description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APP_PROPERTY_AY_SYNC_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0];

        ;WITH PropertyQuery AS (
            SELECT
                CAST(PROPERTY_AY_KEY       AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                CAST(PROPERTY_KEY          AS INT)            AS PROPERTY_KEY,
                CAST(PROPERTY_NAME         AS VARCHAR(100))   AS PROPERTY_NAME,
                CAST(AY                    AS INT)            AS AY_YEAR,
                CAST(AY_NAME               AS VARCHAR(9))     AS AY_YEAR_NAME,
                CAST(RELATIVE_AY           AS INT)            AS AY_REVERSE_ID,
                CAST(AY_BEGIN_DATE         AS INT)            AS AY_START_DATE,
                CAST(AY_BEGIN_DATEID       AS INT)            AS AY_START_DATEID,
                CAST(AY_END_DATE           AS INT)            AS AY_END_DATE,
                CAST(AY_END_DATEID         AS INT)            AS AY_END_DATEID,
                CAST(FLAG_NON_STANDARD     AS INT)            AS NON_STANDARD_FLAG,
                CAST(FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS AS INT)            AS FALL_FLAG_DAYS,
                CAST(MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE    AS INT)            AS MOVE_IN_START_DATE,
                CAST(MOVE_IN_END_DATE      AS INT)            AS MOVE_IN_END_DATE
            FROM [xtemp].[PROPERTY_AY_0]
            WHERE PROPERTY_KEY > 500
               OR PROPERTY_KEY = 0
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] (
            PROPERTY_AY_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, AY_YEAR, AY_YEAR_NAME,
            AY_REVERSE_ID, AY_START_DATE, AY_START_DATEID, AY_END_DATE, AY_END_DATEID,
            NON_STANDARD_FLAG, FALL_FLAG_DAYS, MOVE_IN_START_DATE, MOVE_IN_END_DATE
        )
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_AY_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, AY_YEAR, AY_YEAR_NAME,
            AY_REVERSE_ID, AY_START_DATE, AY_START_DATEID, AY_END_DATE, AY_END_DATEID,
            NON_STANDARD_FLAG, FALL_FLAG_DAYS, MOVE_IN_START_DATE, MOVE_IN_END_DATE
        FROM PropertyQuery;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES_SP
transformations: LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LOCATION_GROUP: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE' ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME] END

SECURITY_LEVEL: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10E' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0VV' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10B' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A14Q' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SH' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10C' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SF' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10J' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1FY' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 -- (Duplicate A0ZT in ATL, retained for fidelity) ELSE [SECURITY_LEVEL] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.PROPERTY_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.EMPLOYEE_F into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Process Type 1)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES];

        -- 2. Processing Logic (CTEs)
        WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            /* Transformation: Emps1
               Logic: Joins Property and Employee data, applies decode/case logic for Locations and Roles.
            */
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                -- ATL: NAME_FIRST || ' ' || NAME_LAST
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                -- ATL: decode logic for Location
                CASE 
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                P.[ADDRESS_1],
                P.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                P.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                P.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                E.[EMAIL],
                E.[DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                -- Security Role Flags
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
                P.[PM_EMAIL],
                P.[RM_EMAIL],
                -- Location Group Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE'
                    ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION_GROUP],
                E.[NAME_FIRST],
                E.[NAME_LAST],
                E.[FLAG_CORPORATE],
                E.[SECURITY_LEVEL],
                P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_MANAGED],
                P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE]
            FROM [xtemp].[PROPERTY_F] P
            LEFT JOIN [xtemp].[EMPLOYEE_F] E 
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE 
                (P.[FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1)
                AND 
                (
                    E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NULL 
                    OR 
                    (E.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' AND E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE')
                )
        ),
        CTE_Security AS (
            /* Transformation: Security
               Logic: Filters for non-null Employee Codes and applies hardcoded Security Level overrides.
            */
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                [LOCATION],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                [EMAIL],
                [DEPARTMENT],
                [TITLE],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
                -- Hardcoded Security Level Overrides
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10E' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0VV' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10B' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A14Q' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SH' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10C' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SF' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10J' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1FY' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 -- (Duplicate A0ZT in ATL, retained for fidelity)
                    ELSE [SECURITY_LEVEL]
                END AS [SECURITY_LEVEL],
                [FLAG_CORPORATE]
            FROM CTE_Emps1
            WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
        )
        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
            [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
            [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE]
        FROM CTE_Security;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

FAS_PROPERTY_CONTACTNAME: CASE WHEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END <> '--' THEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_NAME = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_NAME ELSE p.PM_NAME END <> '--' THEN CASE WHEN p.PM_NAME = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_NAME ELSE p.PM_NAME END ELSE 'Jaleesa Holman' END

FALLBACK_EMAIL: CASE WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'LEGENDS PLACE' THEN 'kmontgomery@peakcampus.com' WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'WOODLANDS OF COLLEGE STATION' THEN 'ereynolds@peakcampus.com' WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END = '--' AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END = '--' THEN 'customercare@peakmade.com' ELSE '--' END

FALLBACK_CONTACTNAME: CASE WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END = '--' AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END = '--' THEN 'Jaleesa Holman' WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'LEGENDS PLACE' THEN 'Kayla Montgomery' WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'WOODLANDS OF COLLEGE STATION' THEN 'Elisha Reynolds' ELSE '--' END
description: DELETE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL_TARGETS.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FAS_EMAIL_TARGETS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Materialize to temp table since Fabric doesn't support CTEs spanning DML statements
    SELECT
        UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME)                                                          AS PROPERTY_NAME_1,
        p.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID                                                             AS PROPERTY_ID,

        CASE
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END <> '--'
                THEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END <> '--'
                THEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END
            ELSE 'customercare@peakmade.com'
        END                                                                             AS FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL,

        CASE
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END <> '--'
                THEN CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_NAME = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_NAME ELSE p.PM_NAME END <> '--'
                THEN CASE WHEN p.PM_NAME = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_NAME ELSE p.PM_NAME END
            ELSE 'Jaleesa Holman'
        END                                                                             AS FAS_PROPERTY_CONTACTNAME,

        p.RM_NAME                                                                       AS PROPERTY_RM,
        p.RM_EMAIL,
        CASE WHEN p.PM_NAME  = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_NAME  ELSE p.PM_NAME  END          AS PROPERTY_MANAGER,
        CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END          AS PM_EMAIL,

        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'UNIVERSITY CENTER'
                 AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END = '--'
            THEN 'Default to Property Address'
            ELSE CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END
        END                                                                             AS PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_NAME,

        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'UNIVERSITY CENTER'
                 AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'SHELBY SMYERS' ELSE p.AM_NAME END = '--'
            THEN 'universitycenter@peakcampus.com'
            ELSE CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END
        END                                                                             AS PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_EMAIL,

        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'LEGENDS PLACE'
                THEN 'kmontgomery@peakcampus.com'
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'WOODLANDS OF COLLEGE STATION'
                THEN 'ereynolds@peakcampus.com'
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END = '--'
                 AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END = '--'
                THEN 'customercare@peakmade.com'
            ELSE '--'
        END                                                                             AS FALLBACK_EMAIL,

        CASE
            WHEN CASE WHEN p.PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN p.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE p.PM_EMAIL END = '--'
                 AND CASE WHEN p.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9823, 9825) THEN 'ssmyers@peakmade.com' ELSE p.AM_EMAIL END = '--'
                THEN 'Jaleesa Holman'
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'LEGENDS PLACE'
                THEN 'Kayla Montgomery'
            WHEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) = 'WOODLANDS OF COLLEGE STATION'
                THEN 'Elisha Reynolds'
            ELSE '--'
        END                                                                             AS FALLBACK_CONTACTNAME,

        CONVERT(INT, FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyyMMdd'))                  AS LASTUPDATED_DATE

    INTO #FAS_Staging
    FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
    WHERE p.FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
      AND p.FLAG_REPORTABLE  = 1;

    DELETE FROM [dbo].[FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL_TARGETS];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL_TARGETS] (
        PROPERTY_NAME_1,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL,
        FAS_PROPERTY_CONTACTNAME,
        PROPERTY_RM,
        RM_EMAIL,
        PROPERTY_MANAGER,
        PM_EMAIL,
        PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_NAME,
        PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_EMAIL,
        FALLBACK_EMAIL,
        FALLBACK_CONTACTNAME,
        LASTUPDATED_DATE
    )
    SELECT
        PROPERTY_NAME_1,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        FAS_PROPERTY_EMAIL,
        FAS_PROPERTY_CONTACTNAME,
        PROPERTY_RM,
        RM_EMAIL,
        PROPERTY_MANAGER,
        PM_EMAIL,
        PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_NAME,
        PROPERTY_ASSISTANT_MANAGER_EMAIL,
        FALLBACK_EMAIL,
        FALLBACK_CONTACTNAME,
        LASTUPDATED_DATE
    FROM #FAS_Staging;

    DROP TABLE #FAS_Staging;

END;

CREATE    PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_Prepare_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

 

    -- If table exists, truncate it to prep for fresh data
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t 
               JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id 
               WHERE t.name = 'FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER' AND s.name = 'dbo')
    BEGIN
        TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER;
    END

    -- If table exists, truncate it to prep for fresh data
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t 
               JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id 
               WHERE t.name = 'FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT' AND s.name = 'dbo')
    BEGIN
        TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT;
    END

    -- If table exists, truncate it to prep for fresh data
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t 
               JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id 
               WHERE t.name = 'FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT_AND_NER' AND s.name = 'dbo')
    BEGIN
        TRUNCATE TABLE dbo.FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT_AND_NER;
    END

END;

-- 2. Create/Alter the Procedure
CREATE   PROCEDURE [control].[InsertIntoPipelineMetadata_Entrata_SP]
    /* -------------------------------------------------------------------------
       USER PROMPTS: Supply these values when running the proc
       ------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
    @SourceName          VARCHAR(255),  -- e.g. 'Entrata'
    @SourceSchema        VARCHAR(255),  -- e.g. 'public'
    @SourceEntity        VARCHAR(255),  -- e.g. 'leasing_agents'
    @WatermarkColumnName VARCHAR(255) = NULL -- Optional: e.g. 'last_updated_on'
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Check if record already exists to prevent duplicates
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [control].[PipelineMetadata_Entrata]
        WHERE SourceName = @SourceName
          AND SourceSchema = @SourceSchema
          AND SourceEntity = @SourceEntity
    )
    BEGIN
        INSERT INTO [control].[PipelineMetadata_Entrata] (
            [Id],
            [SourceName],
            [SourceType],
            [SourceSchema],
            [SourceEntity],
            [SourceQuery],
            [SourceRelativeURL],
            [BronzeContainer],
            [BronzeSchema],
            [BronzeEntity],
            [FullEnable],
            [FullLastLoadDurationSeconds],
            [FullLastLoadRowcount],
            [IncrementalEnable],
            [IncrementalLastLoadDurationSeconds],
            [IncrementalLastLoadRowcount],
            [UniqueColumnName],
            [WatermarkColumnName],
            [WatermarkValue],
            [DW_LastUpdated]
        ) 
        VALUES (
            -- ID Generation (kept generic ID logic from original)
            CONVERT(BIGINT, CONVERT(VARBINARY, CONCAT(NEWID(), GETDATE()))),
            
            @SourceName,
            
            -- Entrata Specific Logic Hardcoded
            'AWS Postgres', 
            
            @SourceSchema,
            @SourceEntity,
            NULL, -- SourceQuery
            NULL, -- SourceRelativeURL
            
            -- Entrata Specific Bronze Target
            'LH_Bronze_Entrata',
            
            -- Bronze Schema matches Source Schema for Entrata
            @SourceSchema,
            
            -- Bronze Entity Naming Convention (E_TABLENAME)
            CONCAT('E_', UPPER(@SourceEntity)),
            
            -- Defaults
            1,    -- FullEnable
            NULL, -- FullLastLoadDurationSeconds
            NULL, -- FullLastLoadRowcount
            0,    -- IncrementalEnable
            NULL, -- IncrementalLastLoadDurationSeconds
            NULL, -- IncrementalLastLoadRowcount
            NULL, -- UniqueColumnName
            @WatermarkColumnName,
            NULL, -- WatermarkValue
            GETDATE()
        );

        PRINT 'Success: Metadata record inserted for ' + @SourceEntity;
    END
    ELSE
    BEGIN
        PRINT 'Skipped: Record already exists for ' + @SourceEntity;
    END
END

-- ============================================================
-- MBR_PARENT_0_UPDATE_SP
-- Deploy to: DB_APP_SUPPORT (run this script in that database)
--
-- Updates PARENT_PROPERTY with current values from PROPERTY_0
-- for active properties (non-dispositioned, non-retail, non-non-property).
--
-- Source:  [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]      (= App_Support.DBO.PROPERTY_0 in ATL)
-- Target:  [dbo].[PARENT_PROPERTY] (= App_Support.DBO.PARENT_PROPERTY in ATL)
--
-- ATL dataflow: MBR_Parent_0_Update
--   ActiveProps:  PROPERTY_0 WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED=0 AND FLAG_NON_PROPERTY=0 AND FLAG_RETAIL=0
--   Query:        INNER JOIN PARENT_PROPERTY with ActiveProps on PROPERTY_KEY
--   Map_Operation: all operations -> update
--   Loader:        auto_correct_using_merge, update-only
-- ============================================================

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MBR_PARENT_0_UPDATE_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- CTE: active properties from PROPERTY_0 (ATL: ActiveProps)
    WITH [CTE_ActiveProps] AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ADDRESS_1],
                [ADDRESS_CITY],
                [ADDRESS_STATE],
                [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                [APARTMENT_COUNT],
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                [BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                [BUILD_YEAR],
                [COMPANY],
                [COUNT],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                [FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [LATITUDE],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                [LONGITUDE],
                [OWNER],
                [OWNER_GROUP],
                [PHONE_1],
                [PM_NAME],
                [STATUS],
                [TIME_ZONE],
                [URL_FACEBOOK],
                [URL_INSTAGRAM],
                [URL_TWITTER],
                [URL_WEBSITE]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
              AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY]  = 0
              AND [FLAG_RETAIL]        = 0
        )

        -- UPDATE PARENT_PROPERTY for rows that have a matching active property
        -- INNER JOIN semantics: only update where match exists (ATL: Map_Operation all -> update)
        UPDATE PP
        SET
            PP.[PROPERTY_NAME]        = S.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            PP.[ADDRESS_1]            = S.[ADDRESS_1],

            PP.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = S.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
            PP.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED]   = S.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            PP.[FLAG_MIXED_USE]       = S.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],
            PP.[FLAG_REPORTABLE]      = S.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            PP.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY]    = S.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
            PP.[LATITUDE]             = S.[LATITUDE],
            PP.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]    = S.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
            PP.[LONGITUDE]            = S.[LONGITUDE],
            PP.[OWNER]                = S.[OWNER],
            PP.[OWNER_GROUP]          = S.[OWNER_GROUP],

            PP.[PM_NAME]              = S.[PM_NAME],
            PP.[STATUS]               = S.[STATUS],
            PP.[TIME_ZONE]            = S.[TIME_ZONE],
            PP.[URL_FACEBOOK]         = S.[URL_FACEBOOK],
            PP.[URL_INSTAGRAM]        = S.[URL_INSTAGRAM],
            PP.[URL_TWITTER]          = S.[URL_TWITTER],

    FROM [dbo].[PARENT_PROPERTY] PP
    INNER JOIN [CTE_ActiveProps] S
        ON PP.[PROPERTY_KEY] = S.[PROPERTY_KEY];

END;

name: MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES_SP
transformations: LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
MILESTONE_TYPE: CASE WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'MAINTENANCE' ELSE 'LEASING' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.EMPLOYEE_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.APP_EMPLOYEES, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES.
sql:
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- =========================================================================
        -- TRUNCATE TARGET TABLES
        -- =========================================================================
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[APP_EMPLOYEES];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES];

        -- =========================================================================
        -- LOAD TARGET 1: APP_EMPLOYEES
        -- =========================================================================
        WITH Emps1_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                CASE
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                E.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM [xtemp].[EMPLOYEE_F] AS E
            LEFT JOIN [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED'
              AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
              -- E.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' was commented out in ATL here
        ),
        Final_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                [LOCATION],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                [TITLE],
                [TITLE] AS [TITLE_CONTROL],
                1 AS [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
                [TITLE_GROUP],
                [STATUS]
            FROM Emps1_CTE
            WHERE [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%LEASING%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINT%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY ASSISTANT MANAGER%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE 'NATIONAL OPERATIONS SPECIALIST'
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[APP_EMPLOYEES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_CONTROL],
            [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [STATUS]
        )
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_CONTROL],
            [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [STATUS]
        FROM Final_CTE;

        -- =========================================================================
        -- LOAD TARGET 2: MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES
        -- =========================================================================
        WITH Emps1_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                CASE
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE E.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                E.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM [xtemp].[EMPLOYEE_F] AS E
            LEFT JOIN [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED'
              AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        Final_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                [LOCATION],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                [TITLE],
                [TITLE_GROUP],
                [STATUS]
            FROM Emps1_CTE
            WHERE [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%LEASING%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINT%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY ASSISTANT MANAGER%'
               OR [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE 'NATIONAL OPERATIONS SPECIALIST'
        ),
        AppEmployees_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                [LOCATION],
                CASE
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'MAINTENANCE'
                    ELSE 'LEASING'
                END AS [MILESTONE_TYPE],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE]
            FROM Final_CTE
            -- The TERMINATED filter is correctly applied here for MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES
            WHERE [STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' 
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [MILESTONE_TYPE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE]
        )
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [MILESTONE_TYPE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE]
        FROM AppEmployees_CTE;

        COMMIT TRAN;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRAN;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_All_Comps_Monday_Projector_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.WEEKS, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_PROPERTY into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_FACT, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FLOORPLAN_FACT.
sql:
CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_All_Comps_Monday_Projector_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Project current week's Comp and Floorplan data based on previous week.
Process Type:   Update/Insert (Refactored to Delete/Insert for Fabric Compatibility)
Fix:            Replaced MERGE with DELETE + INSERT to avoid Msg 24559.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE 1: Get Target Week (Relative Week 0)
        ;WITH WeeksAhead AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY
            FROM [dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE RELATIVE_WEEK = 0
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Get Source Week (Relative Week -1)
        CurrentWeek AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY
            FROM [dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE RELATIVE_WEEK = -1
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Comp Property Reference
        CompProp AS (
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY, 
                OPPORTUNITY, 
                STRENGTH, 
                THREAT, 
                WEAKNESS
            FROM [dbo].[COMP_PROPERTY]
        ),

        -- CTE 4: Filter Latest Parent Data
        MaxParentData AS (
            SELECT 
                CF.*, 
                CP.OPPORTUNITY AS NEW_OPPORTUNITY, 
                CP.STRENGTH AS NEW_STRENGTH, 
                CP.THREAT AS NEW_THREAT, 
                CP.WEAKNESS AS NEW_WEAKNESS
            FROM [dbo].[COMP_FACT] CF
            INNER JOIN CurrentWeek CW ON CF.DATE_KEY = CW.DATE_KEY
            INNER JOIN CompProp CP ON CF.PROPERTY_KEY = CP.PROPERTY_KEY
        ),

        -- CTE 5: Parent Output for Projection
        CompOutput AS (
            SELECT WA.DATE_KEY AS NEW_DATE_KEY, MPD.*
            FROM MaxParentData MPD
            CROSS JOIN WeeksAhead WA
        ),

        -- CTE 6: Filter Latest Floorplan Data
        MaxFloorplanData AS (
            SELECT 
                FF.*, 
                ISNULL(FF.PROPERTY_KEY, FW.PROPERTY_KEY) AS CALC_PROPERTY_KEY,
                ISNULL(FF.PROPERTY_NAME, FW.PROPERTY_NAME) AS CALC_PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT] FF
            INNER JOIN CurrentWeek CW ON FF.DATE_KEY = CW.DATE_KEY
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_WORKSPACE] FW 
                ON FW.FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY = FF.FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY
        ),

        -- CTE 7: Floorplan Output for Projection
        FloorplanOutput AS (
            SELECT WA.DATE_KEY AS NEW_DATE_KEY, MFD.*
            FROM MaxFloorplanData MFD
            CROSS JOIN WeeksAhead WA
        )

        -- TARGET 1: COMP_FACT (Delete/Insert)
        -- 1a. Remove existing records for the target week to prevent duplicates
        DELETE T 
        FROM [dbo].[COMP_FACT] AS T
        INNER JOIN WeeksAhead AS W ON T.DATE_KEY = W.DATE_KEY;

        -- 1b. Insert the projected data
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[COMP_FACT] (
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, APARTMENT_COUNT, AY, BED_COUNT_COMPILED, 
            STATUS, SUMMARY_COMP_OPPORTUNITY, SUMMARY_COMP_STRENGTH, 
            SUMMARY_COMP_THREAT, SUMMARY_COMP_WEAKNESS, UPDATED_BY
        )
        SELECT 
            NEW_DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, APARTMENT_COUNT, AY, BED_COUNT_COMPILED, 
            STATUS, NEW_OPPORTUNITY, NEW_STRENGTH, 
            NEW_THREAT, NEW_WEAKNESS, 'SYSTEM'
        FROM CompOutput;

        -- TARGET 2: FLOORPLAN_FACT (Delete/Insert)
        -- 2a. Remove existing records for the target week
        DELETE T 
        FROM [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT] AS T
        INNER JOIN WeeksAhead AS W ON T.DATE_KEY = W.DATE_KEY;

        -- 2b. Insert the projected data
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT] (
            DATE_KEY, FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY, APARTMENT_COUNT, 
            RENT_CURRENT_TERM_FURNISHED, RENT_CURRENT_TERM_UNFURNISHED, DATE_MODIFIED
        )
        SELECT 
            NEW_DATE_KEY, FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY, APARTMENT_COUNT, 
            RENT_CURRENT_TERM_FURNISHED, RENT_CURRENT_TERM_UNFURNISHED, 0
        FROM FloorplanOutput;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_Comp_Assignment_Projector_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.WEEKS into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_ASSIGNMENTS.
sql:
CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_Comp_Assignment_Projector_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Project upcoming week's comp assignments based on the most recent set.
Process Type:   Update/Insert (Incremental Merge)
Fix:            Removed LASTUPDATED column per Rule 2.1 (Not present in target schema)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE 1: Get Today's Week (Relative Week 0)
        ;WITH Week0 AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY, RELATIVE_WEEK
            FROM [dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE RELATIVE_WEEK = 0
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Get the Future Week (Relative Week 1)
        WeeksAhead AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY, RELATIVE_WEEK
            FROM [dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE RELATIVE_WEEK = 1
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Link Assignments to the current week logic
        WeeksCompAssignment AS (
            SELECT 
                CA.*,
                W.RELATIVE_WEEK
            FROM [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] CA
            INNER JOIN Week0 W ON CA.DATE_KEY = W.DATE_KEY
        ),

        -- CTE 4: Find the latest period for each comp (MaxPerComp)
        MaxPerComp AS (
            SELECT 
                PARENT_COMP_KEY,
                MAX(DATE_KEY) AS MAX_DATE_KEY,
                MAX(RELATIVE_WEEK) AS MAX_RELATIVE_WEEK,
                PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM WeeksCompAssignment
            WHERE RELATIVE_WEEK < 1
            GROUP BY PARENT_COMP_KEY, PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME
        ),

        -- CTE 5: Filter original assignments to just the latest set
        MaxCompAssignment AS (
            SELECT 
                WCA.*
            FROM WeeksCompAssignment WCA
            INNER JOIN MaxPerComp MPC 
                ON WCA.PARENT_COMP_KEY = MPC.PARENT_COMP_KEY 
               AND WCA.DATE_KEY = MPC.MAX_DATE_KEY
        ),

        -- CTE 6: Clone the latest assignments with the future week's date (AssignmentOutput)
        AssignmentOutput AS (
            SELECT 
                MCA.PARENT_COMP_KEY,
                WA.DATE_KEY, 
                MCA.COMP_PROPERTY_KEY,
                MCA.COMP_PROPERTY_NAME,
                MCA.COMPID,
                MCA.ENDCOMPDATE,
                MCA.FLAG_COMP,
                MCA.FLAG_PARENT,
                MCA.FLAG_PARENT_1,
                MCA.MARKET_KEY,
                MCA.MARKET_CITY,
                MCA.MARKET_CITY_STATE,
                MCA.MARKET_STATE,
                MCA.MARKETCOMPMAPID,
                'SYSTEM' AS MODIFIEDBY,
                MCA.MODIFIEDDATE,
                MCA.PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY,
                MCA.PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME,
                MCA.RANK_ORDER,
                MCA.STARTCOMPDATE,
                MCA.SUBJECTID
            FROM MaxCompAssignment MCA
            CROSS JOIN WeeksAhead WA 
        )

        -- Target Logic: Incremental Merge
        MERGE [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] AS TARGET
        USING AssignmentOutput AS SOURCE
        ON (TARGET.PARENT_COMP_KEY = SOURCE.PARENT_COMP_KEY 
            AND TARGET.DATE_KEY = SOURCE.DATE_KEY)
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                TARGET.COMP_PROPERTY_KEY = SOURCE.COMP_PROPERTY_KEY,
                TARGET.COMP_PROPERTY_NAME = SOURCE.COMP_PROPERTY_NAME,
                TARGET.COMPID = SOURCE.COMPID,
                TARGET.ENDCOMPDATE = SOURCE.ENDCOMPDATE,
                TARGET.FLAG_COMP = SOURCE.FLAG_COMP,
                TARGET.FLAG_PARENT = SOURCE.FLAG_PARENT,
                TARGET.FLAG_PARENT_1 = SOURCE.FLAG_PARENT_1,
                TARGET.MARKET_KEY = SOURCE.MARKET_KEY,
                TARGET.MARKET_CITY = SOURCE.MARKET_CITY,
                TARGET.MARKET_CITY_STATE = SOURCE.MARKET_CITY_STATE,
                TARGET.MARKET_STATE = SOURCE.MARKET_STATE,
                TARGET.MARKETCOMPMAPID = SOURCE.MARKETCOMPMAPID,
                TARGET.MODIFIEDBY = SOURCE.MODIFIEDBY,
                TARGET.MODIFIEDDATE = SOURCE.MODIFIEDDATE,
                TARGET.PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY = SOURCE.PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY,
                TARGET.PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME = SOURCE.PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME,
                TARGET.RANK_ORDER = SOURCE.RANK_ORDER,
                TARGET.STARTCOMPDATE = SOURCE.STARTCOMPDATE,
                TARGET.SUBJECTID = SOURCE.SUBJECTID

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                PARENT_COMP_KEY, DATE_KEY, COMP_PROPERTY_KEY, COMP_PROPERTY_NAME, COMPID,
                ENDCOMPDATE, FLAG_COMP, FLAG_PARENT, FLAG_PARENT_1, MARKET_KEY,
                MARKET_CITY, MARKET_CITY_STATE, MARKET_STATE, MARKETCOMPMAPID,
                MODIFIEDBY, MODIFIEDDATE, PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY, PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME,
                RANK_ORDER, STARTCOMPDATE, SUBJECTID
            )
            VALUES (
                SOURCE.PARENT_COMP_KEY, SOURCE.DATE_KEY, SOURCE.COMP_PROPERTY_KEY, SOURCE.COMP_PROPERTY_NAME, SOURCE.COMPID,
                SOURCE.ENDCOMPDATE, SOURCE.FLAG_COMP, SOURCE.FLAG_PARENT, SOURCE.FLAG_PARENT_1, SOURCE.MARKET_KEY,
                SOURCE.MARKET_CITY, SOURCE.MARKET_CITY_STATE, SOURCE.MARKET_STATE, SOURCE.MARKETCOMPMAPID,
                SOURCE.MODIFIEDBY, SOURCE.MODIFIEDDATE, SOURCE.PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY, SOURCE.PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME,
                SOURCE.RANK_ORDER, SOURCE.STARTCOMPDATE, SOURCE.SUBJECTID
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_DATE_BUILDER_SP

sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_DATE_BUILDER_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Truncates and reloads [WEEKS] and [DATES] from [DATE_F].
             Fixed: Uses temp table and correct column names from source.
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[WEEKS];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DATES];

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Create temp table from source
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE] AS [DATE_VAL],
            [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            TRY_CAST([DATE_TIME] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DATE_TIME],
            [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        INTO #DATE_F_TEMP
        FROM [xtemp].[DATE_F];

        -- Insert into WEEKS
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[WEEKS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        )
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE_VAL], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],

        FROM #DATE_F_TEMP
        WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1
          AND [RELATIVE_WEEK] BETWEEN -200 AND 52;

        -- Insert into DATES
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[DATES] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        )
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE_VAL], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        FROM #DATE_F_TEMP
        WHERE [RELATIVE_AY] BETWEEN 0 AND 2;

        DROP TABLE #DATE_F_TEMP;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @Msg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@Msg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_FORCE_RANK_TO_TWENTY_SP
transformations: RANK_ORDER: CASE WHEN [DATE_KEY] >= 20220901 AND [RANK_ORDER] = 0 AND [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] <> [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] THEN 20 ELSE [RANK_ORDER] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_ASSIGNMENTS.
sql:
CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_FORCE_RANK_TO_TWENTY_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Forces Rank_Order to 20 if it's a Zero, but is NOT a Parent property.
Process Type:   Update/Insert (Fabric Compatibility Refactor v2)
Fix:            Uses Local Temp Table (#) to stage data so TRUNCATE can execute safely.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Create a Local Temp Table to stage the corrected data.
        -- Local temps (#) are fully supported in Fabric Stored Procedures.
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#CorrectedAssignments') IS NOT NULL 
            DROP TABLE #CorrectedAssignments;

        CREATE TABLE #CorrectedAssignments
        (
            [PARENT_COMP_KEY] VARCHAR(20),
            [DATE_KEY] INT,
            [RANK_ORDER] INT,
            [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] INT,
            [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME] VARCHAR(100),
            [COMPID] INT,
            [ENDCOMPDATE] INT,
            [FLAG_COMP] INT,
            [FLAG_PARENT] INT,
            [FLAG_PARENT_1] INT,
            [MARKET_KEY] INT,
            [MARKET_CITY] VARCHAR(255),
            [MARKET_CITY_STATE] VARCHAR(255),
            [MARKET_STATE] VARCHAR(2),
            [MARKETCOMPMAPID] INT,
            [MODIFIEDBY] VARCHAR(64),
            [MODIFIEDDATE] INT,
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] INT,
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME] VARCHAR(100),
            [STARTCOMPDATE] INT,
            [SUBJECTID] INT
        );

        -- 2. Populate the Temp Table with the corrected logic.
        INSERT INTO #CorrectedAssignments
        SELECT 
            [PARENT_COMP_KEY],
            [DATE_KEY],
            CASE 
                WHEN [DATE_KEY] >= 20220901 
                     AND [RANK_ORDER] = 0 
                     AND [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] <> [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] 
                THEN 20 
                ELSE [RANK_ORDER] 
            END AS [RANK_ORDER],
            [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
            [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
            [COMPID],
            [ENDCOMPDATE],
            [FLAG_COMP],
            [FLAG_PARENT],
            [FLAG_PARENT_1],
            [MARKET_KEY],
            [MARKET_CITY],
            [MARKET_CITY_STATE],
            [MARKET_STATE],
            [MARKETCOMPMAPID],
            [MODIFIEDBY],
            [MODIFIEDDATE],
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
            [STARTCOMPDATE],
            [SUBJECTID]
        FROM [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS];

        -- 3. Clear the physical table.
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS];

        -- 4. Reload from the Temp Table.
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] (
            [PARENT_COMP_KEY], [DATE_KEY], [RANK_ORDER], [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
            [COMPID], [ENDCOMPDATE], [FLAG_COMP], [FLAG_PARENT], [FLAG_PARENT_1], [MARKET_KEY],
            [MARKET_CITY], [MARKET_CITY_STATE], [MARKET_STATE], [MARKETCOMPMAPID], [MODIFIEDBY],
            [MODIFIEDDATE], [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], [STARTCOMPDATE], [SUBJECTID]
        )
        SELECT * FROM #CorrectedAssignments;

        -- 5. Cleanup
        DROP TABLE #CorrectedAssignments;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_FORCE_RANK_TO_ZERO_SP
transformations: RANK_ORDER: CASE WHEN [DATE_KEY] >= 20220901 AND [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] AND [RANK_ORDER] <> 0 THEN 0 ELSE [RANK_ORDER] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.MS_CA_STAGING, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_ASSIGNMENTS.
sql:
CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_FORCE_RANK_TO_ZERO_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Forces the Rank_Order to Zero for Parent properties.
Fix:            Uses Permanent xtemp table to bypass Msg 15816 (Distributed Processing Error).
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Use a physical staging table in the xtemp schema.
        -- We TRUNCATE it first to ensure it's clean for this run.
        TRUNCATE TABLE [xtemp].[MS_CA_STAGING];

        -- 2. Populate staging with corrected data.
        -- Fabric likes physical-to-physical moves for distributed mode.
        INSERT INTO [xtemp].[MS_CA_STAGING]
        SELECT 
            [PARENT_COMP_KEY],
            [DATE_KEY],
            CASE 
                WHEN [DATE_KEY] >= 20220901 
                     AND [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] 
                     AND [RANK_ORDER] <> 0 
                THEN 0 
                ELSE [RANK_ORDER] 
            END AS [RANK_ORDER],
            [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
            [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
            [COMPID],
            [ENDCOMPDATE],
            [FLAG_COMP],
            [FLAG_PARENT],
            [FLAG_PARENT_1],
            [MARKET_KEY],
            [MARKET_CITY],
            [MARKET_CITY_STATE],
            [MARKET_STATE],
            [MARKETCOMPMAPID],
            [MODIFIEDBY],
            [MODIFIEDDATE],
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
            [STARTCOMPDATE],
            [SUBJECTID]
        FROM [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS];

        -- 3. Clear the target table.
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS];

        -- 4. Reload the target from the physical staging table.
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS]
        SELECT * FROM [xtemp].[MS_CA_STAGING];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: PDM_App_SupportTablesRefresh_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.OWNER_0, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.RVP_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_App_SupportTablesRefresh_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    -- Transaction Handling
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 1. Truncate Target Tables (Refresh Logic)
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Note: OWNER_GROUP_0 is excluded as the ATL logic (WHERE 1=2) indicates it is disabled.
        
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[OWNER_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[RVP_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[RM_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[RMLS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[CONTROLLER_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[ACCOUNTANT_0];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 2. Populate OWNER_0
        --    Logic: Distinct Owner Name and Min Short Name
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[OWNER_0] (
            [OWNER], 
            [OWNER_SHORT]
        )
        SELECT 
            LTRIM(RTRIM(UPPER([OWNER]))) AS [OWNER],
            MIN(UPPER([OWNER_SHORT])) AS [OWNER_SHORT]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [OWNER] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [OWNER];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 3. Populate RVP_0
        --    Logic: Distinct RVP Name and Max Email
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[RVP_0] (
            [RVP_NAME], 
            [RVP_EMAIL]
        )
        SELECT 
            UPPER([RVP_NAME]) AS [RVP_NAME],
            MAX(LOWER([RVP_EMAIL])) AS [RVP_EMAIL]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [RVP_NAME] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [RVP_NAME];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 4. Populate RM_0
        --    Logic: Distinct RM Name and Max Email
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[RM_0] (
            [RM_NAME], 
            [RM_EMAIL]
        )
        SELECT 
            UPPER([RM_NAME]) AS [RM_NAME],
            MAX(LOWER([RM_EMAIL])) AS [RM_EMAIL]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [RM_NAME] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [RM_NAME];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 5. Populate RMLS_0
        --    Logic: Distinct RMLS Name and Max Email
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[RMLS_0] (
            [RMLS_NAME], 
            [RMLS_EMAIL]
        )
        SELECT 
            UPPER([RMLS_NAME]) AS [RMLS_NAME],
            MAX(LOWER([RMLS_EMAIL])) AS [RMLS_EMAIL]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [RMLS_NAME] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [RMLS_NAME];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 6. Populate CONTROLLER_0
        --    Logic: Distinct Controller Name
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[CONTROLLER_0] (
            [CONTROLLER]
        )
        SELECT 
            UPPER([CONTROLLER]) AS [CONTROLLER]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [CONTROLLER] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [CONTROLLER];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- 7. Populate ACCOUNTANT_0
        --    Logic: Distinct Accountant Name
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[ACCOUNTANT_0] (
            [ACCOUNTANT]
        )
        SELECT 
            UPPER([ACCOUNTANT]) AS [ACCOUNTANT]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [ACCOUNTANT] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [ACCOUNTANT];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH;
END;

name: PDM_PROPERTY_0_RENEWAL_BASE_UPDATE_SP
description: Unknown from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into unknown target.
sql:
-- ============================================================
-- PDM_PROPERTY_0_RENEWAL_BASE_UPDATE_SP
-- Deploy to: DB_APP_SUPPORT (run this script in that database)
--
-- Updates BED_COUNT_CUSTOM on PROPERTY_0 using the most recent
-- occupied bed count from UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0.
--
-- Source:  [xtemp].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0]  (= STAGING2.DBO.UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0 in ATL)
-- Target:  [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]                   (= App_Support.DBO.PROPERTY_0 in ATL)
--
-- ATL dataflow: PDM_Property_0_Renewal_Base_Update
--   Filter:     FLAG_ACTIVE_AY=1 AND FLAG_OCCUPIED>0 AND DATE_KEY > 30 days ago (as INT)
--   Operation:  UPDATE only — sets BED_COUNT_CUSTOM = FLAG_OCCUPIED, matched on PROPERTY_KEY
-- ============================================================

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_PROPERTY_0_RENEWAL_BASE_UPDATE_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE: most recent occupied snapshot per property (ATL: RenewalBase -> UPDATER)
        -- Filtered to active AY, occupied units, within last 30 days
        WITH [CTE_RenewalBase] AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            FROM [xtemp].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_ACTIVE_AY] = 1
              AND [FLAG_OCCUPIED]  > 0
              AND [DATE_KEY] > CAST(FORMAT(DATEADD(day, -30, GETDATE()), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT)
        )

        -- UPDATE existing rows only (ATL: auto_correct_using_merge, all operations = 'update')
        UPDATE P
        SET P.[BED_COUNT_CUSTOM] = S.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P
        INNER JOIN [CTE_RenewalBase] S
            ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = S.[PROPERTY_KEY];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PDM_Property_0_Precursor_SP
transformations: NEW_LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID: CASE WHEN T.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 THEN P.[Sub_Property_ID] ELSE 0 END
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.E_PROPERTIES, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_Property_0_Precursor_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    -- Transaction Handling
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Common Table Expressions (CTEs) to replicate Dataflow Logic
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------

        -- 1. ParentProperties: Filter E_PROPERTIES for Parents
        --    Mapping: ODS -> [xtemp]
        WITH CTE_ParentProperties AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID] AS [Sub_Property_ID],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [LOOKUP_CODE]
            FROM [xtemp].[E_PROPERTIES]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_ID] IS NULL 
              AND [PROPERTY_TYPE_ID] IN (1, 4)
        ),

        -- 2. SubProperties: Filter E_PROPERTIES for Subs
        CTE_SubProperties AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID] AS [Sub_Property_ID],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [LOOKUP_CODE]
            FROM [xtemp].[E_PROPERTIES]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_ID] IS NOT NULL 
              AND [PROPERTY_TYPE_ID] IN (1, 4)
        ),

        -- 3. Properties: Merge Parent and Sub streams
        CTE_Properties_Union AS (
            SELECT * FROM CTE_ParentProperties
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM CTE_SubProperties
        ),

        -- 4. PullProperty: Transform (Upper Case Name)
        CTE_PullProperty AS (
            SELECT 
                [Sub_Property_ID],
                UPPER([PROPERTY_NAME]) AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [LOOKUP_CODE]
            FROM CTE_Properties_Union
        ),

        -- 5. Query: Filter Target Table (PROPERTY_0) for records needing update
        --    Logic: WHERE LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID is null
        --    Includes transformation: nvl(SOURCE_SYSTEM, 'ENTRATA')
        CTE_Target_Scope AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                ISNULL([SOURCE_SYSTEM], 'ENTRATA') AS [Calculated_SOURCE_SYSTEM]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] IS NULL
        ),

        -- 6. Join & Calc: Combine Target Scope with Lookup Properties
        --    Logic matches ATL "Join" and "LimitKeys" Views
        CTE_Update_Logic AS (
            SELECT 
                T.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                -- Logic from View "Join": decode(Query.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0, PullProperty.Sub_Property_ID, 0)
                CASE 
                    WHEN T.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 THEN P.[Sub_Property_ID] 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [NEW_LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                -- Logic from View "Join": PullProperty.Sub_Property_ID
                P.[Sub_Property_ID] AS [NEW_LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_ID_ENTRATA],
                -- Logic from View "Join": Query.SOURCE_SYSTEM (which was calculated in CTE_Target_Scope)
                T.[Calculated_SOURCE_SYSTEM] AS [NEW_SOURCE_SYSTEM]
            FROM CTE_Target_Scope T
            INNER JOIN CTE_PullProperty P 
                ON T.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = P.[LOOKUP_CODE]
        )

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Target Load (UPDATE)
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- The ATL Map_Operation is set to "Update".
        -- The "LimitKeys" view restricts the update to specific columns.
        -- FIXED: Date conversion uses CONVERT to YYYYMMDD string before CAST to INT.
        
        UPDATE TGT
        SET 
            TGT.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]             = SRC.[NEW_LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
            TGT.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_ID_ENTRATA] = SRC.[NEW_LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_ID_ENTRATA],
            TGT.[SOURCE_SYSTEM]                 = SRC.[NEW_SOURCE_SYSTEM],
            -- Fix for Msg 529: Convert datetime to YYYYMMDD string, then to INT
            TGT.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED]             = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112) AS INT)
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] TGT
        INNER JOIN CTE_Update_Logic SRC
            ON TGT.[PROPERTY_KEY] = SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Fix for Msg 266: Ensure transaction is rolled back if active
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        -- Throw Error
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH;
END;

name: PDM_to_MS_Parent_SYNC_assignments_only_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PARENT_PROPERTY into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_to_MS_Parent_SYNC_assignments_only_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @JobName VARCHAR(100) = 'COMP_ASSIGNMENTS_SP';
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME = SYSDATETIME();

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 1: Properties (Source: PROPERTY_0)
        -- Filtered by Flag Reportable/Tentative AND Student Only
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        WITH [CTE_Properties] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ADDRESS_1],
                [ADDRESS_CITY],
                [ADDRESS_STATE],
                [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                [APARTMENT_COUNT],
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                [BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                [BUILD_YEAR],
                [COMPANY],
                [COUNT],
                [DATE_CREATED],
                [DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                [FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [LATITUDE],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                [LONGITUDE],
                [MARKET_CITY],
                [MARKET_STATE],
                [OWNER],
                [OWNER_GROUP],
                [PHONE_1],
                [PM_NAME],
                [STATUS],
                [TIME_ZONE],
                [URL_FACEBOOK],
                [URL_INSTAGRAM],
                [URL_TWITTER],
                [URL_WEBSITE]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE 
                (
                    [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 
                    OR ([FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 AND [PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1060)
                )
                AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 2: Parents (Source: PARENT_PROPERTY)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        [CTE_Parents] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY]
            FROM [dbo].[PARENT_PROPERTY]
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 3: Naming / Stripper Logic
        -- Identifies Properties that DO NOT exist in Parents (Left Join IS NULL)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        [CTE_Stripper] AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[ADDRESS_1],
                P.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                P.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                P.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                P.[APARTMENT_COUNT],
                P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                P.[BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                P.[BUILD_YEAR],
                P.[COMPANY],
                P.[COUNT],
                P.[DATE_CREATED],
                P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[LATITUDE],
                P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                P.[LONGITUDE],
                P.[MARKET_CITY],
                P.[MARKET_STATE],
                P.[OWNER],
                P.[OWNER_GROUP],
                P.[PHONE_1],
                P.[PM_NAME],
                P.[STATUS],
                P.[TIME_ZONE],
                P.[URL_FACEBOOK],
                P.[URL_INSTAGRAM],
                P.[URL_TWITTER],
                P.[URL_WEBSITE]
            FROM [CTE_Properties] P
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_Parents] PP ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PP.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE PP.[PROPERTY_KEY] IS NULL
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 4: Weeks Logic
        -- Filters for Relative Week -1 (Last Week) and 0 (Current Week)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        [CTE_Weeks] AS (
            SELECT [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_WEEK] IN (-1, 0)
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 5: CompAssign (Final Source Projection)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        [CTE_SourceData] AS (
            SELECT
                -- Key Construction: PropertyKey.PropertyKey
                CAST(S.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '.' + CAST(S.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [PARENT_COMP_KEY],
                W.[DATE_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                S.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                S.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                20991231 AS [ENDCOMPDATE],
                0 AS [FLAG_COMP],
                1 AS [FLAG_PARENT],
                1 AS [FLAG_PARENT_1],
                S.[MARKET_CITY] AS [MARKET_CITY],
                '--' AS [MARKET_CITY_STATE],
                S.[MARKET_STATE] AS [MARKET_STATE],
                'SYSTEM' AS [MODIFIEDBY],
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112) AS INT) AS [MODIFIEDDATE],
                S.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                S.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                0 AS [RANK_ORDER],
                W.[DATE_KEY] AS [STARTCOMPDATE]
            FROM [CTE_Stripper] S
            CROSS JOIN [CTE_Weeks] W
        )

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- MERGE STATEMENT (Update/Insert)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] AS TARGET
        USING [CTE_SourceData] AS SOURCE
        ON TARGET.[PARENT_COMP_KEY] = SOURCE.[PARENT_COMP_KEY]
           AND TARGET.[DATE_KEY] = SOURCE.[DATE_KEY]

        -- Update existing records if data changed
        WHEN MATCHED AND (
               ISNULL(TARGET.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], -1) <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], -1)
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME], '') <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME], '')
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[ENDCOMPDATE], 0) <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[ENDCOMPDATE], 0)
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[FLAG_COMP], -1) <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[FLAG_COMP], -1)
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[FLAG_PARENT], -1) <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[FLAG_PARENT], -1)
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[MARKET_CITY], '') <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[MARKET_CITY], '')
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[MARKET_STATE], '') <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[MARKET_STATE], '')
            OR ISNULL(TARGET.[MODIFIEDDATE], 0) <> ISNULL(SOURCE.[MODIFIEDDATE], 0)
        ) THEN 
            UPDATE SET 
                TARGET.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY]    = SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                TARGET.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME]   = SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                TARGET.[ENDCOMPDATE]          = SOURCE.[ENDCOMPDATE],
                TARGET.[FLAG_COMP]            = SOURCE.[FLAG_COMP],
                TARGET.[FLAG_PARENT]          = SOURCE.[FLAG_PARENT],
                TARGET.[FLAG_PARENT_1]        = SOURCE.[FLAG_PARENT_1],
                TARGET.[MARKET_CITY]          = SOURCE.[MARKET_CITY],
                TARGET.[MARKET_CITY_STATE]    = SOURCE.[MARKET_CITY_STATE],
                TARGET.[MARKET_STATE]         = SOURCE.[MARKET_STATE],
                TARGET.[MODIFIEDBY]           = SOURCE.[MODIFIEDBY],
                TARGET.[MODIFIEDDATE]         = SOURCE.[MODIFIEDDATE],
                TARGET.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY]  = SOURCE.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                TARGET.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME] = SOURCE.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                TARGET.[RANK_ORDER]           = SOURCE.[RANK_ORDER],
                TARGET.[STARTCOMPDATE]        = SOURCE.[STARTCOMPDATE]

        -- Insert new records
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [PARENT_COMP_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY],
                [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ENDCOMPDATE],
                [FLAG_COMP],
                [FLAG_PARENT],
                [FLAG_PARENT_1],
                [MARKET_CITY],
                [MARKET_CITY_STATE],
                [MARKET_STATE],
                [MODIFIEDBY],
                [MODIFIEDDATE],
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [RANK_ORDER],
                [STARTCOMPDATE]
            )
            VALUES (
                SOURCE.[PARENT_COMP_KEY],
                SOURCE.[DATE_KEY],
                SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                SOURCE.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                SOURCE.[ENDCOMPDATE],
                SOURCE.[FLAG_COMP],
                SOURCE.[FLAG_PARENT],
                SOURCE.[FLAG_PARENT_1],
                SOURCE.[MARKET_CITY],
                SOURCE.[MARKET_CITY_STATE],
                SOURCE.[MARKET_STATE],
                SOURCE.[MODIFIEDBY],
                SOURCE.[MODIFIEDDATE],
                SOURCE.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                SOURCE.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                SOURCE.[RANK_ORDER],
                SOURCE.[STARTCOMPDATE]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH;
END;

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- Schema: [dbo] (Runs inside DB_APP_SUPPORT)
-- Object: PDM_to_MS_Parent_SYNC_comp_only_SP
-- Strategy: INSERT MISSING (Incremental Append to COMP_PROPERTY)
-- Source Logic: PROPERTY_0 records (filtered) that DO NOT exist in PARENT_PROPERTY

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_to_MS_Parent_SYNC_comp_only_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 1: Source Properties (Filtered)
        -- Logic: Matches ATL source filter (Student Only + Reportable/Tentative)
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        WITH [SourceProperties] AS (
            SELECT 
                *
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE 
                (
                    [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 
                    OR ([FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 AND [PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1060)
                )
                AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1
        ),

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        -- CTE 2: Identify "Comp" Candidates
        -- Logic: Records in Source that are NOT in PARENT_PROPERTY
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        [CompCandidates] AS (
            SELECT Src.*
            FROM [SourceProperties] Src
            LEFT JOIN [dbo].[PARENT_PROPERTY] P ON Src.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE P.[PROPERTY_KEY] IS NULL
        )

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        -- Step 1: Insert into COMP_PROPERTY
        -- Logic: Full column mapping from ATL 'CompProperty' View
        -- ---------------------------------------------------------
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[COMP_PROPERTY] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],

            [ADDRESS_STATE],
            [ADDRESS_ZIP],

            [FLAG_AMENITY_BASKETBALL],

            [FLAG_AMENITY_TANNING],
            [FLAG_AMENITY_TENNIS],
