CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] (
        [ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [CUSTOMER_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [AR_CODE_ID],
        [AR_ORIGIN_ID], [AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID], [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
        [AR_TRIGGER_ID], [AR_PROCESS_ID], [AR_PAYMENT_ID], [AR_PAYMENT_SPLIT_ID],
        [ACCRUAL_DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], [ACCRUAL_CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID],
        [CASH_DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], [CASH_CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID],
        [AR_TRANSACTION_ID], [AP_ALLOCATION_ID], [AP_DETAIL_ID],
        [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID], [PERIOD_ID], [DEPENDENT_AR_TRANSACTION_ID],
        [TRANSACTION_DATETIME],
        [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT], [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE], [INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE],
        [POST_MONTH],
        [MEMO],
        [IS_PAYMENT_IN_KIND], [IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT], [IS_REVERSAL],
        [IS_TEMPORARY], [IS_POSTED], [IS_INITIAL_IMPORT],
        [HAS_DEPENDENCIES], [IS_DELETED],
        [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON],
        [INTERNAL_MEMO],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [LASTUPDATED],
        -- Date split columns
        [REPORTING_POST_DATE], [REPORTING_POST_DATEID], [REPORTING_POST_DATETIME],
        [TRANSACTION_DATE], [TRANSACTION_DATEID],
        [POST_DATE], [POST_DATEID], [POST_DATETIME],
        [POST_MONTH_DATE], [POST_MONTH_DATEID], [POST_MONTH_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LAST_RUN_DT],
        [FULLY_ALLOCATED_POST_DATE], [FULLY_ALLOCATED_POST_MONTH]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [property_id], [lease_id], [lease_interval_id],
        [customer_id], [ar_code_type_id], [ar_code_id],
        [ar_origin_id], [ar_origin_reference_id], [ar_origin_object_id],
        [ar_trigger_id], [ar_process_id], [ar_payment_id], [ar_payment_split_id],
        [accrual_debit_gl_account_id], [accrual_credit_gl_account_id],
        [cash_debit_gl_account_id], [cash_credit_gl_account_id],
        [ar_transaction_id], [ap_allocation_id], [ap_detail_id],
        [scheduled_charge_id], [period_id], [dependent_ar_transaction_id],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([transaction_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [transaction_amount], [transaction_amount_due], [initial_amount_due],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([memo] AS VARCHAR(500)),                            -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        -- Boolean bit -> varchar(5)
        CAST([is_payment_in_kind] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_deposit_credit] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_reversal] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_temporary] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_posted] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_initial_import] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([has_dependencies] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_deleted] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        [updated_by], CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by], CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([internal_memo] AS VARCHAR(500)),                   -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
        GETDATE(),
        -- REPORTING_POST_DATE date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- TRANSACTION_DATETIME date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transaction_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transaction_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        -- POST_DATE date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- POST_MONTH date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- UPDATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- CREATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE(),                                               -- LAST_RUN_DT
        -- Single-column date extracts (no triple)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([fully_allocated_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([fully_allocated_post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([lease_generated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([lease_generated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [lease_id], [lease_interval_id], [lease_interval_type_id],
        [lease_ps_product_id], [lease_signature_type_id],
        -- LEASE_START_DATE date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [lease_start_window_id], [lease_status_type_id], [lease_term_id], [lease_type_id],
        [leasing_agent_id], [locked_by],
        -- LOCKED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([locked_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([locked_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([locked_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [max_application_stage_id], [max_application_status_id], [max_application_step_id],
        -- MUTE_FOLLOWUPS_UNTIL: hardcoded NULL per ATL stage 2
        NULL, NULL, NULL,
        UPPER([name_first]),                                     -- UPPER per ATL
        UPPER([name_last]),                                      -- UPPER per ATL
        UPPER([name_middle]),                                    -- UPPER per ATL
        [occupancy_type_id], [optimal_monthly_rent_base], [optimal_monthly_rent_total],
        [originating_lead_source_id],
        -- PRE_QUALIFICATION_APPROVED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- PRE_QUALIFICATION_COMPLETED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_completed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_completed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([pre_qualification_completed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [primary_applicant_id], [primary_phone_number],
        [property_building_id], [property_floor_id], [property_floorplan_id],
        [property_id],
        UPPER([property_name]),                                  -- UPPER per ATL
        -- PROPERTY_TOURED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([property_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([property_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([property_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [property_unit_id], [ps_product_id], [quote_id],
        -- QUOTED_RENT_LOCKED_UNTIL date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([quoted_rent_locked_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([quoted_rent_locked_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([quoted_rent_locked_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [quotes_count], [referring_lease_customer_id],
        CAST([requires_capture] AS VARCHAR(5)),                  -- bit -> varchar
        [response_event_id],
        -- SCREENING_APPROVED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([screening_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([screening_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([screening_approved_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [sem_ad_group_id], [sem_keyword_id], [sem_source_id],
        -- SITE_VISITED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([site_visited_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([site_visited_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([site_visited_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [space_configuration_id], [term_month],
        TRY_CAST([time_to_first_response] AS TIME),
        [total_applicants], [total_guarantors], [total_non_leasing_applicants],
        [total_not_responsible], [total_responsible],
        -- TRANSFERRED_IN_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_in_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_in_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_in_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- TRANSFERRED_OUT_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_out_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_out_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([transferred_out_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [unit_kind_id], [unit_number_cache], [unit_prior_application_id],
        [unit_space_id], [unit_square_feet],
        -- UNIT_TOURED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([unit_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([unit_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([unit_toured_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [unit_type_id], [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        NULL,                                                    -- URL_REFERER (hardcoded NULL per ATL stage 2)
        [vehicle_count], [website_id],
        NULL,
        CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST(NULL AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        NULL,
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES_SP]
AS

-- !! DEPRECATED 2026-04-01: Canonical version migrated to WH_ODS. This staging copy pending cleanup. !!
-- !! Do not modify this copy. Make changes to dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES_SP instead. !!

BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    MERGE [dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] AS Target
    USING (
        SELECT * FROM (
            SELECT *,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2) DESC) AS rn
            FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
        ) d WHERE rn = 1
    ) AS Source ON (Target.ID = Source.id)
    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        Target.CID = Source.cid, Target.PROPERTY_ID = Source.property_id,
        Target.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE = Source.lease_status_type,
        Target.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE = Source.lease_interval_type,
        Target.RESIDENT_BALANCE = Source.resident_balance,
        Target.FINANCIAL_BALANCE = Source.financial_balance,
        Target.TOTAL_BALANCE = Source.total_balance,
        Target.REPAYMENT_BALANCE = Source.repayment_balance,
        Target.DEPOSIT_HELD = Source.deposit_held
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [ID],[CID],[PROPERTY_ID],[REIMBURSING_PROPERTY_ID],[OWNER_ID],
        [PROPERTY_UNIT_ID],[UNIT_SPACE_ID],[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID],
        [PAYMENT_ALLOWANCE_TYPE_ID],[PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID],[TRANSFER_LEASE_ID],
        [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],[TERMINATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],
        [ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],[M2M_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LAST_DELINQUENCY_NOTE_EVENT_ID],[SUBSIDY_CONTRACT_ID],
        [SUBSIDY_CONTRACT_TYPE_ID],[SET_ASIDE_ID],
        [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
        [COMPANY_NAME],[NAME_FIRST],[NAME_MIDDLE],[NAME_LAST],[PRIMARY_PHONE_NUMBER],
        [LEASE_START_DATE],[LEASE_START_DATEID],[LEASE_START_DATETIME],
        [LEASE_END_DATE],[LEASE_END_DATEID],[LEASE_END_DATETIME],
        [MOVE_IN_DATE],[MOVE_IN_DATEID],[MOVE_IN_DATETIME],
        [NOTICE_DATE],[NOTICE_DATEID],[NOTICE_DATETIME],
        [MOVE_OUT_DATE],[MOVE_OUT_DATEID],[MOVE_OUT_DATETIME],
        [COLLECTIONS_START_DATE],[COLLECTIONS_START_DATEID],[COLLECTIONS_START_DATETIME],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],[BUILDING_NAME],[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],[DISPLAY_NUMBER],
        [RESIDENT_BALANCE],[FINANCIAL_BALANCE],[TOTAL_BALANCE],[REPAYMENT_BALANCE],[DEPOSIT_HELD],
        [MOVE_IN_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATE],[MOVE_IN_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATEID],[MOVE_IN_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [MOVE_OUT_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATE],[MOVE_OUT_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATEID],[MOVE_OUT_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE],[TRANSFERRED_ON_DATEID],[TRANSFERRED_ON_DATETIME],
        [FMO_STARTED_ON_DATE],[FMO_STARTED_ON_DATEID],[FMO_STARTED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE],[UPDATED_ON_DATEID],[UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE],[CREATED_ON_DATEID],[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
    ) VALUES (
        Source.id, Source.cid, Source.property_id, Source.reimbursing_property_id, Source.owner_id,
        Source.property_unit_id, Source.unit_space_id, Source.occupancy_type_id,
        Source.payment_allowance_type_id, Source.primary_customer_id, Source.transfer_lease_id,
        Source.lease_status_type_id, Source.lease_interval_type_id, Source.termination_list_type_id,
        Source.active_lease_interval_id, Source.m2m_lease_interval_id,
        Source.last_delinquency_note_event_id, Source.subsidy_contract_id,
        Source.subsidy_contract_type_id, Source.set_aside_id,
        Source.lease_status_type, Source.lease_interval_type,
        UPPER(Source.company_name), UPPER(CAST(Source.name_first AS VARCHAR(100))),
        UPPER(CAST(Source.name_middle AS VARCHAR(100))), UPPER(CAST(Source.name_last AS VARCHAR(100))),
        Source.primary_phone_number,
        Source.lease_start_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.lease_start_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.lease_start_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        Source.lease_end_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.lease_end_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.lease_end_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        Source.move_in_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.move_in_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.move_in_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        Source.notice_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.notice_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.notice_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        Source.move_out_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.move_out_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.move_out_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        Source.collections_start_date,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.collections_start_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(CAST(Source.collections_start_date AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)),
        UPPER(Source.property_name), UPPER(Source.building_name),
        Source.unit_number_cache, Source.display_number,
        Source.resident_balance, Source.financial_balance, Source.total_balance,
        Source.repayment_balance, Source.deposit_held,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.move_in_review_completed_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.move_in_review_completed_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.move_in_review_completed_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.move_out_review_completed_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.move_out_review_completed_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.move_out_review_completed_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.transferred_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.transferred_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.transferred_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.fmo_started_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.fmo_started_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.fmo_started_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.updated_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.updated_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.updated_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(Source.created_on AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(Source.created_on AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST(Source.created_on AS DATETIME2(3))
    );
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS] (
        [ID],[CID],[CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS],[CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS],
        [CREATED_BY],[CREATED_ON],
        [INSTALLMENT_PLAN_ID],
        [INTERVAL_DATETIME],
        [IS_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN],[IS_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED],[LATE_FEE_FORMULA_ID],
        [LEASE_END_DATE],[LEASE_ID],[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],[LEASE_START_DATE],
        [LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID],[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],[LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS],
        [LEASE_TERM_ID],[NEXT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],[OCCUPIED_LENGTH_DAYS],[OCCUPIED_LENGTH_MONTHS],
        [PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],[PRIOR_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],[PROPERTY_ID],
        [UPDATED_BY],[UPDATED_ON],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],[cid],[contract_length_days],[contract_length_months],
        [created_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [installment_plan_id],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([interval_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([is_immediate_move_in] AS VARCHAR(5)),[is_import_consolidated],[late_fee_formula_id],
        TRY_CAST([lease_end_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),[lease_id],[lease_interval_type_id],
        TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [lease_start_window_id],[lease_status_type_id],[lease_term_billing_months],
        [lease_term_id],[next_lease_interval_id],[occupied_length_days],[occupied_length_months],
        [parent_lease_interval_id],[prior_lease_interval_id],[property_id],
        [updated_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped WHERE rn = 1;
END

                )

                SELECT

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [updated_on] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_COMPANY_USERS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS] (
        [ID],[CID],[COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID],[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID],[USERNAME],
        [LAST_LOGIN_DATE],[LAST_LOGIN_DATEID],[LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME],
        [LOGIN_ATTEMPT_COUNT],
        [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATE],[LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATEID],[LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME],
        [ALLOW_WEB_SERVICES],[BLOCK_ADMIN_LOGIN],[EMPLOYEE_PORTAL_ONLY],
        [IS_ADMINISTRATOR],[IS_DISABLED],[IS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USER],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE],[DELETED_ON_DATEID],[DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY],[UPDATED_ON_DATE],[UPDATED_ON_DATEID],[UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],[CREATED_ON_DATE],[CREATED_ON_DATEID],[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],[cid],[company_user_type_id],[company_employee_id],[username],
        CASE WHEN [last_login] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([last_login] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [last_login] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([last_login] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [last_login],
        [login_attempt_count],
        CASE WHEN [last_login_attempt_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([last_login_attempt_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [last_login_attempt_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([last_login_attempt_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [last_login_attempt_on],
        [allow_web_services],[block_admin_login],
        NULL,
        [is_administrator],[is_disabled],[is_active_directory_user],
        CASE WHEN [deleted_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [deleted_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [deleted_on],
        [updated_by],
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([updated_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([updated_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [updated_on],
        [created_by],
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([created_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([created_on] AS DATE),112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [created_on],
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;

    UPDATE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS]
    SET
        [LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST([LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END,
        [LAST_LOGIN_DATE] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [LAST_LOGIN_DATEID] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([LAST_LOGIN_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST([LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END,
        [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATE] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATEID] = CASE WHEN [LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] = CASE WHEN [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST([DELETED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END,
        [DELETED_ON_DATE] = CASE WHEN [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([DELETED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [DELETED_ON_DATEID] = CASE WHEN [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([DELETED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] = CASE WHEN [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST([UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END,
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE] = CASE WHEN [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [UPDATED_ON_DATEID] = CASE WHEN [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] = CASE WHEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST([CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END,
        [CREATED_ON_DATE] = CASE WHEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END,
        [CREATED_ON_DATEID] = CASE WHEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] IS NOT NULL THEN ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8),CAST([CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATE),112) AS INT),0) ELSE NULL END
    ;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_CUSTOMER_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMER_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_CUSTOMER_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMER_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS] (
        [ID], [CID], [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CUSTOMER_ID], [IMPORTANCE_RATING], [LEASE_ID],
        [PREFERENCE_DATE], [PREFERENCE_DATEID], [PREFERENCE_DATETIME],
        [RANKING], [ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID], [ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTION_ID],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [WRITTEN_RESPONSE], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [created_by],

        -- Date split: created_on (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),

        [customer_id], [importance_rating], [lease_id],

        -- Date split: preference_datetime (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([preference_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([preference_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([preference_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),

        [ranking], [roommate_interest_id], [roommate_interest_option_id],
        [updated_by],

        -- Date split: updated_on (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),

        -- long_to_varchar(written_response, 1, 255)
        CAST([written_response] AS VARCHAR(255)),

        GETDATE()

    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        [DEFAULT_EVENT_RESULT_ID], [ASSOCIATED_EVENT_ID], [PS_PRODUCT_ID],
        [OLD_STAGE_ID], [NEW_STAGE_ID], [OLD_STATUS_ID], [NEW_STATUS_ID],
        [COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [CUSTOMER_ID],
        [EVENT_DATETIME],
        [IS_DELETED],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LAST_RUN_DT],
        [CID], [CREATED_BY], [DETAILS], [DO_NOT_EXPORT],
        [IP_ADDRESS], [IS_RESIDENT], [NOTES], [TAGS], [TITLE],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [EVENT_DATE], [EVENT_DATEID],
        [SCHEDULED_DATE], [SCHEDULED_DATEID],
        [SCHEDULED_END_DATE], [SCHEDULED_END_DATEID],
        [SCHEDULED_DATETIME], [SCHEDULED_END_DATETIME],
        [EVENT_HANDLE], [DATA_REFERENCE_ID], [CALENDAR_EVENT_KEY]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [property_id], [property_unit_id], [unit_space_id],
        [event_type_id], [event_sub_type_id], [event_result_id],
        [default_event_result_id], [associated_event_id], [ps_product_id],
        [old_stage_id], [new_stage_id], [old_status_id], [new_status_id],
        [company_employee_id], [lease_id], [lease_interval_id],
        [customer_id],
        [event_datetime],
        [is_deleted],
        -- updated_on date splits
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- created_on date splits
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE(),
        [cid], [created_by], [details], [do_not_export],
        [ip_address], [is_resident], [notes], [tags], [title],
        [updated_by],
        -- event_datetime date splits
        CASE WHEN [event_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([event_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [event_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([event_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        -- scheduled_datetime date splits
        CASE WHEN [scheduled_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([scheduled_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [scheduled_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([scheduled_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        -- scheduled_end_datetime date splits
        CASE WHEN [scheduled_end_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([scheduled_end_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [scheduled_end_datetime] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([scheduled_end_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        [scheduled_datetime],
        [scheduled_end_datetime],
        [event_handle], [data_reference_id], [calendar_event_key]
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_GL_ACCOUNTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_GL_ACCOUNTS];

    ;WITH deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [updated_on] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_GL_ACCOUNTS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_GL_ACCOUNTS] (
        [ID], [CID], [GL_CHART_ID], [CASH_FLOW_TYPE_ID], [GL_ACCOUNT_USAGE_TYPE_ID],
        [GL_ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID], [AP_CODE_ID], [CAM_ALLOWANCE_TYPE_ID], [SYSTEM_CODE],
        [RESTRICT_FOR_AP], [RESTRICT_FOR_GL], [IS_CONFIDENTIAL], [DISABLED_BY],
        [DISABLED_ON_DATE], [DISABLED_ON_DATEID], [DISABLED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DEFAULT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [gl_chart_id], [cash_flow_type_id], [gl_account_usage_type_id],
        [gl_account_type_id], [ap_code_id], [cam_allowance_type_id], [system_code],
        [restrict_for_ap], [restrict_for_gl], [is_confidential], [disabled_by],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [disabled_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [disabled_on]), 0),
        CAST(CAST([disabled_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_by],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [updated_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [updated_on]), 0),
        CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [created_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [created_on]), 0),
        CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [default_gl_account_id]
    FROM deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        [accrual_gl_account_id],
        [cash_gl_account_id],
        [lease_id],
        [property_unit_id],
        [gl_reconciliation_id],
        [ap_detail_id],
        [offsetting_gl_detail_id],

        CASE WHEN [post_month] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [post_month] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        [post_month],

        [is_confidential],

        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3))
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICES_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICES];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICES]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICES] (
        [ID], [PARENT_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID],
        [NAME], [DESCRIPTION], [ORDER_NUM],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_ON],
        [LASTUPDATED], [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],
        [parent_internet_listing_service_id],
        UPPER([name]),
        [description],
        [order_num],
        [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date splits with TZ + serial DATEID
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),

        [created_by],
        -- CREATED_ON date splits with TZ + serial DATEID
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),

        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE(),
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        UPPER([description]),
        NULL,                                                     -- NOTES hardcoded NULL per ATL

        -- start_date splits
        CASE WHEN [start_date] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST([start_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [start_date] IS NOT NULL
             THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST([start_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT)
             ELSE NULL END,

             ELSE NULL END,

    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] (
        [ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [LEASE_ID],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
        [LEASE_TERM_ID], [LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID], [PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [INTERVAL_DATE], [INTERVAL_DATEID], [INTERVAL_DATETIME],
        [LEASE_START_DATE], [LEASE_START_DATEID], [LEASE_START_DATETMIE],
        [LEASE_END_DATE], [LEASE_END_DATEID], [LEASE_END_DATETIME],
        [IS_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED], [IS_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LEASE_START_DATETIME],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [property_id], [lease_id],
        [lease_interval_type_id], [lease_status_type_id],
        [lease_term_id], [lease_start_window_id], [parent_lease_interval_id],
        -- INTERVAL date split (ISNULL per ATL nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([interval_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([interval_datetime] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([interval_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- LEASE_START date split (ISNULL per ATL nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- LEASE_END date split (ISNULL per ATL nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([lease_end_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([lease_end_date] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([lease_end_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [is_import_consolidated],
        CAST([is_immediate_move_in] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date split (ISNULL per ATL nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        -- CREATED_ON date split (ISNULL per ATL nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- Fabric-only passthrough
        TRY_CAST([lease_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE()                                                -- LAST_RUN_DT
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

name: E_LEASE_TERMS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_TERMS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_LEASE_TERMS_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_TERMS];

    WITH CleanData AS (
        SELECT 
            [id], [cid], [lease_term_structure_id], UPPER([name]) AS [name], [term_month],
            IIF([allow_prospect_edit] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [allow_prospect_edit],
            IIF([allow_renewal_edit] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [allow_renewal_edit],
            [lease_term_type_id],
            IIF([is_prospect] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_prospect],
            IIF([is_renewal] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_renewal],
            IIF([is_system] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_system],
            IIF([is_disabled] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_disabled],
            IIF([is_default] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_default],
            IIF([is_unset] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_unset],
            IIF([show_on_website] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [show_on_website],
            IIF([is_commercial] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_commercial],
            [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], [occupancy_type_id],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [id]
                ORDER BY [updated_on] DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_LEASE_TERMS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_TERMS] (
        [ID], [CID], [LEASE_TERM_STRUCTURE_ID], [NAME], [TERM_MONTH],
        [ALLOW_PROSPECT_EDIT], [ALLOW_RENEWAL_EDIT], [LEASE_TERM_TYPE_ID],
        [IS_PROSPECT], [IS_RENEWAL], [IS_SYSTEM], [IS_DISABLED], [IS_DEFAULT], [IS_UNSET],
        [SHOW_ON_WEBSITE], [IS_COMMERCIAL], [DELETED_BY], [DELETED_ON], [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON],
        [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON], [OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE], [DELETED_ON_DATEID], [DELETED_ON_DATETMIE], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [lease_term_structure_id], [name], [term_month],
        [allow_prospect_edit], [allow_renewal_edit], [lease_term_type_id],
        [is_prospect], [is_renewal], [is_system], [is_disabled], [is_default], [is_unset],
        [show_on_website], [is_commercial], [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on],
        [created_by], [created_on], [occupancy_type_id],
        NULL, NULL, NULL,
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM CleanData
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

name: E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    MERGE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES] AS Target
    USING (
        SELECT * FROM (
            SELECT [id],[cid],[property_id],[lease_id],[unit_space_id],
                [move_in_date],[move_out_date],[starts_with_lease],[ends_with_lease],
                [slot_number],[deleted_by],[deleted_on],[created_by],[created_on],
                [DW_PipelineRunId],[DW_LastModified],[DW_PipelineName],
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
            FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES]
        ) d WHERE rn = 1
    ) AS Source ON (Target.ID = Source.id)
    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        Target.CID = Source.cid, Target.PROPERTY_ID = Source.property_id,
        Target.LEASE_ID = Source.lease_id, Target.UNIT_SPACE_ID = Source.unit_space_id,
        Target.STARTS_WITH_LEASE = Source.starts_with_lease,
        Target.ENDS_WITH_LEASE = Source.ends_with_lease,
        Target.SLOT_NUMBER = Source.slot_number,
        Target.MOVE_IN_DATE = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.move_in_date, 112) AS INT), 0),
        Target.MOVE_IN_DATEID = ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.move_in_date), 0),
        Target.MOVE_IN_DATETIME = Source.move_in_date,
        Target.MOVE_OUT_DATE = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.move_out_date, 112) AS INT), 0),
        Target.MOVE_OUT_DATEID = ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.move_out_date), 0),
        Target.MOVE_OUT_DATETIME = Source.move_out_date,
        Target.DELETED_BY = Source.deleted_by,
        Target.DELETED_ON_DATE = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.deleted_on, 112) AS INT), 0),
        Target.DELETED_ON_DATEID = ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.deleted_on), 0),
        Target.DELETED_ON_DATETIME = Source.deleted_on,
        Target.CREATED_BY = Source.created_by,
        Target.CREATED_ON_DATE = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.created_on, 112) AS INT), 0),
        Target.CREATED_ON_DATEID = ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.created_on), 0),
        Target.CREATED_ON_DATETIME = Source.created_on,
        Target.LASTUPDATED = SYSDATETIME()
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [ID],[CID],[PROPERTY_ID],[LEASE_ID],[UNIT_SPACE_ID],
        [MOVE_IN_DATE],[MOVE_IN_DATEID],[MOVE_IN_DATETIME],
        [MOVE_OUT_DATE],[MOVE_OUT_DATEID],[MOVE_OUT_DATETIME],
        [STARTS_WITH_LEASE],[ENDS_WITH_LEASE],[SLOT_NUMBER],[DELETED_BY],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE],[DELETED_ON_DATEID],[DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],[CREATED_ON_DATE],[CREATED_ON_DATEID],[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID],[DW_LASTMODIFIED],[DW_PIPELINENAME],[LASTUPDATED]
    ) VALUES (
        Source.id, Source.cid, Source.property_id, Source.lease_id, Source.unit_space_id,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.move_in_date, 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.move_in_date), Source.move_in_date,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.move_out_date, 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.move_out_date), Source.move_out_date,
        Source.starts_with_lease, Source.ends_with_lease, Source.slot_number, Source.deleted_by,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.deleted_on, 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.deleted_on), Source.deleted_on,
        Source.created_by,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), Source.created_on, 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', Source.created_on), Source.created_on,
        Source.DW_PipelineRunId, Source.DW_LastModified, Source.DW_PipelineName, SYSDATETIME()
    );
END

sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS] (
        [ID], [CID], [PARENT_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
        [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_BUILDING_ID], [PROPERTY_UNIT_ID],
        [UNIT_SPACE_ID], [CUSTOMER_ID], [LEASE_ID], [JOB_PROJECT_ID],
        [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
        [MAINTENANCE_LOCATION_ID], [MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_ID],
        [SUB_MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_ID], [RECURRING_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
        [COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID], [AP_PAYEE_ID], [PS_PRODUCT_ID],
        [MAINTENANCE_TEMPLATE_ID], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPE_ID],
        [ASSET_ID], [ADD_ON_ID], [MAINTENANCE_GROUP_ID],
        [DUE_DATE], [DUE_DATEID], [DUE_DATETIME],
        [IS_RESIDENT_VISIBLE],
        [PRINTED_ON_DATE], [PRINTED_ON_DATEID], [PRINTED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DELETED_BY],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE], [DELETED_ON_DATEID], [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [PRINTED_ON], [DELETED_ON], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_ON],
        [UPDATED_PS_PRODUCT_ID],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [LASTUPDATED], [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [parent_maintenance_request_id],
        [property_id], [property_building_id], [property_unit_id],
        [unit_space_id], [customer_id], [lease_id], [job_project_id],
        [maintenance_priority_id], [maintenance_status_id],
        [maintenance_location_id], [maintenance_problem_id],
        [sub_maintenance_problem_id], [recurring_maintenance_request_id],
        [company_employee_id], [ap_payee_id], [ps_product_id],
        [maintenance_template_id], [maintenance_request_type_id],
        [asset_id], [add_on_id], [maintenance_group_id],
        -- DUE_DATE date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([due_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([due_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([due_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [is_resident_visible],
        -- PRINTED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([printed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([printed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([printed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [deleted_by],
        -- DELETED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        -- CREATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- Fabric-only passthrough datetime columns
        CAST(TRY_CAST([printed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_ps_product_id],
        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
        GETDATE(), GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        [REQUESTED_DATE], [REQUESTED_DATEID], [REQUESTED_DATETIME],
        [SCHEDULED_START_DATE], [SCHEDULED_START_DATEID], [SCHEDULED_START_DATETIME],
        [SCHEDULED_END_DATE], [SCHEDULED_END_DATEID], [SCHEDULED_END_DATETIME],
        [ACTUAL_START_DATE], [ACTUAL_START_DATEID], [ACTUAL_START_DATETIME],
        [COMPLETED_DATE], [COMPLETED_DATEID], [COMPLETED_DATETIME],
        [IGNORE_RESPONSE_TIMES], [IGNORE_RESPONSE_REASON],
        [ESTIMATED_HOURS], [ACTUAL_HOURS], [COST_PER_HOUR],
        [PARTS_DESCRIPTION], [PARTS_COST],
        [EQUIPMENT_DESCRIPTION], [EQUIPMENT_COST], [ADDITIONAL_COST],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
        [UNIT_NUMBER], [MAIN_PHONE_NUMBER], [EMAIL_ADDRESS],
        [REQUIRED_RESPONSE_DATE], [REQUIRED_RESPONSE_DATEID], [REQUIRED_RESPONSE_DATETIME],
        [SMS_CONFIRMED_ON_DATE], [SMS_CONFIRMED_ON_DATEID], [SMS_CONFIRMED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LAST_RUN_DT],
        [ALT_PHONE_NUMBER], [ALT_PHONE_NUMBER_ENCRYPTED],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST_ENCRYPTED], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST_ENCRYPTED],
        [IS_BILLABLE], [IS_PET],
        [MAIN_PHONE_NUMBER_ENCRYPTED], [RESPONSE_DURATION]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [maintenance_request_id],
        [main_phone_number_type_id], [alt_phone_number_type_id],
        [main_message_operator_id], [alt_message_operator_id],
        CAST([problem_description] AS VARCHAR(500)),             -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        CAST([additional_info] AS VARCHAR(500)),                  -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        CAST([location_specifics] AS VARCHAR(500)),               -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        [permission_to_enter],
        -- REQUESTED date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([requested_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([requested_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([requested_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- SCHEDULED_START date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([scheduled_start_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([scheduled_start_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([scheduled_start_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- SCHEDULED_END date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([scheduled_end_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([scheduled_end_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([scheduled_end_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- ACTUAL_START date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([actual_start_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([actual_start_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([actual_start_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- COMPLETED date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([completed_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([completed_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([completed_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([ignore_response_times] AS VARCHAR(5)),             -- bit -> varchar(5)
        [ignore_response_reason],
        [estimated_hours], [actual_hours], [cost_per_hour],
        [parts_description], [parts_cost],
        [equipment_description], [equipment_cost], [additional_cost],
        [customer_name_first], [customer_name_last],
        [unit_number], [main_phone_number], [email_address],
        -- REQUIRED_RESPONSE date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([required_response_datetime] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([required_response_datetime] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([required_response_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- SMS_CONFIRMED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([sms_confirmed_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([sms_confirmed_on] AS DATE)),
        TRY_CAST([sms_confirmed_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        -- CREATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE(),                                               -- LAST_RUN_DT
        -- Fabric-only passthrough columns
        [alt_phone_number], [alt_phone_number_encrypted],
        [customer_name_first_encrypted],
        CAST([customer_name_last_encrypted] AS VARCHAR(500)),    -- long_to_varchar per ATL
        [is_billable], [is_pet],
        [main_phone_number_encrypted], [response_duration]
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

name: E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS] (
        [ID], [CID], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPE_ID],
        [PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
        [PROPERTY_ID], [LEASE_ID], [PROPERTY_UNIT_ID], [UNIT_SPACE_ID],
        [PERIOD_ID], [REPORTING_PERIOD_ID], [EFFECTIVE_PERIOD_ID], [ORIGINAL_PERIOD_ID],
        [OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
        [OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
        [OLD_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID], [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
        [POST_MONTH], [POST_DATE], [REPORTING_POST_MONTH],
        [APPLY_THROUGH_POST_MONTH], [REPORTING_POST_DATE], [APPLY_THROUGH_POST_DATE],
        [LOG_DATETIME], [EFFECTIVE_DATE],
        [NEW_IS_DELETED], [OLD_IS_DELETED],
        [IS_POST_MONTH_IGNORED], [IS_POST_DATE_IGNORED],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_ON],
        [UPDATED_PS_PRODUCT_ID],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [LASTUPDATED], [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [maintenance_request_id], [maintenance_request_type_id],
        [prior_maintenance_request_log_id],
        [property_id], [lease_id], [property_unit_id], [unit_space_id],
        [period_id], [reporting_period_id], [effective_period_id], [original_period_id],
        [old_maintenance_status_id], [maintenance_status_id],
        [old_maintenance_status_type_id], [maintenance_status_type_id],
        [old_maintenance_priority_id], [maintenance_priority_id],
        -- Datetime passthrough (no date splits per ATL)
        TRY_CAST([post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([reporting_post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([apply_through_post_month] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([reporting_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([apply_through_post_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([log_datetime] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        TRY_CAST([effective_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [new_is_deleted], [old_is_deleted],
        [is_post_month_ignored], [is_post_date_ignored],
        [updated_by],
        -- UPDATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        -- CREATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- Fabric-only passthrough
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_ps_product_id],
        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
        GETDATE(), GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

name: E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES_SP

sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES];

    WITH CleanData AS (
        SELECT 
            [id], [cid], [maintenance_status_type_id], [code],
            [name], [description],
            [is_default], [is_published], [order_num], [is_hidden_on_dashboard],
            [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [id]
                ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)
            ) as rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES] (
        [ID], [CID], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [CODE],
        [NAME], [DESCRIPTION],
        [IS_DEFAULT], [IS_PUBLISHED], [ORDER_NUM], [IS_HIDDEN_ON_DASHBOARD],
        [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT 
        [id], [cid], [maintenance_status_type_id], [code],
        UPPER([name]), UPPER([description]),
        [is_default], [is_published], [order_num], [is_hidden_on_dashboard],
        [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM CleanData
    WHERE rn = 1;
END
