sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_PERIODS_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PERIODS];

    WITH CleanData AS (
        SELECT
            [id], [cid], [property_id], [post_month],
            [calendar_days], [financial_days],
            [ar_start_date], [ap_start_date], [gl_start_date],
            [ar_end_date], [ap_end_date], [gl_end_date],
            [ar_locked_on], [ap_locked_on], [gl_locked_on],
            [ar_soft_locked_on], [ap_soft_locked_on], [gl_soft_locked_on],
            [vacancy_cached_on],
            [rebuild_differential_cache], [cache_initialized], [has_cache],
            [has_disabled_proration], [use_market_rent_in_gpr], [has_financial_data],
            [gpr_book_basis],
            [is_ar_rollback], [is_ap_rollback], [is_gl_rollback],
            [is_gpr_posted], [is_initial_import],
            [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on],
            [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) as rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_PERIODS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PERIODS] (
        [ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [POST_MONTH],
        [CALENDAR_DAYS], [FINANCIAL_DAYS],
        [AR_START_DATE], [AR_START_DATEID], [AR_START_DATETIME],
        [AP_START_DATE], [AP_START_DATEID], [AP_START_DATETIME],
        [GL_START_DATE], [GL_START_DATEID], [GL_START_DATETIME],
        [AR_END_DATE], [AR_END_DATEID], [AR_END_DATETIME],
        [AP_END_DATE], [AP_END_DATEID], [AP_END_DATETIME],
        [GL_END_DATE], [GL_END_DATEID], [GL_END_DATETIME],
        [AR_LOCKED_ON], [AR_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [AR_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [AR_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [AP_LOCKED_ON], [AP_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [AP_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [AP_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [GL_LOCKED_ON], [GL_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [GL_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [GL_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON], [AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON], [AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON], [GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE], [GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID], [GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],
        [VACANCY_CACHED_ON], [VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATE], [VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATEID], [VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATETIME],
        [REBUILD_DIFFERENTIAL_CACHE], [CACHE_INITIALIZED], [HAS_CACHE],
        [HAS_DISABLED_PRORATION], [USE_MARKET_RENT_IN_GPR], [HAS_FINANCIAL_DATA],
        [GPR_BOOK_BASIS],
        [IS_AR_ROLLBACK], [IS_AP_ROLLBACK], [IS_GL_ROLLBACK],
        [IS_GPR_POSTED], [IS_INITIAL_IMPORT],
        [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [property_id], [post_month],
        [calendar_days], [financial_days],
        -- ar_start_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ar_start_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ar_start_date]), 0),
        [ar_start_date],
        -- ap_start_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ap_start_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ap_start_date]), 0),
        [ap_start_date],
        -- gl_start_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [gl_start_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [gl_start_date]), 0),
        [gl_start_date],
        -- ar_end_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ar_end_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ar_end_date]), 0),
        [ar_end_date],
        -- ap_end_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ap_end_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ap_end_date]), 0),
        [ap_end_date],
        -- gl_end_date splits
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [gl_end_date], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [gl_end_date]), 0),
        [gl_end_date],
        -- ar_locked_on (original + splits)
        [ar_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ar_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ar_locked_on]), 0),
        [ar_locked_on],
        -- ap_locked_on (original + splits)
        [ap_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ap_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ap_locked_on]), 0),
        [ap_locked_on],
        -- gl_locked_on (original + splits)
        [gl_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [gl_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [gl_locked_on]), 0),
        [gl_locked_on],
        -- ar_soft_locked_on (original + splits)
        [ar_soft_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ar_soft_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ar_soft_locked_on]), 0),
        [ar_soft_locked_on],
        -- ap_soft_locked_on (original + splits)
        [ap_soft_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [ap_soft_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [ap_soft_locked_on]), 0),
        [ap_soft_locked_on],
        -- gl_soft_locked_on (original + splits)
        [gl_soft_locked_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [gl_soft_locked_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [gl_soft_locked_on]), 0),
        [gl_soft_locked_on],
        -- vacancy_cached_on (original + splits)
        [vacancy_cached_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [vacancy_cached_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [vacancy_cached_on]), 0),
        [vacancy_cached_on],
        -- flags
        [rebuild_differential_cache], [cache_initialized], [has_cache],
        [has_disabled_proration], [use_market_rent_in_gpr], [has_financial_data],
        [gpr_book_basis],
        [is_ar_rollback], [is_ap_rollback], [is_gl_rollback],
        [is_gpr_posted], [is_initial_import],
        -- updated_on splits
        [updated_by],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [updated_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [updated_on]), 0),
        [updated_on],
        -- created_on splits
        [created_by],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [created_on], 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [created_on]), 0),
        [created_on],
        -- DW columns
        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM CleanData
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_PROPERTIES_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_PROPERTIES]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES] (
        [ID],[CID],[PROPERTY_ID],[PROPERTY_TYPE_ID],[COMPANY_REGION_ID],
        [TIME_ZONE_ID],[OWNER_ID],[ACCOUNT_ID],[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_IDS],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],[LOOKUP_CODE],[VAULTWARE_NUMBER],
        [MIN_RENT],[MAX_RENT],[MIN_SQUARE_FEET],[MAX_SQUARE_FEET],
        [MIN_BEDROOMS],[MAX_BEDROOMS],[MIN_BATHROOMS],[MAX_BATHROOMS],
        [NUMBER_OF_UNITS],
        [YEAR_BUILT_DATETIME],
        [YEAR_REMODELED_DATE],[YEAR_REMODELED_DATEID],
        [SHORT_DESCRIPTION],[FULL_DESCRIPTION],[DRIVING_DIRECTIONS],
        [TERMINATION_REASON],[TERMINATION_DATETIME],
        [DETAILS],
        [ALLOWS_CATS],[ALLOWS_DOGS],[HAS_AVAILABILITY],
        [IS_DISABLED],[IS_TEST],[IS_MANAGERIAL],[ORDER_NUM],
        [DISABLED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY],[UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [YEAR_BUILT_DATE],[YEAR_BUILT_DATEID],
        [YEAR_REMODELED_DATETIME],
        [TERMINATION_DATE],[TERMINATION_DATEID],
        [DISABLED_ON_DATE],[DISABLED_ON_DATEID],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE],[UPDATED_ON_DATEID],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE],[CREATED_ON_DATEID],
        [YEAR_BUILT],[YEAR_REMODELED],[DISABLED_ON],[UPDATED_ON],[CREATED_ON],
        [MARKETING_NAME],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID],[DW_LASTMODIFIED],[DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],[cid],[property_id],[property_type_id],[company_region_id],
        [time_zone_id],[owner_id],[account_id],
        CAST([occupancy_type_ids] AS VARCHAR(255)),
        UPPER(CAST([property_name] AS VARCHAR(100))),
        CAST([lookup_code] AS VARCHAR(255)),
        CAST([vaultware_number] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        [min_rent],[max_rent],[min_square_feet],[max_square_feet],
        [min_bedrooms],[max_bedrooms],[min_bathrooms],[max_bathrooms],
        [number_of_units],

        -- year_built_datetime = passthrough
        CAST(TRY_CAST([year_built] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        -- year_remodeled date split (ISNULL per nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([year_remodeled] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([year_remodeled] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        CAST([short_description] AS VARCHAR(500)),
        CAST([full_description] AS VARCHAR(500)),
        CAST([driving_directions] AS VARCHAR(500)),
        UPPER(CAST([termination_reason] AS VARCHAR(255))),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([termination_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([details] AS VARCHAR(255)),

        [allows_cats],[allows_dogs],[has_availability],
        [is_disabled],[is_test],[is_managerial],[order_num],

        CAST(TRY_CAST([disabled_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        -- year_built date split (ISNULL per nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([year_built] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([year_built] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        -- year_remodeled_datetime = passthrough
        CAST(TRY_CAST([year_remodeled] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        -- termination_date split (ISNULL per nvl)
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([termination_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([termination_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        -- disabled_on split
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([disabled_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([disabled_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        -- updated_on split
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        -- created_on split
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)), 0),

        -- Fabric-only passthrough datetime columns
        CAST(TRY_CAST([year_built] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([year_remodeled] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([disabled_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        CAST([marketing_name] AS VARCHAR(8000)),
        NULL,NULL,NULL,
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped WHERE rn = 1;
END

name: E_PROPERTY_DETAILS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_PROPERTY_DETAILS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS_SP]
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @DateTime_Start DATETIME2(3) = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- TARGET is UPPERCASE. SOURCE is lowercase.
    MERGE [dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS] AS Target
    USING (
        SELECT * FROM (
            SELECT 
                id, cid, property_id, property_website_id, corporate_website_id, route_id, 
                managerial_property_id, job_cash_flow_frequency_id, ap_payee_id, customer_id, 
                CAST(community_website_uri AS VARCHAR(500)) AS community_website_uri,
                CAST(corporate_website_uri AS VARCHAR(500)) AS corporate_website_uri,
                show_appointment_results, show_lead_outreach_results, show_renewal_outreach_results, 
                show_collections_results, 
                CAST(parking_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS parking_policy,
                CAST(pet_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS pet_policy,
                CAST(smoking_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS smoking_policy,
                CAST(renter_insurance_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS renter_insurance_policy,
                CAST(school_description AS VARCHAR(500)) AS school_description,
                allows_smoking, is_featured, update_vacancy_amenities,
                
                -- Date Calculations mapping from lowercase source
                ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS charges_last_posted_on_date,
                ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS charges_last_posted_on_dateid,
                charges_last_posted_on AS charges_last_posted_on_datetime,
                
                ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS late_fee_last_posted_on_date,
                ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid,
                late_fee_last_posted_on AS late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime,
                
                updated_by,
                ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS updated_on_date,
                ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS updated_on_dateid,
                updated_on AS updated_on_datetime,
                
                created_by,
                ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), created_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS created_on_date,
                ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', created_on), 0) AS created_on_dateid,
                created_on AS created_on_datetime,

                -- DEDUPLICATION LOGIC
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY id 
                    ORDER BY updated_on DESC, created_on DESC
                ) AS row_num
                
            FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS]
            WHERE (@CID IS NULL OR cid = @CID) 
              AND (@DateTime_Start IS NULL OR updated_on > @DateTime_Start)
        ) AS DedupedSource
        WHERE row_num = 1
    ) AS Source
    ON (Target.ID = Source.id)

    WHEN MATCHED THEN 
        UPDATE SET 
            CID = Source.cid, 
            PROPERTY_ID = Source.property_id, 
            PROPERTY_WEBSITE_ID = Source.property_website_id,
            CORPORATE_WEBSITE_ID = Source.corporate_website_id, 
            ROUTE_ID = Source.route_id,

            Source.updated_by, Source.updated_on_date, Source.updated_on_dateid, Source.updated_on_datetime, 
            Source.created_by, Source.created_on_date, Source.created_on_dateid, Source.created_on_datetime, 
            SYSDATETIME()
        );

    UPDATE [dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES_SP

sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
            BEGIN
                SET NOCOUNT ON;
                TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES];

                WITH CleanData AS (
                    SELECT 
                        [id], [cid], [property_id], [email_address_type_id], [marketing_name], LOWER([email_address]) AS [email_address], [is_published], [order_num], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                            PARTITION BY [id]
                            ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)
                        ) as rn
                    FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES]
                )
                INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES] ([ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [EMAIL_ADDRESS_TYPE_ID], [MARKETING_NAME], [EMAIL_ADDRESS], [IS_PUBLISHED], [ORDER_NUM], [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME], [LASTUPDATED])
                SELECT 
                    [id], [cid], [property_id], [email_address_type_id], [marketing_name], [email_address], [is_published], [order_num], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [CREATED_ON_DATE],
                    ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE)), 0) AS [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                    TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATE],
                    ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE)), 0) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATEID],
                    TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME], 
                    SYSDATETIME()
                FROM CleanData
                WHERE rn = 1; 
            END

        [USE_COUNT],
        [DELETED_BY],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE],
        [DELETED_ON_DATEID],
        [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATEID],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE],
        [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
        [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],
        [cid],
        [property_group_type_id],
        LEFT([system_code], 20),
        LEFT(UPPER([name]), 200),
        [is_system],
        [order_num],
        [use_count],
        [deleted_by],
        CASE WHEN [deleted_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [deleted_on] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [updated_by],
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [created_by],
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [created_on] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        CAST(CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
            BEGIN
                SET NOCOUNT ON;
                TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS];

                WITH CleanData AS (
                    SELECT 
                        [id], [cid], [property_id], [property_hour_type_id], [office_hours], [open_time], [close_time], [day], IIF([by_appointment_only] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [by_appointment_only], IIF([is_published] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [is_published], [order_num], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                            PARTITION BY [id]
                            ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)
                        ) as rn
                    FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS]
                )
                INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS] ([ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_HOUR_TYPE_ID], [OFFICE_HOURS], [OPEN_TIME], [CLOSE_TIME], [DAY], [BY_APPOINTMENT_ONLY], [IS_PUBLISHED], [ORDER_NUM], [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME], [LASTUPDATED])
                SELECT 
                    [id], [cid], [property_id], [property_hour_type_id], [office_hours], [open_time], [close_time], [day], [by_appointment_only], [is_published], [order_num], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], 
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [CREATED_ON_DATE],
                    ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE)), 0) AS [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                    TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATE],
                    ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE)), 0) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATEID],
                    TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME], 
                    SYSDATETIME()
                FROM CleanData
                WHERE rn = 1; 
            END

description: INSERT from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_RATES (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_RATES_SP] (
    @DateTime_Start DATETIME2(3)
)
AS
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Logical Transformation via CTE
        -- Mapping ATL functions: to_char -> CONVERT, date_diff -> DATEDIFF
        WITH CTE_Query_4 AS (
            SELECT 
                ID = rates.id,
                CID = rates.cid,
                PROPERTY_ID = rates.property_id,
                PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID = rates.property_floorplan_id,
                UNIT_TYPE_ID = rates.unit_type_id,
                UNIT_SPACE_ID = rates.unit_space_id,
                AR_CASCADE_ID = rates.ar_cascade_id,
                AR_CASCADE_REFERENCE_ID = rates.ar_cascade_reference_id,
                AR_ORIGIN_ID = rates.ar_origin_id,
                AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID = rates.ar_origin_reference_id,
                AR_TRIGGER_ID = rates.ar_trigger_id,
                AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = rates.ar_code_type_id,
                AR_CODE_ID = rates.ar_code_id,
                LEASE_TERM_ID = rates.lease_term_id,
                LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID = rates.lease_start_window_id,
                AR_FORMULA_ID = rates.ar_formula_id,
                AR_FORMULA_REFERENCE_ID = rates.ar_formula_reference_id,
                SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID = rates.space_configuration_id,
                CUSTOMER_RELATIONSHIP_ID = rates.customer_relationship_id,
                OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID = rates.occupancy_type_id,
                OCCUPANCY_TYPE_REFERENCE_ID = rates.occupancy_type_reference_id,
                OCCUPANCY_TYPE_OBJECT_ID = rates.occupancy_type_object_id,
                LEASE_TERM_MONTHS = rates.lease_term_months,
                WINDOW_START_DAYS = rates.window_start_days,
                WINDOW_END_DAYS = rates.window_end_days,
                RATE_AMOUNT = rates.rate_amount,
                RATE_INCREASE_INCREMENT = rates.rate_increase_increment,
                MONTH_TO_MONTH_MULTIPLIER = rates.month_to_month_multiplier,
                MAX_AMOUNT = rates.max_amount,
                MIN_AMOUNT = rates.min_amount,
                NORMALIZED_AMOUNT = rates.normalized_amount,
                NORMALIZED_PERCENT = rates.normalized_percent,
                RATE_INTERVAL_START = rates.rate_interval_start,
                RATE_INTERVAL_OCCURANCES = rates.rate_interval_occurances,
                RATE_INTERVAL_OFFSET = rates.rate_interval_offset,
                SHOW_ON_WEBSITE = rates.show_on_website,
                SHOW_IN_ENTRATA = rates.show_in_entrata,
                IS_RENEWAL = rates.is_renewal,
                IS_OPTIONAL = rates.is_optional,
                IS_ALLOWED = rates.is_allowed,
                WINDOW_START_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.window_start_date, 112) AS INT),
                WINDOW_START_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.window_start_date),
                WINDOW_START_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.window_start_date AS DATETIME2(3)),
                WINDOW_END_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.window_end_date, 112) AS INT),
                WINDOW_END_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.window_end_date),
                WINDOW_END_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.window_end_date AS DATETIME2(3)),
                EFFECTIVE_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.effective_date, 112) AS INT),
                EFFECTIVE_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.effective_date),
                EFFECTIVE_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.effective_date AS DATETIME2(3)),
                DEACTIVATION_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.deactivation_date, 112) AS INT),
                DEACTIVATION_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.deactivation_date),
                DEACTIVATION_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.deactivation_date AS DATETIME2(3)),
                UPDATED_BY = rates.updated_by,
                UPDATED_ON_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.updated_on, 112) AS INT),
                UPDATED_ON_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.updated_on),
                UPDATED_ON_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.updated_on AS DATETIME2(3)),
                CREATED_BY = rates.created_by,
                CREATED_ON_DATE = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), rates.created_on, 112) AS INT),
                CREATED_ON_DATEID = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01 00:00:00', rates.created_on),
                CREATED_ON_DATETIME = TRY_CAST(rates.created_on AS DATETIME2(3))
            FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_RATES] AS rates
            WHERE rates.updated_on > @DateTime_Start
        )

        -- 2. Map Operation: DELETE existing keys
        -- Use 3-part name for the Target table
        DELETE T
        FROM [dbo].[E_RATES] AS T
        INNER JOIN CTE_Query_4 AS S ON T.ID = S.ID;

        -- 3. Map Operation: INSERT new/updated rows
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[E_RATES] (
            ID, CID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID, UNIT_TYPE_ID, UNIT_SPACE_ID,
            AR_CASCADE_ID, AR_CASCADE_REFERENCE_ID, AR_ORIGIN_ID, AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID,
            AR_TRIGGER_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_ID, LEASE_TERM_ID, LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID,
            AR_FORMULA_ID, AR_FORMULA_REFERENCE_ID, SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID,
            CUSTOMER_RELATIONSHIP_ID, OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID, OCCUPANCY_TYPE_REFERENCE_ID,
            OCCUPANCY_TYPE_OBJECT_ID, LEASE_TERM_MONTHS, WINDOW_START_DAYS, WINDOW_END_DAYS,
            RATE_AMOUNT, RATE_INCREASE_INCREMENT, MONTH_TO_MONTH_MULTIPLIER, MAX_AMOUNT,
            MIN_AMOUNT, NORMALIZED_AMOUNT, NORMALIZED_PERCENT, RATE_INTERVAL_START,
            RATE_INTERVAL_OCCURANCES, RATE_INTERVAL_OFFSET, SHOW_ON_WEBSITE, SHOW_IN_ENTRATA,
            IS_RENEWAL, IS_OPTIONAL, IS_ALLOWED, WINDOW_START_DATE, WINDOW_START_DATEID,
            WINDOW_START_DATETIME, WINDOW_END_DATE, WINDOW_END_DATEID, WINDOW_END_DATETIME,
            EFFECTIVE_DATE, EFFECTIVE_DATEID, EFFECTIVE_DATETIME, DEACTIVATION_DATE,
            DEACTIVATION_DATEID, DEACTIVATION_DATETIME, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            UPDATED_ON_DATEID, UPDATED_ON_DATETIME, CREATED_BY, CREATED_ON_DATE,
            CREATED_ON_DATEID, CREATED_ON_DATETIME
        )
        SELECT 
            ID, CID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID, UNIT_TYPE_ID, UNIT_SPACE_ID,
            AR_CASCADE_ID, AR_CASCADE_REFERENCE_ID, AR_ORIGIN_ID, AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID,
            AR_TRIGGER_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_ID, LEASE_TERM_ID, LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID,
            AR_FORMULA_ID, AR_FORMULA_REFERENCE_ID, SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID,
            CUSTOMER_RELATIONSHIP_ID, OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID, OCCUPANCY_TYPE_REFERENCE_ID,
            OCCUPANCY_TYPE_OBJECT_ID, LEASE_TERM_MONTHS, WINDOW_START_DAYS, WINDOW_END_DAYS,
            RATE_AMOUNT, RATE_INCREASE_INCREMENT, MONTH_TO_MONTH_MULTIPLIER, MAX_AMOUNT,
            MIN_AMOUNT, NORMALIZED_AMOUNT, NORMALIZED_PERCENT, RATE_INTERVAL_START,
            RATE_INTERVAL_OCCURANCES, RATE_INTERVAL_OFFSET, SHOW_ON_WEBSITE, SHOW_IN_ENTRATA,
            IS_RENEWAL, IS_OPTIONAL, IS_ALLOWED, WINDOW_START_DATE, WINDOW_START_DATEID,
            WINDOW_START_DATETIME, WINDOW_END_DATE, WINDOW_END_DATEID, WINDOW_END_DATETIME,
            EFFECTIVE_DATE, EFFECTIVE_DATEID, EFFECTIVE_DATETIME, DEACTIVATION_DATE,
            DEACTIVATION_DATEID, DEACTIVATION_DATETIME, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            UPDATED_ON_DATEID, UPDATED_ON_DATETIME, CREATED_BY, CREATED_ON_DATE,
            CREATED_ON_DATEID, CREATED_ON_DATETIME
        FROM CTE_Query_4;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

                        [id], [cid], [referrer_type_id], UPPER([name_first]) AS [name_first], UPPER([name_last]) AS [name_last], [company_name], LOWER([email]) AS [email], [phone], [details], [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], IIF([enable_portal_access] = 'True', '1', '0') AS [enable_portal_access], [interaction_cutoff_stage_status_id], [customer_id], 
                        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                            PARTITION BY [id]
                            ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)
                        ) as rn
                    FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_REFERRERS]
                )
                INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_REFERRERS] ([ID], [CID], [REFERRER_TYPE_ID], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST], [COMPANY_NAME], [EMAIL], [PHONE], [DETAILS], [DELETED_BY], [DELETED_ON], [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON], [ENABLE_PORTAL_ACCESS], [INTERACTION_CUTOFF_STAGE_STATUS_ID], [CUSTOMER_ID], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME], [DELETED_ON_DATE], [DELETED_ON_DATETIME], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME], [LASTUPDATED])
                SELECT 
                    [id], [cid], [referrer_type_id], [name_first], [name_last], [company_name], LOWER([email]) AS [email], [phone], [details], [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on], [created_by], [created_on], [enable_portal_access], [interaction_cutoff_stage_status_id], [customer_id], 
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATE],
                    TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
                    ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DELETED_ON_DATE],
                    TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
                    TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [CREATED_ON_DATETIME], 
                    SYSDATETIME()
                FROM CleanData
                WHERE rn = 1; 
            END

name: E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2];

    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2] (
        [ID],
        [CID],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON],
        [DEDUCTIBLE],
        [EFFECTIVE_DATE],
        [EFFECTIVE_DATEID],
        [EFFECTIVE_DATETIME],
        [END_DATE],
        [END_DATEID],
        [END_DATETIME],
        [INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME],
        [INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
        [LIABILITY_LIMIT],
        [PERSONAL_LIMIT],
        [POLICY_NUMBER],
        [PREMIUM_AMOUNT],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],
        [cid],
        [created_by],
        [created_on],
        [deductible],
        CASE WHEN [effective_date] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST([effective_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [effective_date] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST([effective_date] AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        [effective_date],
        CASE WHEN [end_date] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST([end_date] AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        CASE WHEN [end_date] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST([end_date] AS DATE)) ELSE NULL END,
        [end_date],
        LEFT([insurance_carrier_name], 100),
        [insurance_policy_status_type_id],
        [liability_limit],
        [personal_limit],
        LEFT([policy_number], 128),
        [premium_amount],
        [updated_by],
        CASE WHEN [updated_on] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT) ELSE NULL END,
        [updated_on],
        NULL
    FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2];
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] (
        [ID],[AR_CASCADE_ID],[AR_CASCADE_REFERENCE_ID],[AR_CODE_ID],[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
        [AR_FORMULA_ID],[AR_FORMULA_REFERENCE_ID],[AR_ORIGIN_ID],[AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
        [AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],[AR_TRIGGER_ID],
        [CHARGE_AMOUNT],[CHARGE_END_DATE],[CHARGE_MULTIPLIER_AMOUNT],[CHARGE_PERCENT],
        [CHARGE_START_DATE],[CID],[CREATED_BY],[CREATED_ON],
        [CUSTOMER_ID],[DELETED_BY],[DELETED_ON],
        [ENDS_WITH_MOVE_OUT],[INSTALLMENT_ID],[INSTALLMENT_PLAN_ID],
        [IS_CACHED_TO_LEASE],[IS_UNSELECTED_QUOTE],
        [LAST_POSTED_ON],[LEASE_ASSOCIATION_ID],[LEASE_ID],[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID],[LEASE_TERM_ID],[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],[MEMO],
        [MONTH_TO_MONTH_AMOUNT],[MONTH_TO_MONTH_FEE],[MONTH_TO_MONTH_MULTIPLIER],
        [NORMALIZED_AMOUNT],[NORMALIZED_PERCENT],
        [PARENT_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],[POSTED_THROUGH_DATE],[PROPERTY_ID],[QUOTE_ID],
        [RATE_ID],[RATE_INTERVAL_OCCURANCES],[RATE_INTERVAL_OFFSET],[RATE_INTERVAL_START],
        [RATE_LOG_ID],[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_LOG_TYPE_ID],[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID],
        [STARTS_WITH_LEASE],[UPDATED_BY],[UPDATED_ON],
        [TOTAL_VALUE],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID],[DW_LASTMODIFIED],[DW_PIPELINENAME],[LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],[ar_cascade_id],[ar_cascade_reference_id],[ar_code_id],[ar_code_type_id],
        [ar_formula_id],[ar_formula_reference_id],[ar_origin_id],[ar_origin_object_id],
        [ar_origin_reference_id],[ar_trigger_id],
        [charge_amount],TRY_CAST([charge_end_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [charge_multiplier_amount],[charge_percent],
        TRY_CAST([charge_start_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [cid],[created_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [customer_id],[deleted_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([ends_with_move_out] AS VARCHAR(5)),[installment_id],[installment_plan_id],
        CAST([is_cached_to_lease] AS VARCHAR(5)),CAST([is_unselected_quote] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        TRY_CAST([last_posted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [lease_association_id],[lease_id],[lease_interval_id],
        [lease_start_window_id],[lease_term_id],[lease_term_months],
        CAST([memo] AS VARCHAR(500)),
        [month_to_month_amount],[month_to_month_fee],[month_to_month_multiplier],
        [normalized_amount],[normalized_percent],
        [parent_scheduled_charge_id],
        TRY_CAST([posted_through_date] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [property_id],[quote_id],
        CAST([rate_id] AS DECIMAL(18,0)),
        [rate_interval_occurances],[rate_interval_offset],[rate_interval_start],
        CAST([rate_log_id] AS DECIMAL(18,0)),
        [scheduled_charge_log_type_id],[scheduled_charge_type_id],
        CAST([starts_with_lease] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        [updated_by],
        CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST([total_value] AS VARCHAR(8000)),
        [DW_PipelineRunId],[DW_LastModified],[DW_PipelineName],GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_SCREENING_APPLICANT_RESULTS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[E_SCREENING_APPLICANT_RESULTS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT
            [id], [cid], [property_id], [screening_application_request_id],
            [application_id], [applicant_id], [screening_recommendation_type_id],
            TRY_CAST([adverse_action_letter_sent_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [adverse_action_letter_sent_on],
            [updated_by], TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [updated_on],
            [created_by], TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [created_on],
            [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY [DW_LastModified] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_SCREENING_APPLICANT_RESULTS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[E_SCREENING_APPLICANT_RESULTS]
        ([ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [SCREENING_APPLICATION_REQUEST_ID],
         [APPLICATION_ID], [APPLICANT_ID], [SCREENING_RECOMMENDATION_TYPE_ID],
         [ADVERSE_ACTION_LETTER_SENT_ON],
         [ADVERSE_ACTION_LETTER_SENT_ON_DATE], [ADVERSE_ACTION_LETTER_SENT_ON_DATEID], [ADVERSE_ACTION_LETTER_SENT_ON_DATETIME],
         [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON],
         [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
         [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON],
         [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
         [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_PIPELINENAME], [LASTUPDATED])
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [property_id], [screening_application_request_id],
        [application_id], [applicant_id], [screening_recommendation_type_id],
        [adverse_action_letter_sent_on],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [adverse_action_letter_sent_on], 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [adverse_action_letter_sent_on]),
        [adverse_action_letter_sent_on],
        [updated_by], [updated_on],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [updated_on], 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [updated_on]),
        [updated_on],
        [created_by], [created_on],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [created_on], 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [created_on]),
        [created_on],
        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_PipelineName], SYSDATETIME()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_SPECIALS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPECIALS];

    WITH Deduped AS (
        SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [id] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_SPECIALS]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPECIALS] (
        [ID],
        [CID],
        [COUPON_CODE],
        [COUPON_CODE_REQUIRED],
        [CREATED_BY],
        [CREATED_ON],
        [DELETED_BY],
        [DELETED_ON],
        [DESCRIPTION],
        [END_DATE],
        [GIFT_VALUE],
        [HIDE_END_DATE],
        [IS_ACTIVE],
        [IS_DEFAULT],
        [IS_SYSTEM],
        [LIMIT_QUANTITY],
        [MAX_DAYS_TO_LEASE_START],
        [MIN_DAYS_TO_LEASE_START],
        [NAME],
        [NOTES],
        [ORDER_NUM],
        [QUANTITY_BUDGETED],
        [QUANTITY_REMAINING],
        [RECURRING_PAYMENT_DAY_RESTRICTION],
        [SHOW_ON_WEBSITE],
        [SPECIAL_GROUP_ID],
        [SPECIAL_RECIPIENT_ID],
        [SPECIAL_TYPE_ID],
        [START_DATE],
        [UPDATED_BY],
        [UPDATED_ON],
        [LEASE_TERM_IDS],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id],
        [cid],
        [coupon_code],
        [coupon_code_required],
        [created_by],
        [created_on],
        [deleted_by],
        [deleted_on],
        [description],
        [end_date],
        [gift_value],
        [hide_end_date],
        [is_active],
        [is_default],
        [is_system],
        [limit_quantity],
        [max_days_to_lease_start],
        [min_days_to_lease_start],
        [name],
        [notes],
        [order_num],
        [quantity_budgeted],
        [quantity_remaining],
        [recurring_payment_day_restriction],
        [show_on_website],
        [special_group_id],
        [special_recipient_id],
        [special_type_id],
        [start_date],
        [updated_by],
        [updated_on],
        [lease_term_ids],
        GETDATE()
    FROM Deduped
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        [REFERENCE_ID], [REFERENCE_LOG_ID],

        -- Raw datetime passthrough columns
        [MOVE_OUT_DATE], [RESERVE_UNTIL], [AVAILABLE_ON],
        [MAKE_READY_DATE], [VACATED_ON],
        [DELETED_BY], [DELETED_ON],
        [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON],
        [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON],
        [DW_PIPELINERUNID], [DW_LASTMODIFIED], [DW_PIPELINENAME],
        [LASTUPDATED],
        -- Date split columns
        [AVAILABLE_ON_DATE], [AVAILABLE_ON_DATEID], [AVAILABLE_ON_DATETIME],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE], [DELETED_ON_DATEID], [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],

    )

        [property_unit_id], [unit_space_log_type_id], [unit_space_status_type_id],
        [unit_exclusion_reason_type_id], [occupancy_type_id], [late_fee_formula_id],
        [application_lease_id], [hold_lease_id], [future_lease_id],
        [current_lease_id], [past_lease_id],
        [rate_adjustment_type_id], [rate_adjustment_unit_id],
        [reference_id], [reference_log_id],

        [marketing_unit_number], [marketing_unit_number_cache],
        [unit_number], [unit_number_cache], [space_number],

        [budgeted_base_rent], [budgeted_amenity_rent], [budgeted_rent],
        [rate_adjustment_amount],

        CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_start_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        CAST([show_on_website] AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST([is_marketed] AS VARCHAR(5)),

        -- Raw datetime passthrough
        CAST(TRY_CAST([move_out_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([reserve_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([available_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([make_ready_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([vacated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        [deleted_by], CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),

        [DW_PipelineRunId], [DW_LastModified], [DW_PipelineName],
        GETDATE(),
        -- AVAILABLE_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([available_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([available_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([available_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- CREATED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- DELETED_ON date split (NULL-preserving)
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- MAKE_READY date split (no _DATE int col in target, just DATEID + DATETIME)
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([make_ready_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([make_ready_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- MOVE_OUT date split (no _DATE int col in target, just DATEID + DATETIME)
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([move_out_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([move_out_date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- REPORTING_START_MONTH date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_start_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_start_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([reporting_start_month] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- RESERVE_UNTIL date split
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reserve_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE), 112) AS INT),
        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([reserve_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),
        CAST(TRY_CAST([reserve_until] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)),
        -- UPDATED_ON date split

        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST(TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATE)),

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES_SP] (@DayCount INT = NULL) AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES];

    WITH CleanData AS (
        SELECT
            [id], [cid], [property_id], [property_floorplan_id], [unit_type_id],
            UPPER([name])        AS [name],
            [lookup_code],
            UPPER([description]) AS [description],
            [market_rent], [initial_rent], [min_square_feet], [max_square_feet],
            [number_of_units], [number_of_floors], [number_of_rooms], [number_of_bedrooms],
            [bedroom_description], [number_of_bathrooms], [bathroom_description],
            [appliances_description], [maximum_occupants], [default_lease_term_months],
            [notes], [details], [is_occupiable], [is_furnished], [is_published],
            [order_num], [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on],
            [created_by], [created_on],
            NULL AS [DW_PipelineRunId],
            NULL AS [DW_LastModified],
            NULL AS [DW_PipelineName],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [id]
                ORDER BY [updated_on] DESC
            ) AS rn
        FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_UNIT_TYPES]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES] (
        [ID], [CID], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID], [UNIT_TYPE_ID],
        [NAME], [LOOKUP_CODE], [DESCRIPTION],
        [MARKET_RENT], [INITIAL_RENT], [MIN_SQUARE_FEET], [MAX_SQUARE_FEET],
        [NUMBER_OF_UNITS], [NUMBER_OF_FLOORS], [NUMBER_OF_ROOMS], [NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS],
        [BEDROOM_DESCRIPTION], [NUMBER_OF_BATHROOMS], [BATHROOM_DESCRIPTION],
        [APPLIANCES_DESCRIPTION], [MAXIMUM_OCCUPANTS], [DEFAULT_LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
        [NOTES], [DETAILS], [IS_OCCUPIABLE], [IS_FURNISHED], [IS_PUBLISHED],
        [ORDER_NUM], [DELETED_BY], [DELETED_ON], [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON],
        [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON],
        [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [UPDATED_ON_DATE],  [UPDATED_ON_DATEID],  [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
        [DELETED_ON_DATE],  [DELETED_ON_DATEID],  [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        [id], [cid], [property_id], [property_floorplan_id], [unit_type_id],
        [name], [lookup_code], [description],
        [market_rent], [initial_rent], [min_square_feet], [max_square_feet],
        [number_of_units], [number_of_floors], [number_of_rooms], [number_of_bedrooms],
        [bedroom_description], [number_of_bathrooms], [bathroom_description],
        [appliances_description], [maximum_occupants], [default_lease_term_months],
        [notes], [details], [is_occupiable], [is_furnished], [is_published],
        [order_num], [deleted_by], [deleted_on], [updated_by], [updated_on],
        [created_by], [created_on],
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([created_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([updated_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE), 112) AS INT), 0),
        ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATE)), 0),
        TRY_CAST([deleted_on] AS DATETIME2(3)),
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM CleanData
    WHERE rn = 1;
END

        [AY_WEEK_KEY],
        [COMPLIANCE_PERCENTAGE],
        [ENTITY_NUMBER],
        [PROPERTY_NAME]
    )
    SELECT
        [Yesterday].[DATE_KEY],
        [Properties].[PROPERTY_KEY],
        [Yesterday].[AY],
        [Yesterday].[AY_KEY],
        [Yesterday].[AY_WEEK],
        [Yesterday].[AY_WEEK_KEY],
        TRY_CAST([Query].[Compliance Percentage] AS DECIMAL(18,2)) / 100  /* TODO: review BODS expression */,
        [Properties].[ENTITY_NUMBER],
        [Properties].[PROPERTY_NAME]
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] [Properties]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[GRACEHILL_LOCATION_COMPLIANCE_IMPORT] [Query] ON  [Properties].[ENTITY_NUMBER] = [Query].[ENTITY_NUMBER] 
    CROSS JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] [Yesterday]
    WHERE [Yesterday].[FLAG_YESTERDAY] = 1
    ;

END

name: HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES_SP

sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES: append-only dimension (Key_Generation pattern)
    -- Finds distinct EVENT_SOURCE_NAME values in HYLY_EVENTS_F that are not yet
    -- in HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES, generates new sequential IDs, and inserts them.
    -- No TRUNCATE -- this is an incremental/append pattern.

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES] (
        [HYLY_EVENT_SOURCE_ID],
        [HYLY_EVENT_SOURCE_NAME]
    )
    SELECT
        ISNULL((SELECT MAX([HYLY_EVENT_SOURCE_ID]) FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES]), 0)
            + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY new_srcs.[event_source_name]),
        UPPER(new_srcs.[event_source_name])
    FROM (
        SELECT DISTINCT [EVENT_SOURCE_NAME] AS [event_source_name]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[HYLY_EVENTS_F]
        WHERE [EVENT_SOURCE_NAME] IS NOT NULL
    ) new_srcs
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[HYLY_EVENT_SOURCES] ex
        WHERE ex.[HYLY_EVENT_SOURCE_NAME] = UPPER(new_srcs.[event_source_name])
    );

END

-- Fixed by fix_atl_sps_patch.py from LEO_PROPERTY_EXPORT.txt
-- Dataflow: LEO_EXPORT_PROPERTIES
-- Fixed: {datetime.now():%Y-%m-%d %H:%M}
-- NOTE: WORKING_DAYS_* and PMS_HMY columns are NULL (not in DB_APP_SUPPORT.PROPERTY_0)
-- NOTE: BILLING_EMAIL is NULL (no billing email column in PROPERTY_0)

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEO_EXPORT_PROPERTIES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_PROPERTY_EXPORT];
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_PROPERTY_EXPORT] (
        [PORTFOLIO], [EXTERNAL_PROPERTY_ID], [PMS_HMY], [PMS_CODE],
        [NAME], [PROPERTY_PHONE], [BILLING_EMAIL], [PROPERTY_EMAIL],
        [NOVICE], [STREET_ADDRESS], [COUNTRY], [STATE], [PROVINCE],
        [COUNTY], [CITY], [POSTAL_CODE], [ZIPCODE], [LATITUDE], [LONGITUDE],
        [TYPE], [WORKING_DAYS_ALL], [WORKING_DAYS__M], [WORKING_DAYS__T],
        [WORKING_DAYS__X], [WORKING_DAYS__TH], [WORKING_DAYS__F],
        [WORKING_DAYS__S], [WORKING_DAYS__SU]
    )
    -- FILTER5000: all active properties except ENTITY_NUMBER = '5000'
    SELECT
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[RM_NAME],''), 50)                                    AS [PORTFOLIO],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],''), 30)                             AS [EXTERNAL_PROPERTY_ID],
        NULL                                                                AS [PMS_HMY],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],''), 255)                        AS [PMS_CODE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[PROPERTY_NAME],''), 100)                            AS [NAME],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[PHONE_1],''), 21)                                   AS [PROPERTY_PHONE],
        NULL                                                                AS [BILLING_EMAIL],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[EMAIL],''), 255)                                    AS [PROPERTY_EMAIL],
        NULL                                                                AS [NOVICE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[ADDRESS_1],''), 100)                                AS [STREET_ADDRESS],
        LEFT(CASE WHEN p.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' THEN 'CANADA' ELSE 'USA' END, 100) AS [COUNTRY],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[ADDRESS_STATE],''), 2)                              AS [STATE],
        LEFT(CASE WHEN p.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' THEN 'ONTARIO' ELSE '' END, 50) AS [PROVINCE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[ADDRESS_COUNTY],''), 100)                           AS [COUNTY],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[ADDRESS_CITY],''), 100)                             AS [CITY],
        LEFT(CASE WHEN p.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' THEN p.[ADDRESS_ZIP]
             ELSE 'USA' END, 25)                                           AS [POSTAL_CODE],
        LEFT(CASE WHEN p.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' THEN ''
             ELSE SUBSTRING(ISNULL(p.[ADDRESS_ZIP],''), 1, 5) END, 16)    AS [ZIPCODE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(CAST(p.[LATITUDE]  AS VARCHAR(50)),''), 50)            AS [LATITUDE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(CAST(p.[LONGITUDE] AS VARCHAR(50)),''), 50)            AS [LONGITUDE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(p.[PROPERTY_TYPE],''), 2)                              AS [TYPE],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS_ALL], NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__M],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__T],  NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__X],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__TH], NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__F],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__S],  NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__SU]
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
    WHERE (p.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR p.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1
           OR p.[PROPERTY_KEY] = 5000)
      AND p.[DATE_MGMT_TAKEOVER] <= YEAR(GETDATE())*10000 + MONTH(GETDATE())*100 + DAY(GETDATE())
      AND p.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
      AND ISNULL(p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],'') <> '5000'

    UNION ALL

    -- PeakmadeProperty: ENTITY_NUMBER = '5000' row with hardcoded corporate values
    SELECT
        'PEAKMADE CORPORATE'        AS [PORTFOLIO],
        'AAA'                       AS [EXTERNAL_PROPERTY_ID],
        NULL                        AS [PMS_HMY],
        p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]       AS [PMS_CODE],
        'PEAKMADE CORPORATE'        AS [NAME],
        '4049205300'                AS [PROPERTY_PHONE],
        'peakmade@avidbill.com'     AS [BILLING_EMAIL],
        p.[EMAIL]                   AS [PROPERTY_EMAIL],
        NULL                        AS [NOVICE],
        '2970 CLAIREMONT ROAD NE'   AS [STREET_ADDRESS],
        'USA'                       AS [COUNTRY],
        'GA'                        AS [STATE],
        p.[ADDRESS_STATE]           AS [PROVINCE],
        'FULTON'                    AS [COUNTY],
        'ATLANTA'                   AS [CITY],
        'USA'                       AS [POSTAL_CODE],
        '30329'                     AS [ZIPCODE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(CAST(p.[LATITUDE]  AS VARCHAR(50)),''), 50) AS [LATITUDE],
        LEFT(ISNULL(CAST(p.[LONGITUDE] AS VARCHAR(50)),''), 50) AS [LONGITUDE],
        '2'                         AS [TYPE],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS_ALL], NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__M],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__T],  NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__X],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__TH], NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__F],
        NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__S],  NULL AS [WORKING_DAYS__SU]
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
    WHERE (p.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR p.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1
           OR p.[PROPERTY_KEY] = 5000)
      AND p.[DATE_MGMT_TAKEOVER] <= YEAR(GETDATE())*10000 + MONTH(GETDATE())*100 + DAY(GETDATE())
      AND p.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
      AND ISNULL(p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],'') = '5000'
    ;

END

name: LEO_EXPORT_USERS_SP
transformations: EMAIL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ef.[EMAIL],'') = '' THEN '--' ELSE ef.[EMAIL] END
TITLE: CASE WHEN ef.[TITLE] LIKE '%PORTER%' THEN 'MAINTENANCE' WHEN ef.[TITLE] = 'HOUSEKEEPER' THEN 'MAINTENANCE' ELSE ef.[TITLE] END

TIMEZONE: CASE WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EST' THEN 169 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EASTERN' THEN 169 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CENTRAL' THEN 94 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CST' THEN 94 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MOUNTAIN' THEN 105 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MST' THEN 105 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PACIFIC' THEN 147 WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PST' THEN 147 ELSE 169 END

PROPERTIES: CASE WHEN ef.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN ISNULL(ef.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],'0') WHEN ISNULL(TRY_CAST(au.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT), 0) > 1000 THEN 'ALL' ELSE ef.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS] END

TIMEZONE: CASE WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EST' THEN 169 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EASTERN' THEN 169 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CENTRAL' THEN 94 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CST' THEN 94 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MOUNTAIN' THEN 105 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MST' THEN 105 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PACIFIC' THEN 147 WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PST' THEN 147 ELSE 169 END

PROPERTIES: CASE WHEN pres.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN ISNULL(pres.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],'0') WHEN ISNULL(TRY_CAST(pres.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT), 0) > 1000 THEN 'ALL' ELSE pres.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.LEO_USERS_EXPORT.txt, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEO_USERS_EXPORT (cross-database).
sql:
-- Fixed by fix_atl_sps_patch.py from LEO_USERS_EXPORT.txt
-- Dataflow: LEO_EXPORT_USERS
-- Fixed: 2026-03-25 17:34

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEO_EXPORT_USERS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_USERS_EXPORT];
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_USERS_EXPORT] (
        [FIRST_NAME], [LAST_NAME], [EMAIL], [TITLE], [TIMEZONE],
        [ROLE], [PORTFOLIOS], [PROPERTIES], [REPORT_TO],
        [NOTIFY_NOTE_IMPORTANT], [NOTIFY_PROPERTY_CRITICAL]
    )
    -- Emp_Output: active non-terminated employees with a LEO role
    SELECT
        ef.[NAME_FIRST]                                             AS [FIRST_NAME],
        ef.[NAME_LAST]                                             AS [LAST_NAME],
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(ef.[EMAIL],'') = '' THEN '--'
             ELSE ef.[EMAIL] END                                    AS [EMAIL],
        CASE WHEN ef.[TITLE] LIKE '%PORTER%'    THEN 'MAINTENANCE'
             WHEN ef.[TITLE] = 'HOUSEKEEPER'    THEN 'MAINTENANCE'
             ELSE ef.[TITLE] END                                    AS [TITLE],
        CASE WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EST'        THEN 169
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EASTERN'    THEN 169
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CENTRAL'    THEN 94
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CST'        THEN 94
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MOUNTAIN'   THEN 105
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MST'        THEN 105
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PACIFIC'    THEN 147
             WHEN pf.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PST'        THEN 147
             ELSE 169 END                                           AS [TIMEZONE],
        r.[ROLE_ID]                                                AS [ROLE],
        ''                                                         AS [PORTFOLIOS],
        CASE WHEN ef.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
                  THEN ISNULL(ef.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],'0')
             WHEN ISNULL(TRY_CAST(au.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT), 0) > 1000
                  THEN 'ALL'
             ELSE ef.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        END                                                        AS [PROPERTIES],
        ef.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL]                                      AS [REPORT_TO],
        'TRUE'                                                     AS [NOTIFY_NOTE_IMPORTANT],
        'FALSE'                                                    AS [NOTIFY_PROPERTY_CRITICAL]
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] ef
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_USERS_0] au
        ON ef.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = au.[EMPLOYEE_ID] AND au.[STATUS] = 'A'
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf
        ON pf.[PROPERTY_KEY] = ef.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_ROLES] r
        ON ef.[TITLE_PAYCOM] = r.[ROLE_NAME]
    WHERE ef.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED'
      AND ef.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
      AND (ef.[TITLE_PAYCOM] <> 'UNKNOWN' OR ef.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0UK')

    UNION ALL

    -- createDummyUser: synthetic PEAKMADE TRAINING row
    -- inherits timezone/role/properties from the first PRESIDENT employee
    SELECT
        'PEAKMADE'                                                 AS [FIRST_NAME],
        'TRAINING'                                                 AS [LAST_NAME],
        'peakmadetraining@peakmade.com'                            AS [EMAIL],
        'PEAKMADE TRAINING'                                        AS [TITLE],
        CASE WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EST'        THEN 169
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'EASTERN'    THEN 169
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CENTRAL'    THEN 94
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'CST'        THEN 94
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MOUNTAIN'   THEN 105
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'MST'        THEN 105
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PACIFIC'    THEN 147
             WHEN pres.[TIME_ZONE] = 'PST'        THEN 147
             ELSE 169 END                                          AS [TIMEZONE],
        pres.[ROLE_ID]                                             AS [ROLE],
        ''                                                         AS [PORTFOLIOS],
        CASE WHEN pres.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
                  THEN ISNULL(pres.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],'0')
             WHEN ISNULL(TRY_CAST(pres.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT), 0) > 1000
                  THEN 'ALL'
             ELSE pres.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        END                                                        AS [PROPERTIES],
        'ssoller@peakmade.com'                                     AS [REPORT_TO],
        'TRUE'                                                     AS [NOTIFY_NOTE_IMPORTANT],
        'FALSE'                                                    AS [NOTIFY_PROPERTY_CRITICAL]
    FROM (
        SELECT TOP 1 ef.[NAME_FIRST], ef.[NAME_LAST], ef.[EMAIL], ef.[TITLE],
               pf.[TIME_ZONE], r.[ROLE_ID], ef.[TITLE_GROUP],
               ef.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS], au.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
               ef.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] ef
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_USERS_0] au
            ON ef.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = au.[EMPLOYEE_ID] AND au.[STATUS] = 'A'
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf
            ON pf.[PROPERTY_KEY] = ef.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_ROLES] r
            ON ef.[TITLE_PAYCOM] = r.[ROLE_NAME]
        WHERE ef.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED'
          AND ef.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
          AND ef.[TITLE] = 'PRESIDENT'
        ORDER BY ef.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ) pres
    ;

END

name: APPLICATION_AGG_SP

sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;-- Step A: DELETE (Incremental Cleanup based on DATE_KEY)
        -- Removes rows in PROD that exist in the incoming Staging data
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG] T
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_AGG_F] S 
            WHERE S.[DATE_KEY] = T.[DATE_KEY]
        );

        -- Step B: INSERT (Append New/Updated Data)
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [CONTACT_SUM_CALL], [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT], [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS], [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL],
            [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND], [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE], [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], [CONTACT_SUM_SMS], [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
            [COUNT], [DATETIME_KEY], [DAY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_APP_ACTIVE], [FLAG_APP_APPROVED], [FLAG_APP_CANCELLED], [FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND_LEASED],

name: CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG_SP
transformations: FLAG_AH: CASE WHEN [Event_Hour] <= 7 OR [Event_Hour] >= 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.CONTACT_EVENTS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0 into WH_PROD2.dbo.CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG];
    WITH [Base_Events_CTE] AS (
        SELECT C.[PROPERTY_KEY], D.[AY], D.[DAY_3], C.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT],
            C.[FIRST_CATEGORY] AS [CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
            DATEPART(HOUR, C.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT]) AS [Event_Hour],
            C.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT], C.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL], C.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0] C
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] D ON C.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT] = D.[DATE_KEY]
        WHERE (C.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL] > 0 OR C.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] > 0)
          AND D.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1
    ),
    [Calc_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [DAY_3], [FIRST_DATE_EVENT], [CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
            ISNULL(CASE
                WHEN [Event_Hour] BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                WHEN [Event_Hour] BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                ELSE 'After Hours'
            END, 'After Hours') AS [TIMEFRAME],
            CASE WHEN [Event_Hour] <= 7 OR [Event_Hour] >= 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AH],
            [SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT], [SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL], [SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
        FROM [Base_Events_CTE]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG]
        ([DATE_KEY],[PROPERTY_KEY],[AY],[DAY_3],[TIMEFRAME],[CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
         [COUNT],[FLAG_AFTER_HOURS],[FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED],[FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED_TOTAL],[FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR])
    SELECT D2.[DATE_KEY], E.[PROPERTY_KEY], E.[AY], E.[DAY_3], E.[TIMEFRAME], E.[CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
        COUNT(*), SUM(E.[FLAG_AH]), SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT]),
        SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL]), SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR])
    FROM [Calc_CTE] E
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] D2 ON E.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT] <= D2.[DATE_KEY]
    WHERE D2.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 AND D2.[RELATIVE_DAY] < 0
    GROUP BY D2.[DATE_KEY], E.[PROPERTY_KEY], E.[AY], E.[DAY_3], E.[TIMEFRAME], E.[CHANNEL_CONFORMED];
END

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Source Transformation CTE
        WITH [Staging_Source] AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                -- Convert YYYYMMDD (INT) -> DATETIME2(3)
                TRY_CAST(
                    CONCAT(
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 1, 4), '-', 
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 5, 2), '-', 
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 7, 2)
                    ) AS DATETIME2(3)
                ) AS [CALC_DATETIME_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F]
        )

        -- Incremental Merge
        MERGE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG] AS [Target]
        USING [Staging_Source] AS [Source]
        ON (
            [Target].[DATE_KEY] = [Source].[DATE_KEY] AND 
            [Target].[PROPERTY_KEY] = [Source].[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
            [Target].[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = [Source].[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        )
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                [Target].[COUNT] = [Source].[COUNT],
                [Target].[DAYS_HOLIDAY] = [Source].[DAYS_HOLIDAY],
                [Target].[DAYS_ON_HOLD] = [Source].[DAYS_ON_HOLD],
                [Target].[DAYS_OPEN] = [Source].[DAYS_OPEN],
                [Target].[MINUTES_HOLIDAY] = [Source].[MINUTES_HOLIDAY],
                [Target].[MINUTES_ON_HOLD] = [Source].[MINUTES_ON_HOLD],
                [Target].[MINUTES_OPEN] = [Source].[MINUTES_OPEN],
                [Target].[FLAG_OPEN] = [Source].[FLAG_OPEN],
                [Target].[DATETIME_KEY] = [Source].[CALC_DATETIME_KEY]

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [COUNT], [DAYS_HOLIDAY],
                [DAYS_ON_HOLD], [DAYS_OPEN], [DAYS_WEEKDAY], [DAYS_WEEKEND], [DAYS_WORKDAY],
                [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_COMPLETED], [FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS], [FLAG_DELETED],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_ON_HOLD], [FLAG_OPEN], [FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
                [FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH], [FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW], [FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM], [FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
                [FLAG_SUSPENDED], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
                [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
                [FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
                [MINUTES_HOLIDAY], [MINUTES_ON_HOLD], [MINUTES_OPEN], [MINUTES_WEEKDAY],
                [MINUTES_WEEKEND], [MINUTES_WORKDAY], [DATETIME_KEY]
            )
            VALUES (
                [Source].[DATE_KEY], [Source].[PROPERTY_KEY], [Source].[FLOORPLAN_KEY], [Source].[COUNT], [Source].[DAYS_HOLIDAY],
                [Source].[DAYS_ON_HOLD], [Source].[DAYS_OPEN], [Source].[DAYS_WEEKDAY], [Source].[DAYS_WEEKEND], [Source].[DAYS_WORKDAY],
                [Source].[FLAG_CANCELLED], [Source].[FLAG_COMPLETED], [Source].[FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS], [Source].[FLAG_DELETED],
                [Source].[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [Source].[FLAG_HOLIDAY], [Source].[FLAG_ON_HOLD], [Source].[FLAG_OPEN], [Source].[FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
                [Source].[FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH], [Source].[FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW], [Source].[FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM], [Source].[FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
                [Source].[FLAG_SUSPENDED], [Source].[FLAG_WEEKDAY], [Source].[FLAG_WEEKEND], [Source].[FLAG_WORKDAY], [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY],
                [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED], [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED], [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
                [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD], [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN], [Source].[FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
                [Source].[MINUTES_HOLIDAY], [Source].[MINUTES_ON_HOLD], [Source].[MINUTES_OPEN], [Source].[MINUTES_WEEKDAY],
                [Source].[MINUTES_WEEKEND], [Source].[MINUTES_WORKDAY], [Source].[CALC_DATETIME_KEY]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Stored Procedure executed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

    -- Delete matching keys then re-insert (preserves historical periods not in current F batch)

END

name: ACADEMIC_YEAR_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY: CASE WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY: CASE WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY: CASE WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.ACADEMIC_YEAR_0.
sql:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- PART 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ACADEMIC_YEAR_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Truncate Target Table
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[ACADEMIC_YEAR_0];

    -- Step 2: Insert Data with Transformations
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[ACADEMIC_YEAR_0] (
        [AY_KEY],
        [AY_BEGIN_DATE],
        [AY_END_DATE],
        [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY],
        [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
        [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY],
        [RELATIVE_AY],
        [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT 
        -- CHANGED TO UPPERCASE SOURCE COLUMNS
        src.[AY_KEY],
        src.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
        src.[AY_END_DATE],
        
        -- Transformation: decode(RELATIVE_AY = 0, 1, 0)
        CASE 
            WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY],
        
        -- Transformation: decode(RELATIVE_AY = 1, 1, 0)
        CASE 
            WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
        
        -- Transformation: decode(RELATIVE_AY = -1, 1, 0)
        CASE 
            WHEN src.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY],
        
        src.[RELATIVE_AY],
        SYSDATETIME() AS [LASTUPDATED]
    FROM [dbo].[AY_0] AS src;

END;
