name: ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_IMPORT_0_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_ODS.dbo.ACTIVEDIRECTORYEXPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_IMPORT_0, WH_ODS.dbo.ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_IMPORT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @today INT = CAST(CONVERT(varchar, GETDATE(), 112) AS INT);

    MERGE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS] AS tgt
    USING (
        SELECT
            s.[Department], s.[DisplayName], LEFT(s.[DistinguishedName], 150),
            s.[extensionAttribute1], s.[extensionAttribute10], s.[extensionAttribute11],
            s.[extensionAttribute12], s.[extensionAttribute13], s.[extensionAttribute14],
            s.[extensionAttribute2], s.[extensionAttribute3], s.[extensionAttribute4],
            s.[extensionAttribute5], s.[extensionAttribute6], s.[extensionAttribute7],
            s.[extensionAttribute8], s.[extensionAttribute9],
            s.[GivenName], s.[Mail], s.[OU], s.[physicaldeliveryofficename],
            s.[sn], s.[Title], s.[UserPrincipalName], s.[whencreated],
            LEFT(s.[description], 150)
        FROM (
            SELECT *,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [UserPrincipalName] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS _rn
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ACTIVEDIRECTORYEXPORT]
        ) s
        WHERE s._rn = 1
    ) AS src (
        [DEPARTMENT], [DISPLAYNAME], [DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9],
        [GIVENNAME], [MAIL], [OU], [PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME],
        [SN], [TITLE], [USERPRINCIPALNAME], [WHENCREATED],
        [DESCRIPTION]
    )
    ON tgt.[USERPRINCIPALNAME] = src.[USERPRINCIPALNAME]
    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        tgt.[DEPARTMENT]                = src.[DEPARTMENT],
        tgt.[DISPLAYNAME]               = src.[DISPLAYNAME],
        tgt.[DISTINGUISHEDNAME]         = src.[DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10]      = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11]      = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12]      = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13]      = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14]      = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8],
        tgt.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9]       = src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9],
        tgt.[GIVENNAME]                 = src.[GIVENNAME],
        tgt.[MAIL]                      = src.[MAIL],
        tgt.[OU]                        = src.[OU],
        tgt.[PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME]= src.[PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME],
        tgt.[SN]                        = src.[SN],
        tgt.[TITLE]                     = src.[TITLE],
        tgt.[WHENCREATED]               = src.[WHENCREATED],
        tgt.[DESCRIPTION]               = src.[DESCRIPTION],
        tgt.[Last_Updated]              = @today
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [DEPARTMENT], [DISPLAYNAME], [DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9],
        [GIVENNAME], [MAIL], [OU], [PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME],
        [SN], [TITLE], [USERPRINCIPALNAME], [WHENCREATED],
        [DESCRIPTION], [Last_Updated]
    ) VALUES (
        src.[DEPARTMENT], src.[DISPLAYNAME], src.[DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
        src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11],
        src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14],
        src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4],
        src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7],
        src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8], src.[EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9],
        src.[GIVENNAME], src.[MAIL], src.[OU], src.[PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME],
        src.[SN], src.[TITLE], src.[USERPRINCIPALNAME], src.[WHENCREATED],
        src.[DESCRIPTION], @today
    );

    -- Also refresh the WH_STAGING staging table (full reload)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_IMPORT_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_IMPORT_0] (
        [DEPARTMENT], [DISPLAYNAME], [DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE10], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE11],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE12], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7],
        [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE8], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9],
        [GIVENNAME], [MAIL], [OU], [PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME],
        [SN], [TITLE], [USERPRINCIPALNAME], [WHENCREATED],
        [DESCRIPTION], [LAST_UPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        s.[Department], s.[DisplayName], LEFT(s.[DistinguishedName], 150),
        s.[extensionAttribute1], s.[extensionAttribute10], s.[extensionAttribute11],
        s.[extensionAttribute12], s.[extensionAttribute13], s.[extensionAttribute14],
        s.[extensionAttribute2], s.[extensionAttribute3], s.[extensionAttribute4],
        s.[extensionAttribute5], s.[extensionAttribute6], s.[extensionAttribute7],
        s.[extensionAttribute8], s.[extensionAttribute9],
        s.[GivenName], s.[Mail], s.[OU], s.[physicaldeliveryofficename],
        s.[sn], s.[Title], s.[UserPrincipalName], s.[whencreated],
        LEFT(s.[description], 150),
        @today
    FROM (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [UserPrincipalName] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS _rn
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ACTIVEDIRECTORYEXPORT]
    ) s
    WHERE s._rn = 1;
END

INDUCEMENT_TYPE: CASE WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%CONCESSION%' THEN 'CONCESSION' WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' THEN 'REFERRAL' WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%GIFT%' THEN 'GIFT CARD' ELSE UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) END

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.Adaptive_Concession_and_Gift_Card_Input into WH_STAGING.dbo.ADAPTIVE_CONCESSION_AND_GIFT_CARD_0 (cross-database).

-- SECTION 1: TARGET TABLE DDL
-- Per Architecture Rule 0.1: Target tables already exist. DDL is omitted.

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ADAPTIVE_CONCESSION_AND_GIFT_CARD_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_CONCESSION_AND_GIFT_CARD_0];

        -- 2. Define Source Data Logic (Replaces #TempTable to fix Distibuted Processing Error)
        ;WITH [Source_Cache] AS (
            SELECT 
                [Academic_Yr] AS [ACADEMIC_YR],
                [Level_Name] AS [LEVEL_NAME],
                [Rent_Inducements] AS [RENT_INDUCEMENTS],
                [Total_$] AS [TOTAL_$],
                [Lease_Type] AS [LEASE_TYPE]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Concession_and_Gift_Card_Input]
        )

        -- 3. Insert Transformed Data
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_CONCESSION_AND_GIFT_CARD_0] (
            [AY],
            [ENTITY_ID],
            [INDUCEMENT_TYPE],
            [INDUCEMENT_AMOUNT],
            [LEASE_TYPE]
        )
        SELECT 
            -- Mapping: '20' || substr(ACADEMIC_YR,1,2)
            CAST('20' + SUBSTRING([ACADEMIC_YR], 1, 2) AS INT) AS [AY],

            -- Mapping: word(LEVEL_NAME, 1)
            CASE 
                WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) > 0 
                THEN SUBSTRING([LEVEL_NAME], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) - 1)
                ELSE [LEVEL_NAME]
            END AS [ENTITY_ID],

            -- Mapping: decode logic for Inducement_Type
            CASE 
                WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%CONCESSION%' THEN 'CONCESSION'
                WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' THEN 'REFERRAL'
                WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%GIFT%' THEN 'GIFT CARD'
                ELSE UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS])
            END AS [INDUCEMENT_TYPE],

            -- Mapping: nvl("Total_$", 0.00)
            ISNULL([TOTAL_$], 0.00) AS [INDUCEMENT_AMOUNT],

            -- Mapping: decode logic for LEASE_TYPE
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), '') IN ('', 'ACTUAL') THEN 'AGG'
                ELSE ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), 'AGG')
            END AS [LEASE_TYPE]

        FROM [Source_Cache];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

-- Generated from ATL: Admin_App_Fees_0
-- Source: c:\de_remediation\ADMIN_APP_FEES_0_ATL.txt
--
-- AR Code IDs in scope: 155012 (APPLICATION FEE), 154788 (ADMIN FEES)
--
-- Two input paths feed each target table:
--
--   Path 1 — Scheduled Charges (E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES):
--     Filter: DELETED_ON IS NULL, AR_CODE_ID IN (155012,154788)
--     Exclude hardcoded SC IDs: 26989883, 26989884
--     Reversals lookup: MAX(IS_REVERSAL) per SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID from E_AR_TRANSACTIONS
--     Exclude where reversal IS_REVERSAL IN ('1','True')
--
--   Path 2 — Standalone AR Transactions (E_AR_TRANSACTIONS):
--     Filter: IS_REVERSAL not true, AR_PAYMENT_ID IS NULL, SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID IS NULL
--     These are direct fee charges with no backing scheduled charge
--
--   Both paths are UNION ALL'd, then grouped by LEASE_INTERVAL_ID + NAME + PROPERTY_ID
--   with SUM(amount). FLAG = 1 if sum > 0, else 0.
--   Fee name is uppercased in the final output (per ATL upper() in Sum1/Sum2).
--
-- Targets: WH_STAGING.dbo.APP_FEES_0 and WH_STAGING.dbo.ADMIN_FEES_0
-- IS_REVERSAL in WH_ODS.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS is varchar(5): '0','False' = not reversed;
--   '1','True' = reversed. MAX() over SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID picks the 'worst' value.

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ADMIN_APP_FEES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[APP_FEES_0];
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[ADMIN_FEES_0];

    -- =====================================================================
    -- APP_FEES_0
    -- =====================================================================
    ;WITH Reversals AS (
        SELECT
            [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
            MAX([IS_REVERSAL]) AS [IS_REVERSAL]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[APP_FEES_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [APP_FEE_NAME],
        [APP_FEE_AMOUNT],
        [FLAG_APP_FEE],
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        UPPER([FEE_NAME]),
        SUM([FEE_AMOUNT]),
        CASE WHEN SUM([FEE_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM (
        -- Path 1: Scheduled charges for APPLICATION FEE (not reversed)
        SELECT
            sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            ac.[NAME]          AS [FEE_NAME],
            sc.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] AS [FEE_AMOUNT],
            sc.[PROPERTY_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ac
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] sc
            ON ac.[ID] = sc.[AR_CODE_ID]
        LEFT JOIN Reversals r
            ON sc.[ID] = r.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        WHERE sc.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
          AND ac.[ID] IN (155012, 154788)
          AND sc.[ID] NOT IN (26989883, 26989884)
          AND ac.[NAME] = 'APPLICATION FEE'
          AND ISNULL(r.[IS_REVERSAL], '0') NOT IN ('1', 'True')

        UNION ALL

        -- Path 2: Standalone AR transactions for APPLICATION FEE
        SELECT
            t.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            ac.[NAME]              AS [FEE_NAME],
            t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] AS [FEE_AMOUNT],
            t.[PROPERTY_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ac
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] t
            ON ac.[ID] = t.[AR_CODE_ID]
        WHERE ac.[ID] IN (155012, 154788)
          AND t.[IS_REVERSAL] NOT IN ('1', 'True')
          AND t.[AR_PAYMENT_ID] IS NULL
          AND t.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NULL
          AND ac.[NAME] = 'APPLICATION FEE'
    ) AS [AppFeeCombined]
    GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [FEE_NAME], [PROPERTY_ID];

    -- =====================================================================
    -- ADMIN_FEES_0
    -- =====================================================================
    ;WITH Reversals AS (
        SELECT
            [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
            MAX([IS_REVERSAL]) AS [IS_REVERSAL]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[ADMIN_FEES_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [ADMIN_FEE_NAME],
        [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT],
        [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        UPPER([FEE_NAME]),
        SUM([FEE_AMOUNT]),
        CASE WHEN SUM([FEE_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM (
        -- Path 1: Scheduled charges for ADMIN FEES (not reversed)
        SELECT
            sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            ac.[NAME]          AS [FEE_NAME],
            sc.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] AS [FEE_AMOUNT],
            sc.[PROPERTY_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ac
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] sc
            ON ac.[ID] = sc.[AR_CODE_ID]
        LEFT JOIN Reversals r
            ON sc.[ID] = r.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        WHERE sc.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
          AND ac.[ID] IN (155012, 154788)
          AND sc.[ID] NOT IN (26989883, 26989884)
          AND ac.[NAME] = 'ADMIN FEES'
          AND ISNULL(r.[IS_REVERSAL], '0') NOT IN ('1', 'True')

        UNION ALL

        -- Path 2: Standalone AR transactions for ADMIN FEES
        SELECT
            t.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            ac.[NAME]              AS [FEE_NAME],
            t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] AS [FEE_AMOUNT],
            t.[PROPERTY_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ac
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] t
            ON ac.[ID] = t.[AR_CODE_ID]
        WHERE ac.[ID] IN (155012, 154788)
          AND t.[IS_REVERSAL] NOT IN ('1', 'True')
          AND t.[AR_PAYMENT_ID] IS NULL
          AND t.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NULL
          AND ac.[NAME] = 'ADMIN FEES'
    ) AS [AdminFeeCombined]
    GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [FEE_NAME], [PROPERTY_ID];

END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ADMIN_APP_FEES_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Targets
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[APP_FEES_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[ADMIN_FEES_0];

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- BLOCK 1: CALCULATE AND INSERT APPLICATION FEES (APP_FEES_0)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_AR_Codes AS (
            -- Filter generic AR Codes for specific IDs
            SELECT DISTINCT ID, NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
            WHERE ID IN (155012, 154788)
        ),
        CTE_Reversals AS (
            -- Identify Reversals from Transactions
            -- FIX: Cast BIT to INT for Aggregation
            SELECT 
                SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID,
                MAX(CAST(IS_REVERSAL AS INT)) AS IS_REVERSAL
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
            WHERE SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID
        ),
        CTE_Scheduled_Charges_Flow AS (
            -- Logic Flow 1: Scheduled Charges + Reversals
            SELECT 
                SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.NAME AS FEE_NAME,
                SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT AS FEE_VALUE,
                SC.PROPERTY_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
            INNER JOIN CTE_AR_Codes C 
                ON SC.AR_CODE_ID = C.ID
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Reversals R 
                ON SC.ID = R.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID
            WHERE SC.DELETED_ON IS NULL
              AND SC.ID NOT IN (26989883, 26989884)
              AND ISNULL(R.IS_REVERSAL, 0) = 0 -- Exclude if Reversal is 1 (True)
              AND C.NAME = 'APPLICATION FEE'       -- Specific filter for this Block
        ),
        CTE_Transactions_Flow AS (
            -- Logic Flow 2: Standalone Transactions
            SELECT 
                T.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.NAME AS FEE_NAME,
                T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT AS FEE_VALUE,
                T.PROPERTY_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] T
            INNER JOIN CTE_AR_Codes C 
                ON T.AR_CODE_ID = C.ID
            WHERE ISNULL(CAST(T.IS_REVERSAL AS INT), 0) = 0
              AND T.AR_PAYMENT_ID IS NULL
              AND T.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID IS NULL
              AND C.NAME = 'APPLICATION FEE'       -- Specific filter for this Block
        ),
        CTE_Merge_App_Fees AS (
            -- Union both flows
            SELECT * FROM CTE_Scheduled_Charges_Flow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM CTE_Transactions_Flow
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[APP_FEES_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [APP_FEE_NAME],
            [APP_FEE_AMOUNT],
            [FLAG_APP_FEE],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            UPPER(FEE_NAME) AS APP_FEE_NAME,
            SUM(FEE_VALUE) AS APP_FEE_AMOUNT,
            CASE WHEN SUM(FEE_VALUE) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_APP_FEE,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Merge_App_Fees
        GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, FEE_NAME, PROPERTY_ID;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- BLOCK 2: CALCULATE AND INSERT ADMIN FEES (ADMIN_FEES_0)
        -- (CTE Logic repeated because CTEs cannot span multiple INSERT statements)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_AR_Codes AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT ID, NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
            WHERE ID IN (155012, 154788)
        ),
        CTE_Reversals AS (
            -- FIX: Cast BIT to INT for Aggregation
            SELECT 
                SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID,
                MAX(CAST(IS_REVERSAL AS INT)) AS IS_REVERSAL
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
            WHERE SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID
        ),
        CTE_Scheduled_Charges_Flow AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.NAME AS FEE_NAME,
                SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT AS FEE_VALUE,
                SC.PROPERTY_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
            INNER JOIN CTE_AR_Codes C 
                ON SC.AR_CODE_ID = C.ID
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Reversals R 
                ON SC.ID = R.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID
            WHERE SC.DELETED_ON IS NULL
              AND SC.ID NOT IN (26989883, 26989884)
              AND ISNULL(R.IS_REVERSAL, 0) = 0
              AND C.NAME = 'ADMIN FEES'            -- Specific filter for Admin Fees
        ),
        CTE_Transactions_Flow AS (
            SELECT 
                T.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.NAME AS FEE_NAME,
                T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT AS FEE_VALUE,
                T.PROPERTY_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] T
            INNER JOIN CTE_AR_Codes C 
                ON T.AR_CODE_ID = C.ID
            WHERE ISNULL(CAST(T.IS_REVERSAL AS INT), 0) = 0
              AND T.AR_PAYMENT_ID IS NULL
              AND T.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID IS NULL
              AND C.NAME = 'ADMIN FEES'            -- Specific filter for Admin Fees
        ),
        CTE_Merge_Admin_Fees AS (
            SELECT * FROM CTE_Scheduled_Charges_Flow
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM CTE_Transactions_Flow
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[ADMIN_FEES_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [ADMIN_FEE_NAME],
            [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT],
            [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            UPPER(FEE_NAME) AS ADMIN_FEE_NAME,
            SUM(FEE_VALUE) AS ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT,
            CASE WHEN SUM(FEE_VALUE) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_ADMIN_FEE,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Merge_Admin_Fees
        GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, FEE_NAME, PROPERTY_ID;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: AD_EMPLOYEES_0_SP
transformations: EMPLOYEE_TYPE: CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'S' THEN 'SYSTEM 1' WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'D' THEN 'DUMMY 1' WHEN UPPER(U.DISTINGUISHEDNAME) LIKE '%DUMMY%' THEN 'DUMMY 2' WHEN U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 IS NULL THEN 'SYSTEM 2' ELSE ISNULL(SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 3, 50), 'UNKNOWN') END
FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD: CASE WHEN U.[Last_Updated] = @TodayInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

STATUS: CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'S' THEN 'SYSTEM' WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'D' THEN 'DUMMY' WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'T' THEN 'TERMINATED 1' WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'L' THEN 'LEAVE' WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'A' THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(U.DESCRIPTION), 1, 4) = 'TERM' THEN 'TERMINATED 2' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_EMPLOYEES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
/* STEP 3 (FIXED v2): STORED PROCEDURE GENERATION
   Procedure: [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0_SP]
   Fixes: 
     1. Updated column name to [Last_Updated] to match ODS source exactly.
     2. Ensured all other columns match the case from your schema output.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    -- Calculate "Today" as an integer YYYYMMDD to match the source format
    DECLARE @TodayInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS INT);

    
        

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0];

        -- 2. INSERT WITH DEDUPLICATION LOGIC
        WITH RawData AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Base Columns
                UPPER(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                UPPER(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE6) AS [AWARDS],
                U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 AS [DATE_HIRED],
                
                -- FIXED: Exact case match for Last_Updated
                U.[Last_Updated] AS [DATE_UPDATED],
                
                GETDATE() AS [DATETIME_CHANGE], 
                UPPER(U.DEPARTMENT) AS [DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(U.DESCRIPTION) AS [DESCRIPTION],
                U.DISTINGUISHEDNAME AS [DIRECTORY],
                UPPER(U.DISPLAYNAME) AS [DISPLAYNAME],
                LOWER(U.MAIL) AS [EMAIL],
                
                -- Employee Type Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'S' THEN 'SYSTEM 1'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'D' THEN 'DUMMY 1'
                    WHEN UPPER(U.DISTINGUISHEDNAME) LIKE '%DUMMY%' THEN 'DUMMY 2'
                    WHEN U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 IS NULL AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 IS NULL THEN 'SYSTEM 2'
                    ELSE ISNULL(SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 3, 50), 'UNKNOWN')
                END AS [EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
                
                U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14 AS [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14_1],
                
                -- Active Record Flag (Using correct column name)
                CASE WHEN U.[Last_Updated] = @TodayInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD],
                
                UPPER(U.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME) AS [LOCATION],
                LOWER(U.USERPRINCIPALNAME) AS [LOGIN],
                
                -- Name First Logic
                UPPER(CASE 
                    WHEN U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 IS NOT NULL 
                         AND NOT (SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5, 1, 1) IN ('1', '2')) 
                    THEN U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE5 
                    ELSE U.GIVENNAME 
                END) AS [NAME_FIRST],
                
                UPPER(U.DISPLAYNAME) AS [NAME_FULL],
                UPPER(U.SN) AS [NAME_LAST],
                
                -- Property Lookup
                P.PROPERTY_KEY,
                P.PROPERTY_NAME,
                UPPER(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3) AS [PROPERTYNUMBER], 
                
                -- Status Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'S' THEN 'SYSTEM'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'D' THEN 'DUMMY'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'T' THEN 'TERMINATED 1'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'L' THEN 'LEAVE'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14, 1, 1) = 'A' THEN 'ACTIVE'
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(U.DESCRIPTION), 1, 4) = 'TERM' THEN 'TERMINATED 2'
                    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
                END AS [STATUS],
                
                U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14,
                UPPER(U.TITLE) AS [TITLE],

                -- Window Function for Deduplication
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY UPPER(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4) 
                    ORDER BY LOWER(U.USERPRINCIPALNAME) DESC
                ) AS [RowRank],
                
                COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY UPPER(U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4)) AS [CodeCount]

            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS] U
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] P 
                ON U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 = P.ENTITY_NUMBER 
            
            WHERE 1=1
              AND UPPER(U.DISPLAYNAME) <> 'CHRISTOPHER LOGSDON'
              AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 IS NOT NULL
              AND U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 <> 'DUMMY'
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0] (
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [DATE_HIRED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DATETIME_CHANGE],
            [DEPARTMENT], [DESCRIPTION], [DIRECTORY], [DISPLAYNAME], [EMAIL],
            [EMPLOYEE_TYPE], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14_1], [FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD],
            [FLAG_MULTI_RECORD_EMPLOYEE_CODE], [LOCATION], [LOGIN],
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_LAST], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTYNUMBER],
            [STATUS], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], [TITLE], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [DATE_HIRED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DATETIME_CHANGE],
            [DEPARTMENT], [DESCRIPTION], [DIRECTORY], [DISPLAYNAME], [EMAIL],
            [EMPLOYEE_TYPE], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14_1], [FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD],
            [CodeCount] AS [FLAG_MULTI_RECORD_EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [LOCATION], [LOGIN],
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_LAST], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTYNUMBER],
            [STATUS], [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], [TITLE],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM RawData
        WHERE [RowRank] = 1;

        
    
END;

name: AD_MANAGERS_0_SP
transformations: MAPPED_TITLE: CASE -- AM Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY ASSISTANT MANAGER' AND ( TITLE LIKE '%ASSISTANT MANAGER%' OR TITLE IN ('SENIOR LEASING AND MARKETING MANAGER', 'OPERATIONS & LEASING MANAGER', 'MARKETING AND OPERATIONS MANAGER', 'SENIOR FINANCIAL OPERATIONS MANAGER') ) THEN 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' -- PM Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND ( (TITLE LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%' OR TITLE IN ('PROPERTY MANAGER','COMMUNITY MANAGER','PORTFOLIO MANAGER','GENERAL MANAGER','SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER','SENIOR DIRECTOR')) AND TITLE NOT IN ('PROPERTYMANAGER','LEASING MANAGER','HOA MANAGER') ) THEN 'PROPERTY MANAGER' -- RD Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND TITLE LIKE 'RESIDENT%' THEN 'RESIDENT DIRECTOR' -- ED Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND TITLE LIKE 'EXECUTIVE%' THEN 'EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR' -- LM Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY LEASING MANAGER' AND ( TITLE IN ('LEASING MANAGER','SENIOR LEASING MANAGER','SENIOR MARKETING & DESIGN MANAGER','SENIOR LEASING AND MARKETING MANAGER') ) THEN 'LEASING MANAGER' -- MM Logic WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MAINTENANCE MANAGER' AND ( TITLE LIKE '%MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR' OR TITLE IN ('SENIOR MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR','CHIEF ENGINEER') ) THEN 'MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR' ELSE NULL -- Unassigned/Default (Dropped in ATL logic) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_MANAGERS_0.
sql:
-- ================================================== 
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ================================================== 

/*
   Stored Procedure: [dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0_SP]
   Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
   Logic: Filters active employees, maps titles to standard roles (AM, PM, RD, ED, LM, MM),
          and ensures only one manager per role per property is loaded.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0];

        -- 2. Processing Logic
        WITH [CTE_PaycomMgrs] AS (
            -- Base filter from 'PaycomMgrs' query
            SELECT DISTINCT
                EMPLOYEE_CODE AS [EMPLOYEE_ID],
                TITLE_GROUP,
                TITLE,
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                PROPERTY_NAME,
                LOCATION,
                NAME_FULL AS [FULLNAME],
                EMAIL,
                CAST(LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE AS VARCHAR(50)) AS [PROPERTY_NUMBER],
                STATUS
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
            WHERE FLAG_TERMINATED = 0 
              AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
              AND TITLE_GROUP IN (
                  'PROPERTY ASSISTANT MANAGER',
                  'PROPERTY LEASING MANAGER',
                  'PROPERTY MAINTENANCE MANAGER',
                  'PROPERTY MANAGER'
              )
        ),
        
        [CTE_Mapped_Roles] AS (
            -- Implements 'NewCase' Logic (AM, PM, RD, ED, LM, MM)
            -- Priority is determined by CASE order (Mutually Exclusive behavior)
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                PROPERTY_NAME,
                PROPERTY_NUMBER,
                EMAIL,
                FULLNAME,
                EMPLOYEE_ID,
                CASE 
                    -- AM Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY ASSISTANT MANAGER' AND (
                         TITLE LIKE '%ASSISTANT MANAGER%' OR
                         TITLE IN ('SENIOR LEASING AND MARKETING MANAGER', 'OPERATIONS & LEASING MANAGER', 'MARKETING AND OPERATIONS MANAGER', 'SENIOR FINANCIAL OPERATIONS MANAGER')
                    ) THEN 'ASSISTANT MANAGER'

                    -- PM Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND (
                         (TITLE LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%' OR 
                          TITLE IN ('PROPERTY MANAGER','COMMUNITY MANAGER','PORTFOLIO MANAGER','GENERAL MANAGER','SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER','SENIOR DIRECTOR'))
                         AND TITLE NOT IN ('PROPERTYMANAGER','LEASING MANAGER','HOA MANAGER')
                    ) THEN 'PROPERTY MANAGER'

                    -- RD Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND TITLE LIKE 'RESIDENT%' 
                         THEN 'RESIDENT DIRECTOR'

                    -- ED Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND TITLE LIKE 'EXECUTIVE%' 
                         THEN 'EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR'

                    -- LM Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY LEASING MANAGER' AND (
                         TITLE IN ('LEASING MANAGER','SENIOR LEASING MANAGER','SENIOR MARKETING & DESIGN MANAGER','SENIOR LEASING AND MARKETING MANAGER')
                    ) THEN 'LEASING MANAGER'

                    -- MM Logic
                    WHEN TITLE_GROUP = 'PROPERTY MAINTENANCE MANAGER' AND (
                         TITLE LIKE '%MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR' OR 
                         TITLE IN ('SENIOR MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR','CHIEF ENGINEER')
                    ) THEN 'MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR'
                    
                    ELSE NULL -- Unassigned/Default (Dropped in ATL logic)
                END AS [MAPPED_TITLE]
            FROM [CTE_PaycomMgrs]
        ),

        [CTE_Final_Filter] AS (
            -- Implements 'Output_1' and 'Filter' logic:
            -- gen_row_num_by_group(PROPERTY_KEY, TITLE) where Order = 1
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                PROPERTY_NAME,
                PROPERTY_NUMBER,
                EMAIL,
                FULLNAME,
                MAPPED_TITLE AS [TITLE],
                EMPLOYEE_ID,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, MAPPED_TITLE ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS [RN]
            FROM [CTE_Mapped_Roles]
            WHERE MAPPED_TITLE IS NOT NULL -- Exclude unassigned matches
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_NUMBER],
            [EMAIL],
            [FULLNAME],
            [ORDER],
            [TITLE],
            [UPDATED_DATE],
            [EMPLOYEE_ID],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            CAST(PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            PROPERTY_NUMBER,
            CAST(EMAIL AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            CAST(FULLNAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            [RN] AS [ORDER],
            CAST([TITLE] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112) AS INT) AS [UPDATED_DATE],
            CAST(EMPLOYEE_ID AS VARCHAR(50)),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_Final_Filter]
        WHERE [RN] = 1;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT_LOAD_SP
transformations: LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE: CASE WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 621 THEN 217 -- Greyhound WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 633 THEN 218 -- University Lofts WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 637 THEN 219 -- College Crossing National ELSE [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] END
EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER: CASE WHEN CHARINDEX('@', [EMAIL_PAYCOM]) > 0 THEN LEFT([EMAIL_PAYCOM], CHARINDEX('@', [EMAIL_PAYCOM]) - 1) ELSE [EMAIL_PAYCOM] END

GROUP_CODE: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM] = 'CAN' THEN 6 WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 THEN 2 WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 3 WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 THEN 4 WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' AND [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_BAD_EMAIL: CASE WHEN RIGHT([EMAIL_PAYCOM], 13) = '@peakmade.com' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
GROUP_CODE: CASE WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cpell' THEN 1 WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cgage' THEN 4 WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'jeckard' THEN 1 ELSE [GROUP_CODE] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT (cross-database).
sql:
/* * ====================================================================================================================
 * SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
 * ====================================================================================================================
 */
-- FIXED: Removed [WH_STAGING] prefix. Script assumes current context is WH_STAGING.
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    -- FIXED: Removed SET XACT_ABORT ON (Not supported in Fabric DW)

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;
    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- TRUNCATE Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT];

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC (CTEs)
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         */
        WITH [Props] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                [FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [FLAG_RETAIL],
                [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_RETAIL] = 0
        ),
        [Emps] AS (
            SELECT 
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                LOWER([EMAIL_PAYCOM]) AS [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
                [CORP_DEPT_CODE],
                [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
                [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM],
                [FLAG_TERMINATED],
                [LOCATION],
                [LOCATION_AD],
                [LOCATION_PAYCOM],
                [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK],
                -- Logic: decode location codes for specific overrides
                CASE 
                    WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 621 THEN 217 -- Greyhound
                    WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 633 THEN 218 -- University Lofts
                    WHEN [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = 637 THEN 219 -- College Crossing National
                    ELSE [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE]
                END AS [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE],
                [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_LAST],
                [PAYCOM_POSITION],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [TITLE],
                [TITLE_GROUP],
                [TITLE_PAYCOM]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0 
              AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> '0000'
        ),
        [Combo1] AS (
            SELECT 
                E.[EMAIL_PAYCOM],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                E.[NAME_FIRST],
                E.[NAME_LAST],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                E.[DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
                E.[DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM],
                E.[FLAG_TERMINATED],
                E.[LOCATION_AD],
                E.[LOCATION_PAYCOM],
                E.[LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK],
                E.[LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE],
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[TITLE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[TITLE_PAYCOM]
            FROM [Emps] E
            -- ATL: Left Outer Join on LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE = ENTITY_NUMBER
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [Props] P 
                ON E.[LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE] = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
            WHERE E.[EMAIL_PAYCOM] IS NOT NULL 
              AND E.[EMAIL_PAYCOM] <> ''
        ),
        [Coder] AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Extract username (left of @)
                CASE 
                    WHEN CHARINDEX('@', [EMAIL_PAYCOM]) > 0 
                    THEN LEFT([EMAIL_PAYCOM], CHARINDEX('@', [EMAIL_PAYCOM]) - 1)
                    ELSE [EMAIL_PAYCOM]
                END AS [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER],
                [EMAIL_PAYCOM] AS [ORIGINAL_EMAIL], 
                
                -- Complex Decode for Group Code
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM] = 'CAN' THEN 6
                    WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 THEN 1
                    WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 THEN 2
                    WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'US' AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 3
                    WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' AND [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 THEN 4
                    WHEN [ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' AND [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 THEN 5
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [GROUP_CODE],
                
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_LAST],
                [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
                
                -- Flag Bad Email (Logic: If ends in @peakmade.com -> 0 (Good), Else 1 (Bad))
                CASE 
                    WHEN RIGHT([EMAIL_PAYCOM], 13) = '@peakmade.com' THEN 0 
                    ELSE 1 
                END AS [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
                
                -- Capture domain part
                CAST(RIGHT([EMAIL_PAYCOM], 13) AS VARCHAR(25)) AS [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1]
            FROM [Combo1]
            -- Filter applied in CODER view in ATL: WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
            -- Note: Since it was a Left Join, NULLs are filtered out here effectively acting as Inner Join logic
            WHERE ISNULL([FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 0) = 0
        ),
        [Export_Set] AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Typo fix logic from ATL
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'akossman' THEN 'akossmann' 
                    ELSE [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] 
                END AS VARCHAR(200)) AS [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
                [GROUP_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_LAST],
                [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
                [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
                [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1]
            FROM [Coder]
        ),
        [TwoFakes_Set] AS (
            -- This logic generates fake test accounts driven by the existence of specific employees
            SELECT 
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cpell'   THEN 'USAStudent'
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cgage'   THEN 'CanadaStudent'
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'jeckard' THEN 'AccountsPayable1'
                    ELSE [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER]
                END AS VARCHAR(200)) AS [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
                
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cpell'   THEN 1
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cgage'   THEN 4
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'jeckard' THEN 1
                    ELSE [GROUP_CODE]
                END AS [GROUP_CODE],
                
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cpell'   THEN '1111'
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'cgage'   THEN '2222'
                    WHEN [EMAIL_PAYCOM_USER] = 'jeckard' THEN '3333'
                    ELSE [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
                END AS VARCHAR(6)) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                
                CAST('--' AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [NAME_FIRST],
                CAST('--' AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [NAME_LAST],
                CAST('--' AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                CAST('--' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
                [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
                [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1]
            FROM [Coder]
            WHERE [NAME_LAST] IN ('PELL', 'GAGE', 'ECKARD')
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT] (
            [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
            [GROUP_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_LAST],
            [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
            [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
            [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
            [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            *, 
            SYSDATETIME() 
        FROM [Export_Set]
        
        UNION ALL
        
        SELECT 
            *, 
            SYSDATETIME() 
        FROM [TwoFakes_Set];

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status
    SELECT 
        'Success' AS [Status],
        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],
        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],
        'Truncate + Insert (Union Export/TwoFakes)' AS [Load_Strategy];
END;

name: AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_FINAL_LOAD_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_FINAL.
sql:
/* * ====================================================================================================================
 * SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
 * ====================================================================================================================
 */
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_FINAL_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;
    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- TRUNCATE Target (Always fresh export set)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_FINAL];

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC
         * Logic: Read from Staging Export -> Filter BAD_EMAIL = 0 -> Load to Final
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         */
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_FINAL] (
            [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
            [GROUP_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_LAST],
            [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
            [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
            [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
            [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
            [GROUP_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_LAST],
            [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
            [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
            [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
            [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL],
            [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL_1],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[AD_SECURITY_GROUPS_EXPORT] -- Source from previous step
        WHERE [FLAG_BAD_EMAIL] = 0;        -- Filter logic from ATL

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status
    SELECT 
        'Success' AS [Status],
        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],
        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],
        'Truncate + Insert (Filter Bad Emails)' AS [Load_Strategy];
END;

name: AD_USERS_0_SP
transformations: PROPERTY_NUMBER: CASE WHEN [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3] = '110' THEN '211' ELSE [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3] END
STATUS: CASE WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], 1, 4)) = 'TERM' THEN 'T' WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 1, 1)) = 'T' THEN 'T' ELSE UPPER(SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 1, 1)) END

TERMINATION_DATE: CASE WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], 1, 4)) = 'TERM' THEN TRY_CAST( -- word_ext(DESCRIPTION, 2, ' ') rearranged MMDDYYYY -> YYYYMMDD SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 5, 4) + SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 1, 2) + SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 3, 2) AS int) ELSE TRY_CAST([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7] AS int) END

FILTERED_OU: CASE WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - STUDENT%' THEN 'PROPERTIES STUDENT' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - CONVENTIONAL%' THEN 'PROPERTIES CONVENTIONAL' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - ATLANTA%' THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - REMOTE%' THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=[_]DISABLED ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'DISABLED ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS%' THEN 'CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SERVICE ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'SERVICE ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=ADMIN ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'ADMIN ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SHARED MAILBOX%' THEN 'SHARED MAILBOXES' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTY EGNYTE%' THEN 'EGNYTE ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%' THEN 'DUMMY ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=REDPOINT%' THEN 'REDPOINT ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=GOGO%' THEN 'GOGO ACCOUNTS' ELSE 'UNMATCHED' END

EXCLUDED_OU: CASE WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - STUDENT%' THEN 'PROPERTIES STUDENT' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - CONVENTIONAL%' THEN 'PROPERTIES CONVENTIONAL' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - ATLANTA%' THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - REMOTE%' THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=[_]DISABLED ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'DISABLED ACCOUNTS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS%' THEN 'CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SERVICE ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=ADMIN ACCOUNTS%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SHARED MAILBOX%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTY EGNYTE%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=REDPOINT%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=GOGO%' THEN 'EXCLUDED' ELSE 'UNMATCHED' END
FLAG_DUMMY_RECORD: CASE WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_NAME] = 'CORPORATE - ATLANTA' THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA' WHEN [PROPERTY_NAME] = 'CORPORATE - REMOTE' THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE' ELSE [PROPERTY_NAME] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_USERS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AD_USERS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @rows_inserted int = 0;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[AD_USERS_0];

    WITH AllRecords AS (
        SELECT
            UPPER([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4])                                    AS [EMPLOYEE_ID],
            TRY_CAST(
                CONVERT(varchar(8),
                    TRY_CONVERT(date,
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([WHENCREATED] AS varchar(100)), 1, 10),
                        101),
                112) AS int)                                                AS [CREATED_DATE],
            [DISTINGUISHEDNAME],
            SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 3, 5)                        AS [EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
            UPPER([GIVENNAME])                                             AS [FIRST_NAME],
            UPPER([DISPLAYNAME])                                           AS [FULL_NAME],
            UPPER([SN])                                                    AS [LAST_NAME],
            LOWER([USERPRINCIPALNAME])                                     AS [LOGIN],
            UPPER([DEPARTMENT])                                            AS [DEPARTMENT],
            LOWER([MAIL])                                                  AS [EMAIL],
            TRY_CAST([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1] AS int)                         AS [HIRE_DATE],
            [Last_Updated]                                                 AS [LAST_UPDATED],
            UPPER([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE13])                                  AS [PRONOUN],
            UPPER([PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME])                            AS [OFFICE],
            CASE WHEN [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3] = '110' THEN '211'
                 ELSE [EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3]
            END                                                            AS [PROPERTY_NUMBER],
            TRY_CAST([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9] AS int)                         AS [REHIRE_DATE],
            CASE
                WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], 1, 4)) = 'TERM' THEN 'T'
                WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 1, 1)) = 'T'  THEN 'T'
                ELSE UPPER(SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 1, 1))
            END                                                            AS [STATUS],
            CASE
                WHEN UPPER(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], 1, 4)) = 'TERM' THEN
                    TRY_CAST(
                        -- word_ext(DESCRIPTION, 2, ' ') rearranged MMDDYYYY -> YYYYMMDD
                        SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 5, 4) +
                        SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 1, 2) +
                        SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING([DESCRIPTION], CHARINDEX(' ', [DESCRIPTION]) + 1, LEN([DESCRIPTION])), 3, 2)
                    AS int)
                ELSE TRY_CAST([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7] AS int)
            END                                                            AS [TERMINATION_DATE],
            UPPER([TITLE])                                                 AS [TITLE],
            -- filtered_ou (CASE on DISTINGUISHEDNAME)
            CASE
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - STUDENT%'      THEN 'PROPERTIES STUDENT'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - CONVENTIONAL%' THEN 'PROPERTIES CONVENTIONAL'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - ATLANTA%'       THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - REMOTE%'        THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=[_]DISABLED ACCOUNTS%'      THEN 'DISABLED ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS%'     THEN 'CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SERVICE ACCOUNTS%'          THEN 'SERVICE ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=ADMIN ACCOUNTS%'            THEN 'ADMIN ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SHARED MAILBOX%'            THEN 'SHARED MAILBOXES'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTY EGNYTE%'           THEN 'EGNYTE ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%'                    THEN 'DUMMY ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=REDPOINT%'                  THEN 'REDPOINT ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=GOGO%'                      THEN 'GOGO ACCOUNTS'
                ELSE 'UNMATCHED'
            END                                                            AS [FILTERED_OU],
            -- excluded_ou (same pattern but SERVICE/ADMIN/SHARED/EGNYTE/!DUMMY/REDPOINT/GOGO -> 'EXCLUDED')
            CASE
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - STUDENT%'      THEN 'PROPERTIES STUDENT'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTIES - CONVENTIONAL%' THEN 'PROPERTIES CONVENTIONAL'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - ATLANTA%'       THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CORPORATE - REMOTE%'        THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=[_]DISABLED ACCOUNTS%'      THEN 'DISABLED ACCOUNTS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS%'     THEN 'CONTRACTORS AND TEMPS'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SERVICE ACCOUNTS%'          THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=ADMIN ACCOUNTS%'            THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=SHARED MAILBOX%'            THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=PROPERTY EGNYTE%'           THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%'                    THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=REDPOINT%'                  THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=GOGO%'                      THEN 'EXCLUDED'
                ELSE 'UNMATCHED'
            END                                                            AS [EXCLUDED_OU],
            CASE WHEN UPPER([DISTINGUISHEDNAME]) LIKE '%OU=!DUMMY%' THEN 1 ELSE 0
            END                                                            AS [FLAG_DUMMY_RECORD]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USERS]
        WHERE SUBSTRING([EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE14], 1, 1) <> 'T'
          AND [USERPRINCIPALNAME] NOT LIKE '%peakcampus.com'
    ),
    Properties AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [ENTITY_NUMBER]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 0
          AND [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY]  = 0
          AND [ENTITY_NUMBER]     IS NOT NULL
          AND [FLAG_TENTATIVE]    = 0
          AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED]= 0
    ),
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            AR.[LOGIN],
            AR.[CREATED_DATE],
            AR.[DEPARTMENT],
            AR.[EMAIL],
            AR.[EMPLOYEE_ID],
            AR.[EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
            AR.[PROPERTY_NUMBER]                        AS [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            AR.[EXCLUDED_OU],
            AR.[FILTERED_OU],
            AR.[FIRST_NAME],
            AR.[FLAG_DUMMY_RECORD],
            AR.[FULL_NAME],
            AR.[HIRE_DATE],
            AR.[LAST_NAME],
            AR.[LAST_UPDATED],
            AR.[PRONOUN],
            ISNULL(AR.[OFFICE], AR.[FILTERED_OU])      AS [OFFICE],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            AR.[REHIRE_DATE],
            AR.[STATUS],
            AR.[TERMINATION_DATE],
            AR.[TITLE]
        FROM AllRecords AR
        LEFT OUTER JOIN Properties P
            ON AR.[PROPERTY_NUMBER] = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
        WHERE AR.[EXCLUDED_OU] <> 'DISABLED ACCOUNTS'
          AND AR.[EXCLUDED_OU] <> 'UNMATCHED'
          AND AR.[LOGIN]       <> 'terrazul@peakmade.com'
          AND AR.[LOGIN]       <> 'themanning@peakmade.com'
    ),
    Offices AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([PROPERTY_KEY]) AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
            CASE
                WHEN [PROPERTY_NAME] = 'CORPORATE - ATLANTA' THEN 'CORPORATE ATLANTA'
                WHEN [PROPERTY_NAME] = 'CORPORATE - REMOTE'  THEN 'CORPORATE REMOTE'
                ELSE [PROPERTY_NAME]
            END                 AS [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1
          AND [FLAG_RETAIL]        = 0
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_NAME]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[AD_USERS_0] (
        [LOGIN],
        [CREATED_DATE],
        [DEPARTMENT],
        [EMAIL],
        [EMPLOYEE_ID],
        [EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
        [ENTITY_NUMBER],
        [EXCLUDED_OU],
        [FILTERED_OU],
        [FIRST_NAME],
        [FLAG_DUMMY_RECORD],
        [FULL_NAME],
        [HIRE_DATE],
        [LAST_NAME],
        [LAST_UPDATED],
        [PRONOUN],
        [OFFICE],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [REHIRE_DATE],
        [STATUS],
        [TERMINATION_DATE],
        [TITLE]
    )
    SELECT
        C.[LOGIN],
        C.[CREATED_DATE],
        C.[DEPARTMENT],
        C.[EMAIL],
        C.[EMPLOYEE_ID],
        C.[EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
        C.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
        C.[EXCLUDED_OU],
        C.[FILTERED_OU],
        C.[FIRST_NAME],
        C.[FLAG_DUMMY_RECORD],
        C.[FULL_NAME],
        C.[HIRE_DATE],
        C.[LAST_NAME],
        C.[LAST_UPDATED],
        C.[PRONOUN],
        C.[OFFICE],
        ISNULL(C.[PROPERTY_KEY], O.[PROPERTY_KEY]) AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        C.[REHIRE_DATE],
        C.[STATUS],
        C.[TERMINATION_DATE],
        C.[TITLE]
    FROM Combo C
    LEFT OUTER JOIN Offices O
        ON C.[OFFICE] = O.[PROPERTY_NAME]
    WHERE C.[LOGIN] <> 'terrazul@peakmade.com'
      AND C.[LOGIN] <> 'themanning@peakmade.com';

    SET @rows_inserted = @@ROWCOUNT;
    PRINT 'AD_USERS_0_SP: rows inserted = ' + CAST(@rows_inserted AS varchar(20));

END

name: AGENTS_0_SP
transformations: EMPLOYEE_CODE: CASE WHEN ID = 328552 THEN 'A4O4' ELSE EMPLOYEE_CODE END
SYSTEM_USER_FLAG: CASE WHEN CE.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_COMPANY_EMPLOYEES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_COMPANY_USERS into WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- ================================================== 
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ================================================== 

/*
   Stored Procedure: [dbo].[AGENTS_0_SP]
   Source Tables: 
     - [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_EMPLOYEES]
     - [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS]
     - [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USER_TYPES]
*/

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[AGENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AGENTS_0];

        -- 2. Processing Logic
        WITH [CTE_CompanyEmps] AS (
            SELECT 
                ID,
                -- Logic: decode(ID = 328552, 'A4O4', EMPLOYEE_CODE)
                CASE 
                    WHEN ID = 328552 THEN 'A4O4'
                    ELSE EMPLOYEE_CODE 
                END AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                UPPER(NAME_FIRST) AS [NAME_FIRST],
                UPPER(NAME_LAST) AS [NAME_LAST],
                IS_EMPLOYEE
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_EMPLOYEES]
        ),
        
        [CTE_CompanyUsers] AS (
            SELECT 
                U.ID,
                UPPER(U.USERNAME) AS [USERNAME],
                UT.NAME AS [COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
                U.COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID,
                U.LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATE,
                U.LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATEID,
                ISNULL(U.COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID, U.ID) AS [COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID],
                U.IS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USER,
                U.IS_ADMINISTRATOR,
                U.IS_DISABLED
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS] U
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USER_TYPES] UT
                ON UT.ID = U.COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID
        ),
        
        [CTE_Creators] AS (
            SELECT 
                CU.ID AS [COMPANY_USER_ID],
                
                CAST(CU.USERNAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
                
                CAST(CU.COMPANY_USER_TYPE AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
                
                CU.COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID,
                CU.LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATE AS [DATE_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
                CU.LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT_ON_DATEID AS [DATEID_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
                
                -- Employee Code Override Logic
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN CU.ID = 206450 THEN 'A0V2'
                    ELSE CE.EMPLOYEE_CODE 
                END AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                
                ISNULL(CE.ID, CU.ID) AS [EMPLOYEE_ID],
                
                -- Complex Employee Name Logic
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN CE.ID IS NULL AND CU.USERNAME = 'ENTRATAILSAPIUSER' THEN 'ENTRATA SYSTEM'
                    WHEN CE.ID IS NULL AND CU.USERNAME = 'ENTRATA AUTOMATED INITIAL IMPORT' THEN 'ENTRATA AUTOMATED INITIAL IMPORT'
                    WHEN CE.ID IS NULL AND CU.USERNAME LIKE 'ENTRATA%' THEN 'ENTRATA SYSTEM'
                    WHEN CE.ID IS NULL THEN CU.USERNAME
                    ELSE ISNULL(CE.NAME_FIRST, '') + ' ' + ISNULL(CE.NAME_LAST, '')
                END AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                
                CAST(ISNULL(CE.NAME_FIRST, '--') AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
                CAST(ISNULL(CE.NAME_LAST, '--') AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
                
                ISNULL(CU.IS_ACTIVE_DIRECTORY_USER, -1) AS [FLAG_AD_USER],
                ISNULL(CU.IS_ADMINISTRATOR, -1) AS [FLAG_ADMINISTRATOR],
                ISNULL(CU.IS_DISABLED, -1) AS [FLAG_DISABLED],
                ISNULL(CE.IS_EMPLOYEE, -1) AS [FLAG_EMPLOYEE],
                
                ISNULL(CE.ID, CU.ID) AS [LEASING_AGENT_ID],
                
                CASE 
                    WHEN CE.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [SYSTEM_USER_FLAG]

            FROM [CTE_CompanyUsers] CU
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [CTE_CompanyEmps] CE
                ON CE.ID = CU.COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AGENTS_0] (
            [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            [COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
            [COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID],
            [DATE_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
            [DATEID_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_ID],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            [FLAG_AD_USER],
            [FLAG_ADMINISTRATOR],
            [FLAG_DISABLED],
            [FLAG_EMPLOYEE],
            [LEASING_AGENT_ID],
            [SYSTEM_USER_FLAG],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            [COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
            [COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID],
            [DATE_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
            [DATEID_LAST_LOGIN_ATTEMPT],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_ID],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            [FLAG_AD_USER],
            [FLAG_ADMINISTRATOR],
            [FLAG_DISABLED],
            [FLAG_EMPLOYEE],
            [LEASING_AGENT_ID],
            [SYSTEM_USER_FLAG],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_Creators];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: AGENT_LEASES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASES_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENTS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENT_LEASES_0.
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Agent_Leases_0
--
-- Sources (both WH_STAGING):
--   AGENTS_0  : filtered to COMPANY_USER_ID > 195835 (excludes system user IDs)
--   LEASES_F  : filtered to DATE_APPROVED >= 20190801, FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0, FLAG_FALL_TOTAL > 0
--
-- Join: Leases INNER JOIN Agents ON LEASING_AGENT_ID
--
-- Aggregate: GROUP BY LEASING_AGENT_ID, EMPLOYEE_CODE, COMPANY_USER_ID,
--            EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST, EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST
--            SUM(FLAG_FALL_NEW), SUM(FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL), SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENT_LEASES_0
--
-- Note: ATL also writes Combo to Xtemp.DBO.AGENT_LEASES_1 — Xtemp is a BODS
--       intermediate scratch store; omitted here as it has no Fabric equivalent.

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AGENT_LEASES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[AGENT_LEASES_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[AGENT_LEASES_0] (
        [LEASING_AGENT_ID],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [FLAG_FALL_NEW],
        [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
        [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
        [COMPANY_USER_ID],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        a.[LEASING_AGENT_ID],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        SUM(l.[FLAG_FALL_NEW]),
        SUM(l.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]),
        SUM(l.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]),
        a.[COMPANY_USER_ID],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [dbo].[LEASES_F] l
    INNER JOIN [dbo].[AGENTS_0] a
        ON l.[LEASING_AGENT_ID] = a.[LEASING_AGENT_ID]
    WHERE l.[DATE_APPROVED] >= 20190801
      AND l.[FLAG_HOLDOVER] = 0
      AND l.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] > 0
      AND a.[COMPANY_USER_ID] > 195835
    GROUP BY
        a.[LEASING_AGENT_ID],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        a.[COMPANY_USER_ID],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST];

END

name: ALDENGROUP_GC_EXPORT_LOAD_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_PROD2.dbo.DATES, WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY into WH_STAGING.dbo.ALDENGROUP_GC_EXPORT (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ALDENGROUP_GC_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Transaction Start
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0 BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ALDENGROUP_GC_EXPORT];

        -- 2. Define Transformations using CTEs
        
        -- CTE_Yesterday: Filter Dates for Relative Day -1
        ;WITH CTE_Yesterday AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [AY]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1
        ),

        -- CTE_PropertyList: Filter for specific properties
        CTE_PropertyList AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
              AND [PROPERTY_NAME] IN (
                  '48 WEST',
                  'CANOPY',
                  'COTTAGES AT TUCSON',
                  'DAKOTA RANCH STUDENT APARTMENTS',
                  'THE CARMIN',
                  'THE LODGE OF ATHENS',
                  'WILDWOOD BATON ROUGE'
              )
        ),

        -- CTE_LeaseDetails: Filter Facts based on flags
        CTE_LeaseDetails AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [LEASE_AY_KEY],
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [CUSTOMER_NAME],
                [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], -- Mapped to INTERVAL_TYPE in target
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
                [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
                [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS]
            WHERE [FLAG_GIFT_CARD] >= 1 
               OR [FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT] >= 1 
               OR [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL] >= 1
        ),

        -- CTE_Combo: Join Logic
        CTE_Combo AS (
            SELECT 
                ld.[DATE_KEY],
                ld.[LEASE_AY_KEY],
                ld.[AY],
                p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                ld.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
                ld.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] AS [INTERVAL_TYPE],
                ld.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                ld.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
                ld.[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
                ld.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT]
            FROM CTE_LeaseDetails ld
            INNER JOIN CTE_Yesterday d 
                ON ld.[DATE_KEY] = d.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND ld.[AY] = d.[AY]
            INNER JOIN CTE_PropertyList p 
                ON ld.[PROPERTY_KEY] = p.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ALDENGROUP_GC_EXPORT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [LEASE_AY_KEY],
            [AY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
            [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [LEASE_AY_KEY],
            [AY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
            [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Combo;
        
        -- Commit Transaction
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Rollback if error
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: APEX_0_SP

            MAX(CASE WHEN [ACCOUNTS] = 'Utility Expense' THEN [ACT_PERIOD_DATA] END) AS [UTILITY_EXPENSE_ACTUAL],

            MAX(CASE WHEN [ACCOUNTS] = 'Utility Income' THEN [ACT_PERIOD_DATA] END) AS [UTILITY_INCOME_ACTUAL],

        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[APEX_IMPORT]
        GROUP BY 
            [PERIOD],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [ENTITY_ID],
            [ENTITY_NAME];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

            [LEASING_REFERRALS_ACTUAL], [LEASING_REFERRALS_BUDGET],
            [MANAGEMENT_FEES_ACTUAL], [MANAGEMENT_FEES_BUDGET],
            [NOI_ACTUAL], [NOI_BUDGET],
            [OPERATING_EXPENSES_ACTUAL], [OPERATING_EXPENSES_BUDGET],
            [OTHER_OPERATING_EXPENSES_ACTUAL], [OTHER_OPERATING_EXPENSES_BUDGET],
            [OTHER_REVENUE_ACTUAL], [OTHER_REVENUE_BUDGET],
            [OUTSIDE_SERVICES_ACTUAL], [OUTSIDE_SERVICES_BUDGET],
            [PAYROLL_ACTUAL], [PAYROLL_BUDGET],
            [PL_INCOME_ACTUAL], [PL_INCOME_BUDGET],
            [RENTAL_INCOME_ACTUAL], [RENTAL_INCOME_BUDGET],
            [REPAIRS_AND_MAINTENANCE_ACTUAL], [REPAIRS_AND_MAINTENANCE_BUDGET],
            [RESIDENT_LIFE_ACTUAL], [RESIDENT_LIFE_BUDGET],
            [RESIDENT_RECRUITMENT_RETENTION_ACTUAL], [RESIDENT_RECRUITMENT_RETENTION_BUDGET],
            [RETAIL_COMMERCIAL_EXPENSES_ACTUAL], [RETAIL_COMMERCIAL_EXPENSES_BUDGET],
            [RETAIL_COMMERCIAL_INCOME_ACTUAL], [RETAIL_COMMERCIAL_INCOME_BUDGET],
            [TAXES_AND_INSURANCE_ACTUAL], [TAXES_AND_INSURANCE_BUDGET],
            [TELECOM_INCOME_ACTUAL], [TELECOM_INCOME_BUDGET],
            [TELECOM_SVCS_ACTUAL], [TELECOM_SVCS_BUDGET],
            [TURNOVER_RECOVERABLE_COSTS_ACTUAL], [TURNOVER_RECOVERABLE_COSTS_BUDGET],
            [UTILITY_EXPENSE_ACTUAL], [UTILITY_EXPENSE_BUDGET],
            [UTILITY_INCOME_ACTUAL], [UTILITY_INCOME_BUDGET],
            [VACANCY_LOSS_ACTUAL], [VACANCY_LOSS_BUDGET]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APEX_FACTS_F];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;
