CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICANT_TRANSMISSIONS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Truncate Target
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICANT_TRANSMISSIONS_0];

    -- Step 2: Transform and Load
    WITH [Raw_Data] AS (
        SELECT
            T.[APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSION_ID],
            T.[APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID],
            A.[APPLICANT_ID],
            T.[APPLICATION_ID],
            TRY_CAST(SUBSTRING(T.[REPORT_NAME], 1, 5) AS INT) AS [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION],
            T.[TRANSMISSION_DATETIME],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
                PARTITION BY T.[APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID]
                ORDER BY T.[APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSION_ID] DESC
            ) AS [Rn]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSIONS] T
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_APPLICATIONS] A
            ON A.[ID] = T.[APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID]
            AND A.[APPLICATION_ID] = T.[APPLICATION_ID]
    ),

    [Classified_Data] AS (
        SELECT
            [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSION_ID],
            [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID],
            [APPLICANT_ID],
            [APPLICATION_ID],
            [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION],
            CASE
                WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION] IN (
                    67547,67554,76279,76281,81019,81626,82480,82499,84349,84450,
                    84498,84504,84525,84642,84644,84666,84678,84885,86156,86158,
                    86515,86594,86596,86604,86606,86667,92157,92158,94056
                ) THEN 'LEAP'
                WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION] IN (
                    55195,55198,55694,55696,58018,58028,58031,58033,58862,60172,
                    60176,60313,60921,61333,61554,61856,62175,62463,62540,62541,
                    62542,62543,62545,62549,62550,62551,62554,62556,62558,62823,
                    62929,63079,63250,63257,63258,63262,63264,63266,63267,63423,
                    63607,64809,64811,65148,65750,65753,65834,65836,65838,66476,
                    66556,66559,66859,66860,66861,66863,66866,67208,67210,67341,
                    67343,67345,67346,67348,67349,69656,72409,72410,72412,72690,
                    72693,72712,76252,76253,76254,76255,76258,76262,76263,76264,
                    76265,76266,76267,76268,76269,76270,76271,76273,76274,76275,
                    76277,76278,76283,78218,80570,81021,81602,81603,81619,81624,
                    81630,81635,81636,82470,83019,83466,83467,83469,83473,83713,
                    83714,84004,84016,84356,84500,84509,84513,84514,84521,84524,
                    84527,84528,84533,84534,84537,84538,84550,84636,84637,84639,
                    84640,84643,84645,84646,84647,84648,84650,84652,84653,84654,
                    84657,84658,84659,84662,84663,84664,84665,84667,84668,84669,
                    84671,84674,84675,84677,84679,84680,84682,84881,84882,84886,
                    84887,86097,86161,86163,86362,86368,86371
                ) THEN 'SELF'
                WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION] IN (
                    55195,55197,55472,55692,55776,58026,59900,61244,61854,62533,
                    62538,62553,63163,63259,63425,65835,66629,66862,67207,67347,
                    67556,70692,72653,72680,72681,72694,73333,75888,76259,76261,
                    76276,76280,76284,76285,81612,81617,81618,82472,83016,83424,
                    83856,84008,84351,84501,84507,84532,84535,84548,84551,84638,
                    84641,84655,84660,84673,84676,84683,84890,86150,87015,91097,
                    91183,91348,91462,93904,94507
                ) THEN 'GUARANTOR'
                ELSE 'NOT QUALIFIED'
            END AS [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED]
        FROM [Raw_Data]
        WHERE [Rn] = 1
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICANT_TRANSMISSIONS_0]
    (
        [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSION_ID],
        [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID],
        [APPLICANT_ID],
        [APPLICATION_ID],
        [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR],
        [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP],
        [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE],
        [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
        [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID],
        [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED]
    )
    SELECT
        [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_TRANSMISSION_ID],
        [APPLICANT_APPLICATION_ID],
        [APPLICANT_ID],
        [APPLICATION_ID],
        CASE WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED] = 'GUARANTOR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED] = 'LEAP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED] = 'NOT QUALIFIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED] = 'SELF' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        [SCREENING_PACKAGE_ID_SELECTION],
        [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED]
    FROM [Classified_Data];

END;

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_APPLICANTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @rows_inserted int = 0;

    -- Drop work table from any previous failed run
    IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.APPLICATIONS_0_WORK', 'U') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE [xtemp].[APPLICATIONS_0_WORK];

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Step 1: Build the full Combo + Output result into xtemp
    --   Apps CTE:       filtered/transformed E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS
    --   Main SELECT:    29-table join with all column transformations
    --   APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0: deduplicated to most recent per app
    --   APPLICANT_SCREENING:            deduplicated to most recent per app+applicant
    -- =========================================================================
    ;WITH Apps AS (
        SELECT
            [ID]                                                              AS APPLICATION_ID,
            [PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID]                                            AS APPLICANT_ID,
            [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],
            [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],
            [APPLICATION_DATE]                                                AS DATE_APPLICATION,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_APPROVED_ON_DATE], 0)                         AS DATE_APPROVED,
            ISNULL([CANCELLED_ON_DATE], 0)                                    AS DATE_CANCELLED,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_COMPLETED_ON_DATE], 0)                        AS DATE_COMPLETED,
            [CREATED_ON_DATE]                                                 AS DATE_CREATED,
            ISNULL([LEASE_APPROVED_ON_DATE], 0)                               AS DATE_LEASE_APPROVED,
            -- DATE_LEASE_BEGIN: cap at 20300801; if lease start = created date,
            --   use Oct 1 of same or next year depending on month (0828 cutoff)
            CAST(CASE
                WHEN [LEASE_START_DATE] > 20300801
                    THEN '20300801'
                WHEN [LEASE_START_DATE] = [CREATED_ON_DATE]
                     AND SUBSTRING(CAST([CREATED_ON_DATE] AS varchar(8)), 5, 4) >= '0828'
                    THEN CAST(CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST([CREATED_ON_DATE] AS varchar(8)), 1, 4) AS int) + 1 AS varchar(4)) + '1001'
                WHEN [LEASE_START_DATE] = [CREATED_ON_DATE]
                     AND SUBSTRING(CAST([CREATED_ON_DATE] AS varchar(8)), 5, 4) <= '0827'
                    THEN SUBSTRING(CAST([CREATED_ON_DATE] AS varchar(8)), 1, 4) + '1001'
                ELSE CAST([LEASE_START_DATE] AS varchar(8))
            END AS int)                                                       AS DATE_LEASE_BEGIN,
            ISNULL([LEASE_COMPLETED_ON_DATE], 0)                              AS DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED,
            -- DATE_LEASE_END: cap at 20310731; if 0 use LEASE_START_DATE
            CASE
                WHEN ISNULL([LEASE_END_DATE], 0) > 20310731 THEN 20310731
                ELSE CASE
                         WHEN ISNULL([LEASE_END_DATE], 0) = 0 THEN [LEASE_START_DATE]
                         ELSE [LEASE_END_DATE]
                     END
            END                                                               AS DATE_LEASE_END,
            ISNULL([LEASE_GENERATED_ON_DATE], 0)                              AS DATE_LEASE_GENERATED,
            ISNULL([SCREENING_APPROVED_ON_DATE], 0)                           AS DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED,
            ISNULL([SITE_VISITED_ON_DATE], 0)                                 AS DATE_SITE_VISITED,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_STARTED_ON_DATE], 0)                          AS DATE_STARTED,
            ISNULL([PROPERTY_TOURED_ON_DATE], 0)                              AS DATE_TOURED,
            ISNULL([UNIT_TOURED_ON_DATE], 0)                                  AS DATE_UNIT_TOURED,
            [UPDATED_ON_DATE]                                                 AS DATE_UPDATED,
            [APPLICATION_DATEID]                                              AS DATEID_APPLICATION,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_APPROVED_ON_DATEID], 0)                       AS DATEID_APPROVED,
            ISNULL([CANCELLED_ON_DATEID], 0)                                  AS DATEID_CANCELLED,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_COMPLETED_ON_DATEID], 0)                      AS DATEID_COMPLETED,
            [CREATED_ON_DATEID]                                               AS DATEID_CREATED,
            ISNULL([LEASE_APPROVED_ON_DATEID], 0)                             AS DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED,
            [LEASE_START_DATEID]                                              AS DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN,
            ISNULL([LEASE_COMPLETED_ON_DATEID], 0)                            AS DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED,
            ISNULL([LEASE_END_DATEID], 0)                                     AS DATEID_LEASE_END,
            ISNULL([LEASE_GENERATED_ON_DATEID], 0)                            AS DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED,
            ISNULL([SCREENING_APPROVED_ON_DATEID], 0)                         AS DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED,
            ISNULL([SITE_VISITED_ON_DATEID], 0)                               AS DATEID_SITE_VISITED,
            ISNULL([APPLICATION_STARTED_ON_DATEID], 0)                        AS DATEID_STARTED,
            ISNULL([PROPERTY_TOURED_ON_DATEID], 0)                            AS DATEID_TOURED,
            ISNULL([UNIT_TOURED_ON_DATEID], 0)                                AS DATEID_UNIT_TOURED,
            [UPDATED_ON_DATEID]                                               AS DATEID_UPDATED,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_BATHROOMS], -1.0)                                 AS DESIRED_BATHROOMS,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_BEDROOMS], -1)                                    AS DESIRED_BEDROOMS,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_OCCUPANTS], -1)                                   AS DESIRED_OCCUPANTS,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_PETS], -1)                                        AS DESIRED_PETS,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_RENT_MAX], -1.00)                                 AS DESIRED_RENT_MAX,
            ISNULL([DESIRED_RENT_MIN], -1.00)                                 AS DESIRED_RENT_MIN,
            [DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID]                                  AS DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG_ID,
            ISNULL([INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID], 0)                          AS INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID,
            [ORIGINATING_LEAD_SOURCE_ID]                                      AS LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            ISNULL([LEASE_ID], 0)                                             AS LEASE_ID,
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [LEASE_TERM_ID],
            ISNULL([LEASE_TYPE_ID], 0)                                        AS LEASE_TYPE_ID,
            ISNULL([LEASING_AGENT_ID], 0)                                     AS LEASING_AGENT_ID,
            ISNULL([UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], '--')                                  AS UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE,
            ISNULL([UNIT_SPACE_ID], 0)                                        AS UNIT_SPACE_ID,
            ISNULL([UNIT_SQUARE_FEET], 0)                                     AS UNIT_SQUARE_FEET,
            ISNULL([UNIT_TYPE_ID], 0)                                         AS UNIT_TYPE_ID,
            ISNULL([URL_REFERER], '--')                                        AS URL_REFERER,
            ISNULL([WEBSITE_ID], 0)                                           AS WEBSITE_ID,
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [APPLICATION_STAGE_ID]                                            AS STAGE_ID,
            [APPLICATION_STATUS_ID]                                           AS STATUS_ID,
            [APPLICATION_STEP_ID]                                             AS STEP_ID,
            [TERM_MONTH],
            ISNULL([QUOTE_ID], 0)                                             AS QUOTE_ID,
            [SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID],
            [OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID],
            [IS_LEAD]                                                         AS FLAG_LEAD_RAW,
            [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID]                                           AS FLOORPLAN_ID_RAW
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
        WHERE [IS_DELETED] = '0'
    )
    SELECT
        CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS int)        AS [DATE_KEY],
        CAST(DATEADD(day,-1,CAST(GETDATE() AS date)) AS datetime2(6))            AS [DATE_TIME],
        Apps.[APPLICATION_ID],
        ISNULL(PAY.[AY], 0)                                                     AS [AY],
        LW.[AY_WEEK],
        LW.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
        LW.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
        LW.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
        ISNULL(Ap.[EMAIL_ADDRESS], '--')                                        AS [APPLICANT_EMAIL],
        ISNULL(Ap.[GENDER], 'U')                                                AS [APPLICANT_GENDER],
        Apps.[APPLICANT_ID],
        CASE
            WHEN Ap.[NAME_FIRST] IS NOT NULL AND Ap.[NAME_LAST] IS NOT NULL AND Ap.[NAME_MIDDLE] IS NOT NULL
                THEN Ap.[NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + SUBSTRING(Ap.[NAME_MIDDLE],1,1) + '. ' + Ap.[NAME_LAST]
            WHEN Ap.[NAME_FIRST] IS NOT NULL AND Ap.[NAME_LAST] IS NOT NULL
                THEN Ap.[NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + Ap.[NAME_LAST]
            ELSE '--'
        END                                                                     AS [APPLICANT_NAME],
        ISNULL(Ap.[NAME_FIRST], '--')                                           AS [APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST],
        ISNULL(Ap.[NAME_LAST], '--')                                            AS [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST],
        ISNULL(Ap.[NAME_MIDDLE], '')                                            AS [APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ISNULL(Ap.[MOBILE_NUMBER],''),1,3) = '+1 '
                    THEN SUBSTRING(Ap.[MOBILE_NUMBER],4,15) ELSE Ap.[MOBILE_NUMBER] END, '--')  AS [APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ISNULL(Ap.[PHONE_NUMBER],''),1,3) = '+1 '
                    THEN SUBSTRING(Ap.[PHONE_NUMBER],4,15) ELSE Ap.[PHONE_NUMBER] END, '--')    AS [APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(ISNULL(Ap.[WORK_NUMBER],''),1,3) = '+1 '
                    THEN SUBSTRING(Ap.[WORK_NUMBER],4,15) ELSE Ap.[WORK_NUMBER] END, '--')      AS [APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK],
        CLI.[NAME]                                                              AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],
        Apps.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],
        CLT.[NAME]                                                              AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],
        Apps.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_CALL], 0)                                           AS [CONTACT_SUM_CALL],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_CHAT], 0)                                           AS [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_EVENT_COUNT], 0)                                         AS [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_EMAIL], 0)                                          AS [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_INBOUND], 0)                                        AS [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_ONLINE], 0)                                         AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT], 0)                                   AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_SMS], 0)                                            AS [CONTACT_SUM_SMS],
        ISNULL(CE.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0)                                   AS [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        1                                                                       AS [COUNT],
        Ap.[CUSTOMER_ID],
        CASE
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(CU.[NAME_FIRST],''))) <> ''
             AND LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(CU.[NAME_LAST],''))) <> ''
             AND LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(CU.[NAME_MIDDLE],''))) <> ''
                THEN LTRIM(RTRIM(CU.[NAME_FIRST])) + ' ' + SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(CU.[NAME_MIDDLE])),1,1) + '. ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(CU.[NAME_LAST]))
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(CU.[NAME_FIRST],''))) <> ''
             AND LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(CU.[NAME_LAST],''))) <> ''
                THEN LTRIM(RTRIM(CU.[NAME_FIRST])) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(CU.[NAME_LAST]))
            ELSE '--'
        END                                                                     AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],
        CU.[NAME_FIRST]                                                         AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
        CU.[NAME_LAST]                                                          AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
        CU.[NAME_MIDDLE]                                                        AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],
        Apps.[DATE_APPLICATION],
        Apps.[DATE_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED],
        Apps.[DATE_COMPLETED],
        Apps.[DATE_CREATED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT], 0)                                        AS [DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_DATE_EVENT], 0)                                         AS [DATE_LAST_CONTACT],
        Apps.[DATE_LEASE_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATE_LEASE_BEGIN],
        Apps.[DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED],
        Apps.[DATE_LEASE_END],
        Apps.[DATE_LEASE_GENERATED],
        ISNULL(MSS.[MAX_DATE_KEY],
               CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS int)) AS [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
        PAY.[AY_BEGIN_DATE]                                                     AS [DATE_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN],
        PAY.[AY_END_DATE]                                                       AS [DATE_PROPERTY_AY_END],
        PF.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED]                                                 AS [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
        Apps.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATE_SITE_VISITED],
        Apps.[DATE_STARTED],
        Apps.[DATE_CREATED]                                                     AS [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],
        Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED]                                                   AS [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED],
        -- DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE: set to yesterday when first crossing step 343
        CASE
            WHEN (CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] = 0
                       THEN SSL.[ID]
                       ELSE MSS.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] END) >= 343
             AND ISNULL(PS.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], 0) < 343
            THEN CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS int)
            ELSE PS.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE]
        END                                                                     AS [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
        -- DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE: set to yesterday when first crossing step 229
        CASE
            WHEN (CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] = 0
                       THEN SSL.[ID]
                       ELSE MSS.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] END) >= 229
             AND ISNULL(PS.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], 0) < 229
            THEN CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS int)
            ELSE PS.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE]
        END                                                                     AS [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
        Apps.[DATE_TOURED],
        Apps.[DATE_UNIT_TOURED],
        Apps.[DATE_UPDATED],
        Apps.[DATEID_APPLICATION],
        Apps.[DATEID_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
        Apps.[DATEID_COMPLETED],
        Apps.[DATEID_CREATED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_DATEID_EVENT], 0)                                      AS [DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_DATEID_EVENT], 0)                                       AS [DATEID_LAST_CONTACT],
        Apps.[DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN],
        Apps.[DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED],
        Apps.[DATEID_LEASE_END],
        Apps.[DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],
        PAY.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID]                                                   AS [DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN],
        PAY.[AY_END_DATEID]                                                     AS [DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_END],
        Apps.[DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED],
        Apps.[DATEID_SITE_VISITED],
        Apps.[DATEID_STARTED],
        Apps.[DATEID_TOURED],
        Apps.[DATEID_UNIT_TOURED],
        Apps.[DATEID_UPDATED],
        Apps.[DESIRED_BATHROOMS],
        Apps.[DESIRED_BEDROOMS],
        Apps.[DESIRED_OCCUPANTS],
        Apps.[DESIRED_PETS],
        Apps.[DESIRED_RENT_MAX],
        Apps.[DESIRED_RENT_MIN],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN DSC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT] = 2
                    THEN DSC.[NAME] + ' - MULTI SPACE'
                    ELSE DSC.[NAME] END, '--')                                  AS [DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG],
        Apps.[DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG_ID],
        ISNULL(DSC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT], 0)                                       AS [DESIRED_SPACE_UNIT_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_APP_ACTIVE],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_APPROVED] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                   AS [FLAG_APP_APPROVED],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_APP_CANCELLED],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_COMPLETED] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],
        MSS.[FLAG_FORCED_STATUS]                                                AS [FLAG_FORCED_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CALL], 0)                                         AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CALL_LEASED], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CALL_TOURED], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CHAT], 0)                                         AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CHAT_LEASED], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_CHAT_TOURED], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL], 0)                                        AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL_LEASED], 0)                                 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL_TOURED], 0)                                 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_INBOUND], 0)                                      AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE], 0)                                       AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE_LEASED], 0)                                AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE_TOURED], 0)                                AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT], 0)                                 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        0                                                                       AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_SMS], 0)                                          AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_SMS_LEASED], 0)                                   AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_SMS_TOURED], 0)                                   AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0)                                 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED], 0)                          AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED], 0)                          AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_CALL], 0)                                          AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_CHAT], 0)                                          AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_EMAIL], 0)                                         AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_INBOUND], 0)                                       AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_LEASED], 0)                                        AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_ONLINE], 0)                                        AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_SMS], 0)                                           AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0)                                  AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        -- FLAG_LEAD: only count as lead if IS_LEAD=1 AND lease interval type is 'APPLICATION'
        CASE WHEN Apps.[FLAG_LEAD_RAW] = 1 AND UPPER(LIT.[NAME]) = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END  AS [FLAG_LEAD],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN OT.[NAME] = 'OTHER INCOME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0)      AS [FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN OT.[NAME] = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0)      AS [FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN OT.[NAME] = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0)           AS [FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT],
        PF.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED]                                                 AS [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS [FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED],
        Scr.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR],
        Scr.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP],
        Scr.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE],
        Scr.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
        CASE WHEN (WA.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL OR WC.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL
                OR WCO.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL OR WI.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL)
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                                                  AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY],
        CASE WHEN WA.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS],
        CASE WHEN WC.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS],
        CASE WHEN WCO.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                 AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES],
        CASE WHEN WI.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                  AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES],
        ISNULL(ISNULL(FP.[FLOORPLAN], UT.[FLOORPLAN]), 'UNASSIGNED')           AS [FLOORPLAN],
        ISNULL(ISNULL(FP.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], UT.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]), 'UNASSIGNED') AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
        ISNULL(ISNULL(Apps.[FLOORPLAN_ID_RAW], UT.[FLOORPLAN_ID]), 0)          AS [FLOORPLAN_ID],
        ISNULL(ISNULL(FP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], UT.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]), 0)              AS [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_CATEGORY], '--')                                       AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_CATEGORY_ID], 0)                                       AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_EMP_ID], 0)                                            AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID],
        CASE
            WHEN CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_FIRST] IS NOT NULL AND CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_LAST] IS NOT NULL
                THEN CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_LAST]
            ELSE '--'
        END                                                                     AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_FIRST], '--')                                 AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_EMP_NAME_LAST], '--')                                  AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_GROUP_TYPE], '--')                                     AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_ID], 0)                                                AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_ID],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_TYPE], '--')                                           AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE],
        ISNULL(CE.[FIRST_TYPE_ID], 0)                                           AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID],
        ISNULL(ILS.[NAME], '--')                                                AS [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE],
        Apps.[INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_CATEGORY], '--')                                        AS [LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_GROUP_TYPE], '--')                                      AS [LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_ID], 0)                                                 AS [LAST_CONTACT_ID],
        ISNULL(CE.[LAST_EVENT_ORDER], 0)                                        AS [LAST_CONTACT_ORDER],
        CAST(ISNULL(CE.[LAST_TYPE], '--') AS varchar(100))                      AS [LAST_CONTACT_TYPE],
        ISNULL(OLS.[NAME], '--')                                                AS [LEAD_SOURCE],
        ISNULL(Apps.[LEAD_SOURCE_ID], 0)                                        AS [LEAD_SOURCE_ID],
        ISNULL(OLS.[LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE], '--')                                    AS [LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE],
        Apps.[LEASE_ID],
        Apps.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        UPPER(ISNULL(LIT.[NAME], '--'))                                         AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
        Apps.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
        LST.[NAME]                                                              AS [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
        Apps.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
        Apps.[LEASE_TERM_ID],
        ISNULL(UPPER(LT.[NAME]), '--')                                          AS [LEASE_TYPE],
        Apps.[LEASE_TYPE_ID],
        ISNULL(ISNULL(LA.[EMPLOYEE_NAME], LA.[COMPANY_USERS_NAME]), '--')       AS [LEASING_AGENT],
        Apps.[LEASING_AGENT_ID],
        CASE WHEN Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] = 0
             THEN SSL.[ID]
             ELSE MSS.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID]
        END                                                                     AS [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN OT.[NAME] = 'OTHER INCOME' THEN 'AFFORDABLE' ELSE OT.[NAME] END, '--')  AS [OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
        Apps.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID],
        PAY.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
        Apps.[PROPERTY_ID],
        PF.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        PF.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        Apps.[QUOTE_ID],
        Scr.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME],
        Scr.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED],
        ISNULL(Sp.[SPACE], '--')                                                AS [SPACE],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN SC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT] = 2
                    THEN SC.[NAME] + ' - MULTI SPACE'
                    ELSE SC.[NAME] END, '--')                                   AS [SPACE_CONFIG],
        Apps.[SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID]                                           AS [SPACE_CONFIG_ID],
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(SC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT], 1) = 0 THEN 1
             ELSE ISNULL(SC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT], 1) END                          AS [SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],
        ISNULL(SCL.[Space_Count],
               CASE WHEN ISNULL(SC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT], 1) = 0 THEN 1
                    ELSE ISNULL(SC.[UNIT_SPACE_COUNT], 1) END)                  AS [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
        NULL                                                                    AS [SPACE_COUNT_TEST],
        ISNULL(Sp.[SPACE_ID], 0)                                                AS [SPACE_ID],
        ISNULL(Sp.[SPACE_NUMBER], '--')                                         AS [SPACE_NUMBER],
        AST.[NAME]                                                              AS [STAGE],
        Apps.[STAGE_ID],
        AST.[ORDER_NUM]                                                         AS [STAGE_ORDER_NUM],
        ASS.[NAME]                                                              AS [STATUS],
        Apps.[STATUS_ID],
        ASS.[ORDER_NUM]                                                         AS [STATUS_ORDER_NUM],
        ASP.[NAME]                                                              AS [STEP],
        Apps.[STEP_ID],
        ASP.[ORDER_NUM]                                                         AS [STEP_ORDER_NUM],
        Apps.[TERM_MONTH],
        Apps.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
        Apps.[UNIT_SPACE_ID],
        Apps.[UNIT_SQUARE_FEET],
        ISNULL(Sp.[UNIT_KEY], 0)                                                AS [UNIT_KEY],
        ISNULL(Sp.[UNIT_ID], 0)                                                 AS [UNIT_ID],
        Apps.[UNIT_TYPE_ID],
        UT.[FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE],
        Apps.[URL_REFERER],
        Apps.[WEBSITE_ID]
    INTO [xtemp].[APPLICATIONS_0_WORK]
    FROM Apps
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANTS] Ap
        ON Apps.[APPLICANT_ID] = Ap.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STAGES] AST
        ON Apps.[STAGE_ID] = AST.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STATUSES] ASS
        ON Apps.[STATUS_ID] = ASS.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STEPS] ASP
        ON Apps.[STEP_ID] = ASP.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] PF
        ON Apps.[PROPERTY_ID] = PF.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        AND PF.[SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
        AND PF.[PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1048
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] LW
        ON Apps.[DATE_CREATED] = LW.[DATE_KEY]
        AND LW.[AY] > 2014
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AGENTS_0] LA
        ON Apps.[LEASING_AGENT_ID] = LA.[EMPLOYEE_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPACE_CONFIGURATIONS] DSC
        ON Apps.[DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG_ID] = DSC.[ID]
        AND DSC.[CID] = 15647
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPACE_CONFIGURATIONS] SC
        ON Apps.[SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID] = SC.[ID]
        AND SC.[CID] = 15647
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F] FP
        ON Apps.[FLOORPLAN_ID_RAW] = FP.[FLOORPLAN_ID]
        AND FP.[SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [UNIT_KEY], [SPACE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER], [UNIT_ID]
        FROM (
            SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [SPACE_ID]
                ORDER BY [UNIT_KEY] DESC
            ) AS rn
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F]
            WHERE [SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
        ) _sp WHERE rn = 1
    ) Sp ON Apps.[UNIT_SPACE_ID] = Sp.[SPACE_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_TYPES] LT
        ON Apps.[LEASE_TYPE_ID] = LT.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES] LIT
        ON Apps.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = LIT.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT [PROPERTY_ID], [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                        [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                        [AY_END_DATE], [AY_END_DATEID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_BY_DAY_0]
    ) PAY ON Apps.[PROPERTY_ID] = PAY.[PROPERTY_ID]
          AND Apps.[DATE_LEASE_BEGIN] = PAY.[DATE_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_SOURCES_0] OLS
        ON Apps.[LEAD_SOURCE_ID] = OLS.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [LEASE_ID], COUNT([LEASE_ID]) AS [Space_Count]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_UNIT_SPACES]
        WHERE [DELETED_ON_DATE] = 0 AND [UNIT_SPACE_ID] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [LEASE_ID]
    ) SCL ON Apps.[LEASE_ID] = SCL.[LEASE_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES] LST
        ON Apps.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = LST.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0] CE
        ON Apps.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = CE.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICES] ILS
        ON Apps.[INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID] = ILS.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_OCCUPANCY_TYPES] OT
        ON Apps.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID] = OT.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_TYPES_0] UT
        ON Apps.[UNIT_TYPE_ID] = UT.[UNIT_TYPE_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LIST_ITEMS] CLI
        ON Apps.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID] = CLI.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LIST_TYPES] CLT
        ON Apps.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID] = CLT.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [APPLICATION_ID], [FLAG_FORCED_STATUS], [MAX_DATE_KEY],
               [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM (
            SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
                ORDER BY [MAX_DATE_KEY] DESC
            ) AS rn
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1]
        ) _mss WHERE rn = 1
    ) MSS ON Apps.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = MSS.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STAGE_STATUS_STEP_0] SSL
        ON Apps.[STAGE_ID]  = SSL.[STAGE_ID]
        AND Apps.[STATUS_ID] = SSL.[STATUS_ID]
        AND Apps.[STEP_ID]   = SSL.[STEP_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMERS] CU
        ON Ap.[CUSTOMER_ID] = CU.[ID]
    -- Most recent screening record per (APPLICATION_ID, APPLICANT_ID)
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [APPLICATION_ID], [APPLICANT_ID],
               [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP],
               [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
               [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME], [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED],
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY [APPLICATION_ID], [APPLICANT_ID]
                   ORDER BY [SCREENING_APPLICANT_RESULT_ID] DESC
               ) AS rn
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICANT_SCREENING]
    ) Scr ON Apps.[APPLICATION_ID] = Scr.[APPLICATION_ID]
          AND Apps.[APPLICANT_ID]   = Scr.[APPLICANT_ID]
          AND Scr.rn = 1
    -- Most recent prior-status record per APPLICATION_ID
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [APPLICATION_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
               [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                   PARTITION BY [APPLICATION_ID]
                   ORDER BY [DATE_KEY] DESC
               ) AS rn
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0]
    ) PS ON Apps.[APPLICATION_ID] = PS.[APPLICATION_ID]
         AND PS.rn = 1
    -- Week-flag joins (CURRENT_WEEK_0 contains dates in the current week)
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0] WA
        ON Apps.[DATE_CREATED] = WA.[DATE_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0] WC
        ON Apps.[DATE_CANCELLED] = WC.[DATE_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0] WCO
        ON Apps.[DATE_COMPLETED] = WCO.[DATE_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0] WI
        ON Apps.[DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED] = WI.[DATE_KEY]
    WHERE PF.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
      AND Apps.[DATE_CREATED] >= 20250101
      AND Apps.[APPLICATION_ID] <> 17249584;

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Step 2: Truncate target and insert deduplicated rows
    --   Mirrors ATL FilterDupes: exclude APPLICATION_IDs that appear > 1 time
    -- =========================================================================
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0] (
        [DATE_KEY], [DATE_TIME], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], [AY_WEEK],
        [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
        [APPLICANT_EMAIL], [APPLICANT_GENDER], [APPLICANT_ID],
        [APPLICANT_NAME], [APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST], [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST], [APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE],
        [APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE], [APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY], [APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK],
        [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM], [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],
        [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE], [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],
        [CONTACT_SUM_CALL], [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT], [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS],
        [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL], [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND], [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE],
        [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], [CONTACT_SUM_SMS], [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        [COUNT], [CUSTOMER_ID],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],
        [DATE_APPLICATION], [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_COMPLETED],
        [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT], [DATE_LAST_CONTACT],
        [DATE_LEASE_APPROVED], [DATE_LEASE_BEGIN], [DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED], [DATE_LEASE_END],
        [DATE_LEASE_GENERATED], [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
        [DATE_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN], [DATE_PROPERTY_AY_END], [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
        [DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], [DATE_SITE_VISITED], [DATE_STARTED],
        [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED], [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED],
        [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
        [DATE_TOURED], [DATE_UNIT_TOURED], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [DATEID_APPLICATION], [DATEID_APPROVED], [DATEID_CANCELLED], [DATEID_COMPLETED],
        [DATEID_CREATED], [DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT], [DATEID_LAST_CONTACT],
        [DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED], [DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN], [DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED],
        [DATEID_LEASE_END], [DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],
        [DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN], [DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_END],
        [DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED], [DATEID_SITE_VISITED], [DATEID_STARTED],
        [DATEID_TOURED], [DATEID_UNIT_TOURED], [DATEID_UPDATED],
        [DESIRED_BATHROOMS], [DESIRED_BEDROOMS], [DESIRED_OCCUPANTS], [DESIRED_PETS],
        [DESIRED_RENT_MAX], [DESIRED_RENT_MIN],
        [DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG], [DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG_ID], [DESIRED_SPACE_UNIT_COUNT],
        [FLAG_APP_ACTIVE], [FLAG_APP_APPROVED], [FLAG_APP_CANCELLED], [FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],
        [FLAG_FORCED_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_TOURED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_TOURED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_TOURED],

name: APPLICATIONS_AGG_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATION_FACTS_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATIONS_AGG_F.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATIONS_AGG_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_AGG_F];

        -- Step 2: Aggregate and Load
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_AGG_F]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [COUNT], [CONTACT_SUM_CALL], [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT], [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS], [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL],
            [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND], [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE], [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], [CONTACT_SUM_SMS], [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_APP_ACTIVE], [FLAG_APP_APPROVED], [FLAG_APP_CANCELLED], [FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SYSTEM], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SYSTEM_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
            [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE], [FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL], [FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT],
            [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS],
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_TOURED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_TOURED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_TOURED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_TOURED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_TOURED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED]
        )
        SELECT 
            F.[DATE_KEY],
            -- Logic: Concatenate DATE_KEY and AY (e.g., 20230101.2023)
            TRY_CAST(CAST(F.[DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '.' + CAST(F.[AY] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS DECIMAL(19,4)),
            F.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            F.[AY],
            F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            SUM(F.[COUNT]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_CALL]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_CHAT]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_SMS]),
            SUM(F.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR]),
            CAST(D.[DATE_TIME] AS DATETIME2(6)), -- Explicit Cast to DATETIME2
            D.[DAY_OF_WEEK], 
            SUM(F.[FLAG_APP_ACTIVE]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_APP_APPROVED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_APP_COMPLETED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND]),
            -- Complex Sum for INBOUND_LEASED
            SUM(
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED] + 
                F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED]
            ),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED]),
            0, -- Hardcoded 0 in ATL
            0, -- Hardcoded 0 in ATL
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_LEAD]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_TOURED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_TOURED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_TOURED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_TOURED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_TOURED]),
            SUM(F.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED])

        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_FACTS_F] F
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] D 
            ON D.[DATE_KEY] = F.[DATE_KEY] 
            AND D.[AY] = F.[AY]
        WHERE F.[FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
        GROUP BY 
            F.[DATE_KEY], 
            F.[AY],
            F.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
            F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            D.[DATE_TIME],
            D.[DAY_OF_WEEK];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Procedure executed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @rows_deleted  int = 0;
    DECLARE @rows_inserted int = 0;

    -- Step 1: delete all existing rows for each DATE_KEY present in the source
    DELETE TGT
    FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG] TGT
    WHERE TGT.[DATE_KEY] IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT [DATE_KEY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_AGG_F]
    );
    SET @rows_deleted = @@ROWCOUNT;
    PRINT 'APPLICATION_AGG_SP: rows deleted  = ' + CAST(@rows_deleted  AS varchar(20));

    -- Step 2: re-insert all source rows
    -- DATETIME_KEY is derived from DATE_KEY (YYYYMMDD int) via style-112 conversion
    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG] (
        [DATE_KEY],
        [DATE_KEY_AY],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [AY],

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN

            [CUSTOMER_ID], [EVENT_DATE], [EVENT_DATEID], [EVENT_DATETIME], [EVENT_RESULT_ID],
            [EVENT_RESULT_NAME], [EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME], [EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID], [EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME],

            [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED],
            [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED],
            [FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED], [FLAG_VALID_LEAD_EVENT], [LEAD_MILESTONE],
            [LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],

name: APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATIONS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step A: DELETE (Incremental Cleanup)
        -- Remove rows in Target that exist in the Source filter scope
        -- Key: LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1] T
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0] S 
            WHERE S.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = T.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
              AND S.[DATE_CANCELLED] = 0 
              AND S.[FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
        );

        -- Step B: INSERT (Append)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_1]
        (
            [APPLICATION_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [FLAG_FORCED_STATUS],
            [MAX_DATE_KEY],
            [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [STAGE_MAX],
            [STAGE_ID_MAX],
            [STATUS_MAX],
            [STATUS_ID_MAX],
            [STEP_MAX],
            [STEP_ID_MAX]
        )
        SELECT 
            [APPLICATION_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            -- Logic: NVL(FLAG..., 0) -> ISNULL in T-SQL
            ISNULL([FLAG_FORCED_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], 0) AS [FLAG_FORCED_STATUS],
            [DATE_KEY] AS [MAX_DATE_KEY],
            [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [STAGE] AS [STAGE_MAX],
            [STAGE_ID] AS [STAGE_ID_MAX],
            [STATUS] AS [STATUS_MAX],
            [STATUS_ID] AS [STATUS_ID_MAX],
            [STEP] AS [STEP_MAX],
            [STEP_ID] AS [STEP_ID_MAX]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0]
        WHERE [DATE_CANCELLED] = 0 
          AND [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED] = 0;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Procedure executed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_PROD2.dbo.APPLICATION_FACTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    -- Truncate/Load: refresh application status records for Relative Day -2
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0];

    WITH PriorDateCTE AS (
        SELECT
            D.[DATE_KEY],
            A.[APPLICATION_ID],
            A.[AY],
            ISNULL(A.[DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],
            ISNULL(A.[DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED],
            ISNULL(A.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], 0) AS [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            ISNULL(A.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], 0) AS [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            A.[LEASE_ID],
            A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
            A.[PROPERTY_ID],
            A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            A.[STAGE],
            A.[STAGE_ID],
            A.[STATUS],
            A.[STATUS_ID],
            A.[STEP],
            A.[STEP_ID],
            A.[DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
            A.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] AS D
        INNER JOIN [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_FACTS] AS A
            ON A.[DATE_KEY] = D.[DATE_KEY]
        WHERE D.[RELATIVE_DAY] = -2
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATION_STATUS_PRIOR_DAY_0] (
        [DATE_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],
        [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
        [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [STAGE],
        [STAGE_ID], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID], [STEP], [STEP_ID],
        [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],
        [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
        [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [STAGE],
        [STAGE_ID], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID], [STEP], [STEP_ID],
        [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID]
    FROM PriorDateCTE;

END;

name: APP_LOCATION_LIST_SP
transformations: LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.LOCATION = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.LOCATION = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE P.PROPERTY_NAME END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LOCATION_GROUP: CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE' ELSE P.PROPERTY_NAME END
PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = 5000 THEN 'CORPORATE' ELSE PROPERTY_NAME END

PM_EMAIL: CASE WHEN PM_EMAIL = 'cgauthier@theoverlookstgabriels.com' THEN 'cgauthier@peakmade.com' WHEN PM_EMAIL = 'cmonahan@theoverlookstgabriels.com' THEN 'cmonahan@peakmade.com' WHEN PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN EXEC_DIR_EMAIL ELSE PM_EMAIL END
description: DELETE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.EMPLOYEE_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.PROPERTY_F into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.APP_LOCATION_LIST (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[APP_LOCATION_LIST_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Sync App_Location_List with Driver logic (Property -> Employee)
Process Type:   Truncate/Load
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 0.3. Run TRUNCATE before CTE processes
        DELETE FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[APP_LOCATION_LIST];

        -- CTE 1: Filtered Employees (Emps)
        ;WITH Emps AS (
            SELECT *
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[xtemp].[EMPLOYEE_F]
            WHERE EMPLOYEE_CODE IS NOT NULL
              AND STATUS <> 'TERMINATED'
              AND STATUS <> 'NOT HIRED'
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Main Join Logic (Emps1) 
        -- Driver: PROPERTY_F (to include properties without employees)
        Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                P.PROPERTY_KEY,
                E.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
                E.NAME_FIRST + ' ' + E.NAME_LAST AS EMPLOYEE_NAME,
                E.STATUS,
                CASE 
                    WHEN E.LOCATION = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.LOCATION = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE P.PROPERTY_NAME
                END AS LOCATION,
                P.ADDRESS_1,
                P.ADDRESS_CITY,
                P.ADDRESS_STATE,
                P.ADDRESS_ZIP,
                P.PROPERTY_NAME,
                P.PROPERTY_TYPE,
                E.EMAIL,
                E.DEPARTMENT,
                UPPER(E.TITLE) AS TITLE,
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1,
                CASE WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2,
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.TITLE) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3,
                P.AM_EMAIL,
                P.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL,
                P.PM_EMAIL,
                P.RM_EMAIL,
                P.RSM_EMAIL,
                P.RVP_EMAIL,
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE' 
                    ELSE P.PROPERTY_NAME 
                END AS LOCATION_GROUP,
                E.NAME_FIRST,
                E.NAME_LAST,
                E.FLAG_CORPORATE,
                E.SECURITY_LEVEL,
                P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY,
                P.FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION,
                P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                P.FLAG_MANAGED,
                P.FLAG_NON_PROPERTY,
                P.FLAG_REPORTABLE,
                P.FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,
                P.FLAG_TENTATIVE
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[xtemp].[PROPERTY_F] AS P
            LEFT OUTER JOIN Emps AS E ON E.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY
            WHERE (P.FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL = 1 OR P.FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT = 1 OR P.FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION = 1)
              AND (E.EMPLOYEE_CODE IS NULL OR (E.STATUS <> 'TERMINATED' AND E.STATUS <> 'NOT HIRED'))
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Swap Names & Clean Email Logic (SWAPNAMES)
        SWAPNAMES AS (
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                CASE WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = 5000 THEN 'CORPORATE' ELSE PROPERTY_NAME END AS PROPERTY_NAME,
                LOCATION_GROUP,
                AM_EMAIL,
                RSM_EMAIL,
                RVP_EMAIL,
                CASE 
                    WHEN PM_EMAIL = 'cgauthier@theoverlookstgabriels.com' THEN 'cgauthier@peakmade.com'
                    WHEN PM_EMAIL = 'cmonahan@theoverlookstgabriels.com' THEN 'cmonahan@peakmade.com'
                    WHEN PM_EMAIL = '--' THEN EXEC_DIR_EMAIL
                    ELSE PM_EMAIL
                END AS PM_EMAIL,
                RM_EMAIL,
                FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY,
                FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION,
                FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                FLAG_MANAGED,
                FLAG_NON_PROPERTY,
                FLAG_REPORTABLE,
                FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,
                FLAG_TENTATIVE
            FROM Emps1
        )

        -- Target Logic: Final Load with Group By (ListOfLocations)
        INSERT INTO [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[APP_LOCATION_LIST] (
            PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, LOCATION_GROUP, AM_EMAIL, RSM_EMAIL, RVP_EMAIL, 
            PM_EMAIL, RM_EMAIL, FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY, FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION, 
            FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_MANAGED, FLAG_NON_PROPERTY, FLAG_REPORTABLE, 
            FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY, FLAG_TENTATIVE
        )
        SELECT 
            PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, LOCATION_GROUP, AM_EMAIL, RSM_EMAIL, RVP_EMAIL, 
            PM_EMAIL, RM_EMAIL, FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY, FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION, 
            FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_MANAGED, FLAG_NON_PROPERTY, FLAG_REPORTABLE, 
            FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY, FLAG_TENTATIVE
        FROM SWAPNAMES
        GROUP BY 
            PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, LOCATION_GROUP, AM_EMAIL, RSM_EMAIL, RVP_EMAIL, 
            PM_EMAIL, RM_EMAIL, FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY, FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION, 
            FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_MANAGED, FLAG_NON_PROPERTY, FLAG_REPORTABLE, 
            FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY, FLAG_TENTATIVE;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_DATE,
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_APPROVED_ON_DATE, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CANCELLED_ON_DATE, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_COMPLETED_ON_DATE, 0),
    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE,
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_APPROVED_ON_DATE, 0),
    -- DATE_LEASE_BEGIN
    CASE 
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE > 20300801 THEN 20300801
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE = E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE 
             AND CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 5, 4) AS INT) >= 0828 
        THEN CAST(
                CAST( (CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 1, 4) AS INT) + 1) AS VARCHAR(10)) + '1001'
             AS INT)
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE = E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE 
             AND CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 5, 4) AS INT) <= 0827
        THEN CAST(
                SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 1, 4) + '1001'
             AS INT)
        ELSE E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE
    END,
    -- DATE_LEASE_BEGIN_new
    CASE 
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE > 20300801 THEN 20300801
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE = E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE 
             AND CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 5, 2) AS INT) >= 09
        THEN CAST(
                CAST( (CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 1, 4) AS INT) + 1) AS VARCHAR(10)) + '0901'
             AS INT)
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE = E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE 
             AND CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 5, 2) AS INT) <= 08 
        THEN CAST(
                SUBSTRING(CAST(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 1, 4) + '0901'
             AS INT)
        ELSE E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE
    END,
    -- Flag_Bad_Data
    CASE 
        WHEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE = E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CREATED_ON_DATE THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END,
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_COMPLETED_ON_DATE, 0),
    -- DATE_LEASE_END
    CASE 
        WHEN ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_END_DATE, 0) > 20310731 THEN 20310731
        ELSE 
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_END_DATE, 0) = 0 THEN E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_START_DATE 
                ELSE E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_END_DATE 
            END
    END,
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_GENERATED_ON_DATE, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.SCREENING_APPROVED_ON_DATE, 0),

    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_STARTED_ON_DATE, 0),

    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.UNIT_TOURED_ON_DATE, 0),
    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.UPDATED_ON_DATE,
    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_DATEID,
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_APPROVED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.CANCELLED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_COMPLETED_ON_DATEID, 0),

    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.LEASE_GENERATED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.SCREENING_APPROVED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.SITE_VISITED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.APPLICATION_STARTED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.PROPERTY_TOURED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    ISNULL(E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.UNIT_TOURED_ON_DATEID, 0),
    E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.UPDATED_ON_DATEID,

FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
WHERE E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS.IS_DELETED = '0';

    [PHONE_2], [PHONE_MOBILE], [PHONE_WORK], [RETURNED_PAYMENTS]
)
SELECT 
    E_CUSTOMERS.ID,
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE1)), 200), '--') AS VARCHAR(200)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE2)), 200), '') AS VARCHAR(200)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE3)), 200), '') AS VARCHAR(200)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_CITY)), 100), '--') AS VARCHAR(100)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_COUNTRY_CODE)), 4), '--') AS VARCHAR(4)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_STATE_CODE)), 4), '--') AS VARCHAR(4)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_POSTAL_CODE)), 40), '--') AS VARCHAR(40)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.COMPANY_NAME)), 200), '--') AS VARCHAR(200)),
    E_CUSTOMERS.ID,
    ISNULL(E_CUSTOMERS.BIRTH_DATE, 0),
    E_CUSTOMERS.CREATED_ON_DATE,
    E_CUSTOMERS.UPDATED_ON_DATE,
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.EMAIL_ADDRESS))), 255), '--') AS VARCHAR(255)),
    ISNULL(E_CUSTOMERS.PRIMARY_IS_VERIFIED, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(E_CUSTOMERS.GENDER, 2), 'U') AS VARCHAR(2)),
    -- Name Logic with Explicit Cast and component truncation
    CAST(LEFT(
        CASE 
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_FIRST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_LAST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_MIDDLE)) IS NOT NULL 
            THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_FIRST)), 50) + ' ' + SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_MIDDLE)), 1, 1) + '. ' + LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_LAST)), 40)
            
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_FIRST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_LAST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_MIDDLE)) IS NULL 
            THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_FIRST)), 50) + ' ' + LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_LAST)), 49)
            
            ELSE '--'
        END, 
    100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_FIRST)), 200), '--') AS VARCHAR(200)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_LAST)), 100), '--') AS VARCHAR(100)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.NAME_MIDDLE)), 100), '') AS VARCHAR(100)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.PHONE_NUMBER)), 60), '--') AS VARCHAR(60)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.SECONDARY_NUMBER)), 100), '--') AS VARCHAR(100)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.MOBILE_NUMBER)), 60), '--') AS VARCHAR(60)),
    CAST(ISNULL(LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(E_CUSTOMERS.WORK_NUMBER)), 60), '--') AS VARCHAR(60)),
    ISNULL(E_CUSTOMERS.RETURNED_PAYMENTS_COUNT, 0)
FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMERS];

name: AY_0_SP

sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- WARNING: This SP decrements RELATIVE_AY by 1 for all rows.
    -- Original ATL has a "blocker" to prevent accidental runs.
    -- Only run this when rolling over to a new Academic Year.
    UPDATE [dbo].[AY_0]
    SET RELATIVE_AY = RELATIVE_AY - 1;
END

name: AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_WEEKS_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0];

        -- Step 2: Transform and Load (Range Join)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], 
            [DATE_KEY_AY], 
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], 
            [AY], 
            [AY_BEGIN_DATE], 
            [AY_END_DATE], 
            [AY_KEY], 
            [AY_WEEK], 
            [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], 
            [AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
        )
        SELECT 
            D.[DATE_KEY],
            W.[DATE_KEY_AY],
            W.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
            W.[AY],
            W.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
            W.[AY_END_DATE],
            W.[AY_KEY],
            W.[AY_WEEK],
            W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
            W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] D
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_F] W 
            ON D.[DATE_KEY] >= W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE] 
            AND D.[DATE_KEY] <= W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
        WHERE D.[DATE_KEY] >= 20140101 
          AND D.[RELATIVE_AY] <= 4;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Execution completed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: AY_WEEKS_F_SP
transformations: AY_WEEK_KEY: CASE WHEN W.[AY] = 2025 THEN W.[AY_WEEK_KEY] - 0.01 ELSE W.[AY_WEEK_KEY] END
AY_WEEK: CASE WHEN W.[AY] = 2025 THEN W.[AY_WEEK] - 1 ELSE W.[AY_WEEK] END
FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = -1) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

AY_WEEK_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 1 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 2 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 9 AND 12 THEN 3 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 13 AND 16 THEN 4 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN 5 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 21 AND 24 THEN 6 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 25 AND 28 THEN 7 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 29 AND 32 THEN 8 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 33 AND 36 THEN 9 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 37 AND 40 THEN 10 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 41 AND 44 THEN 11 WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 45 AND 48 THEN 12 WHEN [AY_WEEK] >= 49 THEN 13 ELSE 0 END

AY_WEEK_INTERVAL_NAME: CASE WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 1 THEN 'WEEK 1-4' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 2 THEN 'WEEK 5-8' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 3 THEN 'WEEK 9-12' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 4 THEN 'WEEK 13-16' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 5 THEN 'WEEK 17-20' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 6 THEN 'WEEK 21-24' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 7 THEN 'WEEK 25-28' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 8 THEN 'WEEK 29-32' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 9 THEN 'WEEK 33-36' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 10 THEN 'WEEK 37-40' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 11 THEN 'WEEK 41-44' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 12 THEN 'WEEK 45-48' WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 13 THEN 'WEEK 49-52' ELSE NULL END
FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_WEEKS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_WEEKS_F.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[AY_WEEKS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_F];

        -- Step 2: Prepare Logic Variables
        DECLARE @CurrentDateInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS INT);

        -- Step 3: Transformation Logic
        WITH [CurrentWeek_CTE] AS (
            -- Logic: Identify the current AY_WEEK based on today's date
            SELECT [AY_WEEK]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_0]
            WHERE [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE] <= @CurrentDateInt 
              AND [AY_WEEK_END_DATE] >= @CurrentDateInt
              AND [AY_WEEK] > 0
        ),

        [Yesterday_CTE] AS (
            -- Logic: Identify Yesterday relative to reporting
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1 
              AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] <> 7
        ),

        [Weeks_CTE] AS (
            -- Join AY_WEEKS_0 with the single scalar value from CurrentWeek_CTE
            SELECT 
                W.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
                W.[AY],
                W.[AY_WEEK],
                W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
                CW.[AY_WEEK] AS [AY_WEEK_CURRENT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_0] W
            CROSS JOIN [CurrentWeek_CTE] CW
            WHERE W.[AY_WEEK] > 0
        ),

        [Combo_Calculations] AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Date Key Logic: ISNULL(Yesterday, WeekEnd)
                ISNULL(Y.[DATE_KEY], W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]) AS [DATE_KEY],
                ISNULL(Y.[DATE_KEY], W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]) AS [YESTERDAY],
                Y.[DATE_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY_MIDWEEK],
                
                -- DATE_KEY_AY: Concatenation logic
                TRY_CAST(
                    CAST(ISNULL(Y.[DATE_KEY], W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]) AS VARCHAR(20)) 
                    + '.' + 
                    CAST(W.[AY] AS VARCHAR(10)) 
                AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DATE_KEY_AY],

                -- AY_WEEK_KEY Adjustment for 2025
                CASE 
                    WHEN W.[AY] = 2025 THEN W.[AY_WEEK_KEY] - 0.01 
                    ELSE W.[AY_WEEK_KEY] 
                END AS [AY_WEEK_KEY],

                W.[AY],
                A.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                A.[AY_END_DATE],
                A.[AY_KEY],

                -- AY_WEEK Adjustment for 2025
                CASE 
                    WHEN W.[AY] = 2025 THEN W.[AY_WEEK] - 1 
                    ELSE W.[AY_WEEK] 
                END AS [AY_WEEK],

                W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],

                -- Flags (Pre-calculated logic)
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY],
                
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK],
                
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
                
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK],
                
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY],
                
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = -1) AND (A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],

                A.[RELATIVE_AY],
                (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT]) AS [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK]

            FROM [Weeks_CTE] W
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0] A ON A.[AY_KEY] = W.[AY]
            LEFT JOIN [Yesterday_CTE] Y ON W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE] = Y.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
        ),

        [Interval_Calculations] AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                -- Interval Logic based on 4-week buckets
                CASE 
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 1 AND 4 THEN 1
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 5 AND 8 THEN 2
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 9 AND 12 THEN 3
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 13 AND 16 THEN 4
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 17 AND 20 THEN 5
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 21 AND 24 THEN 6
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 25 AND 28 THEN 7
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 29 AND 32 THEN 8
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 33 AND 36 THEN 9
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 37 AND 40 THEN 10
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 41 AND 44 THEN 11
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] BETWEEN 45 AND 48 THEN 12
                    WHEN [AY_WEEK] >= 49 THEN 13
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL]
            FROM [Combo_Calculations]
        )

        -- Final Insert
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_F]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], [YESTERDAY], [DATE_KEY_MIDWEEK], [DATE_KEY_AY],
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
            [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL_NAME],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK_INTERVAL],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [YESTERDAY], [DATE_KEY_MIDWEEK], [DATE_KEY_AY],
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
            [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL],
            -- Interval Name Construction
            CASE 
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 1 THEN 'WEEK 1-4'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 2 THEN 'WEEK 5-8'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 3 THEN 'WEEK 9-12'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 4 THEN 'WEEK 13-16'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 5 THEN 'WEEK 17-20'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 6 THEN 'WEEK 21-24'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 7 THEN 'WEEK 25-28'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 8 THEN 'WEEK 29-32'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 9 THEN 'WEEK 33-36'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 10 THEN 'WEEK 37-40'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 11 THEN 'WEEK 41-44'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 12 THEN 'WEEK 45-48'
                WHEN [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL] = 13 THEN 'WEEK 49-52'
                ELSE NULL 
            END AS [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL_NAME],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK],
            -- Flag Current Interval
            CASE WHEN [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK_INTERVAL],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [RELATIVE_AY],
            [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK]
        FROM [Interval_Calculations];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Execution completed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

        [RELATIVE_AY],

    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_F];

END
