    [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_TOURED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 
    [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED], 
    [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND], 
    [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], 
    [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE], 
    [FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL], [FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT], [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED], 
    [FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP], 
    [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], 
    [FLOORPLAN_ID], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY], [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID], 
    [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME], [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST], 
    [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST], [INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE], [INITIAL_CONTACT_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE], 
    [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID], [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE], [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID], [LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY], 
    [LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE], [LAST_CONTACT_ID], [LAST_CONTACT_ORDER], [LAST_CONTACT_TYPE], [LEAD_SOURCE], 
    [LEAD_SOURCE_ID], [LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE], 
    [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE], [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_TERM_ID], [LEASE_TYPE], 
    [LEASE_TYPE_ID], [LEASING_AGENT], [LEASING_AGENT_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], [OCCUPANCY_TYPE], 
    [OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [QUOTE_ID], 
    [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME], [SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED], [SPACE], [SPACE_CONFIG], [SPACE_CONFIG_ID], 
    [SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER], [STAGE], [STAGE_ID], 
    [STAGE_ORDER_NUM], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID], [STATUS_ORDER_NUM], [STEP], [STEP_ID], [STEP_ORDER_NUM], 
    [TERM_MONTH], [UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], [UNIT_SPACE_ID], [UNIT_SQUARE_FEET], [UNIT_KEY], [UNIT_ID], 
    [UNIT_TYPE_ID], [FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE], [URL_REFERER], [WEBSITE_ID]
)
SELECT 
    NULL AS [DATE_KEY],
    Apps.APPLICATION_ID,
    ISNULL(PropertyAcademicYears.AY, 0),
    LeaseWeeks.AY_WEEK,
    LeaseWeeks.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
    LeaseWeeks.AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
    LeaseWeeks.AY_WEEK_KEY,
    CAST(ISNULL(Applicants.EMAIL, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Applicants.GENDER, 'U') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.APPLICANT_ID,
    -- Logic for APPLICANT_NAME
    CAST(
        CASE 
            WHEN Applicants.NAME_FIRST IS NOT NULL AND Applicants.NAME_LAST IS NOT NULL AND Applicants.NAME_MIDDLE IS NOT NULL 
            THEN Applicants.NAME_FIRST + ' ' + SUBSTRING(Applicants.NAME_MIDDLE, 1, 1) + '. ' + Applicants.NAME_LAST
            
            WHEN Applicants.NAME_FIRST IS NOT NULL AND Applicants.NAME_LAST IS NOT NULL AND Applicants.NAME_MIDDLE IS NULL 
            THEN Applicants.NAME_FIRST + ' ' + Applicants.NAME_LAST
            
            ELSE '--'
        END 
    AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Applicants.NAME_FIRST, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Applicants.NAME_LAST, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Applicants.NAME_MIDDLE, '') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_MOBILE, 1, 3) = '+1 ' THEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_MOBILE, 4, 15) ELSE Applicants.PHONE_MOBILE END, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_PRIMARY, 1, 3) = '+1 ' THEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_PRIMARY, 4, 15) ELSE Applicants.PHONE_PRIMARY END, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_WORK, 1, 3) = '+1 ' THEN SUBSTRING(Applicants.PHONE_WORK, 4, 15) ELSE Applicants.PHONE_WORK END, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(CancelListItems.Cancellation_List_Item AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID,
    CAST(CancelListTypes.Cancellation_List_Type AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_CALL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_CHAT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_SMS, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 0),
    1 AS [COUNT],
    Applicants.CUSTOMER_ID,
    CAST(Customers.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(Customers.NAME_FIRST AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(Customers.NAME_LAST AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(Customers.NAME_MIDDLE AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.DATE_APPLICATION,
    Apps.DATE_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATE_CANCELLED,
    Apps.DATE_COMPLETED,
    Apps.DATE_CREATED,
    ISNULL(Contacts.DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.DATE_LAST_CONTACT, 0),
    Apps.DATE_LEASE_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATE_LEASE_BEGIN,
    Apps.DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED,
    Apps.DATE_LEASE_END,
    Apps.DATE_LEASE_GENERATED,
    Apps.DATE_CREATED AS DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED,
    Apps.DATE_CANCELLED AS DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED,
    -- Logic for DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE (using sysdate-1)
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_CANCELLED = 0 THEN StageStatusStepLookup.ID ELSE MaxStageStatusStep.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID END) >= 343 
             AND ISNULL(Prior_Status.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID, 0) < 343 
        THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)
        ELSE Prior_Status.DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE 
    END,
    -- Logic for DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE
    CASE 
        WHEN (CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_CANCELLED = 0 THEN StageStatusStepLookup.ID ELSE MaxStageStatusStep.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID END) >= 229 
             AND Prior_Status.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 
        THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)
        ELSE Prior_Status.DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE 
    END,
    ISNULL(MaxStageStatusStep.MAX_DATE_KEY, CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)),
    PropertyAcademicYears.AY_BEGIN_DATE,
    PropertyAcademicYears.AY_END_DATE,
    Properties.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
    Apps.DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATE_SITE_VISITED,
    Apps.DATE_STARTED,
    Apps.DATE_TOURED,
    Apps.DATE_UNIT_TOURED,
    Apps.DATE_UPDATED,
    Apps.DATEID_APPLICATION,
    Apps.DATEID_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATEID_CANCELLED,
    Apps.DATEID_COMPLETED,
    Apps.DATEID_CREATED,
    ISNULL(Contacts.DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.DATEID_LAST_CONTACT, 0),
    Apps.DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN,
    Apps.DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED,
    Apps.DATEID_LEASE_END,
    Apps.DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED,
    PropertyAcademicYears.AY_BEGIN_DATEID,
    PropertyAcademicYears.AY_END_DATEID,
    Apps.DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED,
    Apps.DATEID_SITE_VISITED,
    Apps.DATEID_STARTED,
    Apps.DATEID_TOURED,
    Apps.DATEID_UNIT_TOURED,
    Apps.DATEID_UPDATED,
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_BATHROOMS, -1.0),
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_BEDROOMS, -1),
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_OCCUPANTS, -1),
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_PETS, -1),
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_RENT_MAX, -1.00),
    ISNULL(Apps.DESIRED_RENT_MIN, -1.00),
    CAST(ISNULL(DesiredSpaceConfigs.NAME, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID,
    ISNULL(DesiredSpaceConfigs.UNIT_SPACE_COUNT, 0),
    CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_CANCELLED = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_APP_ACTIVE
    CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_APPROVED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_APP_APPROVED
    CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_CANCELLED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_APP_CANCELLED
    CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_COMPLETED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_APP_COMPLETED
    MaxStageStatusStep.FLAG_FORCED_STATUS,
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 0),
    CASE WHEN Apps.FLAG_LEAD = '1' AND LeaseIntervalTypes.NAME = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_LEAD
    ISNULL(CASE WHEN OccTypes.NAME = 'OTHER INCOME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0), -- FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE
    ISNULL(CASE WHEN OccTypes.NAME = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0), -- FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL
    ISNULL(CASE WHEN OccTypes.NAME = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, 0), -- FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT
    Properties.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
    CASE WHEN Apps.DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, -- FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED
    Screening.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR,
    Screening.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP,
    Screening.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE,
    Screening.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF,
    CAST(ISNULL(ISNULL(Floorplans.FLOORPLAN, UnitTypes.FLOORPLAN), 'UNASSIGNED') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(ISNULL(Floorplans.FLOORPLAN_CODE, UnitTypes.FLOORPLAN_CODE), 'UNASSIGNED') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(ISNULL(Apps.FLOORPLAN_ID, UnitTypes.FLOORPLAN_ID), 0), -- Converted 'UNASSIGNED' to 0 for INT
    ISNULL(ISNULL(Floorplans.FLOORPLAN_KEY, UnitTypes.FLOORPLAN_KEY), 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID, 0),
    -- Logic for INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME
    CAST(
        CASE 
            WHEN Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST IS NOT NULL AND Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST IS NOT NULL 
            THEN Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST + ' ' + Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST 
            ELSE '--' 
        END 
    AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_ID, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Contacts.INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(InternetListingSvc.NAME, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Apps.INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Contacts.LAST_CONTACT_ID, 0),
    ISNULL(Contacts.LAST_CONTACT_ORDER, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(Contacts.LAST_CONTACT_TYPE, 0) AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(OriginatingLeadSources.NAME, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    ISNULL(Apps.LEAD_SOURCE_ID, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(OriginatingLeadSources.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.LEASE_ID,
    Apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
    CAST(LeaseIntervalTypes.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
    CAST(LeaseStatusTypes.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
    Apps.LEASE_TERM_ID,
    CAST(ISNULL(LeaseTypes.NAME, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.LEASE_TYPE_ID,
    CAST(ISNULL(ISNULL(Leasing_Agent.EMPLOYEE_NAME, Leasing_Agent.COMPANY_USERS_NAME), '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.LEASING_AGENT_ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN Apps.DATE_CANCELLED = 0 THEN StageStatusStepLookup.ID 
        ELSE MaxStageStatusStep.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID 
    END,
    CAST(ISNULL(CASE WHEN OccTypes.NAME = 'OTHER INCOME' THEN 'AFFORDABLE' ELSE OccTypes.NAME END, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
    PropertyAcademicYears.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
    Apps.PROPERTY_ID,
    Properties.PROPERTY_KEY,
    CAST(Properties.PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.QUOTE_ID,
    CAST(Screening.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(Screening.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(Spaces.SPACE, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(ISNULL(SpaceConfigs.NAME, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID,
    -- SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT
    CASE 
        WHEN ISNULL(SpaceConfigs.UNIT_SPACE_COUNT, 1) = 0 THEN 1 
        ELSE ISNULL(SpaceConfigs.UNIT_SPACE_COUNT, 1) 
    END,
    -- SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE
    ISNULL(
        SpaceCountByLease.Space_Count, 
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(SpaceConfigs.UNIT_SPACE_COUNT, 1) = 0 THEN 1 
            ELSE ISNULL(SpaceConfigs.UNIT_SPACE_COUNT, 1) 
        END
    ),
    ISNULL(Spaces.SPACE_ID, 0),
    CAST(ISNULL(Spaces.SPACE_NUMBER, '--') AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(AppStages.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.STAGE_ID,
    AppStages.ORDER_NUM,
    CAST(AppStatuses.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.STATUS_ID,
    AppStatuses.ORDER_NUM,
    CAST(AppSteps.NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.STEP_ID,
    AppSteps.ORDER_NUM,
    Apps.TERM_MONTH,
    CAST(Apps.UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.UNIT_SPACE_ID,
    Apps.UNIT_SQUARE_FEET,
    ISNULL(Spaces.UNIT_KEY, 0),
    ISNULL(Spaces.UNIT_ID, 0),
    Apps.UNIT_TYPE_ID,
    CAST(UnitTypes.FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    CAST(Apps.URL_REFERER AS VARCHAR(8000)),
    Apps.WEBSITE_ID

FROM [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Apps] AS Apps
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Applicants] AS Applicants ON Apps.APPLICANT_ID = Applicants.ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_AppStages] AS AppStages ON Apps.STAGE_ID = AppStages.ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_AppStatuses] AS AppStatuses ON Apps.STATUS_ID = AppStatuses.ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_AppSteps] AS AppSteps ON Apps.STEP_ID = AppSteps.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Leasing_Agent] AS Leasing_Agent ON Apps.LEASING_AGENT_ID = Leasing_Agent.EMPLOYEE_ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Properties] AS Properties ON Apps.PROPERTY_ID = Properties.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_DesiredSpaceConfigs] AS DesiredSpaceConfigs ON Apps.DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID = DesiredSpaceConfigs.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_SpaceConfigs] AS SpaceConfigs ON Apps.SPACE_CONFIGURATION_ID = SpaceConfigs.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Floorplans] AS Floorplans ON Apps.FLOORPLAN_ID = Floorplans.FLOORPLAN_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Spaces] AS Spaces ON Apps.UNIT_SPACE_ID = Spaces.SPACE_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_LeaseTypes] AS LeaseTypes ON Apps.LEASE_TYPE_ID = LeaseTypes.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_LeaseIntervalTypes] AS LeaseIntervalTypes ON Apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = LeaseIntervalTypes.ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_LeaseWeeks] AS LeaseWeeks ON Apps.DATE_CREATED = LeaseWeeks.DATE_KEY
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_PropertyAcademicYears] AS PropertyAcademicYears ON Apps.PROPERTY_ID = PropertyAcademicYears.PROPERTY_ID AND Apps.DATE_LEASE_BEGIN = PropertyAcademicYears.DATE_KEY
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_OriginatingLeadSources] AS OriginatingLeadSources ON Apps.LEAD_SOURCE_ID = OriginatingLeadSources.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_SpaceCountByLease] AS SpaceCountByLease ON Apps.LEASE_ID = SpaceCountByLease.LEASE_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_LeaseStatusTypes] AS LeaseStatusTypes ON Apps.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = LeaseStatusTypes.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Contacts] AS Contacts ON Apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Contacts.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_InternetListingSvc] AS InternetListingSvc ON Apps.INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID = InternetListingSvc.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_OccTypes] AS OccTypes ON Apps.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID = OccTypes.ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_UnitTypes] AS UnitTypes ON Apps.UNIT_TYPE_ID = UnitTypes.Unit_Type_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_CancelListItems] AS CancelListItems ON Apps.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID = CancelListItems.Cancellation_List_Item_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_CancelListTypes] AS CancelListTypes ON Apps.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID = CancelListTypes.Cancellation_List_Type_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_MaxStageStatusStep] AS MaxStageStatusStep ON Apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = MaxStageStatusStep.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_StageStatusStepLookup] AS StageStatusStepLookup ON AppStages.ID = StageStatusStepLookup.STAGE_ID AND AppStatuses.ID = StageStatusStepLookup.STATUS_ID AND AppSteps.ID = StageStatusStepLookup.STEP_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Customers] AS Customers ON Applicants.CUSTOMER_ID = Customers.CUSTOMER_KEY
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Screening] AS Screening ON Apps.APPLICATION_ID = Screening.APPLICATION_ID AND Apps.APPLICANT_ID = Screening.APPLICANT_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[App0_Prior_Status] AS Prior_Status ON Apps.APPLICATION_ID = Prior_Status.APPLICATION_ID

WHERE 
    Properties.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0 
    AND (ISNULL(PropertyAcademicYears.AY, 0) = 0 OR ISNULL(PropertyAcademicYears.AY, 0) > 2024)
    AND CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(Apps.DATE_CREATED AS VARCHAR(20)), 1, 4) AS INT) > 2024;
	
--=============== end of chunk 9

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();

        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

name: BLUE_OCEAN_BRAIN_EXPORT_LOAD_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.Blue_Ocean_Brain_Export.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[BLUE_OCEAN_BRAIN_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Transaction Start
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0 BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Blue_Ocean_Brain_Export];

        -- 2. Define Transformations
        
        -- CTE_AllEmployees: Base Filter for Active and Valid Records
        ;WITH CTE_AllEmployees AS (
            SELECT 
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [NAME_FIRST] AS [LEGAL_FIRSTNAME],
                [NAME_LAST] AS [LEGAL_LASTNAME],
                [EMAIL] AS [WORK_EMAIL],
                [DEPARTMENT] AS [DEPARTMENT_DESC],
                [LOCATION_AD] AS [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
                [TITLE] AS [POSITION_TITLE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
            WHERE [STATUS] = 'ACTIVE'
              AND ISNULL([EMAIL], '') <> ''
              AND [NAME_FIRST] IS NOT NULL
              AND [NAME_LAST] IS NOT NULL
              AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
        ),

        -- CTE_EmployeeTypes: Filter for specific Titles/Depts and Clean Strings
        CTE_EmployeeTypes AS (
            SELECT 
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [LEGAL_FIRSTNAME],
                [LEGAL_LASTNAME],
                ISNULL([WORK_EMAIL], '--') AS [WORK_EMAIL],
                ISNULL(REPLACE([DEPARTMENT_DESC], ',', ' '), '--') AS [DEPARTMENT_DESC],
                ISNULL(REPLACE([CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC], ',', ' '), '--') AS [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
                ISNULL(REPLACE([POSITION_TITLE], ',', ' '), '--') AS [POSITION_TITLE]
            FROM CTE_AllEmployees
            WHERE [POSITION_TITLE] LIKE '%MANA%' 
               OR [POSITION_TITLE] LIKE '%DIREC%' 
               OR [POSITION_TITLE] LIKE '%VP%' 
               OR [POSITION_TITLE] LIKE '%SUPER%' 
               OR [POSITION_TITLE] LIKE '%PRES%' 
               OR [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC] LIKE '%CORPORATE%'
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Blue_Ocean_Brain_Export] (
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [LEGAL_FIRSTNAME],
            [LEGAL_LASTNAME],
            [WORK_EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT_DESC],
            [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
            [POSITION_TITLE],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [LEGAL_FIRSTNAME],
            [LEGAL_LASTNAME],
            [WORK_EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT_DESC],
            [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
            [POSITION_TITLE],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_EmployeeTypes;

        -- Commit Transaction
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Rollback if error
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: COLLECTIONS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.COLLECTIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[COLLECTIONS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[COLLECTIONS_0];

    WITH [Leases_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS [Lease_ID], [ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [COLLECTIONS_START_DATE],
               [FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [MOVE_OUT_DATE],
               [UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], [UNIT_SPACE_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
        WHERE [OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID] <> 5
          AND [FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE] IS NOT NULL
          AND [ID] <> 14627910
    ),
    [AR_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [LEASE_ID], [AR_CODE_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [AR_TRIGGER_ID],
               [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT], [TRANSACTION_DATE], [IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT], [IS_DELETED]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [IS_DELETED] NOT IN ('True','1')
          AND [IS_TEMPORARY] NOT IN ('True','1')
    ),
    [AR_Codes_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [ID], [LEDGER_FILTER_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
        WHERE [LEDGER_FILTER_ID] IN (337, 339)
    ),
    [Ledger_Filters_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [ID], [NAME] AS [Ledger_Filter_Name]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEDGER_FILTERS]
        WHERE UPPER([NAME]) <> 'GROUP'
    ),
    [FMO_Dates_CTE] AS (
        SELECT [LEASE_ID], MIN([TRANSACTION_DATE]) AS [DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [AR_PROCESS_ID] = 8
        GROUP BY [LEASE_ID]
    ),
    [Combo] AS (
        SELECT
            L.[Lease_ID],
            L.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            L.[COLLECTIONS_START_DATE],
            FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED] AS [FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE],
            L.[MOVE_OUT_DATE],
            L.[PROPERTY_ID],
            L.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            L.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
            L.[UNIT_SPACE_ID],
            LF.[Ledger_Filter_Name],
            SUM(CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_DATE] < FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED]
                     THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [Balance_Before_FMO],
            SUM(CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_DATE] >= FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED]
                      AND AR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] NOT IN (701, 706)
                      AND AR.[IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT] NOT IN ('True','1')
                      AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 1
                     THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Charges_After_FMO],
            SUM(CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_DATE] >= FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED]
                      AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Payments_After_FMO],
            SUM(CASE WHEN AR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] IN (701, 706)
                      AND AR.[IS_DELETED] NOT IN ('True','1')
                     THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Write_Off_Balance],
            SUM(CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_DATE] >= FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED]
                      AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 7
                      AND AR.[IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT] IN ('True','1')
                     THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0.00 END) AS [Deposits_Applied_To_Charges],
            SUM(AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) AS [Current_Balance]
        FROM [Leases_CTE] L
        INNER JOIN [AR_CTE] AR ON L.[Lease_ID] = AR.[LEASE_ID]
        INNER JOIN [AR_Codes_CTE] AC ON AR.[AR_CODE_ID] = AC.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [Ledger_Filters_CTE] LF ON LF.[ID] = AC.[LEDGER_FILTER_ID]
        INNER JOIN [FMO_Dates_CTE] FMO ON L.[Lease_ID] = FMO.[LEASE_ID]
        GROUP BY L.[Lease_ID], L.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], L.[COLLECTIONS_START_DATE],
                 FMO.[DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED], L.[MOVE_OUT_DATE],
                 L.[PROPERTY_ID], L.[PROPERTY_NAME], L.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
                 L.[UNIT_SPACE_ID], LF.[Ledger_Filter_Name]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[COLLECTIONS_0]
        ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [CURRENT_BALANCE], [DATE_COLLECTIONS_START],
         [DATE_FMO_PROCESSED], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],
         [FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS], [LEASE_ID], [LEDGER_NAME], [PRE_FMO_BALANCE],
         [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [POST_FMO_CHARGES], [POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],
         [TOTAL_CHARGES], [UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], [UNIT_SPACE_ID], [WRITE_OFF_BALANCE])
    SELECT
        [ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [Current_Balance],
        [COLLECTIONS_START_DATE],
        [FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE],
        [MOVE_OUT_DATE],
        [Deposits_Applied_To_Charges],
        CASE WHEN [COLLECTIONS_START_DATE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        [Lease_ID],
        [Ledger_Filter_Name],
        [Balance_Before_FMO],
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [Charges_After_FMO],
        [Payments_After_FMO],
        [Balance_Before_FMO] + [Charges_After_FMO] + [Deposits_Applied_To_Charges],
        [UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
        [UNIT_SPACE_ID],
        [Write_Off_Balance]
    FROM [Combo];
END

name: COMP_ASSIGNMENTS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_ASSIGNMENTS into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Process logical source transformations using CTE
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        WITH Query_CTE AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                [PARENT_COMP_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY],
                0 AS [RANK_ORDER]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS]
            WHERE [DATE_KEY] >= 20220901
              AND [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY]
              AND [RANK_ORDER] <> 0
        )

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Incremental Update (MERGE)
        -- Removing LASTUPDATED to match existing schema
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] AS Target
        USING Query_CTE AS Source
        ON (Target.[PARENT_COMP_KEY] = Source.[PARENT_COMP_KEY] 
            AND Target.[DATE_KEY] = Source.[DATE_KEY])
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[RANK_ORDER] = Source.[RANK_ORDER]
        
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT ([PARENT_COMP_KEY], [DATE_KEY], [RANK_ORDER])
            VALUES (Source.[PARENT_COMP_KEY], Source.[DATE_KEY], Source.[RANK_ORDER]);

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

name: CONCESSIONS_0_SP
transformations: IS_TOTALLY_REVERSED_FLAG: CASE WHEN RC.[TRANSACTION_COUNT] = RC.[REVERSAL_COUNT] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CONCESSION_VALUE: CASE WHEN DT.[SC_DELETED_FLAG] = 1 AND FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME] IN ('MOVE-IN','ONE TIME','RENEWAL START') THEN DT.[AR_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] * -1 END
IS_DELETED_FLAG: CASE WHEN FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME] IN ('MOVE-IN','ONE TIME','RENEWAL START') THEN ISNULL(DT.[SC_DELETED_FLAG], 0) ELSE 0 END
CREATED_AFTER_CHARGE_FLAG: CASE WHEN YEAR(SC.[CREATED_ON]) >= YEAR(SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE]) AND MONTH(SC.[CREATED_ON]) > MONTH(SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE]) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LEASE_TERM_MONTHS: CASE WHEN C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS] > 12 THEN 12 ELSE C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS] END
FLAG_CONCESSION: CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL: CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SPECIALS into WH_STAGING.dbo.CONCESSIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CONCESSIONS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET (Process Type: Truncate/Load)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONCESSIONS_0];

        -- 2. CTE LOGIC (Mapped from ATL Data Flows)
        WITH [CTE_SC] AS (
            -- GUID::05567d8f-3c28-48c2-9b55-b5661a10872a
            -- Filters E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES based on Where clause
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [CHARGE_END_DATE],
                [CHARGE_START_DATE],
                [AR_CODE_ID],
                [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
                [AR_ORIGIN_ID],
                [AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
                [AR_TRIGGER_ID],
                [CHARGE_AMOUNT],
                [CREATED_ON],
                [IS_UNSELECTED_QUOTE],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [LEASE_TERM_ID],
                [PROPERTY_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
            WHERE [DELETED_ON] IS NULL 
              AND [IS_UNSELECTED_QUOTE] NOT IN ('True','1')
              AND [AR_TRIGGER_ID] IN (307, 212, 202, 201, 211)
              AND [ID] <> 26938492
              AND [AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6
              AND [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155001, 154999, 155628, 155632)
        ),
        [CTE_Specials] AS (
            -- GUID::7709bc22-ce48-42c0-8f43-2c188618aa4e
            -- Filters E_SPECIALS where NOTES do not start with 'WAIVED'
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPECIALS]
            WHERE SUBSTRING(ISNULL([NOTES],''), 1, 6) <> 'WAIVED'
        ),
        [CTE_Frequencies] AS (
            -- GUID::cdcd7ef2-126f-4e4f-8f4a-2ff20bbd1ad2
            -- Joins AR_TRIGGERS and FREQUENCIES
            SELECT 
                T.[ID] AS [AR_TRIGGER_ID],
                T.[NAME] AS [AR_TRIGGER_NAME],
                T.[FREQUENCY_ID],
                F.[NAME] AS [FREQUENCY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRIGGERS] T
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_FREQUENCIES] F ON F.[ID] = T.[FREQUENCY_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Properties] AS (
            -- GUID::e2b4ccde-8734-4f9f-84a0-fe74b91c1887
            -- Filters PROPERTY_F for Entrata
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] AS [PROPERTY_ID],
                [PROPERTY_NAME] AS [PROPERTY_NAME_1]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
        ),
        [CTE_ARCodes] AS (
            -- GUID::cbd76700-122d-4b27-b182-14c67b63020c
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                UPPER([NAME]) AS [NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
        ),
        [CTE_ARCodeTypes] AS (
            -- GUID::578f54e6-a75f-41f0-ac22-0453b0898983
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]
        ),
        [CTE_AROrigins] AS (
            -- GUID::b3e9a19b-b534-4ad9-9af2-d56f817ee452
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_ORIGINS]
        ),
        [CTE_Intervals] AS (
            -- GUID::40b11313-d14a-43a2-9a5d-c374f134e8e2
            -- Calculates Lease Term Months using Date Diff logic
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [LEASE_TERM_ID],
                (DATEDIFF(MONTH, [LEASE_START_DATETIME], [LEASE_END_DATETIME]) + 1) AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTH],
                [LEASE_END_DATETIME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
        ),
        [CTE_AT] AS (
            -- GUID::60f60879-82f7-4149-8c00-ad44234772b7
            -- Aggregates Transaction Amounts
            SELECT 
                [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                SUM([TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) AS [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
            WHERE [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NOT NULL
              AND [AR_TRIGGER_ID] IN (307, 212, 202, 201)
              AND ([AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6 OR [AR_CODE_ID] = 154999)
            GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_DeletedTransactions] AS (
            -- GUID::47ff912f-34e4-4cd2-94b1-4c8bd82b4739
            -- Identifies deleted transactions (Amount = 0)
            SELECT 
                [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] AS [AR_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
                1 AS [SC_DELETED_FLAG]
            FROM [CTE_AT]
            WHERE [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] = 0.00
        ),
        [CTE_Reversal_Raw] AS (
            -- Base data for Reversal Logic (E_AR_TRANSACTIONS_1)
            SELECT 
                [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                [ID],
                [IS_REVERSAL],
                [TRANSACTION_DATE]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
            WHERE [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 3
              AND [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155001, 154999, 155628, 155632)
              AND [AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6
              AND [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NOT NULL
              AND [AR_TRIGGER_ID] = 307
        ),
        [CTE_RecordCount] AS (
            -- GUID::55dfc59f-5311-4280-8a5f-f98972bce354
            SELECT 
                [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                COUNT([ID]) AS [TRANSACTION_COUNT],
                SUM(CASE WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT]
            FROM [CTE_Reversal_Raw]
            GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_ReversalMonths_Calc] AS (
            -- GUID::0457f774-abf2-40e9-be66-7dcac21c4815 (Logic Chain Query -> Query_2 -> ReversalMonths)
            -- Extracts YYYYMM from Integer Date and counts distinct reversal months
            SELECT 
                [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(LEFT(CAST([TRANSACTION_DATE] AS VARCHAR(20)), 6) AS INT)) AS [TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS]
            FROM [CTE_Reversal_Raw]
            WHERE [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True','1')
            GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Reversals] AS (
            -- GUID::bfe3ca31-5bc3-4ca3-9290-5d277a5d0f16
            SELECT 
                RC.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
                CASE WHEN RC.[TRANSACTION_COUNT] = RC.[REVERSAL_COUNT] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [IS_TOTALLY_REVERSED_FLAG],
                RC.[TRANSACTION_COUNT],
                RC.[REVERSAL_COUNT],
                RM.[TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS]
            FROM [CTE_RecordCount] RC
            INNER JOIN [CTE_ReversalMonths_Calc] RM ON RC.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] = RM.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_ManualConcessions] AS (
            -- GUID::941b1d2c-5e80-4981-8208-3d26ad4a9a63
            -- Aggregates Manual Concessions (No Scheduled Charge ID)
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SUM([TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) AS [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
                COUNT([ID]) - SUM(CASE WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
                SUM(CASE WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
                (SUM(CASE 
                    WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True','1') AND [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] < 0.00 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] * 2 -- Logic from ATL: amount + amount
                    WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True','1') AND [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0.00 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]
                    ELSE 0.00 
                 END) * -1) AS [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
            WHERE [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 3
              AND [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155001, 154999, 155628, 155632)
              AND [AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6
              AND [AR_TRIGGER_ID] IN (901)
              AND [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NULL
            GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Combo] AS (
            -- GUID::ba599a41-ae1b-4426-ae19-3efefe869bad
            -- Main Join of Scheduled Charges to all lookups
            SELECT 
                SC.[ID],
                SC.[LEASE_ID],
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
                AC.[NAME] AS [AR_CODE_NAME],
                SC.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
                ACT.[NAME] AS [AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
                SC.[AR_ORIGIN_ID],
                AO.[NAME] AS [AR_ORIGIN_NAME],
                SC.[AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
                SC.[AR_TRIGGER_ID],
                FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME],
                ISNULL(SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE], I.[LEASE_END_DATETIME]) AS [CHARGE_END_DATE],
                SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                SP.[NAME] AS [CONCESSION_NAME],
                -- Logic: If Deleted Flag Set & Trigger matches, use Trans Amount, else use Charge Amount * -1
                CASE 
                    WHEN DT.[SC_DELETED_FLAG] = 1 AND FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME] IN ('MOVE-IN','ONE TIME','RENEWAL START') 
                    THEN DT.[AR_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]
                    ELSE SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] * -1
                END AS [CONCESSION_VALUE],
                FR.[FREQUENCY_ID],
                FR.[FREQUENCY_NAME],
                -- IS_DELETED_FLAG Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME] IN ('MOVE-IN','ONE TIME','RENEWAL START') 
                    THEN ISNULL(DT.[SC_DELETED_FLAG], 0)
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [IS_DELETED_FLAG],
                R.[IS_TOTALLY_REVERSED_FLAG],
                I.[LEASE_TERM_ID],
                I.[LEASE_TERM_MONTH] AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                P.[PROPERTY_ID],
                (R.[REVERSAL_COUNT] / 2) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT], -- ATL divides by 2?
                (R.[REVERSAL_COUNT] / 2 * (CASE 
                        WHEN DT.[SC_DELETED_FLAG] = 1 AND FR.[AR_TRIGGER_NAME] IN ('MOVE-IN','ONE TIME','RENEWAL START') 
                        THEN DT.[AR_TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] 
                        ELSE SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] * -1 
                     END)
                ) AS [TOTAL_REVERSAL_AMOUNT],
                SC.[CREATED_ON],
                CASE 
                    WHEN YEAR(SC.[CREATED_ON]) >= YEAR(SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE]) AND MONTH(SC.[CREATED_ON]) > MONTH(SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE]) 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS [CREATED_AFTER_CHARGE_FLAG],
                ISNULL(R.[TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS], 0) AS [TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS]
            FROM [CTE_SC] SC
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_Specials] SP ON SP.[ID] = SC.[AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_Frequencies] FR ON SC.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] = FR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID]
            INNER JOIN [CTE_Properties] P ON SC.[PROPERTY_ID] = P.[PROPERTY_ID]
            INNER JOIN [CTE_ARCodes] AC ON SC.[AR_CODE_ID] = AC.[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ARCodeTypes] ACT ON SC.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = ACT.[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_AROrigins] AO ON SC.[AR_ORIGIN_ID] = AO.[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_Intervals] I ON SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = I.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_DeletedTransactions] DT ON SC.[ID] = DT.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_Reversals] R ON SC.[ID] = R.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_ChargeDuration] AS (
            -- GUID::2546b6c1-c44a-4b5e-9077-3ba54a77e8e3
            -- Merges Combo with Manual Concessions and calculates duration
            SELECT 
                C.[LEASE_ID],
                C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                C.[CHARGE_END_DATE],
                C.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                C.[CONCESSION_NAME],
                C.[CONCESSION_VALUE],
                -- Charge Duration Months Calculation
                CASE 
                    WHEN C.[CREATED_AFTER_CHARGE_FLAG] = 0 
                    THEN ((DATEDIFF(MONTH, C.[CHARGE_START_DATE], C.[CHARGE_END_DATE]) + 1) - C.[TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS])
                    ELSE ((DATEDIFF(MONTH, C.[CREATED_ON], C.[CHARGE_END_DATE]) + 1) - C.[TOTAL_MONTHS_OF_REVERSALS]) -- Adjusted to +1 to match BODS 'MM' behavior if needed, standardizing on DATEDIFF
                END AS [CHARGE_DURATION_MONTHS],
                C.[FREQUENCY_ID],
                C.[FREQUENCY_NAME],
                C.[IS_DELETED_FLAG],
                C.[IS_TOTALLY_REVERSED_FLAG] AS [IS_REVERSAL],
                -- Cap Lease Term Months at 12
                CASE WHEN C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS] > 12 THEN 12 ELSE C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS] END AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                C.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                C.[PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                C.[PROPERTY_ID],
                ISNULL(C.[REVERSAL_COUNT], 0) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
                ISNULL(MC.[REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL], 0) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
                ISNULL(C.[TOTAL_REVERSAL_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
                ISNULL(MC.[REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL], 0.00) AS [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
                ISNULL(MC.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] * -1, 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
                MC.[CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL]
            FROM [CTE_Combo] C
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ManualConcessions] MC ON C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = MC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Monthly] AS (
            -- GUID::ea7ba7df-d86a-4ae1-9bd4-85df72e36a9c
            -- Logic for Monthly Frequencies
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
                [CONCESSION_NAME],
                ([CONCESSION_VALUE] * ISNULL([CHARGE_DURATION_MONTHS], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS])) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
                [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
                [IS_DELETED_FLAG],
                [IS_REVERSAL],
                [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
                [REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
                [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
                [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
                1 AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED]
            FROM [CTE_ChargeDuration]
            WHERE [FREQUENCY_NAME] = 'MONTHLY'
        ),
        [CTE_Once] AS (
            -- GUID::6005a8a5-8bce-4a95-80d2-53025535d06e
            -- Logic for One Time Frequencies
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
                [CONCESSION_NAME],
                [CONCESSION_VALUE] AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
                [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
                [IS_DELETED_FLAG],
                [IS_REVERSAL],
                [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
                [REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
                [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
                [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
                1 AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED]
            FROM [CTE_ChargeDuration]
            WHERE [FREQUENCY_NAME] IN ('ONCE', 'ONE TIME')
        ),
        [CTE_Merge] AS (
            -- GUID::21755cee-4d96-4bb9-8a82-a462b9ac5528
            -- Union of logic branches
            SELECT * FROM [CTE_Monthly]
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM [CTE_Once]
        ),
        [CTE_Conformer] AS (
            -- GUID::07417056-31f4-4de8-bc3f-ae78133c03d6
            -- Aggregation by Lease Interval
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                [IS_DELETED_FLAG] AS [FLAG_DELETED],
                
                -- Aggregations
                SUM([CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED]) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
                ISNULL(MAX([CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL]), 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
                SUM([CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED]) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT],
                
                SUM([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED]) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
                MAX([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL]) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
                (SUM([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED]) + MAX([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL])) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
                
                -- Monthly Values (Derived)
                (SUM([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED]) / NULLIF([LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],0)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
                (MAX([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL]) / NULLIF([LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],0)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
                ((SUM([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED]) / NULLIF([LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],0)) + (MAX([CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL]) / NULLIF([LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],0))) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],

                -- Reversals
                MAX([REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED]) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
                MAX([REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL]) AS [REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
                (MAX([REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED]) + MAX([REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL])) AS [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_COUNT],
                
                MAX([REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED]) AS [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
                MAX([REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL]) AS [REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
                (MAX([REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED]) + MAX([REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL])) AS [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT]

            FROM [CTE_Merge]
            WHERE [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS] IS NOT NULL 
              AND [IS_DELETED_FLAG] = 0 
              AND ISNULL([IS_REVERSAL], 0) = 0
            GROUP BY 
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME_1],
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                [IS_DELETED_FLAG]
        ),
        [CTE_QryDupes] AS (
            -- GUID::2e6d767b-5f1a-4743-b7f7-57941a6c0a4d
            -- Check for duplicates
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                COUNT([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]) AS [COUNT_ID]
            FROM [CTE_Conformer]
            GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        )
        -- 3. LOAD TARGET
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONCESSIONS_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [CONCESSION_COUNT],
            [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_COUNT],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED],
            [FLAG_DELETED],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME]
        )
        SELECT 
            C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            C.[CONCESSION_COUNT],
            C.[CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],
            C.[CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
            C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],
            C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            C.[CONCESSION_REVERSAL_COUNT],
            C.[REVERSAL_COUNT_MANUAL],
            C.[REVERSAL_COUNT_SCHEDULED],
            C.[CONCESSION_REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT],
            C.[REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_MANUAL],
            C.[REVERSAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT_SCHEDULED],
            C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],
            C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            -- Flag Logic from Grouper
            CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CONCESSION],
            CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL],
            CASE WHEN C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED],
            C.[FLAG_DELETED],
            C.[LEASE_ID],
            C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
            C.[PROPERTY_ID],
            C.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            C.[PROPERTY_NAME_1]
        FROM [CTE_Conformer] C
        INNER JOIN [CTE_QryDupes] D ON C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = D.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        WHERE D.[COUNT_ID] = 1; -- Filter for unique Lease Intervals

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: CONCESSION_TARGETS_0_SP
transformations: Entity_ID: CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING([LEVEL_NAME], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) - 1) ELSE [LEVEL_NAME] END

Inducement_Type: CASE WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%CONCESSION%' THEN 'CONCESSION' WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' THEN 'REFERRAL' WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%GIFT%' THEN 'GIFT CARD' ELSE UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) END
LEASE_TYPE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), '') IN ('', 'ACTUAL') THEN 'AGG' ELSE ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), 'AGG') END
CONCESSION_AGG: CASE WHEN ISNULL([CON_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([CON_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([CON_RENEW_Amount],0) ELSE [CON_AGG_Amount] END
GIFT_CARD_AGG: CASE WHEN ISNULL([GC_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([GC_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([GC_RENEW_Amount],0) ELSE [GC_AGG_Amount] END
REFERRAL_AGG: CASE WHEN ISNULL([REF_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([REF_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([REF_RENEW_Amount],0) ELSE [REF_AGG_Amount] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.Adaptive_Concession_and_Gift_Card_Input, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
-- SECTION 1: TARGET TABLE DDL
-- Per Architecture Rule 0.1: Target tables already exist. DDL is omitted.

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CONCESSION_TARGETS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE 1: Source Cache (Fixes Distributed Processing Error & Case Sensitivity)
        -- Source: [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Concession_and_Gift_Card_Input]
        WITH [Source_Cache] AS (
            SELECT 
                [Academic_Yr] AS [ACADEMIC_YR],
                [Level_Name] AS [LEVEL_NAME],
                [Rent_Inducements] AS [RENT_INDUCEMENTS],
                [Total_$] AS [TOTAL_$],
                [Lease_Type] AS [LEASE_TYPE]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Concession_and_Gift_Card_Input]
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Concessions (Initial Transformations)
        [Concessions] AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Mapping: '20' || substr(ACADEMIC_YR,1,2)
                CAST('20' + SUBSTRING([ACADEMIC_YR], 1, 2) AS INT) AS [AY],
                
                -- Mapping: word(LEVEL_NAME, 1)
                CASE 
                    WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) > 0 
                    THEN SUBSTRING([LEVEL_NAME], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME]) - 1)
                    ELSE [LEVEL_NAME]
                END AS [Entity_ID],

                -- Mapping: Inducement Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%CONCESSION%' THEN 'CONCESSION'
                    WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%REFERRAL%' THEN 'REFERRAL'
                    WHEN UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS]) LIKE '%GIFT%' THEN 'GIFT CARD'
                    ELSE UPPER([RENT_INDUCEMENTS])
                END AS [Inducement_Type],

                -- Mapping: Amount
                ISNULL([TOTAL_$], 0.00) AS [Inducement_Amount],

                -- Mapping: Lease Type
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), '') IN ('', 'ACTUAL') THEN 'AGG'
                    ELSE ISNULL(UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]), 'AGG')
                END AS [LEASE_TYPE]
            FROM [Source_Cache]
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Property (Filter Subproperties)
        [Property] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
        ),

        -- CTE 4: ConcessionsSum (Join & Group By)
        -- Constructs the "Pivot Key" (Inducement - LeaseType)
        [ConcessionsSum] AS (
            SELECT 
                C.[AY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                -- Composite Key for Pivot: e.g., 'GIFT CARD - AGG'
                (C.[Inducement_Type] + ' - ' + C.[LEASE_TYPE]) AS [Pivot_Key],
                SUM(C.[Inducement_Amount]) AS [Total_Amount]
            FROM [Concessions] C
            INNER JOIN [Property] P ON C.[Entity_ID] = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
            GROUP BY 
                C.[AY], 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME], 
                (C.[Inducement_Type] + ' - ' + C.[LEASE_TYPE])
        ),

        -- CTE 5: Reverse_Pivot (Flatten Rows to Columns)
        [Reverse_Pivot] AS (
            SELECT 
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                -- Pivot Logic using Conditional Aggregation
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'GIFT CARD - AGG' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [GC_AGG_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'GIFT CARD - NEW' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [GC_NEW_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'GIFT CARD - RENEWAL' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [GC_RENEW_Amount],
                
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'CONCESSION - AGG' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [CON_AGG_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'CONCESSION - NEW' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [CON_NEW_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'CONCESSION - RENEWAL' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [CON_RENEW_Amount],
                
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'REFERRAL - AGG' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [REF_AGG_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'REFERRAL - NEW' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [REF_NEW_Amount],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [Pivot_Key] = 'REFERRAL - RENEWAL' THEN [Total_Amount] ELSE 0 END) AS [REF_RENEW_Amount]
            FROM [ConcessionsSum]
            GROUP BY [AY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
        ),

        -- CTE 6: Output_View (Final Calculations)
        [Output_View] AS (
            SELECT 
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                -- Logic: If AGG is 0, sum NEW + RENEW
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL([CON_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([CON_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([CON_RENEW_Amount],0)
                    ELSE [CON_AGG_Amount] 
                END AS [CONCESSION_AGG],
                ISNULL([CON_NEW_Amount], 0) AS [CONCESSION_NEW],
                ISNULL([CON_RENEW_Amount], 0) AS [CONCESSION_RENEW],

                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL([GC_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([GC_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([GC_RENEW_Amount],0)
                    ELSE [GC_AGG_Amount] 
                END AS [GIFT_CARD_AGG],
                ISNULL([GC_NEW_Amount], 0) AS [GIFT_CARD_NEW],
                ISNULL([GC_RENEW_Amount], 0) AS [GIFT_CARD_RENEW],

                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL([REF_AGG_Amount], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL([REF_NEW_Amount],0) + ISNULL([REF_RENEW_Amount],0)
                    ELSE [REF_AGG_Amount] 
                END AS [REFERRAL_AGG],
                ISNULL([REF_NEW_Amount], 0) AS [REFERRAL_NEW],
                ISNULL([REF_RENEW_Amount], 0) AS [REFERRAL_RENEW],

                -- DATE_UPDATED: sysdate() - 1 -> YYYYMMDD
                CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)) AS [DATE_UPDATED]
            FROM [Reverse_Pivot]
        )

        -- MERGE STATEMENT (Process Type 2: Update/Insert)
        -- Target: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONCESSION_TARGETS_0]
        -- Keys: AY, PROPERTY_KEY
        MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONCESSION_TARGETS_0] AS Target
        USING [Output_View] AS Source
        ON Target.[AY] = Source.[AY] AND Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[PROPERTY_NAME]      = Source.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                Target.[CONCESSION_AGG]     = Source.[CONCESSION_AGG],
                Target.[CONCESSION_NEW]     = Source.[CONCESSION_NEW],
                Target.[CONCESSION_RENEW]   = Source.[CONCESSION_RENEW],
                Target.[GIFT_CARD_AGG]      = Source.[GIFT_CARD_AGG],
                Target.[GIFT_CARD_NEW]      = Source.[GIFT_CARD_NEW],
                Target.[GIFT_CARD_RENEW]    = Source.[GIFT_CARD_RENEW],
                Target.[REFERRAL_AGG]       = Source.[REFERRAL_AGG],
                Target.[REFERRAL_NEW]       = Source.[REFERRAL_NEW],
                Target.[REFERRAL_RENEW]     = Source.[REFERRAL_RENEW],
                Target.[DATE_UPDATED]       = Source.[DATE_UPDATED]

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [CONCESSION_AGG],
                [CONCESSION_NEW],
                [CONCESSION_RENEW],
                [GIFT_CARD_AGG],
                [GIFT_CARD_NEW],
                [GIFT_CARD_RENEW],
                [REFERRAL_AGG],
                [REFERRAL_NEW],
                [REFERRAL_RENEW],
                [DATE_UPDATED]
            )
            VALUES (
                Source.[AY],
                Source.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                Source.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                Source.[CONCESSION_AGG],
                Source.[CONCESSION_NEW],
                Source.[CONCESSION_RENEW],
                Source.[GIFT_CARD_AGG],
                Source.[GIFT_CARD_NEW],
                Source.[GIFT_CARD_RENEW],
                Source.[REFERRAL_AGG],
                Source.[REFERRAL_NEW],
                Source.[REFERRAL_RENEW],
                Source.[DATE_UPDATED]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.CONTACT_EVENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DECLARE @rows_inserted int = 0;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0];

    WITH [Applications_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            CASE WHEN [APPLICATION_STAGE_ID] = 4 AND [APPLICATION_STATUS_ID] = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_LEASED],
            CASE WHEN [IS_LEAD] = 1 AND [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_LEAD]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
    ),
    [Base_Events_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            E.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            E.[ID]                                    AS [EVENT_ID],
            EM.[NAME]                                 AS [CATEGORY],
            EM.[ID]                                   AS [CATEGORY_ID],
            E.[CUSTOMER_ID],
            E.[CREATED_ON_DATE]                       AS [EVENT_DATE],
            E.[CREATED_ON_DATEID]                     AS [EVENT_DATEID],
            TRY_CAST(E.[EVENT_DATETIME] AS DATETIME2(6)) AS [EVENT_DATETIME],
            E.[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID],
            AG.[NAME_FIRST],
            AG.[NAME_LAST],
            E.[LEASE_ID],
            E.[PROPERTY_ID],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            E.[NEW_STAGE_ID],
            E.[NEW_STATUS_ID],
            ET.[NAME]                                 AS [TYPE_NAME],
            ET.[ID]                                   AS [TYPE_ID],
            CASE WHEN ET.[ID] IN (1,3,5,7,9,10,78,395,442,449) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_INBOUND],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'CALL'          THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CALL],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'CHAT'          THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CHAT],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'EMAIL'         THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_EMAIL],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'ONLINE'        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ONLINE],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'SMS'           THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_SMS],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'ON-SITE VISIT' AND ET.[NAME] IN ('ONSITE VISIT','TOUR','SELF-GUIDED TOUR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
            CASE WHEN EM.[NAME] = 'ON-SITE VISIT' AND ET.[NAME] = 'VIRTUAL TOUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
            CASE
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (390,391,439,440) THEN 'COMMERCIAL'
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (9,78,442,512,515) THEN 'VISIT'
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (3,4,16,57,81,142,405,469,470,479) THEN 'PHONE CALL'
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (10,37,38,39,40,108,278,279,280,315,343,374,395,396,397,398,399,444,445,446,447,449,452,472,507,509) THEN 'ONLINE'
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (1,2,5,6,7,33,158,216,250,274,319,342,346,379,443,471,502,517,522) THEN 'CHAT/EMAIL/SMS'
                WHEN ET.[ID] IN (11,12,13,14,15,17,18,21,25,26,34,41,42,43,83,85,86,146,147,94,95,96,97,
                                  109,110,111,112,113,114,119,120,131,132,133,141,143,238,275,148,156,157,
                                  414,172,176,181,188,189,190,208,227,228,239,248,249,293,294,297,309,310,
                                  316,332,333,344,345,350,351,352,356,369,380,381,385,386,387,389,392,401,
                                  402,406,407,411,415,416,417,429,430,434,435,438,441,448,450,451,461,464,
                                  467,468,473,475,477,486,487,488,493,495,496,497,498,500,501,505,514,519,
                                  520,523,524,525) THEN 'APPLICATION/LEASE'
                ELSE 'GENERAL'
            END AS [GROUP_TYPE]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENTS] E
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_TYPES]    ET ON E.[EVENT_TYPE_ID]      = ET.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_MEDIUMS]  EM ON ET.[EVENT_MEDIUM_ID]   = EM.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]    P ON E.[PROPERTY_ID]        = P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        LEFT  JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_EMPLOYEES] AG
               ON E.[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID] = AG.[ID]
              AND AG.[NAME_LAST]    NOT IN ('PEAK CAMPUS','TEST')
              AND AG.[EMAIL_ADDRESS] IS NOT NULL
        WHERE E.[CREATED_ON_DATE] > 20230101
          AND E.[IS_DELETED]        = 0
          AND E.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] IS NOT NULL
          AND ET.[EVENT_MEDIUM_ID] <> 8
          AND P.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY]  = 0
    ),
    [Ordered_Events_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            B.*,
            A.[FLAG_LEASED],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_CALL]         ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_CALL],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_CHAT]         ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_CHAT],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_EMAIL]        ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_EMAIL],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_ONLINE]       ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_ONLINE],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_SMS]          ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_SMS],
            CASE WHEN A.[FLAG_LEAD] = 1 THEN B.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] ELSE 0 END AS [CLEAN_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] ORDER BY B.[EVENT_ID] ASC) AS [EVENT_ORDER]
        FROM [Base_Events_CTE] B
        LEFT JOIN [Applications_CTE] A ON B.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    ),
    [Aggregates_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            COUNT(*)                       AS [SUM_EVENT_COUNT],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_CALL])         AS [SUM_FLAG_CALL],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_CHAT])         AS [SUM_FLAG_CHAT],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_EMAIL])        AS [SUM_FLAG_EMAIL],
            SUM([FLAG_INBOUND])            AS [SUM_FLAG_INBOUND],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_ONLINE])       AS [SUM_FLAG_ONLINE],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_SMS])          AS [SUM_FLAG_SMS],
            SUM([CLEAN_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]) AS [SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
        FROM [Ordered_Events_CTE]
        GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    ),
    [First_Inbound_Keys] AS (
        SELECT [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], MIN([EVENT_ID]) AS [MIN_INBOUND_ID]
        FROM [Ordered_Events_CTE]
        WHERE [FLAG_INBOUND] = 1
        GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    ),
    [Last_Contact_Keys] AS (
        SELECT [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], MAX([EVENT_ORDER]) AS [MAX_ORDER]
        FROM [Ordered_Events_CTE]
        GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0]
    SELECT
        FIRST.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED],
        FIRST.[EVENT_ID]            AS [FIRST_ID],
        FIRST.[CATEGORY]            AS [FIRST_CATEGORY],
        FIRST.[CATEGORY_ID]         AS [FIRST_CATEGORY_ID],
        FIRST.[EVENT_DATE]          AS [FIRST_DATE_EVENT],
        FIRST.[EVENT_DATEID]        AS [FIRST_DATEID_EVENT],
        FIRST.[EVENT_DATETIME]      AS [FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT],
        FIRST.[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID] AS [FIRST_EMP_ID],
        FIRST.[NAME_FIRST]          AS [FIRST_EMP_NAME_FIRST],
        FIRST.[NAME_LAST]           AS [FIRST_EMP_NAME_LAST],
        FIRST.[FLAG_CALL]           AS [FIRST_FLAG_CALL],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_CALL]         = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_CALL_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_CALL]         = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_CALL_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_CHAT]           AS [FIRST_FLAG_CHAT],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_CHAT]         = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_CHAT_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_CHAT]         = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_CHAT_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_EMAIL]          AS [FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_EMAIL]        = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_EMAIL]        = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_EMAIL_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_INBOUND]        AS [FIRST_FLAG_INBOUND],
        FIRST.[FLAG_ONLINE]         AS [FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_ONLINE]       = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_ONLINE]       = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_ONLINE_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT]   AS [FIRST_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_SMS]            AS [FIRST_FLAG_SMS],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_SMS]          = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_SMS_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_SMS]          = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_SMS_LEASED],
        FIRST.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]   AS [FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] = 1 AND AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR_TOURED],
        CASE WHEN FIRST.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] = 1 AND FIRST.[FLAG_LEASED]         = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FIRST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
        FIRST.[GROUP_TYPE]          AS [FIRST_GROUP_TYPE],
        FIRST.[TYPE_NAME]           AS [FIRST_TYPE],
        FIRST.[TYPE_ID]             AS [FIRST_TYPE_ID],
        CASE WHEN AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_1_or_more_ONSITE_VISITS],
        LAST.[EVENT_ID]             AS [LAST_ID],
        LAST.[CATEGORY]             AS [LAST_CATEGORY],
        LAST.[EVENT_DATE]           AS [LAST_DATE_EVENT],
        LAST.[EVENT_DATEID]         AS [LAST_DATEID_EVENT],
        LAST.[EVENT_ORDER]          AS [LAST_EVENT_ORDER],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_CALL]      AS [LAST_FLAG_CALL],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_CHAT]      AS [LAST_FLAG_CHAT],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_EMAIL]     AS [LAST_FLAG_EMAIL],
        LAST.[FLAG_INBOUND]         AS [LAST_FLAG_INBOUND],
        CASE WHEN LAST.[NEW_STAGE_ID] = 4 AND LAST.[NEW_STATUS_ID] = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [LAST_FLAG_LEASED],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_ONLINE]       AS [LAST_FLAG_ONLINE],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] AS [LAST_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_SMS]          AS [LAST_FLAG_SMS],
        LAST.[CLEAN_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] AS [LAST_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        LAST.[GROUP_TYPE]           AS [LAST_GROUP_TYPE],
        LAST.[TYPE_NAME]            AS [LAST_TYPE],
        FIRST.[LEASE_ID],
        FIRST.[PROPERTY_ID],
        FIRST.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        FIRST.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        LAST.[NEW_STAGE_ID]         AS [STAGE_ID],
        LAST.[NEW_STATUS_ID]        AS [STATUS_ID],
        AGG.[SUM_EVENT_COUNT],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_CALL],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_CHAT],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_EMAIL],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_INBOUND],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONLINE],
        CASE WHEN AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT]                                  AS [SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_SMS],
        AGG.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
    FROM [First_Inbound_Keys] FIK
    INNER JOIN [Ordered_Events_CTE] FIRST
           ON FIK.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = FIRST.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
          AND FIK.[MIN_INBOUND_ID]    = FIRST.[EVENT_ID]
    INNER JOIN [Last_Contact_Keys] LCK
           ON FIRST.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LCK.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    INNER JOIN [Ordered_Events_CTE] LAST
           ON LCK.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]  = LAST.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
          AND LCK.[MAX_ORDER]          = LAST.[EVENT_ORDER]
    INNER JOIN [Aggregates_CTE] AGG
           ON FIRST.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = AGG.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID];

    SET @rows_inserted = @@ROWCOUNT;
    PRINT 'CONTACT_EVENTS_0_SP: rows inserted = ' + CAST(@rows_inserted AS varchar(20));

END

name: CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG_SP
transformations: FLAG_TIME_BUCKET: CASE WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 1 WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AFTER_HOURS: CASE WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) <= 7 OR DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) >= 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

TIMEFRAME: CASE WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning' WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon' ELSE 'After Hours' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.CONTACT_EVENTS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0 into WH_PROD2.dbo.CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG (cross-database).
sql:
/*
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- Definition: 2-part name for definition. Logic uses 3-part names for data access.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- We perform a full refresh as part of the Drop/Create intent
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG];

        -- CTE 1: Replicating the 'Events' logical view
        -- Handles time bucketing and initial filtering
        WITH Events_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                CE.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                D.[AY],
                D.[YEAR],
                1 AS [BaseCount],
                D.[DAY_3],
                DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) AS [Hour_of_day],
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 1
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 2
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_TIME_BUCKET],
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) <= 7 
                      OR DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) >= 19 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS],
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, TRY_CAST(CE.[FIRST_DATETIME_EVENT] AS DATETIME2(3))) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                    ELSE 'After Hours' 
                END AS [TIMEFRAME],
                CE.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                CE.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                CE.[FIRST_CATEGORY],
                CE.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT],
                CE.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT],
                CE.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL],
                CE.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_0] AS CE
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D 
                ON CE.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT] = D.[DATE_KEY]
            WHERE (CE.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL] > 0 OR CE.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR] > 0)
              AND D.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Replicating the 'Naming' logical view
        -- Handles the non-equi join for cumulative/range logic and aggregation
        Naming_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                D1.[DATE_KEY],
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[AY],
                E.[DAY_3],
                E.[TIMEFRAME],
                E.[FIRST_CATEGORY] AS [CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
                SUM(E.[BaseCount]) AS [COUNT],
                SUM(E.[FLAG_AFTER_HOURS]) AS [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS],
                SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED],
                SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT_TOTAL]) AS [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED_TOTAL],
                SUM(E.[SUM_FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]) AS [FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
            FROM Events_CTE AS E
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D1 
                ON E.[FIRST_DATE_EVENT] <= D1.[DATE_KEY]
            WHERE D1.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 
              AND D1.[RELATIVE_DAY] < 0
            GROUP BY 
                D1.[DATE_KEY], 
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
                E.[AY], 
                E.[DAY_3], 
                E.[TIMEFRAME], 
                E.[FIRST_CATEGORY]
        )

        -- Final Load Step
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[CONTACT_EVENTS_VISITS_AGG] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [AY],
            [DAY_3],
            [TIMEFRAME],
            [CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
            [COUNT],
            [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS],
            [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED],
            [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [AY],
            [DAY_3],
            [TIMEFRAME],
            [CHANNEL_CONFORMED],
            [COUNT],
            [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS],
            [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED],
            [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR]
        FROM Naming_CTE;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

FLAG_MOVED_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL([MOVE_OUT_DATE], 99999999) <= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE()-1, 112) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL([TRANSFER_LEASE_ID], 0) > 0 AND [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (4, 5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'APPLICATION' THEN 'NEW' WHEN [NAME] = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 'MTM' WHEN [NAME] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'RENEWAL' WHEN [NAME] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE '--' END
FLAG_TYPE_MTM: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_NEW: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
