FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'NOTICE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST: CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'PAST' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED: CASE WHEN [DATE_FMO_PROCESSED] > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE: CASE WHEN [CURRENT_BALANCE] = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN Applications.[DATE_STARTED] WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN Applications.[DATE_COMPLETED] ELSE Lease_AY.[DATE_CREATED] END

DATEID_CREATED: CASE WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN Applications.[DATEID_STARTED] WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN Applications.[DATEID_COMPLETED] ELSE Lease_AY.[DATEID_CREATED] END
DATEID_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE] > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
DATEID_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN Leases.[MOVE_OUT_DATE] > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.[MOVE_OUT_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN Leases.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN Applications.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM] IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 1 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_MTM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1 AND Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE] <> 'NOTICE' AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Properties.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY], 'US') = 'CA' AND ISNULL(Properties.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY], 0) = 1 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER_IN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN], 0) = 1 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_APP: CASE WHEN Applications.[DATE_CREATED] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO: CASE WHEN Applications.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER: CASE WHEN Leases.[NAME_LAST] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN Applications.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = 'UNASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(RentCharges.[RENT_AMOUNT], 0.00) <= 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE], 0) > 0 AND Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE] < ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_BEGIN], 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_COST: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCost.[LEASING_REFERRAL_COST], 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCredit.[LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT], 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM], 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT], 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE: CASE WHEN LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LeaseTerms.[FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE] END
FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.[FLOORPLAN], 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.[UNIT_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN Units.[FLOORPLAN] ELSE Applications.[FLOORPLAN] END
FLOORPLAN_CODE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.[FLOORPLAN], 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.[UNIT_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN Units.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] ELSE Applications.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] END
FLOORPLAN_ID: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.[FLOORPLAN], 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.[UNIT_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN Units.[FLOORPLAN_ID] ELSE Applications.[FLOORPLAN_ID] END
FLOORPLAN_KEY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.[FLOORPLAN], 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.[UNIT_KEY] IS NOT NULL THEN Units.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] ELSE Applications.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] END

Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.[TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID], 0) > 0 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT' WHEN IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.[TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID], 0) = 0 THEN 'TRANSFER IN' ELSE IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] END
LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] END
space_count_test: CASE WHEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN C.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN C.[DATE_APP_STARTED] WHEN C.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN C.[DATE_APP_COMPLETED] ELSE C.[DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED] END
FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN C.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ISNULL(C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN C.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID_1] >= 229 AND C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM] IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_MTM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1 AND C.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE] <> 'NOTICE' AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 AND C.[PROPERTY_ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA' AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_OCC_TYPE_STUDENT], 0) = 1 -- Assuming this maps to Student Only prop flag THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW: CASE WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1 -- Note: ATL logic check required here, assuming Total excludes MTM based on pattern AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(C.[DATE_MOVE_IN], 0) > 0 AND C.[DATE_MOVE_IN] < ISNULL(C.[DATE_BEGIN], 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION: CASE WHEN ISNULL(C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE ISNULL(C.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], 0) END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW: CASE WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_NEW_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_FALL_NEW_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_FALL_NEW_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 0 THEN [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END

FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES: CASE WHEN [DATE_APPROVED] >= [DATE_WEEK_BEGIN] AND [DATE_APPROVED] <= [DATE_APPROVED] -- Note: ATL source said <= DATE_APPROVED (redundant but preserved) THEN [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] ELSE 0 END

INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP: CASE WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED NEW' WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED RENEWAL' WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE NEW' WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE RENEWAL' WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER' WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM' THEN 'MONTH TO MONTH' WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'NEW' THEN 'INCOMPLETE NEW' WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'INCOMPLETE RENEWAL' WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] < 229 THEN 'APPLICATION' WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] IN (267, 272) THEN 'APPLICATION ON HOLD' WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT' WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN] = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER IN' WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OTHER' END

INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID: CASE WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 91 WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 92 WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 21 WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 31 WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 50 WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM' THEN 41 WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'NEW' THEN 22 WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 32 WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] < 229 THEN 10 WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] IN (267, 272) THEN 11 WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 1 THEN 52 WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN] = 1 THEN 51 WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 THEN 90 ELSE 999 END

 -- =========================================================

        -- CHUNK 1: Source Transforms & COMBO Inputs (28 Tables)

        -- 1. Leases (Source: [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES])

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Leases') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Leases;

            [COLLECTIONS_START_DATE], [COMPANY_NAME], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON_DATE],

                THEN 1 ELSE 0 

            END AS [FLAG_MOVED_IN],

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL([MOVE_OUT_DATE], 99999999) <= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE()-1, 112) 

                THEN 1 ELSE 0 

            END AS [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],

            CASE

        -- 2. Lease_AY (Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0])

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Lease_AY') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Lease_AY;

            [FLAG_FALL], [FLAG_HOLDOVER], [FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING], [FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN],

            [FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED], [FLAG_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR],

            [FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE], [FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT], [FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED],

            [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT], [FLAG_MTM_FUTURE], [FLAG_MTM_LEASE], [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE],

            [FLAG_MTM_PAST], [FLAG_NEW_LEASE], [FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],

            [FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE] AS [FLAG_TRANSFER], [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN], [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],

            [HOLDOVER_DAYS], [INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],

            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE], [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS],

            [PARENT_INTERVAL_ID], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY],

            [PROPERTY_NAME], [STAGE], [STAGE_ID], [START_WINDOW_ID], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID],

            [STATUS_TYPE_ID], [TERM_ID], [TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID]

        INTO #Lease_AY

        -- 3. Properties (Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F])

            CASE WHEN [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS [space_count_test],

            [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER], [STAGE], [STAGE_ID], [STAGE_ORDER_NUM],

            [STATUS], [STATUS_ID], [STATUS_ORDER_NUM], [STEP], [STEP_ID], [STEP_ORDER_NUM],

        INTO #Applications FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F];

        -- 5. IntervalTypes (Source: [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES])

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#IntervalTypes') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #IntervalTypes;

        SELECT 

            [ID] AS [Interval_Type_ID], [NAME] AS [Interval_Type],

            CASE 

                WHEN [NAME] = 'APPLICATION' THEN 'NEW'

                WHEN [NAME] = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 'MTM'

                WHEN [NAME] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'RENEWAL'

                WHEN [NAME] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER'

                ELSE '--' 

            END AS [Interval_Type_CONFORMED],

            CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_TYPE_MTM],

            CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_TYPE_NEW],

            CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL],

            CASE WHEN [NAME] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER]

        INTO #IntervalTypes FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES];

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------

        -- STEP 2: THE "COMBO" TRANSFORM (Massive Join)

        -- ---------------------------------------------------------

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Combo_Stage') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Combo_Stage;

        -- [INSERT CHUNK 2 HERE]

        -- The 25+ Join logic for the COMBO view will go here.

-- =========================================================

        -- CHUNK 2: The "COMBO" Transform

        -- =========================================================

        

        SELECT 

            Lease_AY.[LEASE_AY_KEY],

            ThisWeek.[DATE_KEY],

            Leases.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],

            ISNULL(AdminFees.[ADMIN_FEE_NAME], '--') AS [ADMIN_FEE_NAME],

            ISNULL(AdminFees.[ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(AppFees.[APP_FEE_NAME], '--') AS [APP_FEE_NAME],

            ISNULL(AppFees.[APP_FEE_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [APP_FEE_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[APPLICATION_ID], 0) AS [APPLICATION_ID],

            Lease_AY.[AY],

            Applications.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],

            Applications.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],

            Applications.[DATE_STARTED],

            Applications.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] AS [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID_1],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[AY_WEEK_KEY], 0.00) AS [AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM], '--') AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID], 0) AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE], '--') AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],

            ISNULL(Collections.[COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_COUNT], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_CALL], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CALL],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_CHAT], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_SMS], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_SMS],

            ISNULL(Applications.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],

            Lease_AY.[COUNT],

            Lease_AY.[CREATOR_ID],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_GENDER],

            Leases.[PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID] AS [CUSTOMER_ID],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_KEY],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_NAME],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE],

            Customers.[CUSTOMER_RETURNED_PAYMENTS],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_STARTED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_STARTED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_LEASE_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_AY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_AY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_AY_END], 0) AS [DATE_AY_END],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END], 0) AS [DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATE_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE], 0) AS [DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Collections.[DATE_COLLECTIONS_START], 0) AS [DATE_COLLECTIONS_START],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_COMPLETED],

            -- DATE_CREATED Logic

            CASE 

                WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN Applications.[DATE_STARTED]

                WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN Applications.[DATE_COMPLETED]

                ELSE Lease_AY.[DATE_CREATED]

            END AS [DATE_CREATED],

            Lease_AY.[DATE_CREATED] AS [DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED],

            Leases.[CREATED_ON_DATE] AS [DATE_LEASE_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Deposits.[DATE_POSTED], 0) AS [DATE_DEPOSIT_POSTED],

            -- DATE_END Logic (MTM Extension)

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_END], 0) = 0 AND IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM'

                THEN CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, 10, GETDATE()), 112))

                ELSE ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_END], 0)

            END AS [DATE_END],

            ISNULL(Collections.[DATE_FMO_PROCESSED], 0) AS [DATE_FMO_PROCESSED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_LEASE_GENERATED], 0) AS [DATE_GENERATED],

            ISNULL(GiftCards.[DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Guarantors.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED],

            ISNULL(Guarantors.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(Guarantors.[DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(Guarantors.[DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[DATE_POLICY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[DATE_POLICY_END], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_END],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN_DATE], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END_DATE], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_LAST_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATE_LAST_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], 0) AS [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],

            ISNULL(Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE], 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_IN],

            ISNULL(Leases.[MOVE_OUT_DATE], 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_OUT],

            ISNULL(Properties.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED], 0) AS [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],

            Applications.[DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],

            Applications.[DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED],

            Applications.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],

            Applications.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_TRANSFERRED], 0) AS [DATE_TRANSFERRED],

            Lease_AY.[DATE_UPDATED],

            ThisWeek.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE] AS [DATE_WEEK_BEGIN],

            ThisWeek.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE] AS [DATE_WEEK_END],

            Lease_AY.[DATE_YESTERDAY],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATEID_APP_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATEID_APP_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATEID_APP_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_CREATED], 0) AS [DATEID_APP_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_STARTED], 0) AS [DATEID_APP_STARTED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATEID_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATEID_AY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_END], 0) AS [DATEID_AY_END],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATEID_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATEID_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE], 0) AS [DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATEID_COMPLETED],

            CASE 

                WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN Applications.[DATEID_STARTED]

                WHEN Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN Applications.[DATEID_COMPLETED]

                ELSE Lease_AY.[DATEID_CREATED]

            END AS [DATEID_CREATED],

            -- DATEID_END Logic

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_END], 0) = 0 AND IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM'

                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', DATEADD(day, 10, GETDATE()))

                ELSE ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_END], 0)

            END AS [DATEID_END],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(Insurance.[DATEID_POLICY_END], 0) AS [DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_END],

            Lease_AY.[DATEID_CREATED] AS [DATEID_INTERVAL_CREATED],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_LAST_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATEID_LAST_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED], 0) AS [DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],

            -- DATEID_MOVE_IN

            CASE 

                WHEN Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE] > 0 

                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.[MOVE_IN_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8))))

                ELSE 0 

            END AS [DATEID_MOVE_IN],

            -- DATEID_MOVE_OUT

            CASE 

                WHEN Leases.[MOVE_OUT_DATE] > 0 

                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.[MOVE_OUT_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8))))

                ELSE 0 

            END AS [DATEID_MOVE_OUT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED],

            Lease_AY.[DATEID_UPDATED],

            Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY],

            ISNULL(Deposits.[DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Deposits.[DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Deposits.[INITIAL_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Leases.[DEPOSIT_HELD], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_HELD],

            ISNULL(Deposits.[DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS], 0) AS [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],

            ISNULL(Leases.[FINANCIAL_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [FINANCIAL_BALANCE],

            CASE WHEN Leases.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL],

            ISNULL(AdminFees.[FLAG_ADMIN_FEE], 0) AS [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],

            ISNULL(AppFees.[FLAG_APP_FEE], 0) AS [FLAG_APP_FEE],

            -- FLAG_CANCELLED

            CASE 

                WHEN Applications.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 

                     AND Applications.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM] IS NOT NULL 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 1 

                THEN 1 ELSE 0 

            END AS [FLAG_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) AS [FLAG_CANCELLED_old_logic],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE], 0) AS [FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Collections.[FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE], 0) AS [FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) AS [FLAG_COMPLETE],

            ISNULL(Concessions.[FLAG_CONCESSION], 0) AS [FLAG_CONCESSION],

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0 

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED],

            -- FLAG_FALL_MTM (Canada Student Logic)

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1

                     AND Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE] <> 'NOTICE'

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Properties.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY], 'US') = 'CA'

                     AND ISNULL(Properties.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY], 0) = 1

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_MTM],

            -- FLAG_FALL_NEW

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW],

----end of 2.1

-- FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER],

            -- FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            -- FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL

            -- FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER_IN

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN], 0) = 1

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            -- FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE],

            -- FLAG_FALL_TOTAL

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            -- FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            -- FLAG_OCCUPIED Logic

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Units.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], 0) > 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND (

                        (Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_BEGIN], 0) AND Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_END], 0))

                     )

                     AND (

                        (Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_BEGIN], 0) AND Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_END], 0))

                        OR ISNULL(Applications.[FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL], 0) = 1

                     )

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],

            -- FLAG_OCCUPIED_SPACES (Same Logic)

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(Units.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], 0) > 1

                     AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATE_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND (

                        (Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_BEGIN], 0) AND Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_END], 0))

                     )

                     AND (

                        (Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_BEGIN], 0) AND Lease_AY.[DATEID_YESTERDAY] <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.[DATEID_AY_END], 0))

                        OR ISNULL(Applications.[FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL], 0) = 1

                     )

                THEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED_SPACES],

            -- Interval_Type_CONFORMED

                WHEN IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.[TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID], 0) > 0 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT'

                WHEN IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.[TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID], 0) = 0 THEN 'TRANSFER IN'

                ELSE IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED]

            END AS [Interval_Type_CONFORMED],

            Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],

            ISNULL(Applications.[LEAD_SOURCE], '--') AS [LEAD_SOURCE],

            ISNULL(Applications.[LEAD_SOURCE_ID], 0) AS [LEAD_SOURCE_ID],

            Lease_AY.[LEASE_ID],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], 0) AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], -- Changed default to 0 to match type, ATL said '--'

            Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],

            LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM],

            LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_ID],

            LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],

            Lease_AY.[CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT],

            CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] END AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION],

            LeaseTerms.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],

            Agents.[COMPANY_USER_ID] AS [LEASING_AGENT_COMPANY_ID],

            Agents.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] AS [LEASING_AGENT_EMPLOYEE_CODE],

            Agents.[EMPLOYEE_NAME] AS [LEASING_AGENT_NAME],

            Applications.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],

            ISNULL(Applications.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE], '--') AS [OCC_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Applications.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [OCC_TYPE_ID],

            ISNULL(Applications.[LEASE_TYPE], '--') AS [OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[LEASE_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT_ID],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[PARENT_INTERVAL_ID], 0) AS [PARENT_INTERVAL_ID],

            Properties.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY] AS [PROPERTY_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY], 0.0) AS [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],

            Lease_AY.[PROPERTY_ID],

            Lease_AY.[PROPERTY_KEY],

            Lease_AY.[PROPERTY_NAME],

            ISNULL(ReferralCost.[LEASING_REFERRAL_COST], 0.00) AS [REFERRAL_COST],

            ISNULL(ReferralCost.[REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID], 0) AS [REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID],

            ISNULL(ReferralCost.[REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], '--') AS [REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],

            ISNULL(ReferralCost.[REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], '--') AS [REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],

            ISNULL(ReferralCredit.[LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT], 0.00) AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT],

            ISNULL(ReferralCredit.[CHARGE_COUNT], 0) AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_COUNT],

            ISNULL(ReferralCredit.[LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL], 0.00) AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],

            ISNULL(RentCharges.[RENT_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [RENT_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(Leases.[REPAYMENT_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [REPAYMENT_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Leases.[RESIDENT_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [RESIDENT_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], 0.00) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.[CHARGE_COUNT], 0) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL], 0.00) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM], 0.00) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.[CHARGE_COUNT], 0) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT],

            ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL], 0.00) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL],

            ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT], 0.00) AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT],

            ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.[CHARGE_COUNT], 0) AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT],

            ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL], 0.00) AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],

            ISNULL(School.[SCHOOL_NAME], '--') AS [SCHOOL_NAME],

            Applications.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME],

            Applications.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED],

            ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS], 0) AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS],

            ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE], 0) AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],

            ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY], 0.00) AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY],

            ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL], 0.00) AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],

            ISNULL(Units.[SPACE], '--') AS [SPACE],

            Applications.[SPACE_CONFIG],

            Applications.[SPACE_CONFIG_ID],

            Applications.[SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], Applications.[SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT]) AS [SPACE_COUNT],

            ISNULL(Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 1) AS [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],

            CASE WHEN Applications.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE] = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS [space_count_test],

            ISNULL(Units.[SPACE_ID], 0) AS [SPACE_ID],

            ISNULL(Units.[SPACE_NUMBER], '--') AS [SPACE_NUMBER],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[STAGE], '--') AS [STAGE],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[STAGE_ID], 0) AS [STAGE_ID],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[START_WINDOW_ID], 0) AS [START_WINDOW_ID],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[STATUS], '--') AS [STATUS],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[STATUS_ID], 0) AS [STATUS_ID],

            ISNULL(StatusTypes.[STATUS_TYPE], '--') AS [STATUS_TYPE],

            ISNULL(Lease_AY.[STATUS_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [STATUS_TYPE_ID],

            ISNULL(Applications.[STEP], '--') AS [STEP],

            ISNULL(Leases.[TOTAL_BALANCE], 0.00) AS [TOTAL_BALANCE],

            ISNULL(Units.[UNIT_KEY], 0) AS [UNIT_KEY],

            SYSDATETIME() AS [ETL_CREATED_DATE]

			INTO #Combo_Stage

        FROM #Lease_AY AS Lease_AY

        LEFT JOIN #Leases AS Leases 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_ID] = Leases.[ID]

        INNER JOIN #Properties AS Properties 

            ON Lease_AY.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Properties.[PROPERTY_KEY]

        LEFT JOIN #Applications AS Applications 

            ON Lease_AY.[APPLICATION_ID] = Applications.[APPLICATION_ID]

        INNER JOIN #IntervalTypes AS IntervalTypes 

            ON Lease_AY.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = IntervalTypes.[Interval_Type_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Guarantors AS Guarantors 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Guarantors.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #StatusTypes AS StatusTypes 

            ON Lease_AY.[STATUS_TYPE_ID] = StatusTypes.[Status_Type_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Concessions AS Concessions 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Concessions.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #GiftCards AS GiftCards 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = GiftCards.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #AdminFees AS AdminFees 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = AdminFees.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #AppFees AS AppFees 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = AppFees.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #RentCharges AS RentCharges 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = RentCharges.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #LeaseTerms AS LeaseTerms 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LeaseTerms.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #ShortTermPremiums AS ShortTermPremiums 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ShortTermPremiums.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #GraduationEstimate AS GraduationEstimate 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = GraduationEstimate.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #School AS School 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = School.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Customers AS Customers 

            ON Lease_AY.[CUSTOMER_ID] = Customers.[CUSTOMER_KEY]

        LEFT JOIN #Agents AS Agents 

            ON Lease_AY.[CREATOR_ID] = Agents.[COMPANY_USER_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Units AS Units 

            ON Leases.[UNIT_SPACE_ID] = Units.[SPACE_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Deposits AS Deposits 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Deposits.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Collections AS Collections 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Collections.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #Insurance AS Insurance 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Insurance.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #SchedRentDiscount AS SchedRentDiscount 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = SchedRentDiscount.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #SchedLockOffDiscount AS SchedLockOffDiscount 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = SchedLockOffDiscount.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #SchedLockOffPremium AS SchedLockOffPremium 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = SchedLockOffPremium.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #ReferralCredit AS ReferralCredit 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ReferralCredit.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #ReferralCost AS ReferralCost 

            ON Lease_AY.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ReferralCost.[TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]

        LEFT JOIN #ThisWeek AS ThisWeek 

            ON Lease_AY.[DATE_KEY] = ThisWeek.[DATE_KEY];

        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Middle_Logic') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Middle_Logic;

        -- [INSERT CHUNK 3 HERE]

-- =========================================================

		-- =========================================================

        -- CHUNK 3: Output1 Logic (The Calculation Layer)

        -- Purpose: Apply specific Business Logic, Flags, and Type Conversions

        -- =========================================================

        SELECT 

            -- Keys & IDs

            C.[LEASE_AY_KEY],

            C.[DATE_KEY],

            C.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],

            C.[APPLICATION_ID],

            C.[AY],

            

            -- Admin & App Fees

            ISNULL(C.[ADMIN_FEE_NAME], '--') AS [ADMIN_FEE_NAME],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT],

            ISNULL(C.[APP_FEE_NAME], '--') AS [APP_FEE_NAME],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[APP_FEE_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [APP_FEE_AMOUNT],

            -- Cancellation Logic

            ISNULL(C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM], '--') AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],

            ISNULL(C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID], 0) AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],

            ISNULL(C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE], '--') AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],

            ISNULL(C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID], 0) AS [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],

            -- Collections Logic (Handle Nulls & Casts)

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],

            -- Concessions

            ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_COUNT], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT],

            ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL],

            ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED], 0) AS [CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],

            -- Contacts (Application Data)

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_CALL], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CALL],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_CHAT], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CHAT],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_SMS], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_SMS],

            ISNULL(C.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0) AS [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],

            

            -- Customer Data

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_GENDER], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_GENDER],

            C.[CUSTOMER_ID],

            C.[CUSTOMER_KEY],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_NAME], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE], '--') AS [CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE],

            ISNULL(C.[CUSTOMER_RETURNED_PAYMENTS], 0) AS [CUSTOMER_RETURNED_PAYMENTS],

            -- Date Logic: DATE_CREATED (Complex Rule)

            -- ATL Logic: ifthenelse(Interval_Type_ID = 1, Date_Started, ifthenelse(Interval_Type_ID = 3, Date_Completed, Date_Created))

            CASE 

                WHEN C.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN C.[DATE_APP_STARTED]

                WHEN C.[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] = 3 THEN C.[DATE_APP_COMPLETED]

                ELSE C.[DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED]

            END AS [DATE_CREATED],

            

            -- Date Logic: DATE_END (MTM Extension)

            -- ATL Logic: ifthenelse(nvl(Date_End, 0) = 0 and Interval_Type = 'MTM', to_char(sysdate + 10), Date_End)

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(C.[DATE_END], 0) = 0 AND C.[Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM'

                THEN CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, 10, GETDATE()), 112))

                ELSE ISNULL(C.[DATE_END], 0)

            END AS [DATE_END],

            -- Pass-through Dates (Ensure Null Handling)

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APP_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APP_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APP_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APP_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_CREATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APP_STARTED], 0) AS [DATE_APP_STARTED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_AY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_AY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_AY_END], 0) AS [DATE_AY_END],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END], 0) AS [DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_CANCELLED], 0) AS [DATE_CANCELLED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE], 0) AS [DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_COLLECTIONS_START], 0) AS [DATE_COLLECTIONS_START],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_LEASE_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_LEASE_CREATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_DEPOSIT_POSTED], 0) AS [DATE_DEPOSIT_POSTED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_FMO_PROCESSED], 0) AS [DATE_FMO_PROCESSED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GENERATED], 0) AS [DATE_GENERATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_END], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_END],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END], 0) AS [DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_LAST_CONTACT], 0) AS [DATE_LAST_CONTACT],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], 0) AS [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_MOVE_IN], 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_IN],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_MOVE_OUT], 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_OUT],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED], 0) AS [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], 0) AS [DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],

            ISNULL(C.[DATE_TRANSFERRED], 0) AS [DATE_TRANSFERRED],

            C.[DATE_UPDATED],

            C.[DATE_WEEK_BEGIN],

            C.[DATE_WEEK_END],

            C.[DATE_YESTERDAY],

            -- Deposit Logic

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[DEPOSIT_HELD], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DEPOSIT_HELD],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],

            

            ISNULL(C.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS], 0) AS [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],

            CAST(ISNULL(C.[FINANCIAL_BALANCE], 0.00) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [FINANCIAL_BALANCE],

		

		

		

-- end of chunk 1

-- ===================================

            -- FLAG LOGIC (Business Rules)

            -- ===================================

            

            -- FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL

            CASE WHEN C.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = ISNULL(C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL],

            

            -- FLAG_CANCELLED (Complex Override)

            -- ATL: ifthenelse(MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM IS NOT NULL AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 1, 1, 0)

            CASE 

                WHEN C.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID_1] >= 229 

                     AND C.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM] IS NOT NULL 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 1 

                THEN 1 ELSE 0 

            END AS [FLAG_CANCELLED],

            -- FLAG_FALL_MTM (Canada Student Logic)

            -- Logic: Checks for Fall term, Student property, CA country, and MTM type

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1

                     AND C.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE] <> 'NOTICE'

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND C.[PROPERTY_ADDRESS_COUNTRY] = 'CA'

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_OCC_TYPE_STUDENT], 0) = 1 -- Assuming this maps to Student Only prop flag

                THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0)

                ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_MTM],

            -- FLAG_FALL_NEW

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_NEW], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) 

                ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW],

            -- FLAG_FALL_TOTAL

            CASE 

                WHEN ISNULL(C.[FLAG_FALL], 0) = 1 

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_CANCELLED], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_COMPLETE], 0) = 1

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TYPE_MTM], 0) = 1 -- Note: ATL logic check required here, assuming Total excludes MTM based on pattern

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_HOLDOVER], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], 0) = 0

                     AND ISNULL(C.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], 0) = 0

                THEN ISNULL(C.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], 0) 

                ELSE 0

            END AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],

            -- Standard Flags (Passthrough with Null Protection)

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER'

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM' THEN 'MONTH TO MONTH'

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT'

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN] = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER IN'

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED'

                ELSE 'OTHER'

            END AS [INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP],

            -- Logic: INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID (The Massive Decode - IDs)

            CASE 

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 91

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 92

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW] > 0 THEN 21

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] > 0 THEN 31

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER' THEN 50

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 0 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'MTM' THEN 41

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'NEW' THEN 22

                WHEN [FLAG_INCOMPLETE] = 1 AND [FLAG_CANCELLED] = 0 AND [Interval_Type_CONFORMED] = 'RENEWAL' THEN 32

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] < 229 THEN 10

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] IN (267, 272) THEN 11

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT] = 1 THEN 52

                WHEN [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID] >= 229 AND [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN] = 1 THEN 51

                WHEN [FLAG_CANCELLED] > 0 THEN 90

                ELSE 999

name: CORPORATE_CONTRACTS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_USER_DATA, WH_ODS.dbo.ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_LISTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.CORPORATE_CONTRACTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- SECTION 1: TARGET TABLE DDL
-- Per Architecture Rule 0.1: Target tables already exist. DDL is omitted.

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CORPORATE_CONTRACTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Process Type 1: Truncate/Load)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CORPORATE_CONTRACTS_0];

        -- 2. CTEs to replicate ATL Dataflow Logic
        
        -- CTE: Q100 (Join and Filter Source Data)
        WITH [Q100] AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[TP_ID],
                U.[TP_LISTID],
                U.[TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                U.[TP_CREATED],
                U.[TP_MODIFIED],
                U.[NVARCHAR1],
                U.[NVARCHAR2],
                U.[NVARCHAR3],
                U.[NVARCHAR7],
                U.[NVARCHAR10],
                U.[NVARCHAR11],
                U.[NVARCHAR12],
                U.[NVARCHAR13],
                U.[NVARCHAR14],
                U.[NVARCHAR15],
                U.[NVARCHAR16],
                U.[BIT1], 
                U.[BIT2], 
                U.[BIT3], 
                U.[DATETIME1], 
                U.[DATETIME2], 
                U.[FLOAT1], 
                U.[TP_ROWORDINAL],
                U.[TP_LEVEL],
                U.[TP_ISCURRENTVERSION],
                U.[TP_CALCULATEDVERSION]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_USER_DATA] U
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_LISTS] L 
                ON U.[TP_LISTID] = L.[TP_ID]
            WHERE U.[TP_ISCURRENT] = 1
        ),

        -- CTE: Case_Corporate_Contracts (Filter for specific List ID)
        [Case_Corporate_Contracts] AS (
            SELECT *
            FROM [Q100]
            WHERE [TP_LISTID] = 'F76F3675-54B0-484D-9DC0-B772AE23EBC0'
        ),

        -- CTE: Q_Corporate_Contracts (Map Columns & Calculate Intermediate Dates)
        [Q_Corporate_Contracts] AS (
            SELECT 
                [TP_LISTID],
                [TP_TITLE] = [NVARCHAR7],
                [TP_CREATED],
                [TP_MODIFIED],
                [TP_ID],
                [TP_ROWORDINAL],
                [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                [TP_LEVEL],
                [TP_ISCURRENTVERSION],
                [TP_CALCULATEDVERSION],
                
                -- Mappings
                [Inactive_Flag] = [BIT3],
                [Expired_Flag] = [BIT2],
                
                -- Calculated Dates
                [Date_KEY] = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112) AS INT),
                [Date_ID]  = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()),
                
                [Required_Days_Notice_To_Cancel] = CAST([FLOAT1] AS INT),
                
                [Start_Date]     = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [DATETIME1], 112) AS INT),
                [Start_DateID]   = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [DATETIME1]),
                [Start_DateTime] = [DATETIME1],
                
                [End_Date]       = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [DATETIME2], 112) AS INT),
                [End_DateID]     = DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', [DATETIME2]),
                [End_DateTime]   = [DATETIME2],
                
                -- String Mappings
                [Creator_Login1]                 = [NVARCHAR1],
                [Creator_Login2]                 = [NVARCHAR2],
                [Suffix]                         = [NVARCHAR3],
                [Title]                          = [NVARCHAR7],
                [Vendor]                         = [NVARCHAR10],
                [Legal_Entity]                   = [NVARCHAR11],
                [Agreement_Type]                 = [NVARCHAR12],
                [Department]                     = [NVARCHAR13],
                [Signed_By]                      = [NVARCHAR14],
                [Auto_Renewal_Period]            = [NVARCHAR15],
                [Termination_Notice_Requirement] = [NVARCHAR16]
            FROM [Case_Corporate_Contracts]
        ),

        -- CTE: Q_Corporate_Contracts2 (Final Transformations, Filters, and Uppercase Aliasing)
        [Q_Corporate_Contracts2] AS (
            SELECT 
                [TP_LISTID],
                [TP_TITLE],
                [TP_CREATED] AS [DATETIME_CREATED],
                [TP_MODIFIED] AS [DATETIME_MODIFIED],
                [TP_ID],
                [TP_ROWORDINAL],
                [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                [TP_LEVEL],
                [TP_ISCURRENTVERSION],
                [TP_CALCULATEDVERSION],
                [Agreement_Type] AS [AGREEMENT_TYPE],
                [Auto_Renewal_Period] AS [AUTO_RENEWAL_PERIOD],
                [Creator_Login1] AS [CREATOR_LOGIN1],
                [Creator_Login2] AS [CREATOR_LOGIN2],
                [Date_ID] AS [DATE_ID],
                [Date_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                
                -- Logic: if Expired_Flag=0, End_DateID - Date_ID, else 9999
                CASE 
                    WHEN [Expired_Flag] = 0 THEN [End_DateID] - [Date_ID]
                    ELSE 9999
                END AS [DAYS_REMAINING],
                
                [Department] AS [DEPARTMENT],
                ISNULL([End_Date], 0) AS [DATE_END],
                ISNULL([End_DateID], 0) AS [DATEID_END],
                [End_DateTime] AS [DATETIME_END],
                [Expired_Flag] AS [FLAG_EXPIRED],
                [Inactive_Flag] AS [FLAG_INACTIVE],
                [Legal_Entity] AS [LEGAL_ENTITY],
                [Required_Days_Notice_To_Cancel] AS [REQUIRED_DAYS_NOTICE_TO_CANCEL],
                [Signed_By] AS [SIGNED_BY],
                ISNULL([Start_Date], 0) AS [DATE_START],
                ISNULL([Start_DateID], 0) AS [DATEID_START],
                [Start_DateTime] AS [DATETIME_START],
                [Suffix] AS [SUFFIX],
                [Termination_Notice_Requirement] AS [TERMINATION_NOTICE_REQUIREMENT],
                [Title] AS [TITLE],
                [Vendor] AS [VENDOR]
            FROM [Q_Corporate_Contracts]
            WHERE [Department] <> 'Department'
              AND ISNULL([TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID], '') = ''
        )

        -- 3. Final Insert
        -- Target Table Columns Assumed UPPERCASE per instruction
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CORPORATE_CONTRACTS_0] (
            [TP_LISTID],
            [TP_TITLE],
            [DATETIME_CREATED],
            [DATETIME_MODIFIED],
            [TP_ID],
            [TP_ROWORDINAL],
            [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
            [TP_LEVEL],
            [TP_ISCURRENTVERSION],
            [TP_CALCULATEDVERSION],
            [AGREEMENT_TYPE],
            [AUTO_RENEWAL_PERIOD],
            [CREATOR_LOGIN1],
            [CREATOR_LOGIN2],
            [DATE_ID],
            [DATE_KEY],
            [DAYS_REMAINING],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATEID_END],
            [DATETIME_END],
            [FLAG_EXPIRED],
            [FLAG_INACTIVE],
            [LEGAL_ENTITY],
            [REQUIRED_DAYS_NOTICE_TO_CANCEL],
            [SIGNED_BY],
            [DATE_START],
            [DATEID_START],
            [DATETIME_START],
            [SUFFIX],
            [TERMINATION_NOTICE_REQUIREMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [VENDOR]
        )
        SELECT 
            [TP_LISTID],
            [TP_TITLE],
            [DATETIME_CREATED],
            [DATETIME_MODIFIED],
            [TP_ID],
            [TP_ROWORDINAL],
            [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
            [TP_LEVEL],
            [TP_ISCURRENTVERSION],
            [TP_CALCULATEDVERSION],
            [AGREEMENT_TYPE],
            [AUTO_RENEWAL_PERIOD],
            [CREATOR_LOGIN1],
            [CREATOR_LOGIN2],
            [DATE_ID],
            [DATE_KEY],
            [DAYS_REMAINING],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATEID_END],
            [DATETIME_END],
            [FLAG_EXPIRED],
            [FLAG_INACTIVE],
            [LEGAL_ENTITY],
            [REQUIRED_DAYS_NOTICE_TO_CANCEL],
            [SIGNED_BY],
            [DATE_START],
            [DATEID_START],
            [DATETIME_START],
            [SUFFIX],
            [TERMINATION_NOTICE_REQUIREMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [VENDOR]
        FROM [Q_Corporate_Contracts2];
END;

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;
