name: CURRENT_OCCUPANCY_BY_FLOORPLAN_EXPORT_LOAD_SP
transformations: UNIT_TYPE: CASE WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '1/1' THEN '1/1.' WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '2/2' THEN '2/2.' WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '3/3' THEN '3/3.' WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '4/4' THEN '4/4.' WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '5/5' THEN '5/5.' ELSE fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.Current_Occupancy_by_Floorplan_EXPORT.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CURRENT_OCCUPANCY_BY_FLOORPLAN_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Transaction Start
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0 BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Current_Occupancy_by_Floorplan_EXPORT];

        -- 2. Define Transformations
        ;WITH CTE_Occupancy AS (
            SELECT 
                fact.[DATE_KEY],
                prop.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                prop.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS [LEVEL],
                
                -- Decode Logic for Unit Type
                CASE 
                    WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '1/1' THEN '1/1.'
                    WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '2/2' THEN '2/2.'
                    WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '3/3' THEN '3/3.'
                    WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '4/4' THEN '4/4.'
                    WHEN fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = '5/5' THEN '5/5.'
                    ELSE fact.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
                END AS [UNIT_TYPE],
                
                fact.[FLAG_OCCUPIED] AS [OCCUPIED_BEDS],
                fact.[BEDS] AS [TOTAL_BEDS]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F] fact
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] prop 
                ON fact.[PROPERTY_KEY] = prop.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE 
                prop.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Current_Occupancy_by_Floorplan_EXPORT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [LEVEL],
            [UNIT_TYPE],
            [OCCUPIED_BEDS],
            [TOTAL_BEDS],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [LEVEL],
            [UNIT_TYPE],
            [OCCUPIED_BEDS],
            [TOTAL_BEDS],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Occupancy;

        -- Commit Transaction
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Rollback if error
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: CURRENT_WEEK_0_SP
transformations: RELATIVE_ACTIVITY_WEEK: CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, SYSDATETIME()) = 1 THEN [RELATIVE_WEEK] ELSE [RELATIVE_WEEK] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.CURRENT_WEEK_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0];

        -- 2. SOURCE TRANSFORMATION LOGIC
        WITH [Activity_Week_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                -- ATL Logic: decode(day_in_week(sysdate()) = 1, RELATIVE_WEEK, RELATIVE_WEEK)
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, SYSDATETIME()) = 1 THEN [RELATIVE_WEEK]
                    ELSE [RELATIVE_WEEK]
                END AS [RELATIVE_ACTIVITY_WEEK],
                
                -- ATL Logic: day_in_week(sysdate())
                DATEPART(WEEKDAY, SYSDATETIME()) AS [DAY_IN_WEEK_CALC],
                
                [RELATIVE_WEEK]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        )
        -- 3. INSERT INTO TARGET
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CURRENT_WEEK_0] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [RELATIVE_ACTIVITY_WEEK],
            [DAY_IN_WEEK_CALC]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [RELATIVE_ACTIVITY_WEEK],
            [DAY_IN_WEEK_CALC]
        FROM [Activity_Week_CTE]
        WHERE [RELATIVE_WEEK] = 0; -- Filter for Current Week only

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: CUSTOMERS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.CUSTOMER_GENDER_0, WH_ODS.dbo.E_CUSTOMERS into WH_STAGING.dbo.CUSTOMERS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CUSTOMERS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMERS_0];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMERS_0] (
        [CUSTOMER_KEY],[ADDRESS_1],[ADDRESS_2],[ADDRESS_3],[ADDRESS_CITY],
        [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],[ADDRESS_STATE],[ADDRESS_ZIP],[COMPANY],[CUSTOMER_ID],
        [DATE_BIRTH],[DATE_CREATED],[DATE_UPDATED],[EMAIL],[FLAG_ADDRESS_VERIFIED],
        [GENDER],[NAME],[NAME_FIRST],[NAME_LAST],[NAME_MIDDLE],
        [PHONE_1],[PHONE_2],[PHONE_MOBILE],[PHONE_WORK],[RETURNED_PAYMENTS]
    )
    SELECT
        CAST(e.ID AS INT),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE1)), '--'), 200) AS VARCHAR(200)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE2)), ''), 200) AS VARCHAR(200)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_STREET_LINE3)), ''), 200) AS VARCHAR(200)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_CITY)), '--'), 100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_COUNTRY_CODE)), '--'), 4) AS VARCHAR(4)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_STATE_CODE)), '--'), 10) AS VARCHAR(10)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PRIMARY_POSTAL_CODE)), '--'), 40) AS VARCHAR(40)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.COMPANY_NAME)), '--'), 200) AS VARCHAR(200)),
        CAST(e.ID AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL(e.BIRTH_DATE, 0) AS INT),
        CAST(e.CREATED_ON_DATE AS INT),
        CAST(e.UPDATED_ON_DATE AS INT),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.EMAIL_ADDRESS))), '--'), 255) AS VARCHAR(255)),
        CAST(ISNULL(e.PRIMARY_IS_VERIFIED, 0) AS INT),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL((
            SELECT TOP 1 MAX(SURVEY_ANSWER_CONFORMED)
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMER_GENDER_0] g
            WHERE g.CUSTOMER_ID = e.ID
            GROUP BY g.CUSTOMER_ID
        ), '--'), 5) AS VARCHAR(5)),
        CAST(LEFT(CASE
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_FIRST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_LAST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_MIDDLE)) IS NOT NULL
            THEN LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_FIRST)) + ' ' + SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_MIDDLE)),1,1) + '. ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_LAST))
            WHEN LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_FIRST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_LAST)) IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_MIDDLE)) IS NULL
            THEN LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_FIRST)) + ' ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_LAST))
            ELSE '--'
        END, 100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_FIRST)), '--'), 200) AS VARCHAR(200)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_LAST)), '--'), 100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.NAME_MIDDLE)), ''), 100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.PHONE_NUMBER)), '--'), 60) AS VARCHAR(60)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.SECONDARY_NUMBER)), '--'), 100) AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.MOBILE_NUMBER)), '--'), 60) AS VARCHAR(60)),
        CAST(LEFT(ISNULL(LTRIM(RTRIM(e.WORK_NUMBER)), '--'), 60) AS VARCHAR(60)),
        CAST(ISNULL(e.RETURNED_PAYMENTS_COUNT, 0) AS INT)
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMERS] e;

    UPDATE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMERS_0]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: CUSTOMER_GENDER_0_SP
transformations: SURVEY_ANSWER_CONFORMED: CASE gp.SURVEY_ANSWER WHEN 'FEMALE' THEN 'F' WHEN 'MALE' THEN 'M' WHEN 'NONBINARY' THEN 'X' WHEN 'X' THEN 'X' WHEN 'PREFER NOT TO ANSWER' THEN 'PNR' WHEN 'OTHER' THEN 'X' ELSE '--' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.SURVEY_RESPONSES_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.CUSTOMER_GENDER_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_Load_CUSTOMER_GENDER_0]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ============================================================
    -- CUSTOMER_GENDER_0
    -- Migrated from SAP Data Services ATL: Customer_Gender_0
    -- Load type: Full Reload (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
    -- Source:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0]
    -- Target:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMER_GENDER_0]
    -- ============================================================

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[CUSTOMER_GENDER_0];

    WITH

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GradPool: filter to GENDER survey questions only.
    -- Despite the name (copy from graduation dataflow), this filters
    -- and processes gender survey responses.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    GradPool AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            SURVEY_ID,
            SURVEY_ANSWER,
            SURVEY_ANSWER_ID,
            SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
            SURVEY_QUESTION,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
            SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
        FROM [dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0]
        WHERE SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED = 'GENDER'
          AND SURVEY_QUESTION           = 'GENDER'
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- MaxGradEntry: most recent survey entry per LEASE_ID.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY LEASE_ID, MAX(LEASE_INTERVAL_ID), MAX(SURVEY_ID)
    -- The join back to GradPool on LEASE_ID + LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
    -- selects only the row(s) matching the max interval per lease.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    MaxGradEntry AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            MAX(LEASE_INTERVAL_ID) AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            MAX(SURVEY_ID)         AS SURVEY_ID
        FROM GradPool
        GROUP BY LEASE_ID
    )

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Graduations (final): INNER JOIN GradPool + MaxGradEntry on
    -- LEASE_ID + LEASE_INTERVAL_ID.
    -- Adds:
    --   GRADUATION_ESTIMATE: Survey_ANSWER cast to int.
    --     Gender answers ('FEMALE','MALE' etc.) are non-numeric so
    --     TRY_CAST returns NULL for all — faithful to ATL varchar->int.
    --   SURVEY_ANSWER_CONFORMED: standardised gender code.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[CUSTOMER_GENDER_0] (
        LEASE_ID,
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        GRADUATION_ESTIMATE,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        SURVEY_ID,
        SURVEY_ANSWER,
        SURVEY_ANSWER_CONFORMED,
        SURVEY_ANSWER_ID,
        SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    )
    SELECT
        gp.LEASE_ID,
        gp.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        gp.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        gp.CUSTOMER_ID,
        gp.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        TRY_CAST(gp.SURVEY_ANSWER AS INT)       AS GRADUATION_ESTIMATE,
        gp.PROPERTY_ID,
        gp.PROPERTY_NAME,
        gp.SURVEY_ID,
        gp.SURVEY_ANSWER,
        CASE gp.SURVEY_ANSWER
            WHEN 'FEMALE'               THEN 'F'
            WHEN 'MALE'                 THEN 'M'
            WHEN 'NONBINARY'            THEN 'X'
            WHEN 'X'                    THEN 'X'
            WHEN 'PREFER NOT TO ANSWER' THEN 'PNR'
            WHEN 'OTHER'                THEN 'X'
            ELSE '--'
        END                                     AS SURVEY_ANSWER_CONFORMED,
        gp.SURVEY_ANSWER_ID,
        gp.SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
        gp.SURVEY_QUESTION,
        gp.SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        gp.SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
        gp.SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
        gp.SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        gp.SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        gp.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    FROM GradPool gp
    INNER JOIN MaxGradEntry mge
        ON  gp.LEASE_ID          = mge.LEASE_ID
        AND gp.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = mge.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID;

    UPDATE [dbo].[CUSTOMER_GENDER_0]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.SURVEY_RESPONSES_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ============================================================
    -- CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0
    -- Migrated from SAP Data Services ATL: Customer_School_0
    -- Load type: Full Reload (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
    -- Source:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0]
    -- Target:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0]
    -- ============================================================

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0];

    WITH

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- AllRecords: filter to SCHOOL survey questions, excluding YEAR.
    -- ATL: SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED LIKE '%SCHOOL%'
    --      AND NOT SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED LIKE '%YEAR%'
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    AllRecords AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            SURVEY_ID,
            SURVEY_ANSWER,
            SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
            SURVEY_QUESTION,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
            SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
            SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
        FROM [dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0]
        WHERE SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED LIKE '%SCHOOL%'
          AND SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED NOT LIKE '%YEAR%'
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- MaxEntry: most recent survey per LEASE_ID + LEASE_INTERVAL_ID.
    -- Note: groups by both LEASE_ID and LEASE_INTERVAL_ID (unlike
    -- GRADUATION/GENDER which grouped by LEASE_ID only).
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    MaxEntry AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            MAX(SURVEY_ID) AS SURVEY_ID
        FROM AllRecords
        GROUP BY LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
    )

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- SCHOOLS (final): INNER JOIN AllRecords + MaxEntry on
    -- LEASE_ID + LEASE_INTERVAL_ID + SURVEY_ID.
    -- Pure pass-through — no computed columns.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0] (
        LEASE_ID,
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        SURVEY_ID,
        SURVEY_ANSWER,
        SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    )
    SELECT
        ar.LEASE_ID,
        ar.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        ar.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        ar.CUSTOMER_ID,
        ar.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        ar.PROPERTY_ID,
        ar.PROPERTY_NAME,
        ar.SURVEY_ID,
        ar.SURVEY_ANSWER,
        ar.SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
        ar.SURVEY_QUESTION,
        ar.SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        ar.SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
        ar.SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
        ar.SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        ar.SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        ar.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    FROM AllRecords ar
    INNER JOIN MaxEntry me
        ON  ar.LEASE_ID          = me.LEASE_ID
        AND ar.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = me.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        AND ar.SURVEY_ID         = me.SURVEY_ID;

    UPDATE [dbo].[CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

-- ==================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ==================================================
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[DATES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        -- Manual Transaction handling
        DECLARE @TranStarted BIT = 0;
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0
        BEGIN
            BEGIN TRANSACTION;
            SET @TranStarted = 1;
        END

        -- The ATL "All_Dates" View is a straight pass-through (1:1 mapping) from DATE_F.
        -- We read from Staging DATE_F and Insert into Prod DATES.
        
        -- FIXED: Semicolon added before WITH to satisfy parser requirements
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES];

        ;WITH [CTE_All_Dates] AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY_AY],
                [AY_WEEK_KEY],
                [AY],

                [AY_END_DATE],

                [FLAG_WEEKDAY],
                [FLAG_WEEKEND],
                [FLAG_WORKDAY],
                [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
                [HOLIDAY],
                [MONTH],
                [MONTH_3],

                [QUARTER],

                [RELATED_DAY],

                [RELATED_QUARTER],
                [RELATED_WEEK],

                [RELATIVE_QUARTER],
