                [WEEK_ID],
                [WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                [YEAR],
                [YEAR_ID],
                [YYYYMM]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY_WEEK_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], 
            [AY_KEY], [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], 
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK], 
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR], 
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR], 
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], 
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], 
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY], 
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], 
            [FLAG_YESTERDAY], [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], 
            [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], 
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH], [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], 
            [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR], [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], 
            [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH], [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR], 
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY_WEEK_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], 
            [AY_KEY], [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], 
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK], 
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR], 
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR], 
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], 
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], 
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY], 
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], 
            [FLAG_YESTERDAY], [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], 
            [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], 
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH], [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], 
            [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR], [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], 
            [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH], [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR], 
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_All_Dates];

        -- Commit Transaction
        IF @TranStarted = 1 COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @TranStarted = 1 AND @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: DATE_0_SP
transformations: Relative_Week_Base: CASE WHEN [DAY_NBR_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN [WEEK_ID_REVERSE] - 1 ELSE [WEEK_ID_REVERSE] END
WEEK_ID: CASE WHEN [DAY_NBR_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN [WEEK_ID] - 1 ELSE [WEEK_ID] END
Flag_EOW: CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Holiday: CASE WHEN H.[DATEKEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_This_Month: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_MONTH] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_This_Quarter: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_QUARTER] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_This_Year: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_YEAR] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Previous_Month: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_MONTH] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Previous_Quarter: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_QUARTER] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Previous_Year: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_YEAR] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Today: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Tomorrow: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_WeekDay: CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Weekend: CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (6,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Workday: CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4,5) AND H.[DATEKEY] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Yesterday: CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Relative_WEEK: CASE WHEN @IsSunday = 1 THEN B.[Relative_Week_Base] + 1 ELSE B.[Relative_Week_Base] END
Relative_WEEK_CALC: CASE WHEN @IsMonday = 1 THEN B.[Relative_Week_Base] ELSE B.[Relative_Week_Base] END

WEEK_OF_YEAR: CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK]=7 THEN B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR]-1 ELSE B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR] END) = 0 THEN 53 ELSE (CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK]=7 THEN B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR]-1 ELSE B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR] END) END
Flag_AY_Current_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_AY_Current_AY_Week: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_AY_Prelease_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_AY_Prelease_AY_Week: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_AY_Previous_AY: CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_AY_Previous_AY_Week: CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = -1) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Date_with_Today: CASE WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 'Yesterday' WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 'Today' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), C.[DATE_TIME], 110) END

Date_with_Today_and_Week: CASE WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 'Yesterday' WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 'Today' ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), C.[DATE_TIME], 110) + ', wk ' + CAST(C2.[AY_WEEK] AS VARCHAR) END
Flag_52: CASE WHEN (C.[Flag_EOW] = 1 AND C.[Relative_DAY] < 0) OR (C.[Relative_WEEK] = 0 AND C.[Relative_DAY] < 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_This_Week: CASE WHEN C.[Relative_WEEK] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Previous_Week: CASE WHEN C.[Relative_WEEK] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

AY_WEEK_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4) THEN 1 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (5,6,7,8) THEN 2 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (9,10,11,12) THEN 3 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (13,14,15,16) THEN 4 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (17,18,19,20) THEN 5 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (21,22,23,24) THEN 6 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (25,26,27,28) THEN 7 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (29,30,31,32) THEN 8 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (33,34,35,36) THEN 9 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (37,38,39,40) THEN 10 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (41,42,43,44) THEN 11 WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (45,46,47,48) THEN 12 WHEN [AY_WEEK] >= 49 THEN 13 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_VIEW, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_HOLIDAYS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[DATE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Setup Variables for System Date logic
        DECLARE @CurrentDateTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
        DECLARE @YesterdayDate DATETIME2(3) = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @CurrentDateTime);
        DECLARE @YesterdayInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), @YesterdayDate, 112) AS INT);
        
        -- Determine if today is Sunday (Logic dependent on System Date)
        -- Normalizing to US Standard where 1=Sunday, 7=Saturday.
        DECLARE @DayOfWeekToday INT = (DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @CurrentDateTime) + @@DATEFIRST - 1) % 7 + 1;
        DECLARE @IsSunday BIT = CASE WHEN @DayOfWeekToday = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;
        DECLARE @IsMonday BIT = CASE WHEN @DayOfWeekToday = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END;

        -- 2. Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0];

        -- 3. CTE Logic
        WITH CTE_Base AS (
            -- Source: DATE_VIEW, Filter: >= 20130101
            -- CORRECTED: Using UPPERCASE source columns to match ATL definition
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] AS [DATE],
                [DATE_ID],
                TRY_CAST([DATE_SQL] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DATE_TIME],
                [DAY_NAME_FULL] AS [DAY],
                [DAY_NAME_SHORT] AS [DAY_3],
                [DAY_NBR_OF_MONTH] AS [DAY_OF_MONTH],
                [DAY_NBR_OF_WEEK] AS [DAY_OF_WEEK],
                [DAY_NBR_OF_YEAR] AS [DAY_OF_YEAR],
                [DAYS_IN_MONTH],
                [DAYS_IN_YEAR],
                [DAYS_LEFT_IN_MONTH] AS [DAYS_LEFT_MONTH],
                [DAYS_LEFT_IN_YEAR] AS [DAYS_LEFT_YEAR],
                [EOM_FLAG],
                [MONTH_ID],
                [MONTH_NAME_FULL] AS [MONTH],
                [MONTH_NAME_SHORT] AS [MONTH_3],
                [MONTH_NBR_OF_QUARTER] AS [MONTH_OF_QUARTER],
                [MONTH_NBR_OF_YEAR] AS [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
                [QUARTER_ID],
                [QUARTER_NAME_SHORT] AS [QUARTER],
                [QUARTER_NAMEYEAR] AS [QUARTER_YEAR],
                [QUARTER_NBR_OF_YEAR] AS [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
                [DATE_ID_REVERSE] AS [Relative_DAY],
                [MONTH_ID_REVERSE] AS [Relative_MONTH],
                [QUARTER_ID_REVERSE] AS [Relative_QUARTER],
                -- Logic: if day=7 (Sunday in Source), use week_reverse-1
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DAY_NBR_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN [WEEK_ID_REVERSE] - 1
                    ELSE [WEEK_ID_REVERSE]
                END AS [Relative_Week_Base],
                [WEEK_ID_REVERSE] + 1 AS [Relative_WEEK_orig], 
                [YEAR_ID_REVERSE] AS [Relative_YEAR],
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DAY_NBR_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN [WEEK_ID] - 1
                    ELSE [WEEK_ID]
                END AS [WEEK_ID],
                [WEEK_NBR_OF_YEAR] AS [WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                [YEAR],
                [YEAR_ID],
                [YYYYMM]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_VIEW]
            WHERE [DATE_KEY] >= 20130101
        ),
        CTE_Holidays AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATEKEY],
                [HOLIDAY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_HOLIDAYS_0]
        ),
        CTE_Combo AS (
            -- Joins Base and Holidays, Calculates Flags
            SELECT 
                B.[DATE_KEY],
                B.[DATE],
                B.[DATE_ID],
                B.[DATE_TIME],
                B.[DAY],
                B.[DAY_3],
                B.[DAY_OF_MONTH],
                B.[DAY_OF_WEEK],
                B.[DAY_OF_YEAR],
                B.[DAYS_IN_MONTH],
                B.[DAYS_IN_YEAR],
                B.[DAYS_LEFT_MONTH] AS [DAYS_Remaining_MONTH],
                B.[DAYS_LEFT_YEAR] AS [DAYS_Remaining_YEAR],
                B.[EOM_FLAG] AS [Flag_EOM],
                CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_EOW],
                CASE WHEN H.[DATEKEY] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Holiday],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_MONTH] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_This_Month],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_QUARTER] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_This_Quarter],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_YEAR] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_This_Year],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_MONTH] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Previous_Month],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_QUARTER] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Previous_Quarter],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_YEAR] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Previous_Year],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Today],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Tomorrow],
                CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_WeekDay],
                CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (6,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Weekend],
                CASE 
                    WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4,5) AND H.[DATEKEY] IS NULL THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [Flag_Workday],
                CASE WHEN B.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Yesterday],
                ISNULL(H.[HOLIDAY], '--') AS [Holiday],
                B.[MONTH],
                B.[MONTH_3],
                B.[MONTH_ID],
                B.[MONTH_OF_QUARTER],
                B.[MONTH_OF_YEAR],
                B.[QUARTER],
                B.[QUARTER_YEAR],
                B.[QUARTER_ID],
                B.[QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
                B.[Relative_DAY],
                B.[Relative_MONTH],
                B.[Relative_QUARTER],
                B.[Relative_Week_Base],
                B.[Relative_WEEK_orig],
                CASE 
                    WHEN @IsSunday = 1 THEN B.[Relative_Week_Base] + 1
                    ELSE B.[Relative_Week_Base]
                END AS [Relative_WEEK],
                CASE 
                    WHEN @IsMonday = 1 THEN B.[Relative_Week_Base]
                    ELSE B.[Relative_Week_Base]
                END AS [Relative_WEEK_CALC],
                B.[Relative_YEAR],
                B.[WEEK_ID],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK]=7 THEN B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR]-1 ELSE B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR] END) = 0 THEN 53
                    ELSE (CASE WHEN B.[DAY_OF_WEEK]=7 THEN B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR]-1 ELSE B.[WEEK_OF_YEAR] END)
                END AS [WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                B.[YEAR],
                B.[YEAR_ID],
                B.[YYYYMM]
            FROM CTE_Base B
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Holidays H ON B.[DATE_KEY] = H.[DATEKEY]
        ),
        CTE_CurrentWeek AS (
            SELECT [AY_WEEK]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_0]
            WHERE [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE] <= @YesterdayInt 
              AND [AY_WEEK_END_DATE] >= @YesterdayInt
        ),
        CTE_Weeks AS (
            SELECT 
                W.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
                W.[AY],
                W.[AY_WEEK],
                W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                CW.[AY_WEEK] AS [AY_WEEK_CURRENT],
                W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_0] W
            CROSS JOIN CTE_CurrentWeek CW
        ),
        CTE_Combo2 AS (
            SELECT 
                W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
                W.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
                W.[AY],
                A.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                A.[AY_END_DATE],
                A.[AY_KEY],
                W.[AY_WEEK],
                W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Current_AY],
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Current_AY_Week],
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Prelease_AY],
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = 0) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Prelease_AY_Week],
                CASE WHEN A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Previous_AY],
                CASE WHEN (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT] = -1) AND A.[RELATIVE_AY] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_AY_Previous_AY_Week],
                A.[RELATIVE_AY] AS [RELATIVE_AY],
                (W.[AY_WEEK] - W.[AY_WEEK_CURRENT]) AS [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK]
            FROM CTE_Weeks W
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0] A ON A.[AY_KEY] = W.[AY]
        ),
        CTE_DateCombo AS (
            SELECT 
                C.[DATE_KEY],
                C2.[AY],
                C2.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                C2.[AY_END_DATE],
                C2.[AY_KEY],
                C2.[AY_WEEK],
                C2.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                C2.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
                C2.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
                C.[DATE],
                CASE 
                    WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 'Yesterday'
                    WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 'Today'
                    ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), C.[DATE_TIME], 110)
                END AS [Date_with_Today],
                CASE 
                    WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = -1 THEN 'Yesterday'
                    WHEN C.[Relative_DAY] = 0 THEN 'Today'
                    ELSE CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), C.[DATE_TIME], 110) + ', wk ' + CAST(C2.[AY_WEEK] AS VARCHAR)
                END AS [Date_with_Today_and_Week],
                CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), C.[DATE_TIME], 110) + ', wk ' + CAST(C2.[AY_WEEK] AS VARCHAR) AS [Date_with_Week],
                C.[DATE_ID],
                C.[DATE_TIME],
                C.[DAY],
                C.[DAY_3],
                C.[DAY_OF_MONTH],
                C.[DAY_OF_WEEK],
                C.[DAY_OF_YEAR],
                C.[DAYS_IN_MONTH],
                C.[DAYS_IN_YEAR],
                C.[DAYS_Remaining_MONTH],
                C.[DAYS_Remaining_YEAR],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (C.[Flag_EOW] = 1 AND C.[Relative_DAY] < 0) OR (C.[Relative_WEEK] = 0 AND C.[Relative_DAY] < 0) THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [Flag_52],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Current_AY],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Current_AY_Week],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Prelease_AY],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Prelease_AY_Week],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Previous_AY],
                C2.[Flag_AY_Previous_AY_Week],
                C.[Flag_EOM],
                C.[Flag_EOW],
                C.[Flag_Holiday],
                C.[Flag_This_Month],
                C.[Flag_This_Quarter],
                CASE WHEN C.[Relative_WEEK] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_This_Week],
                C.[Flag_This_Year],
                C.[Flag_Previous_Month],
                C.[Flag_Previous_Quarter],
                CASE WHEN C.[Relative_WEEK] = -1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Previous_Week],
                C.[Flag_Previous_Year],
                C.[Flag_Today],
                C.[Flag_Tomorrow],
                C.[Flag_WeekDay],
                C.[Flag_Weekend],
                C.[Flag_Workday],
                C.[Flag_Yesterday],
                C.[Holiday],
                C.[MONTH],
                C.[MONTH_3],
                C.[MONTH_ID],
                C.[MONTH_OF_QUARTER],
                C.[MONTH_OF_YEAR],
                C.[QUARTER],
                C.[QUARTER_YEAR],
                C.[QUARTER_ID],
                C.[QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
                C2.[RELATIVE_AY],
                C2.[RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
                C.[Relative_DAY],
                C.[Relative_MONTH],
                C.[Relative_QUARTER],
                C.[Relative_Week_Base],
                C.[Relative_WEEK_orig],
                C.[Relative_WEEK],
                C.[Relative_WEEK_CALC],
                C.[Relative_YEAR],
                C.[WEEK_ID],
                C.[WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                C.[YEAR],
                C.[YEAR_ID],
                C.[YYYYMM]
            FROM CTE_Combo C
            INNER JOIN CTE_Combo2 C2 
                ON C2.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE] <= C.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND C2.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE] >= C.[DATE_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY], [AY_WEEK], 
            [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], [AY_WEEK_KEY], 
            [DATE], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK], 
            [DATE_ID], [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], 
            [DAY_OF_YEAR], [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], 
            [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR], [FLAG_52], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], 
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], 
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR], [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], 
            [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY], [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], 
            [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], 
            [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], [RELATIVE_AY], 
            [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH], [RELATIVE_QUARTER], 
            [RELATIVE_WEEK_BASE], [RELATIVE_WEEK_ORIG], [RELATIVE_WEEK], 
            [RELATIVE_WEEK_CALC], [RELATIVE_YEAR], [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], 
            [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY], [AY_WEEK], 
            [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], 
            CASE 
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (1,2,3,4) THEN 1
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (5,6,7,8) THEN 2
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (9,10,11,12) THEN 3
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (13,14,15,16) THEN 4
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (17,18,19,20) THEN 5
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (21,22,23,24) THEN 6
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (25,26,27,28) THEN 7
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (29,30,31,32) THEN 8
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (33,34,35,36) THEN 9
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (37,38,39,40) THEN 10
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (41,42,43,44) THEN 11
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] IN (45,46,47,48) THEN 12
                WHEN [AY_WEEK] >= 49 THEN 13
                ELSE 0
            END AS [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL],
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], 
            [DATE], [Date_with_Today], [Date_with_Today_and_Week], [Date_with_Week], 
            [DATE_ID], [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], 
            [DAY_OF_YEAR], [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_Remaining_MONTH], 
            [DAYS_Remaining_YEAR], [Flag_52], [Flag_AY_Current_AY], [Flag_AY_Current_AY_Week], 
            [Flag_AY_Prelease_AY], [Flag_AY_Prelease_AY_Week], [Flag_AY_Previous_AY], 
            [Flag_AY_Previous_AY_Week], [Flag_EOM], [Flag_EOW], [Flag_Holiday], 
            [Flag_This_Month], [Flag_This_Quarter], [Flag_This_Week], [Flag_This_Year], 
            [Flag_Previous_Month], [Flag_Previous_Quarter], [Flag_Previous_Week], 
            [Flag_Previous_Year], [Flag_Today], [Flag_Tomorrow], [Flag_WeekDay], 
            [Flag_Weekend], [Flag_Workday], [Flag_Yesterday], [Holiday], [MONTH], 
            [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], 
            [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], [RELATIVE_AY], 
            [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [Relative_DAY], [Relative_MONTH], [Relative_QUARTER], 
            [Relative_Week_Base], [Relative_WEEK_orig], [Relative_WEEK], 
            [Relative_WEEK_CALC], [Relative_YEAR], [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], 
            [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_DateCombo;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: DATE_F_SP
transformations: FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY: CASE WHEN @YesterdayDow = 1 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 2 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 3 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 4 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 5 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 6 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN @YesterdayDow = 7 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.RELATED_DATES_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F.
sql:
-- ==================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ==================================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[DATE_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        -- Manual Transaction handling
        DECLARE @TranStarted BIT = 0;
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0
        BEGIN
            BEGIN TRANSACTION;
            SET @TranStarted = 1;
        END
        -- 0. Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F];
        -- 1. Calculate Date Logic Variables (replacing sysdate)
        DECLARE @CurrentDate DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
        DECLARE @Yesterday DATETIME2(3) = DATEADD(DAY, -1, @CurrentDate);
        
        -- Determine "Day of Week" for Yesterday (1=Sun, 2=Mon ... 7=Sat)
        -- Note: Fabric DATEPART(dw) defaults usually align with US (Sun=1). 
        -- We use this variable to match the specific decode logic in the source.
        DECLARE @YesterdayDow INT = DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @Yesterday);

        WITH [CTE_JoinedData] AS (
            SELECT
                D.[DATE_KEY],
                D.[AY],
                D.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                D.[AY_END_DATE],
                D.[AY_KEY],
                D.[AY_WEEK],
                D.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
                D.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
                D.[AY_WEEK_INTERVAL],
                D.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
                D.[DATE],
                D.[DATE_ID],
                D.[DATE_WITH_TODAY],
                D.[DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK],
                D.[DATE_WITH_WEEK],
                D.[DATE_TIME],
                D.[DAY],
                D.[DAY_3],
                D.[DAY_OF_MONTH],
                D.[DAY_OF_WEEK],
                D.[DAY_OF_YEAR],
                D.[DAYS_IN_MONTH],
                D.[DAYS_IN_YEAR],
                D.[DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH],
                D.[DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
                D.[FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY],
                D.[FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK],
                D.[FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
                D.[FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK],
                D.[FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY],
                D.[FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
                D.[FLAG_EOM],
                D.[FLAG_EOW],
                D.[FLAG_HOLIDAY],
                D.[FLAG_THIS_MONTH],
                D.[FLAG_THIS_QUARTER],
                D.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK],
                D.[FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
                D.[FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH],
                D.[FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER],
                D.[FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK],
                D.[FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
                D.[FLAG_TODAY],
                D.[FLAG_TOMORROW],
                D.[FLAG_WEEKDAY],
                D.[FLAG_WEEKEND],
                D.[FLAG_WORKDAY],
                D.[FLAG_YESTERDAY],
                D.[HOLIDAY],
                D.[MONTH],
                D.[MONTH_3],
                D.[MONTH_ID],
                D.[MONTH_OF_QUARTER],
                D.[MONTH_OF_YEAR],
                D.[QUARTER],
                D.[QUARTER_YEAR] AS [QUARTER_YEAR],
                D.[QUARTER_ID],
                D.[QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
                D.[RELATIVE_AY],
                D.[RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
                D.[RELATIVE_DAY],
                D.[RELATIVE_MONTH],
                D.[RELATIVE_QUARTER],
                D.[RELATIVE_WEEK],
                D.[RELATIVE_YEAR],
                D.[WEEK_ID],
                D.[WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                D.[YEAR],
                D.[YEAR_ID],
                D.[YYYYMM],
                -- Fields from RELATED_DATES_0
                R.[DATE_KEY_AY] AS [R_DATE_KEY_AY],
                R.[RELATED_AY],
                R.[RELATED_AY_WEEK],
                R.[RELATED_DAY],
                R.[RELATED_MONTH],
                R.[RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                R.[RELATED_QUARTER],
                R.[RELATED_WEEK],
                R.[RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_0] D
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[RELATED_DATES_0] R 
                ON D.[DATE_KEY] = R.[DATE_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[DATE_F] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY], 
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], 
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], 
            [DATE_WITH_WEEK], [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], 
            [DAY_OF_YEAR], [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], 
            [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], 
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], 
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY], [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], 
            [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY], [HOLIDAY], 
            [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], 
            [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], [RELATED_AY], 
            [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH], [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], 
            [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR], [RELATIVE_AY], 
            [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH], [RELATIVE_QUARTER], 
            [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR], [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], 
            [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            -- Logic: nvl( RELATED_DATES_0.DATE_KEY_AY, DATE_0.DATE_KEY || '.' || DATE_0.AY)
            -- Note: Target is DECIMAL(19,4), so we concatenate string then cast to decimal
            ISNULL([R_DATE_KEY_AY], TRY_CAST(CONCAT([DATE_KEY], '.', [AY]) AS DECIMAL(19,4))),
            [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY], 
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_INTERVAL], 
            [AY_WEEK_KEY], [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], 
            [DATE_WITH_WEEK], [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], 
            [DAY_OF_YEAR], [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], 
            [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], 
            [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], 
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], 
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR], 
            -- Complex Logic for FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY
            CASE 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 1 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 2 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 3 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 4 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 5 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 6 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                WHEN @YesterdayDow = 7 AND [DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7 AND [FLAG_THIS_WEEK] = 1 THEN 1 
                ELSE 0
            END AS [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], 
            [FLAG_YESTERDAY], [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], 
            [MONTH_OF_YEAR], [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR], 
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH], 
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR], 
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH], 
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR], [WEEK_ID], 
            [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_JoinedData];

        -- Commit Transaction only if we started it
        IF @TranStarted = 1 COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @TranStarted = 1 AND @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: DELINQUENCY_0_SP
transformations: UNPAID_RENT: CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0 AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END

UNPAID_OTHER: CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0 AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN (2, 7) AND (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID IN (3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9) OR (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID <> 2 AND AR.AR_ORIGIN_ID IN (2, 6)) OR AR.AR_TRIGGER_ID = 401) THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END

UNPAID_TOTAL: CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0 AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN (2, 7) AND (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID IN (3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9) OR (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID <> 2 AND AR.AR_ORIGIN_ID IN (2, 6)) OR AR.AR_TRIGGER_ID = 401) THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.DELINQUENCY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[DELINQUENCY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DELINQUENCY_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[DELINQUENCY_0]
    (
        [LEASE_ID], [LEDGER_NAME], [POST_DATE], [POST_PERIOD],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [UNPAID_RENT], [UNPAID_OTHER], [UNPAID_TOTAL]
    )
    SELECT
        L.ID AS LEASE_ID,
        LF.NAME AS LEDGER_NAME,
        AR.POST_DATE,
        CAST(LEFT(CAST(AR.POST_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)), 6) AS INT) AS POST_PERIOD,
        P.PROPERTY_KEY,
        L.PROPERTY_ID,
        P.PROPERTY_NAME,
        CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0 AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 2
             THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END AS UNPAID_RENT,
        CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0
                  AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN (2, 7)
                  AND (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID IN (3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9)
                       OR (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID <> 2 AND AR.AR_ORIGIN_ID IN (2, 6))
                       OR AR.AR_TRIGGER_ID = 401)
             THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END AS UNPAID_OTHER,
        CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0 AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 2
             THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END
        + CASE WHEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0
                    AND AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID NOT IN (2, 7)
                    AND (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID IN (3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 9)
                         OR (AR.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID <> 2 AND AR.AR_ORIGIN_ID IN (2, 6))
                         OR AR.AR_TRIGGER_ID = 401)
               THEN AR.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE ELSE 0 END AS UNPAID_TOTAL
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] L
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] AR ON L.ID = AR.LEASE_ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] AC ON AR.AR_CODE_ID = AC.ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEDGER_FILTERS] LF ON LF.ID = AC.LEDGER_FILTER_ID
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P ON L.PROPERTY_ID = P.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AR_CODE_GROUPS_0] AG ON AR.AR_CODE_ID = AG.AR_CODE_ID
    WHERE L.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID NOT IN (5)
      AND L.FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE IS NULL
      AND AR.IS_DELETED = 0
      AND AR.IS_TEMPORARY <> 1
      AND P.FLAG_REPORTABLE = 1;
END

name: DEPOSITS_CHARGED_COMBO_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED: CASE WHEN SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED: CASE WHEN SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE]) = 0.00 AND SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Deposits_0 (DEPOSITS_CHARGED_COMBO_0_ATL.txt)
--
-- Two Truncate/Load targets:
--
--   DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0  (via Combo path):
--     E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES (DELETED_ON IS NULL, DISTINCT on ID)
--     INNER JOIN E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES ON SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID
--     INNER JOIN E_AR_CODE_TYPES ON AR_CODE_TYPE_ID WHERE NAME = 'DEPOSIT'
--     Output: ID, LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE, DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
--             SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE, CHARGE_START_DATE, CHARGE_END_DATE, DELETED_ON,
--             PROPERTY_ID, STARTS_WITH_LEASE
--
--   DEPOSITS_0  (via Combo1 â†’ Logic path):
--     E_AR_TRANSACTIONS (AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 7)
--     INNER JOIN E_AR_CODE_TYPES (ID = 7)
--     GROUP BY LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, NAME
--       SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT)       â†’ DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT
--       SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE)   â†’ DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT
--       SUM(INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE)       â†’ INITIAL_AMOUNT
--       MAX(POST_DATE)                â†’ DATE_POSTED
--     Logic view applies decode() flags:
--       FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED   = CASE WHEN SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
--       FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED = CASE WHEN SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE) = 0
--                                      AND SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
--
-- Sources: WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES, E_AR_CODE_TYPES,
--          E_AR_TRANSACTIONS
-- Targets: WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_0
--
-- Note: E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES in WH_ODS contains duplicate IDs not present in prod.
--       SC CTE deduplicates by ID (latest DW_LASTMODIFIED) before joining.
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_CHARGED_COMBO_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- =====================================================================
    -- DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0
    -- Source: E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES (deduped by ID) INNER JOIN E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES
    --         INNER JOIN E_AR_CODE_TYPES WHERE NAME = 'DEPOSIT'
    -- =====================================================================
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0];

    ;WITH SC AS (
        SELECT
            [ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
            [CHARGE_AMOUNT], [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID],
            [CHARGE_START_DATE], [CHARGE_END_DATE], [DELETED_ON],
            [PROPERTY_ID], [STARTS_WITH_LEASE],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [ID] ORDER BY [DW_LASTMODIFIED] DESC) AS rn
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
        WHERE [DELETED_ON] IS NULL
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0] (
        [ID],
        [LEASE_ID],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [AR_CODE_TYPE],
        [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
        [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE],
        [CHARGE_START_DATE],
        [CHARGE_END_DATE],
        [DELETED_ON],
        [PROPERTY_ID],
        [STARTS_WITH_LEASE]
    )
    SELECT
        sc.[ID],
        sc.[LEASE_ID],
        sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        act.[NAME]                  AS [AR_CODE_TYPE],
        sc.[CHARGE_AMOUNT]          AS [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
        sct.[NAME]                  AS [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE],
        sc.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
        sc.[CHARGE_END_DATE],
        sc.[DELETED_ON],
        sc.[PROPERTY_ID],
        sc.[STARTS_WITH_LEASE]
    FROM SC sc
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES] sct
        ON sct.[ID] = sc.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] act
        ON act.[ID] = sc.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID]
    WHERE sc.rn = 1
      AND act.[NAME] = 'DEPOSIT';

    -- =====================================================================
    -- DEPOSITS_0
    -- Source: E_AR_TRANSACTIONS (AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 7)
    --         INNER JOIN E_AR_CODE_TYPES (ID = 7)
    --         Grouped by LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, NAME
    -- =====================================================================
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[DEPOSITS_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [AR_CODE_TYPE],
        [DATE_POSTED],
        [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
        [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
        [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
        [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
        [INITIAL_AMOUNT],
        [LEASE_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        t.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        act.[NAME]                                                              AS [AR_CODE_TYPE],
        MAX(t.[POST_DATE])                                                      AS [DATE_POSTED],
        SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT])                                             AS [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
        SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE])                                         AS [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
        CASE WHEN SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
        CASE WHEN SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE]) = 0.00
              AND SUM(t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END         AS [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
        SUM(t.[INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE])                                             AS [INITIAL_AMOUNT],
        t.[LEASE_ID]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] t
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] act
        ON act.[ID] = t.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID]
    WHERE t.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 7
      AND act.[ID] = 7
    GROUP BY
        t.[LEASE_ID],
        t.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        t.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
        act.[NAME];

END

name: DEPOSITS_LOAD_SP
transformations: FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED: CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED: CASE WHEN TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE = 0.00 AND TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_CODE_TYPES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DEPOSITS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Pre-Flight Check: Verify Source Table Exists to prevent confusing "Invalid object" errors
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]', 'U') IS NULL
    BEGIN
        PRINT 'CRITICAL ERROR: Table [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] not found.';
        PRINT 'Please verify the table exists in [WH_ODS] and check capitalization.';
        RETURN;
    END

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Tables
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[DEPOSITS_0];

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- BLOCK 1: LOAD DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0
        -- Logic: Join Scheduled Charges to Charge Types and AR Code Types.
        -- Filter: AR Code NAME = 'DEPOSIT' AND SC.DELETED_ON IS NULL.
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_ARCodes AS (
            SELECT ID, NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]
            WHERE NAME = 'DEPOSIT'
        ),
        CTE_SCTypes AS (
            SELECT ID, NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES]
        ),
        CTE_SC AS (
            SELECT *
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
            WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[DEPOSITS_CHARGED_0] (
            [ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE],
            [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
            [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE],
            [CHARGE_START_DATE],
            [CHARGE_END_DATE],
            [DELETED_ON],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [STARTS_WITH_LEASE],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            SC.ID,
            SC.LEASE_ID,
            SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CAST(AR.NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS AR_CODE_TYPE,
            SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT AS DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            CAST(SCT.NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE,
            SC.CHARGE_START_DATE,
            SC.CHARGE_END_DATE,
            SC.DELETED_ON,
            SC.PROPERTY_ID,
            CAST(SC.STARTS_WITH_LEASE AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_SC SC
        INNER JOIN CTE_SCTypes SCT 
            ON SCT.ID = SC.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID
        INNER JOIN CTE_ARCodes AR 
            ON AR.ID = SC.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- BLOCK 2: LOAD DEPOSITS_0
        -- Logic: Filter Transactions for AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 7.
        --        Join to AR Code Types (ID=7).
        --        Aggregate amounts.
        --        Calculate Flags (Charged vs Collected) based on aggregated sums.
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_Transactions_Agg AS (
            SELECT 
                T.LEASE_ID,
                T.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                ACT.NAME AS AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
                SUM(T.INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
                SUM(T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) AS TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,         -- Mapped to DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT
                SUM(T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE) AS TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE, -- Mapped to DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT
                MAX(T.POST_DATE) AS POST_DATE
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] T
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] ACT 
                ON ACT.ID = T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID
            WHERE T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID = 7 -- Explicit ATL Filter
              AND ACT.ID = 7            -- Explicit ATL Filter
            GROUP BY 
                T.LEASE_ID, 
                T.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, 
                T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, 
                ACT.NAME
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[DEPOSITS_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE],
            [DATE_POSTED],
            [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
            [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
            [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
            [INITIAL_AMOUNT],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CAST(AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            POST_DATE,
            TRANSACTION_AMOUNT AS DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE AS DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            -- Logic: decode(Charged > 0, 1, 0)
            CASE 
                WHEN TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0.00 THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END AS FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED,
            -- Logic: decode(Uncollected = 0 AND Charged > 0, 1, 0)
            CASE 
                WHEN TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE = 0.00 AND TRANSACTION_AMOUNT > 0.00 THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END AS FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED,
            INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            LEASE_ID,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Transactions_Agg;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Fabric-Compatible Rollback (No XACT_STATE)
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: DF_AG_FABRICMIGRATION_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.property_details into WH_ODS.dbo.E_PROPERTY_DETAILS (cross-database).
sql:
-- 2. CREATE THE STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[DF_AG_FABRICMIGRATION_SP]
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @DateTime_Start DATETIME2(3) = NULL
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Using MERGE for ATL's auto_correct_using_merge=yes based on the 'id' KEY column
    MERGE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS] AS Target
    USING (
        SELECT 
            id,
            cid,
            property_id,
            property_website_id,
            corporate_website_id,
            route_id,
            managerial_property_id,
            job_cash_flow_frequency_id,
            ap_payee_id,
            customer_id,
            CAST(community_website_uri AS VARCHAR(500)) AS community_website_uri,
            CAST(corporate_website_uri AS VARCHAR(500)) AS corporate_website_uri,
            show_appointment_results,
            show_lead_outreach_results,
            show_renewal_outreach_results,
            show_collections_results,
            CAST(parking_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS parking_policy,
            CAST(pet_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS pet_policy,
            CAST(smoking_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS smoking_policy,
            CAST(renter_insurance_policy AS VARCHAR(500)) AS renter_insurance_policy,
            CAST(school_description AS VARCHAR(500)) AS school_description,
            allows_smoking,
            is_featured,
            update_vacancy_amenities,
            
            -- New Date Calculations translated from ATL
            ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS charges_last_posted_on_date,
            ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS charges_last_posted_on_dateid,
            charges_last_posted_on AS charges_last_posted_on_datetime,
            
            ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS late_fee_last_posted_on_date,
            ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid,
            late_fee_last_posted_on AS late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime,
            
            updated_by,
            ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), updated_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS updated_on_date,
            ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', updated_on), 0) AS updated_on_dateid,
            updated_on AS updated_on_datetime,
            
            created_by,
            ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), created_on, 112) AS INT), 0) AS created_on_date,
            ISNULL(DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', created_on), 0) AS created_on_dateid,
            created_on AS created_on_datetime
            
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[property_details]
        WHERE (@CID IS NULL OR cid = @CID) 
          AND (@DateTime_Start IS NULL OR updated_on > @DateTime_Start)
    ) AS Source
    ON (Target.id = Source.id)

    WHEN MATCHED THEN 
        UPDATE SET 
            cid = Source.cid,
            property_id = Source.property_id,
            property_website_id = Source.property_website_id,
            corporate_website_id = Source.corporate_website_id,
            route_id = Source.route_id,
            managerial_property_id = Source.managerial_property_id,
            job_cash_flow_frequency_id = Source.job_cash_flow_frequency_id,
            ap_payee_id = Source.ap_payee_id,
            customer_id = Source.customer_id,
            community_website_uri = Source.community_website_uri,
            corporate_website_uri = Source.corporate_website_uri,
            show_appointment_results = Source.show_appointment_results,
            show_lead_outreach_results = Source.show_lead_outreach_results,
            show_renewal_outreach_results = Source.show_renewal_outreach_results,
            show_collections_results = Source.show_collections_results,
            parking_policy = Source.parking_policy,
            pet_policy = Source.pet_policy,
            smoking_policy = Source.smoking_policy,
            renter_insurance_policy = Source.renter_insurance_policy,
            school_description = Source.school_description,
            allows_smoking = Source.allows_smoking,
            is_featured = Source.is_featured,
            update_vacancy_amenities = Source.update_vacancy_amenities,
            charges_last_posted_on_date = Source.charges_last_posted_on_date,
            charges_last_posted_on_dateid = Source.charges_last_posted_on_dateid,
            charges_last_posted_on_datetime = Source.charges_last_posted_on_datetime,
            late_fee_last_posted_on_date = Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_date,
            late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid = Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid,
            late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime = Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime,
            updated_by = Source.updated_by,
            updated_on_date = Source.updated_on_date,
            updated_on_dateid = Source.updated_on_dateid,
            updated_on_datetime = Source.updated_on_datetime,
            created_by = Source.created_by,
            created_on_date = Source.created_on_date,
            created_on_dateid = Source.created_on_dateid,
            created_on_datetime = Source.created_on_datetime,
            LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()

    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN 
        INSERT (
            id, cid, property_id, property_website_id, corporate_website_id, route_id, 
            managerial_property_id, job_cash_flow_frequency_id, ap_payee_id, customer_id, 
            community_website_uri, corporate_website_uri, show_appointment_results, 
            show_lead_outreach_results, show_renewal_outreach_results, show_collections_results, 
            parking_policy, pet_policy, smoking_policy, renter_insurance_policy, school_description, 
            allows_smoking, is_featured, update_vacancy_amenities,
            charges_last_posted_on_date, charges_last_posted_on_dateid, charges_last_posted_on_datetime,
            late_fee_last_posted_on_date, late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid, late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime,
            updated_by, updated_on_date, updated_on_dateid, updated_on_datetime,
            created_by, created_on_date, created_on_dateid, created_on_datetime,
            LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        VALUES (
            Source.id, Source.cid, Source.property_id, Source.property_website_id, Source.corporate_website_id, Source.route_id, 
            Source.managerial_property_id, Source.job_cash_flow_frequency_id, Source.ap_payee_id, Source.customer_id, 
            Source.community_website_uri, Source.corporate_website_uri, Source.show_appointment_results, 
            Source.show_lead_outreach_results, Source.show_renewal_outreach_results, Source.show_collections_results, 
            Source.parking_policy, Source.pet_policy, Source.smoking_policy, Source.renter_insurance_policy, Source.school_description, 
            Source.allows_smoking, Source.is_featured, Source.update_vacancy_amenities,
            Source.charges_last_posted_on_date, Source.charges_last_posted_on_dateid, Source.charges_last_posted_on_datetime,
            Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_date, Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_dateid, Source.late_fee_last_posted_on_datetime,
            Source.updated_by, Source.updated_on_date, Source.updated_on_dateid, Source.updated_on_datetime,
            Source.created_by, Source.created_on_date, Source.created_on_dateid, Source.created_on_datetime,
            SYSDATETIME()
        );

    -- Catch-all for unmodified rows to ensure LAST_RUN_DT is populated
    UPDATE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: DF_ENTRATA_DAILY_ODS_TU_FULL_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from unknown source into WH_ODS.dbo.E_TIME_ZONES (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[DF_ENTRATA_DAILY_ODS_TU_FULL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Full reload
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_TIME_ZONES];

    INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_TIME_ZONES] (
        [ID],
        [NAME],
        [TIME_ZONE_NAME],
        [ABBR],
        [GMT_OFFSET],
        [IS_DAYLIGHT_SAVINGS],
        [IS_PUBLISHED],
        [ORDER_NUM]
    )
    SELECT
        id,
        UPPER(name),
        UPPER(time_zone_name),
        UPPER(abbr),
        gmt_offset,
        is_daylight_savings,
        is_published,
        order_num
    FROM [LH_Bronze_Entrata].[report].[E_TIME_ZONES];

    -- Audit
    UPDATE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_TIME_ZONES]
    SET [LAST_RUN_DT] = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE [LAST_RUN_DT] IS NULL;

END;

name: ELISEAI_AGG_INCREMENTAL_SP
transformations: Timeframe: CASE WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning' WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon' ELSE 'After Hours' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0 into WH_PROD2.dbo.ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD, WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_AGG_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- (Procedure and Execution section remains same as before)
-- ...
-- SECTION 3: STORED PROCEDURE (ONE-ITEM-PER-LINE)
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_INCREMENTAL_SP]
AS
BEGIN-- 1. PREPARE TEMP BASE DATA
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Base_Query') IS NOT NULL 
            DROP TABLE #Base_Query;

        SELECT 
            D.DATE_KEY,
            E.YYYYMM_EVENT,
            D.AY,
            D.YEAR,
            D.DAY_3,
            E.PROPERTY_KEY,
            E.CHANNEL_1 AS CHANNEL_CONFORMED,
            E.EVENT_TYPES AS EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED,
            CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) AS Hour_of_day,
            CASE 
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                ELSE 'After Hours'
            END AS Timeframe,
            SUM(E.COUNT) AS COUNT,
            SUM(E.FLAG_AFTER_HOURS) AS FLAG_AFTER_HOURS,
            SUM(E.FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP) AS FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP,
            SUM(E.FLAG_AI_REPLIED) AS FLAG_AI_REPLIED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_AI_SENT) AS FLAG_AI_SENT,
            SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_RED) AS FLAG_HANDOFF_RED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW) AS FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW,
            SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD) AS FLAG_LEAD,
            SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED) AS FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_SENT) AS FLAG_LEAD_SENT,
            SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED) AS FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED) AS FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME) AS FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME,
            SUM(E.FLAG_STATE) AS FLAG_STATE,
            SUM(E.FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY) AS FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY,
            SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED) AS FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED) AS FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED,
            SUM(E.FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED) AS FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED,
            SUM(E.MINUTES_SAVED) AS MINUTES_SAVED,
            SUM(E.RESPONSE_SECONDS) AS RESPONSE_SECONDS
        INTO #Base_Query
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0] AS E
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D 
            ON E.DATE_KEY = D.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P 
            ON E.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY
        WHERE P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
          AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR >= -1 
          AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR <= 0
          AND D.RELATIVE_AY IN (0, 1)
        GROUP BY 
            D.DATE_KEY, E.YYYYMM_EVENT, D.AY, D.YEAR, D.DAY_3, 
            E.PROPERTY_KEY, E.CHANNEL_1, E.EVENT_TYPES, E.DATETIME_EVENT;

        -- 2. RE-POPULATE AGG_BY_PERIOD
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD];
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD]
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY,
            YYYYMM_EVENT,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            AY,
            DAY_3,
            Timeframe,
            CHANNEL_CONFORMED,
            EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED,
            SUM(COUNT),
            SUM(FLAG_AFTER_HOURS),
            SUM(FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP),
            SUM(FLAG_AI_REPLIED),
            SUM(FLAG_AI_SENT),
            SUM(FLAG_HANDOFF_RED),
            SUM(FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW),
            SUM(FLAG_LEAD),
            SUM(FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED),
            SUM(FLAG_LEAD_SENT),
            SUM(FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED),
            SUM(FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED),
            SUM(FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME),
            SUM(FLAG_STATE),
            SUM(FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY),
            SUM(FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED),
            SUM(FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED),
            SUM(FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED),
            SUM(MINUTES_SAVED),
            SUM(RESPONSE_SECONDS),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM #Base_Query
        GROUP BY 
            DATE_KEY, YYYYMM_EVENT, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, DAY_3, 
            Timeframe, CHANNEL_CONFORMED, EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED;

        -- 3. RE-POPULATE AGG_0 (Rolling)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_0];
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_0]
        SELECT 
            D_CART.DATE_KEY,
            B.PROPERTY_KEY,
            B.AY,
            B.DAY_3,
            B.Timeframe,
            B.CHANNEL_CONFORMED,
            B.EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED,
            SUM(B.COUNT),
            SUM(B.FLAG_AFTER_HOURS),
            SUM(B.FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP),
            SUM(B.FLAG_AI_REPLIED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_AI_SENT),
            SUM(B.FLAG_HANDOFF_RED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW),
            SUM(B.FLAG_LEAD),
            SUM(B.FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_LEAD_SENT),
            SUM(B.FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME),
            SUM(B.FLAG_STATE),
            SUM(B.FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY),
            SUM(B.FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED),
            SUM(B.FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED),
            SUM(B.MINUTES_SAVED),
            SUM(B.RESPONSE_SECONDS),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM #Base_Query AS B
        CROSS JOIN (
            SELECT DATE_KEY FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = 0
        ) AS D_CART
        WHERE B.DATE_KEY <= D_CART.DATE_KEY
        GROUP BY 
            D_CART.DATE_KEY, B.PROPERTY_KEY, B.AY, B.DAY_3, 
            B.Timeframe, B.CHANNEL_CONFORMED, B.EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED;

        -- 4. RE-POPULATE TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG];
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG]
        SELECT 
            AY,
            DAY_3,
            CASE 
                WHEN Hour_of_day BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 1 
                WHEN Hour_of_day BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 2 
                ELSE 0 
            END,
            SUM(COUNT),
            Hour_of_day,
            Timeframe,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM #Base_Query
        WHERE EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED = 'Tours Attended'
        GROUP BY 
            AY, DAY_3, Hour_of_day, Timeframe;END

name: ELISEAI_AGG_INCREMENTAL_V2_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0 into WH_PROD2.dbo.ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD, WH_PROD2.dbo.ELISEAI_TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_INCREMENTAL_V2_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- 1. TRUNCATE + INSERT AGG_BY_PERIOD (no temp table, direct CTE)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD];

    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_BY_PERIOD] (
        [DATE_KEY], [YYYYMM_EVENT], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [DAY_3],
        [TIMEFRAME], [CHANNEL_CONFORMED], [EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED],
        [COUNT], [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS], [FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP], [FLAG_AI_REPLIED],
        [FLAG_AI_SENT], [FLAG_HANDOFF_RED], [FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW],
        [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED], [FLAG_LEAD_SENT],
        [FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED], [FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED], [FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME],
        [FLAG_STATE], [FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY], [FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED],
        [FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED], [FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED],
        [MINUTES_SAVED], [RESPONSE_SECONDS]
    )
    SELECT
        D.DATE_KEY, E.YYYYMM_EVENT, E.PROPERTY_KEY, D.AY, D.DAY_3,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
            ELSE 'After Hours'
        END,
        E.CHANNEL_1, E.EVENT_TYPES,
        SUM(E.COUNT), SUM(E.FLAG_AFTER_HOURS), SUM(E.FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP),
        SUM(E.FLAG_AI_REPLIED), SUM(E.FLAG_AI_SENT), SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_RED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW), SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD), SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_SENT), SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED), SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME), SUM(E.FLAG_STATE), SUM(E.FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY),
        SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED), SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED), SUM(E.FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED),
        SUM(E.MINUTES_SAVED), SUM(E.RESPONSE_SECONDS)
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0] AS E
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D ON E.DATE_KEY = D.DATE_KEY
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P ON E.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY
    WHERE P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR >= -1 AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR <= 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_AY IN (0, 1)
    GROUP BY D.DATE_KEY, E.YYYYMM_EVENT, D.AY, D.DAY_3, E.PROPERTY_KEY,
             E.CHANNEL_1, E.EVENT_TYPES,
             CASE
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                ELSE 'After Hours'
             END;

    -- 2. TRUNCATE + INSERT TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG];

    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_TOURS_ATTENDED_AGG] (
        [AY], [DAY_3], [FLAG_TIME_BUCKET], [TOUR_COUNT],
        [HOUR_OF_DAY], [VISIT_TIMEFRAME], [LAST_UPDATED]
    )
    SELECT
        D.AY, D.DAY_3,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 1
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 2
            ELSE 0
        END,
        SUM(E.COUNT),
        CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT),
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
            ELSE 'After Hours'
        END,
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0] AS E
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D ON E.DATE_KEY = D.DATE_KEY
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P ON E.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY
    WHERE P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR >= -1 AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR <= 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_AY IN (0, 1)
      AND E.EVENT_TYPES = 'Tours Attended'
    GROUP BY D.AY, D.DAY_3, CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT),
             CASE
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                ELSE 'After Hours'
             END,
             CASE
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 1
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 2
                ELSE 0
             END;

    -- 3. TRUNCATE + INSERT ELISEAI_AGG_0 (staging, rolling snapshot)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_0];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_0]
    SELECT
        D_CART.DATE_KEY, E.PROPERTY_KEY, D.AY, D.DAY_3,
        CASE
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
            WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
            ELSE 'After Hours'
        END,
        E.CHANNEL_1, E.EVENT_TYPES,
        SUM(E.COUNT), SUM(E.FLAG_AFTER_HOURS), SUM(E.FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP),
        SUM(E.FLAG_AI_REPLIED), SUM(E.FLAG_AI_SENT), SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_RED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW), SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD), SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_LEAD_SENT), SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED), SUM(E.FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED),
        SUM(E.FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME), SUM(E.FLAG_STATE), SUM(E.FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY),
        SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED), SUM(E.FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED), SUM(E.FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED),
        SUM(E.MINUTES_SAVED), SUM(E.RESPONSE_SECONDS),
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0] AS E
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] AS D ON E.DATE_KEY = D.DATE_KEY
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] AS P ON E.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT DATE_KEY FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0] WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = 0) AS D_CART
    WHERE P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR >= -1 AND D.RELATIVE_YEAR <= 0
      AND D.RELATIVE_AY IN (0, 1)
      AND E.DATE_KEY <= D_CART.DATE_KEY
    GROUP BY D_CART.DATE_KEY, E.PROPERTY_KEY, D.AY, D.DAY_3,
             E.CHANNEL_1, E.EVENT_TYPES,
             CASE
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 8 AND 12 THEN 'Morning'
                WHEN CAST(FORMAT(E.DATETIME_EVENT, 'HH') AS INT) BETWEEN 13 AND 18 THEN 'Afternoon'
                ELSE 'After Hours'
             END;
END

        [FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED], [MINUTES_SAVED], [RESPONSE_SECONDS], [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY],

        [COUNT], [FLAG_AFTER_HOURS], [FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP], [FLAG_AI_REPLIED], [FLAG_AI_SENT],
        [FLAG_HANDOFF_RED], [FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW], [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED],

        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_AGG_0];
END
