description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ELISEAI_SNOWFLAKE_EVENTS, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0_GLOBALFILTER_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Load Strategy: Full Truncate
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0];

        WITH LeadEvents AS (
            SELECT 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS ID,
                CAST(EVENT_ID AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID,
                CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), EVENT_DATETIME_MOD, 112) AS DATE_KEY,
                CAST(UPPER(CHANNEL) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS CHANNEL,
                CAST(CONVERSATION_ID AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS CONVERSATION_ID,
                1 AS [COUNT],
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'SKY GARDEN' THEN 'SKY GARDEN APARTMENTS'
                    WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'COTTAGES OF COLLEGE STATION' THEN 'THE COTTAGES OF COLLEGE STATION'
                    WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'THE U APARTMENTS' THEN 'THE U'
                    ELSE UPPER(BUILDING_NAME)
                END AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME,
                CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), EVENT_DATETIME_MOD, 112) AS DATE_EVENT,
                CAST(EVENT_DATETIME_MOD AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATETIME_EVENT,
                CAST(EVENT_ID AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS EVENT_ID,
                CAST(UPPER(EVENT_TYPE) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS EVENT_TYPE,
                CAST(GLOBAL_SESSION_ID AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS GLOBAL_SESSION_ID,
                CAST(GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING,
                CAST(GUEST_CARD_ID AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS GUEST_CARD_ID,
                CAST(LOWER(LEAD_EMAIL) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS LEAD_EMAIL,
                CAST(UPPER(LEAD_FIRST_NAME) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS LEAD_FIRST_NAME,
                CAST(UPPER(LEAD_LAST_NAME) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS LEAD_LAST_NAME,
                CAST(LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER,
                CAST(UPPER(MARKETING_SOURCE) AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS MARKETING_SOURCE
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ELISEAI_SNOWFLAKE_EVENTS]
            WHERE EVENT_ID NOT LIKE '%made%'
        ),

        Props AS (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, CAST(PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
        ),

        Conform AS (
            SELECT 
                L.*,
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'EMAIL' THEN 'Email'
                    WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'IVR' THEN 'IVR'
                    WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'SMS' THEN 'SMS'
                    WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'VOICE_AI' THEN 'Voice AI'
                    WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'WEBCHAT' THEN 'Webchat'
                    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
                END AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS CHANNEL_CONFORMED,
                CAST(CASE 
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_FOLLOW_UP' THEN 'Follow Up'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_REPLIED' THEN 'Messages'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_SENT' THEN 'Messages'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'HANDOFF_RED' THEN 'Red Handoff'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'HANDOFF_YELLOW' THEN 'Yellow Handoff'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEAD_REPLIED' THEN 'Lead Replied'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEAD_SENT' THEN 'Lead Sent'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEASE_APPLIED' THEN 'Leases Applied'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEASE_SIGNED' THEN 'Leases Signed'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'STATE' THEN 'Leads'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TAKEOVER_EARLY' THEN 'Early Takeover'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TOUR_ATTENDED' THEN 'Tours Attended'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TOUR_BOOKED' THEN 'Tours Booked'
                    WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'WAITLIST_ADDED' THEN 'Waitlist'
                    ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
                END AS VARCHAR(8000)) AS EVENT_TYPE_CONFORMED,
                CASE WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, L.DATETIME_EVENT) >= 18 OR DATEPART(HOUR, L.DATETIME_EVENT) < 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_AFTER_HOURS,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_SENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_AI_SENT,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_FOLLOW_UP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_REPLIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_AI_REPLIED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'HANDOFF_RED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_HANDOFF_RED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'HANDOFF_YELLOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'STATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEASE_APPLIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEASE_SIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEAD_REPLIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'LEAD_SENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_SENT,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'STATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATE,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TAKEOVER_EARLY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TOUR_ATTENDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'TOUR_BOOKED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED,
                CASE WHEN L.EVENT_TYPE = 'WAITLIST_ADDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED,
                CASE WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'VOICE AI' THEN 5 WHEN L.CHANNEL = 'SMS' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS MINUTES_SAVED,
                P.PROPERTY_KEY,
                P.PROPERTY_NAME,
                SUBSTRING(L.DATE_EVENT, 1, 6) AS YYYYMM_EVENT
            FROM LeadEvents L
            LEFT OUTER JOIN Props P ON L.ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME = P.PROPERTY_NAME
        ),

        GlobalSessions AS (
            SELECT 
                GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, CONVERSATION_ID, MIN(DATETIME_EVENT) AS DATETIME_START
            FROM Conform
            WHERE GLOBAL_SESSION_ID IS NOT NULL AND EVENT_TYPE = 'STATE'
            GROUP BY GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, CONVERSATION_ID
        ),

        CoreRecordset AS (
            SELECT C.*, G.DATETIME_START
            FROM Conform C
            INNER JOIN GlobalSessions G ON C.CONVERSATION_ID = G.CONVERSATION_ID
        ),

        MinReply AS (
            SELECT 
                MIN(ID) AS ID, CONVERSATION_ID,
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATETIME_START < MIN(DATETIME_EVENT) 
                    AND DATEDIFF(SECOND, DATETIME_START, MIN(DATETIME_EVENT)) <= 600 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME,
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATETIME_START < MIN(DATETIME_EVENT) THEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, DATETIME_START, MIN(DATETIME_EVENT)) 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS Response_Seconds
            FROM CoreRecordset
            WHERE EVENT_TYPE = 'AI_REPLIED'
            GROUP BY CONVERSATION_ID, EVENT_TYPE, GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, DATETIME_START
        )

        -- FINAL LOAD
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0] (
            ID, ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID, DATE_KEY, CONVERSATION_ID, GUEST_CARD_ID, 
            CHANNEL, CHANNEL_1, [COUNT], DATE_EVENT, DATETIME_EVENT, DATETIME_START, 
            ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, EVENT_ID, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_TYPES, 
            FLAG_AFTER_HOURS, FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP, FLAG_AI_REPLIED, FLAG_AI_SENT, 
            FLAG_HANDOFF_RED, FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW, FLAG_LEAD, FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED, 
            FLAG_LEAD_SENT, FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED, FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED, FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME, 
            FLAG_STATE, FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY, FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED, FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED, 
            FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED, GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING, 
            LEAD_EMAIL, LEAD_FIRST_NAME, LEAD_LAST_NAME, LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER, 
            MARKETING_SOURCE, MINUTES_SAVED, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, 
            RESPONSE_SECONDS, YYYYMM_EVENT, LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            CR.ID, LEFT(CR.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID, 8000), CR.DATE_KEY, LEFT(CR.CONVERSATION_ID, 8000), LEFT(CR.GUEST_CARD_ID, 8000), 
            LEFT(CR.CHANNEL, 8000), LEFT(CR.CHANNEL_CONFORMED, 8000), CR.[COUNT], CR.DATE_EVENT, CR.DATETIME_EVENT, CR.DATETIME_START, 
            LEFT(CR.ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, 8000), LEFT(CR.EVENT_ID, 8000), LEFT(CR.EVENT_TYPE, 8000), LEFT(CR.EVENT_TYPE_CONFORMED, 8000), 
            CR.FLAG_AFTER_HOURS, CR.FLAG_AI_FOLLOW_UP, CR.FLAG_AI_REPLIED, CR.FLAG_AI_SENT, 
            CR.FLAG_HANDOFF_RED, CR.FLAG_HANDOFF_YELLOW, CR.FLAG_LEAD, CR.FLAG_LEAD_REPLIED, 
            CR.FLAG_LEAD_SENT, CR.FLAG_LEASE_APPLIED, CR.FLAG_LEASE_SIGNED, 
            ISNULL(MR.FLAG_RESPONSE_TIME, 0), 
            CR.FLAG_STATE, CR.FLAG_TAKEOVER_EARLY, CR.FLAG_TOUR_ATTENDED, CR.FLAG_TOUR_BOOKED, 
            CR.FLAG_WAITLIST_ADDED, LEFT(CR.GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, 8000), LEFT(CR.GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING, 8000), 
            LEFT(CR.LEAD_EMAIL, 8000), LEFT(CR.LEAD_FIRST_NAME, 8000), LEFT(CR.LEAD_LAST_NAME, 8000), LEFT(CR.LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER, 8000), 
            LEFT(CR.MARKETING_SOURCE, 8000), CR.MINUTES_SAVED, CR.PROPERTY_KEY, LEFT(CR.PROPERTY_NAME, 8000), 
            CASE WHEN MR.Response_Seconds > 600 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(MR.Response_Seconds, 0) END, 
            CR.YYYYMM_EVENT, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CoreRecordset CR
        LEFT OUTER JOIN MinReply MR ON CR.ID = MR.ID;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'SUCCESS: [ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0_GLOBALFILTER_SP] completed.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'FATAL ERROR: ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_FACT_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_FACT (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

        -- 1. DELETE matching records using Cleaned IDs
        -- This is the "Nuclear Fix" for the 3 million row bloat.
        DELETE target
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_FACT] target
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_F] src 
            ON UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(target.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID))) = src.ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID
            AND target.DATE_KEY = src.DATE_KEY;

        -- 2. INSERT the new clean batch
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_FACT] (
            ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID, DATE_KEY, CHANNEL, CHANNEL_CONFORMED, CONVERSATION_ID, 
            [COUNT], DATE_EVENT, DATETIME_EVENT, ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, EVENT_ID, 
            EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED, FLAG_AFTER_HOURS, GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, 
            GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING, GUEST_CARD_ID, LEAD_EMAIL, LEAD_FIRST_NAME, 
            LEAD_LAST_NAME, LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER, MARKETING_SOURCE, MINUTES_SAVED, 
            PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, RESPONSE_SECONDS, YYYYMM_EVENT
        )
        SELECT 
            ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID, DATE_KEY, CHANNEL, CHANNEL_CONFORMED, CONVERSATION_ID,

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_F];

    WITH Deduper AS (
        SELECT *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID))), DATE_KEY 
                ORDER BY DATETIME_EVENT DESC
            ) AS RowRank
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_0]
        WHERE ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID IS NOT NULL AND ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID <> ''
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENTS_F] (
        ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID, DATE_KEY, CHANNEL, CHANNEL_CONFORMED, CONVERSATION_ID, 
        [COUNT], DATE_EVENT, DATETIME_EVENT, ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, EVENT_ID, 
        EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_TYPES_CONFORMED, FLAG_AFTER_HOURS, GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, 
        GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING, GUEST_CARD_ID, LEAD_EMAIL, LEAD_FIRST_NAME, 
        LEAD_LAST_NAME, LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER, MARKETING_SOURCE, MINUTES_SAVED, 
        PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, RESPONSE_SECONDS, YYYYMM_EVENT, LAST_RUN_DT
    )
    SELECT 
        LEFT(UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(ELISEAI_LEAD_EVENT_ID))), 100),
        DATE_KEY,
        LEFT(CHANNEL, 50),
        LEFT(CHANNEL_1, 50),
        LEFT(CONVERSATION_ID, 50),
        [COUNT],
        DATE_EVENT,
        DATETIME_EVENT,
        LEFT(ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, 100),
        LEFT(EVENT_ID, 50),
        LEFT(EVENT_TYPE, 50),
        LEFT(EVENT_TYPES, 50),
        FLAG_AFTER_HOURS,
        LEFT(GLOBAL_SESSION_ID, 50),
        LEFT(GLOBAL_SESSION_ID_BUILDING, 50),
        LEFT(GUEST_CARD_ID, 50),
        LEFT(LEAD_EMAIL, 100),
        LEFT(LEAD_FIRST_NAME, 50),
        LEFT(LEAD_LAST_NAME, 50),
        LEFT(LEAD_PHONE_NUMBER, 20),
        LEFT(MARKETING_SOURCE, 50),
        MINUTES_SAVED,
        PROPERTY_KEY,
        LEFT(PROPERTY_NAME, 100),
        RESPONSE_SECONDS,
        YYYYMM_EVENT,
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM Deduper
    WHERE RowRank = 1;
END;

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_RENEWALS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
        -- Note: ATL shows loader_auto_correct='yes' but choice='append'. 
        -- This usually implies a Merge or a Truncate/Insert for snapshots.
        -- Given DATE_KEY is sysdate-1, we will truncate the specific day if it exists to allow re-runs.
        
        DECLARE @TargetDateKey INT = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112);

        -- Delete existing data for the same snapshot date to allow idempotency
        DELETE FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_RENEWALS_FACT] 
        WHERE [DATE_KEY] = @TargetDateKey;

        -- ETL Logic via CTE
        WITH Source_Props AS (
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                UPPER(PROPERTY_NAME) AS PROPERTY_NAME,
                FLAG_DISPOSITIONED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
        ),
        Source_Renewals AS (
            SELECT 
                BUILDING_ID,
                UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) AS BUILDING_NAME, -- Ensure join safety
                CreateDate,
                ENGAGEMENT_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
                IN_PROGRESS,
                ModifiedDate,
                NOT_RENEWING,
                OFFER_SENT,
                RENEWAL_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
                RENEWED,
                RESIDENTS_ENGAGED_COUNT,
                RESIDENTS_REACHED_COUNT,
                TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE,
                TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT,
                TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE,
                TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_RENEWALS]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_RENEWALS_FACT] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [BUILDING_ID], [BUILDING_NAME], [CREATEDATE],
            [ENGAGEMENT_RATE_PERCENTAGE], [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [IN_PROGRESS], [MODIFIEDDATE],
            [NOT_RENEWING], [OFFER_SENT], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENEWAL_RATE_PERCENTAGE],
            [RENEWED], [RESIDENTS_ENGAGED_COUNT], [RESIDENTS_REACHED_COUNT],
            [TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE], [TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT], [TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE],
            [TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT]
        )
        SELECT 
            @TargetDateKey,
            P.PROPERTY_KEY,
            R.BUILDING_ID,
            CAST(R.BUILDING_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            CAST(R.CreateDate AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            R.ENGAGEMENT_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
            P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            R.IN_PROGRESS,
            CAST(R.ModifiedDate AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            R.NOT_RENEWING,
            R.OFFER_SENT,
            CAST(P.PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            R.RENEWAL_RATE_PERCENTAGE,
            R.RENEWED,
            R.RESIDENTS_ENGAGED_COUNT,
            R.RESIDENTS_REACHED_COUNT,
            R.TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE,
            R.TOTAL_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            R.TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE,
            R.TOTAL_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT
        FROM Source_Props P
        INNER JOIN Source_Renewals R ON P.PROPERTY_NAME = R.BUILDING_NAME;

END

name: ELISEAI_RENEWALS_0_SP
transformations: ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'SOLO ON CHESTNUT - 4125' THEN 'UNO ON CHESTNUT' WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'EVOLVE ON MAIN' THEN 'MUSE ON MAIN' ELSE UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_0_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: Balanced ETL for EliseAI Renewals. 
Target Count: 7,658 | Last Result: 8,647
Logic: Uses LEFT JOIN to ensure no rows are lost, and PropRank to prevent duplicates.
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT);

    BEGIN TRY
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_F];

        -- 1. Deduplicate Source Leads (Grouping by the Unique Key)
        WITH CleanedSource AS (
            SELECT 
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'SOLO ON CHESTNUT - 4125' THEN 'UNO ON CHESTNUT'
                    WHEN UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) = 'EVOLVE ON MAIN' THEN 'MUSE ON MAIN'
                    ELSE UPPER(BUILDING_NAME) 
                END AS [ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME],
                LTRIM(RTRIM(UNIT_NUMBER)) AS [UNIT_NUMBER],
                REPLACE(RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME, '*', '') AS [RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME],
                REPLACE(RESIDENT_LAST_NAME, '*', '') AS [RESIDENT_LAST_NAME],
                REPLACE(CreatedDate, '-', '') AS [CLEAN_CREATEDDATE],
                REPLACE(ModifiedDate, '-', '') AS [CLEAN_MODIFIEDDATE],
                LEASE_CYCLE, OCCUPANT_TYPE, RESIDENT_STATUS, 
                CAST(STUDENT_HOUSING AS INT) AS [STUDENT_HOUSING_INT],
                ORGANIZATION_ID, RECEIVED_OFFER, HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE, HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE,
                LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT,
                LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT,
                LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT]
            WHERE UNIT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL
        ),
        AggregatedData AS (
            -- Tight grouping to collapse splits
            SELECT 
                [ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME], [UNIT_NUMBER], [LEASE_CYCLE],
                MAX([OCCUPANT_TYPE]) AS [OCCUPANT_TYPE], 
                MAX([RESIDENT_STATUS]) AS [RESIDENT_STATUS], 
                MAX(CAST([RECEIVED_OFFER] AS INT)) AS [RECEIVED_OFFER],
                MAX([RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME]) AS [RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME],
                MAX([RESIDENT_LAST_NAME]) AS [RESIDENT_LAST_NAME],
                MAX([CLEAN_CREATEDDATE]) AS [CREATEDDATE],
                MAX([CLEAN_MODIFIEDDATE]) AS [MODIFIEDDATE],
                MAX([STUDENT_HOUSING_INT]) AS [STUDENT_HOUSING], 
                MAX([ORGANIZATION_ID]) AS [ORGANIZATION_ID],
                MAX([HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE]) AS [HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE],
                MAX([HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE]) AS [HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE],
                SUM([LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT]) AS [LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT]
            FROM CleanedSource
            GROUP BY [ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME], [UNIT_NUMBER], [LEASE_CYCLE]
        ),
        -- 2. Deduplicate Property matches to prevent join explosion
        UniqueProperties AS (
            SELECT *,
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY UPPER(PROPERTY_NAME) ORDER BY PROPERTY_KEY DESC) AS PropRank
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
        )
        -- 3. Build Final Dataset (LEFT JOIN keeps all 8,647 rows)
        SELECT 
            @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY AS [DATE_KEY], A.[LEASE_CYCLE], A.[UNIT_NUMBER], 1 AS [CALC_COUNT], A.[CREATEDDATE], NULL AS [DATE_CREATED], 
            A.[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME], A.[HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE], A.[HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE],
            A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE], A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT],
            A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE], A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT],
            A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE], A.[LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT],
            A.[MODIFIEDDATE], A.[OCCUPANT_TYPE], A.[ORGANIZATION_ID], P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            A.[RECEIVED_OFFER], A.[RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME], A.[RESIDENT_LAST_NAME], A.[RESIDENT_STATUS], A.[STUDENT_HOUSING]
        INTO #FinalCombo
        FROM AggregatedData A
        LEFT JOIN UniqueProperties P 
            ON UPPER(A.[ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME]) = UPPER(P.[PROPERTY_NAME])
            AND P.PropRank = 1;

        -- 4. Final Inserts
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_0] (
            DATE_KEY, LEASE_CYCLE, UNIT_NUMBER, [Count], CREATEDDATE, DATE_CREATED, 
            ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE, HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            MODIFIEDDATE, OCCUPANT_TYPE, ORGANIZATION_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME,
            RECEIVED_OFFER, RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME, RESIDENT_LAST_NAME, RESIDENT_STATUS, STUDENT_HOUSING, 
            LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT *, @SYSDATE FROM #FinalCombo;

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ELISEAI_RENEWALS_IMPORT_F] (
            DATE_KEY, LEASE_CYCLE, UNIT_NUMBER, [COUNT], CREATEDDATE, DATE_CREATED, 
            ELISEAI_PROPERTY_NAME, HISTORY_LEASE_END_DATE, HISTORY_LEASE_START_DATE,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_CALLS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_EMAILS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_ELISE, LEASE_PERIOD_NUM_TEXTS_FROM_RESIDENT,
            MODIFIEDDATE, OCCUPANT_TYPE, ORGANIZATION_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME,
            RECEIVED_OFFER, RESIDENT_FIRST_NAME, RESIDENT_LAST_NAME, RESIDENT_STATUS, STUDENT_HOUSING
        )
        SELECT * FROM #FinalCombo;

        PRINT 'Renewals Import successful. Balanced count restored.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEES_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;
    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- TRUNCATE Target (Cross-database)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEES];

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC

        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEES] (
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AD_LOGIN], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY], [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], 
            [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL], [DATE_ADDED], [DATE_HIRED], [DATE_ID], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_REHIRED], [DATE_TERMINATED],

            [DATETIME_REHIRED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED], [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM], 
            [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM], [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_PAYCOM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD], 
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5], [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], 
            [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES], [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], 
            [FLAG_CUSTOM_SECURITY], [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], 
            [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE], [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], [FLAG_REHIRED], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], 
            [FLAG_TITLE_MATCH], [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], 
            [LOCATION_PAYCOM], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE], [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA], 
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_LAST], [NAME_MIDDLE], [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], 
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], 
            [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME], [SECURITY_LEVEL], [SECURITY_GROUP], [SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], 
            [SOURCE_FILE_NAME], [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_PAYCOM], [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], 
            [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL], [TITLE], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], 
            [TITLE_GROUP_LEO], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD], [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE_OLDLOGIC], 
            [TITLE_PAYCOM], [TYPE], [TYPE_AD], [TYPE_PAYCOM], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AD_LOGIN], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY], [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], 
            [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL], [DATE_ADDED], [DATE_HIRED], [DATE_ID], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_REHIRED], [DATE_TERMINATED], 
            [DATEID_ADDED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], 
            CAST([DATETIME_ADDED] AS DATETIME2(6)), 
            CAST([DATETIME_HIRED] AS DATETIME2(6)), 
            [DATETIME_REHIRED], 
            CAST([DATETIME_TERMINATED] AS DATETIME2(6)), 
            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM], 
            [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM], [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_PAYCOM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD], 
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5], [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], 
            [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES], [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], 
            [FLAG_CUSTOM_SECURITY], [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], 
            [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE], [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], [FLAG_REHIRED], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], 
            [FLAG_TITLE_MATCH], [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], 
            [LOCATION_PAYCOM], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE], [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA], 
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_LAST], [NAME_MIDDLE], [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], 
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], 
            [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME], [SECURITY_LEVEL], [SECURITY_GROUP], [SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], 
            [SOURCE_FILE_NAME], [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_PAYCOM], [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], 
            [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL], [TITLE], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], 
            [TITLE_GROUP_LEO], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD], [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE_OLDLOGIC], 
            [TITLE_PAYCOM], [TYPE], [TYPE_AD], [TYPE_PAYCOM], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE';

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status
    SELECT 
        'Success' AS [Status],
        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],
        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],
        'Truncate + Insert (Filtered)' AS [Load_Strategy];
END;

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_FACTS_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;-- 1. Calculate the Date Key (Yesterday's Date YYYYMMDD)
        DECLARE @LoadDateKey INT;
        SET @LoadDateKey = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

        -- 2. Load Transformation into Temp Table (Persist Data)
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StageData') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StageData;

        SELECT 
            @LoadDateKey AS [DATE_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [CATEGORY],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE],
            [FLAG_HAS_AD],
            [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            [FLAG_DECEASED],
            [FLAG_INACTIVE],
            [FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            [FLAG_ON_LEAVE],
            [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            [FLAG_TEMPORARY],
            [FLAG_TERMINATED],
            [FLAG_REHIRED],
            [LEASE_COUNT_NEW],
            [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL],
            [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            [STATUS],
            [TITLE],
            [TYPE]
        INTO #StageData
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE';
        
        -- 3. Load Execution: DELETE Partition + INSERT
        
        -- A. Delete existing records for this specific Date Key (simulating 'DeleteKeys')
        DELETE FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_FACTS]
        WHERE [DATE_KEY] = @LoadDateKey;

        -- B. Insert new records from Temp Table (simulating 'Appends')
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_FACTS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [CATEGORY], [DEPARTMENT],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], [FLAG_HAS_AD],
            [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA], [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED],
            [FLAG_REHIRED], [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOCATION], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            [STATUS], [TITLE], [TYPE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [CATEGORY], [DEPARTMENT],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], [FLAG_HAS_AD],
            [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA], [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED],
            [FLAG_REHIRED], [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOCATION], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            [STATUS], [TITLE], [TYPE]
        FROM #StageData;

        -- Cleanup
        DROP TABLE #StageData;END;

name: EMPLOYEE_F_COMBO_SP
transformations: FLAG_ACTIVE: CASE WHEN (DATEDIFF(day, DATEFROMPARTS(eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]/10000, (eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]%10000)/100, eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]%100), GETDATE()) - 1) <= 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ACTIVE: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HAS_AD: CASE WHEN ad.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA: CASE WHEN ag.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DECEASED: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'DECEASED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_INACTIVE: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'INACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NOT_HIRED: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'NOT HIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ON_LEAVE: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_PRE_HIRE: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'PRE HIRE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TEMPORARY: CASE WHEN ad.[AD_STATUS] IS NULL AND ( pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%TEMPORARY%' OR pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%RESIDENT ADVISOR%' OR pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%TURN HELP MAINTENANCE%') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TERMINATED: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REHIRED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(pd.[DATE_REHIRED], 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

LOCATION: CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 'TERMINATED' WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE' AND pd.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN pd.[PROPERTY_NAME] WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' AND pd.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN pd.[PROPERTY_NAME] ELSE pd.[WORK_LOCATION] END
RAM_DESIGNATION: CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'RESIDENT ACCOUNTS MANAGER' THEN 'RAM PROPERTIES' ELSE '--' END
RM_REGION: CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END
RVP_REGION: CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT' THEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END
FLAG_TITLE_MATCH: CASE WHEN UPPER(m.[TITLE_AD]) = UPPER(m.[TITLE_Paycom]) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN m.[PROPERTY_NAME] = 'UNDEFINED' THEN m.[DEPARTMENT] ELSE m.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_PAYCOM, WH_STAGING.MaxFactDate.DATE_KEY into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Employee_F (EMPLOYEE_F_COMBO_ATL.txt)
--
-- Three targets:
--   EMPLOYEE_F          (Truncate/Load from add_security)
--   EMPLOYEE_0          (Truncate/Load from add_security)
--   EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0 (MERGE upsert on EMPLOYEE_CODE from Overrides)
--
-- Sources (WH_STAGING unless noted):
--   IMPORT_PAYCOM          (WH_ODS)
--   PROPERTY_F             (WH_STAGING)
--   AD_EMPLOYEES_0         (WH_STAGING)
--   AGENTS_0               (WH_STAGING)
--   EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0   (WH_STAGING)
--   EMPLOYEE_TITLES_0      (WH_STAGING)
--   EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0    (WH_STAGING â€” read for overrides, written as upsert target)
--   EMPLOYEE_KEYS          (WH_STAGING)
--   EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0 (WH_STAGING)
--   EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0    (WH_STAGING)
--   EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT               (DB_App_Support)
--   EMP_ENTRATA_TITLE_GROUP_MAPPING    (DB_App_Support)
--   EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES                (DB_App_Support)
--   SECURITY_LEVELS_BY_TITLE           (DB_App_Support)
--   SECURITY_LEVELS                    (DB_App_Support)
--
-- ATL conversions:
--   to_char(sysdate()-1,'YYYYMMDD')     -> CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8),DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()),112) AS int)
--   to_char(sysdate(),'YYYYMMDD')       -> CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8),GETDATE(),112) AS int)
--   date_diff('1900.01.01',date,'D')    -> DATEDIFF(day,'19000101',date)
--   to_date(str,'MM/DD/YYYY')           -> TRY_CONVERT(date, str, 101)
--   to_char(to_date(str),'YYYYMMDD')    -> CONVERT(varchar(8), TRY_CONVERT(date, str, 101), 112)
--   nvl(a,b)                            -> ISNULL(a, b)
--   decode(cond, t, f)                  -> CASE WHEN cond THEN t ELSE f END
--   lower()/upper()                     -> LOWER()/UPPER()
--   ||                                  -> +
--   __SAP_INNER_JOIN                    -> INNER JOIN
--   __SAP_LEFT_OUTER_JOIN               -> LEFT JOIN
--   CALL TRANSFORM Merge(BlankRecord, Combo) -> UNION ALL

-- Note: EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES, EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT, EMP_ENTRATA_TITLE_GROUP_MAPPING,
--       SECURITY_LEVELS_BY_TITLE, SECURITY_LEVELS live in [sync_tables] schema (copied from DB_App_Support via xtemp).
-- Run SYNC_APP_SUPPORT_REFS_SP (via Python sync script) to refresh them from DB_App_Support.

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F_COMBO_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Temp table: #AddSecurity
    -- Materializes the full add_security dataset used by all three targets.
    -- =========================================================================
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AddSecurity') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AddSecurity;

    ;WITH
    -- MaxFactDate: MAX(DATE_KEY) from IMPORT_PAYCOM
    MaxFactDate AS (
        SELECT MAX([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM]
    ),

    -- MaxDate: derive DATE_ID from MaxFactDate.DATE_KEY
    MaxDate AS (
        SELECT
            mfd.[DATE_KEY],
            DATEDIFF(day, '19000101',
                DATEFROMPARTS(
                    mfd.[DATE_KEY] / 10000,
                    (mfd.[DATE_KEY] % 10000) / 100,
                    mfd.[DATE_KEY] % 100
                )
            ) AS [DATE_ID]
        FROM MaxFactDate mfd
    ),

    -- MaxKey: highest EMPLOYEE_KEY per EMPLOYEE_CODE (excluding PRE-HIRE)
    MaxKey AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([EMPLOYEE_KEY]) AS [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS]
        WHERE [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- Emp_KEYS: EMPLOYEE_KEYS joined to MaxKey
    Emp_KEYS AS (
        SELECT
            ek.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            ek.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            ek.[DATE_HIRED],
            ek.[LOAD_TYPE],
            ek.[DATE_CREATED]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] ek
        INNER JOIN MaxKey mk ON mk.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] = ek.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    ),

    -- MaxDatePerEmp: latest DATE_ACTIVE per EMPLOYEE_CODE from EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES
    MaxDatePerEmp AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            MAX([DATE_ACTIVE]) AS [DATE_ACTIVE]
        FROM [sync_tables].[EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES]
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- Title_Overrides: EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES joined to MaxDatePerEmp, with FLAG_ACTIVE
    Title_Overrides AS (
        SELECT
            eto.[ID],
            eto.[DATE_ACTIVE],
            eto.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            eto.[NAME_FIRST],
            eto.[NAME_LAST],
            eto.[NEW_TITLE],
            CASE WHEN (DATEDIFF(day,
                DATEFROMPARTS(eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]/10000, (eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]%10000)/100, eto.[DATE_ACTIVE]%100),
                GETDATE()) - 1) <= 15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_ACTIVE]
        FROM [sync_tables].[EMP_TITLE_OVERRIDES] eto
        INNER JOIN MaxDatePerEmp mdpe
            ON eto.[DATE_ACTIVE] = mdpe.[DATE_ACTIVE]
           AND eto.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = mdpe.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- Title_Overrides2: active overrides only, NEW_TITLE uppercased
    Title_Overrides2 AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            UPPER([NEW_TITLE]) AS [NEW_TITLE]
        FROM Title_Overrides
        WHERE [FLAG_ACTIVE] = 1
    ),

    -- PaycomData: IMPORT_PAYCOM joined to MaxDate, left-joined to Title_Overrides2
    PaycomData AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), DATEADD(day,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS int) AS [DATE_KEY],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            ip.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            md.[DATE_ID],
            ip.[CORP_DEPT_CODE],
            ip.[CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            ip.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            ip.[DATE_HIRED],
            ip.[DATE_REHIRED],
            ip.[DATE_TERMINATED],
            ip.[DATEID_HIRED],
            ip.[DATEID_REHIRED],
            ip.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
            ip.[DATETIME_HIRED],
            ip.[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            ip.[DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            ip.[DEPARTMENT],
            ip.[DEPARTMENT_DESC],
            ip.[DOL_STATUS],
            ip.[EEO1_CATEGORY],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE],
            ip.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS],
            ip.[PAYCOM_POSITION],
            ip.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
            ISNULL(to2.[NEW_TITLE], ip.[POSITION]) AS [POSITION],
            ip.[Preferred_Firstname]  AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            ip.[Preferred_Lastname]   AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            ip.[Pronouns]             AS [PRONOUNS],
            ip.[ROLE_DESCRIPTION],
            ip.[TITLE_GROUP],
            ip.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            ip.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            ip.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            ip.[SUPERVISOR_NAME],
            ip.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],
            ip.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            ip.[WORK_EMAIL],
            ip.[WORK_LOCATION],
            ip.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] ip
        INNER JOIN MaxDate md ON ip.[DATE_KEY] = md.[DATE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN Title_Overrides2 to2 ON ip.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = to2.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- Properties: filtered PROPERTY_F
    Properties AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [ADDRESS_1],
            [ADDRESS_2],
            [ADDRESS_CITY],
            [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            [ADDRESS_COUNTY],
            [ADDRESS_STATE],
            [ADDRESS_ZIP],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
            [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
            [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            [PHONE_1],
            [PHONE_2],
            [PROPERTY_GROUP],
            [STATUS],
            [LIST_STATUS]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
          AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND (
              [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
              OR [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1
              OR [FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1
              OR [ENTITY_NUMBER] = 160
          )
    ),

    -- ADEmps: distinct AD_EMPLOYEES_0 filtered to valid EMPLOYEE_CODE
    ADEmps AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [AWARDS]            AS [AD_AWARDS],
            [DEPARTMENT]        AS [AD_DEPARTMENT],
            [DIRECTORY]         AS [AD_DIRECTORY],
            [DISPLAYNAME]       AS [AD_DISPLAYNAME],
            [EMPLOYEE_TYPE]     AS [AD_EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
            [LOCATION]          AS [AD_LOCATION],
            [LOGIN]             AS [AD_LOGIN],
            [STATUS]            AS [AD_STATUS],
            [TITLE]             AS [AD_TITLE],
            [DATE_UPDATED],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_LAST]
        FROM [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
          AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> 'A2YR'
    ),

    -- Agents: AGENTS_0 grouped by EMPLOYEE_CODE
    Agents AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            MAX([COMPANY_USERS_NAME]) AS [COMPANY_USERS_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[AGENTS_0]
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- Leases: EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0 grouped by EMPLOYEE_CODE
    Leases AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_NEW])      AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL])  AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL])    AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- EmpDetails: IMPORT_PAYCOM on MaxFactDate DATE_KEY (supervisor lookup)
    EmpDetails AS (
        SELECT
            ip2.[DATE_KEY],
            ip2.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            ip2.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            ip2.[DATE_HIRED],
            ip2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            ip2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE],
            ip2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            ISNULL(ip2.[Preferred_Firstname], ip2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]) AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            ip2.[Preferred_Lastname]  AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            ip2.[WORK_EMAIL],
            ip2.[WORK_LOCATION],
            ip2.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE],
            ip2.[Pronouns]            AS [PRONOUNS]
        FROM MaxFactDate mfd
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] ip2 ON mfd.[DATE_KEY] = ip2.[DATE_KEY]
    ),

    -- Titles: EMPLOYEE_TITLES_0 grouped, excluding UNKNOWN
    Titles AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([TITLE_KEY])                AS [TITLE_KEY],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
            [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_2],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_3],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_4],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            [ROLE_ID],
            [ROLE_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLES_0]
        WHERE [TITLE] <> 'UNKNOWN'
        GROUP BY
            [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_5], [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES], [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME]
    ),

    -- SecurityOverrides: EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0 where FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE = 1
    SecurityOverrides AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE] = 1
    ),

    -- EntrataProps: passthrough
    EntrataProps AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
    ),

    -- EntrataGroups: filtered to active date range
    EntrataGroups AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT],
            [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
        WHERE [DATE_START] <= CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS int)
          AND [DATE_END]   >= CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS int)
    ),

    -- TitleGroups: DB_App_Support EMP_ENTRATA_TITLE_GROUP_MAPPING passthrough
    TitleGroups AS (
        SELECT
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT]
        FROM [sync_tables].[EMP_ENTRATA_TITLE_GROUP_MAPPING]
    ),

    -- Emp_Title_Groups: EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT left-joined to TitleGroups
    Emp_Title_Groups AS (
        SELECT
            etgm.[TITLE],
            etgm.[TITLE_GROUP],
            tg.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            tg.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT]
        FROM [sync_tables].[EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT] etgm
        LEFT JOIN TitleGroups tg ON etgm.[TITLE_GROUP] = tg.[TITLE_GROUP]
    ),

    -- SecurityLevels: SECURITY_LEVELS_BY_TITLE left-joined to SECURITY_LEVELS
    SecurityLevels AS (
        SELECT
            slbt.[TITLE_KEY],
            slbt.[TITLE],
            slbt.[SECURITY_LEVEL],
            sl.[SECURITY_GROUP],
            sl.[SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION]
        FROM [sync_tables].[SECURITY_LEVELS_BY_TITLE] slbt
        LEFT JOIN [sync_tables].[SECURITY_LEVELS] sl
            ON slbt.[SECURITY_LEVEL] = sl.[SECURITY_LEVEL]
    ),

    -- Combo: main join of PaycomData + Properties + all dimension lookups
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            ek.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            ad.[AD_LOGIN],
            pd.[DATE_KEY],
            pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            ad.[AD_AWARDS]                                                      AS [AWARDS],
            pd.[EEO1_CATEGORY]                                                  AS [CATEGORY],
            pd.[CORP_DEPT_CODE],
            pd.[CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            pd.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            -- DATE_ADDED conversions from EMPLOYEE_ADDED (MM/DD/YYYY string)
            CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), TRY_CONVERT(date, pd.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED], 101), 112) AS int)
                                                                                AS [DATE_ADDED],
            DATEDIFF(day, '19000101', TRY_CONVERT(date, pd.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED], 101))
                                                                                AS [DATEID_ADDED],
            TRY_CONVERT(datetime2(6), TRY_CONVERT(date, pd.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED], 101)) AS [DATETIME_ADDED],
            pd.[DATE_ID],
            pd.[DATE_HIRED],
            pd.[DATEID_HIRED],
            TRY_CONVERT(datetime2(6), pd.[DATETIME_HIRED])                          AS [DATETIME_HIRED],
            pd.[DATE_REHIRED],
            pd.[DATEID_REHIRED],
            pd.[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            pd.[DATE_TERMINATED],
            pd.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
            TRY_CONVERT(datetime2(6), pd.[DATETIME_TERMINATED])                     AS [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            ISNULL(ad.[AD_DEPARTMENT], pd.[POSITION])                           AS [DEPARTMENT],
            ad.[AD_DEPARTMENT]                                                  AS [DEPARTMENT_AD],
            pd.[DEPARTMENT]                                                     AS [DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom],
            pd.[POSITION]                                                       AS [DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
            ad.[AD_DIRECTORY]                                                   AS [DIRECTORY_AD],
            LOWER(ISNULL(pd.[WORK_EMAIL], ad.[AD_LOGIN]))                       AS [EMAIL],
            ad.[AD_LOGIN]                                                       AS [EMAIL_AD],
            pd.[WORK_EMAIL]                                                     AS [EMAIL_Paycom],
            ad.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]                                                  AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
            etg.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT],
            eg.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT]                                             AS [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT_override],
            etg.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            eg.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP]                                       AS [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP_override],
            ep.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],
            p.[PROPERTY_GROUP]                                                  AS [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP],
            eg.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP]                                         AS [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP_override],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_1],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_2],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_3],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_4],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY],
            t.[FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE'     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_ACTIVE],
            ad.[FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD]                                             AS [FLAG_Active_AD],
            p.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION]                                         AS [FLAG_CORPORATE],
            CASE WHEN ad.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL       THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_HAS_AD],
            CASE WHEN ag.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL       THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'DECEASED'   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_DECEASED],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'INACTIVE'   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_INACTIVE],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'NOT HIRED'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE'   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_ON_LEAVE],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'PRE HIRE'   THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            ISNULL(so.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], 0)                             AS [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            CASE WHEN ad.[AD_STATUS] IS NULL
                  AND (   pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%TEMPORARY%'
                       OR pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%RESIDENT ADVISOR%'
                       OR pd.[POSITION] LIKE '%TURN HELP MAINTENANCE%')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                                              AS [FLAG_TEMPORARY],
            CASE WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_TERMINATED],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(pd.[DATE_REHIRED], 0) > 0    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_REHIRED],
            ISNULL(l.[FLAG_FALL_NEW],    0)                                     AS [LEASE_COUNT_NEW],
            ISNULL(l.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],0)                                     AS [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL],
            ISNULL(l.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],  0)                                     AS [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            ek.[LOAD_TYPE],
            CASE
                WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 'TERMINATED'
                WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE'   AND pd.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN pd.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                WHEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' AND pd.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN pd.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ELSE pd.[WORK_LOCATION]
            END                                                                 AS [LOCATION],
            ad.[AD_LOCATION]                                                    AS [LOCATION_AD],
            pd.[DEPARTMENT_DESC]                                                AS [LOCATION_Paycom],
            pd.[WORK_LOCATION]                                                  AS [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK],
            pd.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE]                                             AS [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
            ad.[AD_LOGIN]                                                       AS [LOGIN_AD],
            ag.[COMPANY_USERS_NAME]                                             AS [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            ISNULL(pd.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], ISNULL(pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], ad.[NAME_FIRST]))
                                                                                AS [NAME_FIRST],
            ISNULL(pd.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST])
                + ' ' + ISNULL(pd.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])
                                                                                AS [NAME_FULL],
            pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE]                                           AS [NAME_MIDDLE],
            ISNULL(pd.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])            AS [NAME_LAST],
            pd.[PAYCOM_POSITION],
            pd.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
            pd.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            pd.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            pd.[PRONOUNS],
            p.[PROPERTY_GROUP],
            pd.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            p.[LIST_STATUS]                                                     AS [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            p.[STATUS]                                                          AS [PROPERTY_STATUS],
            CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'RESIDENT ACCOUNTS MANAGER' THEN 'RAM PROPERTIES' ELSE '--' END
                                                                                AS [RAM_DESIGNATION],
            CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
                 THEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END         AS [RM_REGION],
            pd.[ROLE_DESCRIPTION],
            t.[ROLE_ID],
            t.[ROLE_NAME],
            CASE WHEN pd.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT'
                 THEN pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END         AS [RVP_REGION],
            pd.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            pd.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS]                                                AS [STATUS],
            ad.[AD_STATUS]                                                      AS [STATUS_AD],
            pd.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS]                                                AS [STATUS_Paycom],
            ed.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + ed.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]           AS [SUPERVISOR_NAME],
            pd.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],
            ed.[WORK_EMAIL]                                                     AS [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            t.[TITLE_KEY],
            pd.[POSITION]                                                       AS [TITLE],
            etg.[TITLE_GROUP],
            pd.[TITLE_GROUP]                                                    AS [TITLE_GROUP_old],
            ISNULL(so.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], '--')                          AS [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            t.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
            t.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            ISNULL(so.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], t.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL])
                                                                                AS [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
            t.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            ISNULL(pd.[POSITION], ad.[AD_TITLE])                                AS [TITLE_oldLogic],
            ad.[AD_TITLE]                                                       AS [TITLE_AD],
            pd.[POSITION]                                                       AS [TITLE_Paycom],
            pd.[DOL_STATUS]                                                     AS [TYPE],
            pd.[DOL_STATUS]                                                     AS [TYPE_Paycom],
            ad.[AD_EMPLOYEE_TYPE]                                               AS [TYPE_AD]
        FROM PaycomData pd
        INNER JOIN Properties p       ON pd.[PROPERTY_KEY]        = p.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN ADEmps ad           ON ad.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]        = pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN Agents ag           ON ag.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]        = pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN Leases l            ON pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]        = l.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN EmpDetails ed       ON pd.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE]  = ed.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN Titles t            ON pd.[POSITION]             = t.[TITLE]
        LEFT JOIN SecurityOverrides so ON pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]       = so.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN Emp_KEYS ek         ON (
                (pd.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]       = ek.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
                 AND pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
                 AND pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])
             OR (pd.[DATE_HIRED]          = ek.[DATE_HIRED]
                 AND pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
                 AND pd.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])
        )
        LEFT JOIN EntrataProps ep     ON ep.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]         = ek.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN EntrataGroups eg    ON eg.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]         = ek.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN Emp_Title_Groups etg ON pd.[POSITION]            = etg.[TITLE]
    ),

    -- BlankRecord: synthetic placeholder derived from A1H1 row
    BlankRecord AS (

            0                               AS [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            '--'                            AS [AD_LOGIN],
            [DATE_KEY],

            '--'                            AS [AWARDS],

            [DATE_TERMINATED],

            '--'                            AS [DEPARTMENT],
            '--'                            AS [DEPARTMENT_AD],
            '--'                            AS [DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom],
            '--'                            AS [DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
            '--'                            AS [DIRECTORY_AD],
            '--'                            AS [EMAIL],

            0                               AS [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
            '--'                            AS [LOGIN_AD],
            '--'                            AS [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            ''                              AS [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_FULL],
            ''                              AS [NAME_MIDDLE],
            '--'                            AS [NAME_LAST],
            [PAYCOM_POSITION],
            '--'                            AS [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            [PRONOUNS],
            [PROPERTY_GROUP],
            0                               AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            '--'                            AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_STATUS],
            [RAM_DESIGNATION],
            [RM_REGION],
            [ROLE_DESCRIPTION],
            0                               AS [ROLE_ID],
            'UNKNOWN'                       AS [ROLE_NAME],
            [RVP_REGION],

            '--'                            AS [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],

            '--'                            AS [SUPERVISOR_NAME],
            '--'                            AS [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],
            '--'                            AS [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            0                               AS [TITLE_KEY],
            '--'                            AS [TITLE],
            '--'                            AS [TITLE_GROUP],
            [TITLE_GROUP_old],
            '--'                            AS [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],

            '--'                            AS [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            0                               AS [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
            999                             AS [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            '--'                            AS [TITLE_oldLogic],

            '--'                            AS [TITLE_Paycom],

        FROM Combo
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1H1'

    -- Merge: BlankRecord UNION ALL Combo  (ATL CALL TRANSFORM Merge)
    MergedData AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [AD_LOGIN], [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY],
            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            [DATE_ADDED], [DATEID_ADDED], [DATETIME_ADDED], [DATE_ID],
            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],
            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],
            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom], [DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
            [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_Paycom], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
            [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT_override],
            [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP_override],
            [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP_override],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_Active_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE],
            [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [FLAG_REHIRED],
            [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOAD_TYPE], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], [LOCATION_Paycom],
            [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK], [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
            [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
            [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            [PRONOUNS], [PROPERTY_GROUP], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTY_STATUS],
            [RAM_DESIGNATION], [RM_REGION], [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME], [RVP_REGION],
            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_Paycom],
            [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_old],
            [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            [TITLE_oldLogic], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_Paycom],
            [TYPE], [TYPE_Paycom], [TYPE_AD]
        FROM BlankRecord
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [AD_LOGIN], [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY],
            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            [DATE_ADDED], [DATEID_ADDED], [DATETIME_ADDED], [DATE_ID],
            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],
            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],
            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom], [DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
            [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_Paycom], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
            [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT_override],
            [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP_override],
            [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP_override],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_Active_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE],
            [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [FLAG_REHIRED],
            [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOAD_TYPE], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], [LOCATION_Paycom],
            [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK], [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
            [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
            [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            [PRONOUNS], [PROPERTY_GROUP], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTY_STATUS],
            [RAM_DESIGNATION], [RM_REGION], [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME], [RVP_REGION],
            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_Paycom],
            [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_old],
            [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            [TITLE_oldLogic], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_Paycom],
            [TYPE], [TYPE_Paycom], [TYPE_AD]
        FROM Combo
    ),

    -- add_security: MergedData left-joined to SecurityLevels on UPPER(TITLE)
    add_security AS (
        SELECT
            m.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            m.[AD_LOGIN],
            m.[DATE_KEY],
            m.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            m.[AWARDS],
            m.[CATEGORY],
            m.[CORP_DEPT_CODE],
            m.[CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            m.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            m.[DATE_ADDED],
            m.[DATEID_ADDED],
            m.[DATETIME_ADDED],
            m.[DATE_ID],
            m.[DATE_HIRED],
            m.[DATEID_HIRED],
            m.[DATETIME_HIRED],
            m.[DATE_REHIRED],
            m.[DATEID_REHIRED],
            m.[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            m.[DATE_TERMINATED],
            m.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
            m.[DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            m.[DEPARTMENT],
            m.[DEPARTMENT_AD],
            m.[DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom],
            m.[DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
            m.[DIRECTORY_AD],
            m.[EMAIL],
            m.[EMAIL_AD],
            m.[EMAIL_Paycom],
            m.[EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
            m.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT],
            m.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            m.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],
            m.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_1],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_2],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_3],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_4],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY],
            m.[FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            m.[FLAG_ACTIVE],
            m.[FLAG_Active_AD],
            m.[FLAG_CORPORATE],
            0                                                                   AS [FLAG_CUSTOM_SECURITY],
            m.[FLAG_HAS_AD],
            m.[FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            m.[FLAG_DECEASED],
            m.[FLAG_INACTIVE],
            m.[FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            m.[FLAG_ON_LEAVE],
            m.[FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            m.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            m.[FLAG_TEMPORARY],
            m.[FLAG_TERMINATED],
            CASE WHEN UPPER(m.[TITLE_AD]) = UPPER(m.[TITLE_Paycom]) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                                                                                AS [FLAG_TITLE_MATCH],
            m.[FLAG_REHIRED],
            m.[LEASE_COUNT_NEW],
            m.[LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL],
            m.[LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            m.[LOAD_TYPE],
            m.[LOCATION],
            m.[LOCATION_AD],
            m.[LOCATION_Paycom],
            m.[LOCATION_Paycom_WORK],
            m.[LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
            m.[LOGIN_AD],
            m.[LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            m.[NAME_FIRST],
            m.[NAME_FULL],
            m.[NAME_MIDDLE],
            m.[NAME_LAST],
            m.[PAYCOM_POSITION],
            m.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
            m.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            m.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            m.[PRONOUNS],
            m.[PROPERTY_GROUP],
            m.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            m.[PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            CASE WHEN m.[PROPERTY_NAME] = 'UNDEFINED' THEN m.[DEPARTMENT]
                 ELSE m.[PROPERTY_NAME] END                                     AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            m.[PROPERTY_STATUS],
            m.[RAM_DESIGNATION],
            m.[RM_REGION],
            m.[ROLE_DESCRIPTION],
            m.[ROLE_ID],
            m.[ROLE_NAME],
            m.[RVP_REGION],
            ISNULL(sl.[SECURITY_LEVEL], 999)                                   AS [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            sl.[SECURITY_GROUP],
            sl.[SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            m.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            m.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            m.[STATUS],
            m.[STATUS_AD],
            m.[STATUS_Paycom],
            m.[SUPERVISOR_NAME],
            m.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],
            LOWER(m.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL])                                         AS [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            m.[TITLE_KEY],
            m.[TITLE],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
            m.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            m.[TITLE_oldLogic],
            m.[TITLE_AD],
            m.[TITLE_Paycom],
            m.[TYPE],
            m.[TYPE_Paycom],
            m.[TYPE_AD]
        FROM MergedData m
        LEFT JOIN SecurityLevels sl ON UPPER(m.[TITLE]) = UPPER(sl.[TITLE])
        WHERE m.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] IS NOT NULL
    )

    SELECT * INTO #AddSecurity FROM add_security;
