        [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
        [TITLE_oldLogic], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_Paycom],
        [TYPE], [TYPE_Paycom], [TYPE_AD]
    FROM #AddSecurity;

    -- =========================================================================
    -- EMPLOYEE_0  (Truncate/Load)
    -- =========================================================================
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_0]
    SELECT
        [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [AD_LOGIN], [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY],
        [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
        [DATE_ADDED], [DATEID_ADDED], [DATETIME_ADDED], [DATE_ID],
        [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],
        [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],
        [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
        [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_Code_Paycom], [DEPARTMENT_Paycom],
        [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_Paycom], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
        [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
        [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP],
        [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
        [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_Active_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], [FLAG_CUSTOM_SECURITY],
        [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
        [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
        [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [FLAG_TITLE_MATCH], [FLAG_REHIRED],
        [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
        [LOAD_TYPE], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], [LOCATION_Paycom],
        [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK], [LOCATION_Paycom_WORK_CODE],
        [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
        [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
        [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
        [PRONOUNS], [PROPERTY_GROUP], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
        [PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTY_STATUS],
        [RAM_DESIGNATION], [RM_REGION], [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME], [RVP_REGION],
        [SECURITY_LEVEL], [SECURITY_GROUP], [SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
        [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
        [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_Paycom],
        [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
        [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP],
        [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
        [TITLE_oldLogic], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_Paycom],
        [TYPE], [TYPE_Paycom], [TYPE_AD]
    FROM #AddSecurity;

    -- =========================================================================
    -- EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0  (DELETE+INSERT upsert on EMPLOYEE_CODE)
    -- Replaces MERGE to work around Fabric's lack of unique index enforcement.
    -- Deletes existing rows whose EMPLOYEE_CODE is in the source, then inserts
    -- fresh from #AddSecurity. Rows with codes not in source are preserved.
    -- Overrides = add_security WHERE (FLAG_ACTIVE IN (0,1) OR FLAG_TERMINATED = 0)
    --             AND EMPLOYEE_CODE <> '0000'
    -- =========================================================================
    DELETE FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0]
    WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IN (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        FROM #AddSecurity
        WHERE ([FLAG_ACTIVE] IN (0, 1) OR [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0)
          AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> '0000'
    );

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0] (
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
        [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP],
        [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
    )
    SELECT
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMAIL],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE],
        [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
        [NAME_FIRST],
        [NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + [NAME_LAST]    AS [NAME_FULL],
        [NAME_MIDDLE],
        [NAME_LAST],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [TITLE_KEY],
        [TITLE],
        [TITLE_GROUP],
        [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
        [TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
        [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
    FROM #AddSecurity
    WHERE ([FLAG_ACTIVE] IN (0, 1) OR [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0)
      AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> '0000';

END

name: EMPLOYEE_F_SP
transformations: FLAG_ACTIVE: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HAS_AD: CASE WHEN ADEmps.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA: CASE WHEN Agents.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DECEASED: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'DECEASED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_INACTIVE: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'INACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NOT_HIRED: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'NOT HIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ON_LEAVE: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_PRE_HIRE: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'PRE HIRE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TEMPORARY: CASE WHEN ADEmps.[AD_STATUS] IS NULL AND ( PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%TEMPORARY%' OR PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%RESIDENT ADVISOR%' OR PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%TURN HELP MAINTENANCE%' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TERMINATED: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REHIRED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(PaycomData.[DATE_REHIRED], 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

LOCATION: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 'TERMINATED' WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE' AND PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN PaycomData.[PROPERTY_NAME] WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' AND PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN PaycomData.[PROPERTY_NAME] ELSE PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION] END
RAM_DESIGNATION: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'RESIDENT ACCOUNTS MANAGER' THEN 'RAM PROPERTIES' ELSE '--' END
RM_REGION: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END
RVP_REGION: CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT' THEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END
FLAG_TITLE_MATCH: CASE WHEN F.[TITLE_AD] = F.[TITLE_PAYCOM] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
PROPERTY_NAME_CLEAN: CASE WHEN F.[PROPERTY_NAME] = 'UNDEFINED' THEN F.[DEPARTMENT] ELSE F.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_PAYCOM, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ============================================================================
    -- EMPLOYEE_F_SP: Employee Fact Table Builder
    -- Sources: WH_ODS.IMPORT_PAYCOM, WH_STAGING local tables, DB_APP_SUPPORT
    -- Targets: EMPLOYEE_F (truncate/load), EMPLOYEE_0 (truncate/load),
    --          EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0 (upsert on EMPLOYEE_CODE)
    -- FIX: TRUNCATE moved before WITH block so add_security CTE is consumed
    --      by the INSERT, not the DELETE.
    -- ============================================================================

    -- Clear EMPLOYEE_F BEFORE the CTE block (CTE must immediately precede INSERT)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F];

    -- ============================================================================
    -- 1. PROCESSING CTEs  ->  EMPLOYEE_F
    -- ============================================================================
    WITH

    SecurityOverrides AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE] = 1
    ),

    MaxFactDate AS (
        SELECT MAX([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY] FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM]
    ),

    MaxDate AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY],
            DATEDIFF(day, '1900-01-01', CAST(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)) AS [DATE_ID]
        FROM MaxFactDate
    ),

    PaycomData AS (
        SELECT
            CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS [DATE_KEY_calc],
            P.[DATE_KEY], P.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            P.[DATE_HIRED], P.[DATEID_HIRED], P.[DATETIME_HIRED],
            P.[DATE_REHIRED], P.[DATEID_REHIRED], P.[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            P.[DATE_TERMINATED], P.[DATEID_TERMINATED], P.[DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            P.[CORP_DEPT_CODE], P.[CORP_DEPT_DESC], P.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            P.[DEPARTMENT], P.[DEPARTMENT_DESC], P.[DOL_STATUS], P.[EEO1_CATEGORY],
            P.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED], P.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], P.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE], P.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            P.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS], P.[PAYCOM_POSITION], P.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], P.[POSITION],
            P.[Preferred_Firstname], P.[Preferred_Lastname], P.[Pronouns],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME], P.[ROLE_DESCRIPTION], P.[TITLE_GROUP],
            P.[WORK_EMAIL], P.[WORK_LOCATION], P.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE],
            P.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE], P.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            P.[SUPERVISOR_NAME], P.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE], P.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            MD.[DATE_ID] AS [CALC_DATE_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] P
        INNER JOIN MaxFactDate MFD ON P.[DATE_KEY] = MFD.[DATE_KEY]
        CROSS JOIN MaxDate MD
    ),

    Properties AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [ADDRESS_1], [ADDRESS_2], [ADDRESS_CITY],
               [ADDRESS_COUNTRY], [ADDRESS_COUNTY], [ADDRESS_STATE], [ADDRESS_ZIP],
               [ENTITY_NUMBER], [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION], [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
               [PHONE_1], [PHONE_2], [PROPERTY_GROUP], [STATUS], [LIST_STATUS],
               [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY], [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [FLAG_TENTATIVE]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
          AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND ([FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 OR [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 OR [FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 OR [ENTITY_NUMBER] = '160')
    ),

    ADEmps AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [LOGIN]            AS [AD_LOGIN],
            [AWARDS]           AS [AD_AWARDS],
            [DEPARTMENT]       AS [AD_DEPARTMENT],
            [DIRECTORY]        AS [AD_DIRECTORY],
            [STATUS]           AS [AD_STATUS],
            [LOCATION]         AS [AD_LOCATION],
            [TITLE]            AS [AD_TITLE],
            [EMPLOYEE_TYPE]    AS [AD_EMPLOYEE_TYPE],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [EMAIL]
        FROM [dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
          AND [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> 'A2YR'
    ),

    Agents AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_CODE], MAX([COMPANY_USERS_NAME]) AS [COMPANY_USERS_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[AGENTS_0]
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    Leases AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_NEW])      AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL])  AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
            SUM([EMP_LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL])    AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    EmpDetails AS (
        SELECT P2.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], P2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], P2.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], P2.[WORK_EMAIL]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] P2
        INNER JOIN MaxFactDate MFD ON P2.[DATE_KEY] = MFD.[DATE_KEY]
    ),

    Titles AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([TITLE_KEY]) AS [TITLE_KEY],
            [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLES_0]
        WHERE [TITLE] <> 'UNKNOWN'
        GROUP BY [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
                 [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
                 [FLAG_ACCESS_1], [FLAG_ACCESS_2], [FLAG_ACCESS_3], [FLAG_ACCESS_4], [FLAG_ACCESS_5],
                 [FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], [FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], [FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
                 [ROLE_ID], [ROLE_NAME]
    ),

    MaxKey AS (
        SELECT MAX([EMPLOYEE_KEY]) AS [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS]
        WHERE [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    Emp_KEYS AS (
        SELECT K.*
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] K
        INNER JOIN MaxKey MK ON K.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] = MK.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    ),

    EntrataProps AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
    ),

    TitleGroups AS (
        SELECT [TITLE_GROUP], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP], [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT]
        FROM [dbo].[TITLE_GROUPS_ENTRATA]
    ),

    EntrataGroups AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP], [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP]
        FROM [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
        WHERE [DATE_START] <= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112)
          AND [DATE_END]   >= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112)
    ),

    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            ADEmps.[AD_LOGIN],
            PaycomData.[DATE_KEY],
            PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            ADEmps.[AD_AWARDS]                                                          AS [AWARDS],
            PaycomData.[EEO1_CATEGORY]                                                  AS [CATEGORY],
            PaycomData.[CORP_DEPT_CODE],
            PaycomData.[CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            PaycomData.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
            CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED] AS DATE), 112)) AS [DATE_ADDED],
            DATEDIFF(day, '1900-01-01', CAST(PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED] AS DATE))      AS [DATEID_ADDED],
            CAST(PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED] AS DATETIME2)                              AS [DATETIME_ADDED],
            PaycomData.[CALC_DATE_ID]                                                   AS [DATE_ID],
            PaycomData.[DATE_HIRED],    PaycomData.[DATEID_HIRED],    PaycomData.[DATETIME_HIRED],
            PaycomData.[DATE_REHIRED],  PaycomData.[DATEID_REHIRED],  PaycomData.[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            PaycomData.[DATE_TERMINATED], PaycomData.[DATEID_TERMINATED], PaycomData.[DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            ISNULL(ADEmps.[AD_DEPARTMENT], PaycomData.[POSITION])                       AS [DEPARTMENT],
            ADEmps.[AD_DEPARTMENT]                                                      AS [DEPARTMENT_AD],
            PaycomData.[DEPARTMENT]                                                     AS [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM],
            PaycomData.[POSITION]                                                       AS [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM],
            ADEmps.[AD_DIRECTORY]                                                       AS [DIRECTORY_AD],
            LOWER(ISNULL(PaycomData.[WORK_EMAIL], ADEmps.[AD_LOGIN]))                   AS [EMAIL],
            ADEmps.[AD_LOGIN]                                                           AS [EMAIL_AD],
            PaycomData.[WORK_EMAIL]                                                     AS [EMAIL_PAYCOM],
            ADEmps.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]                                                      AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
            ISNULL(EntrataGroups.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT],    TitleGroups.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT])    AS [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT],
            ISNULL(EntrataGroups.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP], TitleGroups.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP]) AS [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
            EntrataProps.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS],
            ISNULL(EntrataGroups.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP], Properties.[PROPERTY_GROUP]) AS [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP],
            Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_1], Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_2], Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_3],
            Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_4], Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_5],
            Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_GLOBAL], Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_MARKET_SURVEY], Titles.[FLAG_ACCESS_MILESTONES],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE'    THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_ACTIVE],
            ADEmps.[FLAG_ACTIVE_RECORD]                                                 AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD],
            Properties.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION]                                        AS [FLAG_CORPORATE],
            CASE WHEN ADEmps.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END              AS [FLAG_HAS_AD],
            CASE WHEN Agents.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]  IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END             AS [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'DECEASED'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_DECEASED],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'INACTIVE'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_INACTIVE],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'NOT HIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_NOT_HIRED],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_ON_LEAVE],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'PRE HIRE'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END     AS [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            ISNULL(SecurityOverrides.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE], 0)                       AS [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            CASE WHEN ADEmps.[AD_STATUS] IS NULL AND (
                PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%TEMPORARY%' OR
                PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%RESIDENT ADVISOR%' OR
                PaycomData.[POSITION] LIKE '%TURN HELP MAINTENANCE%'
            ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                                                         AS [FLAG_TEMPORARY],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END    AS [FLAG_TERMINATED],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(PaycomData.[DATE_REHIRED], 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END       AS [FLAG_REHIRED],
            ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_FALL_NEW],      0)                                      AS [LEASE_COUNT_NEW],
            ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],  0)                                      AS [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL],
            ISNULL(Leases.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],    0)                                      AS [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            Emp_KEYS.[LOAD_TYPE],
            CASE
                WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'TERMINATED'                        THEN 'TERMINATED'
                WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE'   AND PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN PaycomData.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                WHEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ON LEAVE' AND PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION] = '' THEN PaycomData.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ELSE PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION]
            END                                                                         AS [LOCATION],
            ADEmps.[AD_LOCATION]                                                        AS [LOCATION_AD],
            PaycomData.[DEPARTMENT_DESC]                                                AS [LOCATION_PAYCOM],
            PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION]                                                  AS [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK],
            PaycomData.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE]                                             AS [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE],
            ADEmps.[AD_LOGIN]                                                           AS [LOGIN_AD],
            Agents.[COMPANY_USERS_NAME]                                                 AS [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
            ISNULL(PaycomData.[Preferred_Firstname], ISNULL(PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], ADEmps.[NAME_FIRST])) AS [NAME_FIRST],
            ISNULL(PaycomData.[Preferred_Firstname], PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]) + ' ' +
                ISNULL(PaycomData.[Preferred_Lastname], PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])AS [NAME_FULL],
            PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE]                                           AS [NAME_MIDDLE],
            ISNULL(PaycomData.[Preferred_Lastname], PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])    AS [NAME_LAST],
            PaycomData.[PAYCOM_POSITION],
            PaycomData.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
            PaycomData.[Preferred_Firstname]                                            AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            PaycomData.[Preferred_Lastname]                                             AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            PaycomData.[Pronouns]                                                       AS [PRONOUNS],
            Properties.[PROPERTY_GROUP],
            PaycomData.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            Properties.[LIST_STATUS]                                                    AS [PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],
            Properties.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            Properties.[STATUS]                                                         AS [PROPERTY_STATUS],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'RESIDENT ACCOUNTS MANAGER' THEN 'RAM PROPERTIES' ELSE '--' END AS [RAM_DESIGNATION],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER'          THEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END AS [RM_REGION],
            PaycomData.[ROLE_DESCRIPTION],
            Titles.[ROLE_ID],
            Titles.[ROLE_NAME],
            CASE WHEN PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT'   THEN PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST] + ' REGION' ELSE '--' END AS [RVP_REGION],
            PaycomData.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
            PaycomData.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
            PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS]                                                AS [STATUS],
            ADEmps.[AD_STATUS]                                                          AS [STATUS_AD],
            PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS]                                                AS [STATUS_PAYCOM],
            EmpDetails.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + EmpDetails.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]   AS [SUPERVISOR_NAME],
            PaycomData.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],
            EmpDetails.[WORK_EMAIL]                                                     AS [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL],
            Titles.[TITLE_KEY],
            Titles.[TITLE],
            PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP],
            ISNULL(SecurityOverrides.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION], '--')                   AS [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            Titles.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
            Titles.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            ISNULL(SecurityOverrides.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], Titles.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL]) AS [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
            Titles.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD],
            ISNULL(PaycomData.[POSITION], ADEmps.[AD_TITLE])                            AS [TITLE_OLDLOGIC],
            ADEmps.[AD_TITLE]                                                           AS [TITLE_AD],
            PaycomData.[POSITION]                                                       AS [TITLE_PAYCOM],
            PaycomData.[DOL_STATUS]                                                     AS [TYPE],
            PaycomData.[DOL_STATUS]                                                     AS [TYPE_PAYCOM],
            ADEmps.[AD_EMPLOYEE_TYPE]                                                   AS [TYPE_AD]

        FROM PaycomData
        INNER JOIN Properties      ON PaycomData.[PROPERTY_KEY]       = Properties.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN  ADEmps          ON ADEmps.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]          = PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN  Agents          ON Agents.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]          = PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN  Leases          ON PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]      = Leases.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN  EmpDetails      ON PaycomData.[SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE]= EmpDetails.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN  Titles          ON PaycomData.[POSITION]           = Titles.[TITLE]
        LEFT JOIN  SecurityOverrides ON PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]    = SecurityOverrides.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN  Emp_KEYS ON (
                (PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]      = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
                 AND PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
                 AND PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])
            OR  (PaycomData.[DATE_HIRED]         = Emp_KEYS.[DATE_HIRED]
                 AND PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
                 AND PaycomData.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])
        )
        LEFT JOIN  EntrataProps    ON EntrataProps.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]     = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN  TitleGroups     ON TitleGroups.[TITLE_GROUP]       = PaycomData.[TITLE_GROUP]
        LEFT JOIN  EntrataGroups   ON EntrataGroups.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]    = Emp_KEYS.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    ),

    FinalStream AS (
        SELECT * FROM Combo

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            0, '--', [DATE_KEY], '0000',
            '--','--','--','--','--',
            [DATE_ADDED],[DATEID_ADDED],[DATETIME_ADDED],[DATE_ID],
            [DATE_HIRED],[DATEID_HIRED],[DATETIME_HIRED],
            [DATE_REHIRED],[DATEID_REHIRED],[DATETIME_REHIRED],
            [DATE_TERMINATED],[DATEID_TERMINATED],[DATETIME_TERMINATED],
            '--','--','--','--',
            '--','--','--','--','--',
            '--','--',NULL,'--',
            0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,
            [FLAG_ACTIVE],[FLAG_ACTIVE_AD],[FLAG_CORPORATE],
            [FLAG_HAS_AD],[FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
            [FLAG_DECEASED],[FLAG_INACTIVE],[FLAG_NOT_HIRED],[FLAG_ON_LEAVE],[FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
            0,[FLAG_TEMPORARY],[FLAG_TERMINATED],[FLAG_REHIRED],
            [LEASE_COUNT_NEW],[LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL],[LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
            [LOAD_TYPE],'--','--','--','--',0,'--','--',
            '','---','','--',
            [PAYCOM_POSITION],'--',[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],[PREFERRED_LASTNAME],[PRONOUNS],
            [PROPERTY_GROUP],0,[PROPERTY_LIST_STATUS],'--',[PROPERTY_STATUS],
            [RAM_DESIGNATION],[RM_REGION],[ROLE_DESCRIPTION],0,'UNKNOWN',[RVP_REGION],
            0,'--','--',
            '--','--','--',
            '--','--', NULL,
            '--','--','--', NULL, '--', NULL, NULL, '--',
            '--','--','--',
            '--','--'
        FROM Combo
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1H1'
    ),

    add_security AS (
        SELECT
            F.*,
            0                                                                           AS [FLAG_CUSTOM_SECURITY],
            CASE WHEN F.[TITLE_AD] = F.[TITLE_PAYCOM] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END               AS [FLAG_TITLE_MATCH],
            CASE
                WHEN F.[PROPERTY_NAME] = 'UNDEFINED' THEN F.[DEPARTMENT]
                ELSE F.[PROPERTY_NAME]
            END                                                                         AS [PROPERTY_NAME_CLEAN],
            ISNULL(SL.[SECURITY_LEVEL], 999)                                           AS [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            SL.[SECURITY_GROUP],
            SL.[SECURITY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION]
        FROM FinalStream F
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[sync_tables].[SECURITY_LEVELS_BY_TITLE] SBT
            ON UPPER(F.[TITLE]) = UPPER(SBT.[TITLE])
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[sync_tables].[SECURITY_LEVELS] SL
            ON SBT.[SECURITY_LEVEL] = SL.[SECURITY_LEVEL]
    )

    -- ============================================================================

    -- ============================================================================

    WHERE [EMPLOYEE_KEY] IS NOT NULL;

    -- ============================================================================
    -- 3. LOAD: EMPLOYEE_0 (EMPLOYEE_F minus PRE-HIRE rows)

        [TYPE], [TYPE_PAYCOM], [TYPE_AD]
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
    WHERE [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE';

    -- ============================================================================
    -- 4. UPSERT: EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0 (key: EMPLOYEE_CODE)
    -- ============================================================================
    MERGE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_0] AS tgt
    USING (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
            [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
            [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
            [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> '0000'
    ) AS src ON tgt.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = src.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        tgt.[EMAIL]                        = src.[EMAIL],
        tgt.[FLAG_ACTIVE]                  = src.[FLAG_ACTIVE],
        tgt.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE]       = src.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
        tgt.[NAME_FIRST]                   = src.[NAME_FIRST],
        tgt.[NAME_FULL]                    = src.[NAME_FULL],
        tgt.[NAME_MIDDLE]                  = src.[NAME_MIDDLE],
        tgt.[NAME_LAST]                    = src.[NAME_LAST],
        tgt.[PROPERTY_KEY]                 = src.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        tgt.[PROPERTY_NAME]                = src.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        tgt.[TITLE_KEY]                    = src.[TITLE_KEY],
        tgt.[TITLE]                        = src.[TITLE],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP]                  = src.[TITLE_GROUP],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION]      = src.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY]              = src.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO]              = src.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL]   = src.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL],
        tgt.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD] = src.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
        [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_FULL], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [TITLE_KEY], [TITLE], [TITLE_GROUP], [TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
        [TITLE_GROUP_KEY], [TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], [TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
    ) VALUES (
        src.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], src.[EMAIL], src.[FLAG_ACTIVE], src.[FLAG_SECURITY_OVERRIDE],
        src.[NAME_FIRST], src.[NAME_FULL], src.[NAME_MIDDLE], src.[NAME_LAST],
        src.[PROPERTY_KEY], src.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        src.[TITLE_KEY], src.[TITLE], src.[TITLE_GROUP], src.[TITLE_GROUP_DESCRIPTION],
        src.[TITLE_GROUP_KEY], src.[TITLE_GROUP_LEO],
        src.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL], src.[TITLE_GROUP_SECURITY_LEVEL_OLD]
    );

END;

name: EMPLOYEE_KEYS_SP
description: INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7 into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_KEYS (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Copy_1_Employee_KEYS (EMPLOYEE_KEYS_ATL.txt)
--
-- Assigns EMPLOYEE_KEY values to employees from PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7.
-- NOT a Truncate/Load â€” existing rows are preserved.
--
-- Two paths:
--   PATH 1 (INSERT): New employees with no matching key in EMPLOYEE_KEYS.
--     Match key: EMPLOYEE_CODE + EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST + EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST + DATE_HIRED
--     New EMPLOYEE_KEY = MAX(EMPLOYEE_KEY) + ROW_NUMBER() (ATL: key_generation)
--     DATE_CREATED = today as YYYYMMDD int (ATL: to_char(sysdate(),'YYYYMMDD'))
--
--   PATH 2 (UPDATE): Existing employees already in EMPLOYEE_KEYS.
--     SET LOAD_TYPE = 'INCREMENTAL LOAD' WHERE EMPLOYEE_KEY matches.
--
-- Source:  WH_ODS.dbo.PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7
-- Target:  WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_KEYS (INSERT new rows + UPDATE existing LOAD_TYPE)
--
-- Column conversions from PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7:
--   DATE_HIRED  = CAST(SUBSTRING(Hire_Date,7,4)+SUBSTRING(Hire_Date,1,2)+SUBSTRING(Hire_Date,4,2) AS int)
--                 (varchar MM/DD/YYYY â†’ YYYYMMDD int, per ATL substr logic)
--   EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST = UPPER(Legal_Firstname)
--   EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST  = UPPER(Legal_Lastname)
--   EMPLOYEE_CODE       = UPPER(Employee_Code)
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Snapshot the current max key before any inserts.
    -- Equivalent to ATL key_generation('STAGING2.DBO.EMPLOYEE_KEYS','EMPLOYEE_KEY',1).
    DECLARE @MaxKey int;
    SELECT @MaxKey = ISNULL(MAX([EMPLOYEE_KEY]), 0) FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS];

    -- =====================================================================
    -- PATH 1: INSERT new employees (no matching record in EMPLOYEE_KEYS)
    -- =====================================================================
    ;WITH INBOUND AS (
        SELECT
            UPPER([Employee_Code])                                                    AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            UPPER([Legal_Firstname])                                                  AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            UPPER([Legal_Lastname])                                                   AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            CAST(
                SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 7, 4)
                + SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 1, 2)
                + SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 4, 2)
            AS int)                                                                   AS [DATE_HIRED]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7]
    ),
    NO_MATCH AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            [DATE_HIRED]
        FROM INBOUND i
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] ek
            WHERE  ek.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]       = i.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
              AND  ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = i.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
              AND  ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = i.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]
              AND  ek.[DATE_HIRED]          = i.[DATE_HIRED]
        )
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] (
        [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [DATE_HIRED],
        [LOAD_TYPE],
        [DATE_CREATED]
    )
    SELECT
        @MaxKey + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], [DATE_HIRED]),
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [DATE_HIRED],
        'INCREMENTAL LOAD',
        CAST(CONVERT(varchar(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS int)
    FROM NO_MATCH;

    -- =====================================================================
    -- PATH 2: UPDATE LOAD_TYPE for existing employees (match found)
    -- =====================================================================
    ;WITH INBOUND AS (
        SELECT
            UPPER([Employee_Code])                                                    AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            UPPER([Legal_Firstname])                                                  AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            UPPER([Legal_Lastname])                                                   AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            CAST(
                SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 7, 4)
                + SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 1, 2)
                + SUBSTRING([Hire_Date], 4, 2)
            AS int)                                                                   AS [DATE_HIRED]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_V7]
    )
    UPDATE ek
    SET ek.[LOAD_TYPE] = 'INCREMENTAL LOAD'
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] ek
    INNER JOIN INBOUND i
        ON  ek.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]       = i.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        AND ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST] = i.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
        AND ek.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]  = i.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]
        AND ek.[DATE_HIRED]          = i.[DATE_HIRED];

END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS_0];

    WITH Emps AS (
        SELECT EMPLOYEE_CODE, CATEGORY, DEPARTMENT, EMAIL,
               FLAG_TERMINATED, LOCATION, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST,
               PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEES]
        WHERE FLAG_TERMINATED = 0
    ),
    Yesterday AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, AY
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES]
        WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = -1
    ),
    Leases AS (
        SELECT LA.DATE_KEY, LA.AY, LA.PROPERTY_KEY,
               SUM(LA.FLAG_FALL_NEW) AS FLAG_FALL_NEW,
               SUM(LA.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL) AS FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL,
               SUM(LA.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM Yesterday Y
        INNER JOIN [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG] LA ON LA.DATE_KEY = Y.DATE_KEY AND LA.AY = Y.AY
        GROUP BY LA.DATE_KEY, LA.AY, LA.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    Properties AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
               BED_COUNT_CUSTOM AS BED_COUNT_CUSTOM_RENEWAL_BASE,
               [COUNT], ENTITY_NUMBER,
               RAM_EMP_CODE, RAM_NAME, RSM_EMP_CODE, RSM_NAME,
               RM_EMP_CODE, RM_NAME, RVP_EMP_CODE, RVP_NAME,
               FLAG_STABILIZED AS FLAG_NEW_DEV
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY]
        WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0 AND FLAG_RETAIL = 0
          AND LIST_STATUS = 'REPORTABLE' AND LIST_TYPE = 'STUDENT' AND LIST_MANAGED = 'MANAGED'
    ),
    BaseMetrics1 AS (
        SELECT CONVERT(INT, FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyyMMdd')) AS DATE_KEY,
               P.PROPERTY_KEY, P.PROPERTY_NAME,
               SUM(P.BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
               SUM(P.[COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(L.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL,
               P.RAM_EMP_CODE, P.RAM_NAME, P.RSM_EMP_CODE, P.RSM_NAME,
               P.RM_EMP_CODE, P.RM_NAME, P.RVP_EMP_CODE, P.RVP_NAME
        FROM Properties P
        LEFT JOIN Leases L ON P.PROPERTY_KEY = L.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY L.AY, P.PROPERTY_NAME, P.PROPERTY_KEY,
                 P.RM_EMP_CODE, P.RM_NAME, P.RVP_EMP_CODE, P.RVP_NAME,
                 P.RAM_EMP_CODE, P.RAM_NAME, P.RSM_EMP_CODE, P.RSM_NAME
    ),
    LEVEL_RVP AS (
        SELECT 'RVP' AS METRIC_LEVEL, RVP_EMP_CODE AS EMP_CODE,
               SUM(BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED, SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM BaseMetrics1 WHERE RVP_EMP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND RVP_EMP_CODE <> '0000'
        GROUP BY RVP_EMP_CODE
    ),
    LEVEL_RM AS (
        SELECT 'RM' AS METRIC_LEVEL, RM_EMP_CODE AS EMP_CODE,
               SUM(BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED, SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM BaseMetrics1 WHERE RM_EMP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND RM_EMP_CODE <> '0000'
        GROUP BY RM_EMP_CODE
    ),
    LEVEL_RMLS AS (
        SELECT 'RMLS' AS METRIC_LEVEL, RSM_EMP_CODE AS EMP_CODE,
               SUM(BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED, SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM BaseMetrics1 WHERE RSM_EMP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND RSM_EMP_CODE <> '0000'
        GROUP BY RSM_EMP_CODE
    ),
    LEVEL_RAM AS (
        SELECT 'RAM' AS METRIC_LEVEL, RAM_EMP_CODE AS EMP_CODE,
               SUM(BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED, SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM BaseMetrics1 WHERE RAM_EMP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND RAM_EMP_CODE <> '0000'
        GROUP BY RAM_EMP_CODE
    ),
    Calcs AS (
        SELECT METRIC_LEVEL, EMP_CODE, [COUNT],
               FLAG_FALL_TOTAL AS Complete_Leases,
               CAST(ROUND(CAST(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(BED_COUNT_COMPILED, 0) * 100, 1) AS VARCHAR(10)) + '%' AS [Complete_Leases_Pct]
        FROM (
            SELECT * FROM LEVEL_RVP UNION ALL SELECT * FROM LEVEL_RM
            UNION ALL SELECT * FROM LEVEL_RMLS UNION ALL SELECT * FROM LEVEL_RAM
        ) Merged
    ),
    Calcs_Property AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS Complete_Leases,
               CAST(ROUND(CAST(SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(BED_COUNT_COMPILED), 0) * 100, 1) AS VARCHAR(10)) + '%' AS [Complete_Leases_Pct]
        FROM BaseMetrics1
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    MetricColumns AS (
        SELECT CONVERT(INT, FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyyMMdd')) AS DATE_KEY,
               EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMAIL, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST,
               LOCATION, CATEGORY, DEPARTMENT, FLAG_TERMINATED,
               PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM Emps WHERE EMPLOYEE_CODE <> '0000'
    ),
    LoadFinal AS (
        SELECT MC.DATE_KEY, MC.EMPLOYEE_CODE, MC.EMAIL, MC.NAME_FIRST, MC.NAME_LAST,
               MC.LOCATION, MC.CATEGORY,
               COALESCE(C.[COUNT], CPr.[COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
               MC.DEPARTMENT, MC.FLAG_TERMINATED,
               MC.PROPERTY_KEY, MC.PROPERTY_NAME,
               COALESCE(C.METRIC_LEVEL, 'PROPERTY') AS METRIC_LEVEL,
               COALESCE(CAST(C.Complete_Leases AS VARCHAR(10)), CAST(CPr.Complete_Leases AS VARCHAR(10))) AS M_1,
               'Complete Leases' AS M_LABEL_1,
               COALESCE(C.[Complete_Leases_Pct], CPr.[Complete_Leases_Pct]) AS M_2,
               'Complete Lease %' AS M_LABEL_2
        FROM MetricColumns MC
        LEFT JOIN Calcs C ON C.EMP_CODE = MC.EMPLOYEE_CODE
        LEFT JOIN Calcs_Property CPr ON MC.PROPERTY_KEY = CPr.PROPERTY_KEY
    )

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS_0]
        ([DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
         [LOCATION], [CATEGORY], [COUNT], [DEPARTMENT], [FLAG_TERMINATED],
         [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [METRIC_LEVEL],
         [M_1], [M_LABEL_1], [M_2], [M_LABEL_2])
    SELECT DATE_KEY, EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMAIL, NAME_FIRST, NAME_LAST,
           LOCATION, CATEGORY, [COUNT], DEPARTMENT, FLAG_TERMINATED,
           PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, METRIC_LEVEL,
           M_1, M_LABEL_1, M_2, M_LABEL_2
    FROM LoadFinal;
END

name: EMPLOYEE_METRICS_SP

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS_SP]
AS
BEGIN

    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS] (
        [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
        [LOCATION], [CATEGORY], [PROPERTY_COUNT], [DEPARTMENT], [FLAG_TERMINATED],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [METRIC_LEVEL], [M], [M_LABEL],
        [M_1], [M_LABEL_1], [M_2], [M_LABEL_2], [M_3], [M_LABEL_3],
        [M_4], [M_LABEL_4], [M_5], [M_LABEL_5], [M_6], [M_LABEL_6],
        [M_7], [M_LABEL_7], [M_8], [M_LABEL_8], [M_9], [M_LABEL_9],
        [M_10], [M_LABEL_10]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
        [LOCATION], [CATEGORY], [COUNT], [DEPARTMENT], [FLAG_TERMINATED],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [METRIC_LEVEL], [M], [M_LABEL],
        [M_1], [M_LABEL_1], [M_2], [M_LABEL_2], [M_3], [M_LABEL_3],
        [M_4], [M_LABEL_4], [M_5], [M_LABEL_5], [M_6], [M_LABEL_6],
        [M_7], [M_LABEL_7], [M_8], [M_LABEL_8], [M_9], [M_LABEL_9],
        [M_10], [M_LABEL_10]
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS_0];
END

name: EMPLOYEE_PREHIRE_KEYS_SP
transformations: EMPLOYEE_KEY: CASE WHEN EK.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] IN (5, 6, 7) THEN NULL ELSE EK.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_ODS.dbo.PAYCOM_IMPORT_PREHIRE_US, WH_ODS.dbo.PAYCOM_IMPORT_PREHIRE_CANADA into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_KEYS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_PREHIRE_KEYS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Merge US + Canada prehire imports, conforming to the fields needed for key assignment.
    -- ATL sources (Excel files) replaced by WH_ODS staging tables.
    -- DATE_HIRE: convert Hire Date from MM/DD/YYYY varchar to YYYYMMDD int.
    WITH INBOUND AS (
        SELECT
            UPPER([Temp New Employee Code])                     AS EMPLOYEE_CODE,
            UPPER([Legal First Name])                           AS EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST,
            UPPER([Legal Last Name])                            AS EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST,
            CAST(
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 7, 4) +
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 1, 2) +
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 4, 2)
            AS INT)                                             AS DATE_HIRED,
            'PRE-HIRE'                                         AS LOAD_TYPE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_PREHIRE_US]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            UPPER([Temp New Employee Code]),
            UPPER([Legal First Name]),
            UPPER([Legal Last Name]),
            CAST(
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 7, 4) +
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 1, 2) +
                SUBSTRING([Hire Date], 4, 2)
            AS INT),
            'PRE-HIRE'
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_PREHIRE_CANADA]
    ),

    -- Left-join against the existing EMPLOYEE_KEYS table to detect pre-existing assignments.
    -- Sentinel keys 5/6/7 are treated as unassigned (nullified) per legacy ATL decode logic.
    LOOKUP AS (
        SELECT
            CASE WHEN EK.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] IN (5, 6, 7) THEN NULL
                 ELSE EK.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
            END                         AS EMPLOYEE_KEY,
            I.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
            I.EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST,
            I.EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST,
            I.DATE_HIRED,
            I.LOAD_TYPE
        FROM INBOUND I
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] EK
            ON  I.EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST  = EK.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST]
            AND I.EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST   = EK.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]
            AND (
                    I.DATE_HIRED        = EK.[DATE_HIRED]
                 OR EK.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]  = I.EMPLOYEE_CODE
                )
    ),

    -- Isolate new prehires: no key match, and have a valid EMPLOYEE_CODE.
    NO_MATCH AS (
        SELECT
            EMPLOYEE_CODE,
            EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST,
            EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST,
            DATE_HIRED,
            LOAD_TYPE,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_CODE, EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST, EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST
            ) AS RN
        FROM LOOKUP
        WHERE EMPLOYEE_KEY IS NULL
          AND EMPLOYEE_CODE IS NOT NULL
          AND EMPLOYEE_CODE <> ''
    )

    -- Assign new keys continuing from the current MAX (excluding sentinels 5/6/7).
    -- Append-only â€” no truncate; this is an incremental key assignment job.
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS] (
        [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [DATE_HIRED],
        [LOAD_TYPE],
        [DATE_CREATED]
    )
    SELECT
        NM.RN + BK.MAX_KEY                                  AS EMPLOYEE_KEY,
        NM.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
        NM.EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST,
        NM.EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST,
        NM.DATE_HIRED,
        NM.LOAD_TYPE,
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS INT)    AS DATE_CREATED
    FROM NO_MATCH NM
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT ISNULL(MAX([EMPLOYEE_KEY]), 0) AS MAX_KEY
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_KEYS]
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_KEY] NOT IN (5, 6, 7)
    ) BK;

END

name: EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0_SP
transformations: EMPLOYEE_CODE: CASE WHEN [COMPANY_USER_ID] = 222456 THEN 'A4O4' ELSE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] END
COMBO: CASE WHEN [20_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [20_E] ELSE '' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENTS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0 (EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0_ATL.txt)
--
-- Builds one row per Company_User_ID showing all property assignments for active employees.
-- The 20 ENTITY_NUMBER columns (1_E through 20_E) are pivoted from row-per-property
-- into a single wide row per user. COMBO is their comma-separated concatenation.
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F          (reportable properties)
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.AGENTS_0            (agent / company-user mapping)
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F          (active, non-pre-hire employees)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_COMPANY_USERS         (Entrata users, type=2 only)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_COMPANY_USER_PROPERTY_GROUPS  (user â†’ property group assignments)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_PROPERTY_GROUPS       (property group details, SYSTEM_CODE = Entrata property ID)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   ATL decode(COMPANY_USER_ID=222456,'A4O4',EMPLOYEE_CODE) â†’ CASE in Agents0 CTE
--   ATL gen_row_num_by_group(Company_User_ID) â†’ ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ENTITY_NUMBER)
--   ATL Reverse_Pivot (BucketNumber 1-20, axis=E) â†’ conditional MAX(CASE WHEN BucketNumber=N)
--   ATL Assembly COMBO concatenation â†’ ISNULL(1_E,'') + CASE WHEN 2_E IS NOT NULL THEN...
--   PropGroups.Property_ID = E_PROPERTY_GROUPS.SYSTEM_CODE joins to PROPERTY_GROUP_ID and LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0];

    ;WITH
    -- =====================================================================
    -- Properties: reportable properties from PROPERTY_F
    -- =====================================================================
    Properties AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [RM_NAME],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
            [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Agents0: AGENTS_0 with hardcoded EMPLOYEE_CODE fix for user 222456
    -- ATL: decode(AGENTS_0.COMPANY_USER_ID = 222456, 'A4O4', AGENTS_0.EMPLOYEE_CODE)
    -- =====================================================================
    Agents0 AS (
        SELECT
            [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            CASE WHEN [COMPANY_USER_ID] = 222456 THEN 'A4O4'
                 ELSE [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            END                     AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            [COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
            [EMPLOYEE_ID],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]
        FROM [dbo].[AGENTS_0]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- MaxID: one row per EMPLOYEE_CODE keeping the max COMPANY_USER_ID
    -- ATL: GROUP BY EMPLOYEE_CODE, SELECT max(COMPANY_USER_ID)
    -- =====================================================================
    MaxID AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([COMPANY_USER_ID]) AS [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        FROM Agents0
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Agents: deduplicated â€” only the max COMPANY_USER_ID row per employee
    -- ATL: AGENTS_0 INNER JOIN MaxID ON COMPANY_USER_ID
    -- =====================================================================
    Agents AS (
        SELECT
            a.[COMPANY_USER_ID],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            a.[COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            a.[COMPANY_USER_TYPE],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_ID],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]
        FROM Agents0 a
        INNER JOIN MaxID m ON a.[COMPANY_USER_ID] = m.[COMPANY_USER_ID]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Emps: active non-pre-hire employees from EMPLOYEE_F
    -- ATL: WHERE STATUS <> 'TERMINATED' AND LOAD_TYPE <> 'PRE-HIRE'
    -- =====================================================================
    Emps AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMAIL],
            LEN([EMAIL]) - 1            AS [EMAIL_1],
            [STATUS],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_LAST],
            [TITLE],
            [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE [STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED'
          AND [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Combo: main join producing one row per (user, property assignment)
    -- ATL join chain:
    --   E_COMPANY_USERS (type=2)
    --   INNER JOIN E_COMPANY_USER_PROPERTY_GROUPS ON COMPANY_USER_ID
    --   INNER JOIN E_PROPERTY_GROUPS ON SYSTEM_CODE = PROPERTY_GROUP_ID
    --   INNER JOIN Properties ON LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID = SYSTEM_CODE
    --   LEFT JOIN Agents ON COMPANY_USER_ID
    --   INNER JOIN Emps ON EMPLOYEE_CODE
    -- =====================================================================
    Combo AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            u.[ID]                              AS [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            u.[USERNAME]                        AS [USER_NAME],
            a.[COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]                   AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE_1],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            a.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            TRY_CAST(pg.[SYSTEM_CODE] AS int)   AS [PROPERTY_ID],
            pg.[NAME]                           AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[TITLE],
            e.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS] u
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USER_PROPERTY_GROUPS] cupg
            ON cupg.[COMPANY_USER_ID] = u.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_GROUPS] pg
            ON TRY_CAST(pg.[SYSTEM_CODE] AS int) = cupg.[PROPERTY_GROUP_ID]
        INNER JOIN Properties p
            ON p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] = TRY_CAST(pg.[SYSTEM_CODE] AS int)
        LEFT JOIN Agents a
            ON a.[COMPANY_USER_ID] = u.[ID]
        INNER JOIN Emps e
            ON e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = a.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        WHERE u.[COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID] = 2
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- EmpCodePresent: filter null employee codes and excluded title patterns
    -- ATL: WHERE EMPLOYEE_CODE_1 IS NOT NULL AND NOT(TITLE LIKE '...')
    -- =====================================================================
    EmpCodePresent AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM Combo
        WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE_1] IS NOT NULL
          AND [TITLE] NOT LIKE '%NATIONAL OPERATIONS SPECIALIST%'
          AND [TITLE] NOT LIKE '%NATIONAL LEASING SPECIALIST%'
          AND [TITLE] NOT LIKE '%MARKETING COMMUNICATIONS MANAGER%'
          AND [TITLE] NOT LIKE '%REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT%'
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Numbered: assign bucket numbers per Company_User_ID
    -- ATL: gen_row_num_by_group(Company_User_ID) ordered by ENTITY_NUMBER
    -- =====================================================================
    Numbered AS (
        SELECT
            *,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY [COMPANY_USER_ID]
                ORDER BY [ENTITY_NUMBER]
            ) AS [BucketNumber]
        FROM EmpCodePresent
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Pivoted: spread ENTITY_NUMBERs into columns 1_E through 20_E
    -- ATL: BODS Reverse_Pivot transform (axis=BucketNumber, pivot_column=E/ENTITY_NUMBER)
    -- =====================================================================
    Pivoted AS (
        SELECT
            [COMPANY_USER_ID],
            MAX([COMPANY_USERS_NAME])                                        AS [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
            MAX([EMPLOYEE_CODE_1])                                           AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE_1],
            MAX([EMPLOYEE_CODE])                                             AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            MAX([EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST])                                       AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            MAX([EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST])                                        AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            MAX([USER_NAME])                                                 AS [USER_NAME],
            MAX([TITLE])                                                     AS [TITLE],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 1  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [1_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 2  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [2_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 3  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [3_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 4  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [4_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 5  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [5_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 6  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [6_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 7  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [7_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 8  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [8_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 9  THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [9_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 10 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [10_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 11 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [11_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 12 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [12_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 13 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [13_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 14 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [14_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 15 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [15_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 16 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [16_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 17 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [17_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 18 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [18_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 19 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [19_E],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [BucketNumber] = 20 THEN [ENTITY_NUMBER] END)     AS [20_E]
        FROM Numbered
        GROUP BY [COMPANY_USER_ID]
    )

    -- =====================================================================
    -- INSERT: Assembly â€” COMBO is comma-separated ENTITY_NUMBERs
    -- ATL: "1_E" || decode(2_E IS NOT NULL, COMMA||2_E, '') || ...
    -- =====================================================================
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0] (
        [COMPANY_USER_ID],
        [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE_1],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [USER_NAME],
        [TITLE],
        [COMBO],
        [1_E],  [2_E],  [3_E],  [4_E],  [5_E],
        [6_E],  [7_E],  [8_E],  [9_E],  [10_E],
        [11_E], [12_E], [13_E], [14_E], [15_E],
        [16_E], [17_E], [18_E], [19_E], [20_E]
    )
    SELECT
        [COMPANY_USER_ID],
        [COMPANY_USERS_NAME],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE_1],
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
        [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
        [USER_NAME],
        [TITLE],
        ISNULL([1_E], '')
        + CASE WHEN [2_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [2_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [3_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [3_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [4_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [4_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [5_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [5_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [6_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [6_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [7_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [7_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [8_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [8_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [9_E]  IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [9_E]  ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [10_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [10_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [11_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [11_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [12_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [12_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [13_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [13_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [14_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [14_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [15_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [15_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [16_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [16_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [17_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [17_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [18_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [18_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [19_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [19_E] ELSE '' END
        + CASE WHEN [20_E] IS NOT NULL THEN ', ' + [20_E] ELSE '' END
                                                                        AS [COMBO],
        [1_E],  [2_E],  [3_E],  [4_E],  [5_E],
        [6_E],  [7_E],  [8_E],  [9_E],  [10_E],
        [11_E], [12_E], [13_E], [14_E], [15_E],
        [16_E], [17_E], [18_E], [19_E], [20_E]
    FROM Pivoted;

END

name: EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES_SP
transformations: LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3: CASE WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LOCATION_GROUP: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE' ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME] END

SECURITY_LEVEL: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10E' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0VV' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10B' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A14Q' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SH' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10C' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SF' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10J' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1FY' THEN 19 WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 ELSE [SECURITY_LEVEL] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES];

        -- 2. Processing Logic
        WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                P.[ADDRESS_1],
                P.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                P.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                P.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                E.[EMAIL],
                E.[DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PROPERTY MAN%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%ASSISTANT MAN%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%REGIONAL%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%PRESIDENT%' OR UPPER(E.[TITLE]) LIKE '%DIRECTOR%' THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
                P.[PM_EMAIL],
                P.[RM_EMAIL],
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'CORPORATE'
                    ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION_GROUP],
                E.[NAME_FIRST],
                E.[NAME_LAST],
                E.[FLAG_CORPORATE],
                E.[SECURITY_LEVEL],
                P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_MANAGED],
                P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] E 
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE 
                -- LOGIC UPDATE: Derived Active Flags
                (
                   (P.[FLAG_ACTIVE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1) -- Equiv: FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL
                   OR 
                   (P.[FLAG_ACTIVE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1)      -- Equiv: FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT
                   OR 
                   P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1
                )
                AND 
                (
                    E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NULL 
                    OR 
                    (E.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' AND E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE')
                )
        ),
        CTE_Security AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                [LOCATION],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                [EMAIL],
                [DEPARTMENT],
                [TITLE],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
                [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10E' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0VV' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10B' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A14Q' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SH' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10C' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0SF' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10J' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A1FY' THEN 19
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0ZT' THEN 1 
                    ELSE [SECURITY_LEVEL]
                END AS [SECURITY_LEVEL],
                [FLAG_CORPORATE]
            FROM CTE_Emps1
            WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IS NOT NULL
        )
        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SECURITY_ROLES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
            [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [EMAIL],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [TITLE],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_1],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_2],
            [FLAG_SECURITY_ROLE_3],
            [SECURITY_LEVEL],
            [FLAG_CORPORATE]
        FROM CTE_Security;
END;

name: EMPLOYEE_SOFT_TERMINATIONS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_SOFT_TERMINATIONS.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SOFT_TERMINATIONS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SOFT_TERMINATIONS];

    DECLARE @Today INT = DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE), CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE));

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_SOFT_TERMINATIONS] (
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
        [FLAG_SOFT_TERMINATION], [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TODAY]
    )
    SELECT
        E.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
        E.NAME_FIRST,
        E.NAME_LAST,
        CASE WHEN E.EMPLOYEE_CODE IN ('A1G3','A5IH','A5DQ','A57H','A5KH','A4J4','A5C8','A4JT','A1A4','A53H','A10C') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
        E.DATE_TERMINATED,
        E.DATEID_TERMINATED,
        @Today
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] E
    WHERE E.FLAG_TERMINATED = 1
      AND E.LOAD_TYPE <> 'PRE-HIRE'
      AND (
          -- Recent terminations (within 20 days)
          E.DATEID_TERMINATED >= (@Today - 20)
          -- OR soft termination employees (kept indefinitely)
          OR E.EMPLOYEE_CODE IN ('A1G3','A5IH','A5DQ','A57H','A5KH','A4J4','A5C8','A4JT','A1A4','A53H','A10C')
      );
END

name: EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASES_F, WH_ODS.dbo.E_COMPANY_USERS into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0];

    WITH Leases AS (
        SELECT LEASING_AGENT_ID,
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_NEW) AS FLAG_FALL_NEW,
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL) AS FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL,
               SUM(FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F]
        WHERE DATE_APPROVED >= 20190801
          AND FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0
          AND FLAG_FALL_TOTAL > 0
        GROUP BY LEASING_AGENT_ID
    ),
    CompanyUsers AS (
        SELECT EF.EMPLOYEE_KEY,
               ECE.ID AS ENTRATA_EMPLOYEE_ID,
               ECU.ID AS ENTRATA_USER_ID,
               EF.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
               ECU.CID AS ENTRATA_CID,
               ECE.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS ENTRATA_EMAIL_ADDRESS,
               ECU.USERNAME AS ENTRATA_USERNAME,
               ECE.NAME_FIRST AS ENTRATA_NAME_FIRST,
               ECE.NAME_LAST AS ENTRATA_NAME_LAST,
               ECE.NAME_MIDDLE AS ENTRATA_NAME_MIDDLE,
               L.FLAG_FALL_NEW, L.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL, L.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USERS] ECU
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_USER_TYPES] ECUT ON ECUT.ID = ECU.COMPANY_USER_TYPE_ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_COMPANY_EMPLOYEES] ECE ON ECU.COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID = ECE.ID
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] EF
            ON (ECE.NAME_FIRST = EF.NAME_FIRST AND ECE.NAME_LAST = EF.NAME_LAST AND ECE.EMAIL_ADDRESS = EF.EMAIL)
            OR (ECE.EMAIL_ADDRESS = EF.EMAIL)
            OR (ECE.NAME_FIRST = EF.NAME_FIRST AND ECE.NAME_LAST = EF.NAME_LAST)
        LEFT JOIN Leases L ON ECE.ID = L.LEASING_AGENT_ID
        WHERE EF.FLAG_TERMINATED = 0
          AND EF.LOAD_TYPE <> 'PRE-HIRE'
    ),
    usID AS (
        SELECT EMPLOYEE_KEY, ENTRATA_EMPLOYEE_ID AS ENTRATA_US_EMPLOYEE_ID,
               ENTRATA_USER_ID AS ENTRATA_US_USER_ID, ENTRATA_USERNAME
        FROM CompanyUsers WHERE ENTRATA_CID = 15647
    ),
    cnID AS (
        SELECT EMPLOYEE_KEY, ENTRATA_EMPLOYEE_ID AS ENTRATA_CN_EMPLOYEE_ID,
               ENTRATA_USER_ID AS ENTRATA_CN_USER_ID, ENTRATA_USERNAME
        FROM CompanyUsers WHERE ENTRATA_CID = 19756
    ),
    COMBO AS (
        SELECT CU.EMPLOYEE_KEY, CU.EMPLOYEE_CODE,
               ISNULL(SUM(CU.FLAG_FALL_NEW), 0) AS EMP_LEASE_COUNT_NEW,
               ISNULL(SUM(CU.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL), 0) AS EMP_LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL,
               ISNULL(SUM(CU.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL), 0) AS EMP_LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL,
               MAX(CN.ENTRATA_CN_EMPLOYEE_ID) AS ENTRATA_CN_EMPLOYEE_ID,
               MAX(CN.ENTRATA_CN_USER_ID) AS ENTRATA_CN_USER_ID,
               MAX(CN.ENTRATA_USERNAME) AS ENTRATA_CN_USERNAME,
               MAX(US.ENTRATA_US_EMPLOYEE_ID) AS ENTRATA_US_EMPLOYEE_ID,
               MAX(US.ENTRATA_US_USER_ID) AS ENTRATA_US_USER_ID,
               MAX(US.ENTRATA_USERNAME) AS ENTRATA_US_USERNAME,
               MAX(CU.ENTRATA_NAME_FIRST) AS ENTRATA_NAME_FIRST,
               MAX(CU.ENTRATA_NAME_LAST) AS ENTRATA_NAME_LAST
        FROM CompanyUsers CU
        LEFT JOIN usID US ON US.EMPLOYEE_KEY = CU.EMPLOYEE_KEY
        LEFT JOIN cnID CN ON CN.EMPLOYEE_KEY = CU.EMPLOYEE_KEY
        GROUP BY CU.EMPLOYEE_KEY, CU.EMPLOYEE_CODE
    )

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_AGENTS_0]
        (EMPLOYEE_KEY, EMPLOYEE_CODE,
         EMP_LEASE_COUNT_NEW, EMP_LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL, EMP_LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL,
         ENTRATA_CN_EMPLOYEE_ID, ENTRATA_CN_USER_ID, ENTRATA_CN_USERNAME,
         ENTRATA_US_EMPLOYEE_ID, ENTRATA_US_USER_ID, ENTRATA_US_USERNAME,
         ENTRATA_NAME_FIRST, ENTRATA_NAME_LAST)
    SELECT EMPLOYEE_KEY, EMPLOYEE_CODE,
           EMP_LEASE_COUNT_NEW, EMP_LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL, EMP_LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL,
           ENTRATA_CN_EMPLOYEE_ID, ENTRATA_CN_USER_ID, ENTRATA_CN_USERNAME,
           ENTRATA_US_EMPLOYEE_ID, ENTRATA_US_USER_ID, ENTRATA_US_USERNAME,
           ENTRATA_NAME_FIRST, ENTRATA_NAME_LAST
    FROM COMBO;
END
