CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
        ([ID], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [DATE_END], [DATE_START], [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
         [FLAG_ACTIVE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST], [ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
         [ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP], [TYPE])
    SELECT
        e.[ID], e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY], e.[DATE_END], e.[DATE_START], e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
        e.[FLAG_ACTIVE], e.[NAME_FIRST], e.[NAME_LAST], e.[ENTRATA_PERMISSION_GROUP],
        e.[ENTRATA_DEPARTMENT], e.[ENTRATA_PROPERTY_GROUP], e.[TYPE]
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS] e
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_KEY], MAX([ID]) AS [MAX_ID]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_GROUP_ASSIGNMENTS]
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    ) mx ON mx.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] = e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] AND mx.[MAX_ID] = e.[ID];
END

name: EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0_SP
transformations: ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS: CASE WHEN [CORP_DEPT_DESC] = 'CANADA CORPORATE' THEN '170,171,172,173,174,175' ELSE [COMBO] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0.
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Emp_Entrata_Property_Assignments_0
--
-- Target:
--   EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0  (Truncate/Load â€” WH_STAGING.dbo)
--
-- Sources:
--   PROPERTY_F                  (WH_STAGING.dbo)
--   EMPLOYEE_F                  (WH_STAGING.dbo)
--   EMP_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS    (WH_STAGING.sync_tables â€” remapped from DB_App_Support)
--
-- ATL conversions:
--   ||                                      -> +
--   decode(cond, t, f)                      -> CASE WHEN cond THEN t ELSE f END
--   gen_row_num_by_group(col)               -> ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY col ...)
--   CALL TRANSFORM Reverse_Pivot + Assembly -> STRING_AGG(... , ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ...)
--   __SAP_LEFT_OUTER_JOIN                   -> LEFT JOIN
--   __SAP_INNER_JOIN                        -> INNER JOIN
--   LOAD TABLE (drop/recreate + append)     -> TRUNCATE + INSERT

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0];

    ;WITH
    -- Groups: non-dispositioned, non-retail properties
    Groups AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [PROPERTY_GROUP],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [RM_EMP_CODE],
            [RAM_EMP_CODE],
            [RSM_EMP_CODE],
            [RVP_EMP_CODE]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND [FLAG_RETAIL] = 0
    ),

    -- Emps: active (non-terminated) employees
    Emps AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [NAME_FULL],
            [PROPERTY_GROUP],
            [CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            [TITLE_GROUP]
        FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE [STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED'
    ),

    -- Combo: employees matched to groups via PROPERTY_GROUP (excludes REGIONAL MANAGER)
    Combo AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            g.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            e.[NAME_FULL],
            e.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM Emps e
        LEFT JOIN Groups g ON e.[PROPERTY_GROUP] = g.[PROPERTY_GROUP]
        WHERE g.[ENTITY_NUMBER] IS NOT NULL
          AND e.[TITLE_GROUP] <> 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
    ),

    -- RAM: Regional Area Managers matched via RAM_EMP_CODE
    RAM AS (
        SELECT
            g.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            e.[NAME_FULL],
            e.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM Emps e
        INNER JOIN Groups g ON e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = g.[RAM_EMP_CODE]
        WHERE e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] > 0
    ),

    -- RM: Regional Managers matched via RM_EMP_CODE
    RM AS (
        SELECT
            g.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            e.[NAME_FULL],
            e.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM Emps e
        INNER JOIN Groups g ON e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = g.[RM_EMP_CODE]
        WHERE e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] > 0
    ),

    -- RSM: Regional Senior Managers matched via RSM_EMP_CODE
    RSM AS (
        SELECT
            g.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            e.[NAME_FULL],
            e.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM Emps e
        INNER JOIN Groups g ON e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = g.[RSM_EMP_CODE]
        WHERE e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] > 0
    ),

    -- RVP: Regional Vice Presidents matched via RVP_EMP_CODE
    RVP AS (
        SELECT
            g.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            e.[NAME_FULL],
            e.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM Emps e
        INNER JOIN Groups g ON e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = g.[RVP_EMP_CODE]
        WHERE e.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] > 0
    ),

    -- DirectAssignments: explicit assignments from sync_tables (remapped from DB_App_Support)
    DirectAssignments AS (
        SELECT
            epa.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            epa.[EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            epa.[NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + epa.[NAME_LAST]  AS [NAME_FULL],
            ef.[CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM [sync_tables].[EMP_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS] epa
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] ef ON ef.[EMPLOYEE_KEY] = epa.[EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    ),

    -- AllAssignments: UNION ALL of all six sources
    AllAssignments AS (
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM Combo
        UNION ALL
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM DirectAssignments
        UNION ALL
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM RAM
        UNION ALL
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM RM
        UNION ALL
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM RSM
        UNION ALL
        SELECT [ENTITY_NUMBER], [EMPLOYEE_KEY], [NAME_FULL], [CORP_DEPT_DESC] FROM RVP
    ),

    -- Dedup before aggregation
    DistinctAssignments AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            [NAME_FULL],
            [CORP_DEPT_DESC]
        FROM AllAssignments
    ),

    -- Assembly: aggregate entity numbers per employee into comma-separated string
    -- Replaces ATL Reverse_Pivot + Assembly (gen_row_num_by_group + decode concatenation)
    Assembly AS (
        SELECT
            [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
            MAX([NAME_FULL])                                                             AS [NAME_FULL],
            MAX([CORP_DEPT_DESC])                                                        AS [CORP_DEPT_DESC],
            STRING_AGG([ENTITY_NUMBER], ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY [ENTITY_NUMBER])   AS [COMBO]
        FROM DistinctAssignments
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_KEY]
    )

    -- Load target
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[EMP_ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0] (
        [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
        [NAME_FULL],
        [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
    )
    SELECT
        [EMPLOYEE_KEY],
        [NAME_FULL],
        CASE WHEN [CORP_DEPT_DESC] = 'CANADA CORPORATE'
             THEN '170,171,172,173,174,175'
             ELSE [COMBO]
        END AS [ENTRATA_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS]
    FROM Assembly;

END

name: FEES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVALS into WH_STAGING.dbo.FEES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FEES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Truncate Target
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FEES_0];

    -- Step 2: Transform and Load
    WITH [Scheduled_Raw_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
            SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT],
            ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MONTH, SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE], ISNULL(SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE], LI.[LEASE_END_DATETIME])) + 1, 1) AS [Duration]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
        LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] LI ON SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[ID]
        WHERE SC.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
    ),

    [Scheduled_Agg_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155018 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_ACCEL_RENT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155018 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_ACCEL_RENT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (154774,155162,155132,155110) THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_DEPOSIT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (154774,155162,155132,155110) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_DEPOSIT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155008 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_DOUBLE_UP_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155008 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_DOUBLE_UP_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155019 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_FINAL_ACCEL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155019 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_FINAL_ACCEL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155054 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_FURNITURE_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155054 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_FURNITURE_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155069 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_REFERRAL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155069 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_REFERRAL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155052,155116,155562,155385) THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PARKING_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155052,155116,155562,155385) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PARKING_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155034 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PET_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155034 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PET_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155092 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PET_DEP_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155092 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PET_DEP_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155102 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PROP_PROT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155102 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_PROP_PROT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155017 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_REASSIGN_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155017 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_REASSIGN_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155009 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RENT_DISC_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155009 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RENT_DISC_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155058 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_CAM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155058 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_CAM_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155084 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_ELEC_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155084 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_ELEC_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155062 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_GAS_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155062 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_GAS_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155107 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_INS_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155107 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_INS_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155156 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_LATE_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155156 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_LATE_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155059 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_TAX_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155059 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_TAX_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155056 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_RENT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155056 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_RENT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155135 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_BILL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155135 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_BILL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155086 THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_WATER_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155086 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_RET_WATER_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155089,154778,155006,155002,155003,155004) THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_SHORT_PREM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155089,154778,155006,155002,155003,155004) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_SHORT_PREM_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155021,155152) THEN [CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration] ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_TELECOM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155021,155152) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [SCH_TELECOM_CNT]
        FROM [Scheduled_Raw_CTE]
        GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    ),

    [Booked_Agg_CTE] AS (
        SELECT
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155018 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_ACCEL_RENT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155018 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_ACCEL_RENT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (154774,155162,155132,155110) THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_DEPOSIT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (154774,155162,155132,155110) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_DEPOSIT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155008 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_DOUBLE_UP_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155008 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_DOUBLE_UP_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155019 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_FINAL_ACCEL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155019 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_FINAL_ACCEL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155054 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_FURNITURE_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155054 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_FURNITURE_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155069 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_REFERRAL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155069 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_REFERRAL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155052,155116) THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PARKING_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155052,155116) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PARKING_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155034 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PET_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155034 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PET_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155092 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PET_DEP_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155092 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PET_DEP_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155102 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PROP_PROT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155102 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_PROP_PROT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155017 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_REASSIGN_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155017 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_REASSIGN_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155009 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RENT_DISC_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155009 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RENT_DISC_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155058 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_CAM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155058 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_CAM_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155084 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_ELEC_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155084 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_ELEC_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155062 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_GAS_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155062 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_GAS_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155107 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_INS_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155107 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_INS_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155156 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_LATE_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155156 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_LATE_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155059 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_TAX_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155059 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_TAX_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155056 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_RENT_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155056 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_RENT_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155135 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_BILL_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155135 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_BILL_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155086 THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_WATER_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] = 155086 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_RET_WATER_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155089,154778,155006,155002,155003,155004) THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_SHORT_PREM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155089,154778,155006,155002,155003,155004) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_SHORT_PREM_CNT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155021,155152) THEN [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_TELECOM_AMT],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [AR_CODE_ID] IN (155021,155152) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [BK_TELECOM_CNT]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [IS_REVERSAL] = '0'
          AND [AR_PAYMENT_ID] IS NULL
          AND [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NULL
          AND [AR_TRIGGER_ID] NOT IN (701,706)
          AND [IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT] = '0'
          AND [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 1
        GROUP BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FEES_0]
    SELECT
        LI.[ID] AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_ACCEL_RENT_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_ACCEL_RENT_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_ACCEL_RENT_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_ACCEL_RENT_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_DEPOSIT_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_DEPOSIT_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_DEPOSIT_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_DEPOSIT_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_DOUBLE_UP_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_DOUBLE_UP_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_DOUBLE_UP_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_DOUBLE_UP_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_FINAL_ACCEL_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_FINAL_ACCEL_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_FINAL_ACCEL_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_FINAL_ACCEL_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_FURNITURE_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_FURNITURE_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_FURNITURE_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_FURNITURE_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_REFERRAL_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_REFERRAL_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_REFERRAL_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_REFERRAL_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PARKING_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PARKING_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PARKING_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PARKING_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PET_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PET_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PET_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PET_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PET_DEP_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PET_DEP_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PET_DEP_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PET_DEP_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PROP_PROT_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PROP_PROT_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_PROP_PROT_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_PROP_PROT_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_REASSIGN_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_REASSIGN_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_REASSIGN_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_REASSIGN_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RENT_DISC_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RENT_DISC_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RENT_DISC_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RENT_DISC_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_CAM_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_CAM_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_CAM_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_CAM_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_ELEC_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_ELEC_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_ELEC_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_ELEC_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_GAS_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_GAS_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_GAS_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_GAS_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_INS_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_INS_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_INS_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_INS_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_LATE_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_LATE_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_LATE_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_LATE_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_TAX_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_TAX_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_TAX_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_TAX_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_RENT_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_RENT_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_RENT_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_RENT_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_BILL_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_BILL_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_BILL_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_BILL_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_WATER_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_WATER_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_RET_WATER_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_RET_WATER_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_SHORT_PREM_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_SHORT_PREM_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_SHORT_PREM_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_SHORT_PREM_CNT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_TELECOM_AMT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_TELECOM_AMT],0),
        ISNULL(SCH.[SCH_TELECOM_CNT],0) + ISNULL(BK.[BK_TELECOM_CNT],0)
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] LI
    LEFT JOIN [Scheduled_Agg_CTE] SCH ON SCH.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [Booked_Agg_CTE] BK ON BK.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[ID];

END;

name: FLOORPLANS_0_PRECURSOR_SP

name: FLOORPLANS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_REPORTABLE: CASE WHEN f.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_0, WH_ODS.dbo.E_UNIT_TYPES into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0_SP]
(
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @RunDate DATE = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @AuditTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @MaxKey INT = 0;

    SELECT @MaxKey = ISNULL(MAX([FLOORPLAN_KEY]), 0) FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0];

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Stage_Transform') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Stage_Transform;

    WITH CTE_Types AS (
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID],
            MAX([NAME]) AS [TYPE_NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES]
        WHERE [DELETED_ON] IS NULL
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID]
    ),
    CTE_Combo AS (
        SELECT 
            ISNULL(f.[NUMBER_OF_BATHROOMS], 0) AS [BATHROOMS],
            ISNULL(f.[NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS], 0) AS [BEDROOMS],
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), f.[CREATED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_CREATED],
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), f.[DELETED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_DELETED],
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), f.[UPDATED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_UPDATED],
            ISNULL(f.[MAX_DEPOSIT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_MAX],
            ISNULL(f.[MIN_DEPOSIT], 0.00) AS [DEPOSIT_MIN],
            f.[ALLOWS_CATS] AS [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED],
            f.[ALLOWS_DOGS] AS [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED],
            f.[IS_FEATURED] AS [FLAG_FEATURED],
            f.[IS_MANUAL_DEPOSIT_RANGE] AS [FLAG_MANUAL_DEPOSIT_RANGE],
            f.[IS_MANUAL_RENT_RANGE] AS [FLAG_MANUAL_RENT_RANGE],
            f.[IS_PUBLISHED] AS [FLAG_PUBLISHED],
            CASE WHEN f.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            f.[HAS_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_TERMS] AS [FLAG_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_TERMS],
            f.[IS_DISABLED_VIRTUAL_MOVE_IN] AS [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN t.[TYPE_NAME] IS NULL THEN 'DELETED TYPE' 
                ELSE f.[FLOORPLAN_NAME] 
            END AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [FLOORPLAN],
            CAST(CASE 
                WHEN p.[PROPERTY_KEY] = 9744 THEN f.[FLOORPLAN_NAME]
                ELSE ISNULL(t.[TYPE_NAME], f.[FLOORPLAN_NAME])
            END AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            f.[ID] AS [FLOORPLAN_ID],
            p.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW] AS [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
            p.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] AS [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
            p.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] AS [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            f.[PROPERTY_ID],
            p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            ISNULL(f.[MAX_RENT], 0.00) AS [RENT_MAX],
            ISNULL(f.[MIN_RENT], 0.00) AS [RENT_MIN],
            CAST('ENTRATA' AS VARCHAR(10)) AS [SOURCE_SYSTEM]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_FLOORPLANS] f
        JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] p 
            ON f.[PROPERTY_ID] = p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        LEFT JOIN CTE_Types t 
            ON f.[ID] = t.[PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID]
        WHERE p.[SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA' 
          AND p.[PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1109
    )
    SELECT * INTO #Stage_Transform FROM CTE_Combo;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Final_Upsert') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Final_Upsert;

    SELECT 
        SRC.*,
        ISNULL(TGT.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], NULL) AS [EXISTING_KEY]
    INTO #Final_Upsert
    FROM #Stage_Transform SRC
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0] TGT
        ON SRC.[FLOORPLAN_ID] = TGT.[FLOORPLAN_ID];

    ;WITH NewRows AS (
        SELECT [FLOORPLAN_ID], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY [FLOORPLAN_ID]) AS Rn
        FROM #Final_Upsert
        WHERE [EXISTING_KEY] IS NULL
    )
    UPDATE T
    SET [EXISTING_KEY] = @MaxKey + N.Rn
    FROM #Final_Upsert T
    JOIN NewRows N ON T.[FLOORPLAN_ID] = N.[FLOORPLAN_ID];

    MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0] AS TGT
    USING #Final_Upsert AS SRC
    ON (TGT.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = SRC.[EXISTING_KEY])

    WHEN MATCHED THEN
        UPDATE SET 
            TGT.[BATHROOMS]      = SRC.[BATHROOMS],
            TGT.[BEDROOMS]       = SRC.[BEDROOMS],
            TGT.[DATE_UPDATED]   = SRC.[DATE_UPDATED],
            TGT.[DATE_DELETED]   = SRC.[DATE_DELETED],
            TGT.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = SRC.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            TGT.[FLOORPLAN]      = SRC.[FLOORPLAN],
            TGT.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = SRC.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            TGT.[LASTUPDATED]    = @AuditTime

    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_DELETED], 
            [DATE_UPDATED], [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN], [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], 
            [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED], [FLAG_MANUAL_DEPOSIT_RANGE], 
            [FLAG_MANUAL_RENT_RANGE], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE], 
            [FLAG_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_TERMS], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], 
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID], [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
            [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
            [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], 
            [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        VALUES (
            SRC.[EXISTING_KEY], SRC.[BATHROOMS], SRC.[BEDROOMS], SRC.[DATE_CREATED], SRC.[DATE_DELETED], 
            SRC.[DATE_UPDATED], SRC.[DEPOSIT_MAX], SRC.[DEPOSIT_MIN], SRC.[FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], 
            SRC.[FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], SRC.[FLAG_FEATURED], SRC.[FLAG_MANUAL_DEPOSIT_RANGE], 
            SRC.[FLAG_MANUAL_RENT_RANGE], SRC.[FLAG_PUBLISHED], SRC.[FLAG_REPORTABLE], 
            SRC.[FLAG_SPACE_CONFIGURATION_TERMS], SRC.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], 
            SRC.[FLOORPLAN], SRC.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], SRC.[FLOORPLAN_ID], SRC.[PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
            SRC.[PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], SRC.[PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
            SRC.[PROPERTY_ID], SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY], SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME], SRC.[RENT_MAX], 
            SRC.[RENT_MIN], SRC.[SOURCE_SYSTEM], @AuditTime
        );

    DROP TABLE #Stage_Transform;
    DROP TABLE #Final_Upsert;
END;

name: FLOORPLANS_1_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_1.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLANS_1_SP]
(
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @RunDate DATE = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @AuditTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

    -- 1. TRUNCATE Target
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_1];

    -- 2. INSERT with Logic
    -- ATL Logic: Group By ID, Property -> Max(Key). Join back on Key.
    -- T-SQL Logic: ROW_NUMBER() Partition By ID, Property Order By Key DESC. Select RN=1.
    
    WITH CTE_Dedupe AS (
        SELECT 
            s.*,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY s.[FLOORPLAN_ID], s.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                ORDER BY s.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] DESC
            ) AS [RN]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0] s
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_1] (
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [COUNT], [DATE_CREATED], 
        [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN], 
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], 
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], [FLOORPLAN], 
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID], [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
        [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
        [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], 
        [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT 
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], 
        [BATHROOMS], 
        [BEDROOMS], 
        1 AS [COUNT], -- Hardcoded per ATL
        [DATE_CREATED], 
        [DATE_DELETED], 
        [DATE_UPDATED], 
        [DEPOSIT_MAX], 
        [DEPOSIT_MIN], 
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], 
        [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], 
        [FLAG_FEATURED], 
        [FLAG_PUBLISHED], 
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE], 
        [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], 
        [FLOORPLAN], 
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE], 
        [FLOORPLAN_ID], 
        [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
        [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], 
        [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
        [PROPERTY_ID], 
        [PROPERTY_KEY], 
        [PROPERTY_NAME], 
        [RENT_MAX], 
        [RENT_MIN], 
        [SOURCE_SYSTEM], 
        @AuditTime
    FROM CTE_Dedupe
    WHERE [RN] = 1; -- Keep only the Max Key per group

END;

name: FLOORPLANS_F_SP
transformations: FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN AF.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.UNITS_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ATL: loader_drop_and_create_table=yes, loader_load_choice=append => TRUNCATE + INSERT
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F];

    WITH
    -- FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0 -> Active_Floorplan
    Active_Floorplan AS (
        SELECT [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0]
    ),
    -- UNITS_F grouped by FLOORPLAN_KEY -> UnitCounts
    UnitCounts AS (
        SELECT
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            SUM([COUNT])          AS [BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_OCCUPIED])  AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            SUM([FLAG_VACANT])    AS [FLAG_VACANT],
            SUM([FLAG_0_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_0_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_1_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_1_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_2_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_2_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_3_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_3_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_4_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_4_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_5_BEDS])    AS [FLAG_5_BEDS],
            SUM([FLAG_6+_BEDS])   AS [FLAG_6P_BEDS]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F]
        GROUP BY [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
    ),
    -- FLOORPLAN_WORKSPACE -> CompareTypes (with space-stripped matcher)
    CompareTypes AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            UPPER(REPLACE([FLOORPLAN_NAME], ' ', '')) AS [FLOORPLAN_NAME_matcher],
            [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
            [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_WORKSPACE]
    ),
    -- FLOORPLANS_1 -> pre (with matcher cols, ATL replace_substr_ext = REPLACE spaces)
    pre AS (
        SELECT
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [COUNT],
            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED],
            [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN],
            [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED],
            [FLAG_PUBLISHED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
            [FLOORPLAN],
            UPPER(REPLACE([FLOORPLAN], ' ', ''))      AS [FLOORPLAN_matcher],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            UPPER(REPLACE([FLOORPLAN_CODE], ' ', '')) AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE_matcher],
            [FLOORPLAN_ID],
            [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
            [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_1]
    ),
    -- AllRecords: joins per ATL.
    -- CompareTypes uses OUTER APPLY TOP 1 (vs LEFT JOIN OR) to prevent duplicate rows
    -- when both FLOORPLAN_matcher and FLOORPLAN_CODE_matcher match different CT rows.
    AllRecords AS (
        SELECT
            P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            P.[BATHROOMS],
            P.[BEDROOMS],
            ISNULL(UC.[BEDS], 0)            AS [BEDS],
            ISNULL(CT.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                   CAST(P.[BEDROOMS] AS VARCHAR(5)) + 'x'
                   + LEFT(CAST(P.[BATHROOMS] AS VARCHAR(10)), 1))
                                            AS [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
            CT.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
            P.[COUNT],
            P.[DATE_CREATED], P.[DATE_DELETED], P.[DATE_UPDATED],
            P.[DEPOSIT_MAX], P.[DEPOSIT_MIN],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_0_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_0_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_1_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_1_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_2_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_2_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_3_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_3_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_4_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_4_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_5_BEDS], 0)     AS [FLAG_5_BEDS],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_6P_BEDS], 0)    AS [FLAG_6P_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN AF.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
                                            AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN],
            P.[FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], P.[FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], P.[FLAG_FEATURED],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], 0)   AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            P.[FLAG_PUBLISHED],
            P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            ISNULL(UC.[FLAG_VACANT], 0)     AS [FLAG_VACANT],
            P.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
            P.[FLOORPLAN], P.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], P.[FLOORPLAN_ID],
            P.[PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], P.[PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
            P.[PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], P.[PROPERTY_ID],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            P.[RENT_MAX], P.[RENT_MIN], P.[SOURCE_SYSTEM]
        FROM pre P
        LEFT JOIN Active_Floorplan AF ON P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = AF.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN UnitCounts UC        ON P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = UC.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        OUTER APPLY (
            SELECT TOP 1
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY]
            FROM CompareTypes CT
            WHERE P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = CT.[PROPERTY_KEY]
              AND (P.[FLOORPLAN_matcher]      = CT.[FLOORPLAN_NAME_matcher]
                OR P.[FLOORPLAN_CODE_matcher] = CT.[FLOORPLAN_NAME_matcher])
            ORDER BY
                CASE WHEN P.[FLOORPLAN_matcher] = CT.[FLOORPLAN_NAME_matcher]
                     THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
        ) CT
    )

    -- Filter_UCC: DISTINCT + override FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN and FLAG_REPORTABLE
    -- for specific UCC floorplans at PROPERTY_KEY=9561
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F] (
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [BEDS],
        [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
        [COUNT], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN],
        [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], [FLAG_3_BEDS],
        [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6+_BEDS],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN],
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED],
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        [FLAG_VACANT], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
        [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID],
        [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
        [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM]
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [BEDS],
        [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
        [COUNT], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN],
        [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], [FLAG_3_BEDS],
        [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6P_BEDS],
        CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9561
              AND [FLOORPLAN_KEY] IN (103,117,135,183,331,374,1905,1906,1907)
             THEN 0 ELSE [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN] END,
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED],
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED],
        CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9561
              AND [FLOORPLAN_KEY] IN (103,117,135,183,331,374,1905,1906,1907)
             THEN 0 ELSE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] END,
        [FLAG_VACANT], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
        [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID],
        [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
        [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM]
    FROM AllRecords;
END

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER, WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_ETL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: TRUNCATE TARGET TABLES
        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT_AND_NER];

        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: LOAD TARGET 1 - [FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER]
        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH [Yesterday] AS (
            SELECT 
                 [DATE_KEY]
                ,2026 AS [AY]
                ,[AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY], [AY_WEEK]
                ,[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY]
                ,[DATE], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK]
                ,[DAY], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_YESTERDAY]
                ,[RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [YEAR], [YYYYMM]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1
        ),
        [Actuals] AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0]
        ),
        [Combo] AS (
            SELECT A.* FROM [Yesterday] Y
            INNER JOIN [Actuals] A ON Y.[AY] = A.[AY]
        ),
        [Concessions] AS (
            SELECT 
                 F.*
                ,CASE WHEN F.[FLAG_FALL_NEW] = 0 THEN F.[FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE] ELSE F.[FLAG_FALL_NEW] END AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_COMBINED]
                ,CASE WHEN F.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] = 0 THEN F.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE] ELSE F.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] END AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_COMBINED]
                ,CASE WHEN F.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] = 0 THEN F.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE] ELSE F.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] END AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED]
                ,CASE WHEN UPPER(F.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]) = 'TRANSFER IN' THEN 'NEW' ELSE F.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] END AS [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED_CLEAN]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] F
            INNER JOIN [Yesterday] Y ON Y.[AY] = F.[AY]
        ),
        [Combo2] AS (
            SELECT 
                 C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], C.[AY]
                ,C.[FLAG_FALL_NEW_COMBINED], C.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_COMBINED], C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED]
                ,C.[FLOORPLAN], C.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], C.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,C.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED_CLEAN] AS [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
                ,C.[PROPERTY_KEY], C.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,C.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL]
                ,C.[RENT_AMOUNT]
                ,C.[CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE] AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL]
                ,C.[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]
                ,C.[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL]
                ,C.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
                ,C.[CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE]
                ,C.[GIFT_CARD_MONTHLY_IMPACT]
                ,C.[INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE] END AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT] END AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL] END AS [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL] END AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL] END AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,CASE WHEN C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0 THEN C.[RENT_AMOUNT] / C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] ELSE C.[RENT_AMOUNT] END AS [RENT_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE]
            FROM [Concessions] C
            LEFT JOIN [Combo] O ON C.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = O.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
            WHERE C.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED] > 0
        ),
        [GroupBy_NER] AS (
            SELECT 
                 [AY]
                ,SUM([FLAG_FALL_NEW_COMBINED]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_NEW]
                ,SUM([FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_COMBINED]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
                ,SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
                ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENT]
                ,[RENT_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE] AS [RENT_PER_SPACE]
                ,SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_COMBINED]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_NER]
                ,[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE] AS [NER_PER_SPACE]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]
                ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
            FROM [Combo2]
            GROUP BY 
                 [AY], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
                ,[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,[RENT_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE], [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[FLOORPLAN_KEY], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL], [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
        ),
        [Sort1] AS (
            SELECT 
                 CAST([PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + CAST([FLOORPLAN_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] + '-' + CAST([RENT_PER_SPACE] AS VARCHAR(50)) AS [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY]
                ,*
                ,[NER_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED]
            FROM [GroupBy_NER]
            WHERE [LEASED_COUNT_RENT] > 0
        ),
        [Final_NER_Group] AS (
            SELECT 
                 [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY], [AY]
                ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,[NER_PER_SPACE]
                ,SUM([NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]) AS [NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[RENT_PER_SPACE]
                ,SUM([CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]) AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,SUM([GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]) AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,SUM([INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]) AS [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,SUM([REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED]) AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_NER]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_NER]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_NEW]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_NEW]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_RENT]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENT]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
            FROM [Sort1]
            GROUP BY 
                 [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY], [AY]
                ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,[NER_PER_SPACE], [RENT_PER_SPACE]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_NER] (
             [AY], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY]
            ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED], [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_NER], [LEASED_COUNT_NEW], [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_RENT], [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
            ,[NER_PER_SPACE], [NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED], [RENT_PER_SPACE]
        )
        SELECT 
             [AY], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY]
            ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED], [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_NER], [LEASED_COUNT_NEW], [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_RENT], [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
            ,[NER_PER_SPACE], [NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED], [RENT_PER_SPACE]
        FROM [Final_NER_Group];

                ,[RENT_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE], [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE]
                ,[FLOORPLAN_KEY], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL], [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
        ),
        [Sort1] AS (
            -- This acts as 'Extended_NER'
            SELECT 
                 CAST([PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + CAST([FLOORPLAN_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] + '-' + CAST([RENT_PER_SPACE] AS VARCHAR(50)) AS [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY]
                ,*
                ,[NER_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [CONCESSION_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
                ,[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_NER] AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL_EXTENDED]
            FROM [GroupBy_NER]
            WHERE [LEASED_COUNT_RENT] > 0
        ),
        [GroupBy_RENT] AS (
            SELECT 
                 [AY]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_NEW]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_NEW]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
                ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,SUM([LEASED_COUNT_RENT]) AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENT]
                ,[RENT_PER_SPACE]
            FROM [Sort1]
            GROUP BY 
                 [AY], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
                ,[PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_PER_SPACE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        [Sort2] AS (
            -- This acts as 'Extended_RENT'
            SELECT 
                 CAST([PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + CAST([FLOORPLAN_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] + '-' + CAST([RENT_PER_SPACE] AS VARCHAR(50)) AS [FLOORPLAN_RENT_INTERVAL_KEY]
                ,*
                ,[RENT_PER_SPACE] * [LEASED_COUNT_RENT] AS [RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            FROM [GroupBy_RENT]
            WHERE [LEASED_COUNT_RENT] > 0
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT_AND_NER] (
             [AY]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_NEW], [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
            ,[FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
            ,[PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_RENT]
            ,[RENT_PER_SPACE]
            ,[RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_NEW_1], [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL_1], [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL_1]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_RENT_1]
            ,[RENT_PER_SPACE_1]
            ,[LEASED_COUNT_NER]
            ,[NER_PER_SPACE]
            ,[NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
        )
        SELECT 
             R.[AY]
            ,R.[LEASED_COUNT_NEW]
            ,R.[LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]
            ,R.[LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
            ,R.[FLOORPLAN]
            ,R.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
            ,R.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED]
            ,R.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            ,R.[PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,R.[LEASED_COUNT_RENT]
            ,R.[RENT_PER_SPACE]
            ,R.[RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
            -- Aliased columns from NER source (Sort1)
            ,N.[LEASED_COUNT_NEW]       AS [LEASED_COUNT_NEW_1]
            ,N.[LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL]   AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENEWAL_1]
            ,N.[LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]     AS [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL_1]
            ,N.[LEASED_COUNT_RENT]      AS [LEASED_COUNT_RENT_1]
            ,N.[RENT_PER_SPACE]         AS [RENT_PER_SPACE_1]
            ,N.[LEASED_COUNT_NER]
            ,N.[NER_PER_SPACE]
            ,N.[NER_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]
        FROM [Sort2] R               -- Represents Extended_RENT
        INNER JOIN [Sort1] N         -- Represents Extended_NER
            ON  R.[AY] = N.[AY]
            AND R.[PROPERTY_KEY] = N.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            AND R.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = N.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
            AND R.[RENT_PER_SPACE] = N.[RENT_PER_SPACE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH;
END;

name: FLOORPLAN_FACTS_SP
