CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Delete rows from target where DATE_KEY matches any DATE_KEY in source
    DELETE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACTS]
    WHERE [DATE_KEY] IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT [DATE_KEY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F]
    );

    -- Step 2: Append all rows from source into target
    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACTS] (
        [DATE_KEY],
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        [BATHROOMS],
        [BEDROOMS],
        [BEDS],
        [COUNT],
        [DATETIME_KEY],
        [DEPOSIT_MAX],
        [DEPOSIT_MIN],
        [FLAG_0_BEDS],
        [FLAG_1_BEDS],
        [FLAG_2_BEDS],
        [FLAG_3_BEDS],
        [FLAG_4_BEDS],
        [FLAG_5_BEDS],
        [FLAG_6+_BEDS],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN],
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED],
        [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED],
        [FLAG_FEATURED],
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        [FLAG_PUBLISHED],
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        [FLAG_VACANT],
        [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
        [FLOORPLAN],
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
        [FLOORPLAN_ID],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [RENT_MAX],
        [RENT_MIN]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY],
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        [BATHROOMS],
        [BEDROOMS],
        [BEDS],
        [COUNT],
        CONVERT(datetime, CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(8)), 112),
        [DEPOSIT_MAX],
        [DEPOSIT_MIN],
        [FLAG_0_BEDS],
        [FLAG_1_BEDS],
        [FLAG_2_BEDS],
        [FLAG_3_BEDS],
        [FLAG_4_BEDS],
        [FLAG_5_BEDS],
        [FLAG_6+_BEDS],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN],
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED],
        [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED],
        [FLAG_FEATURED],
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        [FLAG_PUBLISHED],
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        [FLAG_VACANT],
        [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
        [FLOORPLAN],
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
        [FLOORPLAN_ID],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [RENT_MAX],
        [RENT_MIN]
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F];

END

name: FLOORPLAN_FACT_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_FACT_F.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F_SP]
(
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @RunDate DATE = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @AuditTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    
    -- Logic: Calculate Yesterday's Date as INT (YYYYMMDD)
    -- ATL: to_char( sysdate( )-1,'YYYYMMDD')
    DECLARE @YesterdayInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

    -- 1. TRUNCATE Target for Full Load
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F];

    -- 2. INSERT with Transformation
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT_F] (
        [DATE_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [BEDS], [COUNT], 
        [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN], [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], 
        [FLAG_3_BEDS], [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6+_BEDS], 
        [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN], [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED], 
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE], [FLAG_VACANT], 
        [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID], 
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [RENT_MAX], [RENT_MIN], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT 
        @YesterdayInt AS [DATE_KEY], -- Computed Value
        s.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        s.[BATHROOMS],
        s.[BEDROOMS],
        s.[BEDS],
        s.[COUNT],
        s.[DEPOSIT_MAX],
        s.[DEPOSIT_MIN],
        s.[FLAG_0_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_1_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_2_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_3_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_4_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_5_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_6+_BEDS],
        s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN],
        s.[FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED],
        s.[FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED],
        s.[FLAG_FEATURED],
        s.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        s.[FLAG_PUBLISHED],
        s.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        s.[FLAG_VACANT],
        s.[FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED],
        CAST(s.[FLOORPLAN] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        CAST(s.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        s.[FLOORPLAN_ID],
        s.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        s.[RENT_MAX],
        s.[RENT_MIN],
        @AuditTime
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F] s -- Source Table
    WHERE s.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1;       -- Filter Logic from ATL

END;

name: FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_1 into WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0_SP]
(
    @CID INT = NULL,
    @RunDate DATE = NULL
)
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @AuditTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

    -- 1. TRUNCATE Target
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0];

    -- 2. INSERT with Deduplication Logic
    -- We replace the complex ATL joins (Singles vs Multi vs Fallback) with one Window Function
    
    WITH CTE_Dedupe AS (
        SELECT 
            s.*,
            -- Logic: Partition by Property + Code
            -- Order Priority:
            -- 1. Non-Deleted records first (CASE WHEN <> 'DELETED TYPE'...)
            -- 2. Max Floorplan Key (descending)
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY s.[PROPERTY_KEY], s.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
                ORDER BY 
                    CASE WHEN s.[FLOORPLAN] <> 'DELETED TYPE' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC,
                    s.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] DESC
            ) AS [RN]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_1] s
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_KEY_FILTER_0] (
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [COUNT], [DATE_CREATED], 
        [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN], 
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], 
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], [FLOORPLAN], 
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID], [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
        [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
        [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], 
        [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM], [LASTUPDATED]
    )
    SELECT 
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [COUNT], [DATE_CREATED], 
        [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DEPOSIT_MAX], [DEPOSIT_MIN], 
        [FLAG_CATS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_DOGS_ALLOWED], [FLAG_FEATURED], [FLAG_PUBLISHED], 
        [FLAG_REPORTABLE], [FLAG_VIRTUAL_MOVEIN_DISABLED], [FLOORPLAN], 
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_ID], [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 
        [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], 
        [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RENT_MAX], 
        [RENT_MIN], [SOURCE_SYSTEM], 
        @AuditTime
    FROM CTE_Dedupe
    WHERE [RN] = 1; -- Keep only the "best" record per group

END;

name: FORECAST_BUDGET_TIERS_SP
transformations: CURRENT_OCC_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS] WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS], 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS] END

CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN T.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL] WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL] END

PROPERTY_BUDGETED_NER: CASE WHEN ISNULL(PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 THEN -- Fallback calculation based on Fall Occ (((PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL] * PR.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] * 12) - PL.[CONCESSION_AGG]) / 12.0) / NULLIF(CASE WHEN ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL], 1) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL], 1) END, 0) ELSE -- Standard calculation based on Current Occ (((PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL] * PR.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] * 12) - PL.[CONCESSION_AGG]) / 12.0) / NULLIF(ISNULL(PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 1), 0) END
PROPERTY_BUDGETED_OCC_PCT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN (CAST(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL] AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / PL.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]) * 100.0 ELSE 0.00 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.FORECAST_BUDGET_TIERS.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FORECAST_BUDGET_TIERS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: TRUNCATE TARGET TABLE
        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FORECAST_BUDGET_TIERS];

        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: INSERT DATA USING CTE CHAIN
        -- -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH [ActiveProperties] AS (
            -- Filter only reportable properties
            SELECT 
                 [PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,[PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),
        [RateTiersForApps] AS (
            -- Primary logic for Rate Tiers, filtered by AY >= 2023 and Valid Tier flag
            SELECT 
                 R.[RATE_TIER_KEY]
                ,TRY_CAST(SUBSTRING(R.[TIER], 2, 2) AS INT) AS [TIER_NUMBER]
                ,R.[AY]
                ,R.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN]
                ,R.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE]
                ,R.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]
                ,R.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE]
                ,R.[BED_TOTAL]
                ,R.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED]
                ,R.[FLAG_VALID_TIER]
                ,R.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
                ,R.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
                ,R.[LEASE_TYPE]
                ,R.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
                ,P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,R.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
                ,R.[PY1_LEASED_BEDS]
                ,R.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
                ,R.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
                ,R.[PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]
                ,R.[BEDS]
                ,R.[RATE]
                ,CAST(R.[RATE] * R.[BEDS] AS DECIMAL(19,2)) AS [RATE_EXTENDED1]
                ,R.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS]
                ,R.[TIER]
                ,R.[TIER_RATE_LABEL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F] R
            INNER JOIN [ActiveProperties] P ON R.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE R.[FLAG_VALID_TIER] = 1
              AND R.[AY] >= 2023
        ),
        [Property_Rate] AS (
            -- Get max Average Rate per Property/AY
            SELECT 
                 [PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,[AY]
                ,MAX([AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]) AS [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]
            FROM [RateTiersForApps]
            GROUP BY 
                 [PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,[AY]
        ),
        [maxperAY] AS (
            -- Get the latest date key per Property/AY to find the most recent target record
            SELECT 
                 MAX([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY]
                ,[PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,[AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_F]
            GROUP BY 
                 [PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,[AY]
        ),
        [PropertyLevel] AS (
            -- Join Targets to Active Properties and calculate Occupancy/Concession Aggregates
            SELECT 
                 T.[DATE_KEY]
                ,T.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,T.[AY]
                -- CURRENT_OCC_BEDS Logic
                ,CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]
                    WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS], 0) = 0 THEN 1
                    ELSE T.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS]
                 END AS [CURRENT_OCC_BEDS]
                -- CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL Logic
                ,CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN T.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
                    WHEN ISNULL(T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 THEN 1
                    ELSE T.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL]
                 END AS [CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL]
                -- CONCESSION_AGG Logic
                ,ISNULL(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN (T.[CONCESSION_NEW] + T.[CONCESSION_RENEW] + T.[GIFT_CARD_NEW] + T.[GIFT_CARD_RENEW] + T.[REFERRAL_NEW] + T.[REFERRAL_RENEW]) > 0.00
                        THEN (T.[CONCESSION_NEW] + T.[CONCESSION_RENEW] + T.[GIFT_CARD_NEW] + T.[GIFT_CARD_RENEW] + T.[REFERRAL_NEW] + T.[REFERRAL_RENEW])
                        ELSE (T.[CONCESSION_AGG] + T.[GIFT_CARD_AGG] + T.[REFERRAL_AGG])
                    END, 0.00
                 ) AS [CONCESSION_AGG]
                ,T.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]
                ,T.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_F] T
            INNER JOIN [maxperAY] M 
                ON M.[DATE_KEY] = T.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY] 
                AND M.[AY] = T.[AY]
            INNER JOIN [ActiveProperties] A 
                ON A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE T.[AY] >= 2023
        ),
        [Calc] AS (
            -- Calculate Budgeted NER and Occupancy Percentages
            SELECT 
                 PL.[DATE_KEY]
                ,PL.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                ,PR.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                ,PL.[AY]
                ,PL.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS]
                ,PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL]
                ,PL.[CONCESSION_AGG]
                ,PL.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]
                ,PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
                ,PR.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]
                -- PROPERTY_BUDGETED_NER Calculation
                ,CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 0) = 0 THEN
                        -- Fallback calculation based on Fall Occ
                         (((PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL] * PR.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] * 12) - PL.[CONCESSION_AGG]) / 12.0)
                         / NULLIF(CASE WHEN ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL], 1) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL], 1) END, 0)
                    ELSE
                        -- Standard calculation based on Current Occ
                        (((PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL] * PR.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] * 12) - PL.[CONCESSION_AGG]) / 12.0)
                        / NULLIF(ISNULL(PL.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], 1), 0)
                 END AS [PROPERTY_BUDGETED_NER]
                -- PROPERTY_BUDGETED_Occ_Pct Calculation
                ,CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(PL.[FALL_OCC_BEDS], 0) > 0 THEN (CAST(PL.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL] AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / PL.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]) * 100.0
                    ELSE 0.00 
                 END AS [PROPERTY_BUDGETED_OCC_PCT]
            FROM [PropertyLevel] PL
            LEFT JOIN [Property_Rate] PR 
                ON PR.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PL.[PROPERTY_KEY] 
                AND PR.[AY] = PL.[AY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FORECAST_BUDGET_TIERS] (
             [RATE_TIER_KEY]
            ,[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN]
            ,[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE]
            ,[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]
            ,[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE]
            ,[AY]
            ,[BED_TOTAL]
            ,[BED_TOTAL_LEASED]
            ,[BEDS]
            ,[CONCESSION_AGG]
            ,[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS]
            ,[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL]
            ,[FALL_OCC_BEDS]
            ,[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
            ,[FLAG_VALID_TIER]
            ,[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
            ,[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
            ,[LEASE_TYPE]
            ,[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
            ,[PROPERTY_BUDGETED_AVG_RATE]
            ,[PROPERTY_BUDGETED_NER]
            ,[PROPERTY_BUDGETED_OCC_PCT]
            ,[PROPERTY_KEY]
            ,[PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,[PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,[PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,[PY1_LEASED_BEDS]
            ,[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,[PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]
            ,[RATE]
            ,[RATE_EXTENDED1]
            ,[T1_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T2_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T3_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T5_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T6_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T7_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[T8_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,[TIER]
            ,[TIER_NUMBER]
            ,[TIER_RATE_LABEL]
        )
        SELECT 
             RT.[RATE_TIER_KEY]
            ,RT.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN]
            ,RT.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE]
            ,RT.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]
            ,RT.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE]
            ,RT.[AY]
            ,RT.[BED_TOTAL]
            ,RT.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED]
            ,RT.[BEDS]
            ,C.[CONCESSION_AGG]
            ,C.[CURRENT_OCC_BEDS]
            ,C.[CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL]
            ,C.[FALL_OCC_BEDS]
            ,C.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
            ,RT.[FLAG_VALID_TIER]
            ,RT.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
            ,RT.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
            ,RT.[LEASE_TYPE]
            ,RT.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
            ,C.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] AS [PROPERTY_BUDGETED_AVG_RATE]
            ,C.[PROPERTY_BUDGETED_NER]
            ,C.[PROPERTY_BUDGETED_OCC_PCT]
            ,RT.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            ,RT.[PROPERTY_NAME]
            ,RT.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_LEASED_BEDS]
            ,RT.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]
            ,RT.[PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]
            ,RT.[RATE]
            ,RT.[RATE_EXTENDED1]
            ,RT.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS]
            ,RT.[TIER]
            ,RT.[TIER_NUMBER]
            ,RT.[TIER_RATE_LABEL]
        FROM [RateTiersForApps] RT
        LEFT JOIN [Calc] C 
            ON C.[PROPERTY_KEY] = RT.[PROPERTY_KEY] 
            AND C.[AY] = RT.[AY]
        WHERE RT.[AY] >= 2025; -- Filter from Combo View

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH;
END;

name: FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS_BASE_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS_BASE_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Translated from SAP Data Services Forecast_Comp_Floorplans_Base.
             Filters for unique records and performs an incremental merge.
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Logical Transformations (CTEs)
        -- Handles Grouping, Dupe Detection, and Final Output Logic
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- Base1: Grouping and Aggregation
        WITH Base1_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_KEY] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                1 AS [FLAG_INCLUDE],
                [FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                MAX([NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]) AS [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS]
            GROUP BY 
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_NAME], [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], 
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], 
                [FLAG_SOLD_OUT]
        ),

        -- De-duplication Logic (Equivalent to CaptureDupes + SumDupes)
        UniqueKeys_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
            FROM Base1_CTE
            GROUP BY [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
            HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
        ),

        -- Final Source: Filtered for Non-Duplicates
        FinalSource_CTE AS (
            SELECT B.*
            FROM Base1_CTE B
            INNER JOIN UniqueKeys_CTE U ON 
                B.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = U.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
                B.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] = U.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
                B.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY] = U.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
        )

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Incremental Load (MERGE)
        -- Target uses 2-part name [dbo].[Object]
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS_BASE] AS Target
        USING FinalSource_CTE AS Source
        ON (
            Target.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY] = Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
        )

        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME] = Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                Target.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME] = Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                Target.[FLOORPLAN_NAME] = Source.[FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                Target.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY] = Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                Target.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE] = Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                Target.[FLAG_INCLUDE] = Source.[FLAG_INCLUDE],
                Target.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT] = Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                Target.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED] = Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME], [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], 
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], 
                [FLAG_INCLUDE], [FLAG_SOLD_OUT], [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            )
            VALUES (
                Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME], Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], Source.[FLOORPLAN_NAME], 
                Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], 
                Source.[FLAG_INCLUDE], Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT], Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrorMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS_UPDATE_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.WEEKS, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FORECAST_FORECASTS into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS_UPDATE_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Translated from SAP Data Services Forecast_Comp_Floorplans_Update.
             Updates Flag_Sold_Out and NER_PRELEASE for unapproved forecasts 
             in the current/next Academic Year.
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Process logical views (Now, Forecasts, Base1) using CTEs
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- Identify current/upcoming Academic Years
        WITH Now_CTE AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT [AY]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_AY] IN (0, 1)
        ),

        -- Filter for Unapproved Forecasts within those Academic Years
        Forecasts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                F.[FORECAST_KEY],
                F.[AY],
                F.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FORECAST_FORECASTS] AS F
            INNER JOIN Now_CTE AS N ON F.[AY] = N.[AY]
            WHERE F.[FLAG_APPROVED] = 0
        ),

        -- Prepare Actuals from the Market Survey system
        Base1_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_KEY] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME] AS [COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
                [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                [FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                [RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
                [BED_COUNT]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS]
        ),

        -- Join the Actuals to the targeted Forecasts
        Updates_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                F.[FORECAST_KEY],
                B.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                B.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
                B.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY],
                B.[BED_COUNT],
                B.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                B.[FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                B.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                B.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                B.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
                B.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                B.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE]
            FROM Forecasts_CTE AS F
            INNER JOIN Base1_CTE AS B ON F.[PROPERTY_KEY] = B.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY]
        )

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Incremental Load (MERGE)
        -- Target MUST use 2-part name [Schema].[Table] for Fabric compatibility
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[FORECAST_COMP_FLOORPLANS] AS Target
        USING Updates_CTE AS Source
        ON (
            Target.[FORECAST_KEY] = Source.[FORECAST_KEY] AND
            Target.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY] = Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
        )

        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[BED_COUNT] = Source.[BED_COUNT],
                Target.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT] = Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                Target.[FLOORPLAN_NAME] = Source.[FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                Target.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED] = Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                Target.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED] = Source.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                Target.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT] = Source.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
                Target.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY] = Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                Target.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE] = Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE]

        -- Note: ATL 'Map_Operation' set to 'update', but MERGE provides safety for new floorplans
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [FORECAST_KEY], [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], [BED_COUNT], [FLAG_SOLD_OUT], 
                [FLOORPLAN_NAME], [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], [RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], 
                [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], 
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE]
            )
            VALUES (
                Source.[FORECAST_KEY], Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY], 
                Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], Source.[BED_COUNT], Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT], 
                Source.[FLOORPLAN_NAME], Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], Source.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], 
                Source.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT], Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], 
                Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.WEEKS, DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.PROPERTY_F into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Translated from SAP Data Services Forecast_MS_Floorplan_Actuals.
             Calculates NER and aggregates Floorplan actuals for active properties.
             Optimized for Microsoft Fabric (2-part naming for DML).
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Process logical views (Now, ActiveProps, Comps, etc.) 
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- Get the specific Date Key for the current/next AY reporting window
        WITH Now_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATIVE_AY],
                [RELATIVE_WEEK]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[WEEKS]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_AY] = 1 
              AND [RELATIVE_WEEK] = (
                CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, SYSDATETIME()) IN (1, 2) THEN -1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END
              )
        ),

        -- Filter for reportable properties
        ActiveProperties_CTE AS (
            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[xtemp].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),

        -- Join Comp Fact data with the time context and active properties
        Comps_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                CF.[DATE_KEY],
                CF.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                CF.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT],
                CF.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT],
                CF.[COUNT] AS [COMP_COUNT],
                CF.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                CA.[FLAG_COMP],
                CA.[FLAG_PARENT_1] AS [FLAG_PARENT],
                CA.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                CA.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_FACT] AS CF
            INNER JOIN [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] AS CA 
                ON CF.[DATE_KEY] = CA.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND CF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = CA.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY]
            INNER JOIN Now_CTE AS N ON CF.[DATE_KEY] = N.[DATE_KEY]
            INNER JOIN ActiveProperties_CTE AS AP ON CA.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = AP.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- Resolve Floorplan Types with a Min Key aggregation
        Types_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                MIN([FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY]) AS [FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                UPPER([FLOORPLAN_TYPE]) AS [FLOORPLAN_TYPE]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_TYPES]
            GROUP BY UPPER([FLOORPLAN_TYPE])
        ),

        -- Main Source Transformation: Join Comps with Floorplan Fact and Calculate NER
        FinalSource_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                C.[DATE_KEY],
                C.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                FF.[BED_COUNT],
                C.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                C.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT],
                CAST(C.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT] * FF.[BED_COUNT] * 0.01 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [COMP_PRELEASED],
                C.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT],
                C.[COMP_COUNT],
                C.[FLAG_COMP],
                C.[FLAG_PARENT],
                C.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                C.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
                C.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME],
                FF.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY],
                FF.[FLOORPLAN_NAME],
                FF.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE],
                T.[FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY] AS [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                FF.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT],
                FF.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                FF.[RENT_PRELEASE_UNFURNISHED],
                ISNULL(FF.[CONCESSION_ANNUAL_AMOUNT], 0.00) AS [CONCESSION_ANNUAL_AMOUNT],
                CAST(ISNULL(FF.[CONCESSION_ANNUAL_AMOUNT], 0.00) / 12 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
                -- NER Calculation Logic
                CAST(ISNULL(
                    FF.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED] - (FF.[CONCESSION_ANNUAL_AMOUNT] / 12), 
                    ISNULL(FF.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], FF.[RENT_PRELEASE_UNFURNISHED])
                ) AS INT) AS [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            FROM Comps_CTE AS C
            INNER JOIN [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_FACT] AS FF 
                ON C.[DATE_KEY] = FF.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND C.[PROPERTY_KEY] = FF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            INNER JOIN Types_CTE AS T 
                ON UPPER(FF.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE]) = T.[FLOORPLAN_TYPE]
        )

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Incremental Load (MERGE)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[FORECAST_MS_FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS] AS Target
        USING FinalSource_CTE AS Source
        ON (
            Target.[DATE_KEY] = Source.[DATE_KEY] AND
            Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AND
            Target.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY] = Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY]
        )

        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[BED_COUNT] = Source.[BED_COUNT],
                Target.[COMP_PRELEASED] = Source.[COMP_PRELEASED],
                Target.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY] = Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY],
                Target.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT] = Source.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
                Target.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED] = Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED],
                Target.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT] = Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT]

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [BED_COUNT], [COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT], 
                [COMP_PRELEASED], [COMP_PRELEASED_PCT], [FLAG_COMP], [FLAG_PARENT], 
                [PROPERTY_NAME], [PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], [PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], 
                [FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], 
                [COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], [FLAG_SOLD_OUT], [RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], 
                [RENT_PRELEASE_UNFURNISHED], [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT], [NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            )
            VALUES (
                Source.[DATE_KEY], Source.[PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[BED_COUNT], Source.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT], 
                Source.[COMP_PRELEASED], Source.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT], Source.[FLAG_COMP], Source.[FLAG_PARENT], 
                Source.[PROPERTY_NAME], Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[PARENT_PROPERTY_NAME], 
                Source.[FLOORPLAN_ASSIGNMENT_KEY], Source.[FLOORPLAN_NAME], Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE], 
                Source.[COMPARE_AS_FLOORPLAN_TYPE_KEY], Source.[FLAG_SOLD_OUT], Source.[RENT_PRELEASE_FURNISHED], 
                Source.[RENT_PRELEASE_UNFURNISHED], Source.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_IMPACT], Source.[NER_PRELEASE_FURNISHED]
            );

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrorMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: FRESH_SERVICE_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_ODS.dbo.FRESH_SERVICE_IMPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.FRESH_SERVICE_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[FRESH_SERVICE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FRESH_SERVICE_0];

        -- 2. CTE Transformations
        WITH CTE_PROPERTIES AS (
            -- Logic from ATL View: PROPERTIES
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 OR [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1
        ),
        CTE_TICKETS AS (
            -- Logic from ATL View: TICKETS
            -- Strictly mapping quoted ATL columns to Brackets [ ] to handle spaces
            SELECT
                [Ticket_KEY] = TRY_CAST([Ticket Id] AS INT),
                [AGENT] = UPPER([AGENT]),
                [Agent_interactions] = [Agent interactions],
                [Approval_Status] = UPPER([Approval Status]),
                [CATEGORY] = UPPER([CATEGORY]),
                [COUNT] = 1,
                [Customer_interactions] = [Customer interactions],
                
                -- Date conversions
                [DATE_Closed] = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Closed Time], 112) AS INT), 0),
                [DATE_Created] = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Created Time], 112) AS INT),
                [DATE_Due] = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Due by Time], 112) AS INT),
                [DATE_Initial_Response] = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Initial Response Time], 112) AS INT), 0),
                [DATE_Updated] = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Last Updated Time], 112) AS INT), 0),
                [DATE_Resolved] = ISNULL(CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Resolved Time], 112) AS INT), 0),

                -- Datetime Passthroughs
                [DATETIME_Closed] = CAST([Closed Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),
                [DATETIME_Created] = CAST([Created Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),
                [DATETIME_Due] = CAST([Due by Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),
                [DATETIME_Initial_Response] = CAST([Initial Response Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),
                [DATETIME_Updated] = CAST([Last Updated Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),
                [DATETIME_Resolved] = CAST([Resolved Time] AS DATETIME2(3)),

                [DEPARTMENT] = ISNULL(UPPER([DEPARTMENT]), 'NOT ENTERED'),
                [DESCRIPTION] = [DESCRIPTION],
                [First_Response_Status] = UPPER([First Response Status]),
                [First_Response_Time_in_Hrs] = CAST([First Response Time (in Hrs)] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
                [GROUP] = UPPER([GROUP]),
                [IMPACT] = UPPER([IMPACT]),
                
                -- Logic: LOCATION
                [LOCATION] = CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'CORPORATE ATLANTA' THEN 'CORPORATE - ATLANTA'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'CORPORATE REMOTE' THEN 'CORPORATE - REMOTE'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'CORPROATE REMOTE' THEN 'CORPORATE - REMOTE'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'DAKOTA RANCH' THEN 'DAKOTA RANCH STUDENT APARTMENTS'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) LIKE 'GREYHOUND VILLAGE%' THEN 'GREYHOUND VILLAGE'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'HUNTING LODGE' THEN 'THE DEN HUNTING LODGE'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'THEORY INTERLOCK ATLANTA' THEN 'THEORY INTERLOCK'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'BOONE STUDENT LIVING' THEN 'UNDEFINED'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'CAMPUS VIEW' THEN 'THE GATES'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = 'CEDAR RIDGE' THEN 'THE DEN CEDAR RIDGE'
                    WHEN UPPER([LOCATION]) = '' THEN 'UNDEFINED'
                    WHEN [LOCATION] IS NULL THEN 'UNDEFINED'
                    ELSE UPPER([LOCATION])
                END,

                [Phone_Number] = ISNULL([Phone Number], 'NOT ENTERED'),
                [PRIORITY] = UPPER([PRIORITY]),
                [Project_At_Peak] = ISNULL([Project At Peak], 'true'),
                [Reference_Nbr] = ISNULL([Reference Nbr], 0),
                [Requester_Email] = [Requester Email],
                [Requester_Name] = UPPER([Requester Name]),
                [Resolution] = ISNULL(UPPER([Resolution Field]), 'NOT ENTERED'),
                [Resolution_Status] = UPPER([Resolution Status]),
                [Resolution_Time_in_Hrs] = CAST([Resolution Time (in Hrs)] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
                [SOURCE] = UPPER([SOURCE]),
                [STATUS] = UPPER([STATUS]),
                [Sub_Category] = ISNULL(UPPER([Sub-Category]), 'NOT ASSIGNED'),
                [SUBJECT] = UPPER([SUBJECT]),
                [Survey_Result] = UPPER([Survey Result]),
                [TAGS] = UPPER([TAGS]),
                [Ticket_Id] = [Ticket Id],
                [TYPE] = UPPER([TYPE]),
                [URGENCY] = UPPER([URGENCY])
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[FRESH_SERVICE_IMPORT]
        )
        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FRESH_SERVICE_0] (
            [Ticket_KEY], [AGENT], [Agent_interactions], [Approval_Status], [CATEGORY], 
            [COUNT], [Customer_interactions], [DATE_Closed], [DATE_Created], [DATE_Due], 
            [DATE_Initial_Response], [DATE_Updated], [DATE_Resolved], [DATETIME_Closed], 
            [DATETIME_Created], [DATETIME_Due], [DATETIME_Initial_Response], [DATETIME_Updated], 
            [DATETIME_Resolved], [DEPARTMENT], [DESCRIPTION], [First_Response_Status], 
            [First_Response_Time_in_Hrs], [GROUP], [IMPACT], [LOCATION], [Phone_Number], 
            [PRIORITY], [Project_At_Peak], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [Reference_Nbr], 
            [Requester_Email], [Requester_Name], [Resolution], [Resolution_Status], 
            [Resolution_Time_in_Hrs], [SOURCE], [STATUS], [Sub_Category], [SUBJECT], 
            [Survey_Result], [TAGS], [Ticket_Id], [TYPE], [URGENCY], 
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            T.[Ticket_KEY],
            T.[AGENT],
            T.[Agent_interactions],
            T.[Approval_Status],
            T.[CATEGORY],
            T.[COUNT],
            T.[Customer_interactions],
            T.[DATE_Closed],
            T.[DATE_Created],
            T.[DATE_Due],
            T.[DATE_Initial_Response],
            T.[DATE_Updated],
            T.[DATE_Resolved],
            T.[DATETIME_Closed],
            T.[DATETIME_Created],
            T.[DATETIME_Due],
            T.[DATETIME_Initial_Response],
            T.[DATETIME_Updated],
            T.[DATETIME_Resolved],
            T.[DEPARTMENT],
            T.[DESCRIPTION],
            T.[First_Response_Status],
            T.[First_Response_Time_in_Hrs],
            T.[GROUP],
            T.[IMPACT],
            T.[LOCATION],
            T.[Phone_Number],
            T.[PRIORITY],
            T.[Project_At_Peak],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            T.[Reference_Nbr],
            T.[Requester_Email],
            T.[Requester_Name],
            T.[Resolution],
            T.[Resolution_Status],
            T.[Resolution_Time_in_Hrs],
            T.[SOURCE],
            T.[STATUS],
            T.[Sub_Category],
            T.[SUBJECT],
            T.[Survey_Result],
            T.[TAGS],
            T.[Ticket_Id],
            T.[TYPE],
            T.[URGENCY],
            SYSDATETIME() -- Handled explicitly here
        FROM CTE_TICKETS T
        LEFT OUTER JOIN CTE_PROPERTIES P
            ON T.[LOCATION] = P.[PROPERTY_NAME];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: GIFT_CARDS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_GIFT_CARD: CASE WHEN ak.[GIFT_CARD_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE: CASE WHEN ak.[RECORD_COUNT] > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
GIFT_CARD_NAME: CASE WHEN ak.[RECORD_COUNT] > 1 THEN 'MULTIPLE' ELSE ak.[GIFT_CARD_NAME] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_ASSOCIATIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SPECIALS into WH_STAGING.dbo.GIFT_CARDS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Gift_Cards_0 (GIFT_CARDS_0_ATL.txt)
--
-- Builds one row per lease interval summarizing gift card assignments.
-- Excludes two hardcoded duplicate associations (Dakota Ranch, 20240613 fix).
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES          (all leases)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_ASSOCIATIONS      (gift card associations: AR_ORIGIN_ID=6)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_SPECIALS                (gift card specials: GIFT_VALUE > 0)
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0           (reportable properties for PROPERTY_KEY lookup)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.GIFT_CARDS_0  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   nvl(GIFT_VALUE, 0.00) > 0.00           â†’ ISNULL([GIFT_VALUE], 0.00) > 0.00
--   substr(NOTES, 1, 250)                  â†’ LEFT([NOTES], 250)
--   decode(val > n, true_val, false_val)   â†’ CASE WHEN val > n THEN true_val ELSE false_val END
--   Distincts CTE: dedup Combo by grouping on all columns, MAX on dates
--   ApplyKey CTE: aggregate to one row per (LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PROPERTY_ID)
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[GIFT_CARDS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[GIFT_CARDS_0];

    ;WITH
    -- =====================================================================
    -- LA: lease associations for gift cards (AR_ORIGIN_ID=6), non-deleted,
    --     excluding two hardcoded Dakota Ranch duplicate rows.
    -- =====================================================================
    LA AS (
        SELECT
            [ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [AR_ORIGIN_ID],
            [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
            [AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATE],
            [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_ASSOCIATIONS]
        WHERE [AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6
          AND [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NULL
          AND NOT ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = 17440157 AND [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID] = 8212546)
          AND NOT ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = 17443453 AND [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID] = 8213488)
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Specials: gift card specials with a positive GIFT_VALUE
    -- ATL: nvl(GIFT_VALUE, 0.00) > 0.00
    -- =====================================================================
    Specials AS (
        SELECT
            [ID],
            [GIFT_VALUE],
            [NAME],
            LEFT([NOTES], 250)  AS [NOTES]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPECIALS]
        WHERE ISNULL([GIFT_VALUE], 0.00) > 0.00
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Leases: all cached leases
    -- =====================================================================
    Leases AS (
        SELECT
            [ID],
            [PROPERTY_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Combo: core join â€” leases â†’ associations â†’ specials
    -- ATL: Leases INNER JOIN LA ON LA.LEASE_ID=Leases.ID
    --      INNER JOIN Specials ON Specials.ID=LA.AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID
    -- =====================================================================
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            l.[PROPERTY_ID],
            l.[ID]              AS [LEASE_ID],
            la.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            la.[ID]             AS [LEASE_ASSOCIATION_ID],
            la.[AR_ORIGIN_ID],
            la.[AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
            la.[AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
            la.[CREATED_ON_DATE]     AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            la.[CREATED_ON_DATEID]   AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            s.[NAME]                 AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            s.[GIFT_VALUE]           AS [GIFT_CARD_VALUE],
            s.[ID]                   AS [SPECIALS_ID],
            1                        AS [RECORD_COUNT]
        FROM Leases l
        INNER JOIN LA la
            ON la.[LEASE_ID] = l.[ID]
        INNER JOIN Specials s
            ON s.[ID] = la.[AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Distincts: deduplicate Combo â€” one row per unique gift card per lease.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY Lease_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, Gift_Card_NAME, Gift_Card_VALUE,
    --      Record_count, Specials_ID, PROPERTY_ID; MAX on date columns.
    -- =====================================================================
    Distincts AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            MAX([GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE])    AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            MAX([GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATEID])  AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            [GIFT_CARD_VALUE],
            [SPECIALS_ID],
            [RECORD_COUNT]
        FROM Combo
        GROUP BY
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            [GIFT_CARD_VALUE],
            [SPECIALS_ID],
            [RECORD_COUNT]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- ApplyKey: aggregate to one row per (LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PROPERTY_ID).
    -- SUM gift values and record counts across multiple gift cards.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY Lease_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PROPERTY_ID
    -- =====================================================================
    ApplyKey AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            MAX([GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE])    AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            MAX([GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATEID])  AS [GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            MAX([GIFT_CARD_NAME])               AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            SUM([GIFT_CARD_VALUE])              AS [GIFT_CARD_VALUE],
            SUM([RECORD_COUNT])                 AS [RECORD_COUNT]
        FROM Distincts
        GROUP BY
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    ),

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Properties: reportable properties from PROPERTY_0
    -- =====================================================================
    Properties AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
    )

    -- =====================================================================
    -- Final INSERT: ApplyKey LEFT JOIN Properties, apply decode flags
    -- ATL: decode(Gift_Card_VALUE > 0, 1, 0)           â†’ FLAG_GIFT_CARD
    --      decode(Record_count > 1, 1, 0)              â†’ FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE
    --      decode(Record_count > 1, 'MULTIPLE', NAME)  â†’ GIFT_CARD_NAME
    -- =====================================================================
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[GIFT_CARDS_0] (
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LEASE_ID],
        [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],
        [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
        [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
        [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
        [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
        [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        ak.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        ak.[LEASE_ID],
        ak.[GIFT_CARD_CREATED_ON_DATE]                                          AS [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],
        CASE WHEN ak.[GIFT_CARD_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
        CASE WHEN ak.[RECORD_COUNT] > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
        ak.[RECORD_COUNT]                                                        AS [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN ak.[RECORD_COUNT] > 1 THEN 'MULTIPLE' ELSE ak.[GIFT_CARD_NAME] END
                                                                                AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
        ak.[GIFT_CARD_VALUE]                                                    AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]
    FROM ApplyKey ak
    LEFT JOIN Properties p
        ON p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] = ak.[PROPERTY_ID];

END

    SELECT
        d.[DATE_KEY],
        s.[PERIOD_ID],s.[PROPERTY_KEY],s.[AP_END_DATE],s.[AP_END_DATEID],s.[AP_END_DATETIME],s.[AP_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[AP_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[AP_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[AP_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[AP_START_DATE],s.[AP_START_DATEID],s.[AP_START_DATETIME],s.[AR_END_DATE],s.[AR_END_DATEID],s.[AR_END_DATETIME],s.[AR_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[AR_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[AR_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[AR_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[AR_START_DATE],s.[AR_START_DATEID],s.[AR_START_DATETIME],s.[CACHE_INITIALIZED],s.[CALENDAR_DAYS],s.[CID],s.[CREATED_BY],s.[CREATED_ON_DATE],s.[CREATED_ON_DATEID],s.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],s.[FINANCIAL_DAYS],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL_MANAGED],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL_UNMANAGED],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT_MANAGED],s.[FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT_UNMANAGED],s.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],s.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],s.[FLAG_DATA_FREEZE],s.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],s.[FLAG_LEASEUP],s.[FLAG_MANAGED],s.[FLAG_MIGRATED],s.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],s.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],s.[FLAG_PENDING],s.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],s.[FLAG_RETAIL],s.[FLAG_STABILIZED],s.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],s.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY],s.[FLAG_TENTATIVE],s.[FLAG_USE_TEMP_ADDRESS],s.[FLAG_WHITE_LABEL],s.[GL_END_DATE],s.[GL_END_DATEID],s.[GL_END_DATETIME],s.[GL_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[GL_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[GL_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATE],s.[GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATEID],s.[GL_SOFT_LOCKED_ON_DATETIME],s.[GL_START_DATE],s.[GL_START_DATEID],s.[GL_START_DATETIME],s.[GPR_BOOK_BASIS],s.[HAS_CACHE],s.[HAS_DISABLED_PRORATION],s.[HAS_FINANCIAL_DATA],s.[IS_AP_ROLLBACK],s.[IS_AR_ROLLBACK],s.[IS_GL_ROLLBACK],s.[IS_GPR_POSTED],s.[IS_INITIAL_IMPORT],s.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],s.[POST_MONTH],s.[POST_MONTH_DATE],s.[PROPERTY_ID],s.[PROPERTY_NAME],s.[PROPERTY_TYPE],s.[REBUILD_DIFFERENTIAL_CACHE],s.[UPDATED_BY],s.[UPDATED_ON_DATE],s.[UPDATED_ON_DATEID],s.[UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],s.[USE_MARKET_RENT_IN_GPR],s.[VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATE],s.[VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATEID],s.[VACANCY_CACHED_ON_DATETIME]
    FROM [dbo].[GL_PERIODS_0] s
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT [DATE_KEY] FROM [dbo].[DATE_F] WHERE [FLAG_TODAY] = 1) d;
END

name: GRACEHILL_EMPLOYEE_EXPORT_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.GRACEHILL_EMPLOYEE_EXPORT.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GRACEHILL_EMPLOYEE_EXPORT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[GRACEHILL_EMPLOYEE_EXPORT];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[GRACEHILL_EMPLOYEE_EXPORT] (
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST],
        [LOCATION_AD], [ROLE_ID], [DATE_HIRED], [EMAIL], [TITLE]
    )
    SELECT
        EMPLOYEE_CODE, NAME_FIRST, NAME_MIDDLE, NAME_LAST,
        LOCATION_AD, ROLE_ID, DATE_HIRED, EMAIL, TITLE
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
    WHERE FLAG_ACTIVE > 0
      AND EMPLOYEE_CODE <> '0000';
END

name: GUARANTORS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_APPLICANT_APPLICATIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.GUARANTORS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[GUARANTORS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GUARANTORS_0];

        WITH [Apps] AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
        ),
        
        [MaxGuarantor] AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX([ID]) AS [ID],
                [APPLICATION_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_APPLICATIONS]
            WHERE [CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID] = 4 
              AND [DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NULL
            GROUP BY [APPLICATION_ID]
        ),

        [Applicants] AS (
            SELECT 
                Base.[APPLICATION_ID],
                Base.[APPLICANT_ID],
                Base.[CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID],
                Base.[APPLICATION_SIGNED_ON_DATE],
                Base.[APPROVED_ON_DATE],
                Base.[COMPLETED_ON_DATE],
                Base.[CREATED_ON_DATE]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_APPLICATIONS] AS Base
            INNER JOIN [MaxGuarantor] AS MaxG
                ON Base.[ID] = MaxG.[ID]
            WHERE Base.[CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID] = 4
              AND Base.[DELETED_ON_DATETIME] IS NULL
        ),

        [Details] AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [CUSTOMER_ID],
                [EMAIL_ADDRESS],
                [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_LAST],
                [MOBILE_NUMBER],
                [PHONE_NUMBER],
                [WORK_NUMBER]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANTS]
        )

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GUARANTORS_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED],
            [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
            [DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED],
            [DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED],
            [FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
            [GUARANTOR_APPLICANT_ID],
            [GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_ID],
            [GUARANTOR_CUSTOMER_ID],
            [GUARANTOR_CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID],
            [GUARANTOR_EMAIL],
            [GUARANTOR_NAME],
            [GUARANTOR_NAME_FIRST],
            [GUARANTOR_NAME_LAST],
            [GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE],
            [GUARANTOR_PHONE_PRIMARY],
            [GUARANTOR_PHONE_WORK],
            [LEASE_ID]
        )
        SELECT 
            [Apps].[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            ISNULL([Applicants].[APPLICATION_SIGNED_ON_DATE], 0),
            ISNULL([Applicants].[APPROVED_ON_DATE], 0),
            ISNULL([Applicants].[COMPLETED_ON_DATE], 0),
            [Applicants].[CREATED_ON_DATE],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL([Applicants].[APPROVED_ON_DATE], 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            [Applicants].[APPLICANT_ID],
            [Apps].[ID],
            [Details].[CUSTOMER_ID],
            [Applicants].[CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID],
            ISNULL([Details].[EMAIL_ADDRESS], '--'),
            ISNULL([Details].[NAME_FIRST], '') + ' ' + ISNULL([Details].[NAME_LAST], ''),
            ISNULL([Details].[NAME_FIRST], '--'),
            ISNULL([Details].[NAME_LAST], '--'),
            ISNULL([Details].[MOBILE_NUMBER], '--'),
            ISNULL([Details].[PHONE_NUMBER], '--'),
            ISNULL([Details].[WORK_NUMBER], '--'),
            [Apps].[LEASE_ID]
        FROM [Apps]
        INNER JOIN [Applicants] ON [Apps].[ID] = [Applicants].[APPLICATION_ID]
        INNER JOIN [Details] ON [Applicants].[APPLICANT_ID] = [Details].[ID];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: IMAGE_LIST_LOAD_SP

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[IMAGE_LIST_LOAD_SP]

AS

BEGIN

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    

    BEGIN TRY

        -- Transaction Start

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[IMAGE_LIST];

        -- 2. Insert Data

        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[IMAGE_LIST] (

            [IMAGE_KEY],

            [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION],

            [IMAGE_TYPE],

            [IMAGE_URL],

            [LAST_RUN_DT]

        )

        SELECT 

            [IMAGE_KEY],

            [IMAGE_DESCRIPTION],

            [IMAGE_TYPE],

            [IMAGE_URL],

            SYSDATETIME()

        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[IMAGE_LIST_0];

        -- Commit Transaction

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        -- Rollback if error

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        THROW;

    END CATCH

END;
