name: INSURANCE_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_NEW_LOGIC: CASE WHEN NL.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT, 0.00) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY: CASE WHEN I.INSURANCE_STATUS = 'FUTURE COVERAGE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed: CASE WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION ANNUAL' THEN 'PPI ANNUAL' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION MONTHLY' THEN 'PPI MONTHLY' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION 3.0' THEN 'PPI 3.0' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION FORCED' THEN 'PPI FORCED' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'FORCED PLACE INSURANCE' THEN 'PPI FORCED' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = '3RD PARTY NO COI' THEN '3RD PARTY NO COI' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = '3RD PARTY VERIFIED' THEN '3RD PARTY VERIFIED' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'EXEMPT' THEN 'EXEMPT' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'MASTER LEASE-EXEMPT' THEN 'EXEMPT' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'OTHER' THEN '3RD PARTY' WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'NONE' THEN 'NONE' ELSE '3RD PARTY' END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.INSURANCE_0.
sql:
-- ==================================================
-- Procedure: [dbo].[INSURANCE_0_SP]
-- Target:     [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_0]
-- Load Type:  Full Load (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
-- ATL:        Insurance_0
-- Sources:
--   [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
--   [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0]
--   [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0]
--   [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0]
--   [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
-- ==================================================

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[INSURANCE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- ================================================
        -- Full Load: truncate target first
        -- ================================================
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_0];

        -- ================================================
        -- CTE CHAIN
        -- ================================================
        WITH

        -- CurrentMonth: yesterday's YYYYMM from DATE_F
        CurrentMonth_CTE AS (
            SELECT YYYYMM
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = -1
            GROUP BY YYYYMM
        ),

        -- IntervalPool: filtered lease intervals with date calcs
        IntervalPool_CTE AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                L.DATE_BEGIN,
                L.DATE_END,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-1,GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)
                                                            AS DATE_TODAY,
                L.DATEID_BEGIN,
                L.DATEID_END,
                DATEDIFF(DAY, '19000101', DATEADD(DAY,-1,GETDATE()))
                                                            AS DATEID_TODAY,
                L.LEASE_ID,
                L.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                L.PROPERTY_ID,
                L.PROPERTY_KEY,
                L.PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0] L
            WHERE L.LEASE_ID IS NOT NULL
              AND L.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID <> 2
              AND L.DATE_END > 0
              AND L.AY >= 2019
              AND L.STATUS <> 'CANCELLED'
            GROUP BY
                L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, L.DATE_BEGIN, L.DATE_END,
                L.DATEID_BEGIN, L.DATEID_END,
                L.LEASE_ID, L.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                L.PROPERTY_ID, L.PROPERTY_KEY, L.PROPERTY_NAME
        ),

        -- NewLogic: passthrough from INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0
        NewLogic_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                DATE_BEGIN,
                DATE_END,
                DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                DATE_POLICY_END,
                DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                DATEID_POLICY_END,
                INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
                INSURANCE_STATUS,
                LEASE_ID
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0]
        ),

        -- Combo1: IntervalPool LEFT JOIN NewLogic
        Combo1_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                IP.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                IP.DATE_BEGIN,
                IP.DATE_END,
                ISNULL(NL.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN, 0)             AS DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                ISNULL(NL.DATE_POLICY_END, 0)               AS DATE_POLICY_END,
                IP.DATE_TODAY,
                ISNULL(NL.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN, 0)           AS DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                ISNULL(NL.DATEID_POLICY_END, 0)             AS DATEID_POLICY_END,
                IP.DATEID_TODAY,
                CASE WHEN IP.DATEID_TODAY >= IP.DATEID_BEGIN
                      AND IP.DATEID_TODAY <= IP.DATEID_END
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL,
                CASE WHEN NL.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME IS NOT NULL
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_NEW_LOGIC,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME, 'NONE')   AS INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE, 0.00)       AS INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT, 0.00)  AS INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT, 0.00)   AS INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER, '--')    AS INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT, 0.00)   AS INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
                ISNULL(NL.INSURANCE_STATUS, 'NONE')         AS INSURANCE_STATUS,
                ISNULL(NL.LEASE_ID, IP.LEASE_ID)            AS LEASE_ID
            FROM IntervalPool_CTE IP
            LEFT JOIN NewLogic_CTE NL
                ON IP.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = NL.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),

        -- Intervals: Combo1 WHERE DATE_POLICY_BEGIN IS NOT NULL, adds policy flags
        Intervals_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                C.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.DATE_BEGIN,
                C.DATE_END,
                C.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                C.DATE_POLICY_END,
                C.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                C.DATEID_POLICY_END,
                C.DATE_TODAY,
                C.DATEID_TODAY,
                C.FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL,
                -- FLAG_ACTIVE_POLICY
                CASE WHEN C.FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL = 1
                      AND C.DATEID_TODAY >= C.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN
                      AND C.DATEID_TODAY <= C.DATEID_POLICY_END
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_ACTIVE_POLICY,
                C.FLAG_NEW_LOGIC,
                -- FLAG_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON
                CASE WHEN (
                         CASE WHEN C.FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL = 1
                               AND C.DATEID_TODAY >= C.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN
                               AND C.DATEID_TODAY <= C.DATEID_POLICY_END
                              THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                     ) = 1
                      AND C.DATEID_POLICY_END - C.DATEID_TODAY <= 30
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON,
                C.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                C.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                C.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                C.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                C.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                C.INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
                C.INSURANCE_STATUS,
                C.LEASE_ID
            FROM Combo1_CTE C
            WHERE C.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN IS NOT NULL
        ),

        -- InsuranceSchedCharge: passthrough from INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0
        InsuranceSchedCharge_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_END_DATE,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_START_DATE,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID,
                INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0]
        ),

        -- MaxPeriodMonthly: MONTHLY charges joined to CurrentMonth
        MaxPeriodMonthly_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                L.PERIOD_YYYYMM,
                L.COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                L.INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                L.INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
                L.INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG,
                L.INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                L.PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                L.PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0] L
            INNER JOIN CurrentMonth_CTE CM ON CM.YYYYMM = L.PERIOD_YYYYMM
            WHERE L.AR_CODE_NAME = 'MONTHLY'
        ),

        -- MaxPeriodMonthly_1: ANNUAL charges grouped
        MaxPeriodMonthly_1_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                MAX(PERIOD_YYYYMM)              AS PERIOD_YYYYMM,
                COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0]
            WHERE AR_CODE_NAME = 'ANNUAL'
            GROUP BY
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
                PERIOD_YYYYMM
        ),

        -- Merge: UNION ALL of MaxPeriodMonthly + MaxPeriodMonthly_1
        Merge_CTE AS (
            SELECT * FROM MaxPeriodMonthly_CTE
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM MaxPeriodMonthly_1_CTE
        ),

        -- GroupByInterval: aggregate Merge by LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        GroupByInterval_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                MAX(PERIOD_YYYYMM)              AS PERIOD_YYYYMM,
                SUM(COUNT_CODE_NAMES)           AS COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT)   AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                MAX(INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG)     AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
                MAX(INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG)  AS INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG,
                SUM(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                MAX(PERIOD_MONTH_ID)            AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                MAX(PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE)    AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE
            FROM Merge_CTE
            GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),

        -- ChargesPerLeaseID: passthrough from GroupByInterval
        ChargesPerLeaseID_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                PERIOD_YYYYMM,
                COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG,
                INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE
            FROM GroupByInterval_CTE
        ),

        -- Combo_1: Intervals LEFT JOIN InsuranceSchedCharge LEFT JOIN ChargesPerLeaseID
        Combo_1_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                I.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                I.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                I.DATE_POLICY_END,
                I.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                I.DATEID_POLICY_END,
                I.FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL,
                I.FLAG_ACTIVE_POLICY,
                C.INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG                 AS Insurance_Delinquent_Flag,
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT, 0.00) > 0.00
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED,
                C.INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG                    AS Insurance_Charged_Flag,
                CASE WHEN I.INSURANCE_STATUS = 'FUTURE COVERAGE'
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                      AS FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY,
                I.FLAG_NEW_LOGIC,
                I.FLAG_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON,
                I.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                -- INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed
                CASE
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION ANNUAL'  THEN 'PPI ANNUAL'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION MONTHLY' THEN 'PPI MONTHLY'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION 3.0'     THEN 'PPI 3.0'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'PEAK PROTECTION FORCED'  THEN 'PPI FORCED'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'FORCED PLACE INSURANCE'  THEN 'PPI FORCED'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = '3RD PARTY NO COI'        THEN '3RD PARTY NO COI'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = '3RD PARTY VERIFIED'      THEN '3RD PARTY VERIFIED'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'EXEMPT'                  THEN 'EXEMPT'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'MASTER LEASE-EXEMPT'     THEN 'EXEMPT'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'OTHER'                   THEN '3RD PARTY'
                    WHEN UPPER(I.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) = 'NONE'                    THEN 'NONE'
                    ELSE '3RD PARTY'
                END                                         AS INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed,
                C.INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
                C.COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
                C.PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
                C.PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
                C.PERIOD_YYYYMM,
                I.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                I.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                I.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                I.INSURANCE_STATUS,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_END_DATE,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_START_DATE,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID,
                SC.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT,
                C.INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
                I.LEASE_ID
            FROM Intervals_CTE I
            LEFT JOIN InsuranceSchedCharge_CTE SC ON SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = I.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            LEFT JOIN ChargesPerLeaseID_CTE C      ON C.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID  = I.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        )

        -- ================================================
        -- Final INSERT — keys view transformations applied inline
        -- ================================================
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_0]
        (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [DATE_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATE_POLICY_END],
            [DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATEID_POLICY_END],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_3RD_PARTY],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_ACTIVE_POLICY],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGED],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_DELINQUENT],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_EXEMPT],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_NEW_LOGIC],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI],
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI_FORCED],
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER],
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED],
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_COUNT_CODE_NAMES],
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID],
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE],
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM],
            [INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE],
            [INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER],
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AMOUNT],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN_DATE],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END_DATE],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID],
            [INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            [LEASE_ID]
        )
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
            DATE_POLICY_END,
            DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
            DATEID_POLICY_END,
            -- FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL
            ISNULL(FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_3RD_PARTY
            CASE WHEN UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed) IN (
                        '3RD PARTY', '3RD PARTY VERIFIED', '3RD PARTY NO COI')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_ACTIVE_POLICY
            ISNULL(FLAG_ACTIVE_POLICY, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED
            ISNULL(FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGED
            ISNULL(Insurance_Charged_Flag, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_DELINQUENT
            ISNULL(Insurance_Delinquent_Flag, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_EXEMPT
            CASE WHEN UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed) IN ('EXEMPT')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY
            ISNULL(FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_NEW_LOGIC
            ISNULL(FLAG_NEW_LOGIC, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON
            ISNULL(FLAG_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON, 0),
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI
            CASE WHEN UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed) IN (
                        'PPI MONTHLY', 'PPI ANNUAL', 'PPI FORCED', 'PPI 3.0')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            -- FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI_FORCED
            CASE WHEN UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) LIKE '%FORCED%'
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            -- INSURANCE_CARRIER
            UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME),
            -- INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED
            INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME_Conformed,
            -- INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT, 0.00),
            -- INSURANCE_CHARGED_COUNT_CODE_NAMES
            ISNULL(COUNT_CODE_NAMES, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID
            ISNULL(PERIOD_MONTH_ID, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE
            ISNULL(PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM
            ISNULL(PERIOD_YYYYMM, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE, 0.00),
            -- INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT, 0.00),
            -- INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT, 0.00),
            -- INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER
            INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
            -- INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE
            INSURANCE_STATUS,
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AMOUNT
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT, 0.00),
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME, '--'),
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN_DATE
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_START_DATE, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END_DATE
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_END_DATE, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID, 0),
            -- INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT
            ISNULL(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT, 0.00),
            -- LEASE_ID
            LEASE_ID
        FROM Combo_1_CTE;

        COMMIT TRAN;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRAN;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2 into WH_STAGING.dbo.INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0];

        WITH 
        PolicyStatus AS (
            SELECT 
                ID, 
                DESCRIPTION, 
                IS_PUBLISHED, 
                NAME AS INSURANCE_STATUS, 
                ORDER_NUM
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPES]
        ),
        Policies AS (
            SELECT 
                P.ID AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                P.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                P.END_DATE AS DATE_POLICY_END,
                P.EFFECTIVE_DATEID AS DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                P.END_DATEID AS DATEID_POLICY_END,
                UPPER(P.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) AS INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                P.DEDUCTIBLE AS INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                P.LIABILITY_LIMIT AS INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                P.PERSONAL_LIMIT AS INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                P.POLICY_NUMBER AS INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                P.PREMIUM_AMOUNT AS INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
                PS.INSURANCE_STATUS,
                P.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID AS INSURANCE_STATUS_ID,
                TRY_CAST(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(P.POLICY_NUMBER)) > 0 
                        THEN SUBSTRING(LTRIM(P.POLICY_NUMBER), 1, CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(P.POLICY_NUMBER)) - 1)
                        ELSE LTRIM(P.POLICY_NUMBER) 
                    END 
                AS INT) AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2] P
            INNER JOIN PolicyStatus PS 
                ON P.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID = PS.ID
        ),
        MaxPolicy AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX(INSURANCE_POLICY_ID) AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            FROM Policies
            GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),
        Policies2 AS (
            SELECT 
                P.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                P.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
                P.DATE_POLICY_END,
                P.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
                P.DATEID_POLICY_END,
                P.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                P.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
                P.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                P.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                P.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                P.INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
                P.INSURANCE_STATUS,
                P.INSURANCE_STATUS_ID,
                P.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            FROM Policies P
            INNER JOIN MaxPolicy MP 
                ON P.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID = MP.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID
        ),
        LeaseIntervals2 AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                DATE_BEGIN,
                DATE_END,
                LEASE_ID,
                INTERVAL_TYPE_ID AS LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                PROPERTY_ID,
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
            WHERE LEASE_ID IS NOT NULL 
              AND INTERVAL_TYPE_ID <> 2 
              AND DATE_END > 0 
              AND (STATUS <> 'CANCELLED' OR STATUS IS NULL)
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [DATE_BEGIN],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATE_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATE_POLICY_END],
            [DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATEID_POLICY_END],
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME],
            [INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE],
            [INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER],
            [INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT],
            [INSURANCE_STATUS],
            [INSURANCE_STATUS_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME]
        )
        SELECT 
            L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            L.DATE_BEGIN,
            L.DATE_END,
            P2.DATE_POLICY_BEGIN,
            P2.DATE_POLICY_END,
            P2.DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN,
            P2.DATEID_POLICY_END,
            P2.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
            P2.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
            P2.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
            P2.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
            P2.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
            P2.INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
            P2.INSURANCE_STATUS,
            P2.INSURANCE_STATUS_ID,
            L.LEASE_ID,
            L.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
            L.PROPERTY_ID,
            L.PROPERTY_KEY,
            L.PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM LeaseIntervals2 L
        INNER JOIN Policies2 P2 
            ON L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = P2.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID;

        COMMIT TRAN;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRAN;
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

name: INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_LEGACY_0_SP
transformations: ACADEMIC_YEAR_POLICY_NUMBER: CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(POLICY_NUMBER, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020', '2021', '2022') THEN SUBSTRING(POLICY_NUMBER, 1, 4) WHEN INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN '2020' WHEN INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID IN (7, 9) THEN CAST(YEAR(TRY_CAST(EFFECTIVE_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3))) AS VARCHAR(4)) ELSE '0' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CUSTOMERS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_LEGACY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- ==============================================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ==============================================================================
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_LEGACY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Run BEFORE CTE processes per requirements)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_LEGACY_0];

        -- 2. CTE Transformations & Target Load
        WITH 
        Customers AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS CUSTOMER_ID, 
                NAME_FIRST, 
                NAME_LAST
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMERS]
        ),
        PolicyStatus AS (
            SELECT 
                ID, 
                DESCRIPTION, 
                IS_PUBLISHED, 
                NAME, 
                ORDER_NUM
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPES]
        ),
        Policies AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                CASE 
                    WHEN SUBSTRING(POLICY_NUMBER, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020', '2021', '2022') 
                        THEN SUBSTRING(POLICY_NUMBER, 1, 4)
                    WHEN INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 
                        THEN '2020'
                    WHEN INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID IN (7, 9) 
                        THEN CAST(YEAR(TRY_CAST(EFFECTIVE_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3))) AS VARCHAR(4))
                    ELSE '0' 
                END AS ACADEMIC_YEAR_POLICY_NUMBER,
                EFFECTIVE_DATE,
                EFFECTIVE_DATEID,
                TRY_CAST(EFFECTIVE_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS EFFECTIVE_DATETIME,
                END_DATE,
                END_DATEID,
                TRY_CAST(END_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS END_DATETIME,
                UPPER(INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME) AS INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                POLICY_NUMBER,
                UPDATED_ON_DATE,
                DEDUCTIBLE,
                LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                PREMIUM_AMOUNT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICIES2]
        ),
        CustomerPolicyJunction AS (
            SELECT 
                APPLICATION_ID,
                CUSTOMER_ID,
                RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICY_ID AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                LEASE_ID,
                APPLICANT_ID,
                COUNT(DISTINCT LEASE_ID) AS POLICY_COUNT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_INSURANCE_POLICY_CUSTOMERS]
            GROUP BY 
                APPLICATION_ID, 
                CUSTOMER_ID, 
                LEASE_ID, 
                RESIDENT_INSURANCE_POLICY_ID, 
                APPLICANT_ID
        ),
        CustomerInsurance AS (
            SELECT 
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.EFFECTIVE_DATE <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) 
                     AND P.END_DATE >= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS ACTIVE_POLICY_FLAG,
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.EFFECTIVE_DATE >= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) 
                     AND P.END_DATE >= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS FUTURE_POLICY_FLAG,
                P.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                P.ACADEMIC_YEAR_POLICY_NUMBER AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ACADEMIC_YEAR_POLICY_NUMBER,
                P.EFFECTIVE_DATE AS INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
                P.EFFECTIVE_DATEID AS INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATEID,
                P.END_DATE AS INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATE,
                P.END_DATEID AS INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATEID,
                P.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                P.POLICY_NUMBER AS INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                PS.NAME AS INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_NAME,
                CPJ.LEASE_ID,
                P.DEDUCTIBLE,
                P.LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                P.PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                P.PREMIUM_AMOUNT
            FROM Customers C
            INNER JOIN CustomerPolicyJunction CPJ 
                ON CPJ.CUSTOMER_ID = C.CUSTOMER_ID
            LEFT JOIN Policies P 
                ON CPJ.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID = P.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID
            LEFT JOIN PolicyStatus PS 
                ON P.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_ID = PS.ID
            WHERE PS.NAME <> 'EXPIRED'
            GROUP BY 
                PS.NAME, P.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID, P.ACADEMIC_YEAR_POLICY_NUMBER, 
                P.EFFECTIVE_DATE, P.EFFECTIVE_DATEID, P.END_DATE, P.END_DATEID, 
                P.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME, P.POLICY_NUMBER, CPJ.LEASE_ID, 
                P.DEDUCTIBLE, P.LIABILITY_LIMIT, P.PERSONAL_LIMIT, P.PREMIUM_AMOUNT
        ),
        MaxActive AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX(INSURANCE_POLICY_ID) AS INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                LEASE_ID
            FROM CustomerInsurance
            WHERE ACTIVE_POLICY_FLAG = 1
            GROUP BY LEASE_ID
        ),
        Current_Policy AS (
            SELECT 
                MA.LEASE_ID,
                MA.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID,
                CI.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATEID,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATE,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATEID,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
                CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_NAME,
                CI.DEDUCTIBLE,
                CI.LIABILITY_LIMIT,
                CI.PERSONAL_LIMIT,
                CI.PREMIUM_AMOUNT
            FROM MaxActive MA
            INNER JOIN CustomerInsurance CI 
                ON MA.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID = CI.INSURANCE_POLICY_ID
        ),
        LeaseIntervals2 AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                LEASE_ID,
                INTERVAL_TYPE_ID AS LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                PROPERTY_ID,
                DATE_BEGIN AS LEASE_START_DATE,
                DATE_END AS LEASE_END_DATE
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
            WHERE LEASE_ID IS NOT NULL 
              AND INTERVAL_TYPE_ID <> 2 
              AND DATE_END > 0 
              AND AY > 2018 
              AND STATUS <> 'CANCELLED'
        ),
        Intervals AS (
            SELECT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                LEASE_ID,
                LEASE_START_DATE,
                LEASE_END_DATE
            FROM LeaseIntervals2
            GROUP BY 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, 
                LEASE_ID, 
                LEASE_START_DATE, 
                LEASE_END_DATE
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_BY_INTERVAL_LEGACY_0] (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [DATE_BEGIN],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATE_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATE_POLICY_END],
            [DATEID_POLICY_BEGIN],
            [DATEID_POLICY_END],
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME],
            [INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE],
            [INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT],
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER],
            [INSURANCE_PREMIUM_AMOUNT],
            [INSURANCE_STATUS],
            [LEASE_ID]
        )
        SELECT 
            I.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            I.LEASE_START_DATE,
            I.LEASE_END_DATE,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATE,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_EFFECTIVE_DATEID,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_END_DATEID,
            CP.INSURANCE_CARRIER_NAME,
            CP.DEDUCTIBLE,
            CP.LIABILITY_LIMIT,
            CP.PERSONAL_LIMIT,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
            CP.PREMIUM_AMOUNT,
            CP.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE_NAME,
            I.LEASE_ID
        FROM Intervals I
        INNER JOIN Current_Policy CP 
            ON I.LEASE_ID = CP.LEASE_ID;

END;

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_CODE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0];

    ;WITH
    Months AS (
        SELECT
            MONTH_ID,
            RELATIVE_MONTH AS MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            YYYYMM
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        GROUP BY
            MONTH_ID,
            YYYYMM,
            RELATIVE_MONTH
    ),
    ARCodeTypes AS (
        SELECT
            ID,
            NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]
        WHERE ID = 9
    ),
    ARCodes AS (
        SELECT
            ID,
            NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
        WHERE ID IN (154790, 155094, 155113, 155118, 155114, 155143)
        GROUP BY
            ID,
            NAME
    ),
    Transactions AS (
        SELECT
            ID,
            AR_CODE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            IS_DELETED,
            IS_REVERSAL,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            PERIOD_ID,
            TRY_CAST(LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(TRANSACTION_DATETIME AS DATE), 112), 6) AS INT) AS PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(TRANSACTION_DATETIME AS DATE), 112) AS INT) AS POST_DATE,
            DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CAST(TRANSACTION_DATETIME AS DATE)) AS POST_DATEID,
            TRANSACTION_DATETIME AS REPORTING_POST_DATE,
            SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID,
            TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,
            TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE,
            TRANSACTION_DATETIME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE TRY_CAST(IS_DELETED AS BIT) = 0
          AND AR_CODE_ID IN (154790, 155094, 155113, 155118, 155114, 155143)
          AND TRANSACTION_DATETIME IS NOT NULL
    ),
    Combo1 AS (
        SELECT
            T.ID,
            T.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            T.LEASE_ID,
            T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            ACT.NAME AS AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            T.AR_CODE_ID,
            AC.NAME AS AR_CODE_NAME,
            T.INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            T.POST_DATE,
            T.POST_DATEID,
            T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT,
            T.TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE,
            T.REPORTING_POST_DATE,
            T.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
            T.PERIOD_ID,
            M.MONTH_ID AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
            M.MONTH_ID_REVERSE AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            T.PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            T.IS_DELETED,
            T.IS_REVERSAL,
            T.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID
        FROM Transactions T
        INNER JOIN ARCodeTypes ACT
            ON ACT.ID = T.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID
        INNER JOIN ARCodes AC
            ON T.AR_CODE_ID = AC.ID
        INNER JOIN Months M
            ON T.PERIOD_YYYYMM = M.YYYYMM
    ),

    -- ========================================================
    -- PATH 1: MONTHLY CHARGES (Code IDs 154790, 155094, 155118, 155114, 155143)
    -- ========================================================
    Case_Monthly AS (
        SELECT * FROM Combo1
        WHERE AR_CODE_ID IN (154790, 155094, 155118, 155114, 155143)
    ),
    Grouped_by_Period_Monthly AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            AR_CODE_NAME,
            LEASE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            SUM(INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            MAX(POST_DATE) AS POST_DATE,
            MAX(POST_DATEID) AS POST_DATEID,
            COUNT(AR_CODE_NAME) AS COUNT_CODE_NAMES
        FROM Case_Monthly
        GROUP BY
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, LEASE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            PERIOD_YYYYMM, PERIOD_MONTH_ID, PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE, AR_CODE_NAME
    ),
    CurrentChargesPerLeaseInterval AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            'MONTHLY' AS AR_CODE_NAME,
            LEASE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            SUM(INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            SUM(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            MAX(POST_DATE) AS POST_DATE,
            MAX(POST_DATEID) AS POST_DATEID,
            SUM(COUNT_CODE_NAMES) AS COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
            CASE WHEN SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
            CASE WHEN SUM(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) <> 0.00 AND SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG
        FROM Grouped_by_Period_Monthly
        GROUP BY
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PERIOD_YYYYMM, PERIOD_MONTH_ID, PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            LEASE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME
    ),

    -- ========================================================
    -- PATH 2: ANNUAL CHARGES (Code ID 155113)
    -- ========================================================
    Case_Annual AS (
        SELECT * FROM Combo1
        WHERE AR_CODE_ID = 155113
    ),
    Grouped_by_LeaseInterval_Annual AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            MAX(PERIOD_YYYYMM) AS PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            AR_CODE_NAME,
            LEASE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            SUM(INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            SUM(TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            MAX(PERIOD_MONTH_ID) AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
            MAX(PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE) AS PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            MAX(POST_DATE) AS POST_DATE,
            MAX(POST_DATEID) AS POST_DATEID,
            COUNT(AR_CODE_NAME) AS COUNT_CODE_NAMES
        FROM Case_Annual
        GROUP BY
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, LEASE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME, AR_CODE_NAME
    ),
    TotalChargesPerLeaseInterval AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            PERIOD_YYYYMM,
            'ANNUAL' AS AR_CODE_NAME,
            LEASE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            SUM(INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE) AS INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
            SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
            SUM(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) AS INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
            PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            MAX(POST_DATE) AS POST_DATE,
            MAX(POST_DATEID) AS POST_DATEID,
            SUM(COUNT_CODE_NAMES) AS COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
            CASE WHEN SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
            CASE WHEN SUM(INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) <> 0.00 AND SUM(INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT) > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG
        FROM Grouped_by_LeaseInterval_Annual
        GROUP BY
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PERIOD_YYYYMM, PERIOD_MONTH_ID, PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
            LEASE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME
    ),

    -- ========================================================
    -- UNION BOTH PATHS
    -- ========================================================
    Merged_Data AS (
        SELECT * FROM CurrentChargesPerLeaseInterval
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM TotalChargesPerLeaseInterval
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_LEDGER_CHARGES_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [PERIOD_YYYYMM],
        [AR_CODE_NAME],
        [LEASE_ID],
        [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
        [AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
        [INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE],
        [INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
        [INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
        [PERIOD_MONTH_ID],
        [PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE],
        [POST_DATE],
        [POST_DATEID],
        [COUNT_CODE_NAMES],
        [INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG],
        [INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG]
    )
    SELECT
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        PERIOD_YYYYMM,
        AR_CODE_NAME,
        LEASE_ID,
        AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
        AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
        INITIAL_AMOUNT_DUE,
        INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
        INSURANCE_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
        PERIOD_MONTH_ID,
        PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
        POST_DATE,
        POST_DATEID,
        COUNT_CODE_NAMES,
        INSURANCE_CHARGED_FLAG,
        INSURANCE_DELINQUENT_FLAG
    FROM Merged_Data;

END;

name: INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- ==================================================
-- Procedure: [dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0_SP]
-- Target:     [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0]
-- Load Type:  Full Load (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
-- ATL:        Insurance_Sched_Charges_0
-- Sources:
--   [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
--   [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES]
--   [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]
-- ==================================================

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- ================================================
        -- Full Load: truncate target first
        -- ================================================
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0];

        -- ================================================
        -- CTE CHAIN
        -- ================================================
        WITH

        -- SC: E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL
        SC_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                ID,
                AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                CHARGE_AMOUNT,
                CHARGE_END_DATE,
                CHARGE_START_DATE,
                LEASE_ID,
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                PROPERTY_ID,
                SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
            WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL
        ),

        -- SCTypes: all scheduled charge types (passthrough)
        SCTypes_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                ID,
                NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES]
        ),

        -- ARCodes_1: E_AR_CODE_TYPES WHERE NAME = 'OTHER LIABILITY'
        ARCodes_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                ID,
                NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES]
            WHERE NAME = 'OTHER LIABILITY'
        ),

        -- Combo3: SC INNER JOIN SCTypes INNER JOIN ARCodes_1
        Combo3_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                SC.ID,
                SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                SC.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                AR.NAME                                     AS AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
                SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT                            AS RENT_AMOUNT,
                SC.CHARGE_START_DATE,
                SC.CHARGE_END_DATE,
                SC.LEASE_ID,
                SC.PROPERTY_ID
            FROM SC_CTE SC
            INNER JOIN SCTypes_CTE ST   ON ST.ID = SC.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID
            INNER JOIN ARCodes_CTE AR   ON AR.ID = SC.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID
        ),

        -- MaxID3: MAX(ID) per LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        MaxID3_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                MAX(ID)             AS ID,
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            FROM Combo3_CTE
            GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),

        -- InsuranceSchedCharge: Combo3 INNER JOIN MaxID3 ON ID
        InsuranceSchedCharge_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                C.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                C.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                C.AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
                -- decode(CHARGE_END_DATE is not null, to_char(...,'YYYYMMDD'), 0)
                CASE WHEN C.CHARGE_END_DATE IS NOT NULL
                     THEN TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), C.CHARGE_END_DATE, 112) AS INT)
                     ELSE 0
                END                                         AS Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_END_DATE,
                -- to_char(CHARGE_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
                TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), C.CHARGE_START_DATE, 112) AS INT)
                                                            AS Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_START_DATE,
                C.ID                                        AS Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_ID,
                C.RENT_AMOUNT                               AS Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_AMOUNT
            FROM Combo3_CTE C
            INNER JOIN MaxID3_CTE M ON C.ID = M.ID
        )

        -- ================================================
        -- Final INSERT
        -- ================================================
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[INSURANCE_SCHED_CHARGES_0]
        (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_END_DATE],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_START_DATE],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_AMOUNT]
        )
        SELECT
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
            Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_END_DATE,
            Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_START_DATE,
            Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_ID,
            Insurance_Scheduled_Charge_AMOUNT
        FROM InsuranceSchedCharge_CTE;

        COMMIT TRAN;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRAN;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT, WH_ODS.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_SCORE_IMPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: ETL for JTurner Comp Import Staging and Fact tables.
Fix: Removed GROUP BY/DISTINCT to allow 1-to-many join expansion (fixes 8k vs 14k gap).
Targets: 
    1. [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0]
    2. [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F]
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, @SYSDATE), 112) AS INT);-- Cleanup any orphaned transactions from previous failed runs

        -- 1. Truncate Target Tables
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F];

        -- 2. Process data into a Temp Table
        -- We select ALL matches to allow the 1-to-many relationship to expand the row count
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Combo') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Combo;

        SELECT 
            @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY AS [DATE_KEY],
            src.ID,
            src.COMPANY_ORA_SCORE,
            CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), src.CreatedDate, 120) AS [CREATEDDATE], -- Matches Staging varchar(10)
            src.[Date] AS [DATE],
            src.JTA_ID,
            CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), src.ModifiedDate, 120) AS [MODIFIEDDATE],
            src.Name AS [NAME],
            src.NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE,
            src.ORA_SCORE,
            src.CLIENT_ID AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
            ISNULL(score.ID, 0) AS [COMP_ID],
            score.Name AS [COMP_NAME],
            score.ORA_SCORE AS [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        INTO #Combo
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT] src
        LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_SCORE_IMPORT] score 
            ON src.ID = score.PropertyID
        WHERE src.CLIENT_ID <> 'N/A';

        -- 3. Load Target _0 (Staging)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE], 
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], 
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE], 
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], 
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        FROM #Combo;

        -- 4. Load Target _F (Fact)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F] (
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE], 
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], 
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE], 
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], 
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        FROM #Combo;
        PRINT 'JTurner Comp Import full reload successful. Row count should now match On-Prem expansion.';
END;

name: JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_FACT_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_FACT (cross-database).
sql:
-- ==================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE (CLEAN PRODUCTION VERSION)
-- ==================================================
CREATE       PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. DELTA DELETE
        -- Ensures that we replace existing records for the incoming keys.
        -- Uses the ATL Composite Key: DATE_KEY, ID, COMP_ID.
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_FACT] AS T
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F] AS S
            ON  T.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY]
            AND T.[ID]       = S.[ID]
            AND T.[COMP_ID]  = S.[COMP_ID];

        -- 2. APPEND NEW BATCH
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_FACT] (
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE],
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE],
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [CREATEDDATE], [DATE],
            [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE],
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_ID], [COMP_NAME], [COMP_ORA_SCORE]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_COMP_IMPORT_F];

        COMMIT;
        PRINT 'Migration successful.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        DECLARE @Err NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@Err, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_0]
        ([ID], [ANY_COMMENTS_SUGGESTIONS], [CLEAN_AND_READY_AT_MOVE_IN], [CLIENT_ID], [CREATEDATE], [DATE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_MODIFIED], [EASE_OF_PAPERWORK], [EASE_OF_UNDERSTANDING_POLICIES], [EMAIL], [FOLLOW_UP], [HOW_MAY_WE_CONTACT_YOU], [I_FEEL_COMFORTABLE], [JTA_ID], [MODIFIEDDATE], [MOVE_IN_DATE], [MOVE_IN_EXPERIENCE], [MOVE_IN_INDEX], [NOTES], [POLICIES_DID_NOT_MEET_YOUR_EXPECTATIONS], [PROPERTY_NAME_JTURNER], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [QUESTION_CONCERN], [RED_ALERT_OPEN_CLOSED], [RESIDENT_EMAIL], [RESPONSE_ID], [SHOULD_SOMEONE_CONTACT_YOU], [STAFF_CONTACTED_WITHIN_7_DAYS], [STAFF_DID_NOT_MEET_YOUR_EXPECTATIONS], [STAFF_WAS_HELPFUL], [STAFF_WAS_RESPONSIVE], [TELEPHONE], [UNIT_NUMBER], [YOUR_NAME])
    SELECT

        src.[ID] AS [ID],
        src.[any_comments_suggestions] AS [ANY_COMMENTS_SUGGESTIONS],
        src.[clean_and_ready_at_move_in] AS [CLEAN_AND_READY_AT_MOVE_IN],
        src.[Client_ID] AS [CLIENT_ID],
        src.[CreateDate] AS [CREATEDATE],
        src.[Date] AS [DATE],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[CreateDate], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_CREATED],
        CAST(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())), '-', '') AS INT) AS [DATE_KEY],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[ModifiedDate], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_MODIFIED],
        src.[Ease_of_paperwork] AS [EASE_OF_PAPERWORK],
        src.[Ease_of_understanding_policies] AS [EASE_OF_UNDERSTANDING_POLICIES],
        src.[Email] AS [EMAIL],
        src.[Follow_Up] AS [FOLLOW_UP],
        src.[How_may_we_contact_you] AS [HOW_MAY_WE_CONTACT_YOU],

name: JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_0_SP
transformations: JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'THE MANOR CAMPUS VIEW APARTMENTS' THEN 'THE MANOR' WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'JUNCTION 49' THEN 'DISPO JUNCTION 49' WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'BOONE STUDENT LIVING | GLEN WILDE' THEN 'BOONE STUDENT LIVING' WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'ZGREENWAY COMMONS' THEN 'DISPO ZGREENWAY COMMONS' WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'ZGREENWAY COVE' THEN 'DISPO ZGREENWAY COVE' WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'TERRAZUL MIAMI' THEN 'TERRAZUL' ELSE UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) END
JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY: CASE WHEN CAST(S.CLIENT_ID AS VARCHAR(100)) = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE TRY_CAST(S.CLIENT_ID AS INT) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.JTURNER_ORA_SCORE, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_0 (cross-database).
sql:
---

/*
================================================================================
SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
================================================================================
*/

CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- Full Reload strategy per ATL 'loader_drop_and_create_table'
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_0];

        WITH SourceData AS (
            SELECT 
                S.ID,
                S.CLIENT_ID,
                S.[Date] AS DATENAME,
                CASE 
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'THE MANOR CAMPUS VIEW APARTMENTS' THEN 'THE MANOR'
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'JUNCTION 49' THEN 'DISPO JUNCTION 49'
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'BOONE STUDENT LIVING | GLEN WILDE' THEN 'BOONE STUDENT LIVING'
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'ZGREENWAY COMMONS' THEN 'DISPO ZGREENWAY COMMONS'
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'ZGREENWAY COVE' THEN 'DISPO ZGREENWAY COVE'
                    WHEN UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000))) = 'TERRAZUL MIAMI' THEN 'TERRAZUL'
                    ELSE UPPER(CAST(S.Name AS VARCHAR(1000)))
                END AS JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME,
                CAST(S.JTA_ID AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS JTA_ID,
                CASE WHEN CAST(S.CLIENT_ID AS VARCHAR(100)) = 'N/A' THEN NULL ELSE TRY_CAST(S.CLIENT_ID AS INT) END AS JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY,
                P.PROPERTY_KEY AS PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY,
                CAST(P.PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS PEAK_PROPERTY_NAME,
                S.ORA_SCORE,
                CAST(S.NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE,
                CAST(S.COMPANY_ORA_SCORE AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS COMPANY_ORA_SCORE,
                CAST(S.CreateDate AS DATETIME2(3)) AS CREATEDATE,
                CAST(S.ModifiedDate AS DATETIME2(3)) AS MODIFIEDDATE
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE] S
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P 
                ON CAST(S.CLIENT_ID AS VARCHAR(1000)) = CAST(P.PROPERTY_KEY AS VARCHAR(1000))
        ),
        TransformData AS (
            SELECT 
                ID,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) AS DATE_KEY,
                JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY,
                JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME,
                PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY,
                PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY AS PROPERTY_KEY,
                PEAK_PROPERTY_NAME AS PROPERTY_NAME,
                COMPANY_ORA_SCORE,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATENAME, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_ORA_SCORE,
                JTA_ID,
                NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE,
                ORA_SCORE,
                CREATEDATE,
                MODIFIEDDATE
            FROM SourceData
            WHERE PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL 
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_0] (
            [ID], [DATE_KEY], [JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY], [JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME], 
            [PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], 
            [DATE_ORA_SCORE], [JTA_ID], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], [ORA_SCORE], 
            [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            ID, DATE_KEY, JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY, JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME, 
            PEAK_PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, COMPANY_ORA_SCORE, 
            DATE_ORA_SCORE, JTA_ID, NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE, ORA_SCORE, 
            CREATEDATE, MODIFIEDDATE, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM TransformData;

        COMMIT TRAN;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END

AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. Identify & Delete Existing Keys
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT] T
        WHERE T.DATE_KEY IN (SELECT DISTINCT DATE_KEY FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_F]);

        -- 2. Insert Logic
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT] (
            [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED],
            [DATETIME_CREATED], [DATETIME_MODIFIED], [DATE_ORA_SCORE], [JTA_ID],
            [JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY], [JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME], [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE],
            [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [ID], [COMPANY_ORA_SCORE], [DATE_KEY], 
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [CREATEDATE], 112) AS INT),
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [MODIFIEDDATE], 112) AS INT),
            [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE], [DATE_ORA_SCORE], 
            CAST([JTA_ID] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            [JTURNER_PROPERTY_KEY], 
            CAST([JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            [NATIONAL_ORA_SCORE], [ORA_SCORE], [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            @SYSDATE
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_F];

        COMMIT;
        PRINT 'Delta Load Successful.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;

END

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_PORTFOLIO_AVG_TALI_0_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: Replicates Dataflow JTURNER_PORTFOLIO_AVG_TALI_0.
             Filters source for the latest available DATE_KEY where INDEX_KEY = 28.
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        -- 1. Wipe target table for a fresh snapshot
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PORTFOLIO_AVG_TALI_0];

        -- 2. Find the maximum date key in the source
        DECLARE @MaxDateKey VARCHAR(10);
        SELECT @MaxDateKey = MAX(DATE_KEY) 
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_F];

        -- 3. Insert the latest records for Index 28
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PORTFOLIO_AVG_TALI_0] (
            DATE_KEY,
            INDEX_KEY,
            YEAR,
            INDEXNAME,
            INDEXVALUE
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY,
            INDEX_KEY,
            YEAR,
            INDEXNAME,
            INDEXVALUE
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_F]
        WHERE DATE_KEY = @MaxDateKey
          AND INDEX_KEY = 28;

        PRINT 'JTurner Portfolio Avg refresh successful.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_FACT_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: ETL for JTurner Prospects Average Fact and Staging.
Targets: 
    1. [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_FACT]
    2. [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_0]
    3. [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_F]
Mapping: Ported from ATL 'JTurner_Prospects_Avg_FACT'
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();-- 1. Truncate all 3 targets per ATL "loader_drop_and_create_table" logic
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_FACT];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_F];

        -- 2. Process data into a Temp Table once for consistency across all targets
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#FinalQuery') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #FinalQuery;

        SELECT 
            -- ATL: Standardized YYYYMMDD string from YYYY-MM-DD source
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 1, 4) + 
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 6, 2) + 
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 9, 2) AS [DATE_KEY],
            idx.INDEX_KEY,
            src.[Year],
            UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.IndexName))) AS [INDEXNAME],
            TRY_CAST(src.IndexValue AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS [INDEXVALUE],
            src.CreateDate,
            src.ModifiedDate
        INTO #FinalQuery
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT] src
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_INDEX_KEYS_0] idx 
            ON UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.IndexName))) = idx.INDEXNAME
        WHERE src.IndexValue IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY 
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 1, 4) + 
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 6, 2) + 
            SUBSTRING(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.CreateDate)), 9, 2),
            idx.INDEX_KEY, src.[Year], src.IndexName, src.IndexValue, src.CreateDate, src.ModifiedDate;

        -- 3. Load Target 1: PROD Fact
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_FACT] (
            [DATE_KEY], [INDEX_KEY], [YEAR], [INDEXNAME], 
            [INDEXVALUE], [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE]
        )
        SELECT * FROM #FinalQuery;

        -- 4. Load Target 2: Staging _0
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [INDEX_KEY], [YEAR], [INDEXNAME], 
            [INDEXVALUE], [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE]
        )
        SELECT * FROM #FinalQuery;

        -- 5. Load Target 3: Staging _F
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_AVG_IMPORT_F] (
            [DATE_KEY], [INDEX_KEY], [YEAR], [INDEXNAME], 
            [INDEXVALUE], [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE]
        )
        SELECT * FROM #FinalQuery;
        PRINT 'Full Reload Successful for all 3 targets.';
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_QUAD_0_F_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: Consolidated ETL for JTurner Quad datasets.
Fix: Applied exact casing from INFORMATION_SCHEMA results.
     - Date_of_Interaction (Capital I)
     - Website_Speed (Capital S)
     - Follow_Up (Capital U)
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, @SYSDATE), 112) AS INT);

    -- Ensure we start without any hung transactions-- 1. Truncate all targets
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_F];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_NON_VISITOR_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_NON_VISITOR_F];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_F];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_F];

        -- 2. Property Lookup
        IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#PROPS') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #PROPS;
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME
        INTO #PROPS
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0;

        -- ==========================================
        -- 3. PROSPECTS (Stream 1)
        -- ==========================================
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PROSPECTS_F] (
            [ID], [Anticipated_move_date], [Best_property_visited], [Client_ID], [Contacted], [CreateDate],
            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DATE_SUBMIT], [DATETIME_SUBMIT], [Date_of_visit],
            [Email_Address], [JTA_ID], [Leasing_agent_presentation], [Leasing_agent_response], [Leasing_index],
            [ModifiedDate], [Name_of_leasing_agent], [Name_of_the_property], [Note], [Other_reason],

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_0]
        ([ID], [AMENITIES_AVAILABILITY], [AMENITIES_MAINTENANCE], [APARTMENT_CONDITION], [CLIENT_ID], [COMMON_AREA_LIGHTING], [CREATEDATE], [DATE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DESCRIBE_LIVING_EXPERIENCE], [DISPLAY_NAME], [EMAIL], [FOLLOW_UP], [HOW_ARE_WE_DOING], [INTERACTIONS_WITH_COMMUNITY_PERSONNEL], [JTA_ID], [LANDSCAPING_MAINTENANCE], [MANAGER_KNOWS_ME], [MODIFIEDDATE], [NAME], [NOTES], [OTHER_REASON], [PHONE], [PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD], [PROFESSIONALISM_OF_MAINTENANCE_STAFF], [PROPERTY_CLEANLINESS], [PROPERTY_NAME_JTURNER], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [QUESTION_CONCERN], [REASON_NOT_TO_RENEW], [RED_ALERT_STATUS], [REFER], [REQUEST_CONTACT_FROM_MANAGEMENT], [RESIDENT_EMAIL], [RESPONSE_ID], [SENSE_OF_COMMUNITY], [SUGGESTIONS_COMMENTS], [TALI_SCORE], [TIMELY_MAINTENANCE_COMPLETION], [UNIT], [VALUE_FOR_PRICE], [WHAT_VALUE_MEANS_TO_YOU], [WILL_YOU_RENEW_LEASE], [WILLING_TO_PROVIDE_TESTIMONIAL])
    SELECT

        src.[ID] AS [ID],
        src.[Amenities_availability] AS [AMENITIES_AVAILABILITY],
        src.[Amenities_maintenance] AS [AMENITIES_MAINTENANCE],
        src.[Apartment_condition] AS [APARTMENT_CONDITION],
        src.[Client_ID] AS [CLIENT_ID],
        src.[Common_area_lighting] AS [COMMON_AREA_LIGHTING],
        src.[CreateDate] AS [CREATEDATE],
        src.[Date] AS [DATE],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[CreateDate], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_CREATED],
        CAST(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())), '-', '') AS INT) AS [DATE_KEY],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[ModifiedDate], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_MODIFIED],
        src.[Describe_living_experience] AS [DESCRIBE_LIVING_EXPERIENCE],
        src.[Display_Name] AS [DISPLAY_NAME],
        src.[Email] AS [EMAIL],
        src.[Follow_Up] AS [FOLLOW_UP],
        src.[How_are_we_doing] AS [HOW_ARE_WE_DOING],
        src.[Interactions_with_community_personnel] AS [INTERACTIONS_WITH_COMMUNITY_PERSONNEL],
        src.[JTA_ID] AS [JTA_ID],
        src.[Landscaping_maintenance] AS [LANDSCAPING_MAINTENANCE],
        src.[Manager_knows_me] AS [MANAGER_KNOWS_ME],
        src.[ModifiedDate] AS [MODIFIEDDATE],
        src.[Name] AS [NAME],
        src.[Notes] AS [NOTES],
        src.[Other_reason] AS [OTHER_REASON],
        src.[Phone] AS [PHONE],
        src.[Preferred_contact_method] AS [PREFERRED_CONTACT_METHOD],
        src.[Professionalism_of_maintenance_staff] AS [PROFESSIONALISM_OF_MAINTENANCE_STAFF],
        src.[Property_cleanliness] AS [PROPERTY_CLEANLINESS],
        src.[Property_Name] AS [PROPERTY_NAME_JTURNER],
        p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        src.[Question_Concern] AS [QUESTION_CONCERN],
        src.[Reason_not_to_renew] AS [REASON_NOT_TO_RENEW],
        src.[Red_Alert_Status] AS [RED_ALERT_STATUS],
        src.[Refer] AS [REFER],
        src.[Request_contact_from_management] AS [REQUEST_CONTACT_FROM_MANAGEMENT],
        src.[Resident_Email] AS [RESIDENT_EMAIL],
        src.[Response_ID] AS [RESPONSE_ID],
        src.[Sense_of_community] AS [SENSE_OF_COMMUNITY],
        src.[Suggestions_Comments] AS [SUGGESTIONS_COMMENTS],
        src.[Tali_score] AS [TALI_SCORE],
        src.[Timely_maintenance_completion] AS [TIMELY_MAINTENANCE_COMPLETION],
        src.[Unit] AS [UNIT],
        src.[Value_for_price] AS [VALUE_FOR_PRICE],
        src.[What_value_means_to_you] AS [WHAT_VALUE_MEANS_TO_YOU],
        src.[Will_you_renew_lease] AS [WILL_YOU_RENEW_LEASE],
        src.[Willing_to_provide_testimonial] AS [WILLING_TO_PROVIDE_TESTIMONIAL]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_IMPORT] src
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
        ON src.[Client_ID] = p.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        AND p.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0;
END

name: JTURNER_SURVEYS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.JTURNER_SURVEYS, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_SURVEYS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
---

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_0];

        WITH Source_Surveys AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID], [Client_ID], [Crew_Left_the_Work_Area_Clean],
                CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [Date], 112) AS [DATE_STR],
                CAST([Date] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VAL],
                CAST([Email] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [Email],
                UPPER([FollowUp]) AS [FollowUp],
                [JTA_ID], UPPER([MaintenanceAddressedIn]) AS [MaintenanceAddressedIn],
                UPPER([Name]) AS [Name], CAST([Notes] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [Notes], 
                [PendingRequestSatisfaction], [Phone],
                UPPER([PreferredWayToContact]) AS [PreferredWayToContact],
                UPPER([PropertyName]) AS [JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME],
                CAST([Question_Concern] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [Question_Concern],
                UPPER([RedAlertStatus]) AS [RedAlertStatus],
                UPPER([RequestContactFromManagement]) AS [RequestContactFromManagement],
                LOWER([ResidentEmail]) AS [ResidentEmail], [ResponseID], [Still_pending_index],
                CAST([Suggestions_Comments] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [Suggestions_Comments],
                UPPER([Unit]) AS [Unit], [Workorder_Completed_in_a_Timely_Manner],
                [Workorder_Completed_to_My_Satisfaction], [Workorder_index],
                CAST([CreateDate] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [CreateDate],
                CAST([ModifiedDate] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [ModifiedDate]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS]
        ),
        Props_Lookup AS (
            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], UPPER([PROPERTY_NAME]) AS [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
        )
        -- EXPLICIT COLUMN LIST to prevent Msg 213
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_0] (
            [ID], [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [CLIENT_ID], [CREW_LEFT_THE_WORK_AREA_CLEAN], 
            [DATE_SURVEY], [DATETIME_SURVEY], [EMAIL], [FOLLOWUP], [JTA_ID], 
            [MAINTENANCEADDRESSEDIN], [NAME], [NOTES], [PENDINGREQUESTSATISFACTION], 
            [PHONE], [PREFERREDWAYTOCONTACT], [JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME], [QUESTION_CONCERN], 
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [REDALERTSTATUS], [REQUESTCONTACTFROMMANAGEMENT], 
            [RESIDENTEMAIL], [RESPONSEID], [STILL_PENDING_INDEX], [SUGGESTIONS_COMMENTS], 
            [UNIT], [WORKORDER_COMPLETED_IN_A_TIMELY_MANNER], [WORKORDER_COMPLETED_TO_MY_SATISFACTION], 
            [WORKORDER_INDEX], [CREATEDATE], [MODIFIEDDATE], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            S.[ID],
            CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112), 
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY], S.[Client_ID], S.[Crew_Left_the_Work_Area_Clean],
            CAST(S.[DATE_STR] AS INT), S.[DATETIME_VAL], S.[Email], S.[FollowUp],
            S.[JTA_ID], S.[MaintenanceAddressedIn], S.[Name], S.[Notes],
            S.[PendingRequestSatisfaction], S.[Phone], S.[PreferredWayToContact],
            S.[JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME], S.[Question_Concern], P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            S.[RedAlertStatus], S.[RequestContactFromManagement], S.[ResidentEmail],
            S.[ResponseID], S.[Still_pending_index], S.[Suggestions_Comments],
            S.[Unit], S.[Workorder_Completed_in_a_Timely_Manner],
            S.[Workorder_Completed_to_My_Satisfaction], S.[Workorder_index],
            S.[CreateDate], S.[ModifiedDate], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM Source_Surveys S
        LEFT OUTER JOIN Props_Lookup P ON TRY_CAST(S.[Client_ID] AS INT) = P.[PROPERTY_KEY];

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

    -- 2. TARGET-ALIGNED INSERT

    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_FACT] (
        [ID],                                     -- 1

    SELECT

        [DATE_SURVEY],                            -- 7

        [DATETIME_SURVEY],                        -- 10
        
        CAST([EMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000)),           -- 11
        CAST([FOLLOWUP] AS VARCHAR(1000)),        -- 12
        CAST([JTA_ID] AS VARCHAR(1000)),          -- 13
        CAST([MAINTENANCEADDRESSEDIN] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 14
        CAST([NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)),            -- 15
        CAST([NOTES] AS VARCHAR(1000)),           -- 16
        CAST([PENDINGREQUESTSATISFACTION] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 17
        CAST([PHONE] AS VARCHAR(1000)),           -- 18
        CAST([PREFERREDWAYTOCONTACT] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 19
        CAST([JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 20
        CAST([QUESTION_CONCERN] AS VARCHAR(1000)),-- 21
        CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)),   -- 22
        CAST([REDALERTSTATUS] AS VARCHAR(1000)),  -- 23
        CAST([REQUESTCONTACTFROMMANAGEMENT] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 24
        CAST([RESIDENTEMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000)),   -- 25
        [RESPONSEID],                             -- 26
        CAST([STILL_PENDING_INDEX] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 27
        CAST([SUGGESTIONS_COMMENTS] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 28
        CAST([UNIT] AS VARCHAR(1000)),            -- 29
        CAST([WORKORDER_COMPLETED_IN_A_TIMELY_MANNER] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 30
        CAST([WORKORDER_COMPLETED_TO_MY_SATISFACTION] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 31
        CAST([WORKORDER_INDEX] AS VARCHAR(1000)), -- 32
        SYSDATETIME()                             -- 33
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_F]';

    EXEC sp_executesql @InsertSQL;

END;

            A.[LEASING_AGENT_ID], A.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], A.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE], A.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID],

            A.[TERM_MONTH], A.[UNIT_ID], A.[UNIT_KEY], A.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], A.[UNIT_SPACE_ID], A.[UNIT_SQUARE_FEET],
