        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_APPLICATIONS] PA 
            ON A.[APPLICATION_ID] = PA.[APPLICATION_ID] 
            AND A.[APPLICANT_ID] = PA.[APPLICANT_ID]
        WHERE A.[FLAG_LEAD] > 0
          AND PA.[CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID] = 1;
END;

name: LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD: CASE WHEN LA.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'INBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD: CASE WHEN LA.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN (EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (78,9,442,449) AND EVENT_RESULT_ID <> 46434) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 THEN EVENT_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN (EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (78,9,442,449) AND EVENT_RESULT_ID <> 46434) THEN EVENT_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0 AND NEW_STAGE_ID=3 AND NEW_STATUS_ID >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0 AND (NEW_STAGE_ID=1 OR (NEW_STAGE_ID=3 AND NEW_STATUS_ID<=2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0 AND NEW_STAGE_ID=4 AND NEW_STATUS_ID >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0 AND NEW_STAGE_ID=4 AND NEW_STATUS_ID <= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_INBOUND: CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_INBOUND_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_OUTBOUND_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS: CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END
TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END

LEAD_MILESTONE: CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN 'COMPLETE LEASE' WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN 'INCOMPLETE LEASE' WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 THEN 'APPLIED' WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 THEN 'TOUR COMPLETED' WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 THEN 'TOUR BOOKED' WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 THEN 'LEAD CAPTURED' ELSE NULL END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENT_RESULTS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENT_SUB_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0_SP]
AS

-- !! DEPRECATED 2026-04-01: Canonical version migrated to WH_ODS. This staging copy pending cleanup. !!
-- !! Do not modify this copy. Make changes to WH_ODS.dbo.LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0_SP instead. !!

BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0];

    WITH
    CTE_EventResults AS (
        SELECT ID AS EVENT_RESULT_ID, UPPER(NAME) AS EVENT_RESULT_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_RESULTS]
    ),
    CTE_EventSubTypes AS (
        SELECT ID AS EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, NAME AS EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_SUB_TYPES]
    ),
    CTE_EventTypes AS (
        SELECT ID AS EVENT_TYPE_ID, NAME AS EVENT_TYPE_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_TYPES]
    ),
    CTE_AppStatus AS (
        SELECT ID AS STATUS_ID, NAME AS [STATUS]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STATUSES]
    ),
    CTE_AppStages AS (
        SELECT ID AS STAGE_ID, NAME AS [STAGE]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STAGES]
    ),
    CTE_Events AS (
        SELECT
            ID AS EVENT_ID,
            CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(EVENT_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)), 112) AS INT) AS DERIVED_EVENT_DATE,
            TRY_CAST(EVENT_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            NEW_STAGE_ID, NEW_STATUS_ID, OLD_STAGE_ID, OLD_STATUS_ID, PROPERTY_ID
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENTS]
        WHERE EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (1,3,9,10,12,13,17,78,142)
          AND EVENT_DATETIME >= '2023-08-31 00:00:00'
    ),
    CTE_LeadApps AS (
        SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_0] WHERE FLAG_LEAD > 0
    ),
    CTE_Join AS (
        SELECT
            LA.APPLICATION_ID, LA.AY, E.EVENT_ID,
            LA.CUSTOMER_NAME, LA.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            LA.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST, LA.CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            E.DERIVED_EVENT_DATE, E.EVENT_DATETIME,
            E.EVENT_RESULT_ID, ER.EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            E.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, EST.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            E.EVENT_TYPE_ID, ET.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            LA.LEASE_ID, LA.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            E.NEW_STAGE_ID, E.NEW_STATUS_ID,
            LA.PROPERTY_KEY, LA.PROPERTY_NAME,
            ASTG.[STAGE], ASTS.[STATUS],
            LA.LEAD_SOURCE, LA.LEAD_SOURCE_ID, LA.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            LA.FLAG_LEAD,
            CASE WHEN LA.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'INBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD,
            CASE WHEN LA.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD
        FROM CTE_LeadApps LA
        LEFT JOIN CTE_Events E ON LA.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = E.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_EventTypes ET ON E.EVENT_TYPE_ID = ET.EVENT_TYPE_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_EventSubTypes EST ON E.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = EST.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_EventResults ER ON E.EVENT_RESULT_ID = ER.EVENT_RESULT_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_AppStatus ASTS ON E.NEW_STATUS_ID = ASTS.STATUS_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_AppStages ASTG ON E.NEW_STAGE_ID = ASTG.STAGE_ID
    ),
    CTE_FlagTours AS (
        SELECT *,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            CASE WHEN (EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (78,9,442,449) AND EVENT_RESULT_ID <> 46434) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 THEN EVENT_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
                AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            CASE WHEN (EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (78,9,442,449) AND EVENT_RESULT_ID <> 46434) THEN EVENT_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
                AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED
        FROM CTE_Join
    ),
    CTE_FlagMilestones AS (
        SELECT *,
            CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0
                      AND NEW_STAGE_ID=3 AND NEW_STATUS_ID >= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
            CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0
                      AND (NEW_STAGE_ID=1 OR (NEW_STAGE_ID=3 AND NEW_STATUS_ID<=2)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
            CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0
                      AND NEW_STAGE_ID=4 AND NEW_STATUS_ID >= 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
            CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=0
                      AND NEW_STAGE_ID=4 AND NEW_STATUS_ID <= 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
            NULLIF(TRIM(ISNULL([STAGE],'') + ' ' + ISNULL([STATUS],'')), '') AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME
        FROM CTE_FlagTours
    ),
    CTE_AllLeases AS (
        SELECT APPLICATION_ID, AY, PROPERTY_KEY,
               MAX(FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL) AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASES]
        GROUP BY APPLICATION_ID, AY, PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    -- -------------------------------------------------------
    -- Aggregate: one row per APPLICATION_ID
    -- -------------------------------------------------------
    CTE_Agg AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            MAX(AY)                   AS AY,
            MAX(PROPERTY_KEY)         AS PROPERTY_KEY,
            MAX(CUSTOMER_NAME)        AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
            MAX(CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST)  AS CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            MAX(CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST)   AS CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            MAX(CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE) AS CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            MAX(LEASE_INTERVAL_ID)    AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            MAX(LEAD_SOURCE)          AS LEAD_SOURCE,
            MAX(LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE)     AS LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD)            AS FLAG_LEAD,
            MAX(FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD)    AS FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD,
            MAX(FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD)   AS FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD,

            -- Current milestone flags
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED)     AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED)  AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED)         AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED)   AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE)  AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
            MAX(FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE) AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,

            -- Achievement datetimes (first event when milestone was achieved)
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1    THEN DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 THEN DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1        THEN EVENT_DATETIME END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1  THEN EVENT_DATETIME END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN EVENT_DATETIME END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN EVENT_DATETIME END) AS DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,

            -- Achievement event IDs
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1    THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1        THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1  THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            MIN(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN EVENT_ID END) AS EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,

            -- Stage/status name at first achievement
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1    THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1        THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1  THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            MAX(CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN STAGE_STATUS_NAME END) AS STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,

            -- Max event details
            MAX(DERIVED_EVENT_DATE)  AS MAX_EVENT_DATE,
            MAX(EVENT_DATETIME)      AS MAX_EVENT_DATETIME,
            MAX(EVENT_ID)            AS MAX_EVENT_ID
        FROM CTE_FlagMilestones
        GROUP BY APPLICATION_ID
    ),
    -- Get type/stage names for the most recent event
    CTE_MaxEventDetail AS (
        SELECT
            fm.APPLICATION_ID,
            fm.EVENT_TYPE_NAME  AS MAX_EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            fm.STAGE_STATUS_NAME AS MAX_STAGE_STATUS_NAME
        FROM CTE_FlagMilestones fm
        INNER JOIN CTE_Agg a
            ON fm.APPLICATION_ID = a.APPLICATION_ID
           AND fm.EVENT_ID = a.MAX_EVENT_ID
    ),
    -- Build all derived flags and day calculations
    CTE_Final AS (
        SELECT
            a.APPLICATION_ID,
            a.AY,
            a.PROPERTY_KEY,
            a.CUSTOMER_NAME,
            a.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            a.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            a.CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            a.EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,
            a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD,
            a.FLAG_LEAD,

            -- Milestone flags (current)
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
            -- Achievement = same as current since MAX over all events
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED         AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE  AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED   AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            -- Last 4 weeks: lead captured within 4 weeks
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED     AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED  AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,

            -- Lead-to funnel flags
            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED                AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_OUTBOUND,

            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE         AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_OUTBOUND,

            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE        AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_OUTBOUND,

            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED            AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_OUTBOUND,

            a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED         AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOURED_OUTBOUND,

            -- Lease velocity (from WH_PROD2.LEASES)
            ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL, 0)    AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_INBOUND_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(al.FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,0)=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_OUTBOUND_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,

            a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD,

            -- Toured-to-complete
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_OUTBOUND,

            -- Toured-to-incomplete
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1
                      AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1 AND a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 AND a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_OUTBOUND,

            -- Days to completion/incompletion (from lead capture to milestone)
            DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED)   AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED)  END AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND,

            DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND,

            a.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            a.MAX_EVENT_DATE,
            a.MAX_EVENT_DATETIME,
            a.MAX_EVENT_ID,
            me.MAX_EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            me.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,

            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED,
            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED,
            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED,
            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED,
            a.STAGE_STATUS_NAME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED,

            -- Toured-to-complete days
            DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED)   AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND,

            -- Toured-to-incomplete days
            DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1  THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 AND a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED >= DATEADD(WEEK,-4,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
                 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND,
            CASE WHEN a.FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD=1 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) END AS TOURED_TO_INCOMPLETE_DAYS_OUTBOUND,

            -- Incomplete-to-complete days
            DATEDIFF(DAY, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED, a.DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED) AS INCOMPLETE_TO_COMPLETE_DAYS,

            -- Lead milestone label (highest achieved)
            CASE
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE=1   THEN 'COMPLETE LEASE'
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE=1 THEN 'INCOMPLETE LEASE'
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED=1          THEN 'APPLIED'
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED=1   THEN 'TOUR COMPLETED'
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED=1      THEN 'TOUR BOOKED'
                WHEN a.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED=1    THEN 'LEAD CAPTURED'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS LEAD_MILESTONE,

            a.LEAD_SOURCE,
            a.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE
        FROM CTE_Agg a
        LEFT JOIN CTE_MaxEventDetail me ON a.APPLICATION_ID = me.APPLICATION_ID
        LEFT JOIN CTE_AllLeases al
            ON a.APPLICATION_ID = al.APPLICATION_ID
           AND a.AY = al.AY
           AND a.PROPERTY_KEY = al.PROPERTY_KEY
    )

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0] (
        [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],
        [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED], [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED],
        [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED], [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED],
        [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED], [DATETIME_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED],
        [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED], [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED],
        [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED], [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED],
        [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED], [EVENT_ID_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED_ACHIEVED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_APPLIED_OUTBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_COMPLETE_OUTBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_LAST_FOUR_WEEKS_OUTBOUND], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_INCOMPLETE_OUTBOUND],
        [FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED], [FLAG_LEAD_TO_TOUR_BOOKED_INBOUND],

name: LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;-- 1. Identify Keys for Deletion (Logic from ATL 'Keys' and 'MO_Deletes')
        -- We use a Common Table Expression to define the scope of the current refresh
        WITH CTE_IncrementalKeys AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                DATE_KEY, 
                APPLICATION_ID, 
                AY, 
                PROPERTY_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT_F]
        )
        -- 2. DELETE existing records from Production that match the incoming batch keys
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT] AS T
        INNER JOIN CTE_IncrementalKeys AS S
            ON  T.DATE_KEY       = S.DATE_KEY
            AND T.APPLICATION_ID = S.APPLICATION_ID
            AND T.AY             = S.AY
            AND T.PROPERTY_KEY   = S.PROPERTY_KEY;

        -- 3. INSERT the new batch from Staging (Logic from ATL 'MO_Appends')
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATIONS_FACT]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD],

name: LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_LEAD_EVENT: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (12,142) AND EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 AND EVENT_RESULT_ID = 46434 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND: CASE WHEN LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'INBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND: CASE WHEN LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEADS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_EVENTS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0];

        -- 2. Logic Implementation via CTEs (Replacing XTEMPs/Views)
        ;WITH Leads_CTE AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEADS_0]
        ),
        LeadEvents_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                EVENT_ID, COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID, CREATED_ON_DATE, CREATED_ON_DATEID, 
                TRY_CAST(CREATED_ON_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
                CUSTOMER_ID, EVENT_DATE, EVENT_DATEID, 
                TRY_CAST(EVENT_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS EVENT_DATETIME,
                EVENT_RESULT_ID, EVENT_RESULT_NAME, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
                EVENT_TYPE_ID, EVENT_TYPE_NAME, LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, 
                NEW_STAGE_ID, NEW_STATUS_ID, OLD_STAGE_ID, OLD_STATUS_ID
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_0]
        ),
        Combo_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                L.*, 
                LE.COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID AS EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
                LE.CREATED_ON_DATE AS EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
                LE.CREATED_ON_DATETIME AS EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
                LE.EVENT_ID, LE.EVENT_DATE, LE.EVENT_DATEID,
                LE.EVENT_DATETIME, LE.EVENT_RESULT_ID, LE.EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
                LE.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, LE.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
                LE.EVENT_TYPE_ID, LE.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                LE.NEW_STAGE_ID AS EVENT_NEW_STAGE_ID,
                LE.NEW_STATUS_ID AS EVENT_NEW_STATUS_ID,
                LE.OLD_STAGE_ID AS EVENT_OLD_STAGE_ID,
                LE.OLD_STATUS_ID AS EVENT_OLD_STATUS_ID
            FROM Leads_CTE L
            INNER JOIN LeadEvents_CTE LE ON LE.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = L.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),
        FlagLeadEvent_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                CASE 
                    WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (12,142) AND EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
                    WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 AND EVENT_RESULT_ID = 46434 THEN 0
                    ELSE 1 
                END AS FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
                CASE WHEN LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'INBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
                CASE WHEN LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE = 'OUTBOUND' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND
            FROM Combo_CTE
        ),
        AppStages_CTE AS (
            SELECT ID AS STAGE_ID, NAME AS STAGE_NAME FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STAGES]
        ),
        AppStatus_CTE AS (
            SELECT ID AS STATUS_ID, NAME AS STATUS_NAME FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STATUSES]
        ),
        GetOld_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                F.*,
                ASTG.STAGE_NAME AS EVENT_OLD_STAGE_NAME,
                ASTT.STATUS_NAME AS EVENT_OLD_STATUS_NAME
            FROM FlagLeadEvent_CTE F
            LEFT JOIN AppStages_CTE ASTG ON ASTG.STAGE_ID = F.EVENT_OLD_STAGE_ID
            LEFT JOIN AppStatus_CTE ASTT ON ASTT.STATUS_ID = F.EVENT_OLD_STATUS_ID
            WHERE F.FLAG_LEAD_EVENT > 0
        ),
        GetNew_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                G.*,
                ASTG.STAGE_NAME AS EVENT_NEW_STAGE_NAME,
                ASTT.STATUS_NAME AS EVENT_NEW_STATUS_NAME
            FROM GetOld_CTE G
            LEFT JOIN AppStages_CTE ASTG ON ASTG.STAGE_ID = G.EVENT_NEW_STAGE_ID
            LEFT JOIN AppStatus_CTE ASTT ON ASTT.STATUS_ID = G.EVENT_NEW_STATUS_ID
        )
        
        -- 3. Final Load
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0] (
            APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_ID, APPLICANT_EMAIL, APPLICANT_GENDER, APPLICANT_ID, APPLICANT_NAME, 
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST, APPLICANT_NAME_LAST, APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE, APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE, 
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY, APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK, AY, AY_WEEK, AY_WEEK_KEY, CUSTOMER_ID, 
            CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST, CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST, CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE, DATE_APPLICATION, 
            DATE_APPROVED, DATE_CANCELLED, DATE_COMPLETED, DATE_CREATED, DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT, 
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT, EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID, EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE, EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME, 
            EVENT_DATE, EVENT_DATEID, EVENT_DATETIME, EVENT_RESULT_ID, EVENT_RESULT_NAME, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, 
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME, EVENT_TYPE_ID, EVENT_TYPE_NAME, EVENT_NEW_STAGE_ID, EVENT_NEW_STAGE_NAME, 
            EVENT_NEW_STATUS_ID, EVENT_NEW_STATUS_NAME, EVENT_OLD_STAGE_ID, EVENT_OLD_STAGE_NAME, 
            EVENT_OLD_STATUS_ID, EVENT_OLD_STATUS_NAME, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED, 
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE, 
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED, 
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED, FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT, 
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE, 
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS, FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR, FLAG_LEAD, 
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT, FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND, FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND, INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY, 
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE, INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE, LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY, LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE, 
            LAST_CONTACT_ID, LAST_CONTACT_ORDER, LAST_CONTACT_TYPE, LEAD_SOURCE, LEAD_SOURCE_ID, 
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE, LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, STAGE, STAGE_ID, 
            STATUS, STATUS_ID
        )
        SELECT 
            APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_ID, APPLICANT_EMAIL, APPLICANT_GENDER, APPLICANT_ID, APPLICANT_NAME, 
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST, APPLICANT_NAME_LAST, APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE, APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,

name: LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1_SP
transformations: PREV_EVENT_ID: CASE WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY AND APPLICATION_ID = PREV_APPLICATION_ID AND LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER THEN PREV_EVENT_ID ELSE NULL END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 12 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 12 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60 THEN 0 WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 13 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 13 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60 THEN 0 WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 142 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 142 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 THEN 'TOUR COMPLETED' WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 AND EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = 454 THEN 'TOUR BOOKED' ELSE NULL END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 AND EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = 454 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1 -- LEAD ON HOLD WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- LEAD CANCELLED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION ON HOLD WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION CANCELLED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION COMPLETED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION APPROVED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION ON HOLD / CANCELLED APP WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION CANCELLED / CANCELLED APP WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION PARTIALLY APPROVED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1 -- LEASE APPROVED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1 -- LEASE ON HOLD WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 5 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- LEASE CANCELLED (stage 5) WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1 -- LEASE PARTIALLY APPROVED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1 -- LEASE STARTED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1 -- LEASE PARTIALLY COMPLETED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1 -- LEASE COMPLETED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1 -- LEAD STARTED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1 -- LEAD PARTIALLY COMPLETED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1 -- LEAD COMPLETED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1 -- LEAD APPROVED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1 -- LEAD ON HOLD WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- LEAD CANCELLED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1 -- LEAD PARTIALLY APPROVED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION STARTED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1 -- APPLICATION PARTIALLY COMPLETED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1 -- LEASE CANCELLED WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1 -- LEASE PARTIALLY APPROVED ELSE 0 END

PREV_EVENT_ID: CASE WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY AND APPLICATION_ID = PREV_APPLICATION_ID AND EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME = PREV_EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME AND LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER THEN PREV_EVENT_ID ELSE NULL END

PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER: CASE WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY AND APPLICATION_ID = PREV_APPLICATION_ID AND EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME = PREV_EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME AND LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER THEN PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ELSE NULL END
PREV_EVENT_DATETIME: CASE WHEN pv.PREV_EVENT_ID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE pv.PREV_EVENT_DATETIME END
