CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ============================================================
    -- LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1
    -- Migrated from SAP Data Services ATL: LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1
    -- Load type: Full Reload (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
    -- Source:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0]
    -- Target:    [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1]
    -- ============================================================

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1];

    WITH

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- AllRecords: pass-through from source.
    -- Renames EVENT_NEW_STAGE/STATUS -> EVENT_STAGE/STATUS.
    -- EVENT_OLD_* columns exist in source but are unused in ATL.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    AllRecords AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            APPLICANT_GENDER,
            APPLICANT_ID,
            APPLICANT_NAME,
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            AY,
            AY_WEEK,
            AY_WEEK_KEY,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            DATE_APPLICATION,
            DATE_APPROVED,
            DATE_CANCELLED,
            DATE_COMPLETED,
            DATE_CREATED,
            DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            EVENT_DATE,
            EVENT_DATEID,
            EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            EVENT_NEW_STAGE_ID   AS EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            EVENT_NEW_STAGE_NAME AS EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            EVENT_NEW_STATUS_ID  AS EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            EVENT_NEW_STATUS_NAME AS EVENT_STATUS_NAME,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_LEAD,
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LEAD_SOURCE,
            LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            STAGE,
            STAGE_ID,
            STATUS,
            STATUS_ID
        FROM [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_0]
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- OrderBy: deduplicated keys with ordering for row number generation.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_ID
    --      ORDER BY PROPERTY_KEY ASC, APPLICATION_ID ASC, EVENT_ID ASC
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    OrderBy AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID
        FROM AllRecords
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GenEventRow: generates LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER.
    -- ATL: nvl(gen_row_num_by_group(PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID), 0)
    -- T-SQL: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
    --                           ORDER BY EVENT_ID ASC)
    -- Note: ATL OrderBy feeds this sorted by PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID,
    -- EVENT_ID ASC, so within each partition events are numbered
    -- chronologically by EVENT_ID.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    GenEventRow AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            ISNULL(
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                    ORDER BY EVENT_ID ASC
                ), 0
            ) AS LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM OrderBy
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GetPrev: adds previous-row values for same APPLICATION via LAG().
    -- ATL ORDER BY: APPLICATION_ID ASC, LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER DESC
    -- LAG() in this descending order means the "previous" row in the
    -- window is the event with the next higher event number — i.e. the
    -- chronologically earlier event (since numbers are ascending by time).
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    GetPrev AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            LAG(PROPERTY_KEY, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                ORDER BY LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_PROPERTY_KEY,
            LAG(APPLICATION_ID, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                ORDER BY LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_APPLICATION_ID,
            LAG(EVENT_ID, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                ORDER BY LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_EVENT_ID,
            LAG(LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER, 1) OVER (
                PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                ORDER BY LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM GenEventRow
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- FlagPrev: nulls PREV_EVENT_ID when boundary conditions are not met.
    -- ATL decode logic:
    --   IF same PROPERTY_KEY AND same APPLICATION_ID
    --      AND current LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER > PREV number
    --   THEN keep PREV_EVENT_ID
    --   ELSE NULL
    -- The > check confirms we're looking backward within same group.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    FlagPrev AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            CASE
                WHEN PROPERTY_KEY    = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY
                 AND APPLICATION_ID  = PREV_APPLICATION_ID
                 AND LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER
                THEN PREV_EVENT_ID
                ELSE NULL
            END AS PREV_EVENT_ID,
            PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM GetPrev
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- PrevEvents: LEFT JOIN FlagPrev -> AllRecords on PREV_EVENT_ID = EVENT_ID
    -- to retrieve the previous event's type/subtype/result details.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    PrevEvents AS (
        SELECT
            fp.PROPERTY_KEY,
            fp.APPLICATION_ID,
            fp.EVENT_ID,
            fp.LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            fp.PREV_EVENT_ID,
            fp.PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            ar.EVENT_DATETIME       AS PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
            ar.EVENT_TYPE_ID        AS PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_TYPE_NAME      AS PREV_EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID    AS PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME  AS PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_RESULT_ID      AS PREV_EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            ar.EVENT_RESULT_NAME    AS PREV_EVENT_RESULT_NAME
        FROM FlagPrev fp
        LEFT JOIN AllRecords ar
            ON fp.PREV_EVENT_ID = ar.EVENT_ID
            AND fp.APPLICATION_ID = ar.APPLICATION_ID
            AND fp.PROPERTY_KEY = ar.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Combo2: INNER JOIN AllRecords + PrevEvents on
    --         PROPERTY_KEY + APPLICATION_ID + EVENT_ID.
    -- Calculates PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE:
    --   ATL: date_diff(PREV_EVENT_DATETIME, EVENT_DATETIME, 'M')
    --   'M' in SAP DS = minutes
    --   T-SQL: DATEDIFF(MINUTE, PREV_EVENT_DATETIME, EVENT_DATETIME)
    -- CalcTimeDiff is pure pass-through, collapsed here.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    Combo2 AS (
        SELECT
            ar.APPLICATION_ID,
            ar.EVENT_ID,
            ar.APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            ar.APPLICANT_GENDER,
            ar.APPLICANT_ID,
            ar.APPLICANT_NAME,
            ar.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            ar.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            ar.APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            ar.APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            ar.APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            ar.APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            ar.AY,
            ar.AY_WEEK,
            ar.AY_WEEK_KEY,
            ar.CUSTOMER_ID,
            ar.CUSTOMER_NAME,
            ar.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            ar.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            ar.CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            ar.DATE_APPLICATION,
            ar.DATE_APPROVED,
            ar.DATE_CANCELLED,
            ar.DATE_COMPLETED,
            ar.DATE_CREATED,
            ar.DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            ar.DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            ar.EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            ar.EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            ar.EVENT_DATE,
            ar.EVENT_DATEID,
            ar.EVENT_DATETIME,
            ar.EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            ar.EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            ar.EVENT_STATUS_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            ar.EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            ar.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            ar.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            ar.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            ar.FLAG_LEAD,
            ar.FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            ar.FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            ar.FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            ar.INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            ar.INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            ar.INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            ar.LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            ar.LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            ar.LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            ar.LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            ar.LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            ar.LEAD_SOURCE,
            ar.LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            ar.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            ar.LEASE_ID,
            ar.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            pe.LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            ar.PROPERTY_KEY,
            ar.PROPERTY_NAME,
            ar.STAGE,
            ar.STAGE_ID,
            ar.STATUS,
            ar.STATUS_ID,
            -- Previous event details from PrevEvents
            pe.PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_ID,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            pe.PREV_EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            pe.PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            -- Time lapse in minutes between prev and current event
            DATEDIFF(MINUTE, pe.PREV_EVENT_DATETIME, ar.EVENT_DATETIME)
                AS PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE
        FROM AllRecords ar
        INNER JOIN PrevEvents pe
            ON  ar.PROPERTY_KEY   = pe.PROPERTY_KEY
            AND ar.APPLICATION_ID = pe.APPLICATION_ID
            AND ar.EVENT_ID       = pe.EVENT_ID
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- FlagValidLeads: computes FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT.
    -- ATL decode logic suppresses rapid duplicate events:
    --   IF event type 12 repeated within 60 min of prior type 12 -> 0
    --   IF event type 13 repeated within 60 min of prior type 13 -> 0
    --   IF event type 142 repeated within 60 min of prior type 142 -> 0
    --   ELSE -> 1
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    FlagValidLeads AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            APPLICANT_GENDER,
            APPLICANT_ID,
            APPLICANT_NAME,
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            AY,
            AY_WEEK,
            AY_WEEK_KEY,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            DATE_APPLICATION,
            DATE_APPROVED,
            DATE_CANCELLED,
            DATE_COMPLETED,
            DATE_CREATED,
            DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            EVENT_DATE,
            EVENT_DATEID,
            EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            EVENT_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_LEAD,
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LEAD_SOURCE,
            LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
            PREV_EVENT_ID,
            PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID,
            PREV_EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            PREV_EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            PREV_EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            PREV_EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE,
            PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            STAGE,
            STAGE_ID,
            STATUS,
            STATUS_ID,
            CASE
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 12
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 12
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60  THEN 0
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 13
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 13
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60  THEN 0
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 142
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TYPE_ID = 142
                 AND PREV_EVENT_TIME_LAPSE < 60  THEN 0
                ELSE 1
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT
        FROM Combo2
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- ValidLeadEvents: filter WHERE FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT > 0
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    ValidLeadEvents AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM FlagValidLeads
        WHERE FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT > 0
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- FlagTours: adds tour milestone flags and computed string columns.
    -- EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME = EVENT_STAGE_NAME + ' ' + EVENT_STATUS_NAME
    -- EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME:
    --   type 78            -> 'TOUR COMPLETED'
    --   type 17 subtype 454 -> 'TOUR BOOKED'
    --   else               -> NULL
    -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED:
    --   type 17 AND subtype 454 -> 1, else 0
    -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED:
    --   type 78 -> 1, else 0
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    FlagTours AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            APPLICANT_GENDER,
            APPLICANT_ID,
            APPLICANT_NAME,
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            AY,
            AY_WEEK,
            AY_WEEK_KEY,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            DATE_APPLICATION,
            DATE_APPROVED,
            DATE_CANCELLED,
            DATE_COMPLETED,
            DATE_CREATED,
            DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            EVENT_DATE,
            EVENT_DATEID,
            EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            CAST(EVENT_STAGE_NAME + ' ' + EVENT_STATUS_NAME AS VARCHAR(250))
                AS EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            CASE
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78                              THEN 'TOUR COMPLETED'
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 AND EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = 454 THEN 'TOUR BOOKED'
                ELSE NULL
            END AS EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_LEAD,
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LEAD_SOURCE,
            LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            STAGE,
            STAGE_ID,
            STATUS,
            STATUS_ID,
            CASE
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 AND EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = 454 THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            CASE
                WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 THEN 1
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED
        FROM ValidLeadEvents
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Flag_Progression: adds 6 milestone classification flags.
    -- All flags are mutually exclusive and conditioned on
    -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED = 0 AND TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
    -- (i.e. these are non-tour progression events).
    -- Uses EVENT_STAGE_ID + EVENT_STATUS_ID for classification.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    Flag_Progression AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            APPLICANT_GENDER,
            APPLICANT_ID,
            APPLICANT_NAME,
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            AY,
            AY_WEEK,
            AY_WEEK_KEY,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            DATE_APPLICATION,
            DATE_APPROVED,
            DATE_CANCELLED,
            DATE_COMPLETED,
            DATE_CREATED,
            DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            EVENT_DATE,
            EVENT_DATEID,
            EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_LEAD,
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LEAD_SOURCE,
            LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            STAGE,
            STAGE_ID,
            STATUS,
            STATUS_ID,
            -- FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1  -- LEAD ON HOLD
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- LEAD CANCELLED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION ON HOLD
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION CANCELLED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED,
            -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION COMPLETED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION APPROVED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION ON HOLD / CANCELLED APP
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION CANCELLED / CANCELLED APP
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION PARTIALLY APPROVED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
            -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1  -- LEASE APPROVED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1  -- LEASE ON HOLD
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 5 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- LEASE CANCELLED (stage 5)
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1  -- LEASE PARTIALLY APPROVED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
            -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1  -- LEASE STARTED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1  -- LEASE PARTIALLY COMPLETED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1  -- LEASE COMPLETED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
            -- FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1  -- LEAD STARTED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1  -- LEAD PARTIALLY COMPLETED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 3 THEN 1  -- LEAD COMPLETED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 4 THEN 1  -- LEAD APPROVED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 5 THEN 1  -- LEAD ON HOLD
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- LEAD CANCELLED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 1 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1  -- LEAD PARTIALLY APPROVED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 1 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION STARTED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 3 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 2 THEN 1  -- APPLICATION PARTIALLY COMPLETED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
            -- FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED
            CASE
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 6 THEN 1  -- LEASE CANCELLED
                WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED    = 0
                 AND FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED = 0
                 AND EVENT_STAGE_ID = 4 AND EVENT_STATUS_ID = 7 THEN 1  -- LEASE PARTIALLY APPROVED
                ELSE 0
            END AS FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED
        FROM FlagTours
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- MapMilestone: derives EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME from the 6 flags.
    -- Priority order (first match wins):
    --   LEAD CAPTURED > TOUR BOOKED > TOUR COMPLETED > APPLIED >
    --   COMPLETED LEASE > INCOMPLETE LEASE > NULL
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    MapMilestone AS (
        SELECT
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            APPLICANT_EMAIL,
            APPLICANT_GENDER,
            APPLICANT_ID,
            APPLICANT_NAME,
            APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
            APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
            APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
            AY,
            AY_WEEK,
            AY_WEEK_KEY,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            CUSTOMER_NAME,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
            DATE_APPLICATION,
            DATE_APPROVED,
            DATE_CANCELLED,
            DATE_COMPLETED,
            DATE_CREATED,
            DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
            DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
            EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
            EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            EVENT_DATE,
            EVENT_DATEID,
            EVENT_DATETIME,
            EVENT_RESULT_ID,
            EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_ID,
            EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
            EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_STATUS_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME,
            EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
            FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
            FLAG_LEAD,
            FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED,
            FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
            FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
            FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
            FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED,
            LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
            LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
            LAST_CONTACT_ID,
            LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
            LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
            LEAD_SOURCE,
            LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
            LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            STAGE,
            STAGE_ID,
            STATUS,
            STATUS_ID,
            CAST(
                CASE
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED   > 0 THEN 'LEAD CAPTURED'
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED     > 0 THEN 'TOUR BOOKED'
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED  > 0 THEN 'TOUR COMPLETED'
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED         > 0 THEN 'APPLIED'
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE  > 0 THEN 'COMPLETED LEASE'
                    WHEN FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE > 0 THEN 'INCOMPLETE LEASE'
                    ELSE NULL
                END
            AS VARCHAR(200)) AS EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
        FROM Flag_Progression
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- OrderBy2: deduplicated keys + EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME for milestone
    -- row number generation.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
    --               EVENT_ID
    --      ORDER BY PROPERTY_KEY ASC, APPLICATION_ID ASC, EVENT_ID ASC
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    OrderBy2 AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
        FROM MapMilestone
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GenRowNumber: generates two row numbers per event:
    --   LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER:
    --     gen_row_num_by_group(PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID)
    --   LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER:
    --     gen_row_num_by_group(PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME)
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    GenRowNumber AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
            ISNULL(
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID
                    ORDER BY EVENT_ID ASC
                ), 0
            ) AS LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER,
            ISNULL(
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
                    ORDER BY EVENT_ID ASC
                ), 0
            ) AS LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM OrderBy2
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- GetPrev2: LAG() for the milestone chain.
    -- ATL ORDER BY: APPLICATION_ID ASC,
    --               LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
    --               EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
    --               LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    GetPrev2 AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER,
            LAG(PROPERTY_KEY, 1) OVER (
                ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
                         EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_PROPERTY_KEY,
            LAG(APPLICATION_ID, 1) OVER (
                ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
                         EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_APPLICATION_ID,
            LAG(EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME, 1) OVER (
                ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
                         EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
            LAG(EVENT_ID, 1) OVER (
                ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
                         EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_EVENT_ID,
            LAG(LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER, 1) OVER (
                ORDER BY APPLICATION_ID ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER DESC,
                         EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME ASC,
                         LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER ASC
            ) AS PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM GenRowNumber
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- FlagPrev2: nulls PREV_EVENT_ID when milestone boundary not met.
    -- Conditions: same PROPERTY_KEY, APPLICATION_ID, EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
    --   AND current LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER >
    --       PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    FlagPrev2 AS (
        SELECT
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            APPLICATION_ID,
            EVENT_ID,
            EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER,
            LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER,
            CASE
                WHEN PROPERTY_KEY    = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY
                 AND APPLICATION_ID  = PREV_APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME = PREV_EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
                 AND LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
                         > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
                THEN PREV_EVENT_ID
                ELSE NULL
            END AS PREV_EVENT_ID,
            CASE
                WHEN PROPERTY_KEY    = PREV_PROPERTY_KEY
                 AND APPLICATION_ID  = PREV_APPLICATION_ID
                 AND EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME = PREV_EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME
                 AND LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
                         > PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
                THEN PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
                ELSE NULL
            END AS PREV_LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER
        FROM GetPrev2
    ),

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- PreviousValids: INNER JOIN FlagPrev2 -> MapMilestone ON EVENT_ID
    -- to retrieve PREV_EVENT_DATETIME from the previous milestone event.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    PreviousValids AS (
        SELECT
            fp2.PROPERTY_KEY,
            fp2.APPLICATION_ID,
            fp2.EVENT_ID,
            fp2.EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
            fp2.LEAD_APPLICATION_LEAD_EVENT_NUMBER,
            fp2.LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER,
            mm.EVENT_DATETIME    AS PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
            fp2.PREV_EVENT_ID
        FROM FlagPrev2 fp2
        INNER JOIN MapMilestone mm
            ON fp2.EVENT_ID = mm.EVENT_ID
    )

    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Final INSERT: Combo3
    -- MapMilestone INNER JOIN PreviousValids ON PROPERTY_KEY+APP_ID+EVENT_ID
    -- LEFT JOIN GenRowNumber ON EVENT_ID
    -- PREV_EVENT_DATETIME is nulled when PREV_EVENT_ID is null.
    -- ----------------------------------------------------------------
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1] (
        PROPERTY_KEY,
        APPLICATION_ID,
        EVENT_ID,
        APPLICANT_EMAIL,
        APPLICANT_GENDER,
        APPLICANT_ID,
        APPLICANT_NAME,
        APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
        APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
        APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
        APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
        APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
        APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
        AY,
        AY_WEEK,
        AY_WEEK_KEY,
        [COUNT],
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
        DATE_APPLICATION,
        DATE_APPROVED,
        DATE_CANCELLED,
        DATE_COMPLETED,
        DATE_CREATED,
        DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
        DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
        EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
        EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
        EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
        EVENT_DATE,
        EVENT_DATEID,
        EVENT_DATETIME,
        EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
        EVENT_RESULT_ID,
        EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
        EVENT_STAGE_ID,
        EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
        EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,
        EVENT_STATUS_ID,
        EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
        EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
        EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME,
        EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
        FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
        FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
        FLAG_LEAD,
        FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED,
        FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
        FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
        FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
        FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
        INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
        INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
        INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
        FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED,
        LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
        LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
        LAST_CONTACT_ID,
        LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
        LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
        LEASE_ID,
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
        LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER,
        LEAD_SOURCE,
        LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
        LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
        PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
        PREV_EVENT_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        STAGE,
        STAGE_ID,
        STATUS,
        STATUS_ID
    )
    SELECT
        mm.PROPERTY_KEY,
        mm.APPLICATION_ID,
        mm.EVENT_ID,
        mm.APPLICANT_EMAIL,
        mm.APPLICANT_GENDER,
        mm.APPLICANT_ID,
        mm.APPLICANT_NAME,
        mm.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
        mm.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
        mm.APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
        mm.APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
        mm.APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
        mm.APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
        mm.AY,
        mm.AY_WEEK,
        mm.AY_WEEK_KEY,
        1                                       AS [COUNT],
        mm.CUSTOMER_ID,
        mm.CUSTOMER_NAME,
        mm.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        mm.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        mm.CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
        mm.DATE_APPLICATION,
        mm.DATE_APPROVED,
        mm.DATE_CANCELLED,
        mm.DATE_COMPLETED,
        mm.DATE_CREATED,
        mm.DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
        mm.DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
        mm.EVENT_COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
        mm.EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATE,
        mm.EVENT_CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
        mm.EVENT_DATE,
        mm.EVENT_DATEID,
        mm.EVENT_DATETIME,
        mm.EVENT_MILESTONE_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_RESULT_ID,
        mm.EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_STAGE_ID,
        mm.EVENT_STAGE_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_STAGE_STATUS_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_STATUS_ID,
        mm.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
        mm.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_STATUS_NAME,
        mm.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
        mm.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
        mm.FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_EVENT,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND,
        mm.FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND,
        mm.INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
        mm.INITIAL_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
        mm.INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
        mm.FLAG_LEASE_CANCELLED,
        mm.LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
        mm.LAST_CONTACT_GROUP_TYPE,
        mm.LAST_CONTACT_ID,
        mm.LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
        mm.LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
        mm.LEASE_ID,
        mm.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        mm.LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENT_NUMBER,
        grn.LEAD_APPLICATION_MILESTONE_EVENT_NUMBER,
        mm.LEAD_SOURCE,
        mm.LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
        mm.LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE,
        CASE
            WHEN pv.PREV_EVENT_ID IS NULL THEN NULL
            ELSE pv.PREV_EVENT_DATETIME
        END                                     AS PREV_EVENT_DATETIME,
        pv.PREV_EVENT_ID,
        mm.PROPERTY_NAME,
        mm.STAGE,
        mm.STAGE_ID,
        mm.STATUS,
        mm.STATUS_ID
    FROM MapMilestone mm
    INNER JOIN PreviousValids pv
        ON  mm.PROPERTY_KEY   = pv.PROPERTY_KEY
        AND mm.APPLICATION_ID = pv.APPLICATION_ID
        AND mm.EVENT_ID       = pv.EVENT_ID
    LEFT JOIN GenRowNumber grn
        ON pv.EVENT_ID = grn.EVENT_ID;

    -- Audit
    UPDATE [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: LEAD_EVENTS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENT_RESULTS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENT_SUB_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_EVENTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_0];

        -- 2. Define Logic via CTEs
        WITH CTE_EventResults AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_RESULT_ID,
                UPPER(NAME) AS EVENT_RESULT_NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_RESULTS]
        ),
        CTE_EventSubTypes AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
                UPPER(NAME) AS EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_SUB_TYPES]
        ),
        CTE_EventTypes AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_TYPE_ID,
                UPPER(NAME) AS EVENT_TYPE_NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENT_TYPES]
        ),
        CTE_Property AS (
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID,
                PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE FLAG_REPORTABLE > 0
        ),
        CTE_Events AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_ID,
                EVENT_TYPE_ID,
                EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
                EVENT_RESULT_ID,
                OLD_STAGE_ID,
                NEW_STAGE_ID,
                OLD_STATUS_ID,
                NEW_STATUS_ID,
                COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
                LEASE_ID,
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                CUSTOMER_ID,
                CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CAST(EVENT_DATETIME AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)), 112) AS EVENT_DATE,
                -- EVENT_DATEID removed as it was reported invalid
                CAST(EVENT_DATETIME AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Mountain Standard Time' AS DATETIME2(3)) AS EVENT_DATETIME,
                CREATED_ON_DATE,
                DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST('1900-01-01' AS DATE), TRY_CAST(CAST(CREATED_ON_DATEID AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATE)) AS CREATED_ON_DATEID,
                TRY_CAST(CREATED_ON_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) AS CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
                PROPERTY_ID
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENTS]
            WHERE EVENT_TYPE_ID IN (1,3,9,10,12,13,17,37,78,142, 449)
              AND EVENT_DATETIME >= '2022-08-01 00:00:00'
        ),
        CTE_Combo AS (
            SELECT 
                E.EVENT_ID,
                P.PROPERTY_KEY,
                E.COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID,
                E.CREATED_ON_DATE,
                E.CREATED_ON_DATEID,
                E.CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
                E.CUSTOMER_ID,
                E.EVENT_DATE,
                -- E.EVENT_DATEID removed
                E.EVENT_DATETIME,
                E.EVENT_RESULT_ID,
                ER.EVENT_RESULT_NAME,
                E.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID,
                EST.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME,
                E.EVENT_TYPE_ID,
                ET.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                E.LEASE_ID,
                E.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                E.NEW_STAGE_ID,
                E.NEW_STATUS_ID,
                E.OLD_STAGE_ID,
                E.OLD_STATUS_ID,
                E.PROPERTY_ID,
                P.PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM CTE_Events E
            LEFT JOIN CTE_EventTypes ET ON E.EVENT_TYPE_ID = ET.EVENT_TYPE_ID
            LEFT JOIN CTE_EventSubTypes EST ON E.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID = EST.EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID
            LEFT JOIN CTE_EventResults ER ON E.EVENT_RESULT_ID = ER.EVENT_RESULT_ID
            INNER JOIN CTE_Property P ON E.PROPERTY_ID = P.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
        )

        -- 3. Final Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_0]
        (
            EVENT_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID, [COUNT], CREATED_ON_DATE, 
            CREATED_ON_DATEID, CREATED_ON_DATETIME, CUSTOMER_ID, EVENT_DATE, 
            EVENT_DATETIME, EVENT_RESULT_ID, EVENT_RESULT_NAME, 
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME, EVENT_TYPE_ID, EVENT_TYPE_NAME, 
            FLAG_APPLICATION_PROGRESS, FLAG_APPLICATION_UPDATED, FLAG_CALL_INCOMING, 
            FLAG_EMAIL_INCOMING, FLAG_LEASE_PROGRESS, FLAG_ONSITE_VISIT, 
            FLAG_SCHEDULED_APPOINTMENT, FLAG_SMS_OPT_IN, FLAG_TOUR, FLAG_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 
            LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, NEW_STAGE_ID, NEW_STATUS_ID, 
            OLD_STAGE_ID, OLD_STATUS_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME
        )
        SELECT 
            EVENT_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID, 1, CREATED_ON_DATE, 
            CREATED_ON_DATEID, CREATED_ON_DATETIME, CUSTOMER_ID, EVENT_DATE, 
            EVENT_DATETIME, EVENT_RESULT_ID, EVENT_RESULT_NAME, 
            EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID, EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME, EVENT_TYPE_ID, EVENT_TYPE_NAME, 
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 142 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 9 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 17 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 37 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 78 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN EVENT_TYPE_ID = 449 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, NEW_STAGE_ID, NEW_STATUS_ID,

        FROM CTE_Combo;
END;

name: LEAD_EVENTS_AGG_F_SP
transformations: COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS: CASE WHEN COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS > 1 THEN 1 ELSE COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_EVENTS_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEAD_EVENTS_AGG_F.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_AGG_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_AGG_F];

        -- 2. Logic via CTEs
        WITH CTE_AllRecords AS (
            SELECT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                AY,
                [COUNT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_FACT_F]
        ),
        CTE_GroupBy_LeaseInterval AS (
            -- Groups by Lease Interval to find total events per interval
            SELECT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                AY,
                SUM([COUNT]) AS COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS
            FROM CTE_AllRecords
            GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, EVENT_TYPE_NAME, PROPERTY_KEY, AY
        ),
        CTE_Count_Unique AS (
            -- Implements the ATL DECODE: If total events > 1, unique count is 1, else use total
            SELECT 
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                AY,
                COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS,
                CASE 
                    WHEN COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS > 1 THEN 1 
                    ELSE COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS 
                END AS COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS
            FROM CTE_GroupBy_LeaseInterval
        ),
        CTE_Yesterday AS (
            -- Filters for the 'Yesterday' anchor date
            SELECT DATE_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE FLAG_YESTERDAY = 1
        ),
        CTE_GroupBy_Property AS (
            -- Final aggregation by Property and AY
            SELECT 
                Y.DATE_KEY,
                CU.PROPERTY_KEY,
                CU.AY,
                CU.EVENT_TYPE_NAME,
                SUM(CU.COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS) AS COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS,
                SUM(CU.COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS) AS COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS
            FROM CTE_Count_Unique CU
            CROSS JOIN CTE_Yesterday Y -- Cross join per ATL logic
            GROUP BY Y.DATE_KEY, CU.PROPERTY_KEY, CU.AY, CU.EVENT_TYPE_NAME
        )

        -- 3. Final Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_EVENTS_AGG_F]
        (
            [DATE_KEY], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            [AY], 
            [EVENT_TYPE_NAME], 
            [COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS], 
            [COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            [AY], 
            [EVENT_TYPE_NAME], 
            [COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS], 
            [COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS]
        FROM CTE_GroupBy_Property;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

        ON (

            [Target].[PROPERTY_KEY] = [Source].[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
            [Target].[AY] = [Source].[AY] AND 
            [Target].[EVENT_TYPE_NAME] = [Source].[EVENT_TYPE_NAME]
        )
        -- Update existing records
        WHEN MATCHED THEN 
            UPDATE SET 
                [Target].[COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS] = [Source].[COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS],
                [Target].[COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS] = [Source].[COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS]
        -- Insert new records
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [AY], 
                [EVENT_TYPE_NAME],

                [COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS]

                [Source].[EVENT_TYPE_NAME], 
                [Source].[COUNT_TOTAL_EVENTS], 
                [Source].[COUNT_UNIQUE_EVENTS]
            );END;

        )

        USING [Staging_CTE] AS [Source]

            [Target].[EVENT_ID] = [Source].[EVENT_ID] AND

        )
        -- If keys match, update existing record (Incremental Update)
        WHEN MATCHED THEN

                [Target].[APPLICATION_ID] = [Source].[APPLICATION_ID],
                [Target].[AY] = [Source].[AY],
                [Target].[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID] = [Source].[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID],
                [Target].[CREATED_ON_DATE] = [Source].[CREATED_ON_DATE],

                [Target].[EVENT_TYPE_ID] = [Source].[EVENT_TYPE_ID],
                [Target].[EVENT_TYPE_NAME] = [Source].[EVENT_TYPE_NAME],
                [Target].[LEASE_ID] = [Source].[LEASE_ID],
                [Target].[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = [Source].[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [Target].[NEW_STAGE_ID] = [Source].[NEW_STAGE_ID],
                [Target].[NEW_STATUS_ID] = [Source].[NEW_STATUS_ID],
                [Target].[OLD_STAGE_ID] = [Source].[OLD_STAGE_ID],
                [Target].[OLD_STATUS_ID] = [Source].[OLD_STATUS_ID],
                [Target].[PROPERTY_ID] = [Source].[PROPERTY_ID],
                [Target].[PROPERTY_NAME] = [Source].[PROPERTY_NAME]
        -- If keys don't exist, insert new record
        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT (
                [DATE_KEY], [EVENT_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY], 
                [COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], 
                [CREATED_ON_DATETIME], [CUSTOMER_ID], [EVENT_DATE], [EVENT_DATEID], 
                [EVENT_DATETIME], [EVENT_RESULT_ID], [EVENT_RESULT_NAME], 
                [EVENT_SUB_TYPE_ID], [EVENT_SUB_TYPE_NAME], [EVENT_TYPE_ID], 
                [EVENT_TYPE_NAME], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [NEW_STAGE_ID], 
                [NEW_STATUS_ID], [OLD_STAGE_ID], [OLD_STATUS_ID], [PROPERTY_ID], 
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            )
            VALUES (
                [Source].[DATE_KEY], [Source].[EVENT_ID], [Source].[PROPERTY_KEY], [Source].[APPLICATION_ID], [Source].[AY], 
                [Source].[COMPANY_EMPLOYEE_ID], [Source].[CREATED_ON_DATE], [Source].[CREATED_ON_DATEID], 
                [Source].[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], [Source].[CUSTOMER_ID], [Source].[EVENT_DATE], [Source].[EVENT_DATEID], 
                [Source].[EVENT_DATETIME], [Source].[EVENT_RESULT_ID], [Source].[EVENT_RESULT_NAME],

                [Source].[NEW_STATUS_ID], [Source].[OLD_STAGE_ID], [Source].[OLD_STATUS_ID], [Source].[PROPERTY_ID], 
                [Source].[PROPERTY_NAME]
            );END;

            [ORDER_NUM], [DELETED_BY], [DELETED_ON_DATE], [DELETED_ON_DATEID], [DELETED_ON_DATETIME],
            [UPDATED_BY], [UPDATED_ON_DATE], [UPDATED_ON_DATEID], [UPDATED_ON_DATETIME],
            [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATEID], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
        )
        SELECT * FROM [Combo1_CTE];

        -- 3. MAINTENANCE STEP: CAPTURE MISSING RECORDS LOCALLY
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_SOURCE_DIRECTION_MISSING] (
            [ID], [CID], [LEAD_SOURCE], [LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE], [IS_PUBLISHED], [INSERTED_AT]
        )
        SELECT 
            S.[ID], 
            S.[CID], 
            S.[NAME] AS [LEAD_SOURCE], 
            NULL AS [LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE], 
            S.[IS_PUBLISHED],
            SYSDATETIME() -- FIX: Explicit timestamp population
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_SOURCES_0] S
        WHERE S.[LEAD_SOURCE_TYPE] IS NULL
        GROUP BY S.[ID], S.[CID], S.[NAME], S.[IS_PUBLISHED];

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: LEASES_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_MOVED_IN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= @YesterdayDateInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= @YesterdayDateInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
HAS_REPAYMENT_AGREEMENT: CASE WHEN HAS_REPAYMENT_AGREEMENT = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
space_count_test: CASE WHEN SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END
Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN NAME = 'APPLICATION' THEN 'NEW' WHEN NAME = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 'MTM' WHEN NAME = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'RENEWAL' WHEN NAME = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER' ELSE '--' END
FLAG_TYPE_MTM: CASE WHEN NAME = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_NEW: CASE WHEN NAME = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN NAME = 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER: CASE WHEN NAME = 'TRANSFER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT: CASE WHEN NAME = 'APPLICANT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN NAME = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE: CASE WHEN NAME = 'FUTURE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT: CASE WHEN NAME = 'CURRENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE: CASE WHEN NAME = 'NOTICE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST: CASE WHEN NAME = 'PAST' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED: CASE WHEN DATE_FMO_PROCESSED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE: CASE WHEN CURRENT_BALANCE = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN Applications.DATE_STARTED WHEN Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN Applications.DATE_COMPLETED ELSE Lease_AY.DATE_CREATED END
DATEID_CREATED: CASE WHEN Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN Applications.DATEID_STARTED WHEN Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN Applications.DATEID_COMPLETED ELSE Lease_AY.DATEID_CREATED END
DATEID_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(day, '1900-01-01', CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE AS VARCHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
DATEID_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN Leases.MOVE_OUT_DATE > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(day, '1900-01-01', CONVERT(DATE, CAST(Leases.MOVE_OUT_DATE AS VARCHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN Leases.ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = ISNULL(Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, -1) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Applications.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 1 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_MTM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) = 1 AND Lease_AY.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE <> 'NOTICE' AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Properties.ADDRESS_COUNTRY, 'US') = 'CA' AND ISNULL(Properties.FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY, 0) = 1 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_NEW, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_NEW, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_INCOMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_NEW, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 0) ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_test: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER_IN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN, 0) = 1 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_INCOMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_INCL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_INCOMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_APP: CASE WHEN Applications.DATE_CREATED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO: CASE WHEN Applications.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER: CASE WHEN Leases.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN Applications.FLOORPLAN_CODE = 'UNASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(RentCharges.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) <= 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) > 0 AND Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE < ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATE_BEGIN, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_COST: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCost.LEASING_REFERRAL_COST, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCredit.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE: CASE WHEN LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LeaseTerms.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE END

FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION: CASE WHEN LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 0 AND LeaseTerms.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE = 1 AND ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN Units.FLOORPLAN ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN END
FLOORPLAN_CODE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_CODE ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN_CODE END
FLOORPLAN_ID: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_ID ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN_ID END
FLOORPLAN_KEY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_KEY ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN_KEY END

Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT' WHEN IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' AND ISNULL(Leases.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0 THEN 'TRANSFER IN' ELSE IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED END
LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC END
space_count_test: CASE WHEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END
Cancellation_Days: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 THEN COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED ELSE 0 END
CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END

CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END

CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END

CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END

CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END
CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END

FALL_INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN ((CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END) + (CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END)) / (CASE WHEN COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 12 THEN 12.00 ELSE CAST(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC AS DECIMAL(10,2)) END) ELSE 0.00 END
Flag_Cancelled_after_Cutoff: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) > 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Cancelled_before_Cutoff: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) <= 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED ELSE 0 END
