FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_NEW: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_NEW_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_NEW_TRANSFER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_TOTAL: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_TRANSFER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) > 7 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_MTM: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND (COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 0 OR COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 0) AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) > 7 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) > 7 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_ALONE: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END

FLAG_GIFT_CARD: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.FLAG_GIFT_CARD ELSE 0 END
FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE: CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_OUT_30: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 1 AND COMBO.DATEID_MOVE_OUT >= (COMBO.DATEID_YESTERDAY - 30) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_OCCUPIED_1: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_IN = 1 AND COMBO.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= COMBO.DATEID_MOVE_IN AND (COMBO.DATE_CANCELLED = 0 OR COMBO.DATE_CANCELLED > COMBO.DATE_YESTERDAY) AND (COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 OR COMBO.DATE_MOVE_OUT > COMBO.DATE_YESTERDAY) AND COMBO.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID IN (3, 4, 5) THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE ELSE 0 END

GIFT_CARD_MONTHLY_IMPACT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 1) > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END) / (CASE WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 1) > 12 THEN 12.00 WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 1) = 0 THEN 1.00 ELSE CAST(ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 1) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) END) ELSE 0.00 END

INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN ((CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END) + (CASE WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END)) / (CASE WHEN COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 12 THEN 12.00 ELSE CAST(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC AS DECIMAL(10,2)) END) ELSE 0.00 END

NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT: CASE WHEN COMBO.FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK = 1 THEN (ISNULL(COMBO.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) - (ISNULL(COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00) + ISNULL(COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE, 0.00))) / CAST(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION AS DECIMAL(10,2)) ELSE 0.00 END

space_count_test: CASE WHEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL ELSE 0 END

FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED ELSE 0 END

FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED >= Middle_Logic.DATE_WEEK_BEGIN AND Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED <= Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL ELSE 0 END

INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED NEW' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED RENEWAL' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE NEW' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE RENEWAL' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'MTM' THEN 'MONTH TO MONTH' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'NEW' THEN 'INCOMPLETE NEW' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'INCOMPLETE RENEWAL' WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN 'APPLICATION' WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN 'APPLICATION ON HOLD' WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT' WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER IN' WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OTHER' END

INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID: CASE WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 91 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 92 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 21 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 31 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' THEN 50 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'MTM' THEN 41 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'NEW' THEN 22 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'RENEWAL' THEN 32 WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN 10 WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN 11 WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN 52 WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN 51 WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN 90 ELSE 999 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
-- =========================================================================
-- CONFIGURATION & SETUP
-- =========================================================================
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- 1. Declare Variables ONCE for the entire process
    DECLARE @YesterdayDateInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @FutureDateInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, 10, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @FutureDateID INT = DATEDIFF(day, '1900-01-01', DATEADD(day, 10, SYSDATETIME()));

    -- 2. Pre-Flight Cleanup (Ensure we start fresh)
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO]', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO];
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic]', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic];
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Final_Logic]', 'U') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Final_Logic];
    -- (Add drops for Small Tables here too, e.g., xtemp.Leases, xtemp.Agents)

-- =========================================================================
-- STEP 1: SMALL TABLES LOGIC
-- =========================================================================
 
	-- =====================================================
	-- CHUNK 1: LEASES & LEASE_AY (Block 1 from ATL)
	-- =====================================================

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Leases
		-- Source: [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
		-- Logic: Calculates Moved In/Out flags based on System Date
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Leases', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Leases;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Leases
		AS
		SELECT 
			ID,
			ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			BUILDING_NAME,
			CID,
			COLLECTIONS_START_DATE,
			COMPANY_NAME,
			CREATED_BY,
			CREATED_ON_DATE,
			DEPOSIT_HELD,
			DISPLAY_NUMBER,
			FINANCIAL_BALANCE,
			-- FLAG_MOVED_IN
			-- ATL: decode(nvl(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 AND nvl(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= to_char(sysdate()-1, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 0)
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 
					 AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= @YesterdayDateInt 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_MOVED_IN,
			-- FLAG_MOVED_OUT
			-- ATL: decode(nvl(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= to_char(sysdate()-1, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1, 0)
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= @YesterdayDateInt 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
			-- FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT
			-- ATL: decode(nvl(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 and not LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID in (4,5), 1, 0)
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 
					 AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
			FMO_APPROVED_ON_DATE,
			FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE,
			FMO_STARTED_ON_DATE,
			CASE WHEN HAS_REPAYMENT_AGREEMENT = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HAS_REPAYMENT_AGREEMENT,
			IS_MONTH_TO_MONTH,
			IS_MULTI_SLOT,
			IS_TRANSFERRING_IN,
			LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) AS MOVE_IN_DATE, -- ATL: nvl(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0)
			MOVE_IN_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATE,
			ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 0) AS MOVE_OUT_DATE, -- ATL: nvl(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 0)
			NAME_FIRST,
			NAME_LAST,
			NAME_MIDDLE,
			NOTICE_DATE,
			OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
			PAYMENT_ALLOWANCE_TYPE_ID,
			PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID,
			PRIMARY_PHONE_NUMBER,
			PROPERTY_ID,
			PROPERTY_NAME,
			PROPERTY_UNIT_ID,
			RENEWAL_PROMPT_MUTED_ON_DATE,
			REPAYMENT_BALANCE,
			RESIDENT_BALANCE,
			TERMINATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
			TOTAL_BALANCE,
			TRANSFER_LEASE_ID AS TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, -- Mapped in ATL View
			TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE,
			UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE,
			UNIT_SPACE_ID,
			UPDATED_BY,
			UPDATED_ON_DATE
		FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES];

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Lease_AY
		-- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
		-- Logic: Filters AY >= 2022, Renames fields, Generates DATE_KEY
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Lease_AY', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Lease_AY;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Lease_AY
		AS
		SELECT 
			LEASE_AY_KEY,
			@YesterdayDateInt AS DATE_KEY, -- ATL: to_char( sysdate( )-1, 'YYYYMMDD')
			APPLICANT_ID,
			APPLICANT_NAME,
			APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
			APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
			APPLICATION_ID,
			AY,
			AY_WEEK,
			AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
			AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
			AY_WEEK_KEY,
			CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS,
			CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS,
			CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT,
			COUNT,
			CREATED_BY AS CREATOR_ID, -- Mapped in ATL View
			CUSTOMER_ID,
			DATE_AY_BEGIN,
			DATE_AY_END,
			DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
			DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
			DATE_BEGIN,
			DATE_CANCELLED,
			DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			DATE_CREATED,
			DATE_END,
			DATE_TRANSFERRED,
			DATE_UPDATED,
			DATE_YESTERDAY,
			DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
			DATEID_AY_END,
			DATEID_BEGIN,
			DATEID_CANCELLED,
			DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			DATEID_CREATED,
			DATEID_END,
			DATEID_UPDATED,
			DATEID_YESTERDAY,
			DATETIME_BEGIN,
			DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			DATETIME_END,
			FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
			FLAG_CANCELLED,
			FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			FLAG_COMPLETE,
			FLAG_FALL,
			FLAG_HOLDOVER,
			FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
			CASE WHEN FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN = 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
			FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
			FLAG_INCOMPLETE,
			FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,
			FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
			FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
			FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
			FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
			FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
			FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
			FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
			FLAG_MTM_PAST,
			FLAG_NEW_LEASE,
			FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
			FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE,
			FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE AS FLAG_TRANSFER, -- Mapped in ATL View
			FLAG_TRANSFER_IN,
			FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
			HOLDOVER_DAYS,
			INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
			LEASE_ID,
			LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
			LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS,
			PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
			PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
			PROPERTY_ID,
			PROPERTY_KEY,
			PROPERTY_NAME,
			STAGE,
			STAGE_ID,
			START_WINDOW_ID,
			STATUS,
			STATUS_ID,
			STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			TERM_ID,
			TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
		WHERE AY >= 2022 OR AY = 0;

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 3: PROPERTIES & APPLICATIONS (Block 2 from ATL)
		-- =====================================================

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Properties
		-- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] (Maps to STAGING2 in ATL)
		-- Logic: Direct mapping of flags and keys
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Properties', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Properties;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Properties
		AS
		SELECT 
			PROPERTY_KEY,
			DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
			FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
			FLAG_REPORTABLE,
			ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
			FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F];

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Applications
		-- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F]
		-- Logic: Explicit column selection to handle renaming (e.g. FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK)
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Applications', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Applications;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Applications
		AS
		SELECT 
			APPLICATION_ID,
			APPLICANT_EMAIL,
			APPLICANT_GENDER,
			APPLICANT_ID,
			APPLICANT_NAME,
			APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
			APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
			APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE,
			APPLICANT_PHONE_MOBILE,
			APPLICANT_PHONE_PRIMARY,
			APPLICANT_PHONE_WORK,
			AY,
			AY_WEEK,
			AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
			AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
			AY_WEEK_KEY,
			CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM,
			CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID,
			CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE,
			CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
			CONTACT_SUM_CALL,
			CONTACT_SUM_CHAT,
			CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS,
			CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL,
			CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND,
			CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE,
			CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT,
			CONTACT_SUM_SMS,
			CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
			COUNT,
			CUSTOMER_ID,
			DATE_APPLICATION,
			DATE_APPROVED,
			DATE_CANCELLED,
			DATE_COMPLETED,
			DATE_CREATED,
			DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
			DATE_KEY,
			DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
			DATE_LEASE_APPROVED,
			DATE_LEASE_BEGIN,
			DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED,
			DATE_LEASE_END,
			DATE_LEASE_GENERATED,
			DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP,
			DATE_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN,
			DATE_PROPERTY_AY_END,
			DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED,
			DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			DATE_SITE_VISITED,
			DATE_STARTED,
			DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED,
			DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED,
			DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE,
			DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE,
			DATE_TOURED,
			DATE_UNIT_TOURED,
			DATE_UPDATED,
			DATEID_APPLICATION,
			DATEID_APPROVED,
			DATEID_CANCELLED,
			DATEID_COMPLETED,
			DATEID_CREATED,
			DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT,
			DATEID_LAST_CONTACT,
			DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED,
			DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN,
			DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED,
			DATEID_LEASE_END,
			DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED,
			DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_BEGIN,
			DATEID_PROPERTY_AY_END,
			DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			DATEID_SITE_VISITED,
			DATEID_STARTED,
			DATEID_TOURED,
			DATEID_UNIT_TOURED,
			DATEID_UPDATED,
			DESIRED_BATHROOMS,
			DESIRED_BEDROOMS,
			DESIRED_OCCUPANTS,
			DESIRED_PETS,
			DESIRED_RENT_MAX,
			DESIRED_RENT_MIN,
			DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG,
			DESIRED_SPACE_CONFIG_ID,
			DESIRED_SPACE_UNIT_COUNT,
			FLAG_APP_ACTIVE,
			FLAG_APP_APPROVED,
			FLAG_APP_CANCELLED,
			FLAG_APP_COMPLETED,
			FLAG_FORCED_STAGE_STATUS_STEP,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
			FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT,
			FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS,
			FLAG_LEAD,
			FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE,
			FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL,
			FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT,
			FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED,
			FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR,
			FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP,
			FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE,
			FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF,
			-- Renamed per ATL mapping
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS AS FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK,
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY,
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS,
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS,
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES,
			FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES,
			FLOORPLAN,
			FLOORPLAN_CODE,
			FLOORPLAN_ID,
			FLOORPLAN_KEY,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_ID,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE,
			INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID,
			INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE,
			INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID,
			LAST_CONTACT_CATEGORY,
			LAST_CONTACT_ID,
			LAST_CONTACT_ORDER,
			LAST_CONTACT_TYPE,
			LEAD_SOURCE,
			LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
			LEASE_ID,
			LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE,
			LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
			LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
			LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			LEASE_TERM_ID,
			LEASE_TYPE,
			LEASE_TYPE_ID,
			LEASING_AGENT,
			LEASING_AGENT_ID,
			MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID,
			OCCUPANCY_TYPE,
			OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
			PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
			PROPERTY_ID,
			PROPERTY_KEY,
			PROPERTY_NAME,
			QUOTE_ID,
			SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME,
			SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED,
			SPACE,
			SPACE_CONFIG,
			SPACE_CONFIG_ID,
			SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT,
			-- Renamed per ATL mapping
			SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT AS SPACE_COUNT,
			SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE,
			-- Logic converted from decode to CASE
			CASE WHEN SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS space_count_test,
			SPACE_ID,
			SPACE_NUMBER,
			STAGE,
			STAGE_ID,
			STAGE_ORDER_NUM,
			STATUS,
			STATUS_ID,
			STATUS_ORDER_NUM,
			STEP,
			STEP_ID,
			STEP_ORDER_NUM,
			TERM_MONTH,
			UNIT_ID,
			UNIT_KEY,
			UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE,
			UNIT_SPACE_ID,
			UNIT_SQUARE_FEET,
			URL_REFERER,
			WEBSITE_ID
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F];

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 4: REMAINING SMALL TRANSFORMS (Block 3 from ATL)
		-- =====================================================

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: IntervalTypes
		-- Source: [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES] (Maps to ODS in ATL)
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.IntervalTypes', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.IntervalTypes;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.IntervalTypes
		AS
		SELECT 
			ID AS Interval_Type_ID,
			NAME AS Interval_Type,
			-- ATL: decode(NAME = 'APPLICATION', 'NEW', 'MONTH TO MONTH', 'MTM', 'RENEWAL', 'RENEWAL', 'TRANSFER', 'TRANSFER', '--')
			CASE 
				WHEN NAME = 'APPLICATION' THEN 'NEW'
				WHEN NAME = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 'MTM'
				WHEN NAME = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'RENEWAL'
				WHEN NAME = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER'
				ELSE '--'
			END AS Interval_Type_CONFORMED,
			-- ATL: decode(NAME = 'MONTH TO MONTH', 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'MONTH TO MONTH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_MTM,
			-- ATL: decode(NAME = 'APPLICATION', 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'APPLICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_NEW,
			-- ATL: decode(NAME = 'RENEWAL', 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL,
			-- ATL: decode(NAME = 'TRANSFER', 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'TRANSFER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER
		FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES];

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Guarantors
		-- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GUARANTORS_0] (Maps to STAGING2 in ATL)
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Guarantors', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Guarantors;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Guarantors
		AS
		SELECT 
			LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED,
			DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED,
			DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED,
			DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED,
			FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED,
			GUARANTOR_APPLICANT_ID,
			GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_ID,
			GUARANTOR_CUSTOMER_ID,
			GUARANTOR_CUSTOMER_TYPE_ID,
			GUARANTOR_EMAIL,
			GUARANTOR_NAME,
			GUARANTOR_NAME_FIRST,
			GUARANTOR_NAME_LAST,
			GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE,
			GUARANTOR_PHONE_PRIMARY,
			GUARANTOR_PHONE_WORK,
			LEASE_ID
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GUARANTORS_0];

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: StatusTypes
		-- Source: [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES] (Maps to ODS in ATL)
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.StatusTypes', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.StatusTypes;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.StatusTypes
		AS
		SELECT 
			ID AS Status_Type_ID,
			NAME AS STATUS_TYPE,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'APPLICANT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'FUTURE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'CURRENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'NOTICE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE,
			CASE WHEN NAME = 'PAST' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST
		FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES];

		AS

			DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
			-- ATL: DEPOSITS_0.DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT - DEPOSITS_0.DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT
			(DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT - DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) AS DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT,
			DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
			FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED,
			FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED,

			LEASE_ID
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DEPOSITS_0];

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		-- Transform: Collections
		-- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[COLLECTIONS_0] (Maps to STAGING2 in ATL)
		-- Schema: xtemp
		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Collections', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE xtemp.Collections;

		CREATE TABLE xtemp.Collections
		AS
		SELECT 
			LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			-- Field Renaming per ATL
			CURRENT_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE,
			DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES,
			POST_FMO_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES,
			POST_FMO_PAYMENTS AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS,
			PRE_FMO_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE,
			TOTAL_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES,
			WRITE_OFF_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE,
			DATE_COLLECTIONS_START,
			DATE_FMO_PROCESSED,
			FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS,
			-- ATL: decode(DATE_FMO_PROCESSED > 0, 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN DATE_FMO_PROCESSED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED,
			-- ATL: decode(CURRENT_BALANCE = 0.00, 1, 0)
			CASE WHEN CURRENT_BALANCE = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE,
			LEASE_ID -- Explicitly selected in ATL
		FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[COLLECTIONS_0];

		-- Transform: ThisWeek

		-- -----------------------------------------------------
		IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.ThisWeek', 'U') IS NOT NULL

-- =========================================================================
-- STEP 2: COMBO TABLE
-- =========================================================================

		-- Drop table with explicit semicolon terminator
		IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO]', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO];

		CREATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO]

		AS
		SELECT 

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 1: COMBO (Table Creation & First 50 Columns)
		-- =====================================================

			Lease_AY.LEASE_AY_KEY,
			ThisWeek.DATE_KEY,
			Leases.ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			ISNULL(AdminFees.ADMIN_FEE_NAME, '--') AS ADMIN_FEE_NAME,
			CAST(ISNULL(AdminFees.ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT,
			ISNULL(AppFees.APP_FEE_NAME, '--') AS APP_FEE_NAME,
			CAST(ISNULL(AppFees.APP_FEE_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS APP_FEE_AMOUNT,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.APPLICATION_ID, 0) AS APPLICATION_ID,
			Lease_AY.AY,
			Applications.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
			Applications.AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
			Applications.DATE_STARTED,
			Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID AS MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID_1,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.AY_WEEK_KEY, 0.00) AS AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED,
			ISNULL(Applications.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM, '--') AS CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM,
			ISNULL(Applications.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID, 0) AS CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID,
			ISNULL(Applications.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE, '--') AS CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE,
			ISNULL(Applications.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID, 0) AS CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES,
			CAST(ISNULL(Collections.COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE,
			ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_COUNT, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT,
			ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL,
			ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL,
			CAST(ISNULL(Concessions.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED,
			ISNULL(Applications.CONTACT_SUM_CALL, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CALL,
			ISNULL(Applications.CONTACT_SUM_CHAT, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CHAT,
			ISNULL(Applications.CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS,

			-- Logic: FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK,
			
			ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_MTM, 0) AS FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM,
			ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_NEW, 0) AS FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW,
			ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL, 0) AS FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL,
			ISNULL(IntervalTypes.FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER, 0) AS FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER,

			-- Logic: FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL
			CASE 
				WHEN Applications.FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK = 1 
					 AND Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED >= Applications.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED < Applications.AY_WEEK_END_DATE 
					 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 1 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW
			CASE 
				WHEN Applications.FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK = 1 
					 AND Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED >= Applications.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED < Applications.AY_WEEK_END_DATE 
					 AND Applications.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE <> 'RENEWAL' 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW,

			-- Logic: FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL
			CASE 
				WHEN Applications.FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK = 1 
					 AND Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED >= Applications.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED < Applications.AY_WEEK_END_DATE 
					 AND Applications.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE = 'RENEWAL' 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL
			CASE 
				WHEN Applications.FLAG_STARTED_THIS_WEEK = 1 
					 AND Applications.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED >= Applications.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE 
					 AND Applications.DATE_STARTED < Applications.AY_WEEK_END_DATE 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,

			ISNULL(LeaseTerms.FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR, 0) AS FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,

			-- Logic: Missing Data Flags
			CASE WHEN Applications.DATE_CREATED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_APP,
			CASE WHEN Applications.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO,
			CASE WHEN Leases.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER,
			CASE WHEN Applications.FLOORPLAN_CODE = 'UNASSIGNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(RentCharges.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) <= 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT,
			
			ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_IN, 0) AS FLAG_MOVED_IN,

			-- Logic: FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) > 0 
					 AND Leases.MOVE_IN_DATE < ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATE_BEGIN, 0) 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY,

			ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MTM_PAST, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_PAST,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_NEW_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_NEW_LEASE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY, 0) AS FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
			ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_OCCTYPE_AFFORDABLE, 0) AS FLAG_OCC_TYPE_AFFORDABLE,
			ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL, 0) AS FLAG_OCC_TYPE_CONVENTIONAL,
			ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT, 0) AS FLAG_OCC_TYPE_STUDENT,

			-- Logic: FLAG_OCCUPIED
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Units.FLAG_OCCUPIED, 0) = 1 
					 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) > 1 
					 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATE_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 
					 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 
					 AND (
						 (Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_BEGIN, 0) AND Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_END, 0))
					 ) 
					 AND (
						 (Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_AY_BEGIN, 0) AND Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_AY_END, 0))
						 OR ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL, 0) = 1
					 )
				THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_OCCUPIED,

			-- Logic: FLAG_OCCUPIED_SPACES (Identical logic to FLAG_OCCUPIED in ATL)
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Units.FLAG_OCCUPIED, 0) = 1 
					 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) > 1 
					 AND ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATE_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 
					 AND ISNULL(Leases.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 
					 AND (
						 (Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_BEGIN, 0) AND Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_END, 0))
					 ) 
					 AND (
						 (Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_AY_BEGIN, 0) AND Lease_AY.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(Lease_AY.DATEID_AY_END, 0))
						 OR ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL, 0) = 1
					 )
				THEN Applications.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_OCCUPIED_SPACES,

			ISNULL(Properties.FLAG_REPORTABLE, 0) AS FLAG_PROPERTY_ACTIVE,
			ISNULL(Properties.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, 0) AS FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED,

			-- Logic: Referral Flags (Money Checks)
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCost.LEASING_REFERRAL_COST, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_REFERRAL_COST,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(ReferralCredit.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT,
			
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE,
			
		   -- Logic: Sched/Discount Flags (Money Checks) - CORRECTED
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffDiscount.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedLockOffPremium.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM,
			CASE WHEN ISNULL(SchedRentDiscount.AMOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT,

			ISNULL(Applications.FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED, 0) AS FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			Applications.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR,
			Applications.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP,
			Applications.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE,
			Applications.FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF,

			-- Logic: FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE
			CASE WHEN LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LeaseTerms.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE END AS FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE,

			-- Logic: FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION
			CASE 
				WHEN LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 0 
					 AND LeaseTerms.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE = 1 
					 AND ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) = 0.00 
				THEN 1 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION,

			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_INCOMPLETE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE,
			ISNULL(StatusTypes.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST,
			LeaseTerms.FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL,
			LeaseTerms.FLAG_TERM_IS_RENEWAL,
			LeaseTerms.FLAG_TERM_IS_UNSET,
			Applications.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY,
			Applications.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS,
			Applications.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS,
			Applications.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES,
			Applications.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_TRANSFER, 0) AS FLAG_TRANSFER,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN, 0) AS FLAG_TRANSFER_IN,
			ISNULL(Lease_AY.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
			ISNULL(Units.FLAG_OCCUPIED, 0) AS FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED,

		-- Next chunk will include: Remainder of columns (FLOORPLAN through WRITE_OFF)

		--================================ end of chunk 3 (Flags)

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 4: COMBO (Floorplans, Guarantors, Insurance)
		-- =====================================================

			-- Logic: FLOORPLAN (Prioritize Units, fallback to Applications)
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' 
					 AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL 
				THEN Units.FLOORPLAN 
				ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN 
			END AS FLOORPLAN,

			-- Logic: FLOORPLAN_CODE
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' 
					 AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL 
				THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_CODE 
				ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN_CODE 
			END AS FLOORPLAN_CODE,

			-- Logic: FLOORPLAN_ID
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(Applications.FLOORPLAN, 'UNASSIGNED') = 'UNASSIGNED' 
					 AND Units.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL 
				THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_ID 
				ELSE Applications.FLOORPLAN_ID 
			END AS FLOORPLAN_ID,

			-- Logic: FLOORPLAN_KEY
			CASE

				THEN Units.FLOORPLAN_KEY

			CAST(ISNULL(GiftCards.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT,

			ISNULL(Applications.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID, 0) AS INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID,
			ISNULL(Applications.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME, '--') AS INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME,
			ISNULL(Applications.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST, '--') AS INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_FIRST,
			ISNULL(Applications.INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST, '--') AS INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_NAME_LAST,

			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CARRIER, 'NONE') AS INSURANCE_CARRIER,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED, 'NONE') AS INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED,
			CAST(ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CHARGED_COUNT_CODE_NAMES, 0) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_COUNT_CODE_NAMES,

			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE, 0) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM, 0) AS INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM,
			CAST(ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS INSURANCE_DEDUCTIBLE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS INSURANCE_LIABILITY_LIMIT,
			CAST(ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS INSURANCE_PERSONAL_LIMIT,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER, '--') AS INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE, '--') AS INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE,
			CAST(ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AMOUNT,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, 0) AS INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME, '--') AS INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME,
			ISNULL(Insurance.INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID, 0) AS INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID,

			ISNULL(Applications.INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID, 0) AS INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID,
			IntervalTypes.Interval_Type AS INTERVAL_TYPE,

			-- Logic: Interval_Type_CONFORMED (Detailed Transfer Logic)
			CASE 
				WHEN IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' 
					 AND ISNULL(Leases.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 
				THEN 'TRANSFER OUT'
				WHEN IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' 
					 AND ISNULL(Leases.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0 
				THEN 'TRANSFER IN'
				ELSE IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_CONFORMED
			END AS Interval_Type_CONFORMED,

			Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
			ISNULL(Applications.LEAD_SOURCE, '--') AS LEAD_SOURCE,
			ISNULL(Applications.LEAD_SOURCE_ID, 0) AS LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
			Lease_AY.LEASE_ID,
			ISNULL(CAST(Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID AS VARCHAR), '--') AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, -- Cast to varchar to match 'string' default in fallback
			Lease_AY.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,

			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 12 THEN 12 
				ELSE LeaseTerms.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC 
			END AS LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION,

			ISNULL(Applications.LEASE_TYPE, '--') AS OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT,

			CAST(ISNULL(ShortTermPremiums.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY,

			ISNULL(Lease_AY.STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) AS STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			ISNULL(Applications.STEP, '--') AS STEP,
			ISNULL(Applications.STEP_ID, 0) AS STEP_ID,
			CAST(ISNULL(Leases.TOTAL_BALANCE, 0.00) AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS TOTAL_BALANCE,
			ISNULL(Leases.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) AS TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID,
			ISNULL(Units.UNIT_ID, 0) AS UNIT_ID,
			ISNULL(Units.UNIT_KEY, 0) AS UNIT_KEY

		-- End of Columns. 
		-- FROM clause will be generated in the next chunk.

		--=============================end of chunk 5 (Floorplan to Occ Type)

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 6: COMBO (Joins & Table Completion)
		-- =====================================================

		FROM [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Lease_AY] AS Lease_AY

		-- Join 1: Leases (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Leases] AS Leases
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_ID = Leases.ID

		-- Join 2: Properties (Inner)
		INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Properties] AS Properties
			ON Lease_AY.PROPERTY_KEY = Properties.PROPERTY_KEY

		-- Join 3: Applications (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Applications] AS Applications
			ON Lease_AY.APPLICATION_ID = Applications.APPLICATION_ID

		-- Join 4: IntervalTypes (Inner)
		INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[IntervalTypes] AS IntervalTypes
			ON Lease_AY.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = IntervalTypes.Interval_Type_ID

		-- Join 5: Guarantors (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Guarantors] AS Guarantors
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Guarantors.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 6: StatusTypes (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[StatusTypes] AS StatusTypes
			ON Lease_AY.STATUS_TYPE_ID = StatusTypes.Status_Type_ID

		-- Join 7: Concessions (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Concessions] AS Concessions
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Concessions.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 8: GiftCards (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[GiftCards] AS GiftCards
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = GiftCards.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 9: AdminFees (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[AdminFees] AS AdminFees
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = AdminFees.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 10: AppFees (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[AppFees] AS AppFees
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = AppFees.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 11: RentCharges (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[RentCharges] AS RentCharges
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = RentCharges.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 12: LeaseTerms (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[LeaseTerms] AS LeaseTerms
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = LeaseTerms.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 13: ShortTermPremiums (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[ShortTermPremiums] AS ShortTermPremiums
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = ShortTermPremiums.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 14: GraduationEstimate (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[GraduationEstimate] AS GraduationEstimate
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = GraduationEstimate.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 15: School (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[School] AS School
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = School.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 16: Customers (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Customers] AS Customers
			ON Lease_AY.CUSTOMER_ID = Customers.CUSTOMER_KEY

		-- Join 17: Agents (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Agents] AS Agents
			ON Lease_AY.CREATOR_ID = Agents.COMPANY_USER_ID

		-- Join 18: Units (Left Outer)
		-- Note: Joins to Leases, not Lease_AY
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Units] AS Units
			ON Leases.UNIT_SPACE_ID = Units.SPACE_ID

		-- Join 19: Deposits (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Deposits] AS Deposits
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Deposits.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 20: Collections (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Collections] AS Collections
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Collections.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 21: Insurance (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Insurance] AS Insurance
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = Insurance.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 22: SchedRentDiscount (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[SchedRentDiscount] AS SchedRentDiscount
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SchedRentDiscount.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 23: SchedLockOffDiscount (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[SchedLockOffDiscount] AS SchedLockOffDiscount
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SchedLockOffDiscount.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 24: SchedLockOffPremium (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[SchedLockOffPremium] AS SchedLockOffPremium
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SchedLockOffPremium.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 25: ReferralCredit (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[ReferralCredit] AS ReferralCredit
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = ReferralCredit.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 26: ReferralCost (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[ReferralCost] AS ReferralCost
			ON Lease_AY.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = ReferralCost.TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID

		-- Join 27: ThisWeek (Left Outer)
		LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[ThisWeek] AS ThisWeek
			ON Lease_AY.DATE_KEY = ThisWeek.DATE_KEY;

		-- =====================================================
		-- END OF COMBO QUERY
		-- The table [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO] is now complete.
		-- =====================================================

-- =========================================================================
-- STEP 3: MIDDLE LOGIC
-- =========================================================================

		-- =====================================================
		-- Middle_Logic Header
		-- =====================================================

		-- Drop table with explicit semicolon terminator
		IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic]', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
			DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic];

		-- Create Table with correct syntax
		CREATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic]

		AS
		SELECT 

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 1: Middle_Logic (Setup & Financial Calcs)
		-- =====================================================

			COMBO.LEASE_AY_KEY,
			COMBO.ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
			COMBO.ADMIN_FEE_NAME,
			COMBO.ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.APP_FEE_NAME,
			COMBO.APP_FEE_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.APPLICATION_ID,
			COMBO.AY,
			COMBO.AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED,
			COMBO.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM,
			COMBO.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID,
			COMBO.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE,
			COMBO.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,

			-- Logic: Cancellation_Days
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 THEN COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS Cancellation_Days,

			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES,
			COMBO.COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE (No Fall Flag Check)
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED,

			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_CALL,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_CHAT,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_SMS,
			COMBO.CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
			COMBO.COUNT,
			COMBO.CREATOR_ID,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_EMAIL,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_GENDER,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_ID,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_KEY,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_NAME,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE,
			COMBO.CUSTOMER_RETURNED_PAYMENTS,
			COMBO.DATE_APP_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATE_APP_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.DATE_APP_COMPLETED,
			COMBO.DATE_APP_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_APP_STARTED,
			COMBO.DATE_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATE_AY_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_AY_END,
			COMBO.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
			COMBO.DATE_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			COMBO.DATE_COLLECTIONS_START,
			COMBO.DATE_COMPLETED,
			COMBO.DATE_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_DEPOSIT_POSTED,
			COMBO.DATE_END,
			COMBO.DATE_FMO_PROCESSED,
			COMBO.DATE_GENERATED,
			COMBO.DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_GUARANTOR_APPLICATION_SIGNED,
			COMBO.DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATE_GUARANTOR_COMPLETED,
			COMBO.DATE_GUARANTOR_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT,
			COMBO.DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_INSURANCE_POLICY_END,
			COMBO.DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_END,
			COMBO.DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_LAST_CONTACT,
			COMBO.DATE_LEASE_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP,
			COMBO.DATE_MOVE_IN,
			COMBO.DATE_MOVE_OUT,
			COMBO.DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED,
			COMBO.DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE,
			COMBO.DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE,
			COMBO.DATE_TRANSFERRED,
			COMBO.DATE_UPDATED,
			COMBO.DATE_WEEK_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATE_WEEK_END,
			COMBO.DATE_YESTERDAY,
			COMBO.DATEID_APP_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATEID_APP_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.DATEID_APP_COMPLETED,
			COMBO.DATEID_APP_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATEID_APP_STARTED,
			COMBO.DATEID_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATEID_AY_END,
			COMBO.DATEID_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
			COMBO.DATEID_COMPLETED,
			COMBO.DATEID_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATEID_END,
			COMBO.DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT,
			COMBO.DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN,
			COMBO.DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_END,
			COMBO.DATEID_INTERVAL_CREATED,
			COMBO.DATEID_LAST_CONTACT,
			COMBO.DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED,
			COMBO.DATEID_MOVE_IN,
			COMBO.DATEID_MOVE_OUT,
			COMBO.DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED,
			COMBO.DATEID_UPDATED,
			COMBO.DATEID_YESTERDAY,
			COMBO.DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.DEPOSIT_HELD,
			COMBO.DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT,
			COMBO.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,

			-- Logic: FALL_INDUCEMENT_TOTAL
			(CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1)
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END)
			+
			(CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END) AS FALL_INDUCEMENT_TOTAL,

			-- Logic: FALL_INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT
			CASE 
				WHEN ISNULL(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN 
					((CASE 
						WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
							 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1)
							 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
						THEN COMBO.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT 
						ELSE 0.00 
					END)
					+
					(CASE 
						WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
							 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
							 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
						THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE 
						ELSE 0.00 
					END))
					/ 
					(CASE 
						WHEN COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 12 THEN 12.00 
						ELSE CAST(COMBO.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC AS DECIMAL(10,2))
					END)
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS FALL_INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT,

			COMBO.FINANCIAL_BALANCE,

		-- Next chunk will include: FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL through remainder.

		---=============================end of chunk 1

		-- =====================================================
		-- CHUNK 2: Middle_Logic (Flags & Calculations)
		-- =====================================================

			COMBO.FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL,
			COMBO.FLAG_ADMIN_FEE,
			COMBO.FLAG_APP_FEE,
			COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED,
			COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED_old_logic,

			-- Logic: Flag_Cancelled_after_Cutoff
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 
					 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) > 7 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS Flag_Cancelled_after_Cutoff,

			-- Logic: Flag_Cancelled_before_Cutoff
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 
					 AND (COMBO.DATEID_CANCELLED - COMBO.DATEID_CREATED) <= 7 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS Flag_Cancelled_before_Cutoff,

			COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE > 0 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE > 0 
				THEN 1 ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL,

			COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE,
			COMBO.FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.FLAG_CONCESSION 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_COUNT 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED
			CASE 
				WHEN (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED,

			COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 
				THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONV_NEW
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND (COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1)
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT 
				ELSE 0 
			END AS FLAG_CONV_NEW,

			-- Logic: FLAG_CONV_NEW_INCOMPLETE
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT

			-- Logic: RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.RENT_AMOUNT 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL,

			-- Logic: RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_FALL = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.RENT_AMOUNT 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL,

			-- Logic: RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.RENT_AMOUNT 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL,

			-- Logic: RENT_TOTAL
			CASE 
				WHEN COMBO.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 
					 AND (COMBO.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR COMBO.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 
					 AND COMBO.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
				THEN COMBO.RENT_AMOUNT 
				ELSE 0.00 
			END AS RENT_TOTAL,

			COMBO.REPAYMENT_BALANCE,
			COMBO.RESIDENT_BALANCE,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT,
			COMBO.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL,
			COMBO.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT,
			COMBO.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT,
			COMBO.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
			COMBO.SCHOOL_NAME,
			COMBO.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME,
			COMBO.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED,
			COMBO.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS,
			COMBO.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE,
			COMBO.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY,
			COMBO.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL,
			COMBO.SPACE,
			COMBO.SPACE_CONFIG,
			COMBO.SPACE_CONFIG_ID,
			COMBO.SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT,
			COMBO.SPACE_COUNT,
			COMBO.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE,
			
			-- Logic: space_count_test
			CASE WHEN COMBO.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS space_count_test,

			COMBO.SPACE_ID,
			COMBO.SPACE_NUMBER,
			COMBO.STAGE,
			COMBO.STAGE_ID,
			COMBO.START_WINDOW_ID,
			COMBO.STATUS,
			COMBO.STATUS_ID,
			COMBO.STATUS_TYPE,
			COMBO.STATUS_TYPE_ID,
			COMBO.STEP,
			COMBO.STEP_ID,
			COMBO.TOTAL_BALANCE,
			COMBO.TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID,
			COMBO.UNIT_ID,
			COMBO.UNIT_KEY

		FROM [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[COMBO] AS COMBO
		WHERE COMBO.FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED = 0;

		-- =====================================================
		-- END OF Middle_Logic QUERY
		-- The table [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Middle_Logic] is now complete.
		-- =====================================================

	-- =========================================================================
	-- STEP 4: FINAL LOGIC
	-- =========================================================================

	-- =====================================================
	-- COMPLETE SCRIPT: Final_Logic
	-- Description: Consolidates Middle_Logic, applies final flags/groups, and deduplicates.
	-- =====================================================

	-- 1. Cleanup with correct syntax (semicolon terminator)
	IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Final_Logic]', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
		DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Final_Logic];

	-- 2. Create Table
	CREATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[xtemp].[Final_Logic]

			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED ELSE 0

		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW ELSE 0

		-- Logic: FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL ELSE 0

		-- Logic: FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED ELSE 0

		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED ELSE 0 
		END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED,

		-- Logic: FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE = '--' 
				 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 
				 AND Middle_Logic.DATE_CANCELLED >= Middle_Logic.DATE_WEEK_BEGIN 
				 AND Middle_Logic.DATE_CANCELLED <= Middle_Logic.DATE_WEEK_END 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL ELSE 0 
		END AS FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS,

		Middle_Logic.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS_NEW,

		-- Logic: FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED >= Middle_Logic.DATE_WEEK_BEGIN 
				 AND Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED <= Middle_Logic.DATE_APPROVED 
			THEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL ELSE 0 
		END AS FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES,

		Middle_Logic.INTERVAL_TYPE,
		Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED AS INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED,

		-- Logic: INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED NEW'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED RENEWAL'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE NEW'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 'COMPLETE RENEWAL'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' THEN 'TRANSFER'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'MTM' THEN 'MONTH TO MONTH'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'NEW' THEN 'INCOMPLETE NEW'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'RENEWAL' THEN 'INCOMPLETE RENEWAL'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN 'APPLICATION'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN 'APPLICATION ON HOLD'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER OUT'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN 'TRANSFER IN'
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN 'CANCELLED'
			ELSE 'OTHER' 
		END AS INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP,

		-- Logic: INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID
		CASE 
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 91
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 92
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN 21
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN 31
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'TRANSFER' THEN 50
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'MTM' THEN 41
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'NEW' THEN 22
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Middle_Logic.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = 'RENEWAL' THEN 32
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN 10
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN 11
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN 52
			WHEN Middle_Logic.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND Middle_Logic.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN 51
			WHEN Middle_Logic.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN 90
			ELSE 999 
		END AS INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID,

		Middle_Logic.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
		Middle_Logic.LEAD_SOURCE,

        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_0] L
        LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0] RT 
            ON L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = RT.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END
