        WHERE [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
          AND ([AY] = 0 OR [AY] IN (2023, 2024, 2025, 2026, 2027, 2028));
END

name: LEASE_0_SP
transformations: Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN NAME = ''APPLICATION'' THEN ''NEW'' WHEN NAME = ''MONTH TO MONTH'' THEN ''MTM'' WHEN NAME = ''RENEWAL'' THEN ''RENEWAL'' WHEN NAME = ''TRANSFER'' THEN ''TRANSFER'' ELSE ''--'' END
FLAG_TYPE_MTM: CASE WHEN NAME = ''MONTH TO MONTH'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_NEW: CASE WHEN NAME = ''APPLICATION'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN NAME = ''RENEWAL'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER: CASE WHEN NAME = ''TRANSFER'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT: CASE WHEN NAME = ''APPLICANT'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN NAME = ''CANCELLED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE: CASE WHEN NAME = ''FUTURE'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT: CASE WHEN NAME = ''CURRENT'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE: CASE WHEN NAME = ''NOTICE'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST: CASE WHEN NAME = ''PAST'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED: CASE WHEN DATE_FMO_PROCESSED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE: CASE WHEN CURRENT_BALANCE = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_IN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN APP.DATE_STARTED WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN APP.DATE_COMPLETED ELSE L0.DATE_CREATED END
DATEID_CREATED: CASE WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN APP.DATEID_STARTED WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN APP.DATEID_COMPLETED ELSE L0.DATEID_CREATED END
DATEID_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN LS.MOVE_IN_DATE > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(day, ''1900-01-01'', CONVERT(DATE, CAST(LS.MOVE_IN_DATE AS CHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
DATEID_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN LS.MOVE_OUT_DATE > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(day, ''1900-01-01'', CONVERT(DATE, CAST(LS.MOVE_OUT_DATE AS CHAR(8)))) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL: CASE WHEN LS.ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND APP.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(L0.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_APP: CASE WHEN APP.DATE_CREATED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO: CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER: CASE WHEN LS.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN APP.FLOORPLAN_CODE = ''UNASSIGNED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(RC.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) <= 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LS.MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) > 0 AND LS.MOVE_IN_DATE < ISNULL(L0.DATE_BEGIN, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_COST: CASE WHEN ISNULL(RCOST.LEASING_REFERRAL_COST, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(RCRED.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SLD.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SLP.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(SRD.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE: CASE WHEN LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LT.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE END
FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION: CASE WHEN LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 0 AND LT.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE = 1 AND ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN END
FLOORPLAN_CODE: CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_CODE ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_CODE END
FLOORPLAN_ID: CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_ID ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_ID END
FLOORPLAN_KEY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_KEY ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_KEY END

Interval_Type_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' AND ISNULL(LS.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 THEN ''TRANSFER OUT'' WHEN IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' AND ISNULL(LS.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0 THEN ''TRANSFER IN'' ELSE IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED END
LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION: CASE WHEN ISNULL(LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC END
space_count_test: CASE WHEN APP.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN ''yes'' ELSE ''no'' END

FLAG_FALL_NEW: CASE WHEN ISNULL(FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''NEW'' AND ISNULL(FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 1) ELSE 0 END

FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL: CASE WHEN ISNULL(FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''RENEWAL'' AND ISNULL(FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 1) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED_CLEAN: CASE WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN FLAG_CANCELLED ELSE 0 END

NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT: CASE WHEN FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK = 1 THEN ISNULL(RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) - ((ISNULL(GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00) + ISNULL(CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE, 0.00)) / NULLIF(LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION, 0)) ELSE 0.00 END

INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP: CASE WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED NEW'' WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED RENEWAL'' WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN ''COMPLETE NEW'' WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN ''COMPLETE RENEWAL'' WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' THEN ''TRANSFER'' WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''MTM'' THEN ''MONTH TO MONTH'' WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''NEW'' THEN ''INCOMPLETE NEW'' WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''RENEWAL'' THEN ''INCOMPLETE RENEWAL'' WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN ''APPLICATION'' WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN ''APPLICATION ON HOLD'' WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN ''TRANSFER OUT'' WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN ''TRANSFER IN'' WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED'' ELSE ''OTHER'' END
description: INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET ANSI_WARNINGS OFF;

    -- =============================================
    -- 1. CLEANUP: Drop existing views to prevent dependency errors
    -- =============================================
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.POST_PROCESSING', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.POST_PROCESSING;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.PROCESSING', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.PROCESSING;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.COMBO', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.COMBO;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.ThisWeek', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.ThisWeek;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Lease_AY', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Lease_AY;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Leases', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Leases;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Properties', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Properties;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Applications', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Applications;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.IntervalTypes', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.IntervalTypes;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Guarantors', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Guarantors;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.StatusTypes', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.StatusTypes;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Concessions', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Concessions;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.GiftCards', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.GiftCards;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.AdminFees', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.AdminFees;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.AppFees', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.AppFees;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.RentCharges', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.RentCharges;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.LeaseTerms', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.LeaseTerms;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.ShortTermPremiums', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.ShortTermPremiums;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.GraduationEstimate', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.GraduationEstimate;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.School', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.School;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Customers', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Customers;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Agents', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Agents;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Units', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Units;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Deposits', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Deposits;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Collections', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Collections;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Insurance', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Insurance;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.SchedRentDiscount', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.SchedRentDiscount;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.SchedLockOffDiscount', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.SchedLockOffDiscount;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.SchedLockOffPremium', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.SchedLockOffPremium;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.ReferralCredit', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.ReferralCredit;
    IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.ReferralCost', 'V') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.ReferralCost;

    -- =============================================
    -- 2. CREATE DIMENSION & LOOKUP VIEWS
    -- =============================================

    -- Properties
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Properties AS SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_REPORTABLE, ADDRESS_COUNTRY, FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY FROM PROPERTY_F');

    -- Applications
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Applications AS SELECT *, SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT AS SPACE_COUNT FROM APPLICATIONS_F');

    -- IntervalTypes
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW IntervalTypes AS SELECT ID, NAME AS Interval_Type, 
        CASE 
            WHEN NAME = ''APPLICATION'' THEN ''NEW''
            WHEN NAME = ''MONTH TO MONTH'' THEN ''MTM''
            WHEN NAME = ''RENEWAL'' THEN ''RENEWAL''
            WHEN NAME = ''TRANSFER'' THEN ''TRANSFER''
            ELSE ''--'' 
        END AS Interval_Type_CONFORMED,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''MONTH TO MONTH'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_MTM,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''APPLICATION'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_NEW,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''RENEWAL'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_RENEWAL,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''TRANSFER'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TYPE_TRANSFER
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES]');

    -- Guarantors
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Guarantors AS SELECT * FROM GUARANTORS_0');

    -- StatusTypes
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW StatusTypes AS SELECT ID AS Status_Type_ID, NAME AS STATUS_TYPE,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''APPLICANT'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''CANCELLED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''FUTURE'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''CURRENT'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''NOTICE'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE,
        CASE WHEN NAME = ''PAST'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES]');

    -- Concessions
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Concessions AS SELECT * FROM CONCESSIONS_0');

    -- GiftCards
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW GiftCards AS SELECT * FROM GIFT_CARDS_0');

    -- AdminFees
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW AdminFees AS SELECT * FROM ADMIN_FEES_0');

    -- AppFees
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW AppFees AS SELECT * FROM APP_FEES_0');

    -- RentCharges
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW RentCharges AS SELECT * FROM RENT_CHARGES_0');

    -- LeaseTerms
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW LeaseTerms AS SELECT * FROM LEASE_TERMS_0');

    -- ShortTermPremiums
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW ShortTermPremiums AS SELECT * FROM SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0');

    -- GraduationEstimate
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW GraduationEstimate AS SELECT * FROM CUSTOMER_GRADUATION_0');

    -- School
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW School AS SELECT LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, SURVEY_ANSWER AS SCHOOL_NAME FROM CUSTOMER_SCHOOL_0');

    -- Customers
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Customers AS SELECT * FROM CUSTOMERS_0');

    -- Agents
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Agents AS SELECT * FROM AGENTS_0');

    -- Units
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Units AS SELECT * FROM UNITS_F');

    -- Deposits
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Deposits AS SELECT *, (DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT - DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT) AS DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT_CALC FROM DEPOSITS_0');

    -- Collections
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Collections AS SELECT
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        CURRENT_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE,
        DATE_COLLECTIONS_START,
        DATE_FMO_PROCESSED,
        DATE_MOVE_OUT,
        DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES,
        FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS,
        LEASE_ID,
        LEDGER_NAME,
        POST_FMO_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES,
        POST_FMO_PAYMENTS AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS,
        PRE_FMO_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        TOTAL_CHARGES AS COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES,
        UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE,
        UNIT_SPACE_ID,
        WRITE_OFF_BALANCE AS COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE,
        CASE WHEN DATE_FMO_PROCESSED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED,
        CASE WHEN CURRENT_BALANCE = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE
    FROM COLLECTIONS_0');

    -- Insurance
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Insurance AS SELECT *, FLAG_ACTIVE_INTERVAL AS FLAG_INSURANCE_ACTIVE_INTERVAL FROM INSURANCE_0');

    -- Discounts & Premiums
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW SchedRentDiscount AS SELECT * FROM SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_0');
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW SchedLockOffDiscount AS SELECT * FROM SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0');
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW SchedLockOffPremium AS SELECT * FROM SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0');
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW ReferralCredit AS SELECT * FROM LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_0');
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW ReferralCost AS SELECT * FROM LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0');

    -- ThisWeek
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW ThisWeek AS SELECT DATE_KEY, AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE, AY_WEEK_END_DATE FROM DATE_F WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = -1');

    -- =============================================
    -- 3. CREATE CORE LOGIC VIEWS
    -- =============================================

    -- Leases
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Leases AS 
    SELECT *,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MOVED_IN,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]');

    -- Lease_AY
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW Lease_AY AS 
    SELECT *, CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) AS DATE_KEY 
    FROM LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0 
    WHERE AY >= 2022 OR AY = 0');

    -- COMBO (The Big Join)
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW COMBO AS 
    SELECT 
        L0.LEASE_AY_KEY,
        TW.DATE_KEY,
        LS.ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        ISNULL(AF.ADMIN_FEE_NAME, ''--'') AS ADMIN_FEE_NAME,
        ISNULL(AF.ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT,
        ISNULL(APF.APP_FEE_NAME, ''--'') AS APP_FEE_NAME,
        ISNULL(APF.APP_FEE_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS APP_FEE_AMOUNT,
        L0.APPLICATION_ID,
        L0.AY,
        APP.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
        APP.AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
        APP.DATE_STARTED,
        APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID,
        ISNULL(L0.AY_WEEK_KEY, 0.00) AS AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED,
        ISNULL(APP.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM, ''--'') AS CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM,
        ISNULL(APP.CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID, 0) AS CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID,
        ISNULL(APP.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE, ''--'') AS CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE,
        ISNULL(APP.CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID, 0) AS CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES,
        ISNULL(COL.COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE, 0.00) AS COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_COUNT, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED, 0) AS CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL,
        ISNULL(CNC.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED, 0.00) AS CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_CALL, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CALL,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_CHAT, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CHAT,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_CONTACTS,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_EMAIL,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_INBOUND,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_ONLINE,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_SMS, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_SMS,
        ISNULL(APP.CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR, 0) AS CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR,
        L0.COUNT,
        L0.CREATED_BY AS CREATOR_ID,
        CUST.ADDRESS_1 AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1,
        CUST.ADDRESS_2 AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2,
        CUST.ADDRESS_CITY AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY,
        CUST.ADDRESS_COUNTRY AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
        CUST.ADDRESS_STATE AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE,
        CUST.ADDRESS_ZIP AS CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP,
        CUST.EMAIL AS CUSTOMER_EMAIL,
        CUST.GENDER AS CUSTOMER_GENDER,
        LS.PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID AS CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUST.CUSTOMER_KEY,
        CUST.NAME AS CUSTOMER_NAME,
        CUST.NAME_FIRST AS CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUST.NAME_LAST AS CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        CUST.NAME_MIDDLE AS CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE,
        CUST.PHONE_MOBILE AS CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE,
        CUST.RETURNED_PAYMENTS AS CUSTOMER_RETURNED_PAYMENTS,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_APPROVED, 0) AS DATE_APP_APPROVED,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_CANCELLED, 0) AS DATE_APP_CANCELLED,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_COMPLETED, 0) AS DATE_APP_COMPLETED,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_CREATED, 0) AS DATE_APP_CREATED,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_STARTED, 0) AS DATE_APP_STARTED,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_LEASE_APPROVED, 0) AS DATE_APPROVED,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_AY_BEGIN, 0) AS DATE_AY_BEGIN,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_AY_END, 0) AS DATE_AY_END,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,0) AS DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,0) AS DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_BEGIN, 0) AS DATE_BEGIN,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_CANCELLED, 0) AS DATE_CANCELLED,
        ISNULL(L0.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE, 0) AS DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
        ISNULL(COL.DATE_COLLECTIONS_START, 0) AS DATE_COLLECTIONS_START,
        ISNULL(APP.DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED, 0) AS DATE_COMPLETED,
        CASE 
            WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN APP.DATE_STARTED
            WHEN L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN APP.DATE_COMPLETED
            ELSE L0.DATE_CREATED
        END AS DATE_CREATED,
        L0.DATE_CREATED AS DATE_INTERVAL_CREATED,

        ISNULL(DEP.DATE_POSTED, 0) AS DATE_DEPOSIT_POSTED,

             ELSE ISNULL(L0.DATEID_END, 0) 
        END AS DATEID_END,

        -- Velocity Flags
        CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS = 1 AND APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND APP.DATE_STARTED >= APP.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE AND APP.DATE_STARTED < APP.AY_WEEK_END_DATE AND ISNULL(L0.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL,
        CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS = 1 AND APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND APP.DATE_STARTED >= APP.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE AND APP.DATE_STARTED < APP.AY_WEEK_END_DATE AND APP.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE <> ''RENEWAL'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW,
        CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS = 1 AND APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND APP.DATE_STARTED >= APP.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE AND APP.DATE_STARTED < APP.AY_WEEK_END_DATE AND APP.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE = ''RENEWAL'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL,
        CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS = 1 AND APP.MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND APP.DATE_STARTED >= APP.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE AND APP.DATE_STARTED < APP.AY_WEEK_END_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL,

        ISNULL(LT.FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE, 0) AS FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE,
        CASE WHEN APP.DATE_CREATED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_APP,
        CASE WHEN APP.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO,
        CASE WHEN LS.NAME_LAST IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER,
        CASE WHEN APP.FLOORPLAN_CODE = ''UNASSIGNED'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(RC.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) <= 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT,
        ISNULL(LS.FLAG_MOVED_IN, 0) AS FLAG_MOVED_IN,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(LS.MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) > 0 AND LS.MOVE_IN_DATE < ISNULL(L0.DATE_BEGIN, 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY,
        ISNULL(LS.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
        ISNULL(L0.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
        ISNULL(L0.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
        ISNULL(L0.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT, 0) AS FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,

        ISNULL(APP.FLAG_OCCTYPE_STUDENT, 0) AS FLAG_OCC_TYPE_STUDENT,
        
        -- Flag Occupied (Source Logic)
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(U.FLAG_OCCUPIED, 0) = 1 
             AND ISNULL(L0.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) > 1 
             AND ISNULL(L0.DATE_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 
             AND ISNULL(LS.FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 
             AND (
                 (L0.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(L0.DATEID_BEGIN, 0) AND L0.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(L0.DATEID_END, 0))
             )
             AND (
                 (L0.DATEID_YESTERDAY >= ISNULL(L0.DATEID_AY_BEGIN, 0) AND L0.DATEID_YESTERDAY <= ISNULL(L0.DATEID_AY_END, 0))
                 OR ISNULL(APP.FLAG_OCCTYPE_CONVENTIONAL, 0) = 1
             )
             THEN APP.SPACE_COUNT
             ELSE 0 
        END AS FLAG_OCCUPIED,

        ISNULL(PR.FLAG_REPORTABLE, 0) AS FLAG_PROPERTY_ACTIVE,
        ISNULL(PR.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, 0) AS FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED,

        CASE WHEN ISNULL(RCRED.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, 0.00) <> 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT,

        CASE WHEN LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC = 0 THEN 0 ELSE LT.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE END AS FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE,
        CASE WHEN LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 0 AND LT.FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE = 1 AND ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) = 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION,
        ISNULL(L0.FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED,

        ISNULL(ST.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE,
        ISNULL(ST.FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST, 0) AS FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST,

        CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_CODE ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_CODE END AS FLOORPLAN_CODE,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_ID ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_ID END AS FLOORPLAN_ID,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(APP.FLOORPLAN, ''UNASSIGNED'') = ''UNASSIGNED'' AND U.UNIT_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN U.FLOORPLAN_KEY ELSE APP.FLOORPLAN_KEY END AS FLOORPLAN_KEY,

        CASE 
            WHEN IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' AND ISNULL(LS.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 THEN ''TRANSFER OUT''
            WHEN IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' AND ISNULL(LS.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0 THEN ''TRANSFER IN''
            ELSE IT.Interval_Type_CONFORMED 
        END AS Interval_Type_CONFORMED,
        L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
        ISNULL(APP.LEAD_SOURCE, ''--'') AS LEAD_SOURCE,
        ISNULL(APP.LEAD_SOURCE_ID, 0) AS LEAD_SOURCE_ID,
        L0.LEASE_ID,
        ISNULL(L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, 0) AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        L0.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
        ISNULL(L0.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
        LT.LEASE_TERM,
        LT.LEASE_TERM_ID,
        LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC,
        L0.CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 12 THEN 12 ELSE LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC END AS LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION,
        LT.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM,
        AGT.COMPANY_USER_ID AS LEASING_AGENT_COMPANY_ID,
        AGT.EMPLOYEE_CODE AS LEASING_AGENT_EMPLOYEE_CODE,
        AGT.LEASING_AGENT_ID,
        AGT.EMPLOYEE_NAME AS LEASING_AGENT_NAME,
        ISNULL(APP.OCCUPANCY_TYPE, ''--'') AS OCC_TYPE,
        ISNULL(APP.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID, 0) AS OCC_TYPE_ID,
        ISNULL(APP.LEASE_TYPE, ''--'') AS OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT,
        ISNULL(APP.LEASE_TYPE_ID, 0) AS OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT_ID,
        ISNULL(L0.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID, 0) AS PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
        PR.ADDRESS_COUNTRY AS PROPERTY_ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
        ISNULL(L0.PROPERTY_AY_KEY, 0.0) AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
        L0.PROPERTY_ID,
        L0.PROPERTY_KEY,
        L0.PROPERTY_NAME,
        ISNULL(RCOST.LEASING_REFERRAL_COST, 0.00) AS REFERRAL_COST,
        ISNULL(RCOST.REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID, 0) AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID,
        ISNULL(RCOST.REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST, ''--'') AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        ISNULL(RCOST.REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST, ''--'') AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        ISNULL(RCRED.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, 0.00) AS REFERRAL_DISCOUNT,
        ISNULL(RCRED.CHARGE_COUNT, 0) AS REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_COUNT,
        ISNULL(RCRED.LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL, 0.00) AS REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
        ISNULL(RC.RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) AS RENT_AMOUNT,
        ISNULL(LS.REPAYMENT_BALANCE, 0.00) AS REPAYMENT_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(LS.RESIDENT_BALANCE, 0.00) AS RESIDENT_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(SLD.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT, 0.00) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT,
        ISNULL(SLD.CHARGE_COUNT, 0) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT,
        ISNULL(SLD.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL, 0.00) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
        ISNULL(SLP.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM, 0.00) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM,
        ISNULL(SLP.CHARGE_COUNT, 0) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT,
        ISNULL(SLP.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) AS SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL,
        ISNULL(SRD.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT, 0.00) AS SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT,
        ISNULL(SRD.CHARGE_COUNT, 0) AS SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT,
        ISNULL(SRD.SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL, 0.00) AS SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
        ISNULL(SCH.SCHOOL_NAME, ''--'') AS SCHOOL_NAME,
        APP.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME,
        APP.SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED,
        ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS, 0) AS SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS,
        ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE, 0) AS SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE,
        ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY, 0.00) AS SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY,
        ISNULL(STP.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL, 0.00) AS SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL,
        ISNULL(U.SPACE, ''--'') AS SPACE,
        APP.SPACE_CONFIG,
        APP.SPACE_CONFIG_ID,
        APP.SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT,
        ISNULL(APP.SPACE_COUNT, 0) AS SPACE_COUNT,
        ISNULL(APP.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 1) AS SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE,
        CASE WHEN APP.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN ''yes'' ELSE ''no'' END AS space_count_test,
        ISNULL(U.SPACE_ID, 0) AS SPACE_ID,
        ISNULL(U.SPACE_NUMBER, ''--'') AS SPACE_NUMBER,
        ISNULL(L0.STAGE, ''--'') AS STAGE,
        ISNULL(L0.STAGE_ID, 0) AS STAGE_ID,
        ISNULL(L0.START_WINDOW_ID, 0) AS START_WINDOW_ID,
        ISNULL(L0.STATUS, ''--'') AS STATUS,
        ISNULL(L0.STATUS_ID, 0) AS STATUS_ID,
        ISNULL(ST.STATUS_TYPE, ''--'') AS STATUS_TYPE,
        ISNULL(L0.STATUS_TYPE_ID, 0) AS STATUS_TYPE_ID,
        ISNULL(APP.STEP, ''--'') AS STEP,
        ISNULL(APP.STEP_ID, 0) AS STEP_ID,
        ISNULL(LS.TOTAL_BALANCE, 0.00) AS TOTAL_BALANCE,
        ISNULL(LS.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) AS TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID,
        ISNULL(U.UNIT_ID, 0) AS UNIT_ID,
        ISNULL(U.UNIT_KEY, 0) AS UNIT_KEY

    FROM Lease_AY L0
    LEFT JOIN Leases LS ON L0.LEASE_ID = LS.ID 
    INNER JOIN Properties PR ON L0.PROPERTY_KEY = PR.PROPERTY_KEY
    LEFT JOIN Applications APP ON L0.APPLICATION_ID = APP.APPLICATION_ID 
    INNER JOIN IntervalTypes IT ON L0.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = IT.ID
    LEFT JOIN Guarantors GUA ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = GUA.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN StatusTypes ST ON L0.STATUS_TYPE_ID = ST.Status_Type_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Concessions CNC ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = CNC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN GiftCards GC ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = GC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN AdminFees AF ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = AF.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN AppFees APF ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = APF.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN RentCharges RC ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = RC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN LeaseTerms LT ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = LT.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN ShortTermPremiums STP ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = STP.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN GraduationEstimate GE ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = GE.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN School SCH ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SCH.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Customers CUST ON L0.CUSTOMER_ID = CUST.CUSTOMER_KEY 
    LEFT JOIN Agents AGT ON L0.CREATED_BY = AGT.COMPANY_USER_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Units U ON LS.UNIT_SPACE_ID = U.SPACE_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Deposits DEP ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = DEP.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Collections COL ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = COL.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN Insurance INS ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = INS.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN SchedRentDiscount SRD ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SRD.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN SchedLockOffDiscount SLD ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SLD.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN SchedLockOffPremium SLP ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = SLP.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN ReferralCredit RCRED ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = RCRED.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN ReferralCost RCOST ON L0.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = RCOST.TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
    LEFT JOIN ThisWeek TW ON L0.DATE_KEY = TW.DATE_KEY');

    -- PROCESSING
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW PROCESSING AS 
    SELECT *,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''NEW'' AND ISNULL(FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 1) ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_FALL_NEW,
        CASE WHEN ISNULL(FLAG_FALL, 0) = 1 AND ISNULL(FLAG_CANCELLED, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_COMPLETE, 0) = 1 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''RENEWAL'' AND ISNULL(FLAG_HOLDOVER, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_MOVED_OUT, 0) = 0 AND ISNULL(FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, 0) = 0 THEN ISNULL(SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE, 1) ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL,
        CASE WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN FLAG_CANCELLED ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_CANCELLED_CLEAN,
        
        -- Fall Inducement
        (CASE WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END) +
        (CASE WHEN (FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END) 
        AS INDUCEMENT_TOTAL,

        -- Net Effective Rent
        CASE WHEN FLAG_LEASE_TERM_OK = 1 THEN 
             ISNULL(RENT_AMOUNT, 0.00) - 
             ((ISNULL(GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00) + ISNULL(CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE, 0.00)) / NULLIF(LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CONCESSION, 0))
        ELSE 0.00 END AS NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT

    FROM COMBO WHERE FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED = 0');

    -- POST_PROCESSING
    EXEC('CREATE VIEW POST_PROCESSING AS 
    SELECT *,
        CASE 
            WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED NEW''
            WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED RENEWAL''
            WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND FLAG_FALL_NEW > 0 THEN ''COMPLETE NEW''
            WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL > 0 THEN ''COMPLETE RENEWAL''
            WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''TRANSFER'' THEN ''TRANSFER''
            WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 0 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''MTM'' THEN ''MONTH TO MONTH''
            WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''NEW'' THEN ''INCOMPLETE NEW''
            WHEN FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND Interval_Type_CONFORMED = ''RENEWAL'' THEN ''INCOMPLETE RENEWAL''
            WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID < 229 THEN ''APPLICATION''
            WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID IN (267, 272) THEN ''APPLICATION ON HOLD''
            WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 1 THEN ''TRANSFER OUT''
            WHEN MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID >= 229 AND FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN ''TRANSFER IN''
            WHEN FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 THEN ''CANCELLED''
            ELSE ''OTHER''
        END AS INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP
    FROM PROCESSING');

SELECT

    P.[AY],
    P.[AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED],
    P.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],
    P.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM_ID],
    P.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],
    P.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE_ID],
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 THEN P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED ELSE 0 END,
    P.[COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
    P.[COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED ELSE 0.00 END,
    P.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],
    P.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
    P.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
    P.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],

    P.[DATEID_APP_APPROVED],
    P.[DATEID_APP_CANCELLED],
    P.[DATEID_APP_COMPLETED],
    P.[DATEID_APP_CREATED],
    P.[DATEID_APP_STARTED],
    P.[DATEID_APPROVED],
    P.[DATEID_AY_BEGIN],
    P.[DATEID_AY_END],
    P.[DATEID_BEGIN],
    P.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
    P.[DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],
    P.[DATEID_COMPLETED],
    P.[DATEID_CREATED],
    P.[DATEID_END],
    P.[DATEID_INITIAL_CONTACT],
    P.[DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_BEGIN],
    P.[DATEID_INSURANCE_POLICY_END],
    P.[DATEID_INTERVAL_CREATED],
    P.[DATEID_LAST_CONTACT],
    P.[DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],
    P.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],
    P.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT],
    P.[DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED],
    P.[DATEID_UPDATED],
    P.[DATEID_YESTERDAY],
    P.[DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
    P.[DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],
    P.[DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT],
    P.[DEPOSIT_HELD],
    P.[DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
    P.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END + CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN ISNULL(P.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC, 0) > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END + CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE ELSE 0.00 END) / CASE WHEN P.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 12 THEN 12 ELSE P.LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC END ELSE 0.00 END,
    P.[FINANCIAL_BALANCE],
    P.[FLAG_ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL],
    P.[FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
    P.[FLAG_APP_FEE],
    P.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
    P.[FLAG_CANCELLED_old_logic],
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED > 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED <= 7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    P.[FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],
    CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END,
    P.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
    P.[FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE],
    P.[FLAG_CONCESSION],
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_COUNT_MANUAL ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 THEN P.CONCESSION_COUNT_SCHEDULED ELSE 0 END,
    P.[FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL],
    P.[FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED],
    P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    P.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
    P.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
    P.[FLAG_FALL],
    CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED > 7 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED > 7 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 0 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 0) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED > 7 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN (CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.DATEID_CANCELLED - P.DATEID_CREATED > 7 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT >= 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT >= 1 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.SPACE_COUNT ELSE 0 END,

    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND (P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 OR P.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN = 1) AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_NEW_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_FALL = 1 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1 AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    CASE WHEN P.FLAG_CANCELLED = 0 AND (P.FLAG_COMPLETE = 1 OR P.FLAG_INCOMPLETE = 1) AND P.FLAG_MOVED_OUT = 0 AND P.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 0 AND P.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT = 0 THEN P.RENT_AMOUNT ELSE 0.00 END,
    P.[REPAYMENT_BALANCE],
    P.[RESIDENT_BALANCE],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT],
    P.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
    P.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT],
    P.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
    P.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],
    P.[SCHOOL_NAME],
    P.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME],
    P.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED],
    P.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS],
    P.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],
    P.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY],
    P.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
    P.[SPACE],
    P.[SPACE_CONFIG],
    P.[SPACE_CONFIG_ID],
    P.[SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],
    P.[SPACE_COUNT],
    P.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
    CASE WHEN P.SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE = 1 THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END,
    P.[SPACE_ID],
    P.[SPACE_NUMBER],
    P.[STAGE],
    P.[STAGE_ID],
    P.[START_WINDOW_ID],
    P.[STATUS],
    P.[STATUS_ID],
    P.[STATUS_TYPE],
    P.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
    P.[STEP],
    P.[STEP_ID],
    P.[TOTAL_BALANCE],
    P.[TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID],
    P.[UNIT_ID],
    P.[UNIT_KEY]
FROM POST_PROCESSING P;

END

name: LEASE_AGG_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_FACTS_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AGG_F.
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: LEASE_AGG_F (LEASE_AGG_F_ATL.txt)
--
-- Aggregates LEASE_FACTS_F joined with DATE_F into one row per
-- (DATE_KEY, DATE_KEY_AY, DAY_NUMBER, AY, PROPERTY_KEY, FLOORPLAN_KEY).
-- Rows where FLOORPLAN_KEY IS NULL are excluded.
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_FACTS_F   (lease fact rows)
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F          (date dimension â€” provides DAY_OF_WEEK)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AGG_F  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   INNER JOIN DATE_F ON DATE_F.DATE_KEY = LEASE_FACTS_F.DATE_KEY
--   DAY_NUMBER = DATE_F.DAY_OF_WEEK
--   DATE_KEY_AY = CAST(CAST(DATE_KEY AS varchar)+'.'+CAST(AY AS varchar) AS decimal(19,4))
--   decode(FLAG_HOLDOVER=0, GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00) â†’ CASE WHEN [FLAG_HOLDOVER]=0 THEN ... ELSE 0.00 END
--   REFERRAL_AMOUNT = 0, REFERRAL_COUNT = 0  (hardcoded in ATL)
--   WHERE AllRecords.FLOORPLAN_KEY is not null
--   GROUP BY (DATE_KEY, DATE_KEY_AY, DAY_NUMBER, AY, PROPERTY_KEY, FLOORPLAN_KEY)
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_AGG_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_AGG_F];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_AGG_F] (
        [DATE_KEY],

        -- DAY_NUMBER = DATE_F.DAY_OF_WEEK (GROUP BY key, not summed)

        SUM(lf.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_ALONE])                        AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_ALONE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER])                     AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER],

        SUM(lf.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_TRANSFER])                     AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_TRANSFER],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED])                           AS [FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_GIFT_CARD])                               AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE])                      AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED])                      AS [FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER])                                AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING])                       AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR])                    AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS])                          AS [FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE])                              AS [FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL])                    AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED])             AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT])                    AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED])             AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL])                   AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED])            AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND])                 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE])                  AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED])           AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT])            AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED])     AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS])                     AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED])              AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER])                     AS [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL])                   AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW])                      AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL])                  AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL])                    AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE])                         AS [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR])                             AS [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MOVED_IN])                                AS [FLAG_MOVED_IN],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY])                          AS [FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT])                               AS [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT_30])                            AS [FLAG_MOVED_OUT_30],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT])                             AS [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_LEASE])                               AS [FLAG_MTM_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT])                           AS [FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED])                           AS [FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_FUTURE])                              AS [FLAG_MTM_FUTURE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_NOTICE])                              AS [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_MTM_PAST])                                AS [FLAG_MTM_PAST],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE])                               AS [FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_OCCUPIED])                                AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_REFERRAL_COST])                           AS [FLAG_REFERRAL_COST],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT])                       AS [FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE])                           AS [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT])                 AS [FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM])                  AS [FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT])                     AS [FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR])             AS [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP])                  AS [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE])                  AS [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF])                  AS [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE])                        AS [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION])            AS [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED])                        AS [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE])                         AS [FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE])                       AS [FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE])             AS [FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT])                   AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED])                   AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT])                     AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE])                      AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE])                      AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST])                        AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL])                      AS [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY])                      AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS])                          AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS])                       AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES])                     AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES])                   AS [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_TRANSFER])                                AS [FLAG_TRANSFER],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN])                             AS [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],
        SUM(lf.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT])                            AS [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],
        -- ATL: decode(FLAG_HOLDOVER=0, GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT, 0.00)
        SUM(CASE WHEN lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER] = 0 THEN lf.[GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]        ELSE 0.00 END)
                                                                AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
        SUM(CASE WHEN lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER] = 0 THEN lf.[GIFT_CARD_COUNT]         ELSE 0    END)
                                                                AS [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
        SUM(CASE WHEN lf.[FLAG_HOLDOVER] = 0 THEN lf.[GIFT_CARD_MONTHLY_IMPACT] ELSE 0.00 END)
                                                                AS [GIFT_CARD_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
        SUM(lf.[INDUCEMENT_TOTAL])                             AS [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT])                    AS [INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT])                           AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL])            AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED])             AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_NEW])         AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_NEW],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_RENEWAL])     AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_RENEWAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL])   AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL])
                                                                AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL])          AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL])                     AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL])       AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL]) AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL])
                                                                AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL])     AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_TOTAL])                AS [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_TOTAL],
        -- ATL: REFERRAL_AMOUNT = 0, REFERRAL_COUNT = 0 (hardcoded)
        0                                                       AS [REFERRAL_AMOUNT],
        0                                                       AS [REFERRAL_COUNT],
        SUM(lf.[REFERRAL_COST])                                AS [REFERRAL_COST],
        SUM(lf.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT])                            AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_COUNT])                      AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
        SUM(lf.[REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL])                      AS [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_AMOUNT])                                  AS [RENT_AMOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL])                          AS [RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL])                     AS [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL])                   AS [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_TOTAL])                              AS [RENT_FALL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL])                 AS [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL])               AS [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_NEW_TOTAL])                          AS [RENT_FALL_NEW_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL])             AS [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL])           AS [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL])                      AS [RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL])                        AS [RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[RENT_TOTAL])                                   AS [RENT_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT])                      AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT])                AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL])                AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM])                       AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT])                 AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL])                 AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT])                          AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT])                    AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
        SUM(lf.[SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL])                    AS [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
    FROM [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F] lf
    INNER JOIN [dbo].[DATE_F] d
        ON d.[DATE_KEY] = lf.[DATE_KEY]
    WHERE lf.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        lf.[DATE_KEY],
        CAST(CAST(lf.[DATE_KEY] AS varchar(20)) + '.' + CAST(lf.[AY] AS varchar(20)) AS decimal(19,4)),
        d.[DAY_OF_WEEK],
        lf.[AY],
        lf.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        lf.[FLOORPLAN_KEY];

END

name: LEASE_AGG_LOAD_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AGG_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AGG.
sql:
/* STEP 3 (FIXED v3): STORED PROCEDURE GENERATION
   Procedure: [dbo].[LEASE_AGG_LOAD_SP]
   Fixes: 
     1. [FLAG_UNDER_RATE] and [FLAG_WITHIN_RATE] do not exist in Source [LEASE_AGG_F].
     2. Mapped these to CAST(NULL AS INT) in the SELECT list to resolve the "Invalid Column Name" error.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_AGG_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. DELETE LOGIC (Window Replace)
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG] T
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG_F] S 
            WHERE S.[DATE_KEY] = T.[DATE_KEY]
        );

        -- 2. INSERT LOGIC
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG] (
            -- Keys & Dimensions
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], 
            [DATETIME_KEY], [DAY_NUMBER],

            -- Financials
            [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], [APP_FEE_AMOUNT], 
            [COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], [COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],
            [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES], [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],
            [COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE], [COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
            [COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],
            
            -- Concessions
            [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE], [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            
            -- Counts
            [COUNT],
            
            -- Deposits
            [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            [DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            
            -- Fall / Inducement
            [FALL_INDUCEMENT_TOTAL], [FALL_INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
            
            -- Flags
            [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE], [FLAG_APP_FEE], [FLAG_CANCELLED], 
            [FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW], [FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL],
            [FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE], [FLAG_COMPLETE], [FLAG_CONCESSION],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_MANUAL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED], [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
            [FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED], [FLAG_CONV_NEW], [FLAG_CONV_NEW_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_CONV_NEW_TRANSFER], [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL], [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL], [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED], [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED], [FLAG_FALL],
            [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED], [FLAG_FALL_MTM], [FLAG_FALL_NEW], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_ALONE],
            [FLAG_FALL_NEW_CANCELLED], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE_WITH_VISIT], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE_WITHOUT_VISIT],
            [FLAG_FALL_NEW_TRANSFER], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_WITH_VISIT], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_WITHOUT_VISIT],
            [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_ALONE], [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_CANCELLED],
            [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_HOLDOVER], [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_ALONE], [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER],
            [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_TRANSFER], [FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED],
            [FLAG_GIFT_CARD], [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE], [FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
            [FLAG_HOLDOVER], [FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING], [FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR],
            [FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN], [FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED], [FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
            [FLAG_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS],
            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL],
            [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL], [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE], [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR],
            [FLAG_MOVED_IN], [FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT_30],
            [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT], [FLAG_MTM_LEASE], [FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT], [FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED],
            [FLAG_MTM_FUTURE], [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE], [FLAG_MTM_PAST], [FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
            [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_REFERRAL_COST], [FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            [FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], [FLAG_SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM], [FLAG_SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT],
            [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP],
            [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF],
            [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE], [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION],
            [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED], [FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE], [FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT],
            [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE],
            [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST], [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS],
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES],
            [FLAG_TRANSFER], [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN], [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],
            [FLAG_UNDER_RATE], [FLAG_WITHIN_RATE],
            
            -- Other Sums
            [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT], [GIFT_CARD_COUNT], [GIFT_CARD_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
            
            -- Inducement
            [INDUCEMENT_TOTAL], [INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
            
            -- Net Effective
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_NEW],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMBINED_RENEWAL], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
            [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_FALL_TOTAL],
            
            -- Referral / Rent
            [REFERRAL_COST], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_COUNT], [REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],
            [RENT_AMOUNT], [RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_NEW_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL], [RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_TOTAL],
            
            -- Sched
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT], [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT], [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],

            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            -- Keys & Dimensions
            [DATE_KEY], 
            [DATE_KEY_AY], 
            [AY], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY], 
            TRY_CAST(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)), 
            [DAY_NUMBER],

            -- Financials
            [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], [APP_FEE_AMOUNT], 
            [COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], [COLLECTIONS_DEPOSITS_APPLIED_TO_CHARGES],
            [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_CHARGES], [COLLECTIONS_POST_FMO_PAYMENTS],
            [COLLECTIONS_PRE_FMO_BALANCE], [COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
            [COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],
            
            -- Concessions
            [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE], [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_FALL_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], [CONCESSION_FALL_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_MANUAL],
            [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE_SCHEDULED], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_MANUAL], [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE_SCHEDULED],
            
            -- Counts
            [COUNT],
            
            -- Deposits
            [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            [DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            
            -- Fall / Inducement
            [FALL_INDUCEMENT_TOTAL], [FALL_INDUCEMENT_MONTHLY_IMPACT],
            
            -- Flags
            [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE], [FLAG_APP_FEE], [FLAG_CANCELLED], 
            [FLAG_CANCELLED_NEW], [FLAG_CANCELLED_RENEWAL],
            [FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE], [FLAG_COMPLETE], [FLAG_CONCESSION],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_MANUAL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED],
            [FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL], [FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED], [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
            [FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED], [FLAG_CONV_NEW], [FLAG_CONV_NEW_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_CONV_NEW_TRANSFER], [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL], [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE],

            [RENT_AMOUNT], [RENT_COMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_NEW_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_NEW_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_COMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL], [RENT_FALL_INCOMPLETE_RENEWAL_TOTAL],
            [RENT_FALL_RENEWAL_TOTAL], [RENT_INCOMPLETE_TOTAL], [RENT_TOTAL],
            
            -- Sched
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_COUNT], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT], [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT], [SCHED_RENT_DISCOUNT_TOTAL],

            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG_F];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEASE_AR_TRANSACTIONS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_CODES into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AR_TRANSACTIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_AR_TRANSACTIONS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_AR_TRANSACTIONS_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_AR_TRANSACTIONS_0]
        ([TRANSACTION_ID], [AR_CODE_DESCRIPTION], [AR_CODE_ID], [AR_CODE_NAME],
         [AR_CODE_TYPE_DESCRIPTION], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
         [AR_TRANSACTION_ID], [CREATED_ON_DATE], [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
         [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
         [IS_DELETED], [IS_PAYMENT_IN_KIND], [IS_POSTED], [IS_REVERSAL], [IS_TEMPORARY],
         [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
         [POST_DATE], [POST_DATETIME], [POST_MONTH_DATE], [POST_MONTH_DATETIME],
         [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [BUILDING_NAME], [UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
         [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT], [TOTAL_CHARGES], [TOTAL_PAYMENTS], [MEMO])
    SELECT
        t.[ID],
        c.[DESCRIPTION],
        t.[AR_CODE_ID],
        c.[NAME],
        UPPER(ct.[DESCRIPTION]),
        t.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
        ct.[NAME],
        t.[AR_TRANSACTION_ID],
        t.[CREATED_ON_DATE],
        t.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
        l.[NAME_LAST] + ', ' + l.[NAME_FIRST],
        l.[NAME_FIRST],
        l.[NAME_LAST],
        t.[IS_DELETED],
        t.[IS_PAYMENT_IN_KIND],
        t.[IS_POSTED],
        t.[IS_REVERSAL],
        t.[IS_TEMPORARY],
        t.[LEASE_ID],
        t.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        t.[POST_DATE],
        t.[POST_DATETIME],
        t.[POST_MONTH_DATE],
        t.[POST_MONTH_DATETIME],
        l.[PROPERTY_ID],
        l.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        l.[BUILDING_NAME],
        l.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE],
        t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
        CASE WHEN t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] >= 0 THEN t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] < 0 THEN t.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] ELSE 0 END,
        t.[MEMO]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] t
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] c
        ON t.[AR_CODE_ID] = c.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] ct
        ON t.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = ct.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] l
        ON t.[LEASE_ID] = l.[ID]
    WHERE t.[CREATED_ON_DATE] >= 20240501
       OR t.[UPDATED_ON_DATE] >= 20240501
       OR t.[TRANSACTION_DATE] >= 20240501;
END
