name: LEASE_AY_0_SP
transformations: Type_Name: CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END
Type_Name: CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END
Type_Name: CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVALS, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_AY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_AY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_AY_0];

    WITH
    -- CTE 1: E_LEASE_INTERVALS joined with PROPERTY_F (student-only, reportable, ENTRATA)
    Intervals AS (
        SELECT
            li.[ID] AS Lease_Interval_ID,
            li.[LEASE_ID] AS LEASE_ID,
            li.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID] AS LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
            li.[PROPERTY_ID] AS PROPERTY_ID,
            li.[LEASE_START_DATE] AS LEASE_START_DATE,
            li.[LEASE_START_DATEID] AS LEASE_START_DATEID,
            li.[LEASE_END_DATE] AS LEASE_END_DATE,
            li.[LEASE_END_DATEID] AS LEASE_END_DATEID,
            pf.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS PROPERTY_KEY,
            pf.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS PROPERTY_NAME_1,
            lit.[NAME] AS LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] li
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf
            ON li.[PROPERTY_ID] = pf.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
            AND pf.[SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
            AND pf.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
            AND pf.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES] lit
            ON lit.[ID] = li.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID]
    ),
    -- CTE 2: Application info per lease
    AppInfo AS (
        SELECT
            ca.[LEASE_ID] AS LEASE_ID,
            ap.[NAME_FIRST] AS Applicant_NAME_FIRST,
            ap.[NAME_LAST] AS Applicant_NAME_LAST,
            ap.[NAME_MIDDLE] AS Applicant_NAME_MIDDLE,
            ca.[PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID] AS PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID,
            ca.[ID] AS Application_ID,
            ca.[APPLICATION_STAGE_ID] AS APPLICATION_STAGE_ID,
            ast.[NAME] AS APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME,
            ast.[DESCRIPTION] AS APPLICATION_STAGE_DESCRIPTION,
            ca.[APPLICATION_STATUS_ID] AS APPLICATION_STATUS_ID,
            asta.[NAME] AS APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME,
            asta.[DESCRIPTION] AS APPLICATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS] ca
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANTS] ap
            ON ca.[PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID] = ap.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STAGES] ast
            ON ca.[APPLICATION_STAGE_ID] = ast.[ID]
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICATION_STATUSES] asta
            ON ca.[APPLICATION_STATUS_ID] = asta.[ID]
    ),
    -- CTE 3: Lease counts (all intervals + holdover intervals per lease)
    LeaseCounts AS (
        SELECT
            i.LEASE_ID,
            COUNT(*) AS Lease_Count_All,
            SUM(CASE WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME IN ('Holdover', 'HOLDOVER', 'MTM', 'Month to Month')
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Lease_Count_Holdover
        FROM Intervals i
        GROUP BY i.LEASE_ID
    ),
    -- CTE 4: Combo — Intervals + Leases + AppInfo + LeaseCounts
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            i.*,
            lc2.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
            lc2.[TRANSFER_LEASE_ID] AS TRANSFER_LEASE_ID,
            lc2.[TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE] AS TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE,
            ai.Applicant_NAME_FIRST,
            ai.Applicant_NAME_LAST,
            ai.Applicant_NAME_MIDDLE,
            ai.PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID,
            ai.Application_ID,
            ai.APPLICATION_STAGE_ID,
            ai.APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME,
            ai.APPLICATION_STAGE_DESCRIPTION,
            ai.APPLICATION_STATUS_ID,
            ai.APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME,
            ai.APPLICATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION,
            ISNULL(cnt.Lease_Count_All, 0) AS Lease_Count_All,
            ISNULL(cnt.Lease_Count_Holdover, 0) AS Lease_Count_Holdover
        FROM Intervals i
        LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] lc2
            ON i.LEASE_ID = lc2.[ID]
        LEFT JOIN AppInfo ai
            ON i.LEASE_ID = ai.LEASE_ID
        LEFT JOIN LeaseCounts cnt
            ON i.LEASE_ID = cnt.LEASE_ID
        WHERE (lc2.[TRANSFER_LEASE_ID] IS NULL)
            OR (lc2.[TRANSFER_LEASE_ID] IS NOT NULL AND lc2.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] IN (4, 5))
    ),
    -- CTE 5: Academic years (filtered to AY >= 2018)
    AcadYears AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY] AS PROPERTY_KEY,
            [AY] AS ACADEMIC_YEAR,
            [RELATIVE_AY] AS AY_REVERSE_ID,
            [AY_BEGIN_DATE] AS AY_START_DATE,
            [AY_BEGIN_DATEID] AS AY_START_DATEID,
            [AY_END_DATE] AS AY_END_DATE,
            [AY_END_DATEID] AS AY_END_DATEID,
            [PROPERTY_AY_KEY] AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F]
        WHERE [AY] >= 2018
    ),
    -- CTE 6: Level 1 — lease fully within academic year
    Level1 AS (
        SELECT
            c.*,
            ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ay.AY_REVERSE_ID,
            ay.AY_START_DATE, ay.AY_START_DATEID, ay.AY_END_DATE, ay.AY_END_DATEID,
            ay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
            CAST(c.Lease_Interval_ID AS DECIMAL(18,4)) + (CAST(ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR AS DECIMAL(18,4)) * 0.0001) AS Lease_AY_Key,
            CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END AS Type_Name,
            1 AS Level
        FROM Combo c
        INNER JOIN AcadYears ay
            ON c.PROPERTY_KEY = ay.PROPERTY_KEY
            AND c.LEASE_START_DATEID >= ay.AY_START_DATEID
            AND c.LEASE_END_DATEID <= ay.AY_END_DATEID
    ),
    -- CTE 7: Level 2 — lease starts within AY but extends past end
    Level2 AS (
        SELECT
            c.*,
            ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ay.AY_REVERSE_ID,
            ay.AY_START_DATE, ay.AY_START_DATEID, ay.AY_END_DATE, ay.AY_END_DATEID,
            ay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
            CAST(c.Lease_Interval_ID AS DECIMAL(18,4)) + (CAST(ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR AS DECIMAL(18,4)) * 0.0001) AS Lease_AY_Key,
            CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END AS Type_Name,
            2 AS Level
        FROM Combo c
        INNER JOIN AcadYears ay
            ON c.PROPERTY_KEY = ay.PROPERTY_KEY
            AND c.LEASE_START_DATEID >= ay.AY_START_DATEID
            AND c.LEASE_END_DATEID > ay.AY_END_DATEID
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM Level1 l1
            WHERE l1.Lease_Interval_ID = c.Lease_Interval_ID
            AND l1.ACADEMIC_YEAR = ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR
        )
    ),
    -- CTE 8: Level 3 — lease starts before AY but ends within
    Level3 AS (
        SELECT
            c.*,
            ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR, ay.AY_REVERSE_ID,
            ay.AY_START_DATE, ay.AY_START_DATEID, ay.AY_END_DATE, ay.AY_END_DATEID,
            ay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
            CAST(c.Lease_Interval_ID AS DECIMAL(18,4)) + (CAST(ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR AS DECIMAL(18,4)) * 0.0001) AS Lease_AY_Key,
            CASE WHEN ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR IS NOT NULL THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE c.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME END AS Type_Name,
            3 AS Level
        FROM Combo c
        INNER JOIN AcadYears ay
            ON c.PROPERTY_KEY = ay.PROPERTY_KEY
            AND c.LEASE_START_DATEID < ay.AY_START_DATEID
            AND c.LEASE_END_DATEID >= ay.AY_START_DATEID
            AND c.LEASE_END_DATEID <= ay.AY_END_DATEID
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM Level1 l1
            WHERE l1.Lease_Interval_ID = c.Lease_Interval_ID
            AND l1.ACADEMIC_YEAR = ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR
        )
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM Level2 l2
            WHERE l2.Lease_Interval_ID = c.Lease_Interval_ID
            AND l2.ACADEMIC_YEAR = ay.ACADEMIC_YEAR
        )
    ),
    -- CTE 9: Merge all levels
    Merged AS (
        SELECT * FROM Level1
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Level2
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM Level3
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_AY_0]
        ([LEASE_AY_KEY], [ACADEMIC_YEAR], [AY_REVERSE_ID], [APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST], [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST], [APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE], [APPLICATION_ID], [APPLICATION_STAGE_DESCRIPTION], [APPLICATION_STAGE_ID], [APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME], [APPLICATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION], [APPLICATION_STATUS_ID], [APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME], [AY_START_DATE], [AY_START_DATEID], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_END_DATEID], [FLAG_FALL], [FLAG_FALL_NET], [LEASE_COUNT_ALL], [LEASE_COUNT_HOLDOVER], [LEASE_START_DATE], [LEASE_START_DATEID], [LEASE_END_DATE], [LEASE_END_DATEID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME], [LEVEL], [PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME_1], [TRANSFER_LEASE_ID], [TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE], [TYPE_NAME])
    SELECT

        m.Lease_AY_Key AS [LEASE_AY_KEY],
        m.ACADEMIC_YEAR AS [ACADEMIC_YEAR],
        m.AY_REVERSE_ID AS [AY_REVERSE_ID],
        m.Applicant_NAME_FIRST AS [APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST],
        m.Applicant_NAME_LAST AS [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST],
        m.Applicant_NAME_MIDDLE AS [APPLICANT_NAME_MIDDLE],
        m.Application_ID AS [APPLICATION_ID],
        m.APPLICATION_STAGE_DESCRIPTION AS [APPLICATION_STAGE_DESCRIPTION],
        m.APPLICATION_STAGE_ID AS [APPLICATION_STAGE_ID],
        m.APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME AS [APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME],
        m.APPLICATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION AS [APPLICATION_STATUS_DESCRIPTION],
        m.APPLICATION_STATUS_ID AS [APPLICATION_STATUS_ID],
        m.APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME AS [APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME],
        m.AY_START_DATE AS [AY_START_DATE],
        m.AY_START_DATEID AS [AY_START_DATEID],
        m.AY_END_DATE AS [AY_END_DATE],
        m.AY_END_DATEID AS [AY_END_DATEID],
        CASE
            WHEN m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 1 AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID >= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
            WHEN m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 0 AND m.LEASE_START_DATEID <= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 61)
                AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID > (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
            WHEN m.PROPERTY_ID = 675331 AND m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 0
                AND m.LEASE_START_DATEID <= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 138)
                AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID > (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
            ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_FALL],
        CASE
            WHEN m.APPLICATION_STAGE_NAME = 'LEASE' AND m.APPLICATION_STATUS_NAME = 'APPROVED'
                AND (CASE
                    WHEN m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 1 AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID >= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
                    WHEN m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 0 AND m.LEASE_START_DATEID <= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 61)
                        AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID > (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
                    WHEN m.PROPERTY_ID = 675331 AND m.Lease_Count_Holdover = 0
                        AND m.LEASE_START_DATEID <= (m.AY_START_DATEID + 138)
                        AND m.LEASE_END_DATEID > (m.AY_START_DATEID + 30) THEN 1
                    ELSE 0 END) = 1
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_FALL_NET],
        m.Lease_Count_All AS [LEASE_COUNT_ALL],
        m.Lease_Count_Holdover AS [LEASE_COUNT_HOLDOVER],
        m.LEASE_START_DATE AS [LEASE_START_DATE],
        m.LEASE_START_DATEID AS [LEASE_START_DATEID],
        m.LEASE_END_DATE AS [LEASE_END_DATE],
        m.LEASE_END_DATEID AS [LEASE_END_DATEID],
        m.LEASE_ID AS [LEASE_ID],
        m.Lease_Interval_ID AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        m.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
        m.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME],
        m.Level AS [LEVEL],
        m.PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID AS [PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID],
        m.PROPERTY_AY_KEY AS [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
        m.PROPERTY_ID AS [PROPERTY_ID],
        m.PROPERTY_KEY AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        m.PROPERTY_NAME_1 AS [PROPERTY_NAME_1],
        m.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID AS [TRANSFER_LEASE_ID],
        m.TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE AS [TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE],
        m.Type_Name AS [TYPE_NAME]
    FROM Merged m;
END

name: LEASE_CUSTOMER_AR_BALANCE_F_SP

sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_CUSTOMER_AR_BALANCE_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DELETE FROM [dbo].[LEASE_CUSTOMER_AR_BALANCE_F];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_CUSTOMER_AR_BALANCE_F] (
        [DATE_KEY], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
        [CUSTOMER_TOTAL_BALANCE], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
        [CUSTOMER_TOTAL_BALANCE], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME]
    FROM [dbo].[LEASE_CUSTOMER_AR_BALANCE_0];
END

name: LEASE_DELINQUENCY_0_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_DELINQUENCY_0 into WH_PROD2.dbo.LEASE_DELINQUENCY_FACT (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_DELINQUENCY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ATL uses auto_correct_using_merge with keys PERIOD, PROPERTY_KEY, LEASE_ID
    -- This means: delete rows in FACT that match the incoming keys, then insert.
    -- Equivalent SQL: delete by PERIOD (since each run brings a full period snapshot),
    -- then insert the new data. This preserves historical months.

    -- Step 1: Delete only the PERIODs that exist in the current _0 staging data
    DELETE F
    FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_DELINQUENCY_FACT] F
    WHERE F.[PERIOD] IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT [PERIOD] FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_DELINQUENCY_0]
    );

    -- Step 2: Insert current staging data
    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_DELINQUENCY_FACT] (
        [PERIOD], [PROPERTY_KEY], [LEASE_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [ENTITY_NUMBER],
        [BLDG_UNIT], [RESIDENT_NAME], [LEASE_STATUS], [UNPAID_RENT], [UNPAID_OTHER],
        [PAST_DUE], [CURRENT_DUE], [DELINQUENCY]
    )
    SELECT
        [PERIOD], [PROPERTY_KEY], [LEASE_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [ENTITY_NUMBER],
        [BLDG_UNIT], [RESIDENT_NAME], [LEASE_STATUS], [UNPAID_RENT], [UNPAID_OTHER],
        [PAST_DUE], [CURRENT_DUE], [DELINQUENCY]
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_DELINQUENCY_0];
END

name: LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_RESIDENT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.JTURNER_MOVEIN_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS.
sql:
-- ============================================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ============================================================================
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS];

        -- 2. CTE TRANSFORMATIONS
        WITH 
        -- CTE 1: Average Resident Survey 
        -- FIX: Use TRY_CAST to prevent "Error converting varchar to numeric"
        CTE_RESIDENT_SURVEY AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER([RESIDENT_EMAIL]) AS [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
                AVG(TRY_CAST([TALI_SCORE] AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS [TALI_SCORE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_F]
            WHERE [RESIDENT_EMAIL] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY LOWER([RESIDENT_EMAIL])
        ),
        
        -- CTE 2: Average Move In
        -- FIX: Use TRY_CAST
        CTE_MOVEIN AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER([RESIDENT_EMAIL]) AS [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
                AVG(TRY_CAST([MOVE_IN_INDEX] AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS [MOVE_IN_INDEX]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_MOVEIN_F]
            WHERE [RESIDENT_EMAIL] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY LOWER([RESIDENT_EMAIL])
        ),
        
        -- CTE 3: Average Survey / Workorders
        -- FIX: Use TRY_CAST
        CTE_SURVEY AS (
            SELECT 
                LOWER([RESIDENTEMAIL]) AS [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
                ISNULL(AVG(TRY_CAST([WORKORDER_INDEX] AS DECIMAL(10,2))), 0.00) AS [WORKORDER_INDEX],
                COUNT(DISTINCT [RESPONSEID]) AS [RESPONSEID_COUNT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_SURVEYS_F]
            WHERE [RESIDENTEMAIL] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY LOWER([RESIDENTEMAIL])
        ),
        
        -- CTE 4: Base Fact Construction
        CTE_FACTS_BASE AS (
            SELECT
                -- Keys
                F.[DATE_KEY],
                CAST(CAST(F.[DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(8)) AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DATETIME_KEY], 
                F.[LEASE_AY_KEY],
                F.[DATE_KEY_AY],
                F.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                F.[PROPERTY_ID],
                F.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                F.[UNIT_ID],
                F.[UNIT_KEY],
                F.[LEASE_ID],
                F.[APPLICATION_ID],
                
                -- Customer (Leases_F)
                S.[CUSTOMER_ID],
                S.[CUSTOMER_KEY],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
                LOWER(CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000))) AS [JOIN_EMAIL], 
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_GENDER] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_GENDER],
                
                -- Address
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP],
                CAST(S.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                CAST(S.[GRADUATION_ESTIMATE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [GRADUATION_ESTIMATE],

                -- Lease Details
                CAST(F.[LEASE_TERM] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [LEASE_TERM],
                F.[LEASE_TERM_ID],
                F.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
                F.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
                
                -- Space / Config
                CAST(F.[SPACE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [SPACE],
                F.[SPACE_ID],
                CAST(F.[SPACE_NUMBER] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [SPACE_NUMBER],
                CAST(F.[SPACE_CONFIG] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [SPACE_CONFIG],
                F.[SPACE_CONFIG_ID],
                F.[SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],
                F.[SPACE_COUNT],
                F.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
                F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],

                -- Status
                CAST(F.[STATUS] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [STATUS],
                F.[STATUS_ID],
                CAST(F.[STATUS_TYPE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [STATUS_TYPE],
                F.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
                CAST(F.[STAGE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [STAGE],
                F.[STAGE_ID],
                CAST(F.[STEP] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [STEP],
                F.[STEP_ID],
                F.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],

                -- Dates
                F.[DATE_CREATED],
                F.[DATE_UPDATED],
                F.[DATE_APPROVED],
                F.[DATE_COMPLETED],
                F.[DATE_CANCELLED],
                F.[DATE_BEGIN],
                F.[DATE_END],
                F.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
                F.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                F.[DATE_APP_CREATED],
                F.[DATE_APP_STARTED],
                F.[DATE_APP_APPROVED],
                F.[DATE_APP_COMPLETED],
                F.[DATE_APP_CANCELLED],
                F.[DATE_LEASE_CREATED],
                F.[DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED],
                F.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
                F.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
                F.[DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED],
                F.[DATE_LAST_CONTACT],
                F.[DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],
                F.[DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
                F.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                F.[DATE_YESTERDAY],
                F.[DATE_GENERATED],

                -- Metrics
                F.[RENT_TOTAL],
                F.[RENT_AMOUNT],
                F.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT],
                F.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL],
                F.[DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT],
                F.[DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT],
                F.[DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT],
                F.[DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
                F.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE],
                F.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE],
                F.[ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT],
                F.[APP_FEE_AMOUNT],
                F.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
                F.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY],
                F.[COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
                F.[COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE],
                F.[COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE],
                
                -- Metrics from FEES
                FEES.[DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
                FEES.[PET_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
                FEES.[PARKING_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
                FEES.[TELECOM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
                FEES.[FURNITURE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
                FEES.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],

                -- Flags
                F.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                F.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
                F.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
                F.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
                F.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
                F.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
                F.[FLAG_TRANSFER],
                F.[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],
                F.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],
                F.[FLAG_MTM_LEASE],
                F.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT],
                F.[FLAG_MTM_FUTURE],
                F.[FLAG_MTM_NOTICE],
                F.[FLAG_MTM_PAST],
                F.[FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE],
                F.[FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE],
                F.[FLAG_CONCESSION],
                F.[FLAG_APP_FEE],
                F.[FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
                F.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
                F.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
                F.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
                F.[FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
                F.[FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE],
                F.[FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
                F.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],

                -- Marketing & Referrals
                CAST(F.[LEAD_SOURCE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [LEAD_SOURCE],
                F.[LEAD_SOURCE_ID],
                CAST(F.[INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE],
                CAST(F.[INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY],
                CAST(F.[INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE],
                F.[REFERRAL_COST],
                
                -- Transformation: Referred By
                CAST(SUBSTRING(S.[REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], 1, 50) + ' ' + S.[REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [REFERRED_BY],

                -- Guarantor
                CAST(S.[GUARANTOR_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [GUARANTOR_NAME],
                CAST(S.[GUARANTOR_EMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [GUARANTOR_EMAIL],
                CAST(S.[GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F] AS F
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FEES_FACTS_F] AS FEES
                ON F.[DATE_KEY] = FEES.[DATE_KEY] 
                AND F.[LEASE_AY_KEY] = FEES.[LEASE_AY_KEY]
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] AS S
                ON F.[LEASE_AY_KEY] = S.[LEASE_AY_KEY]
            WHERE F.[RELATIVE_AY] >= 0
        )

        -- 3. INSERT INTO TARGET
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_DETAILS_FACTS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATETIME_KEY], [LEASE_AY_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
            [LEASE_ID], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [UNIT_ID], [UNIT_KEY], [CUSTOMER_ID], [CUSTOMER_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE], [CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
            [CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE], [CUSTOMER_GENDER], [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1], [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2],
            [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY], [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE], [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP], [CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            [GRADUATION_ESTIMATE], [LEASE_TERM], [LEASE_TERM_ID], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            [SPACE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER], [SPACE_CONFIG], [SPACE_CONFIG_ID], [SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],
            [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID], [STATUS_TYPE], [STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [STAGE], [STAGE_ID], [STEP], [STEP_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_COMPLETED], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_BEGIN], [DATE_END],
            [DATE_MOVE_IN], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DATE_APP_CREATED], [DATE_APP_STARTED], [DATE_APP_APPROVED], [DATE_APP_COMPLETED],
            [DATE_APP_CANCELLED], [DATE_LEASE_CREATED], [DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED], [DATE_LAST_CONTACT], [DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],
            [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED], [DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], [DATE_YESTERDAY], [DATE_GENERATED],
            [RENT_TOTAL], [RENT_AMOUNT], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT], [NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL], [DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
            [DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT], [DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            [CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE], [CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], [ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], [APP_FEE_AMOUNT], [PET_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
            [PARKING_AMOUNT_TOTAL], [TELECOM_AMOUNT_TOTAL], [FURNITURE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL], [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY], [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL], [COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
            [COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], [COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE], [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_COMPLETE],
            [FLAG_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_NEW_LEASE], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE], [FLAG_TRANSFER], [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],
            [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], [FLAG_MTM_LEASE], [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT], [FLAG_MTM_FUTURE], [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE], [FLAG_MTM_PAST],
            [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE], [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE], [FLAG_CONCESSION], [FLAG_APP_FEE], [FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
            [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED], [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT], [FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
            [FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE], [LEAD_SOURCE], [LEAD_SOURCE_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE], [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY],
            [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE], [REFERRED_BY], [REFERRAL_COST], [GUARANTOR_NAME], [GUARANTOR_EMAIL],
            [GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE], [FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], [DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], 
            
            -- Aggregated Columns
            [TALI_SCORE], [MOVE_IN_INDEX], [WORKORDER_INDEX], [WORKORDER_SURVEY_COUNT],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            M.[DATE_KEY], M.[DATETIME_KEY], M.[LEASE_AY_KEY], M.[DATE_KEY_AY], M.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
            M.[LEASE_ID], M.[PROPERTY_ID], M.[PROPERTY_KEY], M.[UNIT_ID], M.[UNIT_KEY], M.[CUSTOMER_ID], M.[CUSTOMER_KEY], M.[APPLICATION_ID],
            M.[CUSTOMER_NAME], M.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], M.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], M.[CUSTOMER_NAME_MIDDLE], M.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL],
            M.[CUSTOMER_PHONE_MOBILE], M.[CUSTOMER_GENDER], M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_1], M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_2],
            M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_CITY], M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_STATE], M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_ZIP], M.[CUSTOMER_ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
            M.[GRADUATION_ESTIMATE], M.[LEASE_TERM], M.[LEASE_TERM_ID], M.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], M.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            M.[SPACE], M.[SPACE_ID], M.[SPACE_NUMBER], M.[SPACE_CONFIG], M.[SPACE_CONFIG_ID], M.[SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT],
            M.[SPACE_COUNT], M.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], M.[STATUS], M.[STATUS_ID], M.[STATUS_TYPE], M.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            M.[STAGE], M.[STAGE_ID], M.[STEP], M.[STEP_ID], M.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
            M.[DATE_CREATED], M.[DATE_UPDATED], M.[DATE_APPROVED], M.[DATE_COMPLETED], M.[DATE_CANCELLED], M.[DATE_BEGIN], M.[DATE_END],
            M.[DATE_MOVE_IN], M.[DATE_MOVE_OUT], M.[DATE_APP_CREATED], M.[DATE_APP_STARTED], M.[DATE_APP_APPROVED], M.[DATE_APP_COMPLETED],
            M.[DATE_APP_CANCELLED], M.[DATE_LEASE_CREATED], M.[DATE_STATUS_APP_CREATED], M.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            M.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], M.[DATE_STATUS_CANCELLED], M.[DATE_LAST_CONTACT], M.[DATE_INITIAL_CONTACT],
            M.[DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED], M.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], M.[DATE_YESTERDAY], M.[DATE_GENERATED],
            M.[RENT_TOTAL], M.[RENT_AMOUNT], M.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT], M.[NET_EFFECTIVE_RENT_TOTAL], M.[DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
            M.[DEPOSIT_COLLECTED_AMOUNT], M.[DEPOSIT_CHARGED_AMOUNT], M.[DEPOSIT_ENTERED_AMOUNT], M.[DEPOSIT_UNCOLLECTED_AMOUNT],
            M.[CONCESSION_TOTAL_VALUE], M.[CONCESSION_MONTHLY_VALUE], M.[ADMIN_FEE_AMOUNT], M.[APP_FEE_AMOUNT], M.[PET_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
            M.[PARKING_AMOUNT_TOTAL], M.[TELECOM_AMOUNT_TOTAL], M.[FURNITURE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL], M.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            M.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY], M.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL], M.[COLLECTIONS_TOTAL_CHARGES],
            M.[COLLECTIONS_CURRENT_BALANCE], M.[COLLECTIONS_WRITE_OFF_BALANCE], M.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], M.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
            M.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], M.[FLAG_CANCELLED], M.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE], M.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE], M.[FLAG_TRANSFER], M.[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],
            M.[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], M.[FLAG_MTM_LEASE], M.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT], M.[FLAG_MTM_FUTURE], M.[FLAG_MTM_NOTICE], M.[FLAG_MTM_PAST],
            M.[FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE], M.[FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE], M.[FLAG_CONCESSION], M.[FLAG_APP_FEE], M.[FLAG_ADMIN_FEE],
            M.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED], M.[FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED], M.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT], M.[FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
            M.[FLAG_COLLECTIONS_ZERO_BALANCE], M.[LEAD_SOURCE], M.[LEAD_SOURCE_ID], M.[INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE], M.[INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY],
            M.[INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE], M.[REFERRED_BY], M.[REFERRAL_COST], M.[GUARANTOR_NAME], M.[GUARANTOR_EMAIL],
            M.[GUARANTOR_PHONE_MOBILE], M.[FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], M.[DATE_GUARANTOR_APPROVED], 
            
            -- Left Joins to Aggregates
            S_RES.[TALI_SCORE],
            S_MOV.[MOVE_IN_INDEX],
            S_SUR.[WORKORDER_INDEX],
            S_SUR.[RESPONSEID_COUNT],
            
            -- Explicit Date Population (Replacing Default)
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_FACTS_BASE AS M
        LEFT OUTER JOIN CTE_RESIDENT_SURVEY AS S_RES 
            ON M.[JOIN_EMAIL] = S_RES.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL]
        LEFT OUTER JOIN CTE_MOVEIN AS S_MOV 
            ON M.[JOIN_EMAIL] = S_MOV.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL]
        LEFT OUTER JOIN CTE_SURVEY AS S_SUR 
            ON M.[JOIN_EMAIL] = S_SUR.[CUSTOMER_EMAIL];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEASE_EVENT_TAGS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_EVENT_TAG_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION: CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'EXTERNAL COMMUNICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_EVENT_TAG_HOT_LEAD: CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'HOT LEAD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEAP: CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'LEAP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_SPECIAL: CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'LEASE SPECIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_EVENT_TAG_N11S_TURNED_IN: CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'N11S TURNED IN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EVENT_TAGS_0, WH_ODS.dbo.E_EVENTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_EVENT_TAGS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_EVENT_TAGS_0_SP]
AS

-- !! DEPRECATED 2026-04-01: Canonical version migrated to WH_ODS. This staging copy pending cleanup. !!
-- !! Do not modify this copy. Make changes to WH_ODS.dbo.LEASE_EVENT_TAGS_0_SP instead. !!

BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Split Tags (Replaces ATL word_ext/Row_Generation)
        -- Rule: Use 3-part name for Table References
        WITH CTE_Normalized_Tags AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_ID,
                REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(TAG_TO_VARCHAR, '{', ''), '}', ''), '"', '') AS Cleaned_String
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EVENT_TAGS_0]
        ),
        CTE_Query AS (
            SELECT 
                T.EVENT_ID,
                UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value))) AS TAG_NAME
            FROM CTE_Normalized_Tags T
            CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(T.Cleaned_String, ',') s
            WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM(s.value)) <> ''
        ),

        -- 2. Flagging Tags (ATL DECODE logic)
        CTE_Flag_Tags AS (
            SELECT 
                EVENT_ID,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'EXTERNAL COMMUNICATION' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'HOT LEAD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_HOT_LEAD,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'LEAP' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEAP,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'LEASE SPECIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_SPECIAL,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'LEASE TAKEOVER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'N11S TURNED IN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_N11S_TURNED_IN,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'NOT RENEWING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_NOT_RENEWING,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'RAM NOTE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RAM_NOTE,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'RENEWAL ACTIVITY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
                CASE WHEN TAG_NAME = 'ROOMMATE ACTIVITY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY
            FROM CTE_Query
        ),

        -- 3. Group by Event ID
        CTE_GroupBy_EventID AS (
            SELECT 
                EVENT_ID,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_HOT_LEAD) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_HOT_LEAD,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEAP) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEAP,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_SPECIAL) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_SPECIAL,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_TAKEOVER) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_N11S_TURNED_IN) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_N11S_TURNED_IN,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_NOT_RENEWING) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_NOT_RENEWING,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RAM_NOTE) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RAM_NOTE,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
                SUM(FLAG_EVENT_TAG_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY) AS FLAG_EVENT_TAG_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY
            FROM CTE_Flag_Tags
            GROUP BY EVENT_ID
        ),

        -- 4. Join with ODS Events
        CTE_AllEvents AS (
            SELECT 
                ID AS EVENT_ID,
                LEASE_ID,
                LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                PROPERTY_ID,
                EVENT_DATETIME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_EVENTS]
            WHERE EVENT_DATETIME > '2023-01-01 00:00:00.0000000'
        ),

        -- 5. Interval-Level Aggregation
        CTE_GroupBy_Interval AS (
            SELECT 
                A.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                A.PROPERTY_ID,
                COUNT(G.EVENT_ID) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_HOT_LEAD) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEAP) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEAP,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_SPECIAL) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_LEASE_TAKEOVER) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_N11S_TURNED_IN) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_NOT_RENEWING) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RAM_NOTE) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
                SUM(G.FLAG_EVENT_TAG_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY) AS COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY
            FROM CTE_GroupBy_EventID G
            INNER JOIN CTE_AllEvents A ON G.EVENT_ID = A.EVENT_ID
            GROUP BY A.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, A.PROPERTY_ID
        ),

        -- 6. Interval Flags
        CTE_Flag_Tags_IntervalLevel AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEAP > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEAP,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
                CASE WHEN COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY
            FROM CTE_GroupBy_Interval
        )

        -- 7. Load Target Table (3-part name for Table Reference)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_EVENT_TAGS_0] (
            LEASE_AY_KEY, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED,
            COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD,
            COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEAP, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL,
            COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN,
            COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE,
            COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY, COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY,
            FLAG_CANCELLED, FLAG_FALL, FLAG_HOLDOVER, FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
            FLAG_INCOMPLETE, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
            FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEAP,
            FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
            FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING,
            FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE, FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
            FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY, FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
            FLAG_NEW_LEASE, FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE, FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE,
            FLAG_TRANSFER_IN, FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
            LEASE_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME
        )
        SELECT 
            I.LEASE_AY_KEY, F.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, I.PROPERTY_KEY, I.AY, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED,
            F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD,
            F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEAP, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL,
            F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN,
            F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE,
            F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY, F.COUNT_EVENTS_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY,
            I.FLAG_CANCELLED, I.FLAG_FALL, I.FLAG_HOLDOVER, I.FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
            I.FLAG_INCOMPLETE, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_EXTERNAL_COMMUNICATION,
            F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_HOT_LEAD, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEAP,
            F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_SPECIAL, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_LEASE_TAKEOVER,
            F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_N11S_TURNED_IN, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_NOT_RENEWING,
            F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RAM_NOTE, F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_RENEWAL_ACTIVITY,
            F.FLAG_LEASE_TAGGED_ROOMMATE_ACTIVITY, I.FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
            I.FLAG_NEW_LEASE, I.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE, I.FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE,
            I.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN, I.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT, I.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
            I.LEASE_ID, F.PROPERTY_ID, I.PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM CTE_Flag_Tags_IntervalLevel F
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0] I 
            ON F.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = I.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID 
            AND F.PROPERTY_ID = I.PROPERTY_ID;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F]              AS LF
    LEFT JOIN [dbo].[ACADEMIC_YEARS_LOCAL]           AS AY
        ON AY.AY_KEY = LF.AY
    WHERE LF.FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED = 0
      AND (AY.RELATIVE_AY IN (-1, 0, 1, 2) OR LF.AY = 0);

    -- Audit stamp
    UPDATE [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: LEASE_FACTS_LOAD_SP

/* STEP 3 (FIXED): STORED PROCEDURE GENERATION
   Procedure: [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_LOAD_SP]
   Fix: Removed duplicate [HOLDOVER_DAYS] column in INSERT/SELECT list.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. DELETE LOGIC (Window Replace / Incremental Update)
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS] T
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F] S 
            WHERE S.[DATE_KEY] = T.[DATE_KEY]
        );

        -- 2. INSERT LOGIC
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS] (
            -- Keys & Dates
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [LEASE_AY_KEY], [DATETIME_KEY], [AY], [RELATIVE_AY], [AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED],
            
            -- IDs
            [APPLICATION_ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], 
            [UNIT_ID], [UNIT_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [PARENT_INTERVAL_ID], [TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID],
            
            -- String Attributes
            [LEASE_TERM], [SPACE], [SPACE_NUMBER], [SPACE_CONFIG], [OCC_TYPE], [OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT], 
            [RATE_TIER], [RATE_TIER_KEY], [STAGE], [STATUS], [STATUS_TYPE], [STEP], 
            [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE], [LEAD_SOURCE], [LEASING_AGENT_NAME], 
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER], [INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED], [INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER], 
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE], [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME], [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE], 
            [INTERVAL_TYPE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP], [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],

            [STAGE_ID], [STATUS_ID], [STATUS_TYPE_ID], [STEP_ID], [START_WINDOW_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], 
            [INITIAL_CONTACT_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID], 
            [LEAD_SOURCE_ID], [LEASING_AGENT_ID], [LEASING_AGENT_COMPANY_ID], [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID], 
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID], 
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE], [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM], 
            [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID], [INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID], 
            [SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],

            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_COMPLETED], [DATE_CANCELLED],

            [COUNT],

            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

/* STEP 3 (FIXED v2): STORED PROCEDURE GENERATION
   Procedure: [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET_LOAD_SP]
   Fix: Removed duplicate 'FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION' from INSERT/SELECT list.
*/

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. DELETE LOGIC (Window Replace based on DATE_KEY)
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET] T
        WHERE EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F] S 
            WHERE S.[DATE_KEY] = T.[DATE_KEY]
        );

        -- 2. INSERT LOGIC
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET] (
            -- Keys & Dates
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [LEASE_AY_KEY], [DATETIME_KEY], [AY], [RELATIVE_AY], [AY_WEEK_KEY_INTERVAL_CREATED],
            
            -- IDs
            [APPLICATION_ID], [LEASE_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], 
            [UNIT_ID], [UNIT_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [PARENT_INTERVAL_ID], [TRANSFERRED_TO_LEASE_ID],
            
            -- String Attributes
            [LEASE_TERM], [SPACE], [SPACE_NUMBER], [SPACE_CONFIG], [OCC_TYPE], [OCC_TYPE_SUB_CAT], 
            [RATE_TIER], [RATE_TIER_KEY], [STAGE], [STATUS], [STATUS_TYPE], [STEP], 
            [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE], [LEAD_SOURCE], [LEASING_AGENT_NAME], 
            [INSURANCE_CARRIER], [INSURANCE_CARRIER_CONFORMED], [INSURANCE_POLICY_NUMBER], 
            [INSURANCE_POLICY_STATUS_TYPE], [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME], [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE], 
            [INTERVAL_TYPE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP], [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],

            -- IDs related to Attributes

            [STAGE_ID], [STATUS_ID], [STATUS_TYPE_ID], [STEP_ID], [START_WINDOW_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], 
            [INITIAL_CONTACT_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_CATEGORY_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_TYPE_ID], [INITIAL_CONTACT_EMP_ID], 
            [LEAD_SOURCE_ID], [LEASING_AGENT_ID], [LEASING_AGENT_COMPANY_ID], [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_ID], 
            [INSURANCE_SCHEDULED_AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID], 
            [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_MONTH_ID_REVERSE], [INSURANCE_CHARGED_PERIOD_YYYYMM], 
            [INTERNET_LISTING_SERVICE_ID], [INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [INTERVAL_TYPE_GROUP_ID], 
            [SPACE_CONFIG_UNIT_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            
            -- Dates
            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_UPDATED], [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_COMPLETED], [DATE_CANCELLED], 
            [DATE_BEGIN], [DATE_END], [DATE_MOVE_IN], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DATE_APP_APPROVED], 
            [DATE_APP_CANCELLED], [DATE_APP_COMPLETED], [DATE_APP_CREATED], [DATE_APP_STARTED],

            [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED], [FLAG_FALL], [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED], [FLAG_FALL_MTM], [FLAG_FALL_NEW],

            [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE_WITH_VISIT], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE_WITHOUT_VISIT], [FLAG_FALL_NEW_TRANSFER],

        SELECT

            [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED], 
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_3RD_PARTY], [FLAG_INSURANCE_ACTIVE_INTERVAL], [FLAG_INSURANCE_ACTIVE_POLICY], 
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGE_SCHEDULED], [FLAG_INSURANCE_CHARGED], [FLAG_INSURANCE_DELINQUENT], 
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_EXEMPT], [FLAG_INSURANCE_FUTURE_POLICY], [FLAG_INSURANCE_NEW_LOGIC], 
            [FLAG_INSURANCE_POLICY_EXPIRES_SOON], [FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI], [FLAG_INSURANCE_PPI_FORCED], 
            [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER], 
            [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL], 
            [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL], [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE], [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR], [FLAG_MISSING_APP], 
            [FLAG_MISSING_CONTACT_INFO], [FLAG_MISSING_CUSTOMER], [FLAG_MISSING_FLOORPLAN], [FLAG_MISSING_OR_BAD_RENT], 
            [FLAG_MOVED_IN], [FLAG_MOVED_IN_EARLY], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT_30], [FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT], 
            [FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED], [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT], [FLAG_MTM_FUTURE], [FLAG_MTM_LEASE], [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE],

            [FLAG_OCC_TYPE_CONVENTIONAL], [FLAG_OCC_TYPE_STUDENT], [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PROPERTY_ACTIVE], 
            [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED], [FLAG_REFERRAL_COST], [FLAG_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE], 
            [FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_GUARANTOR], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_LEAP], 
            [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_NONE], [FLAG_SCREENING_PACKAGE_SELF], [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE], 
            -- [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION] Removed from here (Fixed)
            [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED], [FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE], 
            [FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT], 
            [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE], 
            [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE], [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST], [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL], [FLAG_TERM_IS_RENEWAL], 
            [FLAG_TERM_IS_UNSET], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_ACTIVITY], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_APPS], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_CANCELS], 
            [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_COMPLETES], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK_INCOMPLETES], [FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW], [FLAG_TRANSFER], 
            [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN], [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT], [FLAG_UNDER_RATE], [FLAG_WITHIN_RATE], 
            [COUNT],

            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_F];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_FEES_0_SP] AS
BEGIN

TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_FEES_0];

INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_FEES_0] (
    [DATE_KEY],
    [LEASE_AY_KEY],
    [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
    [PROPERTY_KEY],
    [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
    [AY],
    [ACCELERATED_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [ACCELERATED_RENT_COUNT],
    [DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [DEPOSIT_COUNT],
    [DOUBLE_UP_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [DOUBLE_UP_PREMIUM_COUNT],
    [FINAL_ACCELERATED_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [FINAL_ACCELERATED_RENT_COUNT],
    [FURNITURE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [FURNITURE_INCOME_COUNT],
    [LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_COUNT],
    [PARKING_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [PARKING_COUNT],
    [PET_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [PET_COUNT],
    [PET_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [PET_DEPOSIT_COUNT],
    [PROPERTY_PROTECTION_FEE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [PROPERTY_PROTECTION_FEE_COUNT],
    [REASSIGNMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [REASSIGNMENT_COUNT],
    [RENT_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_CAM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_CAM_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_ELECTRIC_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_ELECTRIC_REVENUE_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_GAS_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_GAS_REVENUE_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_INSURANCE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_INSURANCE_INCOME_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_LATE_FEE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_LATE_FEE_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_RENT_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_TENANT_SPECIFIC_BILLBACK_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_TENANT_SPECIFIC_BILLBACK_COUNT],
    [RETAIL_WATER_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [RETAIL_WATER_REVENUE_COUNT],
    [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_COUNT],
    [TELECOM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    [TELECOM_COUNT]
)
SELECT
    D.[DATE_KEY],
    L.[LEASE_AY_KEY],
    F.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
    L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
    ISNULL(FP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
    L.[AY],
    F.[ACCELERATED_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[ACCELERATED_RENT_COUNT],
    F.[DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[DEPOSIT_COUNT],
    F.[DOUBLE_UP_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[DOUBLE_UP_PREMIUM_COUNT],
    F.[FINAL_ACCELERATED_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[FINAL_ACCELERATED_RENT_COUNT],
    F.[FURNITURE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[FURNITURE_INCOME_COUNT],
    F.[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_COUNT],
    F.[PARKING_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[PARKING_COUNT],
    F.[PET_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[PET_COUNT],
    F.[PET_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[PET_DEPOSIT_COUNT],
    F.[PROPERTY_PROTECTION_FEE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[PROPERTY_PROTECTION_FEE_COUNT],
    F.[REASSIGNMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[REASSIGNMENT_COUNT],
    F.[RENT_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RENT_DISCOUNT_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_CAM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_CAM_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_ELECTRIC_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_ELECTRIC_REVENUE_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_GAS_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_GAS_REVENUE_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_INSURANCE_INCOME_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_INSURANCE_INCOME_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_LATE_FEE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_LATE_FEE_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_RENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_RENT_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_TENANT_SPECIFIC_BILLBACK_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_TENANT_SPECIFIC_BILLBACK_COUNT],
    F.[RETAIL_WATER_REVENUE_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[RETAIL_WATER_REVENUE_COUNT],
    F.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_COUNT],
    F.[TELECOM_AMOUNT_TOTAL],
    F.[TELECOM_COUNT]
FROM [dbo].[LEASES_F] L
INNER JOIN [dbo].[FEES_0] F
    ON L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = F.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [SPACE_ID], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
    FROM [dbo].[UNITS_F]
    WHERE [SPACE_ID] <> 0
    GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [SPACE_ID], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
) FP
    ON FP.[PROPERTY_KEY] = L.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    AND FP.[SPACE_ID] = L.[SPACE_ID]
INNER JOIN [dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P
    ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT [DATE_KEY]
    FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
    WHERE [FLAG_YESTERDAY] = 1
) D
WHERE L.[AY] > 2024
  AND P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0;

END

        SUM([RETAIL_LATE_FEE_AMOUNT_TOTAL]), SUM([RETAIL_LATE_FEE_COUNT]),
        SUM([RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_AMOUNT_TOTAL]), SUM([RETAIL_REAL_ESTATE_TAX_COUNT]),

        SYSDATETIME()

name: LEASE_FMO_DATES_0_SP

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_FMO_DATES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    -- Append-only: no TRUNCATE. Only insert leases not already present.
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_FMO_DATES_0]
        ([LEASE_ID], [DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED], [DATEID_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED], [DATETIME_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED], [DATE_UPDATED])
    SELECT

        src.[ID] AS [LEASE_ID],
        src.[FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE] AS [DATE_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED],
        src.[FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATEID] AS [DATEID_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED],
        src.[FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATETIME] AS [DATETIME_FIRST_FMO_PROCESSED],
        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_UPDATED]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] src
    WHERE src.[FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE] IS NOT NULL
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM [dbo].[LEASE_FMO_DATES_0] tgt
            WHERE tgt.[LEASE_ID] = src.[ID]
        );
END

name: LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0_SP
transformations: flag: CASE WHEN n.[APPLICATION_ID] IS NULL AND a.[APPLICATION_ID] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVALS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Lease_Interval_Apps_0 (LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0_ATL.txt)
--
-- Builds one row per lease interval with its APPLICATION_ID.
-- First tries a direct app link (LEASE_INTERVAL_ID match); if none found,
-- falls back to the parent interval's app (PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID match).
-- FLAG_PARENT_USED = 1 when the parent fallback was used.
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVALS         (lease intervals)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS     (applications â€” joined twice)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES    (interval type name lookup)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   leases.ID            â†’ LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
--   apps.ID              â†’ APPLICATION_ID
--   LEFT JOIN apps on LEASE_INTERVAL_ID   (normal CTE)
--   LEFT JOIN apps on PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID (normal2 CTE)
--   decode(normal.APPLICATION_ID is null AND apps.APPLICATION_ID is not null, 1, 0)
--     â†’ CASE WHEN APPLICATION_ID IS NULL AND APPLICATION_ID_1 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
--   nvl(APPLICATION_ID, APPLICATION_ID_1) â†’ ISNULL(APPLICATION_ID, APPLICATION_ID_1)
--   INNER JOIN E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES ON LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = ID
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0];

    ;WITH
    -- =========================================================================
    -- leases: all lease intervals
    -- =========================================================================
    leases AS (
        SELECT
            [ID]                            AS [lease_interval_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [LEASE_START_DATE],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- apps: all cached applications (used twice below)
    -- =========================================================================
    apps AS (
        SELECT
            [ID]                AS [APPLICATION_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- normal: leases LEFT JOIN apps on direct LEASE_INTERVAL_ID match
    -- ATL: leases LEFT OUTER JOIN apps ON apps.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = leases.lease_interval_ID
    -- =========================================================================
    normal AS (
        SELECT
            l.[lease_interval_ID],
            l.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
            l.[LEASE_ID],
            l.[LEASE_START_DATE],
            l.[PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            a.[APPLICATION_ID]
        FROM leases l
        LEFT JOIN apps a
            ON a.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = l.[lease_interval_ID]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- normal2: normal LEFT JOIN apps on PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID match.
    -- flag = 1 when direct match was NULL but parent match exists.
    -- ATL: decode(normal.APPLICATION_ID is null AND apps.APPLICATION_ID is not null, 1, 0)
    -- =========================================================================
    normal2 AS (
        SELECT
            n.[lease_interval_ID],
            n.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
            n.[LEASE_ID],
            n.[LEASE_START_DATE],
            n.[PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            n.[APPLICATION_ID],
            a.[APPLICATION_ID]                                              AS [APPLICATION_ID_1],
            CASE WHEN n.[APPLICATION_ID] IS NULL
                  AND a.[APPLICATION_ID] IS NOT NULL
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                                          AS [flag]
        FROM normal n
        LEFT JOIN apps a
            ON a.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = n.[PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    )

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Final INSERT: normal2 INNER JOIN E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES for type name.
    -- APPLICATION_ID = nvl(direct, parent) â†’ ISNULL(APPLICATION_ID, APPLICATION_ID_1)
    -- =========================================================================
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [APPLICATION_ID],
        [FLAG_PARENT_USED],
        [LEASE_ID],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
        [LEASE_START_DATE],
        [PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        n2.[lease_interval_ID]                              AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        ISNULL(n2.[APPLICATION_ID], n2.[APPLICATION_ID_1]) AS [APPLICATION_ID],
        n2.[flag]                                           AS [FLAG_PARENT_USED],
        n2.[LEASE_ID],
        lt.[NAME]                                           AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_NAME],
        n2.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
        n2.[LEASE_START_DATE],
        n2.[PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
    FROM normal2 n2
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES] lt
        ON lt.[ID] = n2.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID];

END

name: LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0_SP
transformations: DATE_SPOOFED: CASE WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304 THEN CAST(CAST(df.[YEAR] AS VARCHAR(4)) + '1231' AS INT) ELSE 0 END
DATEID_SPOOFED: CASE WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '19000101', CAST(CAST(df.[YEAR] AS VARCHAR(4)) + '-12-31' AS DATE)) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DATE_SPOOFED: CASE WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN i.UPDATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END
DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN i.UPDATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN CAST(i.UPDATED_ON_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL END
FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_LEASE: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_CURRENT: CASE WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1 WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 4 THEN 0 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_CURRENT: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_FUTURE: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_NOTICE: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_PAST: CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ecl.MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-1,SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(ecl.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 AND ecl.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_HOLDOVER: CASE WHEN c.AY_Begin = pay.AY THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN e.STATUS_ID = 6 OR e.STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COMPLETE: CASE WHEN e.STAGE_ID = 4 AND e.STATUS_ID = 4 AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_INCOMPLETE: CASE WHEN (e.STAGE_ID IN (4) AND e.STATUS_ID IN (1,2,3) AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2) OR (e.STAGE_ID IN (3) AND e.STATUS_ID IN (3,4) AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE: CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NEW_LEASE: CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE: CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE: CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 5 OR ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_IN: CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 5 AND ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_INTERVALS into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN

    -- =============================================
    -- Procedure : usp_Load_LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0
    -- Target    : [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
    -- Load Type : Full Reload (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
    -- Converted : ATL Dataflow Lease_Interval_AY_0
    -- Notes     :
    --   E_LEASE_INTERVALS has datetime2 dates only — integer
    --   DATE (YYYYMMDD) and DATEID (days since 1900-01-01)
    --   values are derived via CONVERT/DATEDIFF.
    --   E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS same pattern.
    --   E_CACHED_LEASES already has pre-built int columns.
    --   All XTEMP tables collapsed into CTEs.
    --   DateCheck is a single-row CTE (RELATIVE_DAY = -1).
    --   LEASE_AY_KEY = CAST(LEASE_INTERVAL_ID||'.'||AY AS DECIMAL(19,4))
    -- =============================================

    DECLARE @ProcStart  DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @ErrMsg     VARCHAR(1000);
    DECLARE @ErrSev     INT;
    DECLARE @ErrState   INT;

    BEGIN TRAN;

    BEGIN TRY

        -- ================================================
        -- TRUNCATE TARGET
        -- ================================================
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0];

        -- ================================================
        -- INSERT via CTE chain
        -- ================================================
        WITH

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- DateCheck
        -- Single row: yesterday from DATE_F (RELATIVE_DAY=-1)
        -- Spoofed window: DAY_OF_YEAR 182-304 (Jul1-Oct31)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        DateCheck AS
        (
            SELECT TOP 1
                df.DATE_KEY,
                df.DAY_OF_YEAR,
                df.[YEAR],
                CASE
                    WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304
                    THEN CAST(CAST(df.[YEAR] AS VARCHAR(4)) + '1231' AS INT)
                    ELSE 0
                END                                         AS DATE_SPOOFED,
                CASE
                    WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304
                    THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '19000101',
                             CAST(CAST(df.[YEAR] AS VARCHAR(4)) + '-12-31' AS DATE))
                    ELSE 0
                END                                         AS DATEID_SPOOFED,
                CASE
                    WHEN df.DAY_OF_YEAR >= 182 AND df.DAY_OF_YEAR <= 304
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_DATE_SPOOFED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] df
            WHERE df.RELATIVE_DAY = -1
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Intervals
        -- ODS: E_LEASE_INTERVALS LEFT JOIN E_PROPERTIES
        -- Derives integer DATE (YYYYMMDD) and DATEID values
        -- from datetime2 source columns.
        -- Note: LEASE_START_DATETMIE is a known source typo
        --       in the ATL — maps to LEASE_START_DATE here.
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Intervals AS
        (
            SELECT
                eli.ID,
                eli.CID,
                eli.CREATED_BY,
                eli.CREATED_ON_DATE,
                eli.CREATED_ON_DATEID,
                eli.CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
                eli.INTERVAL_DATE,
                eli.INTERVAL_DATEID,
                eli.INTERVAL_DATETIME,
                eli.IS_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                eli.IS_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                eli.LEASE_END_DATE,
                eli.LEASE_END_DATEID,
                eli.LEASE_END_DATETIME,
                eli.LEASE_ID,
                eli.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                eli.LEASE_START_DATE,
                eli.LEASE_START_DATEID,
                eli.LEASE_START_DATETMIE,
                eli.LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID,
                eli.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                eli.LEASE_TERM_ID,
                eli.PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                eli.PROPERTY_ID,
                eli.UPDATED_BY,
                eli.UPDATED_ON_DATE,
                eli.UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
                eli.UPDATED_ON_DATETIME,
                ep.PROPERTY_NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS]        eli
            LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES]         ep
                ON ep.ID = eli.PROPERTY_ID
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- StatusTypes  (ODS: E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        StatusTypes AS
        (
            SELECT elst.ID, CAST(elst.NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES] elst
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- IntervalTypes  (ODS: E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        IntervalTypes AS
        (
            SELECT elit.ID, CAST(elit.NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS NAME
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPES] elit
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- IntervalApps  (STAGING: LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        IntervalApps AS
        (
            SELECT lia.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, lia.APPLICATION_ID, lia.FLAG_PARENT_USED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_APPS_0] lia
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Properties  (STAGING: PROPERTY_F)
        -- Filtered: FLAG_SUBPROPERTY=0, PROPERTY_KEY<>1057
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Properties AS
        (
            SELECT
                pf.PROPERTY_KEY,
                pf.PROPERTY_NAME,
                pf.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
                pf.FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY,
                pf.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                pf.FLAG_RETAIL,
                pf.FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,
                pf.FLAG_SUBPROPERTY,
                pf.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf
            WHERE pf.FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
              AND pf.PROPERTY_KEY <> 1057
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- LeaseIntervals
        -- Full view-equivalent: Intervals + lookups + DateCheck
        -- Derives all DATE/DATEID/FLAG columns expected by
        -- downstream ATL views.
        -- CROSS JOIN DateCheck (guaranteed single row).
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        LeaseIntervals AS
        (
            SELECT
                i.ID                                        AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                ia.APPLICATION_ID,
                i.CREATED_BY,
                i.LEASE_START_DATE                          AS DATE_BEGIN,
                CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2
                     THEN i.UPDATED_ON_DATE  ELSE NULL
                END                                         AS DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                i.CREATED_ON_DATE                           AS DATE_CREATED,
                i.LEASE_END_DATE                            AS DATE_END,
                dc.DATE_SPOOFED,
                i.UPDATED_ON_DATE                           AS DATE_UPDATED,
                i.LEASE_START_DATEID                        AS DATEID_BEGIN,
                CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2
                     THEN i.UPDATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL
                END                                         AS DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                i.CREATED_ON_DATEID                         AS DATEID_CREATED,
                -- DATEID_END: MTM spoof logic
                CASE
                    WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2
                     AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID   = 4
                     AND (ISNULL(i.LEASE_END_DATEID,0) - ISNULL(i.LEASE_START_DATEID,0)) > 25
                     AND dc.FLAG_DATE_SPOOFED = 1
                    THEN dc.DATEID_SPOOFED
                    WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2
                     AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID   = 4
                     AND ISNULL(i.LEASE_END_DATEID,0) = 0
                     AND dc.FLAG_DATE_SPOOFED = 1
                    THEN dc.DATEID_SPOOFED
                    WHEN ISNULL(i.LEASE_END_DATEID,0) = 0
                    THEN ISNULL(i.LEASE_START_DATEID,0) + 1
                    ELSE i.LEASE_END_DATEID
                END                                         AS DATEID_END,
                dc.DATEID_SPOOFED,
                i.UPDATED_ON_DATEID                         AS DATEID_UPDATED,
                CAST(i.LEASE_START_DATETMIE AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATETIME_BEGIN,
                CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2
                     THEN CAST(i.UPDATED_ON_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3)) ELSE NULL
                END                                         AS DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                CAST(i.LEASE_END_DATETIME AS DATETIME2(3))  AS DATETIME_END,
                dc.DAY_OF_YEAR,
                CASE WHEN i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                dc.FLAG_DATE_SPOOFED,
                i.IS_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED                    AS FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                -- IS_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN is BIT in ODS — cast to VARCHAR(5)
                CAST(CASE WHEN i.IS_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN = 1 THEN 'true'
                          ELSE 'false' END AS VARCHAR(5))   AS FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                CASE WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                CASE
                    WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1
                    WHEN i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 4 THEN 0
                    ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                it.NAME                                     AS LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE,
                i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID                    AS INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                i.LEASE_ID,
                st.NAME                                     AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                i.PARENT_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID                  AS PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                p.DATE_DISPOSITIONED                        AS PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
                p.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED                        AS PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                i.PROPERTY_ID,
                p.PROPERTY_NAME,
                p.PROPERTY_KEY,
                i.LEASE_START_WINDOW_ID                     AS START_WINDOW_ID,
                i.LEASE_TERM_ID                             AS TERM_ID
            FROM Intervals                                  i
            CROSS JOIN DateCheck                            dc
            LEFT JOIN Properties                            p
                ON p.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID = i.PROPERTY_ID
            LEFT JOIN IntervalApps                          ia
                ON ia.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = i.ID
            LEFT JOIN StatusTypes                           st
                ON st.ID = i.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID
            LEFT JOIN IntervalTypes                         it
                ON it.ID = i.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- LeaseIntervals2
        -- Filtered subset + MTM sub-status flags
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        LeaseIntervals2 AS
        (
            SELECT
                li.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                li.APPLICATION_ID,
                li.CREATED_BY,
                li.DATE_BEGIN,
                li.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li.DATE_CREATED,
                li.DATE_END,
                li.DATE_UPDATED,
                li.DATEID_BEGIN,
                li.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li.DATEID_CREATED,
                li.DATEID_END,
                li.DATEID_UPDATED,
                li.DATETIME_BEGIN,
                li.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li.DATETIME_END,
                li.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                li.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
                li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
                CASE WHEN li.FLAG_MTM_LEASE = 1 AND li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MTM_PAST,
                li.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                li.LEASE_ID,
                li.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE,
                li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                li.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                li.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                li.PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
                li.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                li.PROPERTY_ID,
                li.PROPERTY_KEY,
                li.PROPERTY_NAME,
                li.START_WINDOW_ID,
                li.TERM_ID
            FROM LeaseIntervals li
            WHERE li.DATE_BEGIN       >= 20100101
              AND li.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID <> 4
              AND li.LEASE_ID         IS NOT NULL
              AND li.PROPERTY_KEY     IS NOT NULL
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Apps  (STAGING: APPLICATIONS_F)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Apps AS
        (
            SELECT
                af.APPLICANT_ID,
                af.APPLICANT_NAME,
                af.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
                af.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
                af.APPLICATION_ID,
                af.CUSTOMER_ID,
                af.DATE_CANCELLED,
                af.DATEID_CANCELLED,
                af.LEASE_ID,
                af.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                af.OCCUPANCY_TYPE,
                af.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
                af.STAGE,
                af.STAGE_ID,
                af.STATUS,
                af.STATUS_ID
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F] af
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- BeginAY / EndAY / PropertyAY
        -- All from STAGING: PROPERTY_AY_F
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        BeginAY AS
        (
            SELECT
                paf.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                paf.AY,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATE,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATEID,
                paf.AY_END_DATE,
                paf.AY_END_DATEID,
                paf.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                paf.FLAG_NON_STANDARD,
                paf.MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE,
