                paf.MOVE_IN_END_DATE,
                paf.PROPERTY_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F] paf
        ),

        EndAY AS
        (
            SELECT
                paf.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                paf.AY,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATE,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATEID,
                paf.AY_END_DATE,
                paf.AY_END_DATEID,
                paf.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                paf.FLAG_NON_STANDARD,
                paf.MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE,
                paf.MOVE_IN_END_DATE,
                paf.PROPERTY_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F] paf
        ),

        PropertyAY AS
        (
            SELECT
                paf.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                paf.AY,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATE,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATEID,
                paf.AY_END_DATE,
                paf.AY_END_DATEID,
                paf.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                paf.FLAG_NON_STANDARD,
                paf.PROPERTY_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F] paf
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Property_AY  (used in Final — renamed columns
        -- to match ATL view output names)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Property_AY AS
        (
            SELECT
                paf.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                paf.AY,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATE        AS DATE_AY_BEGIN,
                paf.AY_END_DATE          AS DATE_AY_END,
                paf.MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE   AS DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
                paf.MOVE_IN_END_DATE     AS DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
                paf.AY_BEGIN_DATEID      AS DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
                paf.AY_END_DATEID        AS DATEID_AY_END,
                paf.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                paf.PROPERTY_KEY
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F] paf
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- AYWeeks  (STAGING: AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        AYWeeks AS
        (
            SELECT
                ayw.DATE_KEY,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_KEY,
                ayw.AY,
                ayw.AY_WEEK,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_END_DATE
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_WEEKS_BY_DAY_0] ayw
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Leases
        -- ODS: E_CACHED_LEASES INNER JOIN E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES
        -- E_CACHED_LEASES already has int DATE columns.
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Leases AS
        (
            SELECT
                ecl.ID,
                ecl.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                CAST(elst.NAME AS VARCHAR(1000))            AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                ecl.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID                       AS TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID,
                ecl.TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE,
                CASE
                    WHEN ISNULL(ecl.MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999)
                         <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-1,SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT)
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
                CASE
                    WHEN ISNULL(ecl.TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0
                     AND ecl.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5)
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]           ecl
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_STATUS_TYPES] elst
                ON elst.ID = ecl.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Installments
        -- ODS: E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS
        -- Derives integer DATE values from datetime2 columns.
        -- MONTH_COUNT maps to CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS per ATL.
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Installments AS
        (
            SELECT
                ecli.ID,
                ecli.CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS,
                ecli.CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS,
                ecli.LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS,
                ecli.CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS                 AS MONTH_COUNT
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASE_INTERVALS] ecli
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- COMBO
        -- LeaseIntervals2 + BeginAY + EndAY + Apps
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        COMBO AS
        (
            SELECT
                li2.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                a.APPLICANT_ID,
                li2.APPLICATION_ID                          AS APPLICATION_ID_1,
                a.APPLICANT_NAME,
                a.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
                a.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
                a.APPLICATION_ID,
                bay.AY                                      AS AY,
                bay.AY                                      AS AY_Begin,
                eay.AY                                      AS AY_End,
                1                                           AS [COUNT],
                li2.CREATED_BY,
                a.CUSTOMER_ID,
                bay.AY_BEGIN_DATE                           AS DATE_AY_BEGIN,
                bay.AY_END_DATE                             AS DATE_AY_END,
                li2.DATE_BEGIN,
                a.DATE_CANCELLED,
                li2.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li2.DATE_CREATED,
                li2.DATE_END,
                bay.MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE                      AS DATE_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
                bay.MOVE_IN_END_DATE                        AS DATE_MOVE_IN_END,
                li2.DATE_UPDATED,
                bay.AY_BEGIN_DATEID                         AS DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
                bay.AY_END_DATEID                           AS DATEID_AY_END,
                li2.DATEID_BEGIN,
                a.DATEID_CANCELLED,
                li2.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li2.DATEID_CREATED,
                li2.DATEID_END,
                li2.DATEID_UPDATED,
                li2.DATETIME_BEGIN,
                li2.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                li2.DATETIME_END,
                bay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                li2.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                CAST(NULL AS INT)                           AS FLAG_HOLDOVER,
                CAST(NULL AS INT)                           AS FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
                li2.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                li2.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                CAST(NULL AS INT)                           AS FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
                li2.FLAG_MTM_PAST,
                bay.FLAG_NON_STANDARD                       AS FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
                CAST(NULL AS INT)                           AS HOLDOVER_DEPTH,
                li2.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                li2.LEASE_ID,
                li2.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                li2.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                a.OCCUPANCY_TYPE,
                a.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
                li2.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                ISNULL(bay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY, 0.0000)         AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                li2.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                li2.PROPERTY_ID,
                li2.PROPERTY_KEY,
                li2.PROPERTY_NAME,
                a.STAGE,
                a.STAGE_ID,
                li2.START_WINDOW_ID,
                a.STATUS,
                a.STATUS_ID,
                li2.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID                    AS STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                li2.TERM_ID
            FROM LeaseIntervals2                            li2
            LEFT JOIN BeginAY                               bay
                ON  li2.PROPERTY_KEY    = bay.PROPERTY_KEY
                AND li2.DATEID_BEGIN   >= bay.AY_BEGIN_DATEID
                AND li2.DATEID_BEGIN   <= bay.AY_END_DATEID
            LEFT JOIN Apps                                  a
                ON  li2.APPLICATION_ID  = a.APPLICATION_ID
            LEFT JOIN EndAY                                 eay
                ON  li2.PROPERTY_KEY    = eay.PROPERTY_KEY
                AND li2.DATEID_END     >= eay.AY_BEGIN_DATEID
                AND li2.DATEID_END     <= eay.AY_END_DATEID
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Exploder
        -- COMBO x PropertyAY: one row per AY the lease spans
        -- Calculates FLAG_HOLDOVER, FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
        -- FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR, HOLDOVER_DEPTH
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Exploder AS
        (
            SELECT
                c.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                ISNULL(pay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY, 0.0000)         AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                c.APPLICANT_ID,
                c.APPLICATION_ID_1,
                c.APPLICANT_NAME,
                c.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
                c.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
                c.APPLICATION_ID,
                ISNULL(pay.AY, 0)                           AS AY,
                c.AY_Begin,
                c.AY_End,
                c.[COUNT],
                c.CREATED_BY,
                c.CUSTOMER_ID,
                c.DATE_AY_BEGIN,
                c.DATE_AY_END,
                c.DATE_BEGIN,
                c.DATE_CANCELLED,
                c.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                c.DATE_CREATED,
                c.DATE_END,
                c.DATE_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
                c.DATE_MOVE_IN_END,
                c.DATE_UPDATED,
                c.DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
                c.DATEID_AY_END,
                c.DATEID_BEGIN,
                c.DATEID_CANCELLED,
                c.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                c.DATEID_CREATED,
                c.DATEID_END,
                c.DATEID_UPDATED,
                c.DATETIME_BEGIN,
                c.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                c.DATETIME_END,
                c.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                c.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                CASE WHEN c.AY_Begin = pay.AY THEN 0 ELSE 1
                END                                         AS FLAG_HOLDOVER,
                CASE
                    WHEN c.AY_Begin < pay.AY
                     AND c.AY_End   = pay.AY
                     AND c.DATEID_END <= (pay.AY_BEGIN_DATEID + pay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS)
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
                c.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                c.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                CASE
                    WHEN c.AY_Begin < pay.AY AND c.AY_End > pay.AY
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,
                c.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
                c.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
                c.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                c.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                c.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
                c.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
                c.FLAG_MTM_PAST,
                c.FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
                CASE
                    WHEN c.AY_Begin < pay.AY AND c.AY_End = pay.AY
                    THEN c.DATEID_END - pay.AY_BEGIN_DATEID
                    ELSE 0
                END                                         AS HOLDOVER_DEPTH,
                c.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                c.LEASE_ID,
                c.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                c.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                c.OCCUPANCY_TYPE,
                c.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
                c.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                c.PROPERTY_AY_KEY                           AS PROPERTY_AY_KEY_1,
                c.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                c.PROPERTY_ID,
                c.PROPERTY_KEY,
                c.PROPERTY_NAME,
                c.STAGE,
                c.STAGE_ID,
                c.START_WINDOW_ID,
                c.STATUS,
                c.STATUS_ID,
                c.STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                c.TERM_ID
            FROM COMBO                                      c
            LEFT JOIN PropertyAY                            pay
                ON  pay.PROPERTY_KEY = c.PROPERTY_KEY
                AND pay.AY          >= c.AY_Begin
                AND pay.AY          <= c.AY_End
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Final
        -- Exploder + Property_AY + Leases + AYWeeks
        -- + Installments
        -- All FLAG calculations and date derivations here.
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Final AS
        (
            SELECT
                CAST(
                    CAST(e.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID AS VARCHAR(20))
                    + '.'
                    + CAST(e.AY AS VARCHAR(10))
                AS DECIMAL(19,4))                           AS LEASE_AY_KEY,
                e.APPLICANT_ID,
                e.APPLICANT_NAME,
                e.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
                e.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
                e.APPLICATION_ID,
                e.AY,
                ayw.AY_WEEK,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
                ayw.AY_WEEK_KEY,
                ins.CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS,
                ins.CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS,
                ins.MONTH_COUNT                             AS CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT,
                e.[COUNT],
                e.CREATED_BY,
                e.CUSTOMER_ID,
                pay.DATE_AY_BEGIN,
                pay.DATE_AY_END,
                pay.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
                pay.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
                e.DATE_BEGIN,
                e.DATE_CANCELLED,
                e.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                e.DATE_CREATED,
                e.DATE_END,
                l.TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE                       AS DATE_TRANSFERRED,
                e.DATE_UPDATED,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-1,SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT)
                                                            AS DATE_YESTERDAY,
                pay.DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
                pay.DATEID_AY_END,
                e.DATEID_BEGIN,
                e.DATEID_CANCELLED,
                e.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                e.DATEID_CREATED,
                e.DATEID_END,
                e.DATEID_UPDATED,
                DATEDIFF(DAY, '19000101', DATEADD(DAY,-1,CAST(SYSDATETIME() AS DATE)))
                                                            AS DATEID_YESTERDAY,
                e.DATETIME_BEGIN,
                e.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                e.DATETIME_END,
                pay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                CASE WHEN e.STATUS_ID = 6 OR e.STATUS_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_CANCELLED,
                e.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                CASE
                    WHEN e.STAGE_ID = 4 AND e.STATUS_ID = 4 AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_COMPLETE,
                CASE
                    WHEN e.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 0
                     AND e.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE = 0
                     AND e.DATEID_BEGIN <= (pay.DATEID_AY_BEGIN + pay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS)
                     AND e.DATEID_END   >  (pay.DATEID_AY_BEGIN + pay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS)
                    THEN 1
                    WHEN e.FLAG_HOLDOVER = 1
                     AND e.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE = 0
                     AND e.DATEID_END   >  (pay.DATEID_AY_BEGIN + pay.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS)
                    THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_FALL,
                e.FLAG_HOLDOVER,
                e.FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
                e.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                e.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                CASE
                    WHEN (e.STAGE_ID IN (4) AND e.STATUS_ID IN (1,2,3) AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2)
                      OR (e.STAGE_ID IN (3) AND e.STATUS_ID IN (3,4)   AND e.STATUS_TYPE_ID <> 2)
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_INCOMPLETE,
                e.FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,
                CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
                e.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
                e.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
                e.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                e.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                e.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
                e.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
                e.FLAG_MTM_PAST,
                CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_NEW_LEASE,
                e.FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
                CASE WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE,
                CASE
                    WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 5
                      OR ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE,
                CASE
                    WHEN e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 5
                     AND ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) = 0
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_TRANSFER_IN,
                CASE
                    WHEN ISNULL(l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0
                END                                         AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
                e.HOLDOVER_DEPTH                            AS HOLDOVER_DAYS,
                e.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                e.LEASE_ID,
                e.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                ISNULL(l.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE, e.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE)
                                                            AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                ISNULL(l.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, e.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID)
                                                            AS LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                ins.LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS,
                e.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                pay.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                e.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                e.PROPERTY_ID,
                e.PROPERTY_KEY,
                e.PROPERTY_NAME,
                e.STAGE,
                e.STAGE_ID,
                e.START_WINDOW_ID,
                e.STATUS,
                e.STATUS_ID,
                e.STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                e.TERM_ID,
                l.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID
            FROM Exploder                                   e
            LEFT JOIN Property_AY                           pay
                ON  e.AY           = pay.AY
                AND e.PROPERTY_KEY = pay.PROPERTY_KEY
            LEFT JOIN Leases                                l
                ON  e.LEASE_ID     = l.ID
            LEFT JOIN AYWeeks                               ayw
                ON  e.DATE_CREATED = ayw.DATE_KEY
            LEFT JOIN Installments                          ins
                ON  ins.ID         = e.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        ),

        -- --------------------------------------------------
        -- Keys  (DISTINCT final projection)
        -- --------------------------------------------------
        Keys AS
        (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                f.LEASE_AY_KEY,
                f.APPLICANT_ID,
                f.APPLICANT_NAME,
                f.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
                f.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST,
                f.APPLICATION_ID,
                f.AY,
                f.AY_WEEK,
                f.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
                f.AY_WEEK_END_DATE,
                f.AY_WEEK_KEY,
                f.CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS,
                f.CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS,
                f.CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT,
                f.[COUNT],
                f.CREATED_BY,
                f.CUSTOMER_ID,
                f.DATE_AY_BEGIN,
                f.DATE_AY_END,
                f.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN,
                f.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END,
                f.DATE_BEGIN,
                f.DATE_CANCELLED,
                f.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                f.DATE_CREATED,
                f.DATE_END,
                f.DATE_TRANSFERRED,
                f.DATE_UPDATED,
                f.DATE_YESTERDAY,
                f.DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
                f.DATEID_AY_END,
                f.DATEID_BEGIN,
                f.DATEID_CANCELLED,
                f.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                f.DATEID_CREATED,
                f.DATEID_END,
                f.DATEID_UPDATED,
                f.DATEID_YESTERDAY,
                f.DATETIME_BEGIN,
                f.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                f.DATETIME_END,
                f.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS,
                f.FLAG_CANCELLED,
                f.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
                f.FLAG_COMPLETE,
                f.FLAG_FALL,
                f.FLAG_HOLDOVER,
                f.FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
                f.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN,
                f.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED,
                f.FLAG_INCOMPLETE,
                f.FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR,
                f.FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE,
                f.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
                f.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED,
                f.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT,
                f.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE,
                f.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
                f.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE,
                f.FLAG_MTM_PAST,
                f.FLAG_NEW_LEASE,
                f.FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
                f.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE,
                f.FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE,
                f.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN,
                f.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
                f.HOLDOVER_DAYS,
                f.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID,
                f.LEASE_ID,
                f.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                f.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE,
                f.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                f.LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS,
                f.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID,
                f.PROPERTY_AY_KEY,
                f.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                f.PROPERTY_ID,
                f.PROPERTY_KEY,
                f.PROPERTY_NAME,
                f.STAGE,
                f.STAGE_ID,
                f.START_WINDOW_ID,
                f.STATUS,
                f.STATUS_ID,
                f.STATUS_TYPE_ID,
                f.TERM_ID,
                f.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID
            FROM Final f
        )

        -- ================================================
        -- FINAL INSERT
        -- ================================================
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
        (
            [LEASE_AY_KEY],[APPLICANT_ID],[APPLICANT_NAME],[APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST],
            [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST],[APPLICATION_ID],[AY],[AY_WEEK],[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
            [AY_WEEK_END_DATE],[AY_WEEK_KEY],[CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS],[CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS],
            [CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT],[COUNT],[CREATED_BY],[CUSTOMER_ID],[DATE_AY_BEGIN],
            [DATE_AY_END],[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN],[DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END],[DATE_BEGIN],
            [DATE_CANCELLED],[DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],[DATE_CREATED],[DATE_END],
            [DATE_TRANSFERRED],[DATE_UPDATED],[DATE_YESTERDAY],[DATEID_AY_BEGIN],
            [DATEID_AY_END],[DATEID_BEGIN],[DATEID_CANCELLED],[DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],
            [DATEID_CREATED],[DATEID_END],[DATEID_UPDATED],[DATEID_YESTERDAY],
            [DATETIME_BEGIN],[DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],[DATETIME_END],
            [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],[FLAG_CANCELLED],[FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE],
            [FLAG_COMPLETE],[FLAG_FALL],[FLAG_HOLDOVER],[FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING],
            [FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN],[FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED],[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR],[FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE],[FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT],
            [FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED],[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT],[FLAG_MTM_FUTURE],[FLAG_MTM_LEASE],
            [FLAG_MTM_NOTICE],[FLAG_MTM_PAST],[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],[FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY],
            [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],[FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE],[FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],[FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],
            [HOLDOVER_DAYS],[INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],[LEASE_ID],[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],[LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS],
            [PARENT_INTERVAL_ID],[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],[PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            [PROPERTY_ID],[PROPERTY_KEY],[PROPERTY_NAME],[STAGE],[STAGE_ID],
            [START_WINDOW_ID],[STATUS],[STATUS_ID],[STATUS_TYPE_ID],[TERM_ID],
            [TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID],[LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT
            k.LEASE_AY_KEY, k.APPLICANT_ID, k.APPLICANT_NAME, k.APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST,
            k.APPLICANT_NAME_LAST, k.APPLICATION_ID, k.AY, k.AY_WEEK, k.AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE,
            k.AY_WEEK_END_DATE, k.AY_WEEK_KEY, k.CONTRACT_LENGTH_DAYS, k.CONTRACT_LENGTH_MONTHS,
            k.CONTRACT_MONTH_COUNT, k.[COUNT], k.CREATED_BY, k.CUSTOMER_ID, k.DATE_AY_BEGIN,
            k.DATE_AY_END, k.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_BEGIN, k.DATE_AY_MOVE_IN_END, k.DATE_BEGIN,
            k.DATE_CANCELLED, k.DATE_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE, k.DATE_CREATED, k.DATE_END,
            k.DATE_TRANSFERRED, k.DATE_UPDATED, k.DATE_YESTERDAY, k.DATEID_AY_BEGIN,
            k.DATEID_AY_END, k.DATEID_BEGIN, k.DATEID_CANCELLED, k.DATEID_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
            k.DATEID_CREATED, k.DATEID_END, k.DATEID_UPDATED, k.DATEID_YESTERDAY,
            k.DATETIME_BEGIN, k.DATETIME_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE, k.DATETIME_END,
            k.FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS, k.FLAG_CANCELLED, k.FLAG_CANCELLED_BY_TYPE,
            k.FLAG_COMPLETE, k.FLAG_FALL, k.FLAG_HOLDOVER, k.FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING,
            k.FLAG_IMMEDIATE_MOVE_IN, k.FLAG_IMPORT_CONSOLIDATED, k.FLAG_INCOMPLETE,
            k.FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR, k.FLAG_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE, k.FLAG_MTM_APPLICANT,
            k.FLAG_MTM_CANCELLED, k.FLAG_MTM_CURRENT, k.FLAG_MTM_FUTURE, k.FLAG_MTM_LEASE,
            k.FLAG_MTM_NOTICE, k.FLAG_MTM_PAST, k.FLAG_NEW_LEASE, k.FLAG_NON_STANDARD_AY,
            k.FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE, k.FLAG_TRANSFER_LEASE, k.FLAG_TRANSFER_IN, k.FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
            k.HOLDOVER_DAYS, k.INTERVAL_TYPE_ID, k.LEASE_ID, k.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            k.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE, k.LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID, k.LEASE_TERM_BILLING_MONTHS,
            k.PARENT_INTERVAL_ID, k.PROPERTY_AY_KEY, k.PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            k.PROPERTY_ID, k.PROPERTY_KEY, k.PROPERTY_NAME, k.STAGE, k.STAGE_ID,
            k.START_WINDOW_ID, k.STATUS, k.STATUS_ID, k.STATUS_TYPE_ID, k.TERM_ID,
            k.TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID,
            @ProcStart
        FROM Keys k;

        COMMIT;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        ROLLBACK;
        SET @ErrMsg   = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        SET @ErrSev   = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        SET @ErrState = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, @ErrSev, @ErrState);
    END CATCH

END;

name: LEASE_MAGNETS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.LEASE_MAGNETS_IMPORT, WH_ODS.dbo.LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_IMPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_MAGNETS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_0_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: Replicates Dataflow Lease_Magnets_0.
             Moves data from ODS Import tables to STAGING2 Staging tables.
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        -- 1. Load LEASE_MAGNETS_0
        -- Note: The script specifies 'append' and 'auto_correct_using_merge'. 
        -- For Staging _0 tables, we typically TRUNCATE and INSERT for a clean slate.
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_0];

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_0] (
            DATE_KEY, DATE_LAST_MODIFIED, RECORD_ID, [COUNT], LM_PROPERTY_ID, 
            LM_PROPERTY_NAME, LM_WEBSITE, LEAD_COUNT, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, 
            TOP_CITIES_STRING, TOUR_COUNT_ROLLING_30, TOUR_IMPRESSIONS, TOURS_IN_CITY, 
            TOURS_OUT_OF_CITY, TOURS_IN_STATE, TOURS_OUT_OF_STATE, TOURS_INTERNATIONAL, 
            TRAFFIC_MOBILE, TRAFFIC_OFF_HOURS
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY, DATE_LAST_MODIFIED, RECORD_ID, [COUNT], LM_PROPERTY_ID, 
            LM_PROPERTY_NAME, LM_WEBSITE, LEAD_COUNT, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, 
            TOP_CITIES_STRING, TOUR_COUNT_ROLLING_30, TOUR_IMPRESSIONS, TOURS_IN_CITY, 
            TOURS_OUT_OF_CITY, TOURS_IN_STATE, TOURS_OUT_OF_STATE, TOURS_INTERNATIONAL, 
            TRAFFIC_MOBILE, TRAFFIC_OFF_HOURS
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_IMPORT];

        -- 2. Load LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_0
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_0];

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_0] (
            DATE_KEY, ID, AI, ALIAS, ANALYTICS_120D, ANALYTICS_180D, 
            ANALYTICS_30D, ANALYTICS_60D, ANALYTICS_90D, COMMUNITY_MAGNETS, 
            EMAIL, FILE_DATE, HIDDEN, IMG_URL, LAUNCHDATE, LOGO, NAME, 
            PHONE, PHOTOS, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_TYPE, 
            REPEATED_TOURS_30D, REPEATED_TOURS_60D, REPEATED_TOURS_90D, 
            REPEATED_TOURS_120D, REPEATED_TOURS_180D, 
            [180_mon_bus], [180_mon_non_bus], [180_tue_bus], [180_tue_non_bus], 
            [180_wed_bus], [180_wed_non_bus], [180_thu_bus], [180_thu_non_bus], 
            [180_fri_bus], [180_fri_non_bus], [180_sat_bus], [180_sat_non_bus], 
            [180_sun_bus], [180_sun_non_bus], 
            REVIEWS, ROOMS, UNITS, URL, WEBSITE_TYPE
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY, ID, AI, ALIAS, ANALYTICS_120D, ANALYTICS_180D, 
            ANALYTICS_30D, ANALYTICS_60D, ANALYTICS_90D, COMMUNITY_MAGNETS, 
            EMAIL, FILE_DATE, HIDDEN, IMG_URL, LAUNCHDATE, LOGO, NAME, 
            PHONE, PHOTOS, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_TYPE, 
            REPEATED_TOURS_30D, REPEATED_TOURS_60D, REPEATED_TOURS_90D, 
            REPEATED_TOURS_120D, REPEATED_TOURS_180D, 
            "180_mon_bus", "180_mon_non_bus", "180_tue_bus", "180_tue_non_bus", 
            "180_wed_bus", "180_wed_non_bus", "180_thu_bus", "180_thu_non_bus", 
            "180_fri_bus", "180_fri_non_bus", "180_sat_bus", "180_sat_non_bus", 
            "180_sun_bus", "180_sun_non_bus", 
            REVIEWS, ROOMS, UNITS, URL, WEBSITE_TYPE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[LEASE_MAGNETS_TOURS_IMPORT];

        PRINT 'Lease Magnets and Tours refresh successful.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEASE_MAGNETS_F_SP
description: DELETE + INSERT from unknown source into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [LEASE_MAGNETS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM [LEASE_MAGNETS_F];

    INSERT INTO [LEASE_MAGNETS_F] (
        [DATE_KEY], [DATE_LAST_MODIFIED], [RECORD_ID], [COUNT], [LM_PROPERTY_ID],
        [LM_PROPERTY_NAME], [LM_WEBSITE], [LEAD_COUNT], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [TOP_CITIES_STRING], [TOUR_COUNT_ROLLING_30], [TOUR_IMPRESSIONS], [TOURS_IN_CITY],
        [TOURS_OUT_OF_CITY], [TOURS_IN_STATE], [TOURS_OUT_OF_STATE], [TOURS_INTERNATIONAL],
        [TRAFFIC_MOBILE], [TRAFFIC_OFF_HOURS]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [DATE_LAST_MODIFIED], [RECORD_ID], [COUNT], [LM_PROPERTY_ID],
        [LM_PROPERTY_NAME], [LM_WEBSITE], [LEAD_COUNT], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [TOP_CITIES_STRING], [TOUR_COUNT_ROLLING_30], [TOUR_IMPRESSIONS], [TOURS_IN_CITY],
        [TOURS_OUT_OF_CITY], [TOURS_IN_STATE], [TOURS_OUT_OF_STATE], [TOURS_INTERNATIONAL],
        [TRAFFIC_MOBILE], [TRAFFIC_OFF_HOURS]
    FROM [LEASE_MAGNETS_0];
END

name: LEASE_PARENTS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASES_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.LEASES_PARENTS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_PARENTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASES_PARENTS];

        -- 2. Insert with Aggregation
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASES_PARENTS] (
            [LEASE_ID],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME],
            [DATE_MOVE_IN],
            [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [LEASE_ID],
            MAX([CUSTOMER_NAME]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],
            MIN([DATE_MOVE_IN]) AS [DATE_MOVE_IN],
            MAX([DATE_MOVE_OUT]) AS [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F]
        GROUP BY 
            [LEASE_ID],
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0_SP
transformations: INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED: CASE WHEN [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER IN' THEN 'NEW' ELSE [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] END
FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW: CASE WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

RESOLVED_RATE_TIER_KEY: CASE WHEN M.[RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN M.[ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY] ELSE M.[RATE_TIER_KEY] END
RESOLVED_TIER: CASE WHEN M.[TIER] IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN M.[ALT_TIER] ELSE M.[TIER] END
FLAG_UNDER_RATE: CASE WHEN F.[RENT_AMOUNT] < T2.[RATE_L] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_WITHIN_RATE: CASE WHEN F.[RENT_AMOUNT] >= T2.[RATE_L] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.ACADEMIC_YEAR_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_AY AS (
            -- Filter Academic Years (Current and Next)
            SELECT 
                [AY_KEY],
                [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ACADEMIC_YEAR_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_AY] IN (0, 1)
        ),
        cte_Tiers AS (
            -- Filter Valid Rate Tiers linked to valid AYs
            SELECT 
                RT.*
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F] RT
            INNER JOIN cte_AY AY ON RT.[AY] = AY.[AY_KEY]
            WHERE RT.[BEDS_U] > 0 
              AND ISNULL(RT.[BEDS], 0) > 0
        ),
        cte_Intervals AS (
            -- Filter Leases/Intervals
            SELECT 
                [AY],
                [DATE_CANCELLED],
                [DATE_COMPLETED],
                [DATE_CREATED],
                [DATEID_CREATED],
                [FLAG_FALL_NEW],
                [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                [FLOORPLAN],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                -- Transform Interval Type 'TRANSFER IN' to 'NEW'
                CASE 
                    WHEN [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = 'TRANSFER IN' THEN 'NEW' 
                    ELSE [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] 
                END AS [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [DATE_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
                [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
                [RENT_AMOUNT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_COMPLETE] = 1 
              AND [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] >= 1 
              AND [FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_HOLDOVER] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER] = 0
        ),
        cte_Pool AS (
            -- Generate Sequence Number within Groups
            SELECT 
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY I.[PROPERTY_KEY], I.[AY], I.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], I.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] 
                    ORDER BY I.[DATE_CREATED] ASC, I.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] ASC
                ) AS [Sequence],
                I.*,
                A.[RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM cte_Intervals I
            INNER JOIN cte_AY A ON A.[AY_KEY] = I.[AY]
        ),
        -- MATCH 1: By PROPERTY_KEY + FLOORPLAN_KEY
        cte_Match1_Base AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[Sequence], P.[AY], P.[FLAG_FALL_NEW], P.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], P.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                P.[FLOORPLAN], P.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], P.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], P.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME], P.[RENT_AMOUNT],
                T.[BEDS_L], T.[BEDS_U], T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                T.[RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[TIER], T.[ALT_TIER]
            FROM cte_Pool P
            LEFT JOIN cte_Tiers T ON 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
                P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = T.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] AND 
                P.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = T.[LEASE_TYPE] AND 
                P.[AY] = T.[AY] AND
                (
                    (P.[Sequence] >= T.[BEDS_L] AND P.[Sequence] <= T.[BEDS_U])
                    OR
                    (P.[Sequence] > T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND T.[BEDS_U] = T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                )
        ),
        cte_Matched1 AS (
            SELECT *, 1 AS [Match_Level] FROM cte_Match1_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NOT NULL
        ),
        cte_Unmatched1 AS (
            SELECT * FROM cte_Match1_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NULL
        ),
        -- MATCH 2: By PROPERTY_KEY + FLOORPLAN_CODE
        cte_Match2_Base AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[Sequence], U.[AY], U.[FLAG_FALL_NEW], U.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], U.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                U.[FLOORPLAN], U.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], U.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY], U.[PROPERTY_NAME], U.[RENT_AMOUNT],
                T.[BEDS_L], T.[BEDS_U], T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                T.[RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[TIER], T.[ALT_TIER]
            FROM cte_Unmatched1 U
            LEFT JOIN cte_Tiers T ON 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
                U.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = T.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] AND 
                U.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = T.[LEASE_TYPE] AND 
                U.[AY] = T.[AY] AND
                (
                    (U.[Sequence] >= T.[BEDS_L] AND U.[Sequence] <= T.[BEDS_U])
                    OR
                    (U.[Sequence] > T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND T.[BEDS_U] = T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                )
        ),
        cte_Matched2 AS (
            SELECT *, 2 AS [Match_Level] FROM cte_Match2_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NOT NULL
        ),
        cte_Unmatched2 AS (
            SELECT * FROM cte_Match2_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NULL
        ),
        -- MATCH 3: By PROPERTY_KEY + FLOORPLAN (Name) = FLOORPLAN_CODE
        cte_Match3_Base AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[Sequence], U.[AY], U.[FLAG_FALL_NEW], U.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], U.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                U.[FLOORPLAN], U.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], U.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY], U.[PROPERTY_NAME], U.[RENT_AMOUNT],
                T.[BEDS_L], T.[BEDS_U], T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                T.[RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY], T.[TIER], T.[ALT_TIER]
            FROM cte_Unmatched2 U
            LEFT JOIN cte_Tiers T ON 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
                U.[FLOORPLAN] = T.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] AND 
                U.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = T.[LEASE_TYPE] AND 
                U.[AY] = T.[AY] AND
                (
                    (U.[Sequence] >= T.[BEDS_L] AND U.[Sequence] <= T.[BEDS_U])
                    OR
                    (U.[Sequence] > T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND T.[BEDS_U] = T.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                )
        ),
        cte_Matched3 AS (
            SELECT *, 3 AS [Match_Level] FROM cte_Match3_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NOT NULL
        ),
        cte_NoMatch AS (
            SELECT *, 4 AS [Match_Level] FROM cte_Match3_Base WHERE [RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NULL
        ),
        -- Combine all flows
        cte_Merge AS (
            SELECT * FROM cte_Matched1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM cte_Matched2
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM cte_Matched3
            UNION ALL
            SELECT * FROM cte_NoMatch
        ),
        -- Resolve Overflow/Tier Logic
        cte_Final_Logic AS (
            SELECT
                M.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                M.[AY],
                M.[BEDS_L],
                M.[BEDS_U],
                M.[FLAG_FALL_NEW],
                M.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                M.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                -- FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW
                CASE 
                    WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW],
                M.[FLOORPLAN],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                M.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                M.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                M.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                -- RATE_TIER_KEY resolution
                CASE 
                    WHEN M.[RATE_TIER_KEY] IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
                    WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN M.[ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY]
                    ELSE M.[RATE_TIER_KEY]
                END AS [RESOLVED_RATE_TIER_KEY],
                M.[RENT_AMOUNT],
                -- TIER resolution
                CASE 
                    WHEN M.[TIER] IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN'
                    WHEN M.[Sequence] > M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AND M.[BEDS_U] = M.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED] THEN M.[ALT_TIER]
                    ELSE M.[TIER]
                END AS [RESOLVED_TIER]
            FROM cte_Merge M
        )
        -- Final Join to Tiers2 (Full Rate Tier Table) and Insert
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASE_RATE_TIERS_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [AY], [BEDS], [BEDS_L], [BEDS_U],
            [FLAG_FALL_NEW], [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW], [FLAG_UNDER_RATE], [FLAG_WITHIN_RATE],
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [RATE_TIER_KEY], [RENT_AMOUNT], [RATE], [RATE_L], [RATE_U],
            [RATE_L_INT], [RATE_U_INT], [TIER]
        )
        SELECT 
            -- DATE_KEY: Yesterday YYYYMMDD
            CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)) AS [DATE_KEY],
            F.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            F.[AY],
            T2.[BEDS],
            T2.[BEDS_L],
            T2.[BEDS_U],
            F.[FLAG_FALL_NEW],
            F.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
            F.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
            F.[FLAG_TIER_OVERFLOW],
            -- FLAG_UNDER_RATE
            CASE WHEN F.[RENT_AMOUNT] < T2.[RATE_L] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_UNDER_RATE],
            -- FLAG_WITHIN_RATE
            CASE WHEN F.[RENT_AMOUNT] >= T2.[RATE_L] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_WITHIN_RATE],
            F.[FLOORPLAN],
            F.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            F.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            F.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            F.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            F.[RESOLVED_RATE_TIER_KEY] AS [RATE_TIER_KEY],
            F.[RENT_AMOUNT],
            T2.[RATE],
            T2.[RATE_L],
            T2.[RATE_U],
            T2.[RATE_L_INT],
            T2.[RATE_U_INT],
            F.[RESOLVED_TIER] AS [TIER]
        FROM cte_Final_Logic F
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F] T2 
            ON T2.[RATE_TIER_KEY] = F.[RESOLVED_RATE_TIER_KEY];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: LEASE_TERMS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE: CASE WHEN [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] > 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE: CASE WHEN [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] < 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0, WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_TERMS into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_TERMS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Lease_Terms_0 (LEASE_TERMS_0_ATL.txt)
--
-- Joins deduplicated lease intervals with their lease term definitions
-- to produce month counts and term-type flags per interval.
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0   (interval dates + TERM_ID)
--   WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_TERMS             (term definitions)
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASE_TERMS_0  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   Intervals CTE: GROUP BY all columns = SELECT DISTINCT
--   LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC = nvl(date_diff calc, LEASE_TERM_MONTHS)
--     ATL: date_diff('1900.01.01',END,'MM') - date_diff('1900.01.01',START,'MM') + 1
--     T-SQL: DATEDIFF(month, LEASE_START_DATETIME, LEASE_END_DATETIME) + 1
--     nvl â†’ ISNULL: use calc if not null, else fall back to TERM_MONTH from E_LEASE_TERMS
--   FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE  = decode(LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC > 13, 1, 0)
--   FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE = decode(LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC < 12, 1, 0)
--   Combo: Intervals INNER JOIN Terms ON LEASE_TERM_ID = Terms.ID
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASE_TERMS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LEASE_TERMS_0];

    ;WITH
    -- =========================================================================
    -- Intervals: deduplicated lease intervals from LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0.
    -- ATL: GROUP BY all columns (= SELECT DISTINCT).
    -- =========================================================================
    Intervals AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [TERM_ID]        AS [LEASE_TERM_ID],
            [DATETIME_END]   AS [LEASE_END_DATETIME],
            [DATETIME_BEGIN] AS [LEASE_START_DATETIME],
            [DATE_END]       AS [LEASE_END_DATE],
            [DATE_BEGIN]     AS [LEASE_START_DATE]
        FROM [dbo].[LEASE_INTERVAL_AY_0]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Terms: lease term definitions from E_LEASE_TERMS (no filter in ATL).
    -- =========================================================================
    Terms AS (
        SELECT
            [ID],
            [IS_COMMERCIAL] AS [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
            [IS_RENEWAL]    AS [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_RENEWAL],
            [IS_UNSET]      AS [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_UNSET],
            [IS_DISABLED]   AS [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_DISABLED],
            [NAME]          AS [LEASE_TERM],
            [TERM_MONTH]    AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_TERMS]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Combo: join intervals to terms; compute LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC once
    -- for reuse in both FLAG columns and the output column.
    -- ATL: Intervals INNER JOIN Terms ON Intervals.LEASE_TERM_ID = Terms.ID
    -- =========================================================================
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            i.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            i.[LEASE_START_DATE],
            i.[LEASE_END_DATE],
            i.[LEASE_TERM_ID],
            t.[FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
            t.[FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_RENEWAL],
            t.[FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_UNSET],
            t.[FLAG_LEASE_TERM_DISABLED],
            t.[LEASE_TERM],
            t.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
            -- ATL: nvl(date_diff(END,MM) - date_diff(START,MM) + 1, TERM_MONTH)
            ISNULL(
                DATEDIFF(month, i.[LEASE_START_DATETIME], i.[LEASE_END_DATETIME]) + 1,
                t.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS]
            )                                               AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC]
        FROM Intervals i
        INNER JOIN Terms t ON t.[ID] = i.[LEASE_TERM_ID]
    )

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[LEASE_TERMS_0] (
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [DATE_LEASE_BEGIN],
        [DATE_LEASE_END],
        [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE],
        [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE],
        [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
        [FLAG_TERM_IS_RENEWAL],
        [FLAG_TERM_IS_UNSET],
        [FLAG_TERM_DISABLED],
        [LEASE_TERM],
        [LEASE_TERM_ID],
        [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
        [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM]
    )
    SELECT
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        [LEASE_START_DATE]                                      AS [DATE_LEASE_BEGIN],
        [LEASE_END_DATE]                                        AS [DATE_LEASE_END],
        -- ATL: decode(nvl(calc, TERM_MONTHS) > 13, 1, 0)
        CASE WHEN [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] > 13 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                                                                AS [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE],
        -- ATL: decode(nvl(calc, TERM_MONTHS) < 12, 1, 0)
        CASE WHEN [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] < 12 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
                                                                AS [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE],
        [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL]                         AS [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
        [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_RENEWAL]                            AS [FLAG_TERM_IS_RENEWAL],
        [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_IS_UNSET]                              AS [FLAG_TERM_IS_UNSET],
        [FLAG_LEASE_TERM_DISABLED]                              AS [FLAG_TERM_DISABLED],
        [LEASE_TERM],
        [LEASE_TERM_ID],
        [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
        [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS]                                     AS [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM]
    FROM Combo;

END

name: LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASING_REFERRAL_ERRORS_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Targets
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_ERRORS_0];

        -- 2. Populate Valid Costs (Where Target ID is NOT NULL)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_COST_0] (
            TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            LEASING_REFERRAL_COST,
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID,
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME,
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            SUM(CHARGE_AMOUNT) AS LEASING_REFERRAL_COST,
            MAX(REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID) AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID,
            MAX(REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME) AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME,
            MAX(REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST) AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            MAX(REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST) AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0]
        WHERE TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID;

        -- 3. Populate Errors (Where Target ID IS NULL)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_ERRORS_0] (
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CHARGE_AMOUNT,
            SCHEDULED_CHARGES_ID,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            DATE_CHARGE_START,
            LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            CHARGE_AMOUNT,
            SCHEDULED_CHARGES_ID,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            DATE_CHARGE_START,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0]
        WHERE TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID IS NULL;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_0];

        -- 2. Define Logic
        WITH CTE_SC AS (
            SELECT 
                ID, AR_CODE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID, CHARGE_AMOUNT, CUSTOMER_ID,
                ENDS_WITH_MOVE_OUT, LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID,
                CHARGE_START_DATE, CHARGE_END_DATE, DELETED_ON, PROPERTY_ID, STARTS_WITH_LEASE, MEMO
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES]
            WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL 
              AND AR_CODE_ID = 155069 -- Leasing Referral Credit
        ),
        CTE_Combo AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.ID AS SCHEDULED_CHARGES_ID,
                ARC.NAME AS AR_CODE,
                SC.AR_CODE_ID,
                'Unknown' AS AR_CODE_TYPE, 
                SC.AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
                SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT,
                SC.CHARGE_AMOUNT AS CHARGE_AMOUNT_TOTAL,
                1 AS COUNT,
                -- Date Conversions
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SC.CHARGE_START_DATE, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_CHARGE_START,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SC.CHARGE_END_DATE, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_CHARGE_END,
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SC.DELETED_ON, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_DELETED,
                1 AS DURATION,
                SC.ENDS_WITH_MOVE_OUT,
                SC.STARTS_WITH_LEASE AS FLAG_STARTS_WITH_LEASE,
                SC.LEASE_ID,
                SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
                SC.MEMO,
                SC.PROPERTY_ID,
                C.CUSTOMER_ID AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID,
                C.CUSTOMER_NAME AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME,
                C.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
                C.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST AS REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
                SCT.NAME AS SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE,
                SCT.ID AS SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID,
                -- FIX: TRY_CAST prevents crash when extracted word is 'Lease' instead of a number
                TRY_CAST(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM(SC.MEMO))) > 0 
                        THEN LEFT(LTRIM(RTRIM(SC.MEMO)), CHARINDEX(' ', LTRIM(RTRIM(SC.MEMO))) - 1)
                        ELSE LTRIM(RTRIM(SC.MEMO))
                    END 
                AS INT) AS TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
            FROM CTE_SC SC
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES] SCT ON SC.SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID = SCT.ID
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ARC ON SC.AR_CODE_ID = ARC.ID
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F] C ON SC.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID = C.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
        )
        
        -- 3. Load Detail Table
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0] (
            SCHEDULED_CHARGES_ID, AR_CODE, AR_CODE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            CHARGE_AMOUNT, CHARGE_AMOUNT_TOTAL, COUNT, DATE_CHARGE_START, DATE_CHARGE_END,
            DATE_DELETED, DURATION, ENDS_WITH_MOVE_OUT, FLAG_STARTS_WITH_LEASE,
            LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, MEMO, PROPERTY_ID, 
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE, SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID, TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            SCHEDULED_CHARGES_ID, AR_CODE, AR_CODE_ID, AR_CODE_TYPE, AR_CODE_TYPE_ID,
            CHARGE_AMOUNT, CHARGE_AMOUNT_TOTAL, COUNT, DATE_CHARGE_START, DATE_CHARGE_END,
            DATE_DELETED, DURATION, ENDS_WITH_MOVE_OUT, FLAG_STARTS_WITH_LEASE,
            LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, MEMO, PROPERTY_ID, 
            REFERRER_CUSTOMER_ID, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST, REFERRER_CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE, SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID, TARGET_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Combo;

        -- 4. Load Summary Table
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_0] (
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, AR_CODE, AR_CODE_ID, CHARGE_COUNT,
            LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT, LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL, LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            AR_CODE,
            AR_CODE_ID,
            SUM(COUNT) AS CHARGE_COUNT,
            SUM(CHARGE_AMOUNT) AS LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT,
            SUM(CHARGE_AMOUNT_TOTAL) AS LEASING_REFERRAL_DISCOUNT_TOTAL,
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASING_REFERRAL_CREDIT_DETAIL_0]
        GROUP BY LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, AR_CODE, AR_CODE_ID;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: LEO_COMPLIANCE_EXPORT_F_SP
description: DELETE + INSERT from unknown source into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [LEO_COMPLIANCE_EXPORT_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    DELETE FROM [LEO_COMPLIANCE_EXPORT_F];

    INSERT INTO [LEO_COMPLIANCE_EXPORT_F] (
        [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [BONUS_PM_SCORE], [BONUS_MS_SCORE],
        [ENTITY_NUMBER], [ALL_TASKS_APPEARED], [ALL_TASKS_CANNOT_DO], [ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE],
        [ALL_TASKS_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE], [ALL_TASKS_COMPLETION_TIMING_PERCENTAGE],
        [ALL_TASKS_INCLUDING_CANNOT_DO_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE], [ALL_TASKS_INCOMPLETE],
        [ALL_TASKS_ON_TIME], [IIPP_APPEARED], [IIPP_COMPLETE], [IIPP_ON_TIME],
        [LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_APPEARED], [LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_COMPLETE], [LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_ON_TIME],
        [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_APPEARED], [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_CANNOT_DO],
        [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETE], [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE],
        [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETION_TIMING_PERCENTAGE],
        [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_INCLUDING_CANNOT_DO_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE],
        [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_INCOMPLETE], [MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_ON_TIME],
        [PM_NAME], [RAM_NAME], [RM_NAME], [RSM_NAME], [RVP_NAME]
    )
    SELECT
        d.[DATE_KEY],
        s.[PROPERTY_KEY], s.[PROPERTY_NAME], s.[BONUS_PM_SCORE], s.[BONUS_MS_SCORE],
        s.[ENTITY_NUMBER], s.[ALL_TASKS_APPEARED], s.[ALL_TASKS_CANNOT_DO], s.[ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE],
        s.[ALL_TASKS_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE], s.[ALL_TASKS_COMPLETION_TIMING_PERCENTAGE],
        s.[ALL_TASKS_INCLUDING_CANNOT_DO_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE], s.[ALL_TASKS_INCOMPLETE],
        s.[ALL_TASKS_ON_TIME], s.[IIPP_APPEARED], s.[IIPP_COMPLETE], s.[IIPP_ON_TIME],
        s.[LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_APPEARED], s.[LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_COMPLETE], s.[LEASE_FILE_AUDIT_ON_TIME],
        s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_APPEARED], s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_CANNOT_DO],
        s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETE], s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE],
        s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_COMPLETION_TIMING_PERCENTAGE],
        s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_INCLUDING_CANNOT_DO_COMPLETION_PERCENTAGE],
        s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_INCOMPLETE], s.[MAINTENANCE_CODE_TASKS_ON_TIME],
        s.[PM_NAME], s.[RAM_NAME], s.[RM_NAME], s.[RSM_NAME], s.[RVP_NAME]
    FROM [LEO_COMPLIANCE_EXPORT_0] s
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT [DATE_KEY] FROM [DATE_F] WHERE [FLAG_YESTERDAY] = 1) d;
END
