name: LEO_USERS_EXPORT_SP
transformations: TIMEZONE: CASE UPPER([TIME_ZONE]) WHEN 'EST' THEN 169 WHEN 'EASTERN' THEN 169 WHEN 'CST' THEN 94 WHEN 'CENTRAL' THEN 94 WHEN 'MST' THEN 105 WHEN 'MOUNTAIN' THEN 105 WHEN 'PST' THEN 147 WHEN 'PACIFIC' THEN 147 ELSE 169 END
Property_Assignments: CASE WHEN UPPER([EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]) = 'BROWNLEE' THEN RTRIM([COMBO]) + ',227' ELSE RTRIM([COMBO]) END
email: CASE WHEN E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = 9743 THEN COALESCE(E.[EMAIL], AD.[EMAIL]) ELSE COALESCE(E.[EMAIL], COALESCE(AD.[EMAIL], '--')) END

properties: CASE WHEN E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A42Z' THEN '233' WHEN E.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN COALESCE(EP.[Property_Assignments], '0') WHEN CAST(P.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT) > 1000 THEN 'ALL' ELSE EP.[Property_Assignments] END
email: CASE WHEN C.[email] = '' THEN '--' ELSE C.[email] END
role: CASE WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0UK' THEN 2 WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A2DK' THEN 23 WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A3UC' THEN 23 WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A519' THEN 7 ELSE R.[ROLE_ID] END
role: CASE WHEN [role] = 19 THEN 7 ELSE [role] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_USERS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.LEO_USERS_EXPORT.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LEO_USERS_EXPORT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_USERS_EXPORT];

    WITH [Emps] AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST], [EMAIL],
               [TITLE], [TITLE_PAYCOM], [TITLE_GROUP], [PROPERTY_KEY],
               [STATUS], [LOAD_TYPE], [SUPERVISOR_EMAIL]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE UPPER([STATUS]) <> 'TERMINATED'
          AND UPPER([LOAD_TYPE]) <> 'PRE-HIRE'
    ),
    [ADUsers] AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_ID],
               MAX([EMAIL]) AS [EMAIL],
               MAX([ENTITY_NUMBER]) AS [ENTITY_NUMBER]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_USERS_0]
        WHERE UPPER([STATUS]) = 'A'
        GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_ID]
    ),
    [Properties] AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
               CASE UPPER([TIME_ZONE])
                   WHEN 'EST' THEN 169 WHEN 'EASTERN' THEN 169
                   WHEN 'CST' THEN 94  WHEN 'CENTRAL' THEN 94
                   WHEN 'MST' THEN 105 WHEN 'MOUNTAIN' THEN 105
                   WHEN 'PST' THEN 147 WHEN 'PACIFIC' THEN 147
                   ELSE 169
               END AS [TIMEZONE],
               [ENTITY_NUMBER]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
    ),
    [EmpProperties] AS (
        SELECT [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
               CASE WHEN UPPER([EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST]) = 'BROWNLEE'
                    THEN RTRIM([COMBO]) + ',227'
                    ELSE RTRIM([COMBO])
               END AS [Property_Assignments]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_PROPERTY_ASSIGNMENTS_0]
    ),
    [Roles] AS (
        SELECT [ROLE_ID], UPPER([ROLE_NAME]) AS [ROLE_NAME]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_ROLES]
    ),
    [Combo1] AS (
        SELECT
            E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            E.[NAME_FIRST] AS [first_name],
            E.[NAME_LAST] AS [last_name],
            CASE WHEN E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = 9743 THEN COALESCE(E.[EMAIL], AD.[EMAIL])
                 ELSE COALESCE(E.[EMAIL], COALESCE(AD.[EMAIL], '--'))
            END AS [email],
            COALESCE(REPLACE(E.[TITLE_PAYCOM], ',', ' '), '--') AS [title],
            E.[TITLE_PAYCOM],
            E.[TITLE_GROUP],
            P.[TIMEZONE] AS [timezone],
            '' AS [portfolios],
            CASE
                WHEN E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A42Z' THEN '233'
                WHEN E.[TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN COALESCE(EP.[Property_Assignments], '0')
                WHEN CAST(P.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS INT) > 1000 THEN 'ALL'
                ELSE EP.[Property_Assignments]
            END AS [properties],
            E.[SUPERVISOR_EMAIL] AS [report_to],
            '' AS [notify_note_important],
            '' AS [notify_property_critical]
        FROM [Emps] E
        LEFT JOIN [ADUsers] AD ON E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = AD.[EMPLOYEE_ID]
        LEFT JOIN [Properties] P ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = E.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN [EmpProperties] EP ON EP.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
    ),
    [AddRoleID] AS (
        SELECT
            C.[first_name], C.[last_name],
            CASE WHEN C.[email] = '' THEN '--' ELSE C.[email] END AS [email],
            C.[title], C.[timezone],
            CASE
                WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0UK' THEN 2
                WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A2DK' THEN 23
                WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A3UC' THEN 23
                WHEN C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A519' THEN 7
                ELSE R.[ROLE_ID]
            END AS [role],
            C.[portfolios], C.[properties],
            C.[report_to], C.[notify_note_important], C.[notify_property_critical],
            C.[TITLE_PAYCOM]
        FROM [Combo1] C
        LEFT JOIN [Roles] R ON C.[TITLE_PAYCOM] = R.[ROLE_NAME]
        WHERE C.[TITLE_PAYCOM] <> 'UNKNOWN' OR C.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A0UK'
    ),
    [Emp_Output] AS (
        SELECT [first_name], [last_name], [email], [title], [timezone],
               CASE WHEN [role] = 19 THEN 7 ELSE [role] END AS [role],
               [portfolios],
               '"' + [properties] + '"' AS [properties],
               [report_to], [notify_note_important], [notify_property_critical]
        FROM [AddRoleID]
        WHERE [properties] IS NOT NULL AND [email] <> '--'
    ),
    [DummyUser] AS (
        SELECT
            'PEAKMADE' AS [first_name], 'TRAINING' AS [last_name],
            'peakmadetraining@peakmade.com' AS [email],
            'PEAKMADE TRAINING' AS [title],
            [timezone], [role], [portfolios], [properties],
            'ssoller@peakmade.com' AS [report_to],
            [notify_note_important], [notify_property_critical]
        FROM [Emp_Output]
        WHERE [title] = 'PRESIDENT'
    ),
    [FinalEmps] AS (
        SELECT * FROM [Emp_Output]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT * FROM [DummyUser]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEO_USERS_EXPORT]
        ([FIRST_NAME], [LAST_NAME], [EMAIL], [TITLE], [TIMEZONE],
         [ROLE], [PORTFOLIOS], [PROPERTIES], [REPORT_TO],
         [NOTIFY_NOTE_IMPORTANT], [NOTIFY_PROPERTY_CRITICAL])
    SELECT [first_name], [last_name], [email], [title], [timezone],
           [role], [portfolios], [properties], [report_to],
           [notify_note_important], [notify_property_critical]
    FROM [FinalEmps];
END

name: LOAD_EMPLOYEE_METRICS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_PROD2.dbo.EMPLOYEES, WH_PROD2.dbo.LEASE_AGG into WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_METRICS (cross-database).
sql:
/* ==============================================================================================================
   SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
   ============================================================================================================== */
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[LOAD_EMPLOYEE_METRICS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @JobName VARCHAR(100) = 'prc_Load_EMPLOYEE_METRICS';
    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    
    DECLARE @DateKeyToday INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @FixedAY INT = 2025; 

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

            -- 1. Truncate Target
            TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS];

            -- 2. CTEs for Transformations
            WITH CTE_Emps AS (
                SELECT 
                    [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST], [LOCATION], 
                    [CATEGORY], [DEPARTMENT], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
                FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[EMPLOYEES]
                WHERE [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
            ),
            CTE_MetricColumns AS (
                -- This CTE creates the structure and generates the "Virtual Columns" as placeholders
                SELECT 
                    @DateKeyToday AS [DATE_KEY],
                    CAST([EMPLOYEE_CODE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                    CAST([EMAIL] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMAIL],
                    CAST([NAME_FIRST] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [NAME_FIRST],
                    CAST([NAME_LAST] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [NAME_LAST],
                    CAST([LOCATION] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [LOCATION],
                    CAST([CATEGORY] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [CATEGORY],
                    CAST([DEPARTMENT] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [DEPARTMENT],
                    [FLAG_TERMINATED],
                    [PROPERTY_KEY],
                    CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
                    
                    -- VIRTUAL COLUMNS CREATION (Initialized as NULL)
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_1], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_1],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_2], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_2],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_3], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_3],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_4], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_4],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_5], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_5],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_6], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_6],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_7], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_7],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_8], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_8],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_9], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_9],
                    CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_10], CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_LABEL_10]
                FROM CTE_Emps
                WHERE [EMPLOYEE_CODE] <> '0000'
            ),
            CTE_LeaseAgg AS (
                SELECT 
                    L.[DATE_KEY], L.[AY], L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                    SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
                FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG] L
                INNER JOIN [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES] D ON L.[DATE_KEY] = D.[DATE_KEY]
                WHERE D.[RELATIVE_DAY] = -1
                GROUP BY L.[DATE_KEY], L.[AY], L.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            ),
            CTE_Properties AS (
                SELECT 
                    [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                    1 AS [COUNT], [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                    [RVP_EMP_CODE], [RVP_NAME],
                    [RM_EMP_CODE], [RM_NAME],
                    [RSM_EMP_CODE], [RSM_NAME],
                    [RAM_EMP_CODE], [RAM_NAME],
                    [LIST_TYPE]
                FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY]
                WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
                  AND [FLAG_RETAIL] = 0 
                  AND [LIST_STATUS] = 'REPORTABLE' 
                  AND [LIST_TYPE] = 'STUDENT' 
                  AND [LIST_MANAGED] = 'MANAGED'
            ),
            CTE_BaseMetrics1 AS (
                SELECT 
                    @DateKeyToday AS [DATE_KEY], @FixedAY AS [AY],
                    P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME], P.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                    P.[RVP_EMP_CODE], P.[RVP_NAME],
                    P.[RM_EMP_CODE], P.[RM_NAME],
                    P.[RSM_EMP_CODE], P.[RSM_NAME],
                    P.[RAM_EMP_CODE], P.[RAM_NAME],
                    SUM(P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) AS [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                    SUM(P.[COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
                    SUM(ISNULL(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], 0)) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
                FROM CTE_Properties P
                LEFT JOIN CTE_LeaseAgg L ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = L.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                WHERE P.[LIST_TYPE] = 'STUDENT'
                GROUP BY 
                    P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME], P.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                    P.[RVP_EMP_CODE], P.[RVP_NAME],
                    P.[RM_EMP_CODE], P.[RM_NAME],
                    P.[RSM_EMP_CODE], P.[RSM_NAME],
                    P.[RAM_EMP_CODE], P.[RAM_NAME],
                    P.[LIST_TYPE]
            ),
            CTE_Merge AS (
                SELECT 'RVP' AS [METRIC_LEVEL], [RVP_EMP_CODE] AS [EMP_CODE], [RVP_NAME] AS [NAME],
                    SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) AS [BED_COUNT_COMPILED], SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT], SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1 WHERE [RVP_EMP_CODE] IS NOT NULL AND [RVP_EMP_CODE] <> '0000'
                GROUP BY [RVP_EMP_CODE], [RVP_NAME]
                UNION ALL
                SELECT 'RM', [RM_EMP_CODE], [RM_NAME], SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]), SUM([COUNT]), SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL])
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1 WHERE [RM_EMP_CODE] IS NOT NULL AND [RM_EMP_CODE] <> '0000'
                GROUP BY [RM_EMP_CODE], [RM_NAME]
                UNION ALL
                SELECT 'RMLS', [RSM_EMP_CODE], [RSM_NAME], SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]), SUM([COUNT]), SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL])
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1 WHERE [RSM_EMP_CODE] IS NOT NULL AND [RSM_EMP_CODE] <> '0000'
                GROUP BY [RSM_EMP_CODE], [RSM_NAME]
                UNION ALL
                SELECT 'RAM', [RAM_EMP_CODE], [RAM_NAME], SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]), SUM([COUNT]), SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL])
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1 WHERE [RAM_EMP_CODE] IS NOT NULL AND [RAM_EMP_CODE] <> '0000'
                GROUP BY [RAM_EMP_CODE], [RAM_NAME]
            ),
            CTE_Calcs_Roles AS (
                SELECT 
                    [METRIC_LEVEL], [EMP_CODE], [COUNT],
                    [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] AS [Complete_Leases],
                    CAST(CAST(ROUND((CAST([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] AS FLOAT) / NULLIF([BED_COUNT_COMPILED], 0)) * 100.0, 1) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '%' AS [Complete_Leases_%]
                FROM CTE_Merge
            ),
            CTE_Calcs_Portfolio AS (
                SELECT 
                    'PORTFOLIO' AS [METRIC_LEVEL],
                    SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
                    SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [Complete_Leases],
                    CAST(CAST(ROUND((CAST(SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]), 0)) * 100.0, 1) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '%' AS [Complete_Leases_%]
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1
            ),
            CTE_Calcs_Property AS (
                SELECT 
                    'PROPERTY' AS [METRIC_LEVEL], [PROPERTY_KEY],
                    SUM([COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
                    SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [Complete_Leases],
                    CAST(CAST(ROUND((CAST(SUM([FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM([BED_COUNT_COMPILED]), 0)) * 100.0, 1) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS VARCHAR(20)) + '%' AS [Complete_Leases_%]
                FROM CTE_BaseMetrics1
                GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
            ),
            CTE_GraceHill AS (
                SELECT 
                    CAST([EMPLOYEE_CODE] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                    [COMPLIANCE_PCT]
                FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[GRACEHILL_COMPLIANCE_SUMMARY_IMPORT]
            )

            -- 3. Final Integration
            INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_METRICS] (
                [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMAIL], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST], [LOCATION], [CATEGORY],
                [PROPERTY_COUNT], [DEPARTMENT], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [METRIC_LEVEL], [M], [M_LABEL], [M_1], [M_LABEL_1], [M_2], [M_LABEL_2], 
                [M_3], [M_LABEL_3], [M_4], [M_LABEL_4], [M_5], [M_LABEL_5], 
                [M_6], [M_LABEL_6], [M_7], [M_LABEL_7], [M_8], [M_LABEL_8], 
                [M_9], [M_LABEL_9], [M_10], [M_LABEL_10], [LAST_RUN_DT]
            )
            SELECT 
                M.[DATE_KEY],
                M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                M.[EMAIL],
                M.[NAME_FIRST],
                M.[NAME_LAST],
                M.[LOCATION],
                M.[CATEGORY],
                
                -- WATERFALL: Count
                ISNULL(C.[COUNT], 
                    ISNULL(
                        CASE WHEN M.[PROPERTY_KEY] >= 5000 AND M.[PROPERTY_KEY] < 6000 THEN CP.[COUNT] ELSE NULL END, 
                        CPR.[COUNT]
                    )
                ) AS [PROPERTY_COUNT],
                
                M.[DEPARTMENT],
                M.[FLAG_TERMINATED],
                M.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                M.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                
                -- WATERFALL: Metric Level
                ISNULL(C.[METRIC_LEVEL], 
                    ISNULL(
                        CASE WHEN M.[PROPERTY_KEY] >= 5000 AND M.[PROPERTY_KEY] < 6000 THEN CP.[METRIC_LEVEL] ELSE NULL END, 
                        CPR.[METRIC_LEVEL]
                    )
                ) AS [METRIC_LEVEL],
                
                M.[M],
                M.[M_LABEL],
                
                -- M_1 (Complete Leases) Waterfall
                CAST(ISNULL(C.[Complete_Leases], 
                    ISNULL(
                        CASE WHEN M.[PROPERTY_KEY] >= 5000 AND M.[PROPERTY_KEY] < 6000 THEN CP.[Complete_Leases] ELSE NULL END, 
                        CPR.[Complete_Leases]
                    )
                ) AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [M_1],
                ISNULL(ISNULL(M.[M_LABEL_1], 'COMPLETE LEASES'), 'COMPLETE LEASES') AS [M_LABEL_1],
                
                -- M_2 (Complete Leases %) Waterfall
                ISNULL(C.[Complete_Leases_%], 
                    ISNULL(
                        CASE WHEN M.[PROPERTY_KEY] >= 5000 AND M.[PROPERTY_KEY] < 6000 THEN CP.[Complete_Leases_%] ELSE NULL END, 
                        CPR.[Complete_Leases_%]
                    )
                ) AS [M_2],
                ISNULL(ISNULL(M.[M_LABEL_2], 'COMPLETE LEASES %'), 'COMPLETE LEASES %') AS [M_LABEL_2],
                
                -- M_3 (GraceHill Compliance)
                CAST(GH.[COMPLIANCE_PCT] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '%' AS [M_3],
                'Your Training Compliance' AS [M_LABEL_3],
                
                M.[M_4], M.[M_LABEL_4],
                M.[M_5], M.[M_LABEL_5],
                M.[M_6], M.[M_LABEL_6],
                M.[M_7], M.[M_LABEL_7],
                M.[M_8], M.[M_LABEL_8],
                M.[M_9], M.[M_LABEL_9],
                M.[M_10], M.[M_LABEL_10],
                
                SYSDATETIME()

            FROM CTE_MetricColumns M
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Calcs_Roles C ON C.[EMP_CODE] = M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            CROSS JOIN CTE_Calcs_Portfolio CP
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Calcs_Property CPR ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = CPR.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            LEFT JOIN CTE_GraceHill GH ON GH.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: LOAD_GIFT_CARDS_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_GIFT_CARD: CASE WHEN A.[Gift_Card_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE: CASE WHEN A.[Record_count] > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
GIFT_CARD_NAME: CASE WHEN A.[Record_count] > 1 THEN 'MULTIPLE' ELSE A.[GIFT_CARD_NAME] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_LEASE_ASSOCIATIONS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SPECIALS into WH_STAGING.dbo.GIFT_CARDS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[LOAD_GIFT_CARDS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GIFT_CARDS_0];

        -- 2. Transform and Load via CTEs
        WITH [CTE_LA] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: LA
            -- LOGIC UPDATE: Columns mapped to actual ODS schema (DELETED_ON, CREATED_ON)
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [AR_ORIGIN_ID],
                [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
                [AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
                -- Derive Integer Date (YYYYMMDD) from CREATED_ON
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [CREATED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [CREATED_ON_DATE],
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [CREATED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                CAST([CREATED_ON] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_ASSOCIATIONS]
            WHERE [AR_ORIGIN_ID] = 6 
              AND [DELETED_ON] IS NULL  -- Corrected from DELETED_ON_DATETIME
              AND NOT ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = 17440157 AND [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID] = 8212546)
              AND NOT ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = 17443453 AND [AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID] = 8213488)
        ),
        [CTE_Specials] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: Specials
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [GIFT_VALUE],
                CAST([NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [NAME],
                CAST(SUBSTRING(ISNULL([NOTES],''), 1, 250) AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [NOTES]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SPECIALS]
            WHERE ISNULL([GIFT_VALUE], 0.00) > 0.00
        ),
        [CTE_Leases] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: Leases
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
                [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_LAST],
                [ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
        ),
        [CTE_Combo] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: Combo
            -- Logic: Join Leases -> LA -> Specials
            SELECT 
                Leases.[PROPERTY_ID],
                Leases.[ID] AS [LEASE_ID],
                LA.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                LA.[ID] AS [Lease_Association_ID],
                LA.[AR_ORIGIN_ID],
                LA.[AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID],
                LA.[AR_ORIGIN_REFERENCE_ID],
                LA.[CREATED_ON_DATE] AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE],
                LA.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                LA.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
                Specials.[NAME] AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
                Specials.[GIFT_VALUE] AS [Gift_Card_VALUE],
                Specials.[NOTES],
                1 AS [Record_count],
                Specials.[ID] AS [Specials_ID]
            FROM [CTE_Leases] AS Leases
            INNER JOIN [CTE_LA] AS LA 
                ON LA.[LEASE_ID] = Leases.[ID]
            INNER JOIN [CTE_Specials] AS Specials 
                ON Specials.[ID] = LA.[AR_ORIGIN_OBJECT_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Distincts] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: Distincts
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                MAX([Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE]) AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE],
                MAX([Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATEID]) AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
                [Gift_Card_VALUE],
                [Record_count],
                [Specials_ID]
            FROM [CTE_Combo]
            GROUP BY 
                [LEASE_ID], 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], 
                [GIFT_CARD_NAME], 
                [Gift_Card_VALUE], 
                [Record_count], 
                [Specials_ID], 
                [PROPERTY_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_ApplyKey] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: ApplyKey
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                MAX([Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE]) AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE],
                MAX([Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATEID]) AS [Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
                CAST(MAX([GIFT_CARD_NAME]) AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
                SUM([Gift_Card_VALUE]) AS [Gift_Card_VALUE],
                SUM([Record_count]) AS [Record_count]
            FROM [CTE_Distincts]
            GROUP BY 
                [LEASE_ID], 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], 
                [PROPERTY_ID]
        ),
        [CTE_Properties] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: Properties
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),
        [CTE_Final] AS (
            -- Mapped from View: MultipleRenamer
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                CAST(P.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(1000)) AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                A.[LEASE_ID],
                A.[Gift_Card_CREATED_ON_DATE] AS [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],
                CASE WHEN A.[Gift_Card_VALUE] > 0.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
                CASE WHEN A.[Record_count] > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
                A.[Record_count] AS [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
                CASE 
                    WHEN A.[Record_count] > 1 THEN 'MULTIPLE' 
                    ELSE A.[GIFT_CARD_NAME] 
                END AS [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
                A.[Gift_Card_VALUE] AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT]
            FROM [CTE_ApplyKey] A
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [CTE_Properties] P 
                ON A.[PROPERTY_ID] = P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[GIFT_CARDS_0] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],
            [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
            [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
            [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
            [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [DATE_GIFT_CARD_CREATED],
            [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
            [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
            [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
            [GIFT_CARD_NAME],
            [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_Final];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

-- Generated from ATL: Maintenance_Requests_0_AL
--
-- Target:
