--
-- ATL conversions:
--   decode(cond, t, f)            -> CASE WHEN cond THEN t ELSE f END
--   date_diff(a, b, 'M')          -> DATEDIFF(MINUTE, a, b)
--   previous_row_value(col)       -> LEAD(col) OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY LOG_ID ASC)
--   is_group_changed(col)         -> handled via LEAD returning NULL for last row in group
--   substr(col, 1, 4)             -> LEFT(CAST(col AS VARCHAR(8)), 4)
--   __SAP_INNER_JOIN              -> INNER JOIN
--   LOAD TABLE (drop/recreate)    -> TRUNCATE + INSERT

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_AL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Truncate/Load
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_AL];

    ;WITH
    -- Property: non-subproperty, non-dispositioned properties
    Property_CTE AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
          AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
    ),

    -- Log: maintenance request log entries
    Log_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [ID]                           AS [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [OLD_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            [OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            [OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATE],
            [CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            [UPDATED_BY]                   AS [STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS]
        WHERE [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID] >= 4826088
    ),

    -- Requests: maintenance requests created since 2019
    Requests_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [ID]                    AS [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATE]       AS [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            [CREATED_ON_DATEID]     AS [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATETIME]   AS [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS]
        WHERE [CREATED_ON_DATE] >= 20190101
    ),

    -- StatusTypes: lookup table
    StatusTypes_CTE AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [NAME] AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPES]
    ),

    -- Status: lookup table
    Status_CTE AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID], [NAME] AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES]
    ),

    -- Priorities: lookup table
    Priorities_CTE AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID], [NAME] AS [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME],
               [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_TYPE_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITIES]
    ),

    -- Join: all sources combined
    Join_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            l.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            l.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            l.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            p.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME],
            p.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_TYPE_ID],
            l.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            s.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME],
            l.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            st.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME],
            l.[OLD_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            l.[OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            l.[OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            l.[CREATED_ON_DATE],
            l.[CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            l.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            r.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            r.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            r.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            l.[STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM Log_CTE l
        INNER JOIN Status_CTE s       ON s.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID]       = l.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID]
        INNER JOIN StatusTypes_CTE st ON st.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID]  = l.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID]
        INNER JOIN Requests_CTE r     ON r.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]       = l.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
        INNER JOIN Priorities_CTE p   ON p.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID]      = l.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID]
        INNER JOIN Property_CTE prop  ON prop.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]         = l.[PROPERTY_ID]
                                     AND prop.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]         = r.[PROPERTY_ID]
    ),

    -- StatusEnd: uses LEAD to assign end dates (LEAD within each request, ordered by LOG_ID ASC).
    -- LEAD = NULL for the most recent log entry (still active).
    -- ATL equivalent: previous_row_value in DESC order = LEAD in ASC order.
    -- IS_GROUP_CHANGED=1 (first row in DESC order) = LEAD IS NULL (last row in ASC order).
    StatusEnd_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091 THEN [CREATED_ON_DATE]     ELSE NULL END AS [DATE_ON_HOLD],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1  THEN [CREATED_ON_DATE]    ELSE NULL END AS [DATE_OPEN],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091 THEN [CREATED_ON_DATEID]   ELSE NULL END AS [DATEID_ON_HOLD],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1  THEN [CREATED_ON_DATEID]  ELSE NULL END AS [DATEID_OPEN],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091 THEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] ELSE NULL END AS [DATETIME_ON_HOLD],
            CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1  THEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME]ELSE NULL END AS [DATETIME_OPEN],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_TYPE_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME],
            [CREATED_ON_DATE]       AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN],
            [CREATED_ON_DATEID]     AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN],
            [CREATED_ON_DATETIME]   AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN],
            -- LEAD gives NULL for the most recent (highest LOG_ID) entry = still active
            LEAD([CREATED_ON_DATE]) OVER (
                PARTITION BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
                ORDER BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID] ASC
            ) AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END],
            LEAD([CREATED_ON_DATEID]) OVER (
                PARTITION BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
                ORDER BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID] ASC
            ) AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END],
            LEAD([CREATED_ON_DATETIME]) OVER (
                PARTITION BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
                ORDER BY [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID] ASC
            ) AS [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END],
            [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE],
            [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATEID],
            [REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            [STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM Join_CTE
    ),

    -- OrderDateReverse: LAG on DATE_KEY DESC to get "yesterday" values
    OrderDateReverse_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_TIME], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            LAG([DATE_KEY])  OVER (ORDER BY [DATE_KEY] DESC) AS [DATE_YESTERDAY],
            LAG([DATE_ID])   OVER (ORDER BY [DATE_KEY] DESC) AS [DATE_ID_YESTERDAY],
            LAG([DATE_TIME]) OVER (ORDER BY [DATE_KEY] DESC) AS [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
    ),

    -- FilterYesterday: the single row where FLAG_YESTERDAY=1 (today's date with yesterday's values)
    FilterYesterday_CTE AS (
        SELECT [DATE_KEY], [DATE_YESTERDAY], [DATE_ID_YESTERDAY], [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
        FROM OrderDateReverse_CTE
        WHERE [FLAG_YESTERDAY] = 1
    ),

    -- Dates: DATE_F INNER JOIN FilterYesterday ON DATE_KEY â€” returns 1 row (today)
    Dates_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            d.[DATE_KEY],
            d.[DATE_ID],
            d.[DATE_TIME],
            fy.[DATE_YESTERDAY],
            fy.[DATE_ID_YESTERDAY]   AS [DATEID_YESTERDAY],
            fy.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY],
            d.[FLAG_HOLIDAY],
            d.[FLAG_WEEKDAY],
            d.[FLAG_WEEKEND],
            d.[FLAG_WORKDAY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] d
        INNER JOIN FilterYesterday_CTE fy ON fy.[DATE_KEY] = d.[DATE_KEY]
    ),

    -- JoinDate: CROSS JOIN StatusEnd Ã— Dates (1 row) WHERE DATE_KEY >= REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE.
    -- Computes derived date columns (DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD, DATE_LAST_OPEN, DATE_LAST_UPDATED, etc.)
    JoinDate_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            dt.[DATE_KEY],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            CAST(LEFT(CAST(se.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 4) AS INT) AS [CREATED_YEAR],
            se.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE]    AS [CREATED_ON_DATE],
            se.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AS [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            dt.[DATE_TIME]                  AS [CURRENT_DATETIME],
            dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY],
            dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY],
            dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY],
            dt.[FLAG_HOLIDAY],
            dt.[FLAG_WEEKDAY],
            dt.[FLAG_WEEKEND],
            dt.[FLAG_WORKDAY],
            -- DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD (STATUS_ID = 113091)
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            -- DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            -- DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            -- DATE_LAST_OPEN (STATUS_TYPE_ID = 1)
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATE_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATE_LAST_OPEN],
            -- DATEID_LAST_OPEN
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATEID_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATEID_LAST_OPEN],
            -- DATETIME_LAST_OPEN
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   IS NULL
                  THEN dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATETIME_LAST_OPEN],
            -- DATE_LAST_UPDATED (any status)
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
            -- DATEID_LAST_UPDATED
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATEID_LAST_UPDATED],
            -- DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED
            CASE
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < dt.[DATE_TIME]
                     AND se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END]   > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN]
                WHEN se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > dt.[DATE_TIME]
                  THEN NULL
                ELSE NULL
            END AS [DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED],
            -- Pass-through status columns
            se.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_TYPE_ID],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END],
            se.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END],
            se.[STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM StatusEnd_CTE se
        CROSS JOIN Dates_CTE dt
        WHERE dt.[DATE_KEY] >= se.[REQUEST_CREATED_ON_DATE]
    ),

    -- CalcMins: filter to requests created after 2024, compute MINUTES in the yesterday window
    CalcMins_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            [CREATED_ON_DATE],
            [CREATED_ON_DATETIME],
            [CURRENT_DATETIME],
            [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY],
            [DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD], [DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD], [DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            [DATE_LAST_OPEN],    [DATEID_LAST_OPEN],    [DATETIME_LAST_OPEN],
            [DATE_LAST_UPDATED], [DATEID_LAST_UPDATED], [DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED],
            [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID],   [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME],   [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_TYPE_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID],     [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN],   [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN],   [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END],     [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END],     [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END],
            [STATUS_UPDATED_BY],
            -- MINUTES: how many minutes this status was active during the yesterday window
            CASE
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] < [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] > [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] > [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [CURRENT_DATETIME])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] > [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] > [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [CURRENT_DATETIME])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                     AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL
                  THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN], [CURRENT_DATETIME])
                WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] > [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                  THEN 0
                ELSE 0
            END AS [MINUTES]
        FROM JoinDate_CTE
        WHERE [CREATED_YEAR] > 2024
    ),

    -- MakeDayRecord: GROUP BY DATE_KEY, MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID â€” aggregate all metrics
    MakeDayRecord_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            MAX([DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD])       AS [DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            MAX([DATE_LAST_OPEN])          AS [DATE_LAST_OPEN],
            MAX([DATE_LAST_UPDATED])       AS [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
            MAX([DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD])     AS [DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            MAX([DATEID_LAST_OPEN])        AS [DATEID_LAST_OPEN],
            MAX([DATEID_LAST_UPDATED])     AS [DATEID_LAST_UPDATED],
            MAX([DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD])   AS [DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            MAX([DATETIME_LAST_OPEN])      AS [DATETIME_LAST_OPEN],
            MAX([DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED])   AS [DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_HOLIDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440 ELSE 0 END)           AS [DAYS_HOLIDAY],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440.0 ELSE 0 END) AS [DAYS_ON_HOLD],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440.0 ELSE 0 END) AS [DAYS_OPEN],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WEEKDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440 ELSE 0 END)           AS [DAYS_WEEKDAY],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WEEKEND] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440 ELSE 0 END)           AS [DAYS_WEEKEND],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WORKDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] / 1440 ELSE 0 END)           AS [DAYS_WORKDAY],
            NULL                                                                           AS [FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_ON_HOLD],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_OPEN],
            NULL                                                                           AS [FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID] = 24525
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID] = 24523
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID] = 24524
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID] = 24534
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] >= [CURRENT_DATETIME] OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL)
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 4
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 3
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [CREATED_ON_DATETIME] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] >= [DATE_TIME_YESTERDAY]
                          AND [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] < [CURRENT_DATETIME]
                     THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                                   AS [FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_HOLIDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)                  AS [MINUTES_HOLIDAY],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = 113091 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)    AS [MINUTES_ON_HOLD],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)    AS [MINUTES_OPEN],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WEEKDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)                  AS [MINUTES_WEEKDAY],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WEEKEND] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)                  AS [MINUTES_WEEKEND],
            SUM(CASE WHEN [FLAG_WORKDAY] = 1 THEN [MINUTES] ELSE 0 END)                  AS [MINUTES_WORKDAY]
        FROM CalcMins_CTE
        GROUP BY [DATE_KEY], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
    ),

    -- GroupByMaxLog: per (DATE_KEY, MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID), find the max log ID
    -- that is currently active (status began <= now, has not ended or ends after now)
    GroupByMaxLog_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            MAX([MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID]) AS [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID]
        FROM CalcMins_CTE
        WHERE [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN] <= [CURRENT_DATETIME]
          AND ([MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] IS NULL OR [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END] > [CURRENT_DATETIME])
        GROUP BY [DATE_KEY], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
    ),

    -- StatusPriority: current status and priority info from CalcMins
    StatusPriority_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_NAME]      AS [PRIORITY],
            [MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID]        AS [PRIORITY_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_NAME]        AS [STATUS],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID]          AS [STATUS_ID],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_NAME]   AS [STATUS_TYPE],
            [MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID]     AS [STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            [STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM CalcMins_CTE
    ),

    -- JoinByLog: join GroupByMaxLog to StatusPriority to get current status per (DATE_KEY, REQUEST_ID)
    JoinByLog_CTE AS (
        SELECT
            sp.[DATE_KEY],
            sp.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            sp.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID],
            sp.[PRIORITY],
            sp.[PRIORITY_ID],
            sp.[STATUS],
            sp.[STATUS_ID],
            sp.[STATUS_TYPE],
            sp.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            sp.[STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
        FROM GroupByMaxLog_CTE gml
        INNER JOIN StatusPriority_CTE sp
            ON sp.[DATE_KEY]                    = gml.[DATE_KEY]
           AND sp.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]       = gml.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
           AND sp.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID]   = gml.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID]
    )

    -- FinalJoin: MakeDayRecord INNER JOIN JoinByLog â†’ INSERT into target
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_AL] (
        [DATE_KEY], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
        [DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD], [DATE_LAST_OPEN], [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
        [DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD], [DATEID_LAST_OPEN], [DATEID_LAST_UPDATED],
        [DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD], [DATETIME_LAST_OPEN], [DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED],
        [DAYS_HOLIDAY], [DAYS_ON_HOLD], [DAYS_OPEN],
        [DAYS_WEEKDAY], [DAYS_WEEKEND], [DAYS_WORKDAY],
        [FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS],
        [FLAG_ON_HOLD], [FLAG_OPEN], [FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
        [FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH], [FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW], [FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM], [FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
        [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
        [FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN], [FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
        [MINUTES_HOLIDAY], [MINUTES_ON_HOLD], [MINUTES_OPEN],
        [MINUTES_WEEKDAY], [MINUTES_WEEKEND], [MINUTES_WORKDAY],
        [PRIORITY], [PRIORITY_ID], [STATUS], [STATUS_ID],
        [STATUS_TYPE], [STATUS_TYPE_ID], [STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
    )
    SELECT
        m.[DATE_KEY],                    m.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
        m.[DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD],           m.[DATE_LAST_OPEN],             m.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
        m.[DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD],         m.[DATEID_LAST_OPEN],           m.[DATEID_LAST_UPDATED],
        m.[DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD],       m.[DATETIME_LAST_OPEN],         m.[DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED],
        m.[DAYS_HOLIDAY],                m.[DAYS_ON_HOLD],               m.[DAYS_OPEN],
        m.[DAYS_WEEKDAY],                m.[DAYS_WEEKEND],               m.[DAYS_WORKDAY],
        m.[FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS],
        m.[FLAG_ON_HOLD],                m.[FLAG_OPEN],                  m.[FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
        m.[FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH],          m.[FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW],          m.[FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM],  m.[FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
        m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED],    m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED],   m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
        m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD],      m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN],        m.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
        m.[MINUTES_HOLIDAY],             m.[MINUTES_ON_HOLD],            m.[MINUTES_OPEN],
        m.[MINUTES_WEEKDAY],             m.[MINUTES_WEEKEND],            m.[MINUTES_WORKDAY],
        j.[PRIORITY],                    j.[PRIORITY_ID],
        j.[STATUS],                      j.[STATUS_ID],
        j.[STATUS_TYPE],                 j.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
        j.[STATUS_UPDATED_BY]
    FROM MakeDayRecord_CTE m
    INNER JOIN JoinByLog_CTE j
        ON j.[DATE_KEY]                = m.[DATE_KEY]
       AND j.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]  = m.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID];

END;

name: MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL_SP
transformations: DATE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END
DATE_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL AND logs.OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE 0 END
DATE_SUSPENDED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = 113080 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END
DATEID_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL END
DATEID_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL END
DATEID_CREATED: CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL AND logs.OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE 0 END
DATETIME_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_CREATED: CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SUSPENDED: CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = 113080 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

IS_GROUP_CHANGED: CASE WHEN LAG(logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID) OVER ( ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC ) IS NULL OR LAG(logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID) OVER ( ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC ) <> logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END: CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN END
MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END: CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN END
MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END: CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN END
DATE_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATE_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END
DATE_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATE_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END
DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATE_CREATED ELSE NULL END
DATEID_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATEID_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END
DATEID_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATEID_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END
DATEID_CREATED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATEID_CREATED ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATETIME_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATETIME_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END
DATETIME_CREATED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATETIME_CREATED ELSE NULL END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN g.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN g.FLAG_COMPLETED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_SUSPENDED: CASE WHEN g.FLAG_SUSPENDED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_SUSPENDED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TODAY_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TODAY_COMPLETED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TODAY_CREATED: CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_CREATED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_DELETED: CASE WHEN req.DELETED_ON_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS, WH_ODS.dbo.E_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL];

    ;WITH StatusCTE AS (
        SELECT
            logs.ID AS MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID,
            logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID,
            logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID,
            logs.OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID,
            logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID,
            logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
            logs.CREATED_ON_DATE,
            logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID,
            logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END AS DATE_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END AS DATE_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL AND logs.OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE 0 END AS DATE_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = 113080 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATE ELSE NULL END AS DATE_SUSPENDED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL END AS DATEID_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE NULL END AS DATEID_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL AND logs.OLD_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID ELSE 0 END AS DATEID_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN logs.PRIOR_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID IS NULL THEN logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = 113080 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            CASE WHEN LAG(logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID) OVER (
                ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC
            ) IS NULL OR LAG(logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID) OVER (
                ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC
            ) <> logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_GROUP_CHANGED,
            LAG(logs.CREATED_ON_DATE) OVER (
                ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC
            ) AS PREV_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN,
            LAG(logs.CREATED_ON_DATEID) OVER (
                ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC
            ) AS PREV_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN,
            LAG(logs.CREATED_ON_DATETIME) OVER (
                ORDER BY logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID ASC, logs.ID DESC, logs.CREATED_ON_DATE DESC
            ) AS PREV_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS] logs
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPES] styp ON logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = styp.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES] stat ON logs.MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = stat.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITIES] pri ON logs.MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID = pri.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf1 ON logs.PROPERTY_ID = pf1.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
        WHERE pf1.FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
          AND pf1.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0
          AND logs.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID >= 4826088
    ),
    StatusEndCTE AS (
        SELECT
            MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID, MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOG_ID,
            DATE_CANCELLED, DATE_COMPLETED, DATE_CREATED, DATE_SUSPENDED,
            DATEID_CANCELLED, DATEID_COMPLETED, DATEID_CREATED,
            DATETIME_CANCELLED, DATETIME_COMPLETED, DATETIME_CREATED,
            FLAG_CANCELLED, FLAG_COMPLETED, FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID, MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
            CREATED_ON_DATE AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN,
            CREATED_ON_DATEID AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN,
            CREATED_ON_DATETIME AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN,
            CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATE_BEGIN END AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATE_END,
            CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATEID_BEGIN END AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATEID_END,
            CASE WHEN IS_GROUP_CHANGED = 1 THEN NULL ELSE PREV_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN END AS MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END
        FROM StatusCTE
    ),
    GroupByCTE AS (
        SELECT
            MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID,
            MAX(DATE_CANCELLED) AS DATE_CANCELLED,
            MAX(DATE_COMPLETED) AS DATE_COMPLETED,
            MAX(DATE_CREATED) AS DATE_CREATED,
            MAX(DATE_SUSPENDED) AS DATE_SUSPENDED,
            MAX(DATEID_CANCELLED) AS DATEID_CANCELLED,
            MAX(DATEID_COMPLETED) AS DATEID_COMPLETED,
            MAX(DATEID_CREATED) AS DATEID_CREATED,
            MAX(DATETIME_CANCELLED) AS DATETIME_CANCELLED,
            MAX(DATETIME_COMPLETED) AS DATETIME_COMPLETED,
            MAX(DATETIME_CREATED) AS DATETIME_CREATED,
            SUM(FLAG_CANCELLED) AS FLAG_CANCELLED,
            SUM(FLAG_COMPLETED) AS FLAG_COMPLETED,
            SUM(FLAG_SUSPENDED) AS FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            SUM(CASE WHEN MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID = 113091
                     THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN, MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END)
                     ELSE 0 END) AS MINUTES_ON_HOLD,
            SUM(CASE WHEN MAINTENANCE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = 1
                     THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_BEGIN, MAINTENANCE_STATUS_DATETIME_END)
                     ELSE 0 END) AS MINUTES_OPEN
        FROM StatusEndCTE
        GROUP BY MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID
    ),
    DatesCTE AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, FLAG_HOLIDAY, FLAG_WEEKDAY, FLAG_WEEKEND, FLAG_WORKDAY, FLAG_YESTERDAY
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        WHERE RELATIVE_YEAR IN (-2, -1, 0) AND FLAG_YESTERDAY = 1
    ),
    JoinDateCTE AS (
        SELECT
            d.DATE_KEY, g.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID,
            CAST(LEFT(CAST(g.DATE_CREATED AS VARCHAR(10)), 4) AS INT) AS CREATED_YEAR,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATE_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END AS DATE_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATE_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END AS DATE_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATE_CREATED ELSE NULL END AS DATE_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATEID_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END AS DATEID_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATEID_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END AS DATEID_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATEID_CREATED ELSE NULL END AS DATEID_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN g.DATETIME_CANCELLED ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN g.DATETIME_COMPLETED ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED THEN g.DATETIME_CREATED ELSE NULL END AS DATETIME_CREATED,
            CASE WHEN g.FLAG_CANCELLED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN g.FLAG_COMPLETED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_COMPLETED,
            d.FLAG_HOLIDAY,
            CASE WHEN g.FLAG_SUSPENDED > 0 AND d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_SUSPENDED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_CANCELLED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TODAY_CANCELLED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_COMPLETED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TODAY_COMPLETED,
            CASE WHEN d.DATE_KEY = g.DATE_CREATED THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_TODAY_CREATED,
            d.FLAG_WEEKDAY, d.FLAG_WEEKEND, d.FLAG_WORKDAY, d.FLAG_YESTERDAY,
            g.MINUTES_ON_HOLD, g.MINUTES_OPEN
        FROM DatesCTE d
        CROSS JOIN GroupByCTE g
        WHERE d.DATE_KEY >= g.DATE_CREATED
    ),
    RequestsCTE AS (
        SELECT
            req.ID AS MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID,
            req.PROPERTY_BUILDING_ID AS BUILDING_ID,
            req.CREATED_BY, req.CUSTOMER_ID,
            req.DELETED_ON_DATE AS DATE_DELETED,
            req.DUE_DATE AS DATE_DUE,
            req.DUE_DATEID AS DATEID_DUE,
            req.DUE_DATETIME AS DATETIME_DUE,
            CASE WHEN req.DELETED_ON_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_DELETED,
            pf.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            req.LEASE_ID,
            mloc.NAME AS LOCATION,
            mloc.ID AS LOCATION_ID,
            ltyp.NAME AS LOCATION_TYPE,
            ltyp.ID AS LOCATION_TYPE_ID,
            mprob.DESCRIPTION AS PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION,
            mprob.ID AS PROBLEM_ID,
            ptyp.NAME AS PROBLEM_TYPE,
            ptyp.ID AS PROBLEM_TYPE_ID,
            pf.PROPERTY_KEY, pf.PROPERTY_NAME,
            rtyp.NAME AS REQUEST_TYPE, rtyp.ID AS REQUEST_TYPE_ID,
            ISNULL(det.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST + ' ' + det.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST, '--') AS REQUESTOR,
            ISNULL(det.MAIN_PHONE_NUMBER, '--') AS REQUESTOR_PHONE,
            ISNULL(det.UNIT_NUMBER, '--') AS UNIT_NUMBER,
            req.UNIT_SPACE_ID
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS] req
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_DETAILS] det ON req.ID = det.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_LOCATIONS] mloc ON mloc.ID = req.MAINTENANCE_LOCATION_ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_LOCATION_TYPES] ltyp ON mloc.MAINTENANCE_LOCATION_TYPE_ID = ltyp.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PROBLEMS] mprob ON req.MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_ID = mprob.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_TYPES] ptyp ON mprob.MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_TYPE_ID = ptyp.ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] pf ON req.PROPERTY_ID = pf.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPES] rtyp ON req.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPE_ID = rtyp.ID
        WHERE req.CREATED_ON_DATE >= 20190101
          AND pf.FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
          AND pf.FLAG_REPORTABLE = 1
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL] (
        [DATE_KEY], [MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID], [BUILDING_ID], [CREATED_BY], [CUSTOMER_ID],
        [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_COMPLETED], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_DELETED], [DATE_DUE],
        [DATEID_CANCELLED], [DATEID_COMPLETED], [DATEID_CREATED], [DATEID_DUE],
        [DATETIME_CANCELLED], [DATETIME_COMPLETED], [DATETIME_CREATED], [DATETIME_DUE],
        [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_COMPLETED], [FLAG_DELETED], [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
        [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_SUSPENDED], [FLAG_TODAY_CANCELLED], [FLAG_TODAY_COMPLETED],
        [FLAG_TODAY_CREATED], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
        [LEASE_ID], [LOCATION], [LOCATION_ID], [LOCATION_TYPE], [LOCATION_TYPE_ID],
        [MINUTES_ON_HOLD], [MINUTES_OPEN], [PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION], [PROBLEM_ID],
        [PROBLEM_TYPE], [PROBLEM_TYPE_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [REQUEST_TYPE], [REQUEST_TYPE_ID], [REQUESTOR], [REQUESTOR_PHONE],
        [UNIT_NUMBER], [UNIT_SPACE_ID]
    )
    SELECT
        jd.DATE_KEY, jd.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID, r.BUILDING_ID, r.CREATED_BY, r.CUSTOMER_ID,
        jd.DATE_CANCELLED, jd.DATE_COMPLETED, jd.DATE_CREATED, r.DATE_DELETED, r.DATE_DUE,
        jd.DATEID_CANCELLED, jd.DATEID_COMPLETED, jd.DATEID_CREATED, r.DATEID_DUE,
        jd.DATETIME_CANCELLED, jd.DATETIME_COMPLETED, jd.DATETIME_CREATED, r.DATETIME_DUE,
        jd.FLAG_CANCELLED, jd.FLAG_COMPLETED, r.FLAG_DELETED, r.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
        jd.FLAG_HOLIDAY, jd.FLAG_SUSPENDED, jd.FLAG_TODAY_CANCELLED, jd.FLAG_TODAY_COMPLETED,
        jd.FLAG_TODAY_CREATED, jd.FLAG_WEEKDAY, jd.FLAG_WEEKEND, jd.FLAG_WORKDAY, jd.FLAG_YESTERDAY,
        r.LEASE_ID, r.LOCATION, r.LOCATION_ID, r.LOCATION_TYPE, r.LOCATION_TYPE_ID,
        jd.MINUTES_ON_HOLD, jd.MINUTES_OPEN, r.PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION, r.PROBLEM_ID,
        r.PROBLEM_TYPE, r.PROBLEM_TYPE_ID, r.PROPERTY_KEY, r.PROPERTY_NAME,
        r.REQUEST_TYPE, r.REQUEST_TYPE_ID, r.REQUESTOR, r.REQUESTOR_PHONE,
        r.UNIT_NUMBER, r.UNIT_SPACE_ID
    FROM JoinDateCTE jd
    INNER JOIN RequestsCTE r ON jd.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID = r.MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID
    WHERE jd.CREATED_YEAR > 2024;

END

name: MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.UNITS_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL into WH_STAGING.dbo.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0];

        -- Step 2: Transform and Load Logic
        WITH [Floorplans_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [UNIT_ID], -- Updated from SPACE_ID
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F]
            WHERE [UNIT_ID] <> 0
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [UNIT_ID], [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0]
        SELECT 
            S.[DATE_KEY],
            S.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID],
            S.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            ISNULL(F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            S.[BUILDING_ID],
            1 AS [COUNT],
            S.[CREATED_BY],
            S.[CUSTOMER_ID],
            S.[DATE_CANCELLED],
            S.[DATE_COMPLETED],
            S.[DATE_CREATED],
            S.[DATE_DELETED],
            S.[DATE_DUE],
            A.[DATE_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            A.[DATE_LAST_OPEN],
            A.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
            S.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
            S.[DATEID_COMPLETED],
            S.[DATEID_CREATED],
            S.[DATEID_DUE],
            A.[DATEID_LAST_ON_HOLD],
            A.[DATEID_LAST_OPEN],
            A.[DATEID_LAST_UPDATED],
            TRY_CAST(S.[DATETIME_CANCELLED] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            TRY_CAST(S.[DATETIME_COMPLETED] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            TRY_CAST(S.[DATETIME_CREATED] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            S.[DATETIME_DUE],
            TRY_CAST(A.[DATETIME_LAST_ON_HOLD] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            TRY_CAST(A.[DATETIME_LAST_OPEN] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            TRY_CAST(A.[DATETIME_LAST_UPDATED] AS DATETIME2(3)),
            A.[DAYS_HOLIDAY],
            A.[DAYS_ON_HOLD],
            A.[DAYS_OPEN],
            A.[DAYS_WEEKDAY],
            A.[DAYS_WEEKEND],
            A.[DAYS_WORKDAY],
            S.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
            S.[FLAG_COMPLETED],
            A.[FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS],
            S.[FLAG_DELETED],
            S.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            S.[FLAG_HOLIDAY],
            A.[FLAG_ON_HOLD],
            A.[FLAG_OPEN],
            A.[FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION],
            A.[FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH],
            A.[FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW],
            A.[FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM],
            A.[FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD],
            S.[FLAG_SUSPENDED],
            S.[FLAG_WEEKDAY],
            S.[FLAG_WEEKEND],
            S.[FLAG_WORKDAY],
            S.[FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN],
            A.[FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED],
            S.[LEASE_ID],
            S.[LOCATION],
            S.[LOCATION_ID],
            S.[LOCATION_TYPE],
            S.[LOCATION_TYPE_ID],
            A.[MINUTES_HOLIDAY],
            A.[MINUTES_ON_HOLD],
            A.[MINUTES_OPEN],
            A.[MINUTES_WEEKDAY],
            A.[MINUTES_WEEKEND],
            A.[MINUTES_WORKDAY],
            A.[PRIORITY],
            A.[PRIORITY_ID],
            S.[PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION],
            S.[PROBLEM_ID],
            S.[PROBLEM_TYPE],
            S.[PROBLEM_TYPE_ID],
            S.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            S.[REQUEST_TYPE],
            S.[REQUEST_TYPE_ID],
            S.[REQUESTOR],
            S.[REQUESTOR_PHONE],
            A.[STATUS],
            A.[STATUS_ID],
            A.[STATUS_TYPE],
            A.[STATUS_TYPE_ID],
            A.[STATUS_UPDATED_BY],
            S.[UNIT_NUMBER],
            S.[UNIT_SPACE_ID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_SL] S
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_0_AL] A 
            ON A.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY] 
            AND A.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID] = S.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
        LEFT JOIN [Floorplans_CTE] F 
            ON F.[PROPERTY_KEY] = S.[PROPERTY_KEY] 
            AND F.[UNIT_ID] = S.[UNIT_SPACE_ID];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_FACTS_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        /* Target is STAGING2.DBO.MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F -> mapped to [WH_STAGING] */
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F];

        /* Load aggregated results */
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_AGG_F]
        (
            DATE_KEY,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            FLOORPLAN_KEY,
            COUNT,
            DAYS_HOLIDAY,
            DAYS_ON_HOLD,
            DAYS_OPEN,
            DAYS_WEEKDAY,
            DAYS_WEEKEND,
            DAYS_WORKDAY,
            FLAG_CANCELLED,
            FLAG_COMPLETED,
            FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS,
            FLAG_DELETED,
            FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            FLAG_HOLIDAY,
            FLAG_ON_HOLD,
            FLAG_OPEN,
            FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION,
            FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH,
            FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW,
            FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM,
            FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD,
            FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            FLAG_WEEKDAY,
            FLAG_WEEKEND,
            FLAG_WORKDAY,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_CREATED,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN,
            FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED,
            MINUTES_HOLIDAY,
            MINUTES_ON_HOLD,
            MINUTES_OPEN,
            MINUTES_WEEKDAY,
            MINUTES_WEEKEND,
            MINUTES_WORKDAY
        )
        SELECT
            SRC.DATE_KEY,
            SRC.PROPERTY_KEY,
            SRC.FLOORPLAN_KEY,

            SUM(SRC.COUNT)                                  AS COUNT,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_HOLIDAY)                           AS DAYS_HOLIDAY,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_ON_HOLD)                           AS DAYS_ON_HOLD,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_OPEN)                              AS DAYS_OPEN,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_WEEKDAY)                           AS DAYS_WEEKDAY,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_WEEKEND)                           AS DAYS_WEEKEND,
            SUM(SRC.DAYS_WORKDAY)                           AS DAYS_WORKDAY,

            SUM(SRC.FLAG_CANCELLED)                         AS FLAG_CANCELLED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_COMPLETED)                         AS FLAG_COMPLETED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS)         AS FLAG_COMPLETED_INCL_VIOLATIONS,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_DELETED)                           AS FLAG_DELETED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED)                     AS FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_HOLIDAY)                           AS FLAG_HOLIDAY,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_ON_HOLD)                           AS FLAG_ON_HOLD,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_OPEN)                              AS FLAG_OPEN,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION)               AS FLAG_OPEN_DAYS_VIOLATION,

            SUM(SRC.FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH)                     AS FLAG_PRIORITY_HIGH,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW)                      AS FLAG_PRIORITY_LOW,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM)                   AS FLAG_PRIORITY_MEDIUM,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD)                 AS FLAG_PRIORITY_STANDARD,

            SUM(SRC.FLAG_SUSPENDED)                         AS FLAG_SUSPENDED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_WEEKDAY)                           AS FLAG_WEEKDAY,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_WEEKEND)                           AS FLAG_WEEKEND,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_WORKDAY)                           AS FLAG_WORKDAY,

            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY)                         AS FLAG_YESTERDAY,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED)               AS FLAG_YESTERDAY_CANCELLED,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED)               AS FLAG_YESTERDAY_COMPLETED,

            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD)                 AS FLAG_YESTERDAY_ON_HOLD,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN)                    AS FLAG_YESTERDAY_OPEN,
            SUM(SRC.FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED)                 AS FLAG_YESTERDAY_UPDATED,

            /* "double" in ATL -> keep numeric; TRY_CAST for safety */
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_HOLIDAY AS FLOAT))     AS MINUTES_HOLIDAY,
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_ON_HOLD AS FLOAT))     AS MINUTES_ON_HOLD,
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_OPEN AS FLOAT))        AS MINUTES_OPEN,
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_WEEKDAY AS FLOAT))     AS MINUTES_WEEKDAY,
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_WEEKEND AS FLOAT))     AS MINUTES_WEEKEND,
            SUM(TRY_CAST(SRC.MINUTES_WORKDAY AS FLOAT))     AS MINUTES_WORKDAY
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS_FACTS_F] AS SRC
        GROUP BY
            SRC.DATE_KEY,
            SRC.PROPERTY_KEY,
            SRC.FLOORPLAN_KEY;

        /* XTEMP.DBO.MTEST1 load is DISREGARDED per mapping rules.
           If you want debug visibility, you can SELECT from the same source set

        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, @ErrSev, @ErrState);
    END CATCH
END;

                TRY_CAST(
                    CONCAT(
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 1, 4), '-', 
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 5, 2), '-', 
                        SUBSTRING(CAST([DATE_KEY] AS VARCHAR(10)), 7, 2)

            [Target].[DATE_KEY] = [Source].[DATE_KEY] AND

            [MINUTES_HOLIDAY], [MINUTES_ON_HOLD], [MINUTES_OPEN], [MINUTES_WEEKDAY], [MINUTES_WEEKEND],
            [MINUTES_WORKDAY], [PRIORITY], [PRIORITY_ID], [PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION], [PROBLEM_ID],
            [PROBLEM_TYPE], [PROBLEM_TYPE_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME], [REQUEST_TYPE], [REQUEST_TYPE_ID],

END;
