name: MANAGERS_0_SP
transformations: DEPARTMENT: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A4BN' THEN 'REGIONAL MANAGER' ELSE [DEPARTMENT] END

FLAG_RM: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IN ('A4BN', 'A0ZT', 'A06V') THEN 1 WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('REGIONAL MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF UNIVERSITY RELATIONS') AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF UNIVERSITY RELATIONS') THEN 1 WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_RVP: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT', 'SENIOR REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT') AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT', 'VICE PRESIDENT OF CANADIAN OPERATIONS', 'SENIOR REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

FLAG_RSM: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 1 WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('SALES & LEASING', 'REGIONAL SALES MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF SALES AND MARKETING') AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL SALES MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF SALES AND MARKETING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CONTROLLER: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'ACCOUNTING' AND [TITLE] IN ('CORPORATE CONTROLLER', 'PROPERTY CONTROLLER') THEN 1 WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'CONTROLLER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_PM: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' AND [TITLE] IN ('PROPERTY MANAGER', 'SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER') THEN 1 WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_AM: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' AND [TITLE] IN ('ASSISTANT MANAGER', 'SENIOR ASSISTANT MANAGER') THEN 1 WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LM: CASE WHEN [DEPARTMENT] LIKE '%LEASING MANAGER%' AND [TITLE] LIKE '%LEASING MANAGER%' THEN 1 WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'LEASING MANAGER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
NAME_FIRST: CASE WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'TAMERA' THEN 'TAMI' WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'SHAKEIA' THEN 'KIA' WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'GABRIELLE' THEN 'GABBY' ELSE [NAME_FIRST] END
TITLE: CASE WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A4BN' THEN 'REGIONAL MANAGER' ELSE [TITLE] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.AD_EMPLOYEES_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.MANAGERS_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MANAGERS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[MANAGERS_0];

        -- 2. Processing Logic
        WITH CTE_Filtered AS (
            /* Transformation: FILTERED
               Logic: Filters active employees and applies complex decoding for Role Flags.
            */
            SELECT 
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                -- Override Dept for A4BN
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A4BN' THEN 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
                    ELSE [DEPARTMENT]
                END AS [DEPARTMENT],
                [EMAIL],
                -- FLAG_RM
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] IN ('A4BN', 'A0ZT', 'A06V') THEN 1
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('REGIONAL MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF UNIVERSITY RELATIONS') 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF UNIVERSITY RELATIONS') THEN 1
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'REGIONAL MANAGER' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_RM],
                -- FLAG_RVP
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT', 'SENIOR REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT') 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT', 'VICE PRESIDENT OF CANADIAN OPERATIONS', 'SENIOR REGIONAL VICE PRESIDENT') THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_RVP],
                -- FLAG_RSM
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A10F' THEN 1
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] IN ('SALES & LEASING', 'REGIONAL SALES MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF SALES AND MARKETING') 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('REGIONAL SALES MANAGER', 'DIRECTOR OF SALES AND MARKETING') THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_RSM],
                -- FLAG_CONTROLLER
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'ACCOUNTING' 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('CORPORATE CONTROLLER', 'PROPERTY CONTROLLER') THEN 1
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'CONTROLLER' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_CONTROLLER],
                -- FLAG_PM
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('PROPERTY MANAGER', 'SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER') THEN 1
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'PROPERTY MANAGER' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_PM],
                -- FLAG_AM
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] = 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' 
                         AND [TITLE] IN ('ASSISTANT MANAGER', 'SENIOR ASSISTANT MANAGER') THEN 1
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'ASSISTANT MANAGER' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_AM],
                -- FLAG_LM
                CASE 
                    WHEN [DEPARTMENT] LIKE '%LEASING MANAGER%' 
                         AND [TITLE] LIKE '%LEASING MANAGER%' THEN 1
                    WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] = 'LEASING MANAGER' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_LM],
                [LOCATION],
                -- Nickname Overrides
                CASE 
                    WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'TAMERA' THEN 'TAMI'
                    WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'SHAKEIA' THEN 'KIA'
                    WHEN [NAME_FIRST] = 'GABRIELLE' THEN 'GABBY'
                    ELSE [NAME_FIRST]
                END AS [NAME_FIRST],
                [NAME_MIDDLE],
                [NAME_LAST],
                -- Override Title for A4BN
                CASE 
                    WHEN [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A4BN' THEN 'REGIONAL MANAGER'
                    ELSE [TITLE]
                END AS [TITLE],
                [TITLE_GROUP]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
            WHERE 
                [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0 
                AND [FLAG_DECEASED] = 0 
                AND [FLAG_INACTIVE] = 0 
                AND [LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
                AND ([TYPE] = 'FULL-TIME' OR [EMPLOYEE_CODE] = 'A4BN')
        ),
        CTE_Merge AS (
            /* Transformation: Merge (Filtered + Dummy Rows) */
            
            -- 1. Real Data
            SELECT * FROM CTE_Filtered
            
            UNION ALL
            
            -- 2. Dummy Row: INACTIVES (Code 2)
            SELECT 
                '2' AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                'INACTIVE' AS [DEPARTMENT],
                'INACTIVE' AS [EMAIL],
                1 AS [FLAG_RM], 1 AS [FLAG_RVP], 1 AS [FLAG_RSM], 1 AS [FLAG_CONTROLLER], 
                1 AS [FLAG_PM], 1 AS [FLAG_AM], 1 AS [FLAG_LM],
                'INACTIVE' AS [LOCATION],
                'INACTIVE' AS [NAME_FIRST],
                '' AS [NAME_MIDDLE],
                '' AS [NAME_LAST],
                'INACTIVE' AS [TITLE],
                NULL AS [TITLE_GROUP] -- (Assuming NULL for dummy rows if not specified in source)
            
            UNION ALL
            
            -- 3. Dummy Row: DASHES (Code 1)
            SELECT 
                '1' AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                '--' AS [DEPARTMENT],
                '--' AS [EMAIL],
                1 AS [FLAG_RM], 1 AS [FLAG_RVP], 1 AS [FLAG_RSM], 1 AS [FLAG_CONTROLLER], 
                1 AS [FLAG_PM], 1 AS [FLAG_AM], 1 AS [FLAG_LM],
                '--' AS [LOCATION],
                '--' AS [NAME_FIRST],
                '' AS [NAME_MIDDLE],
                '' AS [NAME_LAST],
                '--' AS [TITLE],
                NULL AS [TITLE_GROUP]
        )
        -- 3. Final Insert with AD Join
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[MANAGERS_0] (
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [DEPARTMENT],
            [EMAIL],
            [FLAG_RM],
            [FLAG_RVP],
            [FLAG_RSM],
            [FLAG_CONTROLLER],
            [FLAG_PM],
            [FLAG_AM],
            [FLAG_LM],
            [LOCATION],
            [NAME_FIRST],
            [NAME_FULL],
            [NAME_MIDDLE],
            [NAME_LAST],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_GROUP]
        )
        SELECT 
            M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            M.[DEPARTMENT],
            M.[EMAIL],
            M.[FLAG_RM],
            M.[FLAG_RVP],
            M.[FLAG_RSM],
            M.[FLAG_CONTROLLER],
            M.[FLAG_PM],
            M.[FLAG_AM],
            M.[FLAG_LM],
            M.[LOCATION],
            M.[NAME_FIRST],
            -- Logic: Use AD Name if available, else Construct it
            COALESCE(AD.[NAME_FULL], CONCAT(M.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', M.[NAME_LAST])) AS [NAME_FULL],
            M.[NAME_MIDDLE],
            M.[NAME_LAST],
            M.[TITLE],
            M.[TITLE_GROUP]
        FROM CTE_Merge M
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_EMPLOYEES_0] AD
            ON M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = AD.[EMPLOYEE_CODE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER into WH_STAGING.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[usp_Load_MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F]
AS
BEGIN

    -- =============================================
    -- Procedure : usp_Load_MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F
    -- Target    : [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F]
    -- Source    : [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER]
    -- Load Type : Full Reload (TRUNCATE + INSERT)
    -- Converted : ATL Dataflow Market_Survey_AGG_F
    -- Notes     : Single GROUP BY aggregation.
    --             XTEMP MSAGG001 and Query view are pure
    --             pass-through wrappers — collapsed inline.
    --             Source columns are all-uppercase vs mixed
    --             case in ATL — remapped accordingly.
    --             Keys: DATE_KEY + PROPERTY_KEY.
    -- =============================================

    DECLARE @ProcStart  DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @ErrMsg     VARCHAR(1000);
    DECLARE @ErrSev     INT;
    DECLARE @ErrState   INT;

    BEGIN TRAN;

    BEGIN TRY

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F];

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_AGG_F]
        (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [AY],
            [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [Beds_Comp],
            [Beds_Market],
            [Beds_Occupied_Comps],
            [Beds_Occupied_Market],
            [Beds_Preleased_Comps],
            [Beds_Preleased_Market],
            [DATE_OF_SURVEY],
            [Flag_Old_Data],
            [Leases_This_Week_New],
            [Leases_This_Week_Renewal],
            [Leases_This_Week_Total],
            [Market_City],
            [Market_State],
            [Visits_This_Week],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT
            src.[DATE_KEY],
            src.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            src.[AY],
            src.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_COMP])                AS [Beds_Comp],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_MARKET])              AS [Beds_Market],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS])      AS [Beds_Occupied_Comps],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET])     AS [Beds_Occupied_Market],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS])     AS [Beds_Preleased_Comps],
            SUM(src.[BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET])    AS [Beds_Preleased_Market],
            src.[DATE_OF_SURVEY],
            MAX(src.[FLAG_OLD_DATA])            AS [Flag_Old_Data],
            SUM(src.[LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW])     AS [Leases_This_Week_New],
            SUM(src.[LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL]) AS [Leases_This_Week_Renewal],
            SUM(src.[LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL])   AS [Leases_This_Week_Total],
            MAX(src.[MARKET_CITY])              AS [Market_City],
            MAX(src.[MARKET_STATE])             AS [Market_State],
            SUM(src.[VISITS_THIS_WEEK])         AS [Visits_This_Week],
            @ProcStart
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER] src
        GROUP BY
            src.[DATE_KEY],
            src.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            src.[AY],
            src.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
            src.[DATE_OF_SURVEY];

        COMMIT;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        ROLLBACK;
        SET @ErrMsg   = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        SET @ErrSev   = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        SET @ErrState = ERROR_STATE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, @ErrSev, @ErrState);
    END CATCH

END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_COMPS_F_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_COMPS_F];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_COMPS_F]
    (
        [COMP_KEY], [COMP_NAME], [MARKET_PROPERTY_ID], [ORDER],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [MARKET_CITY], [MARKET_STATE]
    )
    SELECT
        [COMP_KEY],
        MAX([COMP_NAME]),
        MAX([MARKET_PROPERTY_ID]),
        MAX([ORDER]),
        MAX([PROPERTY_KEY]),
        MAX([MARKET_CITY]),
        MAX([MARKET_STATE])
    FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS]
    WHERE [DATE_KEY] = (SELECT MAX([DATE_KEY]) FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS])
    GROUP BY [COMP_KEY];
END

name: MARKET_SURVEY_EXTRACTOR_SP
transformations: CALC_ISSUBJECT: CASE WHEN AP.PARENT_MARKETPROPERTYID = AP.MARKETPROPERTYID THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.xtemp.PROPERTY_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.MS_PARENT_PROPERTY into DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PBI_MARKET_ANALYSIS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_EXTRACTOR_SP]
AS
/*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Author:         Gemini AI (Expert Data Warehouse Engineer)
Goal:           Supports the Market Analysis report in PBI.
Process Type:   Truncate/Load
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 0.3. Run TRUNCATE before CTE processes
        TRUNCATE TABLE [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PBI_MARKET_ANALYSIS];

        -- CTE Logic Flow
        -- 1. Source Extractions & Filters
        ;WITH DW_Properties AS (
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID AS PROPERTY_ID,
                PROPERTY_NAME,
                UPPER(ISNULL(RM_NAME, 'UNASSIGNED')) AS RM_NAME,
                UPPER(ISNULL(RVP_NAME, 'UNASSIGNED')) AS RVP_NAME,
                BED_COUNT_COMPILED AS BED_COUNT,
                UPPER(MARKET_CITY) AS MARKET_CITY,
                UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(OWNER))) AS OWNER_NAME,
                UPPER(ADDRESS_STATE) AS PROPERTY_STATE,
                UPPER(ISNULL(RSM_NAME, 'UNASSIGNED')) AS RSM_NAME
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[xtemp].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE FLAG_REPORTABLE = 1 
              AND FLAG_MANAGED = 1 
              AND FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY = 0 
              AND FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
        ),
        MS_Properties AS (
            SELECT * FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[MS_PARENT_PROPERTY]
            WHERE PEAKPROPERTYID IS NOT NULL
        ),
        Weeks AS (
            SELECT 
                DATE_KEY,
                AY AS LEASING_FOR_AY,
                RELATIVE_AY AS LEASING_FOR_AY_REVERSE_ID,
                AY_WEEK_KEY AS LEASING_WEEK_KEY,
                AY_WEEK AS LEASING_WEEK_NBR,
                RELATIVE_AY_WEEK AS LEASING_WEEK_REVERSE_ID
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[xtemp].[DATE_F]
            WHERE DATE_KEY >= 20180801
        ),
        Children AS (
            SELECT 
                *,
                UPPER(PROPERTYNAME) AS PROPERTYNAME_CLEANED
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[MS_CHILD_PROPERTY]
            WHERE TARGETDATE >= 20180801
        ),
        PropFacts AS (
            SELECT * FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[MS_PROPERTY_FACT]
            WHERE TARGETDATE >= 20180801
        ),

        -- 2. Join Logic
        Parents AS (
            SELECT 
                DWP.*,
                MSP.MARKETPROPERTYID,
                MSP.CAMPUSLATITUDE, MSP.CAMPUSLONGITUDE, MSP.DATEREMOVED,
                MSP.DISTANCEFROMCAMPUS, MSP.ISSUBJECT, MSP.LATITUDE, MSP.LONGITUDE,
                MSP.MANAGEMENT, MSP.NORMALIZEDPROPERTYNAME, MSP.OPPORTUNITY,
                MSP.OWNER, MSP.PG_OWNER_NAME, MSP.PG_OWNER_NAME_SHORT,
                MSP.PG_OWNERSHIPGROUP_NAME, MSP.PG_OWNERSHIPGROUP_NAME_SHORT,
                MSP.PHONE, MSP.PROPERTYADDRESS, MSP.PROPERTYBEDS, MSP.PROPERTYCITY,
                MSP.PROPERTYMANAGER, MSP.PROPERTYSTATUS, MSP.PROPERTYTYPE,
                MSP.PROPERTYUNITS, MSP.PROPERTYZIP, MSP.STRENGTH, MSP.THREAT,
                MSP.UPDATEDATE, MSP.UPDATEDBY, MSP.WEAKNESS, MSP.WEBSITE, MSP.YEARBUILT
            FROM DW_Properties DWP
            INNER JOIN MS_Properties MSP ON DWP.PROPERTY_ID = MSP.PEAKPROPERTYID
        ),
        AllProps AS (
            SELECT 
                P.PROPERTY_KEY AS PARENT_KEY,
                P.PROPERTY_ID AS PARENT_PROPERTY_ID,
                P.MARKETPROPERTYID AS PARENT_MARKETPROPERTYID,
                P.PROPERTY_NAME AS PARENT_NAME,
                P.BED_COUNT AS PARENT_BED_COUNT,
                P.MARKET_CITY AS PARENT_MARKET_CITY,
                P.PROPERTY_STATE AS PARENT_MARKET_STATE,
                P.OWNER_NAME AS PARENT_OWNER_NAME,
                P.RM_NAME AS PARENT_RM_NAME,
                P.RSM_NAME AS PARENT_RSM_NAME,
                P.RVP_NAME AS PARENT_RVP_NAME,
                C.*
            FROM Parents P
            INNER JOIN Children C ON P.MARKETPROPERTYID = C.SUBJECTID
        ),
        Combo AS (
            SELECT 
                AP.*,
                PF.CHANGELASTWEEK,
                PF.NEWLEASES7DAYS,
                PF.OCCUPANCY AS OCCUPANCY_PCT,
                PF.OCCUPIED_COUNT,
                PF.PRELEASED AS PRELEASED_PCT,
                PF.PRELEASED_COUNT,
                PF.PROPERTYBEDS AS PF_PROPERTYBEDS,
                PF.RENEWALS7DAYS,
                PF.TRAFFIC7DAYS,
                PF.VALID_FLAG,
                PF.LASTDATA_DATE,
                PF.OLD_DATA_FLAG,
                PF.ORIG_TARGETDATE,
                CASE WHEN AP.PARENT_MARKETPROPERTYID = AP.MARKETPROPERTYID THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CALC_ISSUBJECT
            FROM AllProps AP
            INNER JOIN PropFacts PF ON PF.TARGETDATE = AP.TARGETDATE 
                                   AND PF.MARKETPROPERTYID = AP.MARKETPROPERTYID
        )

        -- 3. Final Target Insert
        INSERT INTO [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PBI_MARKET_ANALYSIS] (
            PARENT_KEY, PARENT_PROPERTY_ID, PARENT_MARKETPROPERTYID, PARENT_NAME, PARENT_BED_COUNT,
            PARENT_MARKET_CITY, PARENT_MARKET_STATE, PARENT_OWNER_NAME, PARENT_RM_NAME, PARENT_RSM_NAME,
            PARENT_RVP_NAME, TARGETDATE, LEASING_FOR_AY, LEASING_FOR_AY_REVERSE_ID, LEASING_WEEK_KEY,
            LEASING_WEEK_NBR, LEASING_WEEK_REVERSE_ID, MARKETPROPERTYID, ORDERID, SUBJECTID,
            CABLECHANNELS, CAMPUSLATITUDE, CAMPUSLONGITUDE, COMPID, DATEREMOVED, DATEUPDATED,
            DISTANCEFROMCAMPUS, ENDCOMPDATE, ENDDATE, HASBASKETBALL, HASCLUBHOUSE, HASFIREPIT,
            HASFITNESSCENTER, HASGAMEROOM, HASINUNITWASHERDRYER, HASOUTDOORKITCHENBBQ, HASPOOL,
            HASSHUTTLESERVICE, HASTANNINGBEDS, HASTENNISCOURTS, HASTVSINUNITS, HASVOLLEYBALL,
            INTERNETINBEDROOMS, INTERNETSPEED, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, MANAGEMENT, MOVIEPREMIUMCHANNELS,
            NORMALIZEDPROPERTYNAME, NUMTANNINGBEDS, OPPORTUNITY, OTHERAMENITIES, OTHERNOTES, OWNER,
            PEAKPROPERTYID, PHONE, PROPERTYADDRESS, PROPERTYAMENITIESID, PROPERTYCITY, PROPERTYMANAGER,
            PROPERTYSTATE, PROPERTYSTATUS, PROPERTYTYPE, PROPERTYUNITS, PROPERTYZIP, SHUTTLESCHEDULE,
            SHUTTLETYPE, STARTCOMPDATE, STARTDATE, STRENGTH, SUBJECTPROPERTYNAME, THREAT, UPDATEDATE,
            UPDATEDBY, WEAKNESS, WEBSITE, YEARBUILT, ISSUBJECT, PROPERTYNAME, PROPERTY_BEDS,
            CHANGELASTWEEK, NEWLEASES7DAYS, OCCUPANCY_PCT, OCCUPIED_COUNT, PRELEASED_PCT,
            PRELEASED_COUNT, PROPERTYBEDS, RENEWALS7DAYS, TRAFFIC7DAYS, VALID_FLAG, LASTDATA_DATE,
            OLD_DATA_FLAG, ORIG_TARGETDATE
        )
        SELECT 
            C.PARENT_KEY, C.PARENT_PROPERTY_ID, C.PARENT_MARKETPROPERTYID, C.PARENT_NAME, C.PARENT_BED_COUNT,
            C.PARENT_MARKET_CITY, C.PARENT_MARKET_STATE, C.PARENT_OWNER_NAME, C.PARENT_RM_NAME, C.PARENT_RSM_NAME,
            C.PARENT_RVP_NAME, C.TARGETDATE, W.LEASING_FOR_AY, W.LEASING_FOR_AY_REVERSE_ID, W.LEASING_WEEK_KEY,
            W.LEASING_WEEK_NBR, W.LEASING_WEEK_REVERSE_ID, C.MARKETPROPERTYID, C.ORDERID, C.SUBJECTID,
            C.CABLECHANNELS, C.CAMPUSLATITUDE, C.CAMPUSLONGITUDE, C.COMPID, C.DATEREMOVED, C.DATEUPDATED,
            C.DISTANCEFROMCAMPUS, C.ENDCOMPDATE, C.ENDDATE, C.HASBASKETBALL, C.HASCLUBHOUSE, C.HASFIREPIT,
            C.HASFITNESSCENTER, C.HASGAMEROOM, C.HASINUNITWASHERDRYER, C.HASOUTDOORKITCHENBBQ, C.HASPOOL,
            C.HASSHUTTLESERVICE, C.HASTANNINGBEDS, C.HASTENNISCOURTS, C.HASTVSINUNITS, C.HASVOLLEYBALL,
            C.INTERNETINBEDROOMS, C.INTERNETSPEED, C.LATITUDE, C.LONGITUDE, C.MANAGEMENT, C.MOVIEPREMIUMCHANNELS,
            C.NORMALIZEDPROPERTYNAME, C.NUMTANNINGBEDS, C.OPPORTUNITY, C.OTHERAMENITIES, C.OTHERNOTES, C.OWNER,
            C.PEAKPROPERTYID, C.PHONE, C.PROPERTYADDRESS, C.PROPERTYAMENITIESID, C.PROPERTYCITY, C.PROPERTYMANAGER,
            C.PROPERTYSTATE, C.PROPERTYSTATUS, C.PROPERTYTYPE, C.PROPERTYUNITS, C.PROPERTYZIP, C.SHUTTLESCHEDULE,
            C.SHUTTLETYPE, C.STARTCOMPDATE, C.STARTDATE, C.STRENGTH, C.SUBJECTPROPERTYNAME, C.THREAT, C.UPDATEDATE,
            C.UPDATEDBY, C.WEAKNESS, C.WEBSITE, C.YEARBUILT, C.CALC_ISSUBJECT, C.PROPERTYNAME, C.PROPERTYBEDS,
            C.CHANGELASTWEEK, C.NEWLEASES7DAYS, C.OCCUPANCY_PCT, C.OCCUPIED_COUNT, C.PRELEASED_PCT,
            C.PRELEASED_COUNT, C.PF_PROPERTYBEDS, C.RENEWALS7DAYS, C.TRAFFIC7DAYS, C.VALID_FLAG, C.LASTDATA_DATE,
            C.OLD_DATA_FLAG, C.ORIG_TARGETDATE
        FROM Combo C
        INNER JOIN Weeks W ON C.TARGETDATE = W.DATE_KEY;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @ErrMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F_SP
transformations: Flag_Top_5: CASE WHEN A.[RANK_ORDER] <= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
Flag_Top_6: CASE WHEN A.[RANK_ORDER] <= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.COMP_ASSIGNMENTS into WH_STAGING.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Truncate Target
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F];

    -- Step 2: Transform and Load
    -- Logic: Filter Dates -> Join Assignments -> Join Facts -> Calculate Columns
    
    WITH [Filtered_Dates_CTE] AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [DATE_KEY],
            [AY],
            [AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
            [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [RELATIVE_AY],
            [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
            [RELATIVE_DAY]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        WHERE [RELATIVE_WEEK] <= 1 
          AND [RELATIVE_WEEK] >= -58
    ),

    [Assignments_CTE] AS (
        SELECT 
            CA.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY],
            CA.[DATE_KEY],
            CA.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY],
            CA.[RANK_ORDER],
            CA.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME],
            CA.[FLAG_PARENT_1],
            CA.[MARKET_CITY],
            CA.[MARKET_STATE],
            D.[AY],
            D.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
            D.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
            D.[RELATIVE_AY],
            D.[RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
            D.[RELATIVE_DAY]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_ASSIGNMENTS] CA
        INNER JOIN [Filtered_Dates_CTE] D ON CA.[DATE_KEY] = D.[DATE_KEY]
        WHERE CA.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL 
          AND CA.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F]
    (
        [DATE_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [COMP_KEY],
        [ORDER],
        [AY],
        [AY_WEEK_KEY],
        [Beds_Comp],
        [Beds_Market],
        [Beds_Occupied_Comps],
        [Beds_Occupied_Market],
        [Beds_Preleased_Comps],
        [Beds_Preleased_Market],
        [Comp_Name],
        [Date_Of_Survey],
        [Date_Last_Updated],
        [Date_Week_End],
        [Flag_Is_Parent],
        [Flag_Is_Peak],
        [Flag_Is_Valid],
        [Flag_Old_Data],
        [Flag_Top_5],
        [Flag_Top_6],
        [Leases_This_Week_New],
        [Leases_This_Week_Renewal],
        [Leases_This_Week_Total],
        [Market_City],
        [Market_Property_ID],
        [Market_State],
        [RELATIVE_AY],
        [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
        [RELATIVE_DAY],
        [Visits_This_Week]
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT
        A.[DATE_KEY],
        A.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        
        -- Concatenated Key: Parent-Rank-Comp
        CAST(A.[PARENT_PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) + '-' + 
        CAST(A.[RANK_ORDER] AS VARCHAR(10)) + '-' + 
        CAST(A.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY] AS VARCHAR(20)) AS [COMP_KEY],
        
        A.[RANK_ORDER] AS [ORDER],
        A.[AY],
        A.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
        
        -- Beds
        CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED] AS [Beds_Comp],
        CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED] AS [Beds_Market],
        
        -- Calculated Occupancy: (Pct * Total) / 100
        CAST((CF.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT] * CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) / 100.0 AS INT) AS [Beds_Occupied_Comps],
        CAST((CF.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT] * CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) / 100.0 AS INT) AS [Beds_Occupied_Market],
        
        -- Calculated Preleased: (Pct * Total) / 100
        CAST((CF.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT] * CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) / 100.0 AS INT) AS [Beds_Preleased_Comps],
        CAST((CF.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT] * CF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]) / 100.0 AS INT) AS [Beds_Preleased_Market],
        
        A.[COMP_PROPERTY_NAME] AS [Comp_Name],
        A.[DATE_KEY] AS [Date_Of_Survey],
        CF.[DATE_UPDATED] AS [Date_Last_Updated],
        A.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE] AS [Date_Week_End],
        
        A.[FLAG_PARENT_1] AS [Flag_Is_Parent],
        A.[FLAG_PARENT_1] AS [Flag_Is_Peak],
        1 AS [Flag_Is_Valid],
        0 AS [Flag_Old_Data],
        
        -- Rank Flags
        CASE WHEN A.[RANK_ORDER] <= 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Top_5],
        CASE WHEN A.[RANK_ORDER] <= 6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Top_6],
        
        CF.[THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES] AS [Leases_This_Week_New],
        CF.[THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS] AS [Leases_This_Week_Renewal],
        (ISNULL(CF.[THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES],0) + ISNULL(CF.[THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS],0)) AS [Leases_This_Week_Total],
        
        A.[MARKET_CITY],
        CF.[LEGACY_MARKETPROPERTYID] AS [Market_Property_ID],
        A.[MARKET_STATE],
        A.[RELATIVE_AY],
        A.[RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
        A.[RELATIVE_DAY],
        CF.[THIS_WEEK_VISITS] AS [Visits_This_Week]

    FROM [Assignments_CTE] A
    INNER JOIN [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[COMP_FACT] CF 
        ON CF.[DATE_KEY] = A.[DATE_KEY] 
        AND CF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = A.[COMP_PROPERTY_KEY];
END;

name: MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER, WH_PROD2.dbo.MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DatesPerWeek') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DatesPerWeek;
    SELECT
        DATE_F.DATE_KEY    AS DATE_KEY,
        DATE_F.AY_WEEK_KEY AS AY_WEEK_KEY
    INTO #DatesPerWeek
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] AS DATE_F
    WHERE DATE_F.RELATIVE_WEEK IN (-5, -4, -3, -2, -1, 0, 1);

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#Exploder') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #Exploder;
    SELECT
        DPW.DATE_KEY                AS DATE_KEY,
        MSF.PROPERTY_KEY            AS PROPERTY_KEY,
        MSF.COMP_KEY                AS COMP_KEY,
        MSF.[ORDER]                 AS [ORDER],
        MSF.AY                      AS AY,
        MSF.AY_WEEK_KEY             AS AY_WEEK_KEY,
        MSF.Beds_Comp               AS BEDS_COMP,
        MSF.Beds_Market             AS BEDS_MARKET,
        MSF.Beds_Occupied_Comps     AS BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS,
        MSF.Beds_Occupied_Market    AS BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
        MSF.Beds_Preleased_Comps    AS BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS,
        MSF.Beds_Preleased_Market   AS BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET,
        MSF.Comp_Name               AS COMP_NAME,
        MSF.Date_Last_Updated       AS DATE_LAST_UPDATED,
        MSF.Date_Of_Survey          AS DATE_OF_SURVEY,
        MSF.Date_Week_End           AS DATE_WEEK_END,
        MSF.Flag_Is_Parent          AS FLAG_IS_PARENT,
        MSF.Flag_Is_Peak            AS FLAG_IS_PEAK,
        MSF.Flag_Is_Valid           AS FLAG_IS_VALID,
        MSF.Flag_Old_Data           AS FLAG_OLD_DATA,
        MSF.Flag_Top_5              AS FLAG_TOP_5,
        MSF.Flag_Top_6              AS FLAG_TOP_6,
        MSF.Leases_This_Week_New    AS LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW,
        MSF.Leases_This_Week_Renewal AS LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL,
        MSF.Leases_This_Week_Total  AS LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL,
        MSF.Market_City             AS MARKET_CITY,
        MSF.Market_Property_ID      AS MARKET_PROPERTY_ID,
        MSF.Market_State            AS MARKET_STATE,
        MSF.RELATIVE_AY             AS RELATIVE_AY,
        MSF.RELATIVE_AY_WEEK        AS RELATIVE_AY_WEEK,
        MSF.RELATIVE_DAY            AS RELATIVE_DAY,
        MSF.Visits_This_Week        AS VISITS_THIS_WEEK
    INTO #Exploder
    FROM #DatesPerWeek AS DPW
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS_F] AS MSF
        ON MSF.AY_WEEK_KEY = DPW.AY_WEEK_KEY;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ExploderKeys') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ExploderKeys;
    SELECT DISTINCT E.DATE_KEY AS DATE_KEY
    INTO #ExploderKeys
    FROM #Exploder AS E;

    DELETE T
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER] AS T
    INNER JOIN #ExploderKeys AS K ON K.DATE_KEY = T.DATE_KEY;

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACT_EXPLODER]
    (DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMP_KEY, [ORDER], AY, AY_WEEK_KEY,
     BEDS_COMP, BEDS_MARKET, BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS, BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
     BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS, BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET, COMP_NAME, DATE_LAST_UPDATED,
     DATE_OF_SURVEY, DATE_WEEK_END, FLAG_IS_PARENT, FLAG_IS_PEAK, FLAG_IS_VALID,
     FLAG_OLD_DATA, FLAG_TOP_5, FLAG_TOP_6, LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW,
     LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL, LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL, MARKET_CITY,
     MARKET_PROPERTY_ID, MARKET_STATE, RELATIVE_AY, RELATIVE_AY_WEEK,
     RELATIVE_DAY, VISITS_THIS_WEEK)
    SELECT
        E.DATE_KEY, E.PROPERTY_KEY, E.COMP_KEY, E.[ORDER], E.AY, E.AY_WEEK_KEY,
        E.BEDS_COMP, E.BEDS_MARKET, E.BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS, E.BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
        E.BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS, E.BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET, E.COMP_NAME, E.DATE_LAST_UPDATED,
        E.DATE_OF_SURVEY, E.DATE_WEEK_END, E.FLAG_IS_PARENT, E.FLAG_IS_PEAK, E.FLAG_IS_VALID,
        E.FLAG_OLD_DATA, E.FLAG_TOP_5, E.FLAG_TOP_6, E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW,
        E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL, E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL, E.MARKET_CITY,
        E.MARKET_PROPERTY_ID, E.MARKET_STATE, E.RELATIVE_AY, E.RELATIVE_AY_WEEK,
        E.RELATIVE_DAY, E.VISITS_THIS_WEEK
    FROM #Exploder AS E;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#AllRecords') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #AllRecords;
    SELECT
        E.DATE_KEY, E.PROPERTY_KEY, E.COMP_KEY, E.[ORDER], E.AY, E.AY_WEEK_KEY,
        E.BEDS_COMP, E.BEDS_MARKET, E.BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS, E.BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
        E.BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS, E.BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET, E.COMP_NAME,
        E.DATE_OF_SURVEY, E.DATE_LAST_UPDATED, E.DATE_WEEK_END,
        TRY_CAST(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), E.DATE_KEY) AS DATE) AS DATETIME2(3)) AS DATETIME_KEY,
        E.FLAG_IS_PARENT, E.FLAG_IS_PEAK, E.FLAG_IS_VALID, E.FLAG_OLD_DATA,
        E.FLAG_TOP_5, E.FLAG_TOP_6, E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW, E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL,
        E.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL, E.MARKET_CITY, E.MARKET_PROPERTY_ID, E.MARKET_STATE,
        E.VISITS_THIS_WEEK
    INTO #AllRecords
    FROM #Exploder AS E
    WHERE E.PROPERTY_KEY <> 9787;

    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#DeleteKeys') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #DeleteKeys;
    SELECT DISTINCT AR.DATE_KEY AS DATE_KEY
    INTO #DeleteKeys
    FROM #AllRecords AS AR;

    DELETE T
    FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS] AS T
    INNER JOIN #DeleteKeys AS K ON K.DATE_KEY = T.DATE_KEY;

    INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MARKET_SURVEY_FACTS]
    (DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMP_KEY, [ORDER], AY, AY_WEEK_KEY,
     BEDS_COMP, BEDS_MARKET, BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS, BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
     BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS, BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET, COMP_NAME, DATE_OF_SURVEY,
     DATE_LAST_UPDATED, DATE_WEEK_END, DATETIME_KEY, FLAG_IS_PARENT,
     FLAG_IS_PEAK, FLAG_IS_VALID, FLAG_OLD_DATA, FLAG_TOP_5, FLAG_TOP_6,
     LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW, LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL, LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL,
     MARKET_CITY, MARKET_PROPERTY_ID, MARKET_STATE, VISITS_THIS_WEEK)
    SELECT
        AR.DATE_KEY, AR.PROPERTY_KEY, AR.COMP_KEY, AR.[ORDER], AR.AY, AR.AY_WEEK_KEY,
        AR.BEDS_COMP, AR.BEDS_MARKET, AR.BEDS_OCCUPIED_COMPS, AR.BEDS_OCCUPIED_MARKET,
        AR.BEDS_PRELEASED_COMPS, AR.BEDS_PRELEASED_MARKET, AR.COMP_NAME, AR.DATE_OF_SURVEY,
        AR.DATE_LAST_UPDATED, AR.DATE_WEEK_END, TRY_CAST(AR.DATETIME_KEY AS DATETIME2(3)),
        AR.FLAG_IS_PARENT, AR.FLAG_IS_PEAK, AR.FLAG_IS_VALID, AR.FLAG_OLD_DATA,
        AR.FLAG_TOP_5, AR.FLAG_TOP_6, AR.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_NEW, AR.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_RENEWAL,
        AR.LEASES_THIS_WEEK_TOTAL, AR.MARKET_CITY, AR.MARKET_PROPERTY_ID, AR.MARKET_STATE,
        AR.VISITS_THIS_WEEK
    FROM #AllRecords AS AR;
END;

name: MF_AGGREGATOR_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_OCCUPIED_COUNT, WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_COMPLETE_LEASE_COUNT into WH_PROD2.dbo.MF_METRIC_AGG (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_AGGREGATOR_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    -- STEP 1: Build deduplicated UNION ALL of all 33 sources
    --         into a temp table (mirrors ATL Merge + ORDER steps)
    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE #MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE;

    SELECT DISTINCT
        DATE_KEY,
        PROPERTY_KEY,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        FLOORPLAN_KEY,
        METRIC_KEY,
        DATETIME_VALUE,
        INT_VALUE,
        DECIMAL_VALUE,
        VARCHAR_VALUE
    INTO #MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE
    FROM (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_OCCUPIED_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_COMPLETE_LEASE_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_F30_LEASE_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_F60_LEASE_COUNT]
        UNION ALL

        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_CANCEL_LAST_30_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_VISIT_LAST_7_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_VISIT_LAST_30_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_DENIAL_LAST_30_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_LAST_7_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_LAST_30_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_LEAD_LAST_7_COUNT]
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY, METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_LEAD_LAST_30_COUNT]
    ) AS Merge_All;

    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    -- STEP 2: Load WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_METRIC_AGG_0
    --         DROP/CREATE + INSERT (full reload)
    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_AGG_0]', 'U') IS NOT NULL
        DROP TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_AGG_0];

    SELECT
        DATE_KEY,
        PROPERTY_KEY,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        FLOORPLAN_KEY,
        METRIC_KEY,
        DATETIME_VALUE,
        INT_VALUE,
        DECIMAL_VALUE,
        VARCHAR_VALUE
    INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_AGG_0]
    FROM #MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE;

    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    -- STEP 3: MERGE into WH_PROD2.dbo.MF_METRIC_AGG
    --         Match on all 9 columns (all are keys in ATL)
    --         WHEN NOT MATCHED → INSERT
    --         WHEN MATCHED → no-op (all columns are key columns,
    --                        nothing to update)
    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    MERGE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_AGG] AS TGT
    USING #MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE AS SRC
        ON  TGT.DATE_KEY        = SRC.DATE_KEY
        AND TGT.PROPERTY_KEY    = SRC.PROPERTY_KEY
        AND ISNULL(TGT.FLOORPLAN_KEY, 0) = ISNULL(SRC.FLOORPLAN_KEY, 0)
        AND TGT.METRIC_KEY      = SRC.METRIC_KEY
        AND ISNULL(TGT.PROPERTY_NAME,  '') = ISNULL(SRC.PROPERTY_NAME,  '')
        AND ISNULL(TGT.DATETIME_VALUE, '1900-01-01') = ISNULL(SRC.DATETIME_VALUE, '1900-01-01')
        AND ISNULL(TGT.INT_VALUE,      -999999999)   = ISNULL(SRC.INT_VALUE,      -999999999)
        AND ISNULL(TGT.DECIMAL_VALUE,  -999999999)   = ISNULL(SRC.DECIMAL_VALUE,  -999999999)
        AND ISNULL(TGT.VARCHAR_VALUE,  '')            = ISNULL(SRC.VARCHAR_VALUE,  '')
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
        INSERT (
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, FLOORPLAN_KEY,
            METRIC_KEY, DATETIME_VALUE, INT_VALUE, DECIMAL_VALUE, VARCHAR_VALUE
        )
        VALUES (
            SRC.DATE_KEY, SRC.PROPERTY_KEY, SRC.PROPERTY_NAME, ISNULL(SRC.FLOORPLAN_KEY, 0),
            SRC.METRIC_KEY, SRC.DATETIME_VALUE, SRC.INT_VALUE, SRC.DECIMAL_VALUE, SRC.VARCHAR_VALUE
        );

    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    -- Cleanup
    -- --------------------------------------------------------
    DROP TABLE #MF_METRIC_AGG_STAGE;

END;

name: MF_APPLICATION_COUNT_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_APPLICATION_COUNT.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_COUNT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_COUNT];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Filtered Property List (Active & Conventional)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregate Application Flags from specific application details table
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM([FLAG_APPLICATION]) AS [FLAG_APPLICATION]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0]
            GROUP BY 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Final AS (
            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'APPLICATION_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'Application Count' AS [METRIC_NAME],
                'INT' AS [METRIC_DATATYPE],
                'Count of Applications by floor plan by property for a given date.  Note: many are UNASSIGNED.' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'APPLICATIONS_F.COUNT - logic needed - pay app fee and reserved unit' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],
                CAST(NULL AS datetime2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VALUE],
                M.[FLAG_APPLICATION] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_MetricDetails M 
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_COUNT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        FROM cte_Final;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_FACT_SP
transformations: FLAG_APPLICATION: CASE WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'APPLICATION' AND A.[STATUS] <> 'CANCELLED' AND A.[STATUS] <> 'ON HOLD' AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'LEASE MODIFICATION' AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS: CASE WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'APPLICATION' AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'LEASE MODIFICATION' AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'RENEWAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CANCELLED: CASE WHEN A.[DATE_APPROVED] > 0 THEN A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED] ELSE 0 END
FLAG_LEAD: CASE WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'LEAD' AND A.[STATUS] <> 'ON HOLD' AND A.[FLAG_LEAD] <> 0 AND A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.STAGE_STATUS_STEP_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0.
sql:
-- SECTION 1: TARGET TABLE DDL
-- Per Architecture Rule 0.1: Target tables already exist. DDL is omitted.

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;-----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: LOAD STAGING (Truncate/Load)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- 1.1 Truncate Staging Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0];

        -- 1.2 Transformation Logic (CTEs)
        WITH [Props] AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
              -- Note: #AND PROPERTY_FACT_F.PROPERTY_KEY <> 9743 is commented out in ATL
        ),

        [Stage_Status] AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID],
                -- Select other columns if needed for join, ATL only joins on ID
                [ID] AS [Join_ID] 
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STAGE_STATUS_STEP_0]
        ),

        [Apps] AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                A.[APPLICATION_ID],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME],
                A.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME_LAST],
                A.[COUNT],
                A.[DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
                A.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                A.[FLAG_LEAD],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                A.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
                A.[STAGE],
                A.[STATUS],
                A.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME],
                A.[SCREENING_PACKAGE_NAME_CONFORMED],
                A.[STEP],
                A.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],
                A.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],
                A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT],
                A.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
                A.[FLAG_APP_ACTIVE],
                A.[FLAG_APP_APPROVED],
                A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED],
                A.[FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATE_CANCELLED],
                A.[DATE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATE_CREATED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_BEGIN],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_END],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_GENERATED],
                A.[DATE_TOURED],
                A.[DATE_UNIT_TOURED],
                A.[DATEID_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
                A.[DATEID_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATEID_CREATED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_END],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],
                A.[DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_TOURED],
                A.[DATEID_UNIT_TOURED],
                A.[FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                A.[LEASE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_TYPE_ID]
            FROM [Props] P
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[APPLICATIONS_F] A 
                ON A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [Stage_Status] S 
                ON S.[ID] = A.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID]
        ),

        [WeekNumber] AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [WEEK_ID],
                [WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                [YEAR],
                [YYYYMM]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        ),

        [Logic] AS (
            SELECT 
                A.[DATE_KEY],
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                A.[APPLICATION_ID],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST],
                A.[APPLICANT_NAME_LAST],
                A.[CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM],
                A.[CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE],
                A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT],
                A.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
                A.[COUNT],
                W.[WEEK_ID] AS [CREATED_WEEK_ID],
                W.[WEEK_OF_YEAR] AS [CREATED_WEEK_OF_YEAR],
                W.[YEAR] AS [CREATED_YEAR],
                W.[YYYYMM] AS [CREATED_YYYYMM],
                A.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
                A.[DATE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATE_CANCELLED],
                A.[DATE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATE_CREATED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_BEGIN],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_END],
                A.[DATE_LEASE_GENERATED],
                A.[DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP],
                A.[DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                A.[DATE_TOURED],
                A.[DATE_UNIT_TOURED],
                A.[DATEID_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
                A.[DATEID_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATEID_CREATED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_END],
                A.[DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED],
                A.[DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED],
                A.[DATEID_TOURED],
                A.[DATEID_UNIT_TOURED],
                
                -- FLAG_APPLICATION Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'APPLICATION' 
                         AND A.[STATUS] <> 'CANCELLED' 
                         AND A.[STATUS] <> 'ON HOLD' 
                         AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'LEASE MODIFICATION' 
                         AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'RENEWAL' 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_APPLICATION],

                -- FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'APPLICATION' 
                         AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'LEASE MODIFICATION' 
                         AND A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE] <> 'RENEWAL' 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS],

                A.[FLAG_APP_ACTIVE],
                A.[FLAG_APP_APPROVED],
                A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED],
                A.[FLAG_APP_COMPLETED],

                -- FLAG_CANCELLED Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN A.[DATE_APPROVED] > 0 THEN A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED]
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_CANCELLED],

                0 AS [FLAG_DENIAL],

                -- FLAG_LEAD Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN A.[STAGE] = 'LEAD' 
                         AND A.[STATUS] <> 'ON HOLD' 
                         AND A.[FLAG_LEAD] <> 0 
                         AND A.[FLAG_APP_CANCELLED] = 0 
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_LEAD],

                A.[FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED],

                -- FLAG_VISIT Logic
                ISNULL(A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0) + ISNULL(A.[CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR], 0) AS [FLAG_VISIT],

                A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                A.[LEASE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
                A.[LEASE_TYPE],
                A.[LEASE_TYPE_ID],
                A.[MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID],
                A.[STAGE],
                A.[STATUS],
                A.[STEP]

            FROM [Apps] A
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WeekNumber] W 
                ON A.[DATE_CREATED] = W.[DATE_KEY]
        )

        -- 1.3 Insert into Staging
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [APPLICATION_ID], [APPLICANT_NAME], 
            [APPLICANT_NAME_FIRST], [APPLICANT_NAME_LAST], [CANCELLATION_LIST_ITEM], [CANCELLATION_LIST_TYPE], 
            [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], [CONTACT_SUM_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [COUNT], [CREATED_WEEK_ID], 
            [CREATED_WEEK_OF_YEAR], [CREATED_YEAR], [CREATED_YYYYMM], [CUSTOMER_NAME], 
            [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_COMPLETED], [DATE_CREATED], 
            [DATE_LEASE_APPROVED], [DATE_LEASE_BEGIN], [DATE_LEASE_COMPLETED], [DATE_LEASE_END], 
            [DATE_LEASE_GENERATED], [DATE_MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP], [DATE_SCREENING_APPROVED], 
            [DATE_TOURED], [DATE_UNIT_TOURED], [DATEID_APPROVED], [DATEID_CANCELLED], 
            [DATEID_COMPLETED], [DATEID_CREATED], [DATEID_LEASE_APPROVED], [DATEID_LEASE_BEGIN], 
            [DATEID_LEASE_COMPLETED], [DATEID_LEASE_END], [DATEID_LEASE_GENERATED], [DATEID_SCREENING_APPROVED], 
            [DATEID_TOURED], [DATEID_UNIT_TOURED], [FLAG_APPLICATION], [FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS], 
            [FLAG_APP_ACTIVE], [FLAG_APP_APPROVED], [FLAG_APP_CANCELLED], [FLAG_APP_COMPLETED], 
            [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_DENIAL], [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_SCREENING_APPROVED], 
            [FLAG_VISIT], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [LEASE_ID], 
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE], [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE], 
            [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID], [LEASE_TYPE], [LEASE_TYPE_ID], [MAX_STAGE_STATUS_STEP_ID], 
            [STAGE], [STATUS], [STEP]
        )
        SELECT * FROM [Logic];

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: LOAD PROD (Upsert/Merge)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- Source: [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0] (populated above)
        -- Target: [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_FACT]
        
        MERGE INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_FACT] AS Target
        USING [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0] AS Source

name: MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Filtered Property List (Active & Conventional)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregate Application Gross Flags from Application Details
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM([FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS]) AS [FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0]
            GROUP BY 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Final AS (
            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'Application Gross Count' AS [METRIC_NAME],
                'INT' AS [METRIC_DATATYPE],
                'Count of ALL Applications by floor plan by property for a given date.  Note: many are UNASSIGNED.' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'APPLICATIONS_F.COUNT - logic needed - pay app fee and reserved unit' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],
                CAST(NULL AS datetime2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VALUE],
                M.[FLAG_APPLICATION_GROSS] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_MetricDetails M 
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_GROSS_COUNT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        FROM cte_Final;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

            [METRIC_KEY],

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Filtered Property List (Active & Conventional)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_DateRange AS (
            -- Get Date Keys for the last 7 days
            SELECT [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] >= -7 
              AND [RELATIVE_DAY] <= -1
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregate Denials where DATE_CREATED is in the DateRange
            SELECT 
                APP.[DATE_KEY],
                APP.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                APP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM(APP.[FLAG_DENIAL]) AS [DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_APPLICATION_DETAILS_0] APP
            INNER JOIN cte_DateRange DR
                ON DR.[DATE_KEY] = APP.[DATE_CREATED]
            GROUP BY 
                APP.[DATE_KEY], 
                APP.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
                APP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Final AS (
            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'Denial Last 7 Days Count' AS [METRIC_NAME],
                'INT' AS [METRIC_DATATYPE],
                'Count of Denials by floor plan by property for the last 7 days. 	' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'APPLICATIONS_F.COUNT - 	' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],
                CAST(NULL AS datetime2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VALUE],
                M.[DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_MetricDetails M 
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_DENIAL_LAST_7_COUNT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        FROM cte_Final;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_F30_LEASE_COUNT_SP]

        cte_GroupBy AS (

            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                G.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'F30_LEASE_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'F30 Lease Count' AS [METRIC_NAME],
                'INT' AS [METRIC_DATATYPE],
                'Count of leases that are expiring within 30 days from yesterday and are on notice' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'LEASE_FACTS_F.DATE_END' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],
                CAST(NULL AS datetime2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VALUE],
                G.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_GroupBy G 
                ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = G.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_F30_LEASE_COUNT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        FROM cte_Final;

    END TRY

        THROW;
    END CATCH;

name: MF_METRIC_DETAILS_0_SP
transformations: DATEID_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),1,4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),5,2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),7,2) )) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Date_Constants AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = 30 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_30DAYS],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = 60 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_60DAYS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] IN (-1, 30, 60)
        ),
        cte_Today2 AS (
            SELECT [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_THIS_MONTH] = 1
        ),
        cte_Props AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_Units AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                U.[UNIT_KEY],
                U.[COUNT],
                U.[FLAG_AVAILABLE],
                U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                U.[FLAG_VACANT],
                U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                U.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
                U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
                U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
                U.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
                U.[STATUS],
                U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                CASE 
                    WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN 
                        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),1,4) + '-' + 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),5,2) + '-' + 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),7,2)
                        )) 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [DATEID_MOVE_OUT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS_F] U
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Leases AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_ID],
                L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                L.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
                L.[UNIT_KEY],
                L.[DATE_APPROVED],
                L.[DATE_BEGIN],
                L.[DATE_CANCELLED],
                L.[DATE_END],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
                L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[DATEID_APPROVED],
                L.[DATEID_BEGIN],
                L.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
                L.[DATEID_END],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
                L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                L.[LEASE_TERM],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
                L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
                L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN],
                L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
                L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
                L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
                L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY 
                L.[LEASE_ID], L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], L.[PROPERTY_KEY], L.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                L.[DATE_APPROVED], L.[DATE_BEGIN], L.[DATE_CANCELLED], L.[DATE_END], L.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATEID_APPROVED], L.[DATEID_BEGIN], L.[DATEID_CANCELLED], L.[DATEID_END], L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN], L.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT], L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT], L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], L.[UNIT_KEY],
                L.[FLAG_COMPLETE], L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE], L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE], L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                L.[LEASE_TERM], L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE], L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM], L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW], L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER], L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN], L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT]
        ),
        cte_LeaseInfo AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN]
        ),
        cte_FutureLeases AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_ID],
                MAX(L.[DATE_MOVE_IN]) AS [DATE_MOVE_IN],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            GROUP BY L.[LEASE_ID]
        ),
        cte_Floorplans AS (
            SELECT 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [COUNT],
                [FLOORPLAN],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_ID],
                [RENT_MAX],
                [RENT_MIN]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F]
        ),
        cte_UnitDetail AS (
            SELECT 
                [UNIT_KEY],
                [APARTMENT_NUMBER],
                [BUILDING],
                [SPACE],
                NULL AS [SPACE_ID],
                [SPACE_NUMBER]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [UNIT_KEY], [UNIT_COUNT],
            [APARTMENT_NUMBER], [BUILDING],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_BEGIN], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_END],
            [DATE_MAX30], [DATE_MAX60], [DATE_MIN30], [DATE_MIN60],
            [DATE_MOVE_IN], [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            [DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], [DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATEID_APPROVED], [DATEID_BEGIN], [DATEID_CANCELLED], [DATEID_END],
            [DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], [DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            [DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN],
            [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED],
            [FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_MOVED_IN], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            [FLAG_NEW_LEASE], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            [FLAG_UNIT_AVAILABLE], [FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_UNIT_VACANT],
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MAX], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MIN],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            [LEASE_ID_CURRENT], [LEASE_ID_FUTURE], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            [LEASE_TERM], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            [SPACE], [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER],
            [UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE], [UNIT_STATUS]
        )
        SELECT 
            P.[DATE_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            U.[UNIT_KEY],
            U.[COUNT] AS [UNIT_COUNT],
            UD.[APARTMENT_NUMBER],
            UD.[BUILDING],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
            FL.[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            L.[DATE_APPROVED],
            L.[DATE_BEGIN],
            L.[DATE_CANCELLED],
            L.[DATE_END],
            D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] AS [DATE_MAX30],
            D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] AS [DATE_MAX60],
            D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AS [DATE_MIN30],
            D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AS [DATE_MIN60],
            FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
            L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            
            L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] AS [DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS [DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            L.[DATEID_APPROVED],
            L.[DATEID_BEGIN],
            L.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
            L.[DATEID_END],
            
            L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN] AS [DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] AS [DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            CASE WHEN U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN ISNULL(L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],0) - U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] ELSE 0 END,
            L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
            L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            
            -- FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT
            CASE 
                WHEN U.[STATUS] = 'NOTICE UNRENTED' AND (
                    (L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS]) OR 
                    (L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS])
                ) THEN 0
                WHEN U.[STATUS] IN ('VACANT RENTED NOT READY', 'VACANT RENTED READY') 
                     AND U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] > 0 
                     AND FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] THEN 1
                ELSE U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            END,

            -- FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            -- FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT
            CASE 
                WHEN U.[STATUS] = 'NOTICE UNRENTED' AND (
                    (L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS]) OR 
                    (L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS])
                ) THEN 0
                WHEN U.[STATUS] IN ('VACANT RENTED NOT READY', 'VACANT RENTED READY') 
                     AND U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] > 0 
                     AND FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] THEN 1
                ELSE U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            END,

            -- FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            L.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
            
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            
            -- Today2 Flags
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL AND L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL 
                 AND L.[FLAG_COMPLETE] = 0 
                 AND L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = 'RENEWAL'
                 AND L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] NOT IN ('TRANSFER IN','NEW','TRANSFER OUT','MTM')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL 
                 AND L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM] = 0 
                 AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED', 'NOTICE RENTED') 
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN],
            L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN],
            CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT],
            L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            U.[FLAG_AVAILABLE],
            U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            U.[FLAG_VACANT],
            FP.[FLOORPLAN],
            FP.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            FP.[RENT_MAX],
            FP.[RENT_MIN],
            L.[INTERVAL_TYPE],
            L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            U.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
            U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            L.[LEASE_TERM],
            L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
            L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            UD.[SPACE],
            L.[SPACE_COUNT],
            L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
            UD.[SPACE_ID],
            UD.[SPACE_NUMBER],
            -- [UNIT_COUNT] removed from here (Duplicate)
            U.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
            U.[STATUS]

        FROM cte_Units U
        INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Leases L ON U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT] = L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Floorplans FP ON U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = FP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_LeaseInfo LI ON L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Today2 T2 ON L.[DATE_END] = T2.[DATE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_UnitDetail UD ON U.[UNIT_KEY] = UD.[UNIT_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_FutureLeases FL ON U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] = FL.[LEASE_ID]
        CROSS JOIN cte_Date_Constants D
        WHERE 1=1;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: MF_METRIC_DETAILS_FACT_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from unknown source into WH_PROD2.dbo.MF_METRIC_DETAILS_FACT (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    

        -- MERGE Statement for Incremental Load
        -- NOTE: Target Columns are UPPERCASE. Source Columns match Staging (Mixed Case).
        MERGE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS_FACT] AS Target
        USING [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS] AS Source
        ON (
            Target.[DATE_KEY] = Source.[DATE_KEY] AND 
            Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
            Target.[UNIT_KEY] = Source.[UNIT_KEY]
        )
        
        -- UPDATE existing records
        WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
            Target.[PROPERTY_NAME] = Source.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            Target.[APARTMENT_NUMBER] = Source.[APARTMENT_NUMBER],
            Target.[BUILDING] = Source.[BUILDING],
            Target.[CUSTOMER_NAME] = Source.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
