            Target.[DATE_MIN30] = Source.[DATE_MIN30],
            Target.[DATE_MIN60] = Source.[DATE_MIN60],
            Target.[DATE_MOVE_IN] = Source.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
            Target.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] = Source.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            Target.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE] = Source.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            Target.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE] = Source.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            
            -- FIX: Mapping Mixed Case Source to Uppercase Target
            Target.[DATE_UNIT_CURRENT_MOVE_IN] = Source.[DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            Target.[DATE_UNIT_LAST_MOVE_OUT] = Source.[DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            Target.[DATEID_APPROVED] = Source.[DATEID_APPROVED],
            Target.[DATEID_BEGIN] = Source.[DATEID_BEGIN],
            Target.[DATEID_CANCELLED] = Source.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
            Target.[DATEID_END] = Source.[DATEID_END],
            
            -- FIX: Mapping Mixed Case Source to Uppercase Target
            Target.[DATEID_UNIT_CURRENT_MOVE_IN] = Source.[DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            Target.[DATEID_UNIT_LAST_MOVE_OUT] = Source.[DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            Target.[DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN] = Source.[DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN],
            Target.[FLAG_CANCELLED] = Source.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
            Target.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL] = Source.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            Target.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT] = Source.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT],
            Target.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS] = Source.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS],
            Target.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT] = Source.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT],
            Target.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS] = Source.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
            Target.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL] = Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],

            Target.[INTERVAL_TYPE] = Source.[INTERVAL_TYPE],
            Target.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = Source.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            Target.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT] = Source.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
            Target.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] = Source.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            Target.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            Target.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT] = Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            Target.[LEASE_TERM] = Source.[LEASE_TERM],
            Target.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC] = Source.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
            Target.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM] = Source.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            Target.[SPACE] = Source.[SPACE],

            Target.[UNIT_COUNT] = Source.[UNIT_COUNT],
            Target.[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE] = Source.[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
            Target.[UNIT_STATUS] = Source.[UNIT_STATUS]

        -- INSERT new records
        WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [UNIT_KEY],
            [APARTMENT_NUMBER], [BUILDING],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_BEGIN], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_END],
            [DATE_MAX30], [DATE_MAX60], [DATE_MIN30], [DATE_MIN60],
            [DATE_MOVE_IN], [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            -- Uppercase Target Columns
            [DATE_UNIT_CURRENT_MOVE_IN], [DATE_UNIT_LAST_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATEID_APPROVED], [DATEID_BEGIN], [DATEID_CANCELLED], [DATEID_END],
            -- Uppercase Target Columns
            [DATEID_UNIT_CURRENT_MOVE_IN], [DATEID_UNIT_LAST_MOVE_OUT],
            [DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN],
            [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED],
            [FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
            [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_MOVED_IN], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            [FLAG_NEW_LEASE], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT],
            [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            [FLAG_UNIT_AVAILABLE], [FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_UNIT_VACANT],
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MAX], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MIN],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            [LEASE_ID_CURRENT], [LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            [LEASE_TERM], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            [SPACE], [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER],
            [UNIT_COUNT], [UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE], [UNIT_STATUS]
        ) VALUES (
            Source.[DATE_KEY], Source.[PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[PROPERTY_NAME], Source.[UNIT_KEY],
            Source.[APARTMENT_NUMBER], Source.[BUILDING],
            Source.[CUSTOMER_NAME], Source.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], Source.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE], Source.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            Source.[DATE_APPROVED], Source.[DATE_BEGIN], Source.[DATE_CANCELLED], Source.[DATE_END],
            Source.[DATE_MAX30], Source.[DATE_MAX60], Source.[DATE_MIN30], Source.[DATE_MIN60],
            Source.[DATE_MOVE_IN], Source.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            Source.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], Source.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            -- Mapping Mixed Case Source to Uppercase Target
            Source.[DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], Source.[DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            Source.[DATEID_APPROVED], Source.[DATEID_BEGIN], Source.[DATEID_CANCELLED], Source.[DATEID_END],
            -- Mapping Mixed Case Source to Uppercase Target
            Source.[DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], Source.[DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            Source.[DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN],
            Source.[FLAG_CANCELLED], Source.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            Source.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT], Source.[FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS],
            Source.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT], Source.[FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS], Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH], Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
            Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL], Source.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            Source.[FLAG_MOVED_IN], Source.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            Source.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE], Source.[FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN], Source.[FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT],
            Source.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            Source.[FLAG_UNIT_AVAILABLE], Source.[FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED], Source.[FLAG_UNIT_VACANT],
            Source.[FLOORPLAN], Source.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], Source.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            Source.[FLOORPLAN_RENT_MAX], Source.[FLOORPLAN_RENT_MIN],
            Source.[INTERVAL_TYPE], Source.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            Source.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT], Source.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            Source.[LEASE_TERM], Source.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], Source.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            Source.[SPACE], Source.[SPACE_COUNT], Source.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], Source.[SPACE_ID], Source.[SPACE_NUMBER],
            Source.[UNIT_COUNT], Source.[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE], Source.[UNIT_STATUS]
        );

END

name: MF_METRIC_DETAILS_SP
transformations: DATEID_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),1,4) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),5,2) + '-' + SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),7,2) )) ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN: CASE WHEN L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT: CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_METRIC_DETAILS.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Date_Constants AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = 30 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_30DAYS],
                MAX(CASE WHEN [RELATIVE_DAY] = 60 THEN [DATE_KEY] END) AS [DATE_KEY_60DAYS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] IN (-1, 30, 60)
        ),
        cte_Today2 AS (
            SELECT [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_THIS_MONTH] = 1
        ),
        cte_Props AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_Units AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                U.[UNIT_KEY],
                U.[COUNT],
                U.[FLAG_AVAILABLE],
                U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                U.[FLAG_VACANT],
                U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                U.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
                U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
                U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
                U.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
                U.[STATUS],
                U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                CASE 
                    WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN 
                        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),1,4) + '-' + 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),5,2) + '-' + 
                            SUBSTRING(CAST(U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS VARCHAR),7,2)
                        )) 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [DATEID_MOVE_OUT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS_F] U
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Leases AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_ID],
                L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                L.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
                L.[UNIT_KEY],
                L.[DATE_APPROVED],
                L.[DATE_BEGIN],
                L.[DATE_CANCELLED],
                L.[DATE_END],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
                L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[DATEID_APPROVED],
                L.[DATEID_BEGIN],
                L.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
                L.[DATEID_END],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
                L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                L.[LEASE_TERM],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
                L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
                L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN],
                L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
                L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
                L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
                L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY 
                L.[LEASE_ID], L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], L.[PROPERTY_KEY], L.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                L.[DATE_APPROVED], L.[DATE_BEGIN], L.[DATE_CANCELLED], L.[DATE_END], L.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
                L.[DATEID_APPROVED], L.[DATEID_BEGIN], L.[DATEID_CANCELLED], L.[DATEID_END], L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN], L.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT],
                L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT], L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
                L.[SPACE_COUNT], L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], L.[UNIT_KEY],
                L.[FLAG_COMPLETE], L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE], L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
                L.[INTERVAL_TYPE], L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE], L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
                L.[LEASE_TERM], L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE], L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
                L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM], L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW], L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
                L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER], L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN], L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT]
        ),
        cte_LeaseInfo AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN]
        ),
        cte_FutureLeases AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[LEASE_ID],
                MAX(L.[DATE_MOVE_IN]) AS [DATE_MOVE_IN],
                MAX(L.[CUSTOMER_NAME]) AS [CUSTOMER_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEASES_F] L
            GROUP BY L.[LEASE_ID]
        ),
        cte_Floorplans AS (
            SELECT 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [COUNT],
                [FLOORPLAN],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_ID],
                [RENT_MAX],
                [RENT_MIN]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F]
        ),
        cte_UnitDetail AS (
            SELECT 
                [UNIT_KEY],
                [APARTMENT_NUMBER],
                [BUILDING],
                [SPACE],
                NULL AS [SPACE_ID],
                [SPACE_NUMBER]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [UNIT_KEY], [UNIT_COUNT],
            [APARTMENT_NUMBER], [BUILDING],
            [CUSTOMER_NAME], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST], [CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE], [CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            [DATE_APPROVED], [DATE_BEGIN], [DATE_CANCELLED], [DATE_END],
            [DATE_MAX30], [DATE_MAX60], [DATE_MIN30], [DATE_MIN60],
            [DATE_MOVE_IN], [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE], [DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            [DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], [DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            [DATEID_APPROVED], [DATEID_BEGIN], [DATEID_CANCELLED], [DATEID_END],
            [DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN], [DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            [DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN],
            [FLAG_CANCELLED], [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            [FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT], [FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_30_DAYS], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_60_DAYS],
            [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_RENEWED], [FLAG_LEASE_DATE_END_CURRENT_MONTH_UNDECIDED],
            [FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL], [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            [FLAG_MOVED_IN], [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            [FLAG_NEW_LEASE], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN], [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT], [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            [FLAG_UNIT_AVAILABLE], [FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_UNIT_VACANT],
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MAX], [FLOORPLAN_RENT_MIN],
            [INTERVAL_TYPE], [INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            [LEASE_ID_CURRENT], [LEASE_ID_FUTURE], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            [LEASE_TERM], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC], [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            [SPACE], [SPACE_COUNT], [SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE], [SPACE_ID], [SPACE_NUMBER],
            [UNIT_OCCUPANCY_TYPE], [UNIT_STATUS]
        )
        SELECT 
            P.[DATE_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            U.[UNIT_KEY],
            U.[COUNT] AS [UNIT_COUNT],
            UD.[APARTMENT_NUMBER],
            UD.[BUILDING],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST],
            FL.[CUSTOMER_NAME] AS [CUSTOMER_NAME_FUTURE],
            LI.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST],
            L.[DATE_APPROVED],
            L.[DATE_BEGIN],
            L.[DATE_CANCELLED],
            L.[DATE_END],
            D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] AS [DATE_MAX30],
            D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] AS [DATE_MAX60],
            D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AS [DATE_MIN30],
            D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AS [DATE_MIN60],
            FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN],
            L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
            L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_COMPLETE],
            L.[DATE_STATUS_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
            
            L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] AS [DATE_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] AS [DATE_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            L.[DATEID_APPROVED],
            L.[DATEID_BEGIN],
            L.[DATEID_CANCELLED],
            L.[DATEID_END],
            
            L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN] AS [DATEID_UNIT_Current_MOVE_IN],
            U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] AS [DATEID_UNIT_Last_MOVE_OUT],
            
            CASE WHEN U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] > 0 THEN ISNULL(L.[DATEID_MOVE_IN],0) - U.[DATEID_MOVE_OUT] ELSE 0 END,
            L.[FLAG_CANCELLED],
            L.[FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
            
            -- FLAG_F30_LEASE_COUNT
            CASE 
                WHEN U.[STATUS] = 'NOTICE UNRENTED' AND (
                    (L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS]) OR 
                    (L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS])
                ) THEN 0
                WHEN U.[STATUS] IN ('VACANT RENTED NOT READY', 'VACANT RENTED READY') 
                     AND U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] > 0 
                     AND FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] THEN 1
                ELSE U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            END,

            -- FLAG_F30_LEASE_EXITS
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            -- FLAG_F60_LEASE_COUNT
            CASE 
                WHEN U.[STATUS] = 'NOTICE UNRENTED' AND (
                    (L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS]) OR 
                    (L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS])
                ) THEN 0
                WHEN U.[STATUS] IN ('VACANT RENTED NOT READY', 'VACANT RENTED READY') 
                     AND U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] > 0 
                     AND FL.[DATE_MOVE_IN] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] THEN 1
                ELSE U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            END,

            -- FLAG_F60_LEASE_EXITS
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            L.[FLAG_COMPLETE],
            
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_30DAYS] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_END] >= D.[DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY] AND L.[DATE_END] <= D.[DATE_KEY_60DAYS] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            
            -- Today2 Flags
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL AND L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL 
                 AND L.[FLAG_COMPLETE] = 0 
                 AND L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] = 'RENEWAL'
                 AND L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED] NOT IN ('TRANSFER IN','NEW','TRANSFER OUT','MTM')
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
            CASE WHEN T2.[DATE_KEY] IS NOT NULL 
                 AND L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM] = 0 
                 AND U.[STATUS] IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED', 'NOTICE RENTED') 
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,

            L.[FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_MTM],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_NEW],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_RENEWAL],
            L.[FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
            L.[FLAG_MOVED_IN],
            L.[FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
            L.[FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
            CASE WHEN L.[DATE_MOVE_IN] IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN],
            CASE WHEN U.[DATE_MOVE_OUT] = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT],
            L.[FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
            U.[FLAG_AVAILABLE],
            U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            U.[FLAG_VACANT],
            FP.[FLOORPLAN],
            FP.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            FP.[RENT_MAX],
            FP.[RENT_MIN],
            L.[INTERVAL_TYPE],
            L.[INTERVAL_TYPE_CONFORMED],
            U.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
            U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
            L.[LEASE_TERM],
            L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_CALC],
            L.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS_SYSTEM],
            UD.[SPACE],
            L.[SPACE_COUNT],
            L.[SPACE_COUNT_BY_LEASE],
            UD.[SPACE_ID],
            UD.[SPACE_NUMBER],
            -- [UNIT_COUNT] removed from here (Duplicate)
            U.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
            U.[STATUS]

        FROM cte_Units U
        INNER JOIN cte_Props P ON U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Leases L ON U.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT] = L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Floorplans FP ON U.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = FP.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_LeaseInfo LI ON L.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        LEFT JOIN cte_Today2 T2 ON L.[DATE_END] = T2.[DATE_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_UnitDetail UD ON U.[UNIT_KEY] = UD.[UNIT_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN cte_FutureLeases FL ON U.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE] = FL.[LEASE_ID]
        CROSS JOIN cte_Date_Constants D
        WHERE 1=1;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: MF_MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_METRIC_DETAILS into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Filtered Property List (Active & Conventional)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregate Days to Move In with Specific Filters
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM([DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN]) AS [DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS]
            WHERE [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN] <> 1 
              AND [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT] <> 1
            GROUP BY 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Final AS (
            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'Move In Days Total' AS [METRIC_NAME],
                'INT' AS [METRIC_DATATYPE],
                'The total number of move in days by floorplan and by property excluding no move outs and no move ins' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'LEASE_FACTS_F.DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],
                CAST(NULL AS datetime2(3)) AS [DATETIME_VALUE],
                M.[DAYS_TO_MOVE_IN] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_MetricDetails M 
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_MOVE_IN_DAYS_TOTAL] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        FROM cte_Final;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: MF_MOVE_IN_UNITS_TOTAL_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_FACT_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_METRIC_DETAILS into WH_STAGING.dbo.MF_MOVE_IN_UNITS_TOTAL.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_MOVE_IN_UNITS_TOTAL_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_MOVE_IN_UNITS_TOTAL];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Filtered Property List (Active & Conventional)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregate Unit Count with Specific Filters
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM([UNIT_COUNT]) AS [MOVE_IN_UNITS_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS]
            WHERE [FLAG_NO_MOVE_IN] <> 1 
              AND [FLAG_NO_MOVE_OUT] <> 1
            GROUP BY 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Final AS (

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_OCCUPIED_COUNT_SP]
AS
BEGIN

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (

            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)

        cte_Final AS (
            -- Join Props and Aggregates
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],

                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'OCCUPIED_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],
                'Occupied Count' AS [METRIC_NAME],

                'Count of occupied units by floor plan by property for a given date' AS [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
                'UNIT_FACTS_F.FLAG_OCCUPIED' AS [METRIC_SOURCE],

                M.[FLAG_UNIT_OCCUPIED] AS [INT_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4)) AS [DECIMAL_VALUE],
                CAST(NULL AS varchar(255)) AS [VARCHAR_VALUE]
            FROM cte_Props P
            INNER JOIN cte_MetricDetails M 
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_OCCUPIED_COUNT] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],
            [DATETIME_VALUE],
            [INT_VALUE],
            [DECIMAL_VALUE],
            [VARCHAR_VALUE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [METRIC_KEY],
            [METRIC_NAME],
            [METRIC_DATATYPE],
            [METRIC_DESCRIPTION],
            [METRIC_SOURCE],

sql:
-- ==============================================================================
-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
-- ==============================================================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_TARGETS_IMPORT_B_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- TRUNCATE MUST HAPPEN BEFORE CTEs per process type: Truncate/Load
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_TARGETS];

        -- CTE CHAIN BEGINS
        WITH 
        cte_Imports AS (
            SELECT 
                UPPER([Account_Name]) AS [Account_Name],
                [Academic_Yr] AS [Academic_Yr],
                UPPER([Account_Code]) AS [Account_Code],
                UPPER([Level_Name]) AS [Level_Name],
                -- Simulating ATL word(Level_Name, 1) to grab the first word
                CASE 
                    WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) > 0 
                    THEN SUBSTRING([Level_Name], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) - 1) 
                    ELSE [Level_Name] 
                END AS [Entity_Number],
                [Level_Name] AS [Level_Name_1],
                UPPER([Unit_Type]) AS [Unit_Type],
                [Jan], [Feb], [Mar], [Apr], [May], [Jun], 
                [Jul], [Aug], [Sep], [Oct], [Nov], [Dec]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Rental_Income_Input_Adaptive]
        ),
        
        cte_Props AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 0
        ),
        
        cte_Processing AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                2025 AS [Year],
                SUBSTRING(I.[Account_Code], 17, 100) AS [Account_Code],
                I.[Account_Name],
                I.[Unit_Type],
                P.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                I.[Jan] AS [M01],
                I.[Feb] AS [M02],
                I.[Mar] AS [M03],
                I.[Apr] AS [M04],
                I.[May] AS [M05],
                I.[Jun] AS [M06],
                I.[Jul] AS [M07],
                I.[Aug] AS [M08],
                I.[Sep] AS [M09],
                I.[Oct] AS [M10],
                I.[Nov] AS [M11],
                I.[Dec] AS [M12]
            FROM cte_Imports I
            LEFT JOIN cte_Props P 
                ON I.[Entity_Number] = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
        ),
        
        cte_Pivot AS (
            -- Using CROSS APPLY to efficiently unpivot the 12 month columns
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [Year],
                [Account_Code],
                [Account_Name],
                [Unit_Type],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                UNP.[PIVOT_HDR1],
                UNP.[PIVOT_DATA1]
            FROM cte_Processing
            CROSS APPLY (
                VALUES 
                    ('M01', [M01]), ('M02', [M02]), ('M03', [M03]),
                    ('M04', [M04]), ('M05', [M05]), ('M06', [M06]),
                    ('M07', [M07]), ('M08', [M08]), ('M09', [M09]),
                    ('M10', [M10]), ('M11', [M11]), ('M12', [M12])
            ) AS UNP([PIVOT_HDR1], [PIVOT_DATA1])
        ),
        
        cte_FloorplanKeys AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                P.[Account_Code] AS [ACCOUNT_CODE],
                P.[Account_Name] AS [ACCOUNT_NAME],
                F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                P.[Unit_Type] AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                -- Converting Year + Month string into an INT YYYYMM
                CAST((CAST(P.[Year] AS VARCHAR(4)) + SUBSTRING(P.[PIVOT_HDR1], 2, 2)) AS INT) AS [PERIOD_YYYYMM],
                P.[PIVOT_DATA1] AS [TARGET_VALUE],
                P.[Year] AS [YEAR]
            FROM cte_Pivot P
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F] F 
                ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = F.[PROPERTY_KEY] 
               AND P.[Unit_Type] = F.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
        ),

        cte_Keys AS (
            SELECT *
            FROM cte_FloorplanKeys
            WHERE [FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NOT NULL
        ),
        
        cte_Exploder AS (
            SELECT 
                D.[DATE_KEY],
                K.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                K.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                K.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                K.[ACCOUNT_CODE],
                K.[ACCOUNT_NAME],
                K.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                K.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                K.[PERIOD_YYYYMM],
                K.[TARGET_VALUE],
                K.[YEAR]
            FROM cte_Keys K
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] D 
                ON D.[YYYYMM] = K.[PERIOD_YYYYMM]
        )
        
        -- TARGET INSERT LOGIC
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_TARGETS] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [ACCOUNT_CODE],
            [ACCOUNT_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [PERIOD_YYYYMM],
            [TARGET_VALUE],
            [YEAR]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [ACCOUNT_CODE],
            [ACCOUNT_NAME],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [PERIOD_YYYYMM],
            [TARGET_VALUE],
            [YEAR]
        FROM cte_Exploder;

        COMMIT TRAN;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRAN;

        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();

        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

        CTE_Unpivot AS (

                proc_data.[Account_Name],

            CROSS APPLY (

                ('M07', [Jul]), ('M08', [Aug]), ('M09', [Sep]),

            ) AS unpvt ([Month_Code], [Target_Value])
        ),
        CTE_FloorplanKeys AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                U.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                U.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                U.[Account_Code],
                U.[Account_Name],
                F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                U.[Unit_Type] AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                CAST(
                    CAST(U.[Year] AS VARCHAR(4)) + SUBSTRING(U.[Month_Code], 2, 2)

        )
        -- 3. Final Insert

        (

            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],

            [ACCOUNT_NAME],

-- ==============================================================================

-- Schema modifications/drops are prohibited.

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_TARGETS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- Apply Truncate Load Strategy BEFORE CTE processing per Rule 0.3
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_TARGETS];

        -- Execute CTE Logic and Insert
        WITH 
        CTE_Imports AS (
            SELECT 
                UPPER([Account_Name]) AS [ACCOUNT_NAME],
                [Academic_Yr],
                UPPER([Account_Code]) AS [ACCOUNT_CODE],
                UPPER([Level_Name]) AS [LEVEL_NAME],
                -- Simulate the ATL word(Level_Name, 1) function to extract Entity_Number
                LEFT([Level_Name], CASE 
                                     WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name] + ' ') - 1 < 0 THEN LEN([Level_Name]) 
                                     ELSE CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name] + ' ') - 1 
                                   END) AS [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [Level_Name] AS [LEVEL_NAME_1],
                UPPER([Unit_Type]) AS [UNIT_TYPE],
                [Jan], [Feb], [Mar], [Apr], [May], [Jun], 
                [Jul], [Aug], [Sep], [Oct], [Nov], [Dec]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Rental_Income_Input_Adaptive]
        ),
        CTE_Props AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [PROPERTY_TYPE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 0
        ),
        CTE_Processing AS (
            SELECT 
                p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                2025 AS [YEAR],
                SUBSTRING(i.[ACCOUNT_CODE], 17, 100) AS [ACCOUNT_CODE],
                i.[ACCOUNT_NAME],
                i.[UNIT_TYPE],
                p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                p.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                i.[Jan] AS M01, i.[Feb] AS M02, i.[Mar] AS M03, i.[Apr] AS M04,
                i.[May] AS M05, i.[Jun] AS M06, i.[Jul] AS M07, i.[Aug] AS M08,
                i.[Sep] AS M09, i.[Oct] AS M10, i.[Nov] AS M11, i.[Dec] AS M12
            FROM CTE_Imports i
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Props p ON i.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = p.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
        ),
        CTE_Pivot AS (
            -- Replaces the ATL Pivot transform using CROSS APPLY
            SELECT 
                cp.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                cp.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                cp.[YEAR],
                cp.[ACCOUNT_CODE],
                cp.[ACCOUNT_NAME],
                cp.[UNIT_TYPE],
                cp.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                cp.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                upvt.PIVOT_SEQ,
                upvt.PIVOT_HDR1,
                upvt.PIVOT_DATA1

                    (1, 'M01', cp.M01), (2, 'M02', cp.M02), (3, 'M03', cp.M03),

        CTE_FloorplanKeys AS (

                p.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                p.[ACCOUNT_CODE],
                p.[ACCOUNT_NAME],
                f.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                p.[UNIT_TYPE] AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],

                p.PIVOT_DATA1 AS [TARGET_VALUE],

        ),
        CTE_KEYS AS (

                [ACCOUNT_NAME],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [PERIOD_YYYYMM],
                [TARGET_VALUE],

        CTE_Exploder AS (
            SELECT 
                d.[DATE_KEY],
                k.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                k.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                k.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                k.[ACCOUNT_CODE],
                k.[ACCOUNT_NAME],
                k.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                k.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                k.[PERIOD_YYYYMM],
                k.[TARGET_VALUE],
                k.[YEAR]
            FROM CTE_KEYS k

        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MF_TARGETS] (
            [DATE_KEY],

            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],

sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MF_UNIT_COUNT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_UNIT_COUNT];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH cte_Props AS (
            -- Sourced from PROPERTY_FACT_F with strict filtering
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACT_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100003)
        ),
        cte_MetricDetails AS (
            -- Aggregating Unit Counts from the Detail table
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                SUM([UNIT_COUNT]) AS [UNIT_COUNT]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[MF_METRIC_DETAILS]
            GROUP BY 
                [DATE_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Combo AS (
            -- Joining Props and Metrics
            -- NOTE: ATL explicitly joins ON PROPERTY_KEY only. 
            SELECT 
                P.[DATE_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                M.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                'UNIT_COUNT' AS [METRIC_KEY],

            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] >= -30

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.Milestones_Employees_Export, WH_STAGING.dbo.Milestones_New_Hires.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0 BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Tables
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_Employees_Export];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_New_Hires];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_New_Terms];

        -- =========================================================================
        -- INSERT 1: Main Export
        -- =========================================================================
        ;WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                emp.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                emp.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                emp.[NAME_FIRST],
                emp.[NAME_LAST],
                emp.[EMAIL],
                emp.[DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(emp.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                emp.[STATUS],
                emp.[DATEID_HIRED],
                emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
                CASE 
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE emp.[PROPERTY_NAME] 
                END AS [LOCATION],
                prop.[ADDRESS_1],
                prop.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                prop.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                prop.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                emp.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_HIRED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_NEW],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_TERMS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] emp
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] prop ON emp.[PROPERTY_KEY] = prop.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE emp.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' AND emp.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' AND emp.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        CTE_InitList AS (
            SELECT 
                e.[PROPERTY_KEY], e.[PROPERTY_NAME], e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], e.[FLAG_31_NEW], e.[FLAG_31_TERMS],
                e.[NAME_FIRST], e.[NAME_LAST], e.[EMAIL], e.[LOCATION], e.[DEPARTMENT], e.[TITLE], e.[STATUS],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '2970 CLAIRMONT RD #310' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_1] END AS [ADDRESS_1],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'ATLANTA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_CITY] END AS [ADDRESS_CITY],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'GA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_STATE] END AS [ADDRESS_STATE],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '30329' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_ZIP] END AS [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE]
            FROM CTE_Emps1 e
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLE_CONTROL_0] tctrl ON e.[TITLE] = tctrl.[TITLE]
            WHERE (NOT (UPPER(e.[DEPARTMENT]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND (NOT (UPPER(e.[TITLE]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE] = 1
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_Employees_Export] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
            [EMAIL], [LOCATION], [ADDRESS_1], [ADDRESS_CITY], [ADDRESS_STATE], 
            [ADDRESS_ZIP], [DEPARTMENT], [TITLE], [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_LAST],
            [EMAIL], [LOCATION], [ADDRESS_1], [ADDRESS_CITY], [ADDRESS_STATE], 
            [ADDRESS_ZIP], [DEPARTMENT], [TITLE], [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_InitList
        WHERE [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE] = 1 AND [STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED';

        -- =========================================================================
        -- INSERT 2: New Hires
        -- =========================================================================
        ;WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                emp.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                emp.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                emp.[NAME_FIRST],
                emp.[NAME_LAST],
                emp.[EMAIL],
                emp.[DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(emp.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                emp.[STATUS],
                emp.[DATEID_HIRED],
                emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
                CASE 
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE emp.[PROPERTY_NAME] 
                END AS [LOCATION],
                prop.[ADDRESS_1],
                prop.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                prop.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                prop.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                emp.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_HIRED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_NEW],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_TERMS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] emp
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] prop ON emp.[PROPERTY_KEY] = prop.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE emp.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' AND emp.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' AND emp.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        CTE_InitList AS (
            SELECT 
                e.[PROPERTY_KEY], e.[PROPERTY_NAME], e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], e.[FLAG_31_NEW], e.[FLAG_31_TERMS],
                e.[NAME_FIRST], e.[NAME_LAST], e.[EMAIL], e.[LOCATION], e.[DEPARTMENT], e.[TITLE], e.[STATUS],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '2970 CLAIRMONT RD #310' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_1] END AS [ADDRESS_1],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'ATLANTA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_CITY] END AS [ADDRESS_CITY],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'GA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_STATE] END AS [ADDRESS_STATE],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '30329' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_ZIP] END AS [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE]
            FROM CTE_Emps1 e
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLE_CONTROL_0] tctrl ON e.[TITLE] = tctrl.[TITLE]
            WHERE (NOT (UPPER(e.[DEPARTMENT]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND (NOT (UPPER(e.[TITLE]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE] = 1
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_New_Hires] (
            [firstName], [lastName], [address1], [city], 
            [state], [zip], [email], [dsfUserName], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [NAME_FIRST], 
            [NAME_LAST], 
            [ADDRESS_1], 
            [ADDRESS_CITY], 
            [ADDRESS_STATE], 
            [ADDRESS_ZIP], 
            [EMAIL], 
            UPPER(ISNULL([NAME_FIRST],'')) + UPPER(ISNULL([NAME_LAST],'')),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_InitList
        WHERE [FLAG_31_NEW] = 1;

        -- =========================================================================
        -- INSERT 3: New Terms
        -- =========================================================================
        ;WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                emp.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                emp.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                emp.[NAME_FIRST],
                emp.[NAME_LAST],
                emp.[EMAIL],
                emp.[DEPARTMENT],
                UPPER(emp.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                emp.[STATUS],
                emp.[DATEID_HIRED],
                emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
                CASE 
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN emp.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE emp.[PROPERTY_NAME] 
                END AS [LOCATION],
                prop.[ADDRESS_1],
                prop.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                prop.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                prop.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                emp.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_HIRED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_NEW],
                CASE 
                    WHEN (DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', SYSDATETIME()) - emp.[DATEID_TERMINATED]) <= 31 THEN 1 
                    ELSE 0 
                END AS [FLAG_31_TERMS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] emp
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] prop ON emp.[PROPERTY_KEY] = prop.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE emp.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' AND emp.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' AND emp.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        CTE_InitList AS (
            SELECT 
                e.[PROPERTY_KEY], e.[PROPERTY_NAME], e.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], e.[FLAG_31_NEW], e.[FLAG_31_TERMS],
                e.[NAME_FIRST], e.[NAME_LAST], e.[EMAIL], e.[LOCATION], e.[DEPARTMENT], e.[TITLE], e.[STATUS],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '2970 CLAIRMONT RD #310' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_1] END AS [ADDRESS_1],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'ATLANTA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_CITY] END AS [ADDRESS_CITY],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN 'GA' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_STATE] END AS [ADDRESS_STATE],
                CASE WHEN e.[PROPERTY_KEY] BETWEEN 5000 AND 5999 THEN '30329' ELSE e.[ADDRESS_ZIP] END AS [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE]
            FROM CTE_Emps1 e
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLE_CONTROL_0] tctrl ON e.[TITLE] = tctrl.[TITLE]
            WHERE (NOT (UPPER(e.[DEPARTMENT]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND (NOT (UPPER(e.[TITLE]) LIKE '%MAINT%')) AND tctrl.[FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE] = 1
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_New_Terms] (
            [firstName], [lastName], [address1], [city], 
            [state], [zip], [email], [dsfUserName], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [NAME_FIRST], 
            [NAME_LAST], 
            [ADDRESS_1], 
            [ADDRESS_CITY], 
            [ADDRESS_STATE], 
            [ADDRESS_ZIP], 
            [EMAIL], 
            UPPER(ISNULL([NAME_FIRST],'')) + UPPER(ISNULL([NAME_LAST],'')),
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_InitList
        WHERE [FLAG_31_TERMS] = 1;

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES_SP
transformations: LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
LOCATION: CASE WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME] END
MILESTONE_TYPE: CASE WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'MAINTENANCE' ELSE 'LEASING' END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.APP_EMPLOYEES, WH_STAGING.dbo.MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Tables
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[APP_EMPLOYEES];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES];

        -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- LOAD 1: [APP_EMPLOYEES]
        -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] E
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P 
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE 
                E.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' 
                AND E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' 
                AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        CTE_Final AS (
            SELECT 
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                E.[LOCATION],
                E.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                E.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                E.[TITLE],
                TC.[TITLE] AS [TITLE_CONTROL],
                1 AS [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM CTE_Emps1 E
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLE_CONTROL_0] TC 
                ON UPPER(E.[TITLE]) = TC.[TITLE]
            WHERE 
                E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%LEASING%' 
                OR E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINT%' 
                OR E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%'
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[APP_EMPLOYEES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_CONTROL],
            [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [STATUS]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE],
            [TITLE],
            [TITLE_CONTROL],
            [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
            [TITLE_GROUP],
            [STATUS]
        FROM CTE_Final;

        -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- LOAD 2: [MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES] (Logic Repeated)
        -------------------------------------------------------------------------
        ;WITH CTE_Emps1 AS (
            SELECT 
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                CONCAT(E.[NAME_FIRST], ' ', E.[NAME_LAST]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                CASE 
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES' THEN 'REMOTE ASSOCIATES'
                    WHEN E.[LOCATION] = 'PEAK HOME OFFICE' THEN 'PEAK HOME OFFICE'
                    ELSE P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
                END AS [LOCATION],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                UPPER(E.[TITLE]) AS [TITLE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] E
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P 
                ON E.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE 
                E.[STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED' 
                AND E.[STATUS] <> 'NOT HIRED' 
                AND E.[LOAD_TYPE] <> 'PRE-HIRE'
        ),
        CTE_Final AS (
            SELECT 
                E.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                E.[EMPLOYEE_NAME],
                E.[LOCATION],
                E.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                E.[PROPERTY_TYPE],
                E.[TITLE],
                TC.[TITLE] AS [TITLE_CONTROL],
                1 AS [FLAG_MILESTONES_INCLUDE],
                E.[TITLE_GROUP],
                E.[STATUS]
            FROM CTE_Emps1 E
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_TITLE_CONTROL_0] TC 
                ON UPPER(E.[TITLE]) = TC.[TITLE]
            WHERE 
                E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%LEASING%' 
                OR E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINT%' 
                OR E.[TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%PROPERTY MANAGER%'
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            [MILESTONE_TYPE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME],
            [LOCATION],
            CASE 
                WHEN [TITLE_GROUP] LIKE '%MAINTENANCE%' THEN 'MAINTENANCE'
                ELSE 'LEASING'
            END AS [MILESTONE_TYPE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PROPERTY_TYPE]
        FROM CTE_Final
        WHERE [STATUS] <> 'TERMINATED';

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: MILESTONES_EXPORT_LOAD_SP
transformations: CALCULATED_POINTS: CASE WHEN [MILESTONE_TYPE] = 'LEASING' THEN [POINTS_RAW] * 200 WHEN [MILESTONE_TYPE] = 'MAINTENANCE' THEN [POINTS_RAW] * 100 ELSE NULL END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.Milestones_Export, WH_PROD2.dbo.MILESTONES_EXPORT_HISTORY (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MILESTONES_EXPORT_LOAD_SP]

AS

BEGIN

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    

    BEGIN TRY

        -- Transaction Start

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Staging (CSV Export Target) - "Replace" mode in ATL

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_Export];

        

        -- Note: Do NOT truncate [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MILESTONES_EXPORT_HISTORY] 

        -- logic requires "Append".

        -- 2. Define Transformation CTEs

        

        -- CTE_Dates: Filter for current relative month (0)

        ;WITH CTE_Dates AS (

            SELECT DISTINCT [YYYYMM]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]

            WHERE [RELATIVE_MONTH] = 0

        ),

        -- CTE_Properties: Filter undispositioned properties

        CTE_Properties AS (

            SELECT 

                [PROPERTY_KEY],

                [PROPERTY_NAME],

                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],

                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]

            WHERE [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0

        ),

        -- CTE_All_Emps: Join Employees and Points

        CTE_All_Emps AS (

            SELECT 

                pts.[YYYYMM],

                emp.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],

                emp.[EMPLOYEE_NAME],

                pts.[LOCATION],

                ISNULL(pts.[POINTS], 0) AS [POINTS_RAW],

                pts.[PROPERTY_KEY],

                pts.[PROPERTY_NAME],

                emp.[MILESTONE_TYPE]

            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[MILESTONES_EMPLOYEES] emp

            LEFT OUTER JOIN [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[MILESTONES_POINTS] pts 

                ON pts.[PROPERTY_KEY] = emp.[PROPERTY_KEY] 

                AND pts.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = emp.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]

        ),

        -- CTE_Combo1: Join Logic (Inner Join with Properties and Dates)

        CTE_Combo1 AS (

            SELECT 

                ae.[YYYYMM],

                ae.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],

                ae.[EMPLOYEE_NAME],

                ae.[LOCATION],

                ae.[POINTS_RAW],

                ae.[PROPERTY_KEY],

                ae.[PROPERTY_NAME],

                ae.[MILESTONE_TYPE]

            FROM CTE_All_Emps ae

            INNER JOIN CTE_Properties p ON p.[PROPERTY_KEY] = ae.[PROPERTY_KEY]

            INNER JOIN CTE_Dates d ON d.[YYYYMM] = ae.[YYYYMM]

        ),

        -- CTE_ExportFile: Calculation Logic

        CTE_ExportFile AS (

            SELECT 

                [YYYYMM],

                [EMPLOYEE_CODE],

                [EMPLOYEE_NAME],

                [LOCATION],

                [PROPERTY_KEY],

                [PROPERTY_NAME],

                -- Decode / Case Logic for Points Calculation

                CASE 

                    WHEN [MILESTONE_TYPE] = 'LEASING' THEN [POINTS_RAW] * 200

                    WHEN [MILESTONE_TYPE] = 'MAINTENANCE' THEN [POINTS_RAW] * 100

                    ELSE NULL 

                END AS [CALCULATED_POINTS]

            FROM CTE_Combo1

        ),

        -- CTE_FinalFilter: Filter out NULL points

        CTE_FinalFilter AS (

            SELECT * FROM CTE_ExportFile

            WHERE [CALCULATED_POINTS] IS NOT NULL

        )

        -- 3. Insert into Staging (First Target)

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_Export] (

            [YYYYMM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME], [LOCATION], 

            [POINTS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [LAST_RUN_DT]

        )

        SELECT 

            [YYYYMM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME], [LOCATION], 

            [CALCULATED_POINTS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], SYSDATETIME()

        FROM CTE_FinalFilter;

        -- 4. Append to History (Second Target)

        -- We select from the Staging table we just populated to avoid re-calculating

        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[MILESTONES_EXPORT_HISTORY] (

            [YYYYMM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME], [LOCATION], 

            [POINTS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]

        )

        SELECT 

            [YYYYMM], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME], [LOCATION], 

            [POINTS], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]

        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[Milestones_Export];

        -- Commit Transaction

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        -- Rollback if error

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        THROW;

    END CATCH

END;

name: MS_DATE_BUILDER_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into DB_App_Support.dbo.WEEKS, DB_App_Support.dbo.DATES (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_DATE_BUILDER_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Translated from SAP Data Services MS_DATE_BUILDER.
             Truncates and reloads [WEEKS] and [DATES] from [DATE_F].
             Optimized for Microsoft Fabric (2-part naming for DML).
             Fix: reads from [dbo].[DATE_F] (not WH_ODS.xtemp),
                  uses [QUARTER_YEAR] directly (column already has underscore).
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        TRUNCATE TABLE [DB_App_Support].[dbo].[WEEKS];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [DB_App_Support].[dbo].[DATES];

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        WITH DATE_F_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
                [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
                [DATE] AS [DATE_VAL],
                [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
                TRY_CAST([DATE_TIME] AS DATETIME2(3)) AS [DATE_TIME],
                [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
                [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
                [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
                [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
                [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
                [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
                [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
                [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
                [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
                [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
                [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
                [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
                [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
        )

        INSERT INTO [DB_App_Support].[dbo].[WEEKS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER-YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        )
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE_VAL], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        FROM DATE_F_CTE
        WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1
          AND [RELATIVE_WEEK] BETWEEN -200 AND 52;

        INSERT INTO [DB_App_Support].[dbo].[DATES] (
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        )
        SELECT
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_KEY_AY], [AY], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_END_DATE], [AY_KEY],
            [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY],
            [DATE_VAL], [DATE_ID], [DATE_WITH_TODAY], [DATE_WITH_TODAY_AND_WEEK], [DATE_WITH_WEEK],
            [DATE_TIME], [DAY], [DAY_3], [DAY_OF_MONTH], [DAY_OF_WEEK], [DAY_OF_YEAR],
            [DAYS_IN_MONTH], [DAYS_IN_YEAR], [DAYS_REMAINING_MONTH], [DAYS_REMAINING_YEAR],
            [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY], [FLAG_AY_CURRENT_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY],
            [FLAG_AY_PRELEASE_AY_WEEK], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY], [FLAG_AY_PREVIOUS_AY_WEEK],
            [FLAG_EOM], [FLAG_EOW], [FLAG_HOLIDAY], [FLAG_REPORTABLE_SUNDAY],
            [FLAG_THIS_MONTH], [FLAG_THIS_QUARTER], [FLAG_THIS_WEEK], [FLAG_THIS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_PREVIOUS_MONTH], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_QUARTER], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_WEEK], [FLAG_PREVIOUS_YEAR],
            [FLAG_TODAY], [FLAG_TOMORROW], [FLAG_WEEKDAY], [FLAG_WEEKEND], [FLAG_WORKDAY], [FLAG_YESTERDAY],
            [HOLIDAY], [MONTH], [MONTH_3], [MONTH_ID], [MONTH_OF_QUARTER], [MONTH_OF_YEAR],
            [QUARTER], [QUARTER_YEAR], [QUARTER_ID], [QUARTER_OF_YEAR],
            [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY], [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK], [RELATIVE_DAY], [RELATIVE_MONTH],
            [RELATIVE_QUARTER], [RELATIVE_WEEK], [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [WEEK_ID], [WEEK_OF_YEAR], [YEAR], [YEAR_ID], [YYYYMM]
        FROM DATE_F_CTE
        WHERE [RELATIVE_AY] BETWEEN 0 AND 2;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @Msg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@Msg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_DATA_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_DATA_SP]
AS
/*******************************************************************************
Description: Translated from SAP Data Services MS_Parent_Sunday_Data.
             Updates COMP_FACT with leasing performance as of Sunday (EOW).
             Optimized for Microsoft Fabric (Error 40515 Fix).
*******************************************************************************/
BEGIN
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Process logical views (Sunday, PriorSunday, Facts) 
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- Identify the specific Sunday (EOW) dates
        WITH Sunday_CTE AS (
            SELECT [DATE_KEY], [AY]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK] = 0
        ),
        PriorSunday_CTE AS (
            SELECT [DATE_KEY], [AY]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK] = -1
        ),

        -- Filter for reportable properties
        Properties_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], 
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED], [BED_COUNT_CUSTOM] AS [BED_COUNT_CUSTOM_RENEWAL_BASE]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),

        -- Aggregate Current Week Performance
        PropertyFacts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[DATE_KEY], L.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], P.[BED_COUNT_CUSTOM_RENEWAL_BASE],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_NEW]) AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW]
            FROM [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET] AS L
            INNER JOIN Sunday_CTE AS S ON L.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY] AND L.[AY] = S.[AY]
            INNER JOIN Properties_CTE AS P ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY L.[DATE_KEY], L.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[PROPERTY_NAME], P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], P.[BED_COUNT_CUSTOM_RENEWAL_BASE]
        ),

        -- Aggregate Prior Week Performance for Delta Calculation
        PriorFacts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_NEW]) AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW]
            FROM [dbo].[LEASE_FACTS_SUBSET] AS L
            INNER JOIN PriorSunday_CTE AS PS ON L.[DATE_KEY] = PS.[DATE_KEY] AND L.[AY] = PS.[AY]
            GROUP BY L.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- Aggregate Current Leads/Visits
        AppFacts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(A.[FLAG_LEAD]) AS [FLAG_LEAD],
                SUM(A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]
            FROM [xtemp].[APPLICATION_AGG] AS A
            INNER JOIN Sunday_CTE AS S ON A.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY] AND A.[AY] = S.[AY]
            GROUP BY A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- Aggregate Prior Leads/Visits for Delta
        PriorAppFacts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(A.[FLAG_LEAD]) AS [FLAG_LEAD],
                SUM(A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]
            FROM [xtemp].[APPLICATION_AGG] AS A
            INNER JOIN PriorSunday_CTE AS PS ON A.[DATE_KEY] = PS.[DATE_KEY] AND A.[AY] = PS.[AY]
            GROUP BY A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- Aggregate Unit Occupancy
        UnitFacts_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]) AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            FROM [xtemp].[UNIT_FACTS] AS U
            INNER JOIN Sunday_CTE AS S ON U.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY]
            GROUP BY U.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- Compile Source for Merge
        Combo_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                PF.[DATE_KEY], PF.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
                PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], 
                CAST(PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] * 1.0 / NULLIF(PF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_PCT],
                UF.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                CAST(UF.[FLAG_OCCUPIED] * 1.0 / NULLIF(PF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], 0) * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED_PCT],
                (PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], 0)) AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_THIS_WEEK],
                (PF.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL] - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], 0)) AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_THIS_WEEK],
                (PF.[FLAG_FALL_NEW] - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_NEW], 0)) AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_THIS_WEEK],
                (ISNULL(AF.[FLAG_LEAD], 0) - ISNULL(PAF.[FLAG_LEAD], 0)) AS [FLAG_LEAD_THIS_WEEK],
                (ISNULL(AF.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0) - ISNULL(PAF.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0)) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT_THIS_WEEK]
            FROM PropertyFacts_CTE AS PF
            LEFT JOIN UnitFacts_CTE AS UF ON PF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = UF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            LEFT JOIN PriorFacts_CTE AS PRF ON PF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PRF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            LEFT JOIN AppFacts_CTE AS AF ON PF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = AF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            LEFT JOIN PriorAppFacts_CTE AS PAF ON PF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PAF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )

        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Incremental Load (MERGE)
        -----------------------------------------------------------------------
        MERGE INTO [dbo].[COMP_FACT] AS Target
        USING Combo_CTE AS Source
        ON (Target.[DATE_KEY] = Source.[DATE_KEY] AND Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY])

        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET 
                Target.[COMP_PRELEASED] = Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
