                Target.[COMP_PRELEASED_PCT] = Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_PCT],
                Target.[COMP_OCCUPANCY] = Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                Target.[COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT] = Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED_PCT],
                Target.[THIS_WEEK_LEADS] = Source.[FLAG_LEAD_THIS_WEEK],
                Target.[THIS_WEEK_LEASES] = Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_THIS_WEEK],
                Target.[THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES] = Source.[FLAG_FALL_NEW_THIS_WEEK],
                Target.[THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS] = Source.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_THIS_WEEK],
                Target.[THIS_WEEK_VISITS] = Source.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT_THIS_WEEK],
                Target.[UPDATED_BY] = 'SYSTEM',
                Target.[DATE_UPDATED] = Source.[DATE_KEY]

        WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN
            INSERT ([DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [COMP_PRELEASED], [COMP_PRELEASED_PCT], [COMP_OCCUPANCY], [COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT], [THIS_WEEK_LEADS], [THIS_WEEK_LEASES], [THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES], [THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS], [THIS_WEEK_VISITS], [UPDATED_BY], [DATE_UPDATED])
            VALUES (Source.[DATE_KEY], Source.[PROPERTY_KEY], Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_PCT], Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED_PCT], Source.[FLAG_LEAD_THIS_WEEK], Source.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_THIS_WEEK], Source.[FLAG_FALL_NEW_THIS_WEEK], Source.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_THIS_WEEK], Source.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT_THIS_WEEK], 'SYSTEM', Source.[DATE_KEY]);

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @Msg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@Msg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_STAGE_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_STAGE (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_STAGE_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    SET ANSI_WARNINGS OFF;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_STAGE];

        ;WITH
        -- Current Sunday anchor from DATE_F
        Sunday AS (
            SELECT TOP 1 [DATE_KEY], [AY]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK] = 0
        ),
        -- Prior Sunday anchor from DATE_F
        PriorSunday AS (
            SELECT TOP 1 [DATE_KEY], [AY]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_EOW] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY] = 1 AND [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK] = -1
        ),
        -- Reportable properties only
        Properties AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),
        -- Current week lease aggregates (LEASE_FACTS full table, AY match required)
        PropertyFacts AS (
            SELECT
                L.[DATE_KEY],
                L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL])   AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_NEW])     AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS] AS L
            INNER JOIN Sunday AS S
                ON L.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY] AND L.[AY] = S.[AY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY L.[DATE_KEY], L.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
        ),
        -- Prior week lease aggregates
        PriorFacts AS (
            SELECT
                L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL])   AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]) AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
                SUM(L.[FLAG_FALL_NEW])     AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_FACTS] AS L
            INNER JOIN PriorSunday AS PS
                ON L.[DATE_KEY] = PS.[DATE_KEY] AND L.[AY] = PS.[AY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY L.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        -- Current occupancy (Sunday snapshot)
        UnitFacts AS (
            SELECT
                U.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(U.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]) AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS] AS U
            INNER JOIN Sunday AS S
                ON U.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON U.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY U.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        -- Current targets
        Targets AS (
            SELECT
                T.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                T.[FALL_OCC_PERCENT],
                T.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY] AS T
            INNER JOIN Sunday AS S
                ON T.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON T.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        -- Current week app aggregates
        AppFacts AS (
            SELECT
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(A.[FLAG_LEAD])                AS [FLAG_LEAD],
                SUM(A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG] AS A
            INNER JOIN Sunday AS S
                ON A.[DATE_KEY] = S.[DATE_KEY] AND A.[AY] = S.[AY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        -- Prior week app aggregates
        PriorAppFacts AS (
            SELECT
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SUM(A.[FLAG_LEAD])                AS [FLAG_LEAD],
                SUM(A.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[APPLICATION_AGG] AS A
            INNER JOIN PriorSunday AS PS
                ON A.[DATE_KEY] = PS.[DATE_KEY] AND A.[AY] = PS.[AY]
            INNER JOIN Properties AS P
                ON A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[MS_PARENT_SUNDAY_STAGE] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [COMP_FALL_TARGET], [COMP_FALL_TARGET_PCT],
            [COMP_OCCUPANCY], [COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT],
            [COMP_PRELEASED], [COMP_PRELEASED_PCT],
            [DATE_UPDATED],
            [THIS_WEEK_LEADS], [THIS_WEEK_LEASES], [THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES],
            [THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS], [THIS_WEEK_VISITS],
            [UPDATED_BY]
        )
        SELECT
            PF.[DATE_KEY],
            PF.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            T.[FALL_OCC_TOTAL]                              AS [COMP_FALL_TARGET],
            CAST(T.[FALL_OCC_PERCENT] * 100 AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [COMP_FALL_TARGET_PCT],
            UF.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]                              AS [COMP_OCCUPANCY],
            CAST(
                CAST(UF.[FLAG_OCCUPIED] AS DECIMAL(18,4))
                / NULLIF(PF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], 0) * 100
                AS DECIMAL(10,2)
            )                                               AS [COMP_OCCUPANCY_PCT],
            PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]                            AS [COMP_PRELEASED],
            CAST(
                CAST(PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL] AS DECIMAL(18,4))
                / NULLIF(PF.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], 0) * 100
                AS DECIMAL(10,2)
            )                                               AS [COMP_PRELEASED_PCT],
            PF.[DATE_KEY]                                   AS [DATE_UPDATED],
            ISNULL(AF.[FLAG_LEAD], 0)
                - ISNULL(PAF.[FLAG_LEAD], 0)                AS [THIS_WEEK_LEADS],
            PF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL]
                - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_TOTAL], 0)          AS [THIS_WEEK_LEASES],
            PF.[FLAG_FALL_NEW]
                - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_NEW], 0)            AS [THIS_WEEK_NEW_LEASES],
            PF.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL]
                - ISNULL(PRF.[FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL], 0)        AS [THIS_WEEK_RENEWALS],
            ISNULL(AF.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0)
                - ISNULL(PAF.[CONTACT_SUM_ONSITE_VISIT], 0) AS [THIS_WEEK_VISITS],
            'SYSTEM'                                        AS [UPDATED_BY]
        FROM PropertyFacts AS PF
        LEFT JOIN UnitFacts     AS UF  ON UF.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = PF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN Targets       AS T   ON T.[PROPERTY_KEY]   = PF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN PriorFacts    AS PRF ON PRF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN AppFacts      AS AF  ON AF.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = PF.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN PriorAppFacts AS PAF ON PAF.[PROPERTY_KEY] = PF.[PROPERTY_KEY];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: NEW_EMPLOYEE_0_SP
description: DELETE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.NEW_EMPLOYEE_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[NEW_EMPLOYEE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DELETE FROM [dbo].[NEW_EMPLOYEE_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[NEW_EMPLOYEE_0] (
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY], [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC],
        [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL], [DATE_ADDED], [DATEID_ADDED], [DATETIME_ADDED], [DATE_ID],
        [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED], [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED],
        [DATETIME_REHIRED], [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
        [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM], [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM],
        [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_PAYCOM], [AD_LOGIN], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
        [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
        [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [FLAG_REHIRED],
        [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
        [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], [LOCATION_PAYCOM], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK],
        [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE], [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
        [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SECURITY_LEVEL],
        [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
        [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_PAYCOM],
        [TITLE], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_PAYCOM],
        [TYPE], [TYPE_PAYCOM], [TYPE_AD]
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [AWARDS], [CATEGORY], [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC],
        [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL], [DATE_ADDED], [DATEID_ADDED], [DATETIME_ADDED], [DATE_ID],
        [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED], [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED],
        [DATETIME_REHIRED], [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
        [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_AD], [DEPARTMENT_CODE_PAYCOM], [DEPARTMENT_PAYCOM],
        [DIRECTORY_AD], [EMAIL], [EMAIL_AD], [EMAIL_PAYCOM], [AD_LOGIN], [EMPLOYEE_CODE_AD],
        [FLAG_ACTIVE], [FLAG_ACTIVE_AD], [FLAG_CORPORATE], [FLAG_HAS_AD], [FLAG_HAS_ENTRATA],
        [FLAG_DECEASED], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FLAG_NOT_HIRED], [FLAG_ON_LEAVE], [FLAG_PRE_HIRE],
        [FLAG_TEMPORARY], [FLAG_TERMINATED], [FLAG_REHIRED],
        [LEASE_COUNT_NEW], [LEASE_COUNT_RENEWAL], [LEASE_COUNT_TOTAL],
        [LOCATION], [LOCATION_AD], [LOCATION_PAYCOM], [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK],
        [LOCATION_PAYCOM_WORK_CODE], [LOGIN_AD], [LOGIN_ENTRATA],
        [NAME_FIRST], [NAME_MIDDLE], [NAME_LAST], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SECURITY_LEVEL],
        [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME],
        [STATUS], [STATUS_AD], [STATUS_PAYCOM],
        [TITLE], [TITLE_AD], [TITLE_PAYCOM],
        [TYPE], [TYPE_PAYCOM], [TYPE_AD]
    FROM [dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
    WHERE [DATE_HIRED] >= (
        SELECT MIN([DATE_KEY])
        FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
        WHERE [RELATIVE_WEEK] >= -4 AND [RELATIVE_WEEK] <= 0
    );
END

name: OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0_SP
transformations: FALL_OCC_PERCENT: CASE WHEN SUM(BEDS) > 0 AND SUM(OCC_TOTAL) > 0 THEN CAST(SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(SUM(BEDS) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) ELSE 0.0000 END
CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT: CASE WHEN SUM(BEDS) > 0 AND SUM(OCC_TOTAL) > 0 THEN CAST(SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(SUM(BEDS) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) ELSE 0.0000 END
FALL_OCC_PERCENT: CASE WHEN BED_TOTAL > 0 THEN CAST(BED_TOTAL_LEASED AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(BED_TOTAL AS DECIMAL(19,4)) ELSE 0.0000 END
FALL_OCC_BEDS: CASE WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073) THEN FR.FALL_OCC_BEDS ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_BEDS END
FALL_OCC_PERCENT: CASE WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073) THEN FR.FALL_OCC_PERCENT ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_PERCENT END
FALL_OCC_TOTAL: CASE WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073) THEN FR.FALL_OCC_TOTAL ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_TOTAL END
FLAG_FALL_TARGET_FROM_RISC: CASE WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET: CASE WHEN CO.CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET: CASE WHEN FT.FALL_OCC_PERCENT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER, WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0];

        -- 2. Define Logic CTEs
        WITH CTE_Source AS (
            -- Inner Join between Preloader and _0 (Ensures data consistency and applies grouping)
            SELECT 
                T0.DATE_YYYYMM,
                MAX(T0.FLOORPLAN_KEY) AS FLOORPLAN_KEY,
                T0.PROPERTY_KEY,
                T0.BEDS,
                T0.BED_NON_ECON,
                T0.DATE_AY,
                T0.DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR,
                T0.DATE_KEY,
                T0.DATE_UPDATED,
                T0.FLOORPLAN,
                T0.GLOL,
                T0.MKT_RENT_AVG,
                T0.MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC,
                T0.MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL,
                T0.OCC_ADJ,
                T0.OCC_BEDS,
                T0.OCC_BEDS_CA,
                T0.OCC_BEDS_CO,
                T0.OCC_BEDS_MODEL,
                T0.OCC_PCT,
                T0.OCC_TOTAL,
                T0.RENT_CA,
                T0.RENT_CO,
                T0.RENT_LEASED_AVG,
                T0.RENT_LEASED_TOTAL,
                T0.RENT_MODEL,
                T0.RENT_TOTAL,
                T0.VACANCY_LOSS
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER] TP
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_0] T0
                ON TP.FLOORPLAN_KEY = T0.FLOORPLAN_KEY 
               AND TP.PROPERTY_KEY = T0.PROPERTY_KEY
            GROUP BY 
                T0.DATE_YYYYMM, T0.PROPERTY_KEY, T0.BEDS, T0.BED_NON_ECON, T0.DATE_AY,
                T0.DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR, T0.DATE_KEY, T0.DATE_UPDATED, T0.FLOORPLAN,
                T0.GLOL, T0.MKT_RENT_AVG, T0.MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC, T0.MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL,
                T0.OCC_ADJ, T0.OCC_BEDS, T0.OCC_BEDS_CA, T0.OCC_BEDS_CO, T0.OCC_BEDS_MODEL,
                T0.OCC_PCT, T0.OCC_TOTAL, T0.RENT_CA, T0.RENT_CO, T0.RENT_LEASED_AVG,
                T0.RENT_LEASED_TOTAL, T0.RENT_MODEL, T0.RENT_TOTAL, T0.VACANCY_LOSS
        ),
        CTE_FallTargetsRISC AS (
            -- October Targets from RISC (Actuals)
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                DATE_AY,
                DATE_YYYYMM,
                SUM(BEDS) AS FALL_OCC_BEDS,
                SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                CASE 
                    WHEN SUM(BEDS) > 0 AND SUM(OCC_TOTAL) > 0 
                    THEN CAST(SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(SUM(BEDS) AS DECIMAL(19,4))
                    ELSE 0.0000 
                END AS FALL_OCC_PERCENT
            FROM CTE_Source
            WHERE CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(DATE_YYYYMM AS VARCHAR), 5, 2) AS INT) = 10 -- October
            GROUP BY DATE_YYYYMM, PROPERTY_KEY, DATE_AY
        ),
        CTE_CurrentOccupancyRISC AS (
            -- Monthly Occupancy from RISC
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY,
                DATE_AY,
                DATE_YYYYMM,
                SUM(OCC_BEDS) AS CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,
                SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL,
                CASE 
                    WHEN SUM(BEDS) > 0 AND SUM(OCC_TOTAL) > 0 
                    THEN CAST(SUM(OCC_TOTAL) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(SUM(BEDS) AS DECIMAL(19,4))
                    ELSE 0.0000 
                END AS CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT
            FROM CTE_Source
            GROUP BY DATE_YYYYMM, PROPERTY_KEY, DATE_AY
        ),
        CTE_Dates AS (
            -- Date Filter (-2 to +2 years relative to today)
            SELECT DATE_KEY, AY, RELATIVE_AY, YYYYMM
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE RELATIVE_AY IN (-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)
        ),
        CTE_Properties AS (
            -- Property Filter (Reportable, Active, etc)
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, 
                FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0 
              AND FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION = 0
              AND FLAG_NON_PROPERTY = 0
              AND FLAG_TENTATIVE = 0
        ),
        CTE_DATES2 AS (
            -- Dense Grid: Cross Join Dates x Properties
            SELECT 
                D.DATE_KEY, D.AY, D.RELATIVE_AY, D.YYYYMM,
                P.PROPERTY_KEY, P.PROPERTY_NAME, P.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
                P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, P.FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT
            FROM CTE_Dates D
            CROSS JOIN CTE_Properties P
        ),
        CTE_RWTargets AS (
            -- Rate Workbook Targets
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, AY, ENTITY_ID, BED_TOTAL, BED_TOTAL_LEASED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_WORKBOOK_PROPERTY_TARGETS_0]
        ),
        CTE_FallTargetRATE AS (
            -- Calculated Rate Workbook Targets
            SELECT 
                PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, AY,
                BED_TOTAL AS FALL_OCC_BEDS,
                BED_TOTAL_LEASED AS FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                CASE 
                    WHEN BED_TOTAL > 0 
                    THEN CAST(BED_TOTAL_LEASED AS DECIMAL(19,4)) / CAST(BED_TOTAL AS DECIMAL(19,4))
                    ELSE 0.0000 
                END AS FALL_OCC_PERCENT
            FROM CTE_RWTargets
        ),
        CTE_Combo AS (
            -- Main Join and Logic Layer
            SELECT 
                D2.DATE_KEY,
                D2.PROPERTY_KEY,
                D2.AY,
                CO.CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,
                CO.CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT,
                CO.CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL,
                D2.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
                -- Logic: Toggle between RISC and RATE based on Property List
                CASE 
                    WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073)
                    THEN FR.FALL_OCC_BEDS
                    ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_BEDS
                END AS FALL_OCC_BEDS,
                CASE 
                    WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073)
                    THEN FR.FALL_OCC_PERCENT
                    ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_PERCENT
                END AS FALL_OCC_PERCENT,
                CASE 
                    WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073)
                    THEN FR.FALL_OCC_TOTAL
                    ELSE FT.FALL_OCC_TOTAL
                END AS FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                D2.FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT,
                -- Flag Calculation
                CASE 
                    WHEN D2.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9797, 1075, 1127, 9784, 9796, 1069, 1088, 1086, 1110, 1111, 9801, 9816, 1074, 1073)
                    THEN 1 ELSE 0 
                END AS FLAG_FALL_TARGET_FROM_RISC,
                CASE WHEN CO.CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET,
                CASE WHEN FT.FALL_OCC_PERCENT IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET,
                D2.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                D2.PROPERTY_NAME,
                D2.RELATIVE_AY,
                D2.YYYYMM,
                FR.FALL_OCC_BEDS AS RISC_FALL_OCC_BEDS,
                FR.FALL_OCC_TOTAL AS RISC_FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                FR.FALL_OCC_PERCENT AS RISC_FALL_OCC_PERCENT,
                FT.FALL_OCC_BEDS AS RW_FALL_OCC_BEDS,
                FT.FALL_OCC_TOTAL AS RW_FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                FT.FALL_OCC_PERCENT AS RW_FALL_OCC_PERCENT
            FROM CTE_DATES2 D2
            LEFT JOIN CTE_CurrentOccupancyRISC CO 
                ON D2.YYYYMM = CAST(CO.DATE_YYYYMM AS VARCHAR) 
               AND D2.PROPERTY_KEY = CO.PROPERTY_KEY
            LEFT JOIN CTE_FallTargetRATE FT 
                ON D2.AY = FT.AY 
               AND D2.PROPERTY_KEY = FT.PROPERTY_KEY
            LEFT JOIN CTE_FallTargetsRISC FR 
                ON D2.AY = FR.DATE_AY 
               AND D2.PROPERTY_KEY = FR.PROPERTY_KEY
        )
        -- 3. Final Insert
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [CURRENT_OCC_BEDS], [CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT],
            [CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL], [DATE_DISPOSITIONED], [FALL_OCC_BEDS], [FALL_OCC_PERCENT],
            [FALL_OCC_TOTAL], [FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT], [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            [FLAG_FALL_TARGET_FROM_RISC], [FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET], [FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET],
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [RELATIVE_AY], [YYYYMM], [RISC_FALL_OCC_BEDS],
            [RISC_FALL_OCC_TOTAL], [RISC_FALL_OCC_PERCENT], [RW_FALL_OCC_BEDS],
            [RW_FALL_OCC_TOTAL], [RW_FALL_OCC_PERCENT], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS, CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT,
            CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, FALL_OCC_BEDS, FALL_OCC_PERCENT,
            FALL_OCC_TOTAL, FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT, FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            FLAG_FALL_TARGET_FROM_RISC, FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET, FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET,
            CAST(PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)), RELATIVE_AY, CAST(YYYYMM AS VARCHAR(1000)), RISC_FALL_OCC_BEDS,
            RISC_FALL_OCC_TOTAL, RISC_FALL_OCC_PERCENT, RW_FALL_OCC_BEDS,
            RW_FALL_OCC_TOTAL, RW_FALL_OCC_PERCENT, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Combo
        WHERE DATE_DISPOSITIONED >= DATE_KEY; -- Final Filter

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE_LOAD_SP
transformations: FLAG_CHANGED: CASE WHEN ISNULL(P.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], '') <> ISNULL(L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], '') OR ISNULL(P.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], '') <> ISNULL(L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], '') OR ISNULL(P.[PRONOUNS], '') <> ISNULL(L.[PRONOUNS], '') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_PAYCOM, WH_STAGING.dbo.PAYCOM_COMPARE_SET into WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE, WH_STAGING.dbo.LATEST (cross-database).
sql:
/* * ====================================================================================================================
 * SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE (Context: WH_STAGING)
 * ====================================================================================================================
 */
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;
    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- TRUNCATE Targets
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[XPAYCOMTEST1];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[LATEST];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE]; -- Clear Intermediate Stage

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * 1. LOAD INTERMEDIATE STAGE (Perform all Logic Once)
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         */
        WITH [MaxDate] AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM]
            WHERE [DATE_KEY] >= CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)
            GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        ),
        [Latest_Values] AS (
            SELECT 
                I.[DATE_KEY], I.[EMPLOYEE_CODE], I.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], I.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
                -- Mapped from physical names found in Scan
                I.[Preferred_Firstname] AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], 
                I.[Preferred_Lastname]  AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
                I.[Pronouns]            AS [PRONOUNS],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS], I.[DATETIME_UPDATED],
                I.[DATE_TERMINATED]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] I
            INNER JOIN [MaxDate] M 
                ON I.[DATE_KEY] = M.[DATE_KEY] 
               AND I.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = M.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            WHERE ISNULL(I.[DATE_TERMINATED], 0) = 0
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE] (
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS],
            [FLAG_CHANGED], [DATETIME_UPDATED], [DATE_KEY_LATEST],
            [DATE_KEY_PREVIOUS], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],
            [PREFERRED_FIRST_NAME_Clean], [PREFERRED_LAST_NAME_Clean]
        )
        SELECT 
            L.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            L.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
            L.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
            L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
            L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
            L.[PRONOUNS],
            
            -- Change Detection Logic
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(P.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], '') <> ISNULL(L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], '') OR
                     ISNULL(P.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], '')  <> ISNULL(L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], '')  OR
                     ISNULL(P.[PRONOUNS], '')            <> ISNULL(L.[PRONOUNS], '') 
                THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END AS [FLAG_CHANGED],
            
            L.[DATETIME_UPDATED],
            L.[DATE_KEY],
            P.[DATE_KEY],
            L.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS],

            -- InitCap Simulation (Upper 1st, Lower Rest)
            UPPER(LEFT(L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], 1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], 2, LEN(L.[PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME]))),
            UPPER(LEFT(L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], 1)) + LOWER(SUBSTRING(L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME], 2, LEN(L.[PREFERRED_LASTNAME])))

        FROM [Latest_Values] L
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PAYCOM_COMPARE_SET] P 
            ON L.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = P.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        WHERE L.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS] = 'ACTIVE';

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * 2. LOAD TARGETS (Read from Intermediate Stage)
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         */

        -- LOAD 1: The "Latest" snapshot (Full history of comparison)
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[LATEST] (
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], 
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS], 
            [FLAG_CHANGED], [DATETIME_UPDATED], [DATE_KEY_LATEST], 
            [DATE_KEY_PREVIOUS], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], 
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS], 
            [FLAG_CHANGED], [DATETIME_UPDATED], [DATE_KEY_LATEST], 
            [DATE_KEY_PREVIOUS], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE];

        -- LOAD 2: The "Delta Export" (Changes Only)
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[XPAYCOMTEST1] (
            [EE_CODE], [PAYCOM_FIRST_NAME], [PAYCOM_LAST_NAME], 
            [PRONOUNS], [PREFERRED_FIRST_NAME], [PREFERRED_LAST_NAME], 
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], 
            [PRONOUNS], [PREFERRED_FIRST_NAME_Clean], [PREFERRED_LAST_NAME_Clean], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_CHANGE_CAPTURE]
        WHERE [FLAG_CHANGED] = 1;

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status
    SELECT 
        'Success' AS [Status],
        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],
        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],
        'Truncate + Insert (Using Physical Staging Table)' AS [Load_Strategy];
END;

name: PAYCOM_IMPORT_EDM_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PAYCOM_IMPORT_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.PAYCOM_BUSINESS_TITLE_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.PAYCOM_CORP_DEPT_CODE_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_EDM_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- PAYCOM_BUSINESS_TITLE_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_BUSINESS_TITLE_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_BUSINESS_TITLE_0] (
        [BUSINESS_TITLE_KEY], [BUSINESS_TITLE], [BUSINESS_TITLE_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [BUSINESS_TITLE]),
        [BUSINESS_TITLE],
        [BUSINESS_TITLE],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([BUSINESS_TITLE], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [BUSINESS_TITLE];

    -- PAYCOM_CORP_DEPT_CODE_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_CORP_DEPT_CODE_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_CORP_DEPT_CODE_0] (
        [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE_KEY], [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE],
        [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC], [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE]),
        [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE],
        [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
        [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_CODE], [CORPORATE_DEPARTMENT_DESC];

    -- PAYCOM_DEPARTMENT_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_DEPARTMENT_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_DEPARTMENT_0] (
        [DEPARTMENT_KEY], [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_CONFORMED], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [DEPARTMENT]),
        [DEPARTMENT],
        [DEPARTMENT],
        [DEPARTMENT_DESC],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([DEPARTMENT], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_DESC];

    -- PAYCOM_DOL_STATUS_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_DOL_STATUS_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_DOL_STATUS_0] (
        [DOL_STATUS_KEY], [DOL_STATUS], [DOL_STATUS_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [DOL_STATUS]),
        [DOL_STATUS],
        [DOL_STATUS],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([DOL_STATUS], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [DOL_STATUS];

    -- PAYCOM_EEO1_CATEGORY_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_EEO1_CATEGORY_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_EEO1_CATEGORY_0] (
        [EEO1_CATEGORY_KEY], [EEO1_CATEGORY], [EEO1_CATEGORY_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [EEO1_CATEGORY]),
        [EEO1_CATEGORY],
        [EEO1_CATEGORY],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([EEO1_CATEGORY], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [EEO1_CATEGORY];

    -- PAYCOM_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_0 (no FLAG_TERMINATED filter per ATL)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_EMPLOYEE_STATUS_0] (
        [EMPLOYEE_STATUS_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [EMPLOYEE_STATUS]),
        UPPER([EMPLOYEE_STATUS]),
        [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([EMPLOYEE_STATUS], '') <> ''
    GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_STATUS];

    -- PAYCOM_MANAGER_LEVEL_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_MANAGER_LEVEL_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_MANAGER_LEVEL_0] (
        [MANAGER_LEVEL_KEY], [MANAGER_LEVEL], [MANAGER_LEVEL_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [MANAGER_LEVEL]),
        [MANAGER_LEVEL],
        [MANAGER_LEVEL],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([MANAGER_LEVEL], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [MANAGER_LEVEL];

    -- PAYCOM_POSITION_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_POSITION_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_POSITION_0] (
        [POSITION_KEY], [POSITION], [POSITION_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [POSITION]),
        [POSITION],
        [POSITION],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([POSITION], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [POSITION];

    -- PAYCOM_ROLE_DESC_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_ROLE_DESC_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_ROLE_DESC_0] (
        [ROLE_DESC_KEY], [ROLE_DESC], [ROLE_DESC_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [ROLE_DESC]),
        [ROLE_DESC],
        [ROLE_DESC],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([ROLE_DESC], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [ROLE_DESC];

    -- PAYCOM_TITLE_GROUPS_0 (no CONFORMED column)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_TITLE_GROUPS_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_TITLE_GROUPS_0] (
        [TITLEGROUPS_KEY], [TITLEGROUPS], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [TITLEGROUPS]),
        [TITLEGROUPS],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE ISNULL([TITLEGROUPS], '') <> '' AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [TITLEGROUPS];

    -- PAYCOM_WORK_LOCATION_0
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_WORK_LOCATION_0];
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_WORK_LOCATION_0] (
        [WORK_LOCATION_CODE_KEY], [WORK_LOCATION_CODE], [WORK_LOCATION],
        [WORK_LOCATION_CONFORMED], [COUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY [WORK_LOCATION_CODE]),
        [WORK_LOCATION_CODE],
        [WORK_LOCATION],
        [WORK_LOCATION],
        SUM([COUNT])
    FROM [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_0]
    WHERE [WORK_LOCATION_CODE] IS NOT NULL AND [FLAG_TERMINATED] = 0
    GROUP BY [WORK_LOCATION_CODE], [WORK_LOCATION];

END

name: PAYCOM_IMPORT_LOAD_SP
transformations: DATE_HIRED_RAW: CASE WHEN [Hire_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Hire_Date] END
DATE_REHIRED_RAW: CASE WHEN [Rehire_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Rehire_Date] END
DATE_TERMINATED_RAW: CASE WHEN [Termination_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Termination_Date] END
DATE_SENIORITY_RAW: CASE WHEN [Seniority_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Seniority_Date] END
PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME: CASE WHEN [Preferred_Firstname] = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Preferred_Firstname] END
PREFERRED_LASTNAME: CASE WHEN [Preferred_Lastname] = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Preferred_Lastname] END
PRONOUNS: CASE WHEN [Pronouns] = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Pronouns] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_PAYCOM_IMPORT, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_PAYCOM_TRANSFORMED, WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_PAYCOM (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PAYCOM_IMPORT_LOAD_SP]

AS

BEGIN

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;

    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    

    DECLARE @YesterdayDate DATE = DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME());

    DECLARE @YesterdayInt INT = CAST(FORMAT(@YesterdayDate, 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT);

    DECLARE @YesterdayString VARCHAR(8) = FORMAT(@YesterdayDate, 'yyyyMMdd');

    BEGIN TRY

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Intermediate Table

        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_TRANSFORMED];

        /*

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC -> INTO INTERMEDIATE TABLE

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         */

        WITH [Raw_File] AS (

            SELECT 

                CASE WHEN [Hire_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Hire_Date] END AS [DATE_HIRED_RAW],

                CASE WHEN [Rehire_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Rehire_Date] END AS [DATE_REHIRED_RAW],

                CASE WHEN [Termination_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Termination_Date] END AS [DATE_TERMINATED_RAW],

                CASE WHEN [Seniority_Date] = '00/00/0000' THEN NULL ELSE [Seniority_Date] END AS [DATE_SENIORITY_RAW],

                

                UPPER([Corporate_Department_Code]) AS [CORP_DEPT_CODE],

                UPPER([Corporate_Department_Desc]) AS [CORP_DEPT_DESC],

                UPPER([Manager_Level]) AS [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],

                UPPER([Department]) AS [DEPARTMENT],

                UPPER([Department_Desc]) AS [DEPARTMENT_DESC],

                UPPER([DOL_Status]) AS [DOL_STATUS],

                UPPER([EEO1_Category]) AS [EEO1_CATEGORY],

                [Employee_Added] AS [EMPLOYEE_ADDED],

                UPPER([Employee_Code]) AS [EMPLOYEE_CODE],

                UPPER([Legal_Firstname]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],

                UPPER([Legal_Middle_Name]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE],

                UPPER([Legal_Lastname]) AS [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],

                UPPER([Employee_Status]) AS [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],

                UPPER([Position]) AS [PAYCOM_POSITION],

                [Payroll_Profile_Code] AS [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],

                UPPER([Business_Title]) AS [POSITION],

                

                CASE WHEN [Preferred_Firstname] = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Preferred_Firstname] END AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],

                CASE WHEN [Preferred_Lastname]  = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Preferred_Lastname] END AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],

                CASE WHEN [Pronouns]            = '' THEN NULL ELSE [Pronouns] END AS [PRONOUNS],

                

                UPPER([RoleDescription]) AS [ROLE_DESCRIPTION],

                UPPER([Supervisor_Primary]) AS [SUPERVISOR_NAME],

                UPPER([Supervisor_Primary_Code]) AS [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],

                UPPER([TitleGroup]) AS [TITLE_GROUP],

                UPPER([Work_Email]) AS [WORK_EMAIL],

                UPPER([Work_Location]) AS [WORK_LOCATION],

                [DI_FILENAME]

            FROM [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_IMPORT]

            WHERE LEFT([DI_FILENAME], 8) = @YesterdayString

        ),

        [Calculated] AS (

            SELECT 

                R.*,

                @YesterdayInt AS [DATE_KEY],

                

                COALESCE(

                    CASE 

                        WHEN R.[DEPARTMENT] = '621' THEN 217

                        WHEN R.[DEPARTMENT] = '633' THEN 218

                        WHEN R.[DEPARTMENT] = '637' THEN 219

                        WHEN R.[DEPARTMENT] != 'FLD' THEN

                            CASE 

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '910' THEN 5005

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('911', '912') THEN 5002

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('913', '980') THEN 5010

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('914', '915', '990') THEN 5006

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('916', '929', '950') THEN 5001

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '918' THEN 5003

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('919', '960') THEN 5011

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '923' THEN 5018

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '925' THEN 5016

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] IN ('800', '926') THEN 5016

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '927' THEN 5010

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '928' THEN 5014

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '930' THEN 5016

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '940' THEN 5024

                                WHEN R.[CORP_DEPT_CODE] = '970' THEN 5003

                                ELSE TRY_CAST(R.[DEPARTMENT] AS INT)

                            END

                        ELSE TRY_CAST(R.[DEPARTMENT] AS INT)

                    END,

                    5000 

                ) AS [WORK_LOCATION_CODE],

                TRY_CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(R.DATE_HIRED_RAW,7,4), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_HIRED_RAW,1,2), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_HIRED_RAW,4,2)) AS INT) AS [DATE_HIRED],

                TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME2(3), R.DATE_HIRED_RAW, 101) AS [DATETIME_HIRED],

                

                TRY_CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(R.DATE_REHIRED_RAW,7,4), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_REHIRED_RAW,1,2), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_REHIRED_RAW,4,2)) AS INT) AS [DATE_REHIRED],

                TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME2(3), R.DATE_REHIRED_RAW, 101) AS [DATETIME_REHIRED],

                

                TRY_CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING(R.DATE_TERMINATED_RAW,7,4), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_TERMINATED_RAW,1,2), SUBSTRING(R.DATE_TERMINATED_RAW,4,2)) AS INT) AS [DATE_TERMINATED],

                TRY_CONVERT(DATETIME2(3), R.DATE_TERMINATED_RAW, 101) AS [DATETIME_TERMINATED],

                @YesterdayInt AS [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], 

                R.[DI_FILENAME] AS [SOURCE_FILE_NAME]

            FROM [Raw_File] R

        ),

        [Properties] AS (

            SELECT 

                [PROPERTY_KEY],

                [ENTITY_NUMBER],

                [PROPERTY_NAME],

                [FLAG_REPORTABLE]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]

            WHERE [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 

               OR [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 

               OR [FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 

               OR [ENTITY_NUMBER] = '160'

        ),

        [Combo] AS (

            SELECT 

                C.*,

                COALESCE(P.[PROPERTY_KEY], 5000) AS [FINAL_PROPERTY_KEY],

                P.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [FINAL_PROPERTY_NAME],

                DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', C.[DATETIME_HIRED]) AS [DATEID_HIRED],

                DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', C.[DATETIME_REHIRED]) AS [DATEID_REHIRED],

                DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', C.[DATETIME_TERMINATED]) AS [DATEID_TERMINATED]

            FROM [Calculated] C

            LEFT JOIN [Properties] P 

                ON C.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY] 

                OR CAST(C.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE] AS VARCHAR(30)) = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]

        )

        INSERT INTO [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_TRANSFORMED] (

            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [PROPERTY_KEY], 

            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],

            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],

            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_UPDATED],

            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],

            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [DOL_STATUS], [EEO1_CATEGORY], [EMPLOYEE_ADDED],

            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],

            [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [POSITION],

            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS],

            [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],

            [TITLE_GROUP], [WORK_EMAIL], [WORK_LOCATION], [WORK_LOCATION_CODE],

            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME]

        )

        SELECT 

            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [FINAL_PROPERTY_KEY],

            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],

            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],

            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED], SYSDATETIME(),

            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],

            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [DOL_STATUS], [EEO1_CATEGORY], [EMPLOYEE_ADDED],

            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],

            [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [POSITION],

            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS],

            [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [FINAL_PROPERTY_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],

            [TITLE_GROUP], [WORK_EMAIL], [WORK_LOCATION], [WORK_LOCATION_CODE],

            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME]

        FROM [Combo];

        /*

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         * DELETE / INSERT STRATEGY (Using Intermediate Table)

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         */

        

        -- 1. DELETE existing records for this file's Date Key

        DELETE FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] 

        WHERE [DATE_KEY] = @YesterdayInt;

        -- 2. INSERT New Records from Intermediate

        INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] (

            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [PROPERTY_KEY], 

            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED],

            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED],

            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_UPDATED],

            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],

            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [DOL_STATUS], [EEO1_CATEGORY], [EMPLOYEE_ADDED],

            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], [EMPLOYEE_STATUS],

            [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [POSITION],

            [Preferred_Firstname], [Preferred_Lastname], [Pronouns],

            [ROLE_DESCRIPTION], [PROPERTY_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_NAME], [SUPERVISOR_EMP_CODE],

            [TITLE_GROUP], [WORK_EMAIL], [WORK_LOCATION], [WORK_LOCATION_CODE],

            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME]

        )

        SELECT 

            *
        FROM [dbo].[STG_PAYCOM_TRANSFORMED];

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        THROW;

    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status

    SELECT 

        'Success' AS [Status],

        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],

        @YesterdayString AS [File_Date_Processed],

        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],

        'Delete/Insert (Via Physical Stage)' AS [Load_Strategy];

END;

name: PAYCOM_SNAPSHOT_LOAD_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_PAYCOM into WH_STAGING.dbo.PAYCOM_COMPARE_SET (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PAYCOM_SNAPSHOT_LOAD_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;
    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    -- Date Window Logic (from ATL: sysdate-10 to sysdate-5)
    DECLARE @WindowStart INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -10, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @WindowEnd   INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -5, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- TRUNCATE Target (Snapshot is always a fresh lookback)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PAYCOM_COMPARE_SET];

        /*
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC
         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
         */
        WITH [Snapshot_Keys] AS (
            -- Find the LATEST record per Employee WITHIN the specific 5-day window
            SELECT 
                MAX([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY],
                [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM]
            WHERE [DATE_KEY] > @WindowStart 
              AND [DATE_KEY] <= @WindowEnd
            GROUP BY [EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        ),
        [Full_Snapshot] AS (
            SELECT 
                I.[DATE_KEY],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                I.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                I.[DATE_HIRED],
                I.[DATEID_HIRED],
                CAST(I.[DATETIME_HIRED] AS VARCHAR(27)) AS [DATETIME_HIRED],
                I.[DATE_REHIRED],
                I.[DATEID_REHIRED],
                CAST(I.[DATETIME_REHIRED] AS VARCHAR(27)) AS [DATETIME_REHIRED],
                I.[DATE_TERMINATED],
                I.[DATEID_TERMINATED],
                CAST(I.[DATETIME_TERMINATED] AS VARCHAR(27)) AS [DATETIME_TERMINATED],
                CAST(I.[DATETIME_UPDATED] AS VARCHAR(27)) AS [DATETIME_UPDATED],
                I.[CORP_DEPT_CODE],
                I.[CORP_DEPT_DESC],
                I.[CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL],
                I.[DEPARTMENT],
                I.[DEPARTMENT_DESC],
                I.[DOL_STATUS],
                I.[EEO1_CATEGORY],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_ADDED],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST],
                I.[EMPLOYEE_STATUS],
                I.[PAYCOM_POSITION],
                I.[PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE],
                I.[POSITION],
                
                -- FIXED: Source columns likely missing in ODS, projecting NULLs to match Target Schema
                CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME],
                CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [PREFERRED_LASTNAME],
                CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [PRONOUNS],
                
                I.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                I.[WORK_EMAIL],
                I.[WORK_LOCATION],
                I.[WORK_LOCATION_CODE],
                I.[SOURCE_FILE_DATE],
                I.[SOURCE_FILE_NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_PAYCOM] I
            INNER JOIN [Snapshot_Keys] K
                ON I.[DATE_KEY] = K.[DATE_KEY]
               AND I.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = K.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        )
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[PAYCOM_COMPARE_SET] (
            [DATE_KEY], [EMPLOYEE_CODE], [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            [DATE_HIRED], [DATEID_HIRED], [DATETIME_HIRED], 
            [DATE_REHIRED], [DATEID_REHIRED], [DATETIME_REHIRED], 
            [DATE_TERMINATED], [DATEID_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_TERMINATED], [DATETIME_UPDATED], 
            [CORP_DEPT_CODE], [CORP_DEPT_DESC], [CORP_MANAGER_LEVEL], 
            [DEPARTMENT], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [DOL_STATUS], 
            [EEO1_CATEGORY], [EMPLOYEE_ADDED], 
            [EMPLOYEE_NAME_FIRST], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_MIDDLE], [EMPLOYEE_NAME_LAST], 
            [EMPLOYEE_STATUS], [PAYCOM_POSITION], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [POSITION], 
            [PREFERRED_FIRSTNAME], [PREFERRED_LASTNAME], [PRONOUNS], 
            [PROPERTY_NAME], [WORK_EMAIL], [WORK_LOCATION], [WORK_LOCATION_CODE], 
            [SOURCE_FILE_DATE], [SOURCE_FILE_NAME], [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            *, 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [Full_Snapshot];

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status
    SELECT 
        'Success' AS [Status],
        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],
        @WindowStart AS [Window_Start_Int],
        @WindowEnd AS [Window_End_Int],
        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],
        'Truncate + Insert (Historic Snapshot)' AS [Load_Strategy];
END;

name: PAYCOM_TIMECARD_IMPORT_LOAD_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_TIMECARD_IMPORT into WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_TIMECARD_APPROVALS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PAYCOM_TIMECARD_IMPORT_LOAD_SP]

AS

BEGIN

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @StartTime DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();

    DECLARE @SourceRows INT = 0;

    DECLARE @TargetRows INT = 0;

    

    -- Date Logic: Today (YYYYMMDD) for filename filtering

    DECLARE @TodayString VARCHAR(8) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112);

    BEGIN TRY

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- APPEND Strategy (Keep history in ODS, usually implied by log-style imports)

        -- If Truncate is needed, uncomment the next line:

        -- TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_TIMECARD_APPROVALS];

        /*

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         * TRANSFORMATION LOGIC

         * ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

         */

        INSERT INTO [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_TIMECARD_APPROVALS] (
            [DATE_KEY], [EE_CODE], [LAST_NAME], [FIRST_NAME], [BADGE_NBR],
            [DEPARTMENT_CODE], [DEPARTMENT_DESC], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE], [PAYROLL_PROFILE_DESC],
            [CORP_DEPARTMENT_CODE], [CORP_DEPARTMENT_DESC], [ROLE_CODE], [ROLE_DESC],
            [PAYCLASS_CODE], [PAYCLASS_DESC], [EE_STATUS], [DATE_OF_TERM],
            [APPROVAL_TYPE], [DATE_APPROVED], [APPROVED_BY], [APPROVAL_ADDED_DATETIME],
            [DI_FILENAME]
        )

        SELECT DISTINCT

            TRY_CAST(LEFT([DI_FILENAME], 8) AS INT) AS [Date_Key],

            [EE_Code],

            [Last_Name],

            [First_Name],

            [Badge_Nbr],

            [Department_Code],

            [Department_Desc],

            [Payroll_Profile_Code],

            [Payroll_Profile_Desc],

            [Corp_Department_Code],

            [Corp_Department_Desc],

            [Role_Code],

            [Role_Desc],

            [Payclass_Code],

            [Payclass_Desc],

            [EE_Status],

            [Date_of_Term],

            [Approval_Type],

            [Date_Approved],

            [Approved_By],

            [Approval_Added_DateTime],

            [DI_FILENAME]
                FROM [dbo].[STG_TIMECARD_IMPORT]

        WHERE LEFT([DI_FILENAME], 8) = @TodayString; -- Filter: Filename starts with Today's Date

        SET @TargetRows = @@ROWCOUNT;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        THROW;

    END CATCH;

    -- Return Status

    SELECT 

        'Success' AS [Status],

        @TargetRows AS [Rows_Inserted],

        @TodayString AS [File_Date_Filter],

        DATEDIFF(MILLISECOND, @StartTime, SYSDATETIME()) AS [Execution_Time_MS],

        'Append (Distinct filtered by Today)' AS [Load_Strategy];

END;

name: PDM_PROPERTY_0_UPDATE_SP
transformations: LOOKUP_CODE: CASE WHEN ep.ID = 100045645 THEN '171' ELSE ep.LOOKUP_CODE END
LOOKUP_CODE: CASE WHEN ep.ID = 100045645 THEN '171' ELSE ep.LOOKUP_CODE END
Property_Status_Name: CASE WHEN ekv.VALUE='1' THEN 'PENDING' WHEN ekv.VALUE='2' THEN 'ACTIVE' WHEN ekv.VALUE='3' THEN 'INACTIVE' ELSE 'UNDEFINED' END

PROPERTY_NAME: CASE WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z' AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,1)=' ' THEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z' AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,1)='-' THEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),3,98) WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z' THEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,99) ELSE UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME) END
OWNER_GROUP: CASE WHEN UPPER(ISNULL(og.VALUE,'--'))='BV/AXA' THEN 'BV/AXA' ELSE UPPER(ISNULL(og.VALUE,'--')) END
PM_EMAIL: CASE WHEN pk.PROPERTY_KEY=1078 THEN 'mtafoya@peakmade.com' ELSE ISNULL(pm.EMAIL,ed.EMAIL) END
PM_NAME: CASE WHEN pk.PROPERTY_KEY=9999 THEN 'Michelle Tafoya' ELSE ISNULL(pm.FULLNAME,ed.FULLNAME) END

SAME_STORE_YEAR: CASE WHEN ISNULL(pk.FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,1)=1 THEN ( CASE WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),5,2) AS INT) >= 9 THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),1,4) AS INT)+1 ELSE CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),1,4) AS INT) END )+2 ELSE pk.SAME_STORE_YEAR END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_PROPERTIES, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.PDM_PROPERTY_0_STAGE (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PDM_PROPERTY_0_UPDATE_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Clear stage table
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PDM_PROPERTY_0_STAGE];

    -- Populate stage
    ;WITH Properties AS (
        SELECT
            ep.PROPERTY_ID                                                  AS Parent_PROPERTY_ID,
            ep.ID                                                           AS Sub_Property_ID,
            ep.TIME_ZONE_ID, ep.OWNER_ID, ep.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID,
            ep.PROPERTY_NAME, ep.YEAR_BUILT_DATE,
            CASE WHEN ep.ID = 100045645 THEN '171' ELSE ep.LOOKUP_CODE END  AS LOOKUP_CODE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES] ep
        WHERE ep.PROPERTY_ID IS NOT NULL
          AND ep.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID IN (1, 4)

        UNION ALL

        SELECT
            ep.ID                                                           AS Parent_PROPERTY_ID,
            ep.ID                                                           AS Sub_Property_ID,
            ep.TIME_ZONE_ID, ep.OWNER_ID, ep.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID,
            ep.PROPERTY_NAME, ep.YEAR_BUILT_DATE,
            CASE WHEN ep.ID = 100045645 THEN '171' ELSE ep.LOOKUP_CODE END  AS LOOKUP_CODE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES] ep
        WHERE ep.PROPERTY_ID IS NULL
          AND ep.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID IN (1, 4)
          AND NOT EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES] ep2
              WHERE ep2.PROPERTY_ID = ep.ID
                AND ep2.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID IN (1, 4)
          )
    ),
    PropertyKeys AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID, DATE_ADDED_TO_DW,
               SAME_STORE_AY AS SAME_STORE_YEAR, FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,
               DATE_DISPOSITIONED, ENTITY_NUMBER, ADDRESS_COUNTY,
               PROPERTY_GROUP, PROPERTY_GROUP_KEY, LIST_STATUS
        FROM (
            SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID ORDER BY PROPERTY_KEY) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID IS NOT NULL AND LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID > 0
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    MGRS AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY,
               AM_EMAIL, AM_EMP_CODE, AM_NAME,
               EXEC_DIR_EMAIL, EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE, EXEC_DIR_NAME,
               LM_EMAIL, LM_EMP_CODE, LM_NAME,
               MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL, MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE, MAINT_SUPV_NAME,
               PM_EMAIL, PM_EMP_CODE, PM_NAME,
               RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL, RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE, RESIDENT_DIR_NAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY,
                   AM_EMAIL, AM_EMP_CODE, AM_NAME,
                   EXEC_DIR_EMAIL, EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE, EXEC_DIR_NAME,
                   LM_EMAIL, LM_EMP_CODE, LM_NAME,
                   MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL, MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE, MAINT_SUPV_NAME,
                   PM_EMAIL, PM_EMP_CODE, PM_NAME,
                   RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL, RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE, RESIDENT_DIR_NAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY PROPERTY_KEY) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    Address AS (
        SELECT epa.PROPERTY_ID, epa.STREET_LINE1, epa.STREET_LINE2,
               epa.CITY, epa.COUNTRY_CODE, epa.COUNTY,
               epa.STATE_CODE, epa.POSTAL_CODE, epa.LATITUDE, epa.LONGITUDE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_ADDRESSES] epa
        WHERE epa.ADDRESS_TYPE_ID = 1
    ),
    Phone1 AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, PHONE_NUMBER FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_PHONE_NUMBERS]
        WHERE PHONE_NUMBER_TYPE_ID = 3
    ),
    Phone2 AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, PHONE_NUMBER FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_PHONE_NUMBERS]
        WHERE PHONE_NUMBER_TYPE_ID = 12
    ),
    FAX AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, PHONE_NUMBER FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_PHONE_NUMBERS]
        WHERE PHONE_NUMBER_TYPE_ID = 5
    ),
    MinEmail AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, MIN(EMAIL_ADDRESS_TYPE_ID) AS EMAIL_ADDRESS_TYPE_ID
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES]
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_ID
    ),
    Email AS (
        SELECT e.PROPERTY_ID, e.EMAIL_ADDRESS
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_EMAIL_ADDRESSES] e
        INNER JOIN MinEmail me ON e.PROPERTY_ID = me.PROPERTY_ID
            AND e.EMAIL_ADDRESS_TYPE_ID = me.EMAIL_ADDRESS_TYPE_ID
    ),
    WebAddress AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, COMMUNITY_WEBSITE_URI FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_DETAILS]
    ),
    Buildings AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT ID) AS Building_Count
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_BUILDINGS]
        WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL GROUP BY PROPERTY_ID
    ),
    RentableSQFT AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, SUM(SQUARE_FEET) AS RENTABLE_SQUARE_FEET
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_UNITS]
        WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL GROUP BY PROPERTY_ID
    ),
    Apartments AS (
        SELECT epu.PROPERTY_ID, COUNT(epu.ID) AS Apartment_Count
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_UNITS] epu
        LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES] eut ON eut.ID = epu.UNIT_TYPE_ID
        WHERE epu.DELETED_ON IS NULL
          AND ISNULL(eut.NAME, '') NOT LIKE 'RETAIL%'
        GROUP BY epu.PROPERTY_ID
    ),
    Spaces AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, COUNT(ID) AS Space_Count
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_SPACES]
        WHERE DELETED_ON IS NULL AND UNIT_EXCLUSION_REASON_TYPE_ID <> 3
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_ID
    ),
    Status AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT ekv.PROPERTY_ID,
            CASE WHEN ekv.VALUE='1' THEN 'PENDING'
                 WHEN ekv.VALUE='2' THEN 'ACTIVE'
                 WHEN ekv.VALUE='3' THEN 'INACTIVE'
                 ELSE 'UNDEFINED' END AS Property_Status_Name
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTIES] ep2
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY_VALUES] ekv
            ON ep2.ID = ekv.PROPERTY_ID
        WHERE ekv.[KEY] = 'PROPERTY_STATUS'
    ),
    Owners AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT PROPERTY_ID, UPPER(VALUE) AS VALUE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY_VALUES]
        WHERE [KEY] IN ('PROPERTY_OWNER_NAME','FOR PROPERTY_OWNER_NAME')
    ),
    OwnerGroups AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT PROPERTY_ID, UPPER(VALUE) AS VALUE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_CUSTOM_DATA_KEY_VALUES]
        WHERE [KEY] = 'PROPERTY_OWNER_GROUP'
    ),
    Entity AS (
        SELECT eo.ID, eo.OWNER_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_OWNERS] eo
        INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_OWNER_TYPES] eot ON eo.OWNER_TYPE_ID = eot.ID
    ),
    -- *** FIXED: now reads from WH_ODS where E_TIME_ZONES was migrated to ***
    TimeZones AS (
        SELECT ID, ABBR
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_TIME_ZONES]
    ),
    PropertyTypes AS (
        SELECT ID FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_TYPES]
    ),
    Hours1 AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_ID, OFFICE_HOURS_1, OFFICE_HOURS_2, OFFICE_HOURS_3
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_HOURS_0]
    ),
    RelativeAY AS (
        SELECT AY_KEY, RELATIVE_AY
        FROM (
            SELECT AY_KEY, RELATIVE_AY,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY AY_KEY ORDER BY RELATIVE_AY) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0]
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    HeadCount AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, COUNT(DISTINCT EMPLOYEE_KEY) AS Active_Headcount
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
        WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    PMs AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'PROPERTY MANAGER'
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    AMs AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'ASSISTANT MANAGER'
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    RDs AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'RESIDENT DIRECTOR'
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    EDs AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR'
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    LMS AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'LEASING MANAGER'
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    MAINT_SUPV AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME
        FROM (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, EMAIL, EMPLOYEE_ID, FULLNAME,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY PROPERTY_KEY ORDER BY EMPLOYEE_ID) AS RN
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AD_MANAGERS_0]
            WHERE TITLE = 'MAINTENANCE SUPERVISOR' AND [ORDER] = 1
        ) x WHERE RN = 1
    ),
    UpdatePool AS (
        SELECT
            pk.PROPERTY_KEY,
            p.Sub_Property_ID                                               AS LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID,
            CASE
                WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z'
                 AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,1)=' '
                    THEN UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME)
                WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z'
                 AND SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,1)='-'
                    THEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),3,98)
                WHEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),1,1)='Z'
                    THEN SUBSTRING(UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME),2,99)
                ELSE UPPER(p.PROPERTY_NAME)
            END                                                             AS PROPERTY_NAME,
            ISNULL(addr.STREET_LINE1,'--')                                  AS ADDRESS_1,
            addr.STREET_LINE2                                               AS ADDRESS_2,
            ISNULL(RTRIM(addr.CITY),'--')                                   AS ADDRESS_CITY,
            ISNULL(addr.COUNTRY_CODE,'--')                                  AS ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
            ISNULL(addr.COUNTY,ISNULL(pk.ADDRESS_COUNTY,'--'))              AS ADDRESS_COUNTY,
            ISNULL(addr.STATE_CODE,'--')                                    AS ADDRESS_STATE,
            ISNULL(addr.POSTAL_CODE,'--')                                   AS ADDRESS_ZIP,
            am.EMAIL                                                        AS AM_EMAIL,
            am.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS AM_EMP_CODE,
            am.FULLNAME                                                     AS AM_NAME,
            ap.Apartment_Count                                              AS APARTMENT_COUNT,
            sp.Space_Count                                                  AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
            TRY_CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(p.YEAR_BUILT_DATE AS VARCHAR(20)),1,4) AS INT)
                                                                            AS BUILD_YEAR,
            ISNULL(b.Building_Count,1)                                      AS BUILDING_COUNT,
            pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW,
            ISNULL(pk.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,20990101)                          AS DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
            CAST(FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') AS INT)                       AS DATE_LAST_UPDATED,
            CAST(FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') AS INT)                       AS DATE_STATUS,
            ISNULL(em.EMAIL_ADDRESS,'--')                                   AS EMAIL,
            ISNULL(pk.ENTITY_NUMBER,p.LOOKUP_CODE)                         AS ENTITY_NUMBER,
            ed.EMAIL                                                        AS EXEC_DIR_EMAIL,
            ed.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE,
            ed.FULLNAME                                                     AS EXEC_DIR_NAME,
            ISNULL(hc.Active_Headcount,0)                                   AS HEADCOUNT,
            addr.LATITUDE,
            ISNULL(ent.OWNER_NAME,'--')                                     AS LEGAL_ENTITY,
            pk.LIST_STATUS,
            lm.EMAIL                                                        AS LM_EMAIL,
            lm.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS LM_EMP_CODE,
            lm.FULLNAME                                                     AS LM_NAME,
            addr.LONGITUDE,
            ms.EMAIL                                                        AS MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL,
            ms.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE,
            ms.FULLNAME                                                     AS MAINT_SUPV_NAME,
            h.OFFICE_HOURS_1, h.OFFICE_HOURS_2, h.OFFICE_HOURS_3,
            UPPER(ISNULL(own.VALUE,'--'))                                   AS OWNER,
            CASE WHEN UPPER(ISNULL(og.VALUE,'--'))='BV/AXA' THEN 'BV/AXA'
                 ELSE UPPER(ISNULL(og.VALUE,'--'))
            END                                                             AS OWNER_GROUP,
            ISNULL(ph1.PHONE_NUMBER,'--')                                   AS PHONE_1,
            ISNULL(ph2.PHONE_NUMBER,'--')                                   AS PHONE_2,
            ISNULL(fax.PHONE_NUMBER,'--')                                   AS PHONE_FAX,
            CASE WHEN pk.PROPERTY_KEY=1078 THEN 'mtafoya@peakmade.com'
                 ELSE ISNULL(pm.EMAIL,ed.EMAIL)
            END                                                             AS PM_EMAIL,
            pm.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS PM_EMP_CODE,
            CASE WHEN pk.PROPERTY_KEY=9999 THEN 'Michelle Tafoya'
                 ELSE ISNULL(pm.FULLNAME,ed.FULLNAME)
            END                                                             AS PM_NAME,
            ISNULL(pk.PROPERTY_GROUP,p.PROPERTY_NAME)                      AS PROPERTY_GROUP,
            rsf.RENTABLE_SQUARE_FEET                                        AS RENTABLE_SQFT,
            rd.EMAIL                                                        AS RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL,
            rd.EMPLOYEE_ID                                                  AS RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE,
            rd.FULLNAME                                                     AS RESIDENT_DIR_NAME,
            CASE
                WHEN ISNULL(pk.FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY,1)=1
                    THEN (
                        CASE
                            WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),5,2) AS INT) >= 9
                                THEN CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),1,4) AS INT)+1
                            ELSE CAST(SUBSTRING(CAST(pk.DATE_ADDED_TO_DW AS VARCHAR(8)),1,4) AS INT)
                        END
                    )+2
                ELSE pk.SAME_STORE_YEAR
            END                                                             AS SAME_STORE_YEAR,
            ISNULL(st.Property_Status_Name,'--')                            AS STATUS,
            ISNULL(tz.ABBR,'--')                                            AS TIME_ZONE,
            ISNULL(wa.COMMUNITY_WEBSITE_URI,'--')                           AS URL_WEBSITE
        FROM Properties p
        INNER JOIN PropertyTypes pt  ON p.PROPERTY_TYPE_ID = pt.ID
        LEFT JOIN Address addr       ON p.Sub_Property_ID = addr.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Phone1 ph1         ON p.Sub_Property_ID = ph1.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Phone2 ph2         ON p.Sub_Property_ID = ph2.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Email em           ON p.Sub_Property_ID = em.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN WebAddress wa      ON p.Sub_Property_ID = wa.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Buildings b        ON p.Sub_Property_ID = b.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN RentableSQFT rsf   ON p.Sub_Property_ID = rsf.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Hours1 h           ON p.Sub_Property_ID = h.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Status st          ON p.Sub_Property_ID = st.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN TimeZones tz       ON p.TIME_ZONE_ID = tz.ID
        LEFT JOIN Spaces sp          ON p.Sub_Property_ID = sp.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Apartments ap      ON p.Sub_Property_ID = ap.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN Entity ent         ON p.OWNER_ID = ent.ID
        LEFT JOIN FAX fax            ON p.Sub_Property_ID = fax.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN PropertyKeys pk    ON p.Sub_Property_ID = pk.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID
        LEFT JOIN Owners own         ON p.Sub_Property_ID = own.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN OwnerGroups og     ON p.Sub_Property_ID = og.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN AMs am             ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = am.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN PMs pm             ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = pm.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN RDs rd             ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = rd.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN EDs ed             ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = ed.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN HeadCount hc       ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = hc.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN LMS lm             ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = lm.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN MAINT_SUPV ms      ON pk.PROPERTY_KEY = ms.PROPERTY_KEY
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PDM_PROPERTY_0_STAGE]
    SELECT DISTINCT
        up.PROPERTY_KEY,
        up.PROPERTY_NAME,
        up.ADDRESS_1, up.ADDRESS_2, up.ADDRESS_CITY,
        CASE WHEN up.ADDRESS_COUNTRY='--' THEN 'US' ELSE up.ADDRESS_COUNTRY END,
        up.ADDRESS_COUNTY, up.ADDRESS_STATE, up.ADDRESS_ZIP,
        ISNULL(up.AM_EMAIL,             mgr.AM_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.AM_EMP_CODE,          mgr.AM_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.AM_NAME,              mgr.AM_NAME),
        up.APARTMENT_COUNT, up.BED_COUNT_COMPILED, up.BUILD_YEAR, up.BUILDING_COUNT,
        up.DATE_DISPOSITIONED, up.DATE_LAST_UPDATED, up.DATE_STATUS,
        up.EMAIL, up.ENTITY_NUMBER,
        ISNULL(up.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL,       mgr.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE,    mgr.EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.EXEC_DIR_NAME,        mgr.EXEC_DIR_NAME),
        up.HEADCOUNT, up.LATITUDE, up.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID, up.LEGAL_ENTITY,
        ISNULL(up.LM_EMAIL,             mgr.LM_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.LM_EMP_CODE,          mgr.LM_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.LM_NAME,              mgr.LM_NAME),
        up.LONGITUDE,
        ISNULL(up.MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL,     mgr.MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE,  mgr.MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.MAINT_SUPV_NAME,      mgr.MAINT_SUPV_NAME),
        up.OFFICE_HOURS_1, up.OFFICE_HOURS_2, up.OFFICE_HOURS_3,
        up.OWNER, up.OWNER_GROUP,
        up.PHONE_1, up.PHONE_2, up.PHONE_FAX,
        ISNULL(up.PM_EMAIL,             mgr.PM_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.PM_EMP_CODE,          mgr.PM_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.PM_NAME,              mgr.PM_NAME),
        ISNULL(up.PROPERTY_GROUP,       up.PROPERTY_NAME),
        up.RENTABLE_SQFT,
        ISNULL(up.RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL,       mgr.RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL),
        ISNULL(up.RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE,    mgr.RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE),
        ISNULL(up.RESIDENT_DIR_NAME,        mgr.RESIDENT_DIR_NAME),
        up.SAME_STORE_YEAR,
        ray.RELATIVE_AY,
        up.STATUS, up.URL_WEBSITE
    FROM UpdatePool up
    LEFT JOIN RelativeAY ray  ON up.SAME_STORE_YEAR = ray.AY_KEY
    LEFT JOIN MGRS mgr        ON up.PROPERTY_KEY = mgr.PROPERTY_KEY
    WHERE up.LIST_STATUS <> 'DISPOSITIONED'
      AND up.PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL;

    -- Update target from stage
    UPDATE tgt
    SET
        tgt.PROPERTY_NAME               = src.PROPERTY_NAME,
        tgt.ADDRESS_1                   = src.ADDRESS_1,
        tgt.ADDRESS_2                   = src.ADDRESS_2,
        tgt.ADDRESS_CITY                = src.ADDRESS_CITY,
        tgt.ADDRESS_COUNTRY             = src.ADDRESS_COUNTRY,
        tgt.ADDRESS_COUNTY              = src.ADDRESS_COUNTY,
        tgt.ADDRESS_STATE               = src.ADDRESS_STATE,
        tgt.ADDRESS_ZIP                 = src.ADDRESS_ZIP,
        tgt.AM_EMAIL                    = src.AM_EMAIL,
        tgt.AM_EMP_CODE                 = src.AM_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.AM_NAME                     = src.AM_NAME,
        tgt.APARTMENT_COUNT             = src.APARTMENT_COUNT,
        tgt.BED_COUNT_COMPILED          = src.BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
        tgt.BUILD_YEAR                  = src.BUILD_YEAR,
        tgt.BUILDING_COUNT              = src.BUILDING_COUNT,
        tgt.DATE_DISPOSITIONED          = src.DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
        tgt.DATE_LAST_UPDATED           = src.DATE_LAST_UPDATED,
        tgt.DATE_STATUS                 = src.DATE_STATUS,
        tgt.EMAIL                       = src.EMAIL,
        tgt.ENTITY_NUMBER               = src.ENTITY_NUMBER,
        tgt.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL              = src.EXEC_DIR_EMAIL,
        tgt.EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE           = src.EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.EXEC_DIR_NAME               = src.EXEC_DIR_NAME,
        tgt.HEADCOUNT                   = src.HEADCOUNT,
        tgt.LATITUDE                    = src.LATITUDE,
        tgt.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID           = src.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID,
        tgt.LEGAL_ENTITY                = src.LEGAL_ENTITY,
        tgt.LM_EMAIL                    = src.LM_EMAIL,
        tgt.LM_EMP_CODE                 = src.LM_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.LM_NAME                     = src.LM_NAME,
        tgt.LONGITUDE                   = src.LONGITUDE,
        tgt.MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL            = src.MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL,
        tgt.MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE         = src.MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.MAINT_SUPV_NAME             = src.MAINT_SUPV_NAME,
        tgt.OFFICE_HOURS_1              = src.OFFICE_HOURS_1,
        tgt.OFFICE_HOURS_2              = src.OFFICE_HOURS_2,
        tgt.OFFICE_HOURS_3              = src.OFFICE_HOURS_3,
        tgt.OWNER                       = src.OWNER,
        tgt.OWNER_GROUP                 = src.OWNER_GROUP,
        tgt.PHONE_1                     = src.PHONE_1,
        tgt.PHONE_2                     = src.PHONE_2,
        tgt.PHONE_FAX                   = src.PHONE_FAX,
        tgt.PM_EMAIL                    = src.PM_EMAIL,
