        tgt.PM_EMP_CODE                 = src.PM_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.PM_NAME                     = src.PM_NAME,
        tgt.PROPERTY_GROUP              = src.PROPERTY_GROUP,
        tgt.RENTABLE_SQFT               = src.RENTABLE_SQFT,
        tgt.RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL          = src.RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL,
        tgt.RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE       = src.RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE,
        tgt.RESIDENT_DIR_NAME           = src.RESIDENT_DIR_NAME,
        tgt.SAME_STORE_AY               = src.SAME_STORE_YEAR,
        tgt.SAME_STORE_YEAR_REVERSE_ID  = src.SAME_STORE_YEAR_REVERSE_ID,
        tgt.STATUS                      = src.STATUS,
        tgt.URL_WEBSITE                 = src.URL_WEBSITE
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] tgt
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PDM_PROPERTY_0_STAGE] src
        ON tgt.PROPERTY_KEY = src.PROPERTY_KEY;

END;

name: PROPERTY_0_CALC_SP
transformations: CALC_LIST_STATUS: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 'REPORTABLE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_PENDING] = 1) THEN 'ON-BOARDING' WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'DISPOSITIONED' ELSE P.[LIST_STATUS] END

CALC_LIST_TYPE: CASE WHEN (P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT') THEN 'STUDENT' WHEN (P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY') THEN 'MULTI-FAMILY' WHEN (P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE') THEN 'MIXED USE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_RETAIL] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL') THEN 'RETAIL' WHEN P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 'NON-PROPERTY' ELSE P.[LIST_TYPE] END
CALC_LIST_MANAGED: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'MANAGED' WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'UN-MANAGED' ELSE P.[LIST_MANAGED] END
CALC_LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 'NEW DEV' WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 'TRANSITION' ELSE P.[LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_0_CALC_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Start Transaction
        BEGIN TRAN

            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            -- Step 1: Clear Staging Table (Must happen BEFORE CTEs)
            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES];

            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            -- Step 2: Define Logic & Insert
            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            ;WITH [CTE_ActiveEmps] AS (
                -- Filter Active Employees and Format Name
                SELECT 
                    [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
                    ISNULL([NAME_FIRST], '') + ' ' + ISNULL([NAME_LAST], '') AS [FullName]
                FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F]
                WHERE [FLAG_TEMPORARY] = 0
            ),
            [CTE_Calculated_Logic] AS (
                -- Perform Decode/Case Logic on Source Properties
                SELECT 
                    P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                    P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                    
                    -- Calculation: PROPERTY_LIST_CODE
                    (CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 1000
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 2000
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 3000
                        ELSE 9000 
                    END) + 
                    (CASE 
                        WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT' THEN 100
                        WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY' THEN 200
                        WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE' THEN 300
                        WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL' THEN 400
                        ELSE 900 
                    END) +
                    (CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 10
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 20
                        ELSE 90 
                    END) +
                    (CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 1
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 2
                        ELSE 9 
                    END) AS [CALC_PROPERTY_LIST_CODE],

                    -- Calculation: LIST_STATUS
                    CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 'REPORTABLE'
                        WHEN (P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_PENDING] = 1) THEN 'ON-BOARDING'
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'DISPOSITIONED'
                        ELSE P.[LIST_STATUS]
                    END AS [CALC_LIST_STATUS],

                    -- Calculation: LIST_TYPE
                    CASE 
                        WHEN (P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT') THEN 'STUDENT'
                        WHEN (P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY') THEN 'MULTI-FAMILY'
                        WHEN (P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE') THEN 'MIXED USE'
                        WHEN (P.[FLAG_RETAIL] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL') THEN 'RETAIL'
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 'NON-PROPERTY'
                        ELSE P.[LIST_TYPE]
                    END AS [CALC_LIST_TYPE],

                    -- Calculation: LIST_MANAGED
                    CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'MANAGED'
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'UN-MANAGED'
                        ELSE P.[LIST_MANAGED]
                    END AS [CALC_LIST_MANAGED],

                    -- Calculation: LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE
                    CASE 
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 'NEW DEV'
                        WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 'TRANSITION'
                        ELSE P.[LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE]
                    END AS [CALC_LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE],

                    -- Join Keys
                    P.[ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[RAM_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[RM_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[RMLS_EMP_CODE],
                    P.[RVP_EMP_CODE]

                FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P
            )
            
            INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES] (
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [PROPERTY_LIST_CODE],
                [LIST_STATUS],
                [LIST_TYPE],
                [LIST_MANAGED],
                [LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE],
                [ACCOUNTANT],
                [ACCOUNTING_MGR],
                [CONTROLLER],
                [RAM_NAME],
                [RM_NAME],
                [RMLS_NAME],
                [RVP_NAME],
                [CALCULATION_DATE]
            )
            SELECT 
                SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                SRC.[CALC_PROPERTY_LIST_CODE],
                SRC.[CALC_LIST_STATUS],
                SRC.[CALC_LIST_TYPE],
                SRC.[CALC_LIST_MANAGED],
                SRC.[CALC_LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE],
                
                -- Employee Name Lookups (Handling NULLs with '--')
                ISNULL(E_ACCT.[FullName], '--') AS [ACCOUNTANT],
                ISNULL(E_MGR.[FullName], '--')  AS [ACCOUNTING_MGR],
                ISNULL(E_CTRL.[FullName], '--') AS [CONTROLLER],
                ISNULL(E_RAM.[FullName], '--')  AS [RAM_NAME],
                ISNULL(E_RM.[FullName], '--')   AS [RM_NAME],
                ISNULL(E_RMLS.[FullName], '--') AS [RMLS_NAME],
                ISNULL(E_RVP.[FullName], '--')  AS [RVP_NAME],
                
                SYSDATETIME() AS [CALCULATION_DATE]

            FROM [CTE_Calculated_Logic] SRC
            
            -- Joins for Employee Lookups
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_ACCT ON SRC.[ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE]     = E_ACCT.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_MGR  ON SRC.[ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE] = E_MGR.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_CTRL ON SRC.[CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE]     = E_CTRL.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RAM  ON SRC.[RAM_EMP_CODE]            = E_RAM.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RM   ON SRC.[RM_EMP_CODE]             = E_RM.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RMLS ON SRC.[RMLS_EMP_CODE]           = E_RMLS.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RVP  ON SRC.[RVP_EMP_CODE]            = E_RVP.[EMPLOYEE_CODE];

        COMMIT TRAN
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRAN;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: PROPERTY_0_GLOBAL_UPDATE_SP
transformations: New_STATUS: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 'REPORTABLE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_PENDING] = 1) THEN 'ON-BOARDING' WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'DISPOSITIONED' ELSE P.[LIST_STATUS] END

New_TYPE: CASE WHEN (P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT') THEN 'STUDENT' WHEN (P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY') THEN 'MULTI-FAMILY' WHEN (P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE') THEN 'MIXED USE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_RETAIL] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL') THEN 'RETAIL' WHEN P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 'NON-PROPERTY' ELSE P.[LIST_TYPE] END
New_MANAGED: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'MANAGED' WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'UN-MANAGED' ELSE P.[LIST_MANAGED] END
New_TRANS: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 'NEW DEV' WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 'TRANSITION' ELSE P.[LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.EMPLOYEE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_0_GLOBAL_UPDATE_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 1: Populate Local Staging (Allowed DML)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES];

        WITH [CTE_ActiveEmps] AS (
            SELECT [EMPLOYEE_CODE], ISNULL([NAME_FIRST], '') + ' ' + ISNULL([NAME_LAST], '') AS [FullName]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[EMPLOYEE_F] WHERE [FLAG_TEMPORARY] = 0
        ),
        [CTE_CalculatedUpdates] AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                ((CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 1000 WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 2000 WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 3000 ELSE 9000 END) + 
                 (CASE WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT' THEN 100 WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY' THEN 200 WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE' THEN 300 WHEN P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL' THEN 400 ELSE 900 END) +
                 (CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 10 WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 20 ELSE 90 END) +
                 (CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 1 WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 2 ELSE 9 END)) AS [New_CODE],
                CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 THEN 'REPORTABLE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 OR P.[FLAG_PENDING] = 1) THEN 'ON-BOARDING' WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'DISPOSITIONED' ELSE P.[LIST_STATUS] END AS [New_STATUS],
                CASE WHEN (P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'STUDENT') THEN 'STUDENT' WHEN (P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MULTI-FAMILY') THEN 'MULTI-FAMILY' WHEN (P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'MIXED USE') THEN 'MIXED USE' WHEN (P.[FLAG_RETAIL] = 1 OR P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] = 'RETAIL') THEN 'RETAIL' WHEN P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 1 THEN 'NON-PROPERTY' ELSE P.[LIST_TYPE] END AS [New_TYPE],
                CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'MANAGED' WHEN P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'UN-MANAGED' ELSE P.[LIST_MANAGED] END AS [New_MANAGED],
                CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 1 THEN 'NEW DEV' WHEN P.[FLAG_STABILIZED] = 0 THEN 'TRANSITION' ELSE P.[LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE] END AS [New_TRANS],
                ISNULL(E_ACCT.[FullName], '--') AS [New_ACCT], ISNULL(E_MGR.[FullName], '--') AS [New_MGR], ISNULL(E_CTRL.[FullName], '--') AS [New_CTRL],
                ISNULL(E_RAM.[FullName], '--') AS [New_RAM], ISNULL(E_RM.[FullName], '--') AS [New_RM], ISNULL(E_RMLS.[FullName], '--') AS [New_RMLS], ISNULL(E_RVP.[FullName], '--') AS [New_RVP]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] P
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_ACCT ON P.[ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE] = E_ACCT.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_MGR  ON P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE] = E_MGR.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_CTRL ON P.[CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE] = E_CTRL.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RAM  ON P.[RAM_EMP_CODE] = E_RAM.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RM   ON P.[RM_EMP_CODE] = E_RM.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RMLS ON P.[RMLS_EMP_CODE] = E_RMLS.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
            LEFT JOIN [CTE_ActiveEmps] E_RVP  ON P.[RVP_EMP_CODE] = E_RVP.[EMPLOYEE_CODE]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_CODE], [LIST_STATUS], [LIST_TYPE], [LIST_MANAGED], [LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE], 
            [ACCOUNTANT], [ACCOUNTING_MGR], [CONTROLLER], [RAM_NAME], [RM_NAME], [RMLS_NAME], [RVP_NAME], [CALCULATION_DATE]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [New_CODE], [New_STATUS], [New_TYPE], [New_MANAGED], [New_TRANS], 
            [New_ACCT], [New_MGR], [New_CTRL], [New_RAM], [New_RM], [New_RMLS], [New_RVP], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [CTE_CalculatedUpdates];

        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- STEP 2: Explicit Cross-Warehouse Delete/Insert (Fabric Bypass)
        -- --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
        
        -- Delete only the target keys
        DELETE FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] IN (SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY] FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES]);

        -- Explicit Column Insert to prevent Msg 213
        INSERT INTO [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_CODE], [LIST_STATUS], [LIST_TYPE], 
            [LIST_MANAGED], [LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE], [ACCOUNTANT], [ACCOUNTING_MGR], 
            [CONTROLLER], [RAM_NAME], [RM_NAME], [RMLS_NAME], [RVP_NAME]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_LIST_CODE], [LIST_STATUS], [LIST_TYPE], 
            [LIST_MANAGED], [LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE], [ACCOUNTANT], [ACCOUNTING_MGR], 
            [CONTROLLER], [RAM_NAME], [RM_NAME], [RMLS_NAME], [RVP_NAME]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STG_PROPERTY_0_UPDATES];

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PROPERTY_0_SP
transformations: DATE_DISPOSITIONED: CASE WHEN P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 20990101 ELSE P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] END

PROPERTY_TYPE: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Conventional Managed' WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Conventional Unmanaged' WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Student Managed' WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Student Unmanaged' WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 'On-Boarding' WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'Corporate' WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'Inactive' ELSE 'Undesignated' END
SAME_STORE_RELATIVE_AY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) < 2013 THEN -10 ELSE SS.[RELATIVE_AY] END
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.IMAGE_LIST_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    -- Transaction Handling
        -- 1. CTE: SameStoreYears (Replaces Xtemp Load)
        WITH [CTE_SameStoreYears] AS (
            SELECT 
                [AY],
                [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            GROUP BY [AY], [RELATIVE_AY]
        ),
        -- 2. CTE: Source Filtered Property Data
        [CTE_Source] AS (
            SELECT 
                *
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] > 0 
              AND [PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1109
        ),
        -- 3. CTE: Joined & Transformed Data
        [CTE_FinalSelect] AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[ACCOUNTANT],
                P.[ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE],
                P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR],
                P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE],
                P.[ADDRESS_1],
                P.[ADDRESS_2],
                P.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                P.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                P.[ADDRESS_COUNTY],
                P.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                P.[ADDRESS_ZIP],
                P.[ALTERNATE_ID_1],
                P.[ALTERNATE_ID_2],
                P.[ALTERNATE_ID_3],
                P.[AM_EMAIL],
                P.[AM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[AM_NAME],
                P.[APARTMENT_COUNT],
                P.[APARTMENT_COUNT_BILLING],
                P.[ASSET_MGR_EMAIL],
                P.[ASSET_MGR_NAME],
                P.[ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER],
                P.[ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                P.[BED_COUNT_BILLING],
                P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                P.[BED_COUNT_CUSTOM],
                P.[BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                P.[BED_COUNT_STATIC_PY],
                P.[BUILD_YEAR],
                P.[BUILDING_COUNT],
                P.[BILLING_ALLOCATION_PARTNERS],
                P.[BILLING_ALLOCATION_PCT],
                P.[COMPANY],
                P.[CONTROLLER],
                P.[CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                P.[COUNT],
                P.[CURRENT_PHASE],
                P.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
                P.[DATE_CREATED],
                P.[DATE_DATA_FREEZE],
                -- decode(PROPERTY_0.DATE_DISPOSITIONED = 1, 20990101, PROPERTY_0.DATE_DISPOSITIONED)
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 20990101 
                    ELSE P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] 
                END AS [DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                P.[DATE_LIFECYCLE],
                P.[DATE_MGMT_TAKEOVER],
                P.[DATE_MIGRATED],
                P.[DATE_STABILIZED],
                P.[DATE_STATUS],
                P.[EMAIL],
                P.[MGMT_ENTITY] AS [ENTITY_NAME], -- Mapped from MGMT_ENTITY per ATL
                P.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_EMAIL],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_NAME],
                P.[FINANCIAL_PUBLICATION_DAY],
                P.[FLAG_ACTIVE],
                P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
                P.[FLAG_DATA_FREEZE],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_FANNIE_FREDDIE_MORTGAGE],
                P.[FLAG_LEASEUP],
                P.[FLAG_MANAGED],
                P.[FLAG_MIGRATED],
                P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_PENDING],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_0],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_1],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_2],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_3],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_4],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_5],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_6],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_7],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_8],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_9],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_10],
                P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                P.[FLAG_RETAIL],
                P.[FLAG_STABILIZED],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE],
                P.[FLAG_USE_TEMP_ADDRESS],
                P.[GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING],
                P.[GOAL_ORA],
                P.[GOAL_REPUTATION],
                P.[GOOGLE_PROPERTY_LINK],
                P.[GOOGLE_PROPERTY_TYPE],
                P.[GROSS_SQFT],
                P.[HEADCOUNT],
                P.[IMAGE_KEY_FLAG],
                IL.[IMAGE_URL] AS [IMAGE_URL_FLAG],
                P.[IMAGE_KEY_PROPERTY],
                P.[LATITUDE],
                P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_1],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_2],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_3],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_4],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_5],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_6],
                P.[LEGACY_ONESITE_ID],
                P.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_ID_ENTRATA],
                P.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_ID_ONESITE],
                P.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_NAME_1],
                P.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_NAME_2],
                P.[LEGACY_SUBPROPERTY_NUMBER],
                P.[LEGAL_ENTITY],
                P.[LENDER_NAME],
                P.[LIFECYCLE_KEY],
                P.[LIFECYCLE_STEP],
                P.[LIFECYCLE_STATUS],
                P.[LIST_STATUS],
                P.[LIST_TYPE],
                P.[LIST_MANAGED],
                P.[LIST_TRANSITIONTYPE],
                P.[LM_EMAIL],
                P.[LM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[LM_NAME],
                P.[LONGITUDE],
                P.[MAINT_SUPV_EMAIL],
                P.[MAINT_SUPV_EMP_CODE],
                P.[MAINT_SUPV_NAME],
                P.[MANAGEMENT_TYPE],
                P.[MANAGEMENT_TYPE_KEY],
                P.[MARKET_CITY],
                P.[MARKET_CITY_STATE],
                P.[MARKET_STATE],
                P.[MGMT_ENTITY],
                P.[MSA],
                P.[OFFICE_HOURS_1],
                P.[OFFICE_HOURS_2],
                P.[OFFICE_HOURS_3],
                P.[OFFICE_HOURS_4],
                P.[OFFICE_HOURS_5],
                P.[OWNER],
                P.[OWNER_GROUP],
                P.[OWNER_GROUP_SHORT],
                P.[OWNER_SHORT],
                P.[PAYROLL_ENTITY],
                P.[PHONE_1],
                P.[PHONE_2],
                P.[PHONE_FAX],
                P.[PM_EMAIL],
                P.[PM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[PM_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_AR_CODE],
                P.[PROPERTY_GROUP],
                P.[PROPERTY_GROUP_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_LIST_CODE],
                -- Complex Decode Logic for Property Type
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Conventional Managed'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Conventional Unmanaged'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Student Managed'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Student Unmanaged'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 'On-Boarding'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'Corporate'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'Inactive'
                    ELSE 'Undesignated'
                END AS [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] AS [PROPERTY_TYPE_1],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE_KEY],
                P.[RAM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RAM_NAME],
                P.[RENTABLE_SQFT],
                P.[RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL],
                P.[RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RESIDENT_DIR_NAME],
                P.[RM_EMAIL],
                P.[RM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RM_NAME],
                P.[RMLS_EMAIL],
                P.[RMLS_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RMLS_NAME],
                P.[RVP_EMAIL],
                P.[RVP_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RVP_NAME],
                P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR] AS [SAME_STORE_AY],
                -- decode logic for Relative AY
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) < 2013 THEN -10
                    ELSE SS.[RELATIVE_AY]
                END AS [SAME_STORE_RELATIVE_AY],
                P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR_REVERSE_ID],
                P.[SCHOOL_ACRONYM],

transformations: DATE_DISPOSITIONED: CASE WHEN P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 20990101 ELSE P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] END

PROPERTY_TYPE: CASE WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Conventional Managed' WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Conventional Unmanaged' WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Student Managed' WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Student Unmanaged' WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 'On-Boarding' WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'Corporate' WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'Inactive' ELSE 'Undesignated' END
SAME_STORE_RELATIVE_AY: CASE WHEN ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) < 2013 THEN -10 ELSE SS.[RELATIVE_AY] END

CREATE     PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_0_TO_STAGING_SP]
AS
    SET NOCOUNT ON; 
    -- [INJECTED TRUNCATE] 
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_ODS].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0_TO_STAGING]') IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0_TO_STAGING]; 
    ELSE IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0_TO_STAGING]') IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0_TO_STAGING]; 
    -- [END INJECTED] 

BEGIN
    -- Transaction Handling
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 0. TRUNCATE THE TARGET TABLE - CP
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PROPERTY_0];

        -- 1. CTE: SameStoreYears (Replaces Xtemp Load)
        WITH [CTE_SameStoreYears] AS (
            SELECT 
                [AY],
                [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [dbo].[DATE_F]
            GROUP BY [AY], [RELATIVE_AY]
        ),
        -- 2. CTE: Source Filtered Property Data
        [CTE_Source] AS (
            SELECT 
                *
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] > 0 
              AND [PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1109
        ),
        -- 3. CTE: Joined & Transformed Data
        [CTE_FinalSelect] AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[ACCOUNTANT],
                P.[ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE],
                P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR],
                P.[ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE],
                P.[ADDRESS_1],
                P.[ADDRESS_2],
                P.[ADDRESS_CITY],
                P.[ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                P.[ADDRESS_COUNTY],
                P.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                P.[ADDRESS_ZIP],

                P.[ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER],
                P.[ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                P.[BED_COUNT_BILLING],
                P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                P.[BED_COUNT_CUSTOM],
                P.[BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                P.[BED_COUNT_STATIC_PY],

                P.[COUNT],
                P.[CURRENT_PHASE],
                P.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
                P.[DATE_CREATED],
                P.[DATE_DATA_FREEZE],
                -- decode(PROPERTY_0.DATE_DISPOSITIONED = 1, 20990101, PROPERTY_0.DATE_DISPOSITIONED)
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 20990101 
                    ELSE P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] 
                END AS [DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                P.[DATE_LIFECYCLE],
                P.[DATE_MGMT_TAKEOVER],
                P.[DATE_MIGRATED],
                P.[DATE_STABILIZED],
                P.[DATE_STATUS],
                P.[EMAIL],
                P.[MGMT_ENTITY] AS [ENTITY_NAME], -- Mapped from MGMT_ENTITY per ATL
                P.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_EMAIL],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE],
                P.[EXEC_DIR_NAME],
                P.[FINANCIAL_PUBLICATION_DAY],
                P.[FLAG_ACTIVE],
                P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
                P.[FLAG_DATA_FREEZE],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_FANNIE_FREDDIE_MORTGAGE],
                P.[FLAG_LEASEUP],
                P.[FLAG_MANAGED],
                P.[FLAG_MIGRATED],
                P.[FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                P.[FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],

                P.[FLAG_PHASE_1],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_2],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_3],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_4],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_5],

                P.[FLAG_PHASE_9],
                P.[FLAG_PHASE_10],
                P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                P.[FLAG_RETAIL],
                P.[FLAG_STABILIZED],
                P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                P.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY],
                P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE],
                P.[FLAG_USE_TEMP_ADDRESS],
                P.[GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING],
                P.[GOAL_ORA],
                P.[GOAL_REPUTATION],
                P.[GOOGLE_PROPERTY_LINK],
                P.[GOOGLE_PROPERTY_TYPE],
                P.[GROSS_SQFT],
                P.[HEADCOUNT],
                P.[IMAGE_KEY_FLAG],
                IL.[IMAGE_URL] AS [IMAGE_URL_FLAG],
                P.[IMAGE_KEY_PROPERTY],
                P.[LATITUDE],
                P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_1],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_2],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_3],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_4],
                P.[LEGACY_NAME_5],

                P.[PHONE_1],

                P.[PHONE_FAX],
                P.[PM_EMAIL],
                P.[PM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[PM_NAME],
                P.[PROPERTY_AR_CODE],
                P.[PROPERTY_GROUP],
                P.[PROPERTY_GROUP_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_LIST_CODE],
                -- Complex Decode Logic for Property Type
                CASE 
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Conventional Managed'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Conventional Unmanaged'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 1 THEN 'Student Managed'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 AND P.[FLAG_MANAGED] = 0 THEN 'Student Unmanaged'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1 THEN 'On-Boarding'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 THEN 'Corporate'
                    WHEN P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 1 THEN 'Inactive'
                    ELSE 'Undesignated'
                END AS [PROPERTY_TYPE],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE] AS [PROPERTY_TYPE_1],
                P.[PROPERTY_TYPE_KEY],
                P.[RAM_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RAM_NAME],
                P.[RENTABLE_SQFT],
                P.[RESIDENT_DIR_EMAIL],
                P.[RESIDENT_DIR_EMP_CODE],

                P.[RVP_EMAIL],
                P.[RVP_EMP_CODE],
                P.[RVP_NAME],
                P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR] AS [SAME_STORE_AY],
                -- decode logic for Relative AY
                CASE 
                    WHEN ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR], 0) < 2013 THEN -10
                    ELSE SS.[RELATIVE_AY]
                END AS [SAME_STORE_RELATIVE_AY],
                P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR_REVERSE_ID],
                P.[SCHOOL_ACRONYM],
                P.[SCHOOL_INITIALS],
                P.[SCHOOL_MASCOT],
                P.[SCHOOL_NAME],
                P.[SOURCE_SYSTEM],
                P.[SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID],
                P.[SOURCE_SYSTEM_SUB_ID],
                P.[STABILIZED_YEAR],
                P.[STATUS],
                P.[SUBPROPERTY_NAME],
                P.[TAX_ID],
                P.[TEMP_CITY],
                P.[TEMP_STATE],
                P.[TEMP_STREET],
                P.[TEMP_ZIP],
                P.[TIME_ZONE],
                P.[TRANSITION_TYPE],
                P.[TRANSITION_TYPE_KEY],
                P.[URL_FACEBOOK],
                P.[URL_INSTAGRAM],
                P.[URL_TWITTER],
                P.[URL_WEBSITE],
                P.[VENDOR_01],
                P.[VENDOR_02],
                P.[VENDOR_03],
                P.[VENDOR_04],
                P.[VENDOR_05],
                P.[VENDOR_06],
                P.[VENDOR_07],
                P.[VENDOR_08],
                P.[VENDOR_09],
                P.[VENDOR_10],
                P.[VENDOR_11],
                P.[VENDOR_12],
                P.[VENDOR_13],
                P.[VENDOR_14],
                P.[VENDOR_15],
                P.[VENDOR_COMMENTS_01],
                P.[VENDOR_COMMENTS_02]
            FROM [CTE_Source] P
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [CTE_SameStoreYears] SS 
                ON P.[SAME_STORE_YEAR] = SS.[AY]
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[IMAGE_LIST_0] IL 
                ON P.[IMAGE_KEY_FLAG] = IL.[IMAGE_KEY]
        )
        -- 4. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        SELECT * FROM [CTE_FinalSelect];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PROPERTY_AY_0_ADDNEW_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_BASE_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0_ADDNEW_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE 1: Filter Eligible Properties (AllProperties)
        WITH CTE_AllProperties AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY] = 0 
              AND [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY] = 0 
              AND ([FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 OR [FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1)
        ),
        
        -- CTE 2: Existing Properties in Target (AYProperties)
        CTE_ExistingProperties AS (
            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0]
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Identify Properties to Add (PropertiesToAdd)
        CTE_PropertiesToAdd AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM CTE_AllProperties P
            LEFT JOIN CTE_ExistingProperties E ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = E.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE E.[PROPERTY_KEY] IS NULL -- Only missing properties
              AND P.[PROPERTY_KEY] > 500   -- Filter from BaseLoader logic
        ),

        -- CTE 4: Base AY Data (AY_Base)
        CTE_AY_Base AS (
            SELECT 
                B.[AY],
                B.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                B.[AY_END_DATE],
                B.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                B.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                B.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                A.[RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_BASE_0] B
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0] A ON A.[AY_KEY] = B.[AY]
            WHERE B.[AY] >= 2010 OR B.[AY] = 0
        ),

        -- CTE 5: Generate Final Rows (BaseLoader)
        CTE_NewRows AS (
            SELECT 
                -- Logic: PROPERTY_KEY + (AY * .0001)
                CAST(P.[PROPERTY_KEY] + (AY.[AY] * 0.0001) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                AY.[AY],
                -- Logic: AY || '-' || (AY + 1)
                CAST(AY.[AY] AS VARCHAR(4)) + '-' + CAST(AY.[AY] + 1 AS VARCHAR(4)) AS [AY_NAME],
                AY.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                0 AS [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                AY.[AY_END_DATE],
                0 AS [AY_END_DATEID],
                AY.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                0 AS [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
                AY.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                AY.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                AY.[RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM CTE_PropertiesToAdd P
            CROSS JOIN CTE_AY_Base AY
        )

        -- INSERT Logic (AppendAll)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] (
            [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [AY], [AY_NAME], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
            [AY_END_DATE], [AY_END_DATEID], [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS], [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
            [MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE], [MOVE_IN_END_DATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [RELATIVE_AY], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [AY], [AY_NAME], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
            [AY_END_DATE], [AY_END_DATEID], [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS], [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
            [MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE], [MOVE_IN_END_DATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [RELATIVE_AY], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_NewRows;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: PROPERTY_AY_0_DATEIDS_SP
transformations: Calc_AY_BEGIN_DATEID: CASE WHEN T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] > 0 THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 112)) ELSE T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] -- Keep existing value if invalid/zero END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_0 into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0_DATEIDS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE: Calculate updates based on current data + Join
        WITH CTE_Calculations AS (
            SELECT 
                T.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                
                -- Logic: If Date > 0, Calculate Days since 1900-01-01. Else keep existing.
                CASE 
                    WHEN T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] > 0 THEN 
                        DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 112))
                    ELSE T.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] -- Keep existing value if invalid/zero
                END AS [Calc_AY_BEGIN_DATEID],

                CASE 
                    WHEN T.[AY_END_DATEID] >= 0 THEN -- ATL Check uses ID, implies checking if processing is needed
                         DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', TRY_CONVERT(DATE, CAST(T.[AY_END_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 112))
                    ELSE T.[AY_END_DATEID]
                END AS [Calc_AY_END_DATEID],

                A.[RELATIVE_AY] AS [Calc_RELATIVE_AY]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] T
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0] A
                ON A.[AY_KEY] = T.[AY] -- Join on AY Key
        )
        
        -- UPDATE EXISTING ROWS ONLY
        MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] AS Target
        USING CTE_Calculations AS Source
        ON Target.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY]
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET
                Target.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID] = Source.[Calc_AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                Target.[AY_END_DATEID]   = Source.[Calc_AY_END_DATEID],
                Target.[RELATIVE_AY]     = Source.[Calc_RELATIVE_AY],
                Target.[LASTUPDATED]     = SYSDATETIME();

        -- NO INSERT BLOCK: This procedure only updates existing records.

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE: Source Logic (BaseLoader)
        -- Filters source where PROPERTY_KEY > 500
        -- Maps source columns to target names
        WITH CTE_Source AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                [AY_YEAR] AS [AY],
                [AY_YEAR_NAME] AS [AY_Name],
                [AY_START_DATE] AS [AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                [AY_START_DATEID] AS [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                [AY_END_DATE],
                [AY_END_DATEID],
                [FALL_FLAG_DAYS] AS [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                [NON_STANDARD_FLAG] AS [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
                [MOVE_IN_START_DATE] AS [MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                [MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [AY_REVERSE_ID] AS [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] > 500
        )
        
        -- MERGE Statement for Update Logic
        -- Map_Operation in ATL sets "insert", "normal", "delete", "update" all to UPDATE.
        MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] AS Target
        USING CTE_Source AS Source
        ON Target.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY]
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET
                Target.[AY] = Source.[AY],
                Target.[AY_NAME] = Source.[AY_Name],
                Target.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] = Source.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                Target.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID] = Source.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                Target.[AY_END_DATE] = Source.[AY_END_DATE],
                Target.[AY_END_DATEID] = Source.[AY_END_DATEID],
                Target.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS] = Source.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                Target.[FLAG_NON_STANDARD] = Source.[FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
                Target.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE] = Source.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                Target.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE] = Source.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                Target.[PROPERTY_NAME] = Source.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                Target.[RELATIVE_AY] = Source.[RELATIVE_AY],
                Target.[LASTUPDATED] = SYSDATETIME();

        -- NOTE: ATL logic implies "Update Only". No INSERT block is generated.
        -- If a row exists in Source but not Target, it is IGNORED (per ATL logic).

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

        -- Map_Operation in ATL sets "insert", "normal", "delete", "update" all to UPDATE.
        MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0] AS Target
        USING CTE_Source AS Source
        ON Target.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY]
        
        WHEN MATCHED THEN
            UPDATE SET
                Target.[AY] = Source.[AY],
                Target.[AY_NAME] = Source.[AY_Name],
                Target.[AY_BEGIN_DATE] = Source.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                Target.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID] = Source.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                Target.[AY_END_DATE] = Source.[AY_END_DATE],
                Target.[AY_END_DATEID] = Source.[AY_END_DATEID],
                Target.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS] = Source.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                Target.[FLAG_NON_STANDARD] = Source.[FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
                Target.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE] = Source.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                Target.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE] = Source.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                Target.[PROPERTY_KEY] = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                Target.[PROPERTY_NAME] = Source.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                Target.[RELATIVE_AY] = Source.[RELATIVE_AY],
                Target.[LASTUPDATED] = SYSDATETIME();

        -- NOTE: ATL logic implies "Update Only". No INSERT block is generated.

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

name: PROPERTY_AY_F_SP
transformations: FOR_AY_YEAR: CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 1025 AND [DATE_KEY] = 20220904 THEN 2023 ELSE [AY] + 1 END
LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID: CASE WHEN [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 THEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_F, WH_ODS.dbo.PROPERTY_AY_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F_SP]
AS
    SET NOCOUNT ON; 
    -- [INJECTED TRUNCATE] 
    IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_ODS].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F]') IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_ODS].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F]; 
    ELSE IF OBJECT_ID('[WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F]') IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F]; 
    -- [END INJECTED] 

BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- CTE 1: Renewal Base Logic (RenewalBase_1)
        -- Logic to calculate FOR_AY_YEAR and filter specific rows
        WITH CTE_RenewalBase AS (
            SELECT DISTINCT 
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                -- Logic: decode(PROPERTY_KEY = 1025 and DATE_KEY = 20220904, 2023, AY + 1)
                CASE 
                    WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 1025 AND [DATE_KEY] = 20220904 THEN 2023
                    ELSE [AY] + 1
                END AS [FOR_AY_YEAR],
                [FLAG_OCCUPIED] AS [OCCUPIED_COUNT]
            FROM [dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0]
            WHERE NOT ([DATE_KEY] = 20211016 AND [PROPERTY_KEY] = 100014)
        ),

        -- CTE 2: Property Details (Properties)
        CTE_Properties AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                -- Logic: decode(FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0, LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID, 0)
                CASE WHEN [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0 THEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] ELSE 0 END AS [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                [LEGACY_ONESITE_ID],
                [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        ),

        -- CTE 3: Main Source (AllRecords)
        CTE_AllRecords AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
                [AY],
                [AY_NAME],
                [AY_BEGIN_DATE],
                [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
                [AY_END_DATE],
                [AY_END_DATEID],
                [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
                [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
                [MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
                [MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] > 500 OR [PROPERTY_KEY] = 0
        )

        -- INSERT into Target (Combo View Logic)
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_AY_F] (
            [PROPERTY_AY_KEY], [AY], [AY_NAME], [AY_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
            [AY_END_DATE], [AY_END_DATEID], [FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS], [FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
            [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY], [MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE], [MOVE_IN_END_DATE], [PROPERTY_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RELATIVE_AY], [RENEWAL_BASE_COUNT],
            [FOR_AY_YEAR], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT DISTINCT
            A.[PROPERTY_AY_KEY],
            A.[AY],
            A.[AY_NAME],
            A.[AY_BEGIN_DATE],
            A.[AY_BEGIN_DATEID],
            A.[AY_END_DATE],
            A.[AY_END_DATEID],
            A.[FALL_CALCULATION_DAYS],
            A.[FLAG_NON_STANDARD],
            P.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY],
            A.[MOVE_IN_BEGIN_DATE],
            A.[MOVE_IN_END_DATE],
            -- Logic: nvl(Properties.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID, Properties.LEGACY_ONESITE_ID)
            ISNULL(P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID], P.[LEGACY_ONESITE_ID]) AS [PROPERTY_ID],
            A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            A.[RELATIVE_AY],
            -- Logic: nvl(RenewalBase_1.OCCUPIED_COUNT, 0)
            ISNULL(R.[OCCUPIED_COUNT], 0) AS [RENEWAL_BASE_COUNT],
            -- Logic: nvl(RenewalBase_1.FOR_AY_YEAR, 0)
            ISNULL(R.[FOR_AY_YEAR], 0) AS [FOR_AY_YEAR],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_AllRecords A
        LEFT JOIN CTE_Properties P 
            ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN CTE_RenewalBase R 
            ON A.[AY] = R.[FOR_AY_YEAR] AND A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = R.[PROPERTY_KEY];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END;

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN

    BEGIN TRY

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Process Type 1: Truncate/Load)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_0];

        -- 2. CTEs to replicate ATL Dataflow Logic
        
        -- CTE: Q100 (Join and Filter Source Data)
        WITH [Q100] AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[TP_ID],
                U.[TP_LISTID],
                U.[TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                U.[TP_CREATED],
                U.[TP_MODIFIED],
                U.[NVARCHAR1],
                U.[NVARCHAR2],

                U.[NVARCHAR16],
                U.[NVARCHAR17],
                U.[NVARCHAR18],
                U.[NVARCHAR19],
                U.[NVARCHAR20],
                U.[NVARCHAR21],
                U.[NVARCHAR22],
                U.[BIT2],
                U.[BIT3],
                U.[DATETIME1],
                U.[FLOAT1]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_USER_DATA] U
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ODS_SHAREPOINT_ALL_LISTS] L 
                ON U.[TP_LISTID] = L.[TP_ID]
            WHERE U.[TP_ISCURRENT] = 1
        ),

        -- CTE: Case_Property_Contract_Uploads (Filter for specific List ID)
        [Case_Property_Contract_Uploads] AS (
            SELECT *
            FROM [Q100]
            WHERE [TP_LISTID] = '2EF185D4-C91C-4842-9CC2-7EA48F099AA6'
        ),

        -- CTE: Q9000 (Transformations and Aggregation)
        [Q9000] AS (
            SELECT 
                [TP_ID],
                [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                [TP_LISTID],
                -- Clean 'i:0#.w|' from User Names
                LTRIM(REPLACE([NVARCHAR1], 'i:0#.w|', '')) AS [CREATED_BY],
                LTRIM(REPLACE([NVARCHAR2], 'i:0#.w|', '')) AS [MODIFIED_BY],
                [NVARCHAR3] AS [FILETYPE],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR10], '--') AS [NOTICE OR CANCELLATION REQ], -- Spaces -> Underscores
                [NVARCHAR11] AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
                UPPER([NVARCHAR11]) AS [UPPERPROPERTYNAME],                  -- Fixed Case: UPPERPROPERTYNAME
                [NVARCHAR12] AS [CONTRACT_TYPE],
                ISNULL([BIT3], 0) AS [CONTRACT_INACTIVE_FLAG],
                ISNULL([BIT2], 0) AS [MONTH_TO_MONTH_FLAG],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR13], '--') AS [VENDOR_NAME],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR14], '--') AS [CONTACT_NAME],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR15], '--') AS [CONTACT_PHONE],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR16], '--') AS [CONTACT_EMAIL],
                [NVARCHAR17] AS [COST IS PER],                              -- Spaces -> Underscores
                [NVARCHAR18] AS [COST_FREQUENCY],
                ISNULL([NVARCHAR19], '--') AS [INCREASE_MONTH],
                [NVARCHAR20] AS [INCREASE_AMOUNT],
                [NVARCHAR21] AS [AUTO_RENEW_TERM],
                [NVARCHAR22] AS [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS],
                CASE WHEN [NVARCHAR22] = 'Yes' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG],
                [DATETIME1] AS [CONTRACT_EXPIRATION],
                CAST([FLOAT1] AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [COST],
                MAX([TP_MODIFIED]) AS [TP_MODIFIED],
                [TP_CREATED]
            FROM [Case_Property_Contract_Uploads]
            GROUP BY 
                [TP_CREATED],
                [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
                [DATETIME1],
                [FLOAT1],
                [BIT2],
                [BIT3],
                [TP_ID],
                [TP_LISTID],

                [NVARCHAR12],
                [NVARCHAR13],
                [NVARCHAR14],
                [NVARCHAR3],
                [NVARCHAR15],
                [NVARCHAR16],
                [NVARCHAR17],
                [NVARCHAR18],
                [NVARCHAR19],
                [NVARCHAR2],
                [NVARCHAR20],
                [NVARCHAR21],
                [NVARCHAR22]
        )

        -- 3. Final Insert
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_0] (
            [TP_ID],
            [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
            [TP_LISTID],
            [CREATED_BY],
            [MODIFIED_BY],
            [FILETYPE],
            [NOTICE OR CANCELLATION REQ], -- Standardized
            [PROPERTY_NAME],

            [COST_FREQUENCY],
            [INCREASE_MONTH],
            [INCREASE_AMOUNT],
            [AUTO_RENEW_TERM],
            [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS],
            [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG],
            [CONTRACT_EXPIRATION],
            [COST],
            [TP_MODIFIED],
            [TP_CREATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [TP_ID],
            [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID],
            [TP_LISTID],
            [CREATED_BY],
            [MODIFIED_BY],
            [FILETYPE],
            [NOTICE OR CANCELLATION REQ],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [UPPERPROPERTYNAME],
            [CONTRACT_TYPE],
            [CONTRACT_INACTIVE_FLAG],

            [CONTACT_NAME],

name: PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY_CONTRACTS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    -- Transaction Handling
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Full Reload Strategy)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH [CTE_DateReverse] AS (
            -- Sourced from DATE_F where RELATIVE_DAY = -1
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1
        ),
        [CTE_ReverseID_1] AS (
            -- Sourced from DATE_F_1 where RELATIVE_DAY = -1 (Used for Expiration Calc)
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [DATE_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1
        ),
        [CTE_Property1] AS (
            -- Sourced from PROPERTY_F with strict filtering
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] AS [PROPERTY_ID],
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 
              AND [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
        ),
        [CTE_DateTransform] AS (
            -- Sourced from PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_0 with Date formatting
            SELECT 
                [TP_ID],
                [TP_DELETETRANSACTIONID] AS [DELETEDTRANSACTIONID],
                [TP_LISTID],
                [CREATED_BY],
                -- to_char(TP_CREATED, 'YYYYMMDD') -> INT
                TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([TP_CREATED] AS DATETIME2(3)), 112) AS INT) AS [CREATED_DATE],
                [MODIFIED_BY],
                -- to_char(TP_MODIFIED, 'YYYYMMDD') -> INT
                TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([TP_MODIFIED] AS DATETIME2(3)), 112) AS INT) AS [MODIFIED_DATE],
                [FILETYPE],
                -- FIX: Removed internal quotes, brackets handle the spaces
                [NOTICE OR CANCELLATION REQ] AS [NOTICE_OR_CANCELLATION_REQ],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [UPPERPROPERTYNAME],
                [CONTRACT_TYPE],
                [CONTRACT_INACTIVE_FLAG],
                [MONTH_TO_MONTH_FLAG],
                [VENDOR_NAME],
                [CONTACT_NAME],
                [CONTACT_PHONE],
                [CONTACT_EMAIL],
                -- FIX: Removed internal quotes, brackets handle the spaces
                [COST IS PER] AS [COST_IS_PER],
                [COST_FREQUENCY],
                [INCREASE_MONTH],
                [INCREASE_AMOUNT],
                [AUTO_RENEW_TERM],
                [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG],
                [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS],
                -- to_char(CONTRACT_EXPIRATION, 'YYYYMMDD') -> INT.
                TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST([CONTRACT_EXPIRATION] AS DATETIME2(3)), 112) AS INT) AS [CONTRACT_EXPIRATION],
                [COST]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS_0]
        ),
        [CTE_InclPropID] AS (
            -- Join Logic: DateTransform + Property1 + DATE_F + ReverseID-1
            SELECT 
                dt.[TP_ID],
                p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                p.[PROPERTY_ID],
                p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                dt.[TP_LISTID],
                dt.[CREATED_BY],
                dt.[CREATED_DATE],
                dt.[MODIFIED_BY],
                dt.[MODIFIED_DATE],
                dt.[FILETYPE],
                dt.[NOTICE_OR_CANCELLATION_REQ],
                dt.[CONTRACT_TYPE],
                dt.[CONTRACT_INACTIVE_FLAG],
                dt.[MONTH_TO_MONTH_FLAG],
                dt.[VENDOR_NAME],
                dt.[CONTACT_NAME],
                dt.[CONTACT_PHONE],
                dt.[CONTACT_EMAIL],
                dt.[COST_IS_PER],
                dt.[COST_FREQUENCY],
                dt.[INCREASE_MONTH],
                dt.[INCREASE_AMOUNT],
                dt.[AUTO_RENEW_TERM],
                dt.[CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS],
                dt.[CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG],
                dt.[CONTRACT_EXPIRATION],
                df.[DATE_ID] AS [CONTRACT_EXPIRATION_DATEID],
                dt.[DELETEDTRANSACTIONID],
                -- Calculation: "ReverseID-1".DATE_ID - DATE_F.DATE_ID
                (rid.[DATE_ID] - df.[DATE_ID]) AS [EXPIRATION_VAR],
                dt.[COST]
            FROM [CTE_DateTransform] dt
            INNER JOIN [CTE_Property1] p 
                ON dt.[UPPERPROPERTYNAME] = p.[PROPERTY_NAME]
            LEFT OUTER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] df 
                ON dt.[CONTRACT_EXPIRATION] = df.[DATE_KEY] 
            CROSS JOIN [CTE_ReverseID_1] rid 
        ),
        [CTE_FinalSelect] AS (
            -- COMBO + OUTPUT Logic (Applying Transformations: NVL, UPPER, TRIM)
            SELECT
                i.[TP_ID],
                ISNULL(i.[AUTO_RENEW_TERM], '--') AS [AUTO_RENEW_TERM],
                LOWER(ISNULL(i.[CONTACT_EMAIL], '--')) AS [CONTACT_EMAIL],
                UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(i.[CONTACT_NAME], '--')))) AS [CONTACT_NAME],
                LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(i.[CONTACT_PHONE], '--'))) AS [CONTACT_PHONE],
                i.[CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG],
                UPPER(ISNULL(i.[CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS], '--')) AS [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS],
                ISNULL(i.[CONTRACT_TYPE], '--') AS [CONTRACT_TYPE],
                ISNULL(i.[COST], 0.00) AS [COST],
                ISNULL(i.[COST_IS_PER], '--') AS [COST_IS_PER],
                UPPER(ISNULL(i.[COST_FREQUENCY], '--')) AS [COST_FREQUENCY],
                LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(i.[CREATED_BY], '--'))) AS [CREATED_BY],
                i.[CREATED_DATE] AS [DATE_CREATED],
                i.[CONTRACT_EXPIRATION] AS [DATE_EXPIRATION],
                dr.[DATE_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY], -- From CTE_DateReverse
                i.[MODIFIED_DATE] AS [DATE_MODIFIED],
                i.[CONTRACT_EXPIRATION_DATEID] AS [DATEID_EXPIRATION],
                ISNULL(i.[DELETEDTRANSACTIONID], '--') AS [DELETE_TRANSACTION_ID],
                i.[EXPIRATION_VAR],
                i.[CONTRACT_INACTIVE_FLAG] AS [FLAG_INACTIVE],
                LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(i.[FILETYPE], '--'))) AS [FILE_TYPE],
                i.[INCREASE_AMOUNT],
                i.[INCREASE_MONTH],
                i.[MODIFIED_BY],
                i.[MONTH_TO_MONTH_FLAG],
                i.[NOTICE_OR_CANCELLATION_REQ],
                i.[PROPERTY_ID],
                i.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                i.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                i.[TP_LISTID],
                LTRIM(RTRIM(ISNULL(i.[VENDOR_NAME], '--'))) AS [VENDOR_NAME]
            FROM [CTE_InclPropID] i
            CROSS JOIN [CTE_DateReverse] dr -- Cartesian Product to apply the Date Key to all rows
        )
        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_CONTRACTS]
        (
            [TP_ID], [AUTO_RENEW_TERM], [CONTACT_EMAIL], [CONTACT_NAME], [CONTACT_PHONE], 
            [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEW_FLAG], [CONTRACT_AUTO_RENEWS], [CONTRACT_TYPE], [COST], 
            [COST_IS_PER], [COST_FREQUENCY], [CREATED_BY], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_EXPIRATION], 
            [DATE_KEY], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DATEID_EXPIRATION], [DELETE_TRANSACTION_ID], 
            [EXPIRATION_VAR], [FLAG_INACTIVE], [FILE_TYPE], [INCREASE_AMOUNT], [INCREASE_MONTH], 
            [MODIFIED_BY], [MONTH_TO_MONTH_FLAG], [NOTICE_OR_CANCELLATION_REQ], [PROPERTY_ID], 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [TP_LISTID], [VENDOR_NAME], [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            *,
            SYSDATETIME() AS [LASTUPDATED]
        FROM [CTE_FinalSelect];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

            P.[VENDOR_COMMENTS_01],
            P.[VENDOR_COMMENTS_02]

        FROM [FilteredProperties] P
        -- Left Join to LatestReputation (Where rn=1 ensures max date)
        LEFT JOIN [LatestReputation] R ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = R.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND R.rn = 1;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

name: PROPERTY_GL_AR_CHARGES_F_SP

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_GL_AR_CHARGES_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DELETE FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_GL_AR_CHARGES_F];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_GL_AR_CHARGES_F] (
        [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PERIOD_ID], [AR_CODE_ID],
        [ADJUSTED_AMOUNT], [AR_CODE_NAME], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
        [CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], [CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NAME], [CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER],
        [DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], [DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NAME], [DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER],
        [OUT_OF_PERIOD_AMOUNT], [POST_MONTH], [SCHEDULED_AMOUNT],
        [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TOTAL], [TOTAL_AMOUNT], [TOTAL_CREDIT_AMOUNT], [WRITE_OFF_AMOUNT]
    )
    SELECT
        d.[DATE_KEY],
        s.[PROPERTY_ID], s.[PERIOD_ID], s.[AR_CODE_ID],
        s.[ADJUSTED_AMOUNT], s.[AR_CODE_NAME], s.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], s.[AR_CODE_TYPE_NAME],
        s.[CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], s.[CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NAME], s.[CREDIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER],
        s.[DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_ID], s.[DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NAME], s.[DEBIT_GL_ACCOUNT_NUMBER],
        s.[OUT_OF_PERIOD_AMOUNT], s.[POST_MONTH], s.[SCHEDULED_AMOUNT],
        s.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TOTAL], s.[TOTAL_AMOUNT], s.[TOTAL_CREDIT_AMOUNT], s.[WRITE_OFF_AMOUNT]
    FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_GL_AR_CHARGES_0] s
    CROSS JOIN (SELECT [DATE_KEY] FROM [dbo].[DATE_F] WHERE [FLAG_TODAY] = 1) d;
END

name: PROPERTY_HOURS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_PROPERTY_HOURS into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_HOURS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_HOURS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Truncate the target table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_HOURS_0];

        -- CTE 1-3: Replicate the Source Filtering Logic (ONE, SIX, SEVEN)
        WITH [ONE] AS (
            SELECT MAX(ID) AS [ID], [PROPERTY_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_HOUR_TYPE_ID] = 1 AND [DAY] = 1 
              AND [OPEN_TIME] IS NOT NULL AND [CLOSE_TIME] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_ID]
        ),
        [SIX] AS (
            SELECT MAX(ID) AS [ID], [PROPERTY_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_HOUR_TYPE_ID] = 1 AND [DAY] = 6 
              AND [OPEN_TIME] IS NOT NULL AND [CLOSE_TIME] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_ID]
        ),
        [SEVEN] AS (
            SELECT MAX(ID) AS [ID], [PROPERTY_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_HOUR_TYPE_ID] = 1 AND [DAY] = 7 
              AND [OPEN_TIME] IS NOT NULL AND [CLOSE_TIME] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_ID]
        ),
        -- CTE 4: Replicate the "Stack" view logic including the Time Formatting CASE statements
        [CTE_Stack] AS (
            SELECT 
                H.[ID],
                H.[PROPERTY_ID],
                H.[DAY],
                (CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) < 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) AS VARCHAR) + 'am'
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) = 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) AS VARCHAR) + 'pm'
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) > 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[OPEN_TIME]) - 12 AS VARCHAR) + 'pm'
                    ELSE 'CLOSED' 
                 END) + ' - ' +
                (CASE 
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) < 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) AS VARCHAR) + 'am'
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) = 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) AS VARCHAR) + 'pm'
                    WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) > 12 THEN CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, H.[CLOSE_TIME]) - 12 AS VARCHAR) + 'pm'
                    ELSE 'CLOSED' 
                 END) AS [HoursFormatted]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_HOURS] H
            LEFT JOIN [ONE] ON H.[ID] = [ONE].[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [SIX] ON H.[ID] = [SIX].[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [SEVEN] ON H.[ID] = [SEVEN].[ID]
            WHERE H.[PROPERTY_HOUR_TYPE_ID] = 1 
              AND H.[DAY] IN (1, 6, 7)
              AND H.[OPEN_TIME] IS NOT NULL 
              AND H.[CLOSE_TIME] IS NOT NULL
              AND ([ONE].[ID] IS NOT NULL OR [SIX].[ID] IS NOT NULL OR [SEVEN].[ID] IS NOT NULL)
        ),
        -- CTE 5: Replicate the "Reverse_Pivot" transform
        [CTE_Reverse_Pivot] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                ISNULL([1], 'CLOSED') AS [MF_Hours],
                ISNULL([6], 'CLOSED') AS [SAT_Hours],
                ISNULL([7], 'CLOSED') AS [SUN_Hours]
            FROM (
                SELECT [PROPERTY_ID], [DAY], [HoursFormatted] FROM [CTE_Stack]
            ) SourceTable
            PIVOT (
                MAX([HoursFormatted])
                FOR [DAY] IN ([1], [6], [7])
            ) AS PivotTable
        )
        -- Final Load into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_HOURS_0] (
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [OFFICE_HOURS_1],
            [OFFICE_HOURS_2],
            [OFFICE_HOURS_3]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_ID],
            [MF_Hours],
            [SAT_Hours],
            [SUN_Hours]
        FROM [CTE_Reverse_Pivot];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        DECLARE @Msg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW 50000, @Msg, 1;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PROPERTY_KEYS_0_SP
transformations: SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID: CASE WHEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] > 0 THEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] ELSE [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID] END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.APP_Support.PROPERTY_0, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_KEYS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_KEYS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    -- Transaction Handling
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Data Refresh Only)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_KEYS_0];

        -- 2. CTE Transformation Logic
        WITH [CTE_Property_0] AS (
            -- Sourced from APP_Support.PROPERTY_0 with Filter
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID],
                [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID]
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] > 500
        ),
        [CTE_FinalSelect] AS (
            -- Query View Logic with Decode Transformation
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                -- decode(PROPERTY_0.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID > 0, PROPERTY_0.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID, PROPERTY_0.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID)
                CASE 
                    WHEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] > 0 THEN [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
                    ELSE [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID]
                END AS [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID]
            FROM [CTE_Property_0]
        )
        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_KEYS_0]
        (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID]
        FROM [CTE_FinalSelect];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PROPERTY_LEADS_0_SP

sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEADS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @SnapshotDate INT;
    SELECT @SnapshotDate = MAX([DATE_KEY]) FROM [dbo].[DATE_F] WHERE [RELATIVE_DAY] = -1;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEADS_0];

    WITH [MaxEventPerDay] AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [APPLICATION_ID],
            MAX([EVENT_ID]) AS [EVENT_ID],
            [EVENT_DATE],
            [AY]
        FROM [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1]
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [EVENT_DATE], [AY]
    ),
    [LatestEvent] AS (
        SELECT
            @SnapshotDate AS [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [APPLICATION_ID],
            MAX([EVENT_ID]) AS [EVENT_ID],
            [AY]
        FROM [MaxEventPerDay]
        WHERE [EVENT_DATE] <= @SnapshotDate
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [APPLICATION_ID], [AY]
    ),
    [WithFlags] AS (
        SELECT
            L.[DATE_KEY],
            L.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            L.[APPLICATION_ID],
            L.[EVENT_ID],
            L.[AY],
            A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], A.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL], A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT],
            A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL], A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND],
            A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED], A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE],
            A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS],
            A.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD], A.[FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED], A.[FLAG_LEAD_EVENT],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT], A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE], A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED], A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED],
            A.[FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND], A.[FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND]
        FROM [LatestEvent] L
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1] A
            ON L.[PROPERTY_KEY] = A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
           AND L.[APPLICATION_ID] = A.[APPLICATION_ID]
           AND L.[EVENT_ID] = A.[EVENT_ID]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEADS_0] (
        [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
        [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
        [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT],
        [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS],
        [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED], [FLAG_LEAD_EVENT],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED],
        [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND], [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND],
        [PROPERTY_NAME]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY],
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR]), SUM([FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED]),
        SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL]), SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT]),
        SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL]), SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND]),
        SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED]), SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE]),
        SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT]), SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS]),
        SUM([FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_EVENT]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED]),
        SUM([FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND]), SUM([FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND]),
        [PROPERTY_NAME]
    FROM [WithFlags]
    GROUP BY [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [PROPERTY_NAME];
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0_SP]
AS

-- !! DEPRECATED 2026-04-01: Canonical version migrated to WH_ODS. This staging copy pending cleanup. !!
-- !! Do not modify this copy. Make changes to WH_ODS.dbo.PROPERTY_LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0_SP instead. !!

BEGIN
