    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEAD_APPLICATIONS_0]
        ([DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD_COMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY], [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS], [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR], [FLAG_LEAD], [FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED], [FLAG_LEAD_EVENT], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED], [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED], [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND], [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND], [FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE], [FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL], [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL], [FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD_COMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY], [FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY], [PROPERTY_NAME])
    SELECT

        d.[DATE_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
        e.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        e.[AY] AS [AY],
        0 AS [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD_COMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY],
        0 AS [FLAG_INBOUND_LEAD_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CALL],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_CHAT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_LEASED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_SMS],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR]) AS [FLAG_LAST_CONTACT_VIRTUAL_TOUR],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD]) AS [FLAG_LEAD],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_CANCELLED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_EVENT]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_EVENT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_EVENT],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_APPLIED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_COMPLETE_LEASE],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_INCOMPLETE_LEASE],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_LEAD_CAPTURED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_BOOKED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_MILESTONE_TOUR_COMPLETED],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_INBOUND],
        SUM(e.[FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND]) AS [FLAG_LEAD_SOURCE_OUTBOUND],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_COMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_CANCEL],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_NEW],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_RENEWAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_VELOCITY_TOTAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD_COMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY],
        0 AS [FLAG_OUTBOUND_LEAD_INCOMPLETE_LEASE_VELOCITY],
        e.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [PROPERTY_NAME]
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[LEAD_APPLICATION_EVENTS_1] e
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] d
        ON e.[EVENT_DATE] <= d.[DATE_KEY]
    WHERE d.[DATE_KEY] >= 20241101
        AND d.[RELATIVE_DAY] < 0
    GROUP BY d.[DATE_KEY], e.[PROPERTY_KEY], e.[AY], e.[PROPERTY_NAME];
END

name: PROPERTY_LEDGER_SUMMARY_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_LEDGER_SUMMARY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEDGER_SUMMARY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEDGER_SUMMARY_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_LEDGER_SUMMARY_0]
        ([POST_PERIOD], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [UNPAID_RENT], [UNPAID_OTHER], [UNPAID_TOTAL])
    SELECT

        CAST(LEFT(CAST(ar.[POST_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 6) AS INT) AS [POST_PERIOD],
        l.[PROPERTY_ID] AS [PROPERTY_ID],
        p.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        p.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0 AND ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 2
            THEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END) AS [UNPAID_RENT],
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0
                AND ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (2, 7)
                AND (ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] IN (3,4,5,6,8,9)
                     OR (ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 2 AND ar.[AR_ORIGIN_ID] IN (2,6))
                     OR ar.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] = 401)
            THEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END) AS [UNPAID_OTHER],
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0 AND ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 2
            THEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END)
          + SUM(CASE
            WHEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0
                AND ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (2, 7)
                AND (ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] IN (3,4,5,6,8,9)
                     OR (ar.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 2 AND ar.[AR_ORIGIN_ID] IN (2,6))
                     OR ar.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] = 401)
            THEN ar.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END) AS [UNPAID_TOTAL]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES] l
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS] ar
        ON l.[ID] = ar.[LEASE_ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ac
        ON ar.[AR_CODE_ID] = ac.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEDGER_FILTERS] lf
        ON ac.[LEDGER_FILTER_ID] = lf.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
        ON l.[PROPERTY_ID] = p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
    WHERE l.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID] <> 5
        AND l.[FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE] IS NULL
        AND p.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
    GROUP BY CAST(LEFT(CAST(ar.[POST_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 6) AS INT),
             l.[PROPERTY_ID], p.[PROPERTY_KEY], p.[PROPERTY_NAME];
END

name: PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0.
sql:
-- SECTION 1: TARGET TABLE DDL
-- Per Architecture Rule 0.1: Target tables already exist. DDL is omitted.

-- SECTION 2: STORED PROCEDURE
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Process Type 1: Truncate/Load)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0];

        -- 2. Transformation Logic (CTEs)
        
        -- CTE: Query_1 (Filter and Aggregate)
        -- Filters: TIER in ('N0', 'R0') AND AY = 2025
        WITH [Query_1] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                AVG([AVG_RATE_PROPERTY]) AS [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
                SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) AS [BED_TOTAL_LEASED]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F]
            WHERE [TIER] IN ('N0', 'R0')
              AND [AY] = 2025
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),

        -- CTE: Query (Map to Output Format)
        [Query] AS (
            SELECT 
                -- DATE_KEY: Yesterday's date as YYYYMMDD integer
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_KEY],
                
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                
                -- Component Constants
                'FORECASTED REVENUE' AS [COMPONENT_NAME],
                'DEC 10,2' AS [COMPONENT_DATATYPE],
                
                -- Actuals
                'FORECAST_AVG_RATE_PROPERTY' AS [COMPONENT_ACTUAL],
                CAST([AVG_RATE_PROPERTY] AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE],
                
                -- Divisors
                'FORECAST_BED_COUNT' AS [COMPONENT_DIVISOR],
                CAST([BED_TOTAL_LEASED] AS VARCHAR(100)) AS [COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE],
                
                'Used to determine the MONTHLY REVENUE of the property' AS [COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION]
            FROM [Query_1]
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [COMPONENT_NAME],
            [COMPONENT_DATATYPE],
            [COMPONENT_ACTUAL],
            [COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE],
            [COMPONENT_DIVISOR],
            [COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE],
            [COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [COMPONENT_NAME],
            [COMPONENT_DATATYPE],
            [COMPONENT_ACTUAL],
            [COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE],
            [COMPONENT_DIVISOR],
            [COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE],
            [COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION]
        FROM [Query];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FORECAST_FORECASTS, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.FORECAST_FORECAST_TIERS into WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @Yesterday INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT);

    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0];

    WITH
    -- Step 1: Latest approved forecast key per property+AY (AY >= 2025)
    Query AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([FORECAST_KEY]) AS [FORECAST_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [AY]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FORECAST_FORECASTS]
        WHERE [AY] >= 2025
          AND [FLAG_ACTIVE] = 1
          AND [FLAG_APPROVED] = 1
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY]
    ),
    -- Step 2: Join to tiers, sum rate/count per property+AY
    Rates AS (
        SELECT
            Q.[FORECAST_KEY],
            Q.[AY],
            T.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            T.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            SUM(T.[RATE_EXTENDED])  AS [RATE_EXTENDED],
            SUM(T.[LEASE_COUNT])    AS [LEASE_COUNT]
        FROM Query Q
        INNER JOIN [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FORECAST_FORECAST_TIERS] T
            ON T.[FORECAST_KEY] = Q.[FORECAST_KEY]
        GROUP BY Q.[FORECAST_KEY], Q.[AY], T.[PROPERTY_KEY], T.[PROPERTY_NAME]
    ),
    -- Step 3: Actuals — sum per property+AY
    Actuals AS (
        SELECT
            [AY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            SUM([RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED]) AS [RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED],
            SUM([LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL])      AS [LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[FLOORPLAN_ACTUALS_RENT]
        GROUP BY [AY], [PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),
    -- Step 4: Combine forecast + actuals
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            R.[FORECAST_KEY],
            R.[AY],
            R.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            R.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            R.[RATE_EXTENDED],
            R.[LEASE_COUNT],
            A.[RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED],
            A.[LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL],
            CAST((A.[RENT_PER_SPACE_EXTENDED] + R.[RATE_EXTENDED]) AS DECIMAL(10,2))      AS [RATE_EXTENDED_COMBO],
            (A.[LEASED_COUNT_TOTAL] + R.[LEASE_COUNT])                                     AS [LEASE_COUNT_EXTENDED]
        FROM Rates R
        INNER JOIN Actuals A
            ON A.[AY] = R.[AY]
            AND A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = R.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    )

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0] (
        [DATE_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [COMPONENT_NAME],
        [COMPONENT_DATATYPE],
        [COMPONENT_ACTUAL],
        [COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE],
        [COMPONENT_DIVISOR],
        [COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE],
        [COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION]
    )
    SELECT
        @Yesterday,
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        'RE-FORECASTED MONTHLY REVENUE',
        'decimal',
        'RE-FORECASTED Rate Extended + Actuals Rate Extended',
        CAST([RATE_EXTENDED_COMBO] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        'RE-FORECASTED Lease Count Extended + Actual Lease Count',
        CAST([LEASE_COUNT_EXTENDED] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        'Re-Forecasted Monthly Revenue. Note: the Divisor can be used to calculate the Re-Forecasted Avg Rate too.'
    FROM Combo;
END

name: PROPERTY_METRICS_SP
transformations: COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE: CASE WHEN r.PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN r.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE ELSE CAST( TRY_CAST(f.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE AS FLOAT) * TRY_CAST(f.COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE AS FLOAT) AS VARCHAR(100)) END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_PROD2.dbo.DATES, WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY into WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY_METRICS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    ;WITH DATE_RANGE AS (
        SELECT TOP 1 DATE_KEY, AY
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[DATES]
        WHERE RELATIVE_DAY = -1
        ORDER BY DATE_KEY DESC
    ),
    PROPERTY_DIM AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY]
        WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED  = 0
          AND FLAG_NON_PROPERTY   = 0
          AND FLAG_RETAIL         = 0
    ),
    PROPERTY_DIM_1 AS (
        SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY]
        WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED    = 0
          AND FLAG_NON_PROPERTY     = 0
          AND FLAG_RETAIL           = 0
          AND FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY = 0
    ),
    LeaseAgg AS (
        SELECT *
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[LEASE_AGG]
        WHERE DATE_KEY >= 20250101
          AND AY >= 2025
    ),
    UnitFacts AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, UNIT_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, FLAG_OCCUPIED
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS]
        WHERE DATE_KEY >= 20250101
    ),
    PropFacts AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY,
               MAX(BED_COUNT_COMPILED) AS BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
               MAX(BED_COUNT_CUSTOM)   AS BED_COUNT_CUSTOM
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACTS]
        WHERE DATE_KEY >= 20250101
        GROUP BY DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    GoalGoogleRating AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY,
               MAX(GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING) AS GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_FACTS]
        WHERE DATE_KEY = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)
        GROUP BY DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    MaxDate1_1 AS (
        SELECT
            MAX(ID)            AS ID,
            MAX(DATE_KEY)      AS DATE_KEY,
            MAX(DATE_MODIFIED) AS DATE_MODIFIED,
            PROPERTY_KEY
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_FACT]
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    MaxDate1 AS (
        SELECT
            MAX(ID)            AS ID,
            MAX(DATE_KEY)      AS DATE_KEY,
            MAX(DATE_MODIFIED) AS DATE_MODIFIED,
            PROPERTY_KEY
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT]
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    MaxDate1_2 AS (
        SELECT
            MAX(ID)            AS ID,
            MAX(DATE_KEY)      AS DATE_KEY,
            MAX(DATE_MODIFIED) AS DATE_MODIFIED,
            PROPERTY_KEY
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT]
        GROUP BY PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    JTurnerORAGoal AS (
        SELECT
            f.DATE_KEY,
            f.PROPERTY_KEY,
            f.DATE_MODIFIED,
            f.ORA_SCORE,
            f.JTURNER_PROPERTY_NAME
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT] f
        INNER JOIN MaxDate1 m
            ON m.ID            = f.ID
           AND m.DATE_KEY      = f.DATE_KEY
           AND m.DATE_MODIFIED = f.DATE_MODIFIED
           AND m.PROPERTY_KEY  = f.PROPERTY_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM_1 pd
            ON pd.PROPERTY_KEY = f.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    JTurnerORA_AvgGoal AS (
        SELECT AVG(CAST(ORA_SCORE AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS ORA_SCORE
        FROM JTurnerORAGoal
    ),
    JTurnerORAActuals AS (
        SELECT
            f.DATE_KEY,
            f.PROPERTY_KEY,
            f.ORA_SCORE,
            f.DATE_MODIFIED
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[JTURNER_ORA_SCORE_FACT] f
        INNER JOIN MaxDate1_2 m
            ON m.ID            = f.ID
           AND m.DATE_KEY      = f.DATE_KEY
           AND m.PROPERTY_KEY  = f.PROPERTY_KEY
           AND m.DATE_MODIFIED = f.DATE_MODIFIED
        GROUP BY f.DATE_KEY, f.DATE_MODIFIED, f.ORA_SCORE, f.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    RepComGoal AS (
        SELECT
            f.DATE_KEY,
            f.PROPERTY_KEY,
            f.SCORE
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_FACT] f
        INNER JOIN MaxDate1_1 m
            ON m.DATE_KEY      = f.DATE_KEY
           AND m.DATE_MODIFIED = f.DATE_MODIFIED
           AND m.PROPERTY_KEY  = f.PROPERTY_KEY
           AND m.ID            = f.ID
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM_1 pd
            ON pd.PROPERTY_KEY = f.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    RepCom_AvgGoal AS (
        SELECT AVG(CAST(SCORE AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS RepCom_Avg_SCORE
        FROM RepComGoal
    ),
    RepComActuals AS (
        SELECT
            f.DATE_KEY,
            f.PROPERTY_KEY,
            f.SCORE
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_FACT] f
        INNER JOIN MaxDate1_1 m
            ON f.DATE_KEY = m.DATE_KEY
           AND f.ID       = m.ID
    ),
    GoogleRatingsActual AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, [Average Rating]
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS]
    ),
    Query AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            ISNULL(TRY_CAST(TALI_SCORE AS DECIMAL(19,4)), 0.00) AS TALI_SCORE
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_RESIDENT_F]
        WHERE PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
    ),
    TaliScore AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY,
            PROPERTY_KEY,
            AVG(TALI_SCORE)     AS TALI_SCORE,
            COUNT(PROPERTY_KEY) AS [Count]
        FROM Query
        GROUP BY DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    PortfolioAvgTALI AS (
        SELECT TOP 1 DATE_KEY, INDEX_KEY, YEAR, INDEXNAME, INDEXVALUE
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[JTURNER_PORTFOLIO_AVG_TALI_0]
        WHERE YEAR = 2025
        ORDER BY DATE_KEY DESC
    ),
    BED_COUNT_COMPILED AS (
        SELECT
            pf.DATE_KEY,
            pf.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'BED_COUNT_COMPILED'                        AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                       AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(pf.BED_COUNT_COMPILED AS VARCHAR(100)) AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM PropFacts pf
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON pf.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON pf.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    BED_COUNT_CUSTOM2 AS (
        SELECT
            pf.DATE_KEY,
            pf.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'BED_COUNT_CUSTOM'                          AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                       AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(pf.BED_COUNT_CUSTOM AS VARCHAR(100))   AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM PropFacts pf
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON pf.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON pf.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    FLAG_FALL_TOTAL AS (
        SELECT
            la.DATE_KEY,
            la.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'FLAG_FALL_TOTAL'                               AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                           AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(SUM(la.FLAG_FALL_TOTAL) AS VARCHAR(100))   AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM LeaseAgg la
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr
            ON dr.DATE_KEY = la.DATE_KEY AND dr.AY = la.AY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON la.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY la.DATE_KEY, la.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL AS (
        SELECT
            la.DATE_KEY,
            la.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL'                               AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                             AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(SUM(la.FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL) AS VARCHAR(100))   AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM LeaseAgg la
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr
            ON dr.DATE_KEY = la.DATE_KEY AND dr.AY = la.AY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON la.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY la.DATE_KEY, la.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    FLAG_FALL_NEW AS (
        SELECT
            la.DATE_KEY,
            la.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'FLAG_FALL_NEW'                               AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                         AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(SUM(la.FLAG_FALL_NEW) AS VARCHAR(100))   AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM LeaseAgg la
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr
            ON dr.DATE_KEY = la.DATE_KEY AND dr.AY = la.AY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON la.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY la.DATE_KEY, la.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    FLAG_OCCUPIED AS (
        SELECT
            uf.DATE_KEY,
            uf.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'FLAG_OCCUPIED'                               AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                         AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(SUM(uf.FLAG_OCCUPIED) AS VARCHAR(100))   AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM UnitFacts uf
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON dr.DATE_KEY     = uf.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON uf.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY uf.DATE_KEY, uf.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    GOAL_ORA AS (
        SELECT
            dr.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'GOAL_ORA'                                  AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                  AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(ag.ORA_SCORE AS VARCHAR(100))          AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM DATE_RANGE dr
        CROSS JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd
        CROSS JOIN JTurnerORA_AvgGoal ag
    ),
    GOAL_REPUTATION AS (
        SELECT
            dr.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'GOAL_REPUTATION'                               AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(ag.RepCom_Avg_SCORE AS VARCHAR(100))       AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM DATE_RANGE dr
        CROSS JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd
        CROSS JOIN RepCom_AvgGoal ag
    ),
    GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING AS (
        SELECT
            g.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING'                            AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(g.GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING AS VARCHAR(100))      AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM GoalGoogleRating g
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON g.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON g.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    ORA_ACTUAL AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            dr.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'ORA_ACTUAL'                                    AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(a.ORA_SCORE AS VARCHAR(100))               AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM JTurnerORAActuals a
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON a.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON a.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    REP_COM_ACTUAL AS (
        SELECT
            dr.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'REP_COM_ACTUAL'                                AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(MAX(a.SCORE) AS VARCHAR(100))              AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM RepComActuals a
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON a.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON a.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
        GROUP BY dr.DATE_KEY, pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    GOOGLE_ACTUAL AS (
        SELECT
            dr.DATE_KEY,
            pd.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'GOOGLE_ACTUAL'                                 AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            CAST(g.[Average Rating] AS VARCHAR(100))        AS COMPONENT_VALUE
        FROM GoogleRatingsActual g
        INNER JOIN DATE_RANGE dr ON g.DATE_KEY     = dr.DATE_KEY
        INNER JOIN PROPERTY_DIM pd ON g.PROPERTY_KEY = pd.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    Leasing_Pct_YTD AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'LEASING TOTAL YTD'                             AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                           AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'FLAG_FALL_TOTAL'                               AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            ft.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'BED_COUNT_COMPILED'                            AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            bc.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to calc the Leasing % YTD'                AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN FLAG_FALL_TOTAL ft
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = ft.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = ft.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    New_Leasing_Pct_YTD AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'NEW LEASES YTD'                                AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                           AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'FLAG_FALL_NEW'                                 AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            fn.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'BED_COUNT_COMPILED'                            AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            bc.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to calc the New Leasing % YTD'            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN FLAG_FALL_NEW fn
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = fn.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = fn.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    Occupied_Pct_YTD AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'OCCUPIED BEDS YTD'                             AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                           AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'FLAG_OCCUPIED'                                 AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            fo.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'BED_COUNT_COMPILED'                            AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            bc.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to calc the Occupied % YTD'               AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN FLAG_OCCUPIED fo
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = fo.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = fo.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    Renewal_Pct_YTD AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'RENEWAL TOTAL YTD'                             AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'INT'                                           AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL'                             AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            fr.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'BED_COUNT_CUSTOM'                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            bc.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to calc the Renewal % YTD'                AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_CUSTOM2 bc
        LEFT JOIN FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL fr
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = fr.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = fr.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    GoogleRating AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'GOOGLE RATING'                                 AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'GOOGLE_ACTUAL'                                 AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            ga.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING'                            AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            gg.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to compare the property Google Rating to the Peak Avg Google Rating'
                                                            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN GOOGLE_ACTUAL ga
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = ga.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = ga.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN GOAL_GOOGLE_RATING gg
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = gg.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = gg.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    ReputationComRating AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'REPUTATION.COM RATING'                         AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'REP_COM_ACTUAL'                                AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            ra.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'GOAL_REPUTATION'                               AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            gr.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to compare the property REPUTATION.COM Rating to the Peak Avg REPUTATION.COM Rating'
                                                            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN REP_COM_ACTUAL ra
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = ra.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = ra.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN GOAL_REPUTATION gr
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = gr.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = gr.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    JTurner_ORA AS (
        SELECT
            bc.DATE_KEY,
            bc.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'JTURNER ORA RATING'                            AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'ORA_ACTUAL'                                    AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            oa.COMPONENT_VALUE                              AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'GOAL_ORA'                                      AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            go2.COMPONENT_VALUE                             AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to compare the property JTurner ORA Rating to the Peak Avg ORA Rating'
                                                            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM BED_COUNT_COMPILED bc
        LEFT JOIN ORA_ACTUAL oa
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = oa.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = oa.PROPERTY_KEY
        LEFT JOIN GOAL_ORA go2
            ON bc.DATE_KEY     = go2.DATE_KEY
           AND bc.PROPERTY_KEY = go2.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    JTurner_TALI AS (
        SELECT
            ts.DATE_KEY,
            ts.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'TALI SCORE'                                    AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            'DEC 10,2'                                      AS COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'TALI_SCORE'                                    AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            CAST(ts.TALI_SCORE AS VARCHAR(100))             AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            'TALI_GOAL'                                     AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            CAST(pt.INDEXVALUE AS VARCHAR(100))             AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Used to compare the property JTurner Average TALI Score to the Portfolio Avg TALI Score '
                                                            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM TaliScore ts
        CROSS JOIN PortfolioAvgTALI pt
    ),
    ForecastedRevenue AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_FORECASTED_REVENUE_0]
    ),
    ReforecastedRevenue AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS_REFORECASTED_REVENUE_0]
    ),
    ForecastedMonthlyRevenue_1 AS (
        SELECT
            f.DATE_KEY,
            f.PROPERTY_KEY,
            'FORECASTED MONTHLY REVENUE'                    AS COMPONENT_NAME,
            f.COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            'FORECASTED MONTHLY REVENUE'                    AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
            CASE
                WHEN r.PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
                    THEN r.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE
                ELSE CAST(
                        TRY_CAST(f.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE AS FLOAT)
                        * TRY_CAST(f.COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE AS FLOAT)
                     AS VARCHAR(100))
            END                                             AS COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            f.COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
            '1'                                             AS COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
            'Pre-calculated Forecasted Monthly Revenue, using the Revenue Amount * the Forecasted Leased Bed Count from Adaptive'
                                                            AS COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ForecastedRevenue f
        LEFT JOIN ReforecastedRevenue r
            ON f.DATE_KEY     = r.DATE_KEY
           AND f.PROPERTY_KEY = r.PROPERTY_KEY
    ),
    ForecastedMonthlyRevenue AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ForecastedMonthlyRevenue_1
    ),
    ForecastedRevenueOut AS (
        SELECT
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
            COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
            COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ForecastedRevenue
    ),
    AllMetrics AS (
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM Leasing_Pct_YTD
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM New_Leasing_Pct_YTD
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM Occupied_Pct_YTD
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM Renewal_Pct_YTD
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM GoogleRating
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ReputationComRating
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM JTurner_ORA
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM JTurner_TALI
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ForecastedMonthlyRevenue
        UNION ALL
        SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME, COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
               COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
               COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
        FROM ForecastedRevenueOut
    )

    MERGE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS] AS tgt
    USING AllMetrics AS src
        ON  tgt.DATE_KEY       = src.DATE_KEY
        AND tgt.PROPERTY_KEY   = src.PROPERTY_KEY
        AND tgt.COMPONENT_NAME = src.COMPONENT_NAME
    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        tgt.COMPONENT_DATATYPE      = src.COMPONENT_DATATYPE,
        tgt.COMPONENT_ACTUAL        = src.COMPONENT_ACTUAL,
        tgt.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE  = src.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
        tgt.COMPONENT_DIVISOR       = src.COMPONENT_DIVISOR,
        tgt.COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE = src.COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE,
        tgt.COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION   = src.COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, COMPONENT_NAME,
        COMPONENT_DATATYPE, COMPONENT_ACTUAL, COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
        COMPONENT_DIVISOR, COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
    ) VALUES (
        src.DATE_KEY, src.PROPERTY_KEY, src.COMPONENT_NAME,
        src.COMPONENT_DATATYPE, src.COMPONENT_ACTUAL, src.COMPONENT_ACTUAL_VALUE,
        src.COMPONENT_DIVISOR, src.COMPONENT_DIVISOR_VALUE, src.COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION
    );

    UPDATE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY_METRICS]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END

name: PROPERTY_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[PROPERTY_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Start Transaction
        BEGIN TRAN

            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            -- Step 1: Truncate Target Table (Full Load Pattern)
            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY];

            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            -- Step 2: Insert Data from Source
            -- ---------------------------------------------------------
            INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY] (
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ACCOUNTANT],
                [ACCOUNTANT_EMP_CODE],
                [ACCOUNTING_MGR],
                [ACCOUNTING_MGR_EMP_CODE],
                [ADDRESS_1],
                [ADDRESS_2],
                [ADDRESS_CITY],
                [ADDRESS_COUNTRY],
                [ADDRESS_COUNTY],
                [ADDRESS_STATE],
                [ADDRESS_ZIP],
                [ALTERNATE_ID_1],
                [ALTERNATE_ID_2],
                [ALTERNATE_ID_3],
                [AM_EMAIL],
                [AM_EMP_CODE],
                [AM_NAME],
                [APARTMENT_COUNT],
                [APARTMENT_COUNT_BILLING],
                [ASSET_MGR_EMAIL],
                [ASSET_MGR_NAME],
                [ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER],
                [ASSISTANT_CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                [BED_COUNT_BILLING],
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                [BED_COUNT_CUSTOM],
                [BED_COUNT_STATIC],
                [BED_COUNT_STATIC_PY],
                [BILLING_ALLOCATION_PARTNERS],
                [BILLING_ALLOCATION_PCT],
                [BUILD_YEAR],
                [BUILDING_COUNT],
                [COMPANY],
                [CONTROLLER],
                [CONTROLLER_EMP_CODE],
                [COUNT],
                [CURRENT_PHASE],
                [DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
                [DATE_CREATED],
                [DATE_DATA_FREEZE],
                [DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                [DATE_LIFECYCLE],
                [DATE_MGMT_TAKEOVER],
                [DATE_MIGRATED],
                [DATE_STABILIZED],
                [DATE_STATUS],
                [EMAIL],
                [ENTITY_NAME],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [EXEC_DIR_EMAIL],
                [EXEC_DIR_EMP_CODE],
                [EXEC_DIR_NAME],
                [FINANCIAL_PUBLICATION_DAY],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL_MANAGED],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_CONVENTIONAL_UNMANAGED],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT_MANAGED],
                [FLAG_ACTIVE_STUDENT_UNMANAGED],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL_ONLY],
                [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION],
                [FLAG_DATA_FREEZE],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                [FLAG_FANNIE_FREDDIE_MORTGAGE],
                [FLAG_LEASEUP],
                [FLAG_MANAGED],
                [FLAG_MIGRATED],
                [FLAG_MIXED_USE],
                [FLAG_NON_PROPERTY],
                [FLAG_PENDING],
                [FLAG_PHASE_0],
                [FLAG_PHASE_1],
                [FLAG_PHASE_10],
                [FLAG_PHASE_2],
                [FLAG_PHASE_3],
                [FLAG_PHASE_4],
                [FLAG_PHASE_5],
                [FLAG_PHASE_6],
                [FLAG_PHASE_7],
                [FLAG_PHASE_8],
                [FLAG_PHASE_9],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [FLAG_RETAIL],
                [FLAG_STABILIZED],
                [FLAG_STUDENT_ONLY],
                [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY],
                [FLAG_TENTATIVE],
                [FLAG_USE_TEMP_ADDRESS],
                [FLAG_WHITE_LABEL],
