T7_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END

T7_BEDS_U: CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) ELSE NULL END

T8_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END

T8_BEDS_U: CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) + ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0) ELSE NULL END

AVG_RATE: CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS]) / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) ELSE 0.00 END

AVG_RATE: CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS]) / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) ELSE 0.00 END

AVG_RATE: CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS]) / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) ELSE 0.00 END

Tier_Rate_Label: CASE WHEN u.[Rate_L_int] IS NOT NULL AND u.[Rate_U_int] IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN u.[Tier] IN ('N0','R0') THEN CAST(u.[Rate_U_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' or Less' WHEN u.[Rate_U_int] - 1000 = u.[Rate_L_int] THEN CAST(u.[Rate_L_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' or More' ELSE CAST(u.[Rate_L_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' - ' + CAST(u.[Rate_U_int] AS varchar(20)) END ELSE 'No Rate' END
FLAG_VALID_TIER: CASE WHEN q.[Tier] IN ('N0','R0') OR (ISNULL(q.[Beds_L], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(q.[Beds_U], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(q.[Rate_L], 0) > 0 AND ISNULL(q.[Rate_U], 0) > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.ADAPTIVE_BUDGET_YEAR_RATE_WORKBOOK, WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_0 (cross-database).
sql:
-- Generated from ATL: Rate_Tiers_0A (RATE_TIERS_0A_ATL.txt)
--
-- Builds RATE_TIER_0 by:
--   1. Joining ADAPTIVE_BUDGET_YR_RATE_WORKBOOK (DB_APP_SUPPORT) to AY_0
--   2. Transforming tier columns (Bud CTE)
--   3. Joining to PROPERTY_F (Properties) on Entity_ID = ENTITY_NUMBER
--      WHERE GROUP_ROW_NUMBER = 1 (first row per LEVEL_NAME/LEASE_TYPE/UNIT_TYPE group)
--   4. Computing floorplan/property aggregates (ByFloorplan, ByProperty, ByPropertyLeaseType)
--   5. Joining aggregates back (Combo2)
--   6. Unpivoting T0-T8+TRF tiers into rows via CROSS APPLY (replaces BODS Pivot transform)
--      Tier = UPPER(first char of LEASE_TYPE + (PIVOT_SEQ-1))
--   7. Joining to FLOORPLANS_F for FLOORPLAN_KEY
--   8. Computing FloorplanMinMax / FloorplanLeaseTypeMinMax rate bounds
--   9. Assembling Final row with FLAG_VALID_TIER
--
-- Sources:
--   WH_ODS.dbo.ADAPTIVE_BUDGET_YEAR_RATE_WORKBOOK  (replaces sync_tables â€” ODS has data, sync_tables empty)
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_0
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F
--   WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_F
--
-- Target: WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_0  (Truncate/Load)
--
-- Key ATL translations:
--   gen_row_num_by_group(LEVEL_NAME,LEASE_TYPE,UNIT_TYPE)
--     â†’ ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ... ORDER BY ACADEMIC_YR ASC)
--   decode(x = 0, NULL, x) â†’ NULLIF(x, 0)
--   nvl(a, b)              â†’ ISNULL(a, b)
--   word(LEVEL_NAME, 1)    â†’ LEFT(LEVEL_NAME, CHARINDEX(' ', LEVEL_NAME+' ')-1)
--   BODS Pivot transform   â†’ CROSS APPLY (VALUES ...) for 10 tiers T0-T8+TRF
--   upper(substr(LEASE_TYPE,1,1) || PIVOT_SEQ-1) â†’ UPPER(LEFT(LEASE_TYPE,1)+CAST(PIVOT_SEQ-1 AS varchar))
--   Table_Comparison(key=RATE_TIER_KEY, detect_delete=no) â†’ DELETE+INSERT upsert on RATE_TIER_KEY
--   Combo.T0_RATE_L        â†’ hardcoded 1.00 (ATL overrides Bud's 0.00)
--

CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[RATE_TIERS_0A_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Upsert: delete existing keys that will be reloaded, then insert fresh rows
    DELETE tgt
    FROM [dbo].[RATE_TIER_0] tgt
    WHERE EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT DISTINCT
                LEFT(LEFT([Level], CHARINDEX(' ', [Level] + ' ') - 1), 4) AS [Entity_ID],
                CAST('20' + LEFT([Academic Yr], 2) AS int) AS [AY_KEY]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_BUDGET_YEAR_RATE_WORKBOOK]
        ) src
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[AY_0] ay ON ay.[AY_KEY] = src.[AY_KEY]
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[PROPERTY_F] prop ON prop.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = src.[Entity_ID]
        WHERE tgt.[AY] = src.[AY_KEY]
          AND tgt.[PROPERTY_KEY] = prop.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    );

    ;WITH

    -- =========================================================================
    -- SourceBase: join workbook to AY_0 on academic year key.
    -- AY_KEY = '20' prepended to first 2 chars of ACADEMIC_YR (e.g. '23-24' â†’ 2023).
    -- ROW_NUMBER partitioned by (LEVEL_NAME, LEASE_TYPE, UNIT_TYPE) ordered by
    -- ACADEMIC_YR ASC implements BODS gen_row_num_by_group().
    -- =========================================================================
    SourceBase AS (
        SELECT
            a.[Level_Name]                      AS [LEVEL_NAME],
            a.[Lease_Type]                      AS [LEASE_TYPE],
            a.[Unit_Type]                       AS [UNIT_TYPE],
            a.[Academic_Yr]                     AS [ACADEMIC_YR],
            ay.[RELATIVE_AY],
            a.[Total_Beds]                      AS [TOTAL_BEDS],
            a.[Total_Leased_Beds]               AS [TOTAL_LEASED_BEDS],
            a.[Average_Rate]                    AS [AVERAGE_RATE],
            a.[Tier1_Rate]                      AS [TIER1_RATE],
            a.[Tier1_Beds]                      AS [TIER1_BEDS],
            a.[Tier2_Rate]                      AS [TIER2_RATE],
            a.[Tier2_Beds]                      AS [TIER2_BEDS],
            a.[Tier3_Rate]                      AS [TIER3_RATE],
            a.[Tier3_Beds]                      AS [TIER3_BEDS],
            a.[Tier4_Rate]                      AS [TIER4_RATE],
            a.[Tier4_Beds]                      AS [TIER4_BEDS],
            a.[Tier5_Rate]                      AS [TIER5_RATE],
            a.[Tier5_Beds]                      AS [TIER5_BEDS],
            a.[Tier6_Rate]                      AS [TIER6_RATE],
            a.[Tier6_Beds]                      AS [TIER6_BEDS],
            a.[Tier7_Rate]                      AS [TIER7_RATE],
            a.[Tier7_Beds]                      AS [TIER7_BEDS],
            a.[Tier8_Rate]                      AS [TIER8_RATE],
            a.[Tier8_Beds]                      AS [TIER8_BEDS],
            a.[Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only]     AS [ACTUAL_RATE_REFORECAST_ONLY],
            a.[Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only]     AS [ACTUAL_BEDS_REFORECAST_ONLY],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                PARTITION BY a.[Level_Name], a.[Lease_Type], a.[Unit_Type]
                ORDER BY a.[Academic_Yr] ASC
            )                                                               AS [GROUP_ROW_NUMBER]
        FROM (
            SELECT
                [Level]                               AS [Level_Name],
                [Academic Yr]                         AS [Academic_Yr],
                [Lease Type]                          AS [Lease_Type],
                [Unit Type]                           AS [Unit_Type],
                [Total Beds]                          AS [Total_Beds],
                [Total Leased Beds]                   AS [Total_Leased_Beds],
                [Average Rate]                        AS [Average_Rate],
                [Tier 1 - Rate]                       AS [Tier1_Rate],
                [Tier 1 - Beds]                       AS [Tier1_Beds],
                [Tier 2 - Rate]                       AS [Tier2_Rate],
                [Tier 2 - Beds]                       AS [Tier2_Beds],
                [Tier 3 - Rate]                       AS [Tier3_Rate],
                [Tier 3 - Beds]                       AS [Tier3_Beds],
                [Tier 4 - Rate]                       AS [Tier4_Rate],
                [Tier 4 - Beds]                       AS [Tier4_Beds],
                [Tier 5 - Rate]                       AS [Tier5_Rate],
                [Tier 5 - Beds]                       AS [Tier5_Beds],
                [Tier 6 - Rate]                       AS [Tier6_Rate],
                [Tier 6 - Beds]                       AS [Tier6_Beds],
                [Tier 7 - Rate]                       AS [Tier7_Rate],
                [Tier 7 - Beds]                       AS [Tier7_Beds],
                [Tier 8 - Rate]                       AS [Tier8_Rate],
                [Tier 8 - Beds]                       AS [Tier8_Beds],
                [Actual - Rate _reforecast only_]     AS [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only],
                [Actual - Beds _reforecast only_]     AS [Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_BUDGET_YEAR_RATE_WORKBOOK]
        ) a
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[AY_0] ay
            ON CAST('20' + LEFT(a.[Academic_Yr], 2) AS int) = ay.[AY_KEY]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Bud: transform SourceBase into typed tier columns.
    -- T0 beds/rates are constants (0 / NULL / 0.00).
    -- T1-T8 beds: NULLIF(value,0); lower/upper bounds are cumulative sums.
    -- T1-T8 rates: NULLIF(value,0.00); bounds derived from next-tier rates.
    -- TRF = reforecast-only tier.
    -- =========================================================================
    Bud AS (
        SELECT
            [GROUP_ROW_NUMBER],
            CAST('20' + LEFT([ACADEMIC_YR], 2) AS int)                     AS [AY],
            -- Entity_ID: first space-delimited word of LEVEL_NAME, truncated to 4
            LEFT(LEFT([LEVEL_NAME], CHARINDEX(' ', [LEVEL_NAME] + ' ') - 1), 4)
                                                                            AS [Entity_ID],
            CAST([AVERAGE_RATE]       AS decimal(10,2))                    AS [AVG_RATE],
            CAST([TOTAL_BEDS]         AS int)                               AS [BED_TOTAL],
            CAST([TOTAL_LEASED_BEDS]  AS int)                               AS [BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            UPPER([UNIT_TYPE])                                              AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [LEASE_TYPE],

            -- ---- Tier 0: all constants ----
            0                                                               AS [T0_BEDS],
            0                                                               AS [T0_BEDS_L],
            0                                                               AS [T0_BEDS_U],
            CAST(NULL AS decimal(10,2))                                     AS [T0_RATE],
            CAST(0.00  AS decimal(10,2))                                    AS [T0_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00, 0.00)       AS [T0_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 1 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T1_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN [TIER1_BEDS] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END                AS [T1_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN [TIER1_BEDS] = 0 THEN NULL
                 ELSE CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int) END                         AS [T1_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER1_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T1_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T1_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER1_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER1_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T1_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 2 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T2_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T2_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T2_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER2_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T2_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T2_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER2_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER2_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T2_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 3 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T3_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T3_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T3_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER3_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T3_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T3_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER3_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER3_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T3_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 4 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T4_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T4_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T4_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER4_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T4_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T4_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER4_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER4_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T4_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 5 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T5_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T5_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T5_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER5_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T5_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T5_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER5_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER5_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T5_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 6 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T6_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T6_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T6_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER6_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T6_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T6_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER6_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER6_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T6_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 7 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T7_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T7_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T7_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER7_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T7_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T7_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) - 1.00,
                          CAST([TIER7_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00),
                   CAST([TIER7_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T7_RATE_U],

            -- ---- Tier 8 ----
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0)                           AS [T8_BEDS],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0) + 1
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T8_BEDS_L],
            CASE WHEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0) > 0
                 THEN ISNULL(CAST([TIER1_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER2_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER3_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER4_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER5_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER6_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER7_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                    + ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_BEDS] AS int), 0)
                 ELSE NULL END                                              AS [T8_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([TIER8_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T8_RATE],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00)              AS [T8_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(CAST([TIER8_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)) + 1000.00,
                   CAST([TIER8_RATE] AS decimal(10,2)))                     AS [T8_RATE_U],

            -- ---- TRF (reforecast-only tier) ----
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_BEDS_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS int),   0)        AS [TRF_BEDS],
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_BEDS_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS int),   0)        AS [TRF_BEDS_L],
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_BEDS_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS int),   0)        AS [TRF_BEDS_U],
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_RATE_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00) AS [TRF_RATE],
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_RATE_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00) AS [TRF_RATE_L],
            NULLIF(CAST([ACTUAL_RATE_REFORECAST_ONLY] AS decimal(10,2)), 0.00) AS [TRF_RATE_U]
        FROM SourceBase
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Properties: PROPERTY_F filtered to non-sub-properties.
    -- =========================================================================
    Properties AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED]    AS [FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
            [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        FROM [dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Combo: join Bud (GROUP_ROW_NUMBER=1 only) to Properties on Entity_ID.
    -- Applies nvl(Bud.Tx_BEDS, 0) for bed columns.
    -- Overrides T0_RATE_L = 1.00 (ATL hardcodes 1.00 in Combo, not Bud's 0.00).
    -- Computes Tx_RATE_X_BEDS and EXTENDED totals.
    -- =========================================================================
    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            b.[AY],
            b.[Entity_ID],
            b.[AVG_RATE]                                                    AS [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            b.[BED_TOTAL],
            b.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            p.[FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
            b.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            b.[LEASE_TYPE],
            p.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]                                          AS [PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            -- Tier 0 beds/rates (Combo applies ISNULL; T0_RATE_L hardcoded 1.00)
            ISNULL(b.[T0_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T0_BEDS],
            b.[T0_BEDS_L],
            b.[T0_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T0_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T0_RATE],
            CAST(1.00 AS decimal(10,2))                                     AS [T0_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(b.[T1_RATE] - 1.00, 0.00)                               AS [T0_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 1
            ISNULL(b.[T1_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T1_BEDS],
            b.[T1_BEDS_L],
            b.[T1_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T1_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T1_RATE],
            b.[T1_RATE]                                                     AS [T1_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T2_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T1_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T1_RATE])                                             AS [T1_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 2
            ISNULL(b.[T2_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T2_BEDS],
            b.[T2_BEDS_L],
            b.[T2_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T2_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T2_RATE],
            b.[T2_RATE]                                                     AS [T2_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T3_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T2_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T2_RATE])                                             AS [T2_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 3
            ISNULL(b.[T3_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T3_BEDS],
            b.[T3_BEDS_L],
            b.[T3_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T3_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T3_RATE],
            b.[T3_RATE]                                                     AS [T3_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T4_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T3_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T3_RATE])                                             AS [T3_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 4
            ISNULL(b.[T4_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T4_BEDS],
            b.[T4_BEDS_L],
            b.[T4_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T4_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T4_RATE],
            b.[T4_RATE]                                                     AS [T4_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T5_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T4_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T4_RATE])                                             AS [T4_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 5
            ISNULL(b.[T5_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T5_BEDS],
            b.[T5_BEDS_L],
            b.[T5_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T5_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T5_RATE],
            b.[T5_RATE]                                                     AS [T5_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T6_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T5_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T5_RATE])                                             AS [T5_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 6
            ISNULL(b.[T6_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T6_BEDS],
            b.[T6_BEDS_L],
            b.[T6_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T6_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T6_RATE],
            b.[T6_RATE]                                                     AS [T6_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T7_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T6_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T6_RATE])                                             AS [T6_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 7
            ISNULL(b.[T7_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T7_BEDS],
            b.[T7_BEDS_L],
            b.[T7_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T7_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T7_RATE],
            b.[T7_RATE]                                                     AS [T7_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T8_RATE] - 1.00, b.[T7_RATE] + 1000.00),
                   b.[T7_RATE])                                             AS [T7_RATE_U],
            -- Tier 8
            ISNULL(b.[T8_BEDS], 0)                                         AS [T8_BEDS],
            b.[T8_BEDS_L],
            b.[T8_BEDS_U],
            ISNULL(b.[T8_RATE], 0.00)                                      AS [T8_RATE],
            b.[T8_RATE]                                                     AS [T8_RATE_L],
            ISNULL(b.[T8_RATE] + 1000.00, b.[T8_RATE])                     AS [T8_RATE_U],
            -- TRF
            ISNULL(b.[TRF_BEDS], 0)                                        AS [TRF_BEDS],
            b.[TRF_BEDS_L],
            b.[TRF_BEDS_U],
            b.[TRF_RATE],
            b.[TRF_RATE_L],
            b.[TRF_RATE_U],
            -- Rate x Beds products (using Bud values for NULL-safe multiply)
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T1_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T1_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T2_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T2_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T3_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T3_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T4_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T4_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T5_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T5_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T6_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T6_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T7_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T7_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[T8_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[T8_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            ISNULL(ISNULL(b.[TRF_RATE], 0.00) * ISNULL(b.[TRF_BEDS], 0), 0.00) AS [TRF_RATE_X_BEDS],
            -- Extended totals (T1-T8 only)
            (ISNULL(b.[T1_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T1_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T2_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T2_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T3_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T3_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T4_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T4_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T5_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T5_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T6_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T6_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T7_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T7_RATE], 0.00))
          + (ISNULL(b.[T8_BEDS], 0) * ISNULL(b.[T8_RATE], 0.00))           AS [EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            ISNULL(b.[T1_BEDS], 0) + ISNULL(b.[T2_BEDS], 0)
          + ISNULL(b.[T3_BEDS], 0) + ISNULL(b.[T4_BEDS], 0)
          + ISNULL(b.[T5_BEDS], 0) + ISNULL(b.[T6_BEDS], 0)
          + ISNULL(b.[T7_BEDS], 0) + ISNULL(b.[T8_BEDS], 0)                AS [EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]
        FROM Bud b
        INNER JOIN Properties p ON p.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = b.[Entity_ID]
        WHERE b.[GROUP_ROW_NUMBER] = 1
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- ByFloorplan: aggregate Combo by (PROPERTY_KEY, FLOORPLAN_CODE).
    -- AVG_RATE = SUM(rate_x_beds T1-T8) / SUM(BED_TOTAL_LEASED) when >0.
    -- =========================================================================
    ByFloorplan AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
              + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                                                                            AS [RATE_TOTALS],
            SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])                                         AS [BED_TOTALS],
            CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0
                 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
                         + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                    / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                 ELSE 0.00 END                                              AS [AVG_RATE],
            SUM([EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL])                                      AS [EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            SUM([EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL])                                       AS [EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]
        FROM Combo
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_CODE]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- ByProperty: aggregate Combo by PROPERTY_KEY only.
    -- =========================================================================
    ByProperty AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
              + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                                                                            AS [RATE_TOTALS],
            SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])                                         AS [BED_TOTALS],
            CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0
                 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
                         + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                    / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                 ELSE 0.00 END                                              AS [AVG_RATE],
            SUM([EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL])                                      AS [EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            SUM([EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL])                                       AS [EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]
        FROM Combo
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- ByPropertyLeaseType: aggregate Combo by (PROPERTY_KEY, LEASE_TYPE).
    -- =========================================================================
    ByPropertyLeaseType AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [LEASE_TYPE],
            SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
              + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                                                                            AS [RATE_TOTALS],
            SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])                                         AS [BED_TOTALS],
            CASE WHEN SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) > 0
                 THEN SUM([T1_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T2_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T3_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T4_RATE_X_BEDS]
                         + [T5_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T6_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T7_RATE_X_BEDS] + [T8_RATE_X_BEDS])
                    / SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED])
                 ELSE 0.00 END                                              AS [AVG_RATE],
            SUM([EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL])                                      AS [EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            SUM([EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL])                                       AS [EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]
        FROM Combo
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [LEASE_TYPE]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Combo2: Combo LEFT JOIN the three aggregate CTEs.
    -- Adds property-level and floorplan-level rate/bed aggregates alongside
    -- the per-row Combo data.
    -- =========================================================================
    Combo2 AS (
        SELECT
            c.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            c.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            bp.[EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL]                                        AS [PROPERTY_RATE_EXTENDED],
            bp.[EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]                                         AS [PROPERTY_BED_EXTENDED],
            c.[EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            c.[EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL],
            c.[AY],
            c.[Entity_ID],
            bf.[AVG_RATE]                                                   AS [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
            c.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            bp.[AVG_RATE]                                                   AS [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
            bplt.[AVG_RATE]                                                 AS [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
            c.[BED_TOTAL],
            c.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            c.[FLAG_PROPERTY_DISPOSITIONED],
            c.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            bf.[EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL]                                        AS [FLOORPLAN_RATE_EXTENDED],
            bf.[EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]                                         AS [FLOORPLAN_BED_EXTENDED],
            c.[LEASE_TYPE],
            bplt.[EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL]                                      AS [PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE_EXTENDED_RATE_TOTAL],
            bplt.[EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL]                                       AS [PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE_EXTENDED_BED_TOTAL],
            c.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            -- Tier beds/rates pass-through from Combo
            c.[T0_BEDS],  c.[T0_BEDS_L],  c.[T0_BEDS_U],
            c.[T1_BEDS],  c.[T1_BEDS_L],  c.[T1_BEDS_U],
            c.[T2_BEDS],  c.[T2_BEDS_L],  c.[T2_BEDS_U],
            c.[T3_BEDS],  c.[T3_BEDS_L],  c.[T3_BEDS_U],
            c.[T4_BEDS],  c.[T4_BEDS_L],  c.[T4_BEDS_U],
            c.[T5_BEDS],  c.[T5_BEDS_L],  c.[T5_BEDS_U],
            c.[T6_BEDS],  c.[T6_BEDS_L],  c.[T6_BEDS_U],
            c.[T7_BEDS],  c.[T7_BEDS_L],  c.[T7_BEDS_U],
            c.[T8_BEDS],  c.[T8_BEDS_L],  c.[T8_BEDS_U],
            c.[TRF_BEDS], c.[TRF_BEDS_L], c.[TRF_BEDS_U],
            c.[T0_RATE],  c.[T0_RATE_L],  c.[T0_RATE_U],
            c.[T1_RATE],  c.[T1_RATE_L],  c.[T1_RATE_U],
            c.[T2_RATE],  c.[T2_RATE_L],  c.[T2_RATE_U],
            c.[T3_RATE],  c.[T3_RATE_L],  c.[T3_RATE_U],
            c.[T4_RATE],  c.[T4_RATE_L],  c.[T4_RATE_U],
            c.[T5_RATE],  c.[T5_RATE_L],  c.[T5_RATE_U],
            c.[T6_RATE],  c.[T6_RATE_L],  c.[T6_RATE_U],
            c.[T7_RATE],  c.[T7_RATE_L],  c.[T7_RATE_U],
            c.[T8_RATE],  c.[T8_RATE_L],  c.[T8_RATE_U],
            c.[TRF_RATE], c.[TRF_RATE_L], c.[TRF_RATE_U],
            c.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            c.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS], c.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            c.[TRF_RATE_X_BEDS]
        FROM Combo c
        LEFT JOIN ByFloorplan bf
            ON bf.[PROPERTY_KEY] = c.[PROPERTY_KEY]
           AND bf.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = c.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
        LEFT JOIN ByProperty bp
            ON bp.[PROPERTY_KEY] = c.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        LEFT JOIN ByPropertyLeaseType bplt
            ON bplt.[PROPERTY_KEY] = c.[PROPERTY_KEY]
           AND bplt.[LEASE_TYPE]   = c.[LEASE_TYPE]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Unpivoted: replaces BODS Pivot transform + PostPivot CTE.
    -- CROSS APPLY produces 10 rows per Combo2 row (T0-T8 + TRF).
    -- PIVOT_SEQ: 1=T0, 2=T1, ..., 9=T8, 10=TRF.
    -- Tier: UPPER(first_char_of_LEASE_TYPE + (PIVOT_SEQ-1))
    --   e.g. LEASE_TYPE='New' â†’ 'N0','N1',...,'N9'; 'Renewal' â†’ 'R0','R1',...,'R9'
    -- Rate_L_int / Rate_U_int: integer casts of rate bounds.
    -- =========================================================================
    Unpivoted AS (
        SELECT
            c2.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            c2.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            c2.[AY],
            c2.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
            c2.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            c2.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
            c2.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
            c2.[BED_TOTAL],
            c2.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            c2.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            c2.[LEASE_TYPE],
            c2.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            c2.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            c2.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS], c2.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            pv.[PIVOT_SEQ],
            pv.[Beds],
            pv.[Beds_L],
            pv.[Beds_U],
            pv.[Rate],
            pv.[Rate_L],
            pv.[Rate_U],
            CAST(pv.[Rate_L] AS int)                                        AS [Rate_L_int],
            CAST(pv.[Rate_U] AS int)                                        AS [Rate_U_int],
            UPPER(LEFT(c2.[LEASE_TYPE], 1) + CAST(pv.[PIVOT_SEQ] - 1 AS varchar(2)))
                                                                            AS [Tier],
            CAST(NULL AS varchar(25))                                       AS [Tier_Rate_Label]
        FROM Combo2 c2
        CROSS APPLY (VALUES
            (1,  c2.[T0_BEDS],  c2.[T0_BEDS_L],  c2.[T0_BEDS_U],  c2.[T0_RATE],  c2.[T0_RATE_L],  c2.[T0_RATE_U]),
            (2,  c2.[T1_BEDS],  c2.[T1_BEDS_L],  c2.[T1_BEDS_U],  c2.[T1_RATE],  c2.[T1_RATE_L],  c2.[T1_RATE_U]),
            (3,  c2.[T2_BEDS],  c2.[T2_BEDS_L],  c2.[T2_BEDS_U],  c2.[T2_RATE],  c2.[T2_RATE_L],  c2.[T2_RATE_U]),
            (4,  c2.[T3_BEDS],  c2.[T3_BEDS_L],  c2.[T3_BEDS_U],  c2.[T3_RATE],  c2.[T3_RATE_L],  c2.[T3_RATE_U]),
            (5,  c2.[T4_BEDS],  c2.[T4_BEDS_L],  c2.[T4_BEDS_U],  c2.[T4_RATE],  c2.[T4_RATE_L],  c2.[T4_RATE_U]),
            (6,  c2.[T5_BEDS],  c2.[T5_BEDS_L],  c2.[T5_BEDS_U],  c2.[T5_RATE],  c2.[T5_RATE_L],  c2.[T5_RATE_U]),
            (7,  c2.[T6_BEDS],  c2.[T6_BEDS_L],  c2.[T6_BEDS_U],  c2.[T6_RATE],  c2.[T6_RATE_L],  c2.[T6_RATE_U]),
            (8,  c2.[T7_BEDS],  c2.[T7_BEDS_L],  c2.[T7_BEDS_U],  c2.[T7_RATE],  c2.[T7_RATE_L],  c2.[T7_RATE_U]),
            (9,  c2.[T8_BEDS],  c2.[T8_BEDS_L],  c2.[T8_BEDS_U],  c2.[T8_RATE],  c2.[T8_RATE_L],  c2.[T8_RATE_U]),
            (10, c2.[TRF_BEDS], c2.[TRF_BEDS_L], c2.[TRF_BEDS_U], c2.[TRF_RATE], c2.[TRF_RATE_L], c2.[TRF_RATE_U])
        ) AS pv(PIVOT_SEQ, Beds, Beds_L, Beds_U, Rate, Rate_L, Rate_U)
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Floorplans: deduplicate FLOORPLANS_F to max FLOORPLAN_KEY per
    -- (FLOORPLAN_CODE, PROPERTY_KEY).
    -- =========================================================================
    Floorplans AS (
        SELECT
            MAX([FLOORPLAN_KEY])    AS [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [PROPERTY_KEY]
        FROM [dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F]
        GROUP BY [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Query2: join Unpivoted to Floorplans for FLOORPLAN_KEY.
    -- Computes RATE_TIER_KEY and Tier_Rate_Label.
    -- RATE_TIER_KEY = PROPERTY_KEY.AY.FLOORPLAN_KEY.Tier
    -- Tier_Rate_Label:
    --   If Rate_L_int IS NULL or Rate_U_int IS NULL â†’ 'No Rate'
    --   Else if Tier IN ('N0','R0')                 â†’ Rate_U_int + ' or Less'
    --   Else if Rate_U_int - 1000 = Rate_L_int      â†’ Rate_L_int + ' or More'
    --   Else                                         â†’ Rate_L_int + ' - ' + Rate_U_int
    -- =========================================================================
    Query2 AS (
        SELECT
            CAST(u.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS varchar(20)) + '.'
          + CAST(u.[AY]           AS varchar(10)) + '.'
          + CAST(f.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] AS varchar(20)) + '.'
          + u.[Tier]                                                         AS [RATE_TIER_KEY],
            u.[AY],
            u.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
            u.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            u.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
            u.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
            u.[BED_TOTAL],
            u.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            u.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            f.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            u.[LEASE_TYPE],
            CAST(NULL AS decimal(19,4))                                     AS [LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
            u.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            u.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            u.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            u.[Beds],
            u.[Beds_L],
            u.[Beds_U],
            u.[Rate],
            u.[Rate_L],
            u.[Rate_U],
            u.[Rate_L_int],
            u.[Rate_U_int],
            u.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            u.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS], u.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            u.[Tier],
            CASE
                WHEN u.[Rate_L_int] IS NOT NULL AND u.[Rate_U_int] IS NOT NULL THEN
                    CASE
                        WHEN u.[Tier] IN ('N0','R0')
                            THEN CAST(u.[Rate_U_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' or Less'
                        WHEN u.[Rate_U_int] - 1000 = u.[Rate_L_int]
                            THEN CAST(u.[Rate_L_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' or More'
                        ELSE CAST(u.[Rate_L_int] AS varchar(20)) + ' - '
                           + CAST(u.[Rate_U_int] AS varchar(20))
                    END
                ELSE 'No Rate'
            END                                                             AS [Tier_Rate_Label]
        FROM Unpivoted u
        LEFT JOIN Floorplans f
            ON f.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = u.[PROPERTY_KEY]
           AND f.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = u.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- FloorplanMinMax: MIN/MAX rate bounds per (AY, FLOORPLAN_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY),
    -- excluding TRF tier (N5/R5 = PIVOT_SEQ 6, but ATL excludes by Tier name).
    -- =========================================================================
    FloorplanMinMax AS (
        SELECT
            [AY],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            MIN([Rate_L_int])   AS [Rate_L_int],
            MAX([Rate_U_int])   AS [Rate_U_int]
        FROM Query2
        WHERE [FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NOT NULL
          AND [Tier] NOT IN ('N5', 'R5')
        GROUP BY [AY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),

    -- =========================================================================
    -- FloorplanLeaseTypeMinMax: same but also grouped by LEASE_TYPE.
    -- =========================================================================
    FloorplanLeaseTypeMinMax AS (
        SELECT
            [AY],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [LEASE_TYPE],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            MIN([Rate_L_int])   AS [Rate_L_int],
            MAX([Rate_U_int])   AS [Rate_U_int]
        FROM Query2
        WHERE [FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NOT NULL
          AND [Tier] NOT IN ('N5', 'R5')
        GROUP BY [AY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [LEASE_TYPE], [PROPERTY_KEY]
    )

    -- =========================================================================
    -- Final INSERT: Query2 + MinMax lookups; filter to rows with FLOORPLAN_KEY.
    -- FLAG_VALID_TIER: 1 when tier is T0/TRF (N0/R0) OR all bounds are populated.
    -- LEASE_TYPE uppercased per ATL.
    -- =========================================================================

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[RATE_TIER_0] (
        [RATE_TIER_KEY],
        [AY],
        [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
        [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
        [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
        [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
        [BED_TOTAL],
        [BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
        [FLAG_VALID_TIER],
        [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
        [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
        [FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
        [FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
        [LEASE_TYPE],
        [LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [BEDS],
        [BEDS_L],
        [BEDS_U],
        [RATE],
        [RATE_L],
        [RATE_U],
        [RATE_L_INT],
        [RATE_U_INT],
        [T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
        [TIER],
        [TIER_RATE_LABEL]
    )
    SELECT
        q.[RATE_TIER_KEY],
        q.[AY],
        q.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
        q.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
        q.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
        q.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
        q.[BED_TOTAL],
        q.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
        CASE WHEN q.[Tier] IN ('N0','R0')
              OR (ISNULL(q.[Beds_L],  0) > 0
              AND ISNULL(q.[Beds_U],  0) > 0
              AND ISNULL(q.[Rate_L],  0) > 0
              AND ISNULL(q.[Rate_U],  0) > 0)
             THEN 1 ELSE 0 END                                              AS [FLAG_VALID_TIER],
        q.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
        q.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        fltmm.[Rate_L_int]                                                  AS [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
        fltmm.[Rate_U_int]                                                  AS [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
        fmm.[Rate_L_int]                                                    AS [FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
        fmm.[Rate_U_int]                                                    AS [FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
        UPPER(q.[LEASE_TYPE])                                               AS [LEASE_TYPE],
        q.[LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
        q.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
        q.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        q.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        q.[Beds]            AS [BEDS],
        q.[Beds_L]          AS [BEDS_L],
        q.[Beds_U]          AS [BEDS_U],
        q.[Rate]            AS [RATE],
        q.[Rate_L]          AS [RATE_L],
        q.[Rate_U]          AS [RATE_U],
        q.[Rate_L_int]      AS [RATE_L_INT],
        q.[Rate_U_int]      AS [RATE_U_INT],
        q.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
        q.[Tier]            AS [TIER],
        q.[Tier_Rate_Label] AS [TIER_RATE_LABEL]
    FROM Query2 q
    LEFT JOIN FloorplanMinMax fmm
        ON fmm.[AY]           = q.[AY]
       AND fmm.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = q.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
       AND fmm.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = q.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    LEFT JOIN FloorplanLeaseTypeMinMax fltmm
        ON fltmm.[AY]           = q.[AY]
       AND fltmm.[LEASE_TYPE]   = q.[LEASE_TYPE]
       AND fltmm.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = q.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
       AND fltmm.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = q.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    WHERE q.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] IS NOT NULL;

END

name: RATE_TIERS_0B_SP
transformations: Entity_ID: CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING([Level_Name], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) - 1) ELSE [Level_Name] END
T1_BEDS: CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier1_Beds] AS INT) END
T1_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END
T1_BEDS_U: CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier1_Beds] AS INT) END
T2_BEDS: CASE WHEN [Tier2_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier2_Beds] AS INT) END
T2_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END
T2_BEDS_U: CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END
T3_BEDS: CASE WHEN [Tier3_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier3_Beds] AS INT) END
T3_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END
T3_BEDS_U: CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END
T4_BEDS: CASE WHEN [Tier4_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier4_Beds] AS INT) END
T4_BEDS_L: CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.AY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_WORKBOOK_PROPERTY_TARGETS_0 (cross-database).

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[RATE_TIERS_0B_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_WORKBOOK_PROPERTY_TARGETS_0];

        -- 2. CTE Transformations
        WITH cte_AY_Clean AS (
            -- Optimization: Ensure distinct keys to prevent fan-out
            SELECT DISTINCT
                CAST([AY_KEY] AS INT) AS [AY_KEY],
                [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AY_0]
        ),
        cte_Property AS (
            -- Source: PROPERTY_F (Filter: FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0)
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
        ),
        cte_Source_Prep AS (
            -- Optimization: Pre-calculate the Join Key here so the JOIN downstream is simple
            SELECT 
                [Level_Name],
                [Lease_Type],
                [Unit_Type],
                [Academic_Yr],
                -- Create a deterministic Integer key for joining
                TRY_CAST(CONCAT('20', SUBSTRING([Academic_Yr], 1, 2)) AS INT) AS [Calculated_AY_Key],
                [Total_Beds],
                [Total_Leased_Beds],
                [Average_Rate],
                [Tier1_Rate], [Tier1_Beds],
                [Tier2_Rate], [Tier2_Beds],
                [Tier3_Rate], [Tier3_Beds],
                [Tier4_Rate], [Tier4_Beds],
                [Tier5_Rate], [Tier5_Beds],
                [Tier6_Rate], [Tier6_Beds],
                [Tier7_Rate], [Tier7_Beds],
                [Tier8_Rate], [Tier8_Beds],
                [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only],
                [Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only]
            -- UPDATED: Table Name Case Sensitivity
            FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Budget_Yr_Rate_Workbook]
        ),
        cte_Source_Joined AS (
            -- Optimization: Simple Integer Join
            SELECT 
                S.[Level_Name],
                S.[Lease_Type],
                S.[Unit_Type],
                S.[Academic_Yr],
                A.[RELATIVE_AY],
                S.[Total_Beds],
                S.[Total_Leased_Beds],
                S.[Average_Rate],
                S.[Tier1_Rate], S.[Tier1_Beds],
                S.[Tier2_Rate], S.[Tier2_Beds],
                S.[Tier3_Rate], S.[Tier3_Beds],
                S.[Tier4_Rate], S.[Tier4_Beds],
                S.[Tier5_Rate], S.[Tier5_Beds],
                S.[Tier6_Rate], S.[Tier6_Beds],
                S.[Tier7_Rate], S.[Tier7_Beds],
                S.[Tier8_Rate], S.[Tier8_Beds],
                S.[Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only],
                S.[Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only]
            FROM cte_Source_Prep S
            INNER JOIN cte_AY_Clean A 
                ON S.[Calculated_AY_Key] = A.[AY_KEY]
        ),
        cte_Bud AS (
            -- View: Bud (Calculations and Row Numbering)
            SELECT
                -- Optimization: Order by specific columns to help the window function
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
                    PARTITION BY [Level_Name], [Lease_Type], [Unit_Type] 
                    ORDER BY [Level_Name]
                ) AS [GROUP_ROW_NUMBER],
                
                -- Re-calculate AY for display/logic usage
                CONVERT(INT, CONCAT('20', SUBSTRING([Academic_Yr], 1, 2))) AS [AY],
                [RELATIVE_AY],
                
                -- Entity Extraction
                CASE 
                    WHEN CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) > 0 THEN SUBSTRING([Level_Name], 1, CHARINDEX(' ', [Level_Name]) - 1)
                    ELSE [Level_Name]
                END AS [Entity_ID],
                
                CAST([Average_Rate] AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS [AVG_RATE],
                CAST([Total_Beds] AS INT) AS [BED_TOTAL],
                CAST([Total_Leased_Beds] AS INT) AS [BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                UPPER([Unit_Type]) AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [Lease_Type],
                
                -- Tier Logic (T0 - T8, TRF)
                -- T0
                0 AS [T0_BEDS], 0 AS [T0_BEDS_L], 0 AS [T0_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T1
                CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier1_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T1_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 1 END AS [T1_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN [Tier1_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier1_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T1_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T2
                CASE WHEN [Tier2_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier2_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T2_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T2_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T2_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T3
                CASE WHEN [Tier3_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier3_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T3_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T3_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T3_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T4
                CASE WHEN [Tier4_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier4_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T4_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T4_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T4_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T5
                CASE WHEN [Tier5_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier5_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T5_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T5_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T5_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T6
                CASE WHEN [Tier6_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier6_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T6_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T6_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T6_BEDS_U],
                
                -- T7
                CASE WHEN [Tier7_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier7_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T7_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier7_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T7_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier7_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier7_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T7_BEDS_U],

                -- T8
                CASE WHEN [Tier8_Beds] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Tier8_Beds] AS INT) END AS [T8_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier8_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier7_Beds], 0) + 1 ELSE NULL END AS [T8_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL([Tier8_Beds], 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL([Tier1_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier2_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier3_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier4_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier5_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier6_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier7_Beds], 0) + ISNULL([Tier8_Beds], 0) ELSE NULL END AS [T8_BEDS_U],
                
                -- TRF
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] AS INT) END AS [TRF_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] AS INT) END AS [TRF_BEDS_L],
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] = 0 THEN NULL ELSE CAST([Actual_Beds_Reforecast_Only] AS INT) END AS [TRF_BEDS_U],

                -- Rates
                NULL AS [T0_RATE],
                0.00 AS [T0_RATE_L],
                ISNULL([Tier1_Rate] - 1.00, 0.00) AS [T0_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier1_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier1_Rate] END AS [T1_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier1_Rate], 0.00) AS [T1_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier2_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier1_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier1_Rate]) AS [T1_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier2_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier2_Rate] END AS [T2_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier2_Rate], 0.00) AS [T2_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier3_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier2_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier2_Rate]) AS [T2_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier3_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier3_Rate] END AS [T3_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier3_Rate], 0.00) AS [T3_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier4_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier3_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier3_Rate]) AS [T3_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier4_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier4_Rate] END AS [T4_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier4_Rate], 0.00) AS [T4_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier5_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier4_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier4_Rate]) AS [T4_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier5_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier5_Rate] END AS [T5_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier5_Rate], 0.00) AS [T5_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier6_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier5_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier5_Rate]) AS [T5_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier6_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier6_Rate] END AS [T6_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier6_Rate], 0.00) AS [T6_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier7_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier6_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier6_Rate]) AS [T6_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier7_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier7_Rate] END AS [T7_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier7_Rate], 0.00) AS [T7_RATE_L],
                ISNULL(ISNULL([Tier8_Rate] - 1.00, [Tier7_Rate] + 1000.00), [Tier7_Rate]) AS [T7_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Tier8_Rate] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Tier8_Rate] END AS [T8_RATE],
                ISNULL([Tier8_Rate], 0.00) AS [T8_RATE_L],
                ISNULL([Tier8_Rate] + 1000.00, [Tier8_Rate]) AS [T8_RATE_U],
                
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] END AS [TRF_RATE],
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] END AS [TRF_RATE_L],
                CASE WHEN [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] = 0.00 THEN NULL ELSE [Actual_Rate_Reforecast_Only] END AS [TRF_RATE_U]
                
            FROM cte_Source_Joined
        ),
        cte_Combo AS (
            -- View: Combo (Filter RowNum = 1, Join Property)
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                B.[AY],
                B.[Entity_ID],
                B.[BED_TOTAL],
                B.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                B.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
            FROM cte_Bud B
            INNER JOIN cte_Property P 
                ON B.[Entity_ID] = P.[ENTITY_NUMBER]
            WHERE B.[GROUP_ROW_NUMBER] = 1
        ),
        cte_GroupBys AS (
            -- View: groupbys (Aggregation by Property/AY/Entity/Floorplan)
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [AY],
                [Entity_ID],
                [BED_TOTAL], 
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                SUM([BED_TOTAL_LEASED]) AS [Sum_Bed_Total_Leased]
            FROM cte_Combo
            GROUP BY 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [AY],
                [Entity_ID],
                [BED_TOTAL],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE]
        ),
        cte_Sums AS (
            -- View: sums (Aggregation by Property/AY/Entity - Summing the totals)
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [AY],
                [Entity_ID],
                SUM([BED_TOTAL]) AS [Final_Bed_Total],
                SUM([Sum_Bed_Total_Leased]) AS [Final_Bed_Total_Leased]
            FROM cte_GroupBys
            GROUP BY 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [AY],
                [Entity_ID]
        )
        
        -- 3. Load Target
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_WORKBOOK_PROPERTY_TARGETS_0] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [AY],
            [ENTITY_ID],
            [BED_TOTAL],
            [BED_TOTAL_LEASED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [AY],
            [Entity_ID],
            [Final_Bed_Total],
            [Final_Bed_Total_Leased]
        FROM cte_Sums;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH;
END

            [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
