name: RATE_TIER_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_0, WH_ODS.dbo.ADAPTIVE_CURRENTYEAR_RENT_ACHIEVED into WH_STAGING.dbo.RATE_TIER_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[RATE_TIER_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Full Reload Strategy)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F];

        -- 2. CTE Transformations
        WITH CT_AllRecords AS (
            -- Maps to ATL Query: AllRecords
            SELECT 
                [RATE_TIER_KEY],
                [AY],
                [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
                [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
                [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
                [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
                [BED_TOTAL],
                [BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                [FLAG_VALID_TIER],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
                [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
                [FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
                [FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
                UPPER([LEASE_TYPE]) AS [LEASE_TYPE],
                [LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [BEDS],
                [BEDS_L],
                [BEDS_U],
                [RATE],
                [RATE_L],
                [RATE_U],
                [RATE_L_INT],
                [RATE_U_INT],
                [T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
                [TIER],
                [TIER_RATE_LABEL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_0]
        ),
        CT_MaxPopulatedTier AS (
            -- Maps to ATL Query: MaxPopulatedTier
            -- Logic: Groups by AY, Prop, FP, LeaseType to find Max Key/Tier where Beds is not null
            SELECT 
                MAX([RATE_TIER_KEY]) AS [RATE_TIER_KEY],
                MAX([TIER]) AS [TIER],
                [AY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [LEASE_TYPE],
                [PROPERTY_KEY]
            FROM CT_AllRecords
            WHERE [BEDS] IS NOT NULL
            GROUP BY 
                [AY],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [LEASE_TYPE]
        ),
        CT_AllRecords2 AS (
            -- Maps to ATL Query: AllRecords2
            -- Logic: Left Join AllRecords with MaxPopulatedTier to get "Alt" keys
            -- Note: alt_ keys are calculated here but NOT inserted into the final table 
            -- as they do not exist in the physical target schema.
            SELECT 
                A.[RATE_TIER_KEY],
                M.[RATE_TIER_KEY] AS [alt_RATE_TIER_KEY],
                M.[TIER] AS [alt_TIER],
                A.[AY],
                A.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
                A.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
                A.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
                A.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
                A.[BED_TOTAL],
                A.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
                A.[FLAG_VALID_TIER],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
                A.[FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
                A.[LEASE_TYPE],
                A.[LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
                A.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
                A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                A.[BEDS],
                A.[BEDS_L],
                A.[BEDS_U],
                A.[RATE],
                A.[RATE_L],
                A.[RATE_U],
                A.[RATE_L_INT],
                A.[RATE_U_INT],
                A.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
                A.[TIER],
                A.[TIER_RATE_LABEL]
            FROM CT_AllRecords A
            LEFT JOIN CT_MaxPopulatedTier M ON 
                M.[AY] = A.[AY] AND
                M.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] AND
                M.[LEASE_TYPE] = A.[LEASE_TYPE] AND
                M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = A.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        CT_AchievedRents AS (
            -- Maps to ATL Query: AchievedRents (Base Read)
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [ACADEMIC_YEAR_LINK],
                [Achieved_Avg_Rate_$] AS [PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                [Achieved_Avg_NER_$] AS [PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                [Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$] AS [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                [Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$] AS [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                [LEASED_BEDS] AS [PY1_LEASED_BEDS],
                [Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$] AS [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                [Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$] AS [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                [Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$] AS [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                [Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$] AS [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                [PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS] AS [PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_CURRENTYEAR_RENT_ACHIEVED]
        ),
        CT_AchievedRents2 AS (
            -- Maps to ATL Query: AchievedRents2
            -- Logic: Aggregates Rents by Property, Floorplan, and AY
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [ACADEMIC_YEAR_LINK],
                AVG([PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]) AS [PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                AVG([PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]) AS [PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                AVG([PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]) AS [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                AVG([PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]) AS [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                SUM([PY1_LEASED_BEDS]) AS [PY1_LEASED_BEDS],
                AVG([PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]) AS [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                AVG([PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]) AS [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                AVG([PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$]) AS [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
                AVG([PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$]) AS [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
                SUM([PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]) AS [PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS]
            FROM CT_AchievedRents
            GROUP BY 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [ACADEMIC_YEAR_LINK]
        )
        -- 3. Final Insert (Maps to ATL Query: PYRents -> Target Load)
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RATE_TIER_F] (
            [RATE_TIER_KEY],
            [ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY],
            [ALT_TIER],
            [AY],
            [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
            [AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
            [AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
            [BED_TOTAL],
            [BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            [FLAG_VALID_TIER],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
            [FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
            [FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
            [FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
            [LEASE_TYPE],
            [LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            [PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            [PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            [PY1_LEASED_BEDS],
            [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            [PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            [PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            [PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS],
            [BEDS],
            [BEDS_L],
            [BEDS_U],
            [RATE],
            [RATE_L],
            [RATE_U],
            [RATE_L_INT],
            [RATE_U_INT],
            [T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            [TIER],
            [TIER_RATE_LABEL]
        )
        SELECT 
            A.[RATE_TIER_KEY],
            A.[alt_RATE_TIER_KEY] AS [ALT_RATE_TIER_KEY],
            A.[alt_TIER] AS [ALT_TIER],
            A.[AY],
            A.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN],
            A.[AVG_RATE_FLOORPLAN_LEASE_TYPE],
            A.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY],
            A.[AVG_RATE_PROPERTY_LEASE_TYPE],
            A.[BED_TOTAL],
            A.[BED_TOTAL_LEASED],
            A.[FLAG_VALID_TIER],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_L],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_LEASETYPE_RATE_U],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_RATE_L],
            A.[FLOORPLAN_RATE_U],
            A.[LEASE_TYPE],
            A.[LEGACY_RATE_TIER_KEY],
            A.[PROPERTY_BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            A.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            A.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            R.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            R.[PY1_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            R.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            R.[PY1_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            R.[PY1_LEASED_BEDS],
            R.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            R.[PY1_Property_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            R.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_NER_$],
            R.[PY1_Property_Extended_Achieved_Avg_Rate_$],
            R.[PY1_PROPERTY_LEASED_BEDS],
            A.[BEDS],
            A.[BEDS_L],
            A.[BEDS_U],
            A.[RATE],
            A.[RATE_L],
            A.[RATE_U],
            A.[RATE_L_INT],
            A.[RATE_U_INT],
            A.[T1_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T2_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T3_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T4_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T5_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T6_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T7_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[T8_RATE_X_BEDS],
            A.[TIER],
            A.[TIER_RATE_LABEL]
        FROM CT_AllRecords2 A
        LEFT JOIN CT_AchievedRents2 R ON 
            A.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = R.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] AND
            A.[PROPERTY_KEY] = R.[PROPERTY_KEY] AND 
            A.[AY] = R.[ACADEMIC_YEAR_LINK];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        DECLARE @ErrorSeverity INT = ERROR_SEVERITY();
        DECLARE @ErrorState INT = ERROR_STATE();
        
        RAISERROR (@ErrorMessage, @ErrorSeverity, @ErrorState);
    END CATCH
END;

name: RELATED_DATES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.RELATED_DATES_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[RELATED_DATES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET (Data Refresh)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RELATED_DATES_0];

        -- 2. SOURCE TRANSFORMATION LOGIC
        WITH [Query_CTE] AS (
            -- Calculate Key Offsets based on ATL "Query"
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] AS [CY_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 10000 AS [PY1_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 20000 AS [PY2_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 30000 AS [PY3_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 40000 AS [PY4_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 50000 AS [PY5_KEY],
                [DATE_KEY] - 60000 AS [PY6_KEY],
                [RELATIVE_AY],
                [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK],
                [RELATIVE_DAY],
                [RELATIVE_MONTH],
                [RELATIVE_QUARTER],
                [RELATIVE_WEEK],
                [RELATIVE_YEAR],
                [AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_0]
        ),
        [DATES_CTE] AS (
            -- Rename columns for downstream logic per ATL "DATES" View
            SELECT
                [CY_KEY], [PY1_KEY], [PY2_KEY], [PY3_KEY], [PY4_KEY], [PY5_KEY], [PY6_KEY],
                [RELATIVE_AY] AS [RELATED_AY],
                [RELATIVE_AY_WEEK] AS [RELATED_AY_WEEK],
                [RELATIVE_DAY] AS [RELATED_DAY],
                [RELATIVE_MONTH] AS [RELATED_MONTH],
                [AY] AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATIVE_QUARTER] AS [RELATED_QUARTER],
                [RELATIVE_WEEK] AS [RELATED_WEEK],
                [RELATIVE_YEAR] AS [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [Query_CTE]
        ),
        [Union_Set_CTE] AS (
            -- Emulate ATL "Merge" Transform logic for CY1 through PY6
            -- All inputs filter on RELATED_DAY between -364 and 0
            
            -- CY1
            SELECT 
                [CY_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY1
            SELECT 
                [PY1_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 1 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY2
            SELECT 
                [PY2_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 2 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY3
            SELECT 
                [PY3_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 3 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY4
            SELECT 
                [PY4_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 4 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY5
            SELECT 
                [PY5_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 5 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0

            UNION ALL

            -- PY6
            SELECT 
                [PY6_KEY] AS [DATE_KEY],
                [RELATED_AY], [RELATED_AY_WEEK], [RELATED_DAY], [RELATED_MONTH],
                [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY] - 6 AS [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
                [RELATED_QUARTER], [RELATED_WEEK], [RELATED_YEAR]
            FROM [DATES_CTE]
            WHERE [RELATED_DAY] BETWEEN -364 AND 0
        )
        -- 3. FINAL INSERT
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RELATED_DATES_0] (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [DATE_KEY_AY],
            [RELATED_AY],
            [RELATED_AY_WEEK],
            [RELATED_DAY],
            [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
            [RELATED_QUARTER],
            [RELATED_WEEK],
            [RELATED_YEAR]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            -- Logic: KeyCreator DATE_KEY || '.' || RELATED_PRELEASE_AY
            TRY_CAST(CONCAT([DATE_KEY], '.', [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY]) AS DECIMAL(19,4)) AS [DATE_KEY_AY],
            [RELATED_AY],
            [RELATED_AY_WEEK],
            [RELATED_DAY],
            [RELATED_MONTH],
            [RELATED_PRELEASE_AY],
            [RELATED_QUARTER],
            [RELATED_WEEK],
            [RELATED_YEAR]
        FROM [Union_Set_CTE];

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: RENT_CHARGES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.RENT_CHARGES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[RENT_CHARGES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RENT_CHARGES_0];

        -- Step 2: Transform and Load
        -- Logic: Filter for RENT charges, not deleted, pick highest ID per Lease Interval.
        WITH [Filtered_Charges_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.[ID],
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SC.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
                ACT.[NAME] AS [AR_CODE_TYPE],
                SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] AS [RENT_AMOUNT]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES] SCT 
                ON SC.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID] = SCT.[ID]
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] ACT 
                ON SC.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = ACT.[ID]
            WHERE SC.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
              AND ACT.[NAME] = 'RENT'
        ),

        [Ranked_Charges_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
                [AR_CODE_TYPE],
                [RENT_AMOUNT],
                ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] ORDER BY [ID] DESC) AS [RowRank]
            FROM [Filtered_Charges_CTE]
        )

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RENT_CHARGES_0]
        (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE],
            [RENT_AMOUNT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
            [AR_CODE_TYPE],
            [RENT_AMOUNT]
        FROM [Ranked_Charges_CTE]
        WHERE [RowRank] = 1;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Execution completed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: REPORT_DICTIONARY_SP

name: REPUTATIONCOM_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_ODS.dbo.REPUTATION_COM_REVIEWS_IMPORT into WH_STAGING.dbo.REPUTATION_COM_REVIEWS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE       PROCEDURE [dbo].[REPUTATIONCOM_0_SP]
AS
/*
========================================================================================
Description: ETL for Reputation.com data. 
Source: [WH_ODS]
Target: [WH_STAGING]
Mapping: Ported from SAP Data Services DataFlow 'ReputationCom_0'
========================================================================================
*/
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

    SELECT 
    PROPERTY_KEY, 
    PROPERTY_NAME, 
    ENTITY_NUMBER, 
    -- This replicates the SAP 'decode' logic:
    -- If it's the benchmark keys, force the ID to be the string '5022'/'5023'
    CAST(CASE 
        WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = 5022 THEN '5022'
        WHEN PROPERTY_KEY = 5023 THEN '5023'
        ELSE ALTERNATE_ID_3 
    END AS VARCHAR(8000)) as ALTERNATE_ID_3
INTO #PROPS_LOOKUP
FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
-- Ensure we pull the active properties OR our two benchmark properties
WHERE FLAG_DISPOSITIONED = 0 
   OR PROPERTY_KEY IN (5022, 5023);

        -- 2. Truncate all staging targets
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REVIEWS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SURVEY_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_TICKETS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REPORTS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0];
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE];

        -- 3. REVIEWS
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REVIEWS_0] (ID, ATTRIBUTIONS, CANRESPOND, CATEGORIES, COMMENTTITLE, [COUNT], [DATE], DATE_CREATED, DATE_KEY, DATE_MODIFIED, DATETIME, DATETIME_CREATED, DATETIME_MODIFIED, HASRESPONSES, LOCATIONID, NAME, NORMALIZEDRATING, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, PUBLISHED, RATING, REPUTATION_PROPERTY_NAME, REVIEWSID, RESPONSEURL, REVIEWURL, SENTIMENT, SOURCEID, TENANTID, UPDATED, URL, COMMENT, LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT src.ID, src.attributions, src.canRespond, CAST(src.categories AS VARCHAR(MAX)), src.commentTitle, 1, CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), TRY_CAST(LEFT(src.[date], 10) AS DATETIME2), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), TRY_CAST(LEFT(src.[date], 10) AS DATETIME2), src.CreateDate, src.ModifiedDate, src.hasResponses, TRY_CAST(src.locationID AS INT), src.name, src.normalizedRating, lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.published, src.rating, src.locationName, src.reviewsID, src.responseUrl, src.reviewUrl, src.sentiment, src.sourceID, src.tenantID, src.updated, src.url, src.comment, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REVIEWS_IMPORT] src 
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.locationID AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3;

        -- 4. SUMMARY
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_0] (ID, [COUNT], DATE_KEY, DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, DATETIME_CREATED, DATETIME_MODIFIED, DATERANGEFROM, DATERANGERANGE, DATERANGETO, RATING, SCORE, SCORESIGNALSLISTINGACCURACY, SCORESIGNALSREVIEWLENGTH, SCORESIGNALSREVIEWRECENCY, SCORESIGNALSREVIEWRESPONSE, SCORESIGNALSREVIEWSPREAD, SCORESIGNALSREVIEWVOLUME, SCORESIGNALSSEARCHIMPRESSION, SCORESIGNALSSOCIALENGAGEMENT, SCORESIGNALSSTARAVERAGE, SENTIMENTCOUNTNEGATIVE, SENTIMENTCOUNTNEUTRAL, SENTIMENTCOUNTPOSITIVE, CREATEDATE, MODIFIEDDATE, LOCATIONID, LOCATIONNAME, RESPONSECOUNT, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT src.ID, src.[count], CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), src.CreateDate, src.ModifiedDate, TRY_CAST(src.dateRangeFrom AS DATETIME2), src.dateRangeRange, src.dateRangeTo, src.rating, src.score, src.scoreSignalsListingAccuracy, src.scoreSignalsReviewLength, src.scoreSignalsReviewRecency, src.scoreSignalsReviewResponse, src.scoreSignalsReviewSpread, src.scoreSignalsReviewVolume, src.scoreSignalsSearchImpression, src.scoreSignalsSocialEngagement, src.scoreSignalsStarAverage, src.sentimentCountNegative, src.sentimentCountNeutral, src.sentimentCountPositive, src.CreateDate, src.ModifiedDate, src.LocationID, src.LocationName, src.ResponseCount, lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SUMMARY_IMPORT] src 
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.LocationID AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3;

        -- 5. SURVEY
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SURVEY_0] (ID, ANSWERVALUESID, [COUNT], [DATE], DATE_CREATED, DATE_KEY, DATE_MODIFIED, DATE_UPDATED, DATETIME_CREATED, DATETIME_MODIFIED, DATETIME, DATETIME_UPDATED, LOCALE, LOCATIONID, REPUTATION_PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTIES, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, QUESTIONID, QUESTIONTEXT, QUESTIONTYPE, SENTDATE, STATUS, SURVEYID, SURVEYTEMPLATEID, ANSWERVALUESTEXT, LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT src.ID, src.answerValuesID, 1, CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[date], 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.updatedDate, 112)), src.CreateDate, src.ModifiedDate, src.[date], src.updatedDate, src.locale, TRY_CAST(src.locationID AS INT), src.locationName, CAST(src.properties AS VARCHAR(MAX)), lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.questionID, CAST(src.questionText AS VARCHAR(MAX)), src.questionType, src.sentDate, src.status, src.SurveyID, src.surveyTemplateID, CAST(src.answerValuesText AS VARCHAR(MAX)), SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_SURVEY_IMPORT] src 
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.locationID AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3;

        -- 6. TICKETS
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_TICKETS_0] (ID, ATTACHMENTS, CLOSEDBY, CLOSEDDATE, CLOSEDEXPLANATION, COMMENT, [COUNT], CREATEDBY, CREATEDDATE, DATE_KEY, DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, DATETIME_CREATED, DATETIME_MODIFIED, DUEDATE, ESCALATIONID, ESCALATIONNAME, LOCATIONID, LOCATIONNAME, ORIGINALDUEDATE, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, QUEUEID, QUEUENAME, REPORTERADDRESSCITY, REPORTERADDRESSSTATE, REPORTERADDRESSSTREET, REPORTERADDRESSZIP, REPORTEREMAIL, REPORTERNAME, REPORTERPHONE, REVIEWID, ROOTCAUSES, SENTIMENT, STAGEID, STAGENAME, SURVEYRESULTID, TAGNAMES, TAGS, TICKETID, TICKETTYPE, UPDATEDBY, UPDATEDDATE, VERSION, FULLCOMMENT, LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT src.ID, CAST(src.attachments AS VARCHAR(MAX)), src.closedBy, src.closedDate, CAST(src.closedExplanation AS VARCHAR(MAX)), CAST(src.comment AS VARCHAR(MAX)), 1, src.createdBy, src.createdDate, CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.createdDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.updatedDate, 112)), src.createdDate, src.updatedDate, src.dueDate, src.escalationID, src.escalationName, TRY_CAST(src.locationID AS INT), src.locationName, src.originalDueDate, lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.queueID, src.queueName, src.reporterAddressCity, src.reporterAddressState, src.reporterAddressStreet, src.reporterAddressZip, src.reporterEmail, src.reporterName, CAST(src.reporterPhone AS DECIMAL(19,0)), src.reviewID, CAST(src.rootCauses AS VARCHAR(MAX)), src.sentiment, src.stageID, src.stageName, src.surveyResultID, CAST(src.tagNames AS VARCHAR(MAX)), CAST(src.tags AS VARCHAR(MAX)), src.ticketID, src.ticketType, src.updatedBy, src.updatedDate, src.version, CAST(src.fullComment AS VARCHAR(MAX)), SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_TICKET_IMPORT] src 
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.locationID AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3;

        -- 7. BEST IN CLASS
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_0] (DATE_KEY, ID, CLIENT, COUNTRY, CREATEDATE, DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, DIVISION, ENTITY_NUMBER, [Listing Completeness], LOCATION, [Location Code], MODIFIEDDATE, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, [Reputation Score], [Review Quality], [Review Recency], [Review Response], [Review Sentiment], [Review Spread], [Review Volume], RM, RSM, RVP, [Search Impressions], [Social Score], LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), src.ID, src.Client, src.Country, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), src.CreateDate, 120), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), src.Division, lkp.ENTITY_NUMBER, src.[Listing Completeness], src.Location, src.[Location Code], CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), src.ModifiedDate, 120), lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.[Reputation Score], src.[Review Quality], src.[Review Recency], src.[Review Response], src.[Review Sentiment], src.[Review Spread], src.[Review Volume], src.RM, src.RSM, src.RVP, src.[Search Impressions], src.[Social Score], SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_IMPORT] src 
        INNER JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3 = (CASE WHEN (src.Location) = 'Best In Class' THEN '5022' WHEN (src.Location) = 'Industry Average' THEN '5023' ELSE CAST(src.[Location Code] AS VARCHAR(8000)) END);

        -- 8. CUSTOMER INQUIRIES
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_0] (
            DATE_KEY, ID, DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, CATEGORIES, CREATEDATE, [DATE], ENTITY_NUMBER, 
            [Expired PII Removed], [Final Date], FLAGS, INQUIRIESID, LOCALE, [Location Code], 
            [Location Name], MODIFIEDDATE, ORIGIN, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, [q342-sq351], 
            [q342-sq356], [Result Status], [Sent Date], SENTIMENT, SQ335, SQ372, SQ374, 
            [Survey Taken Duration], [Survey taker Email], [Survey taker Name], [Survey taker Phone number], LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), 
            src.ID, 
            CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), 
            CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), 
            src.Categories, 
            src.CreateDate, 
            src.[Date], 
            lkp.ENTITY_NUMBER, 
            src.[Expired PII Removed], 
            src.[Final Date], 
            src.Flags, 
            src.InquiriesId, -- Matched to your schema (Id vs ID)
            src.Locale, 
            src.[Location Code], 
            src.[Location Name], 
            src.ModifiedDate, 
            src.Origin, 
            lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, 
            lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, 
            src.[q342-sq351], 
            src.[q342-sq356], 
            src.[Result Status], 
            src.[Sent Date], 
            src.Sentiment, 
            src.sq335,       -- Matched to your schema (lowercase sq)
            CAST(src.sq372 AS VARCHAR(MAX)), -- Matched to your schema
            src.sq374,       -- Matched to your schema
            src.[Survey Taken Duration], 
            src.[Survey taker Email], 
            src.[Survey taker Name], 
            src.[Survey taker Phone number], 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_IMPORT] src 
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.[Location Code] AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3;

        -- 9. REPORTS
     -- ==========================================
-- 9. REPORTS (Consolidated Bridge Logic)
-- ==========================================
/* Ensure these DECLARE statements are at the top of your 
   stored procedure after the AS BEGIN line 
*/
DECLARE @SYSDATE DATETIME2(3) = SYSDATETIME();
DECLARE @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, @SYSDATE), 112) AS INT);

-- ==========================================
-- 9. REPORTS (Incremental Logic with Bridge)
-- ==========================================

-- Step A: Create a Temp Bridge to resolve Location Names to Location Codes
-- This replicates the 'RepProps' and 'LocCode' views in your ATL
-- Step A: Resolve Location Names to Location Codes using the 'Best In Class' Bridge
IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#ReputationBridge') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #ReputationBridge;

SELECT DISTINCT 
    UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(Location))) AS JOIN_NAME, 
    [Location Code]
INTO #ReputationBridge
FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_IMPORT]
WHERE Location IS NOT NULL;

-- Step B: Truncate and Load
TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REPORTS_0];

INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REPORTS_0] (
    ID, DATE_KEY2, AVERAGE_RATING, 
    COMPETITOR_1_AVERAGE_RATING, COMPETITOR_1_LOCATIONS, COMPETITOR_1_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, 
    COMPETITOR_1_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_1_POSITIVE_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_1_REPUTATION_SCORE, COMPETITOR_1_TOTAL_REVIEWS,
    COMPETITOR_2_AVERAGE_RATING, COMPETITOR_2_LOCATIONS, COMPETITOR_2_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, 
    COMPETITOR_2_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_2_POSITIVE_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_2_REPUTATION_SCORE, COMPETITOR_2_TOTAL_REVIEWS,
    COMPETITOR_3_AVERAGE_RATING, COMPETITOR_3_LOCATIONS, COMPETITOR_3_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, 
    COMPETITOR_3_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_3_POSITIVE_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_3_REPUTATION_SCORE, COMPETITOR_3_TOTAL_REVIEWS,
    COMPETITOR_4_AVERAGE_RATING, COMPETITOR_4_LOCATIONS, COMPETITOR_4_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, 
    COMPETITOR_4_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_4_POSITIVE_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_4_REPUTATION_SCORE, COMPETITOR_4_TOTAL_REVIEWS,
    COMPETITOR_5_AVERAGE_RATING, COMPETITOR_5_LOCATIONS, COMPETITOR_5_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, 
    COMPETITOR_5_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_5_POSITIVE_REVIEWS, COMPETITOR_5_REPUTATION_SCORE, COMPETITOR_5_TOTAL_REVIEWS,
    CREATEDATE, DATE_CREATED, DATE_KEY, DATE_MODIFIED, 
    ENTITY_NUMBER, LOCATIONS, LOCATION_CODE, MODIFIEDDATE, 
    NEGATIVE_REVIEWS, NEUTRAL_REVIEWS, POSITIVE_REVIEWS, 
    PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, REPUTATION_SCORE, TOTAL_REVIEWS
)
SELECT 
    src.ID,
    @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY AS DATE_KEY2,
    src.Average_Rating,
    -- Competitor 1
    src.Competitor_1_Average_Rating, src.Competitor_1_Locations, src.Competitor_1_Negative_Reviews,
    src.Competitor_1_Neutral_Reviews, src.Competitor_1_Positive_Reviews, src.Competitor_1_Reputation_Score, src.Competitor_1_Total_Reviews,
    -- Competitor 2
    src.Competitor_2_Average_Rating, src.Competitor_2_Locations, src.Competitor_2_Negative_Reviews,
    src.Competitor_2_Neutral_Reviews, src.Competitor_2_Positive_Reviews, src.Competitor_2_Reputation_Score, src.Competitor_2_Total_Reviews,
    -- Competitor 3
    src.Competitor_3_Average_Rating, src.Competitor_3_Locations, src.Competitor_3_Negative_Reviews,
    src.Competitor_3_Neutral_Reviews, src.Competitor_3_Positive_Reviews, src.Competitor_3_Reputation_Score, src.Competitor_3_Total_Reviews,
    -- Competitor 4
    src.Competitor_4_Average_Rating, src.Competitor_4_Locations, src.Competitor_4_Negative_Reviews,
    src.Competitor_4_Neutral_Reviews, src.Competitor_4_Positive_Reviews, src.Competitor_4_Reputation_Score, src.Competitor_4_Total_Reviews,
    -- Competitor 5
    src.Competitor_5_Average_Rating, src.Competitor_5_Locations, src.Competitor_5_Negative_Reviews,
    src.Competitor_5_Neutral_Reviews, src.Competitor_5_Positive_Reviews, src.Competitor_5_Reputation_Score, src.Competitor_5_Total_Reviews,
    -- Dates
    src.CreateDate,
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_CREATED,
    @DATE_KEY_YESTERDAY AS DATE_KEY,
    CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112) AS INT) AS DATE_MODIFIED,
    -- Lookup results
    p.ENTITY_NUMBER,
    src.Locations,
    bridge.[Location Code],
    src.ModifiedDate,
    src.Negative_Reviews,
    src.Neutral_Reviews,
    src.Positive_Reviews,
    p.PROPERTY_KEY,
    p.PROPERTY_NAME,
    src.Reputation_Score,
    src.Total_Reviews
FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REPORTS_IMPORT] src
LEFT JOIN #ReputationBridge bridge 
    ON UPPER(LTRIM(RTRIM(src.Locations))) = bridge.JOIN_NAME
LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP p 
    ON bridge.[Location Code] = p.ALTERNATE_ID_3
WHERE src.Locations IS NOT NULL;

        -- 10. GOOGLE RATINGS
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0] (DATE_KEY, ID, [Average Rating], CLIENT, COUNTRY, CREATEDATE, [Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Total Reviews], DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, DIVISION, ENTITY_NUMBER, LOCATION, [Location Code], MODIFIEDDATE, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, [Reputation Score], [Response Rate], RM, RSM, RVP)
        SELECT CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), src.ID, src.[Average Rating], src.Client, src.Country, src.CreateDate, src.[Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)], src.[Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)], src.[Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)], src.[Current Total Reviews], CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), src.Division, lkp.ENTITY_NUMBER, src.Location, src.[Location Code], src.ModifiedDate, lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.[Reputation Score], src.[Response Rate], src.RM, src.RSM, src.RVP
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_IMPORT] src
        LEFT JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON CAST(src.[Location Code] AS VARCHAR(8000)) = lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3
        WHERE src.[Location Code] IS NOT NULL AND src.[Location Code] <> '';

        -- 11. RESOLUTION RATE
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE] (ID, BACKLOG, CLOSED, CLOSED_ON_TIME, [COUNT], DATE_KEY, DATE_CREATED, DATE_MODIFIED, LOCATION, PERCENT_CLOSED_ON_TIME, PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, RESOLUTION_RATE, SNAPSHOT_MONTH, TOTAL, LOCATION_1, LAST_RUN_DT)
        SELECT src.ID, src.Backlog, src.Closed, src.[Closed On Time], 1, CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.CreateDate, 112)), CONVERT(INT, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.ModifiedDate, 112)), src.Location, src.[Percent Closed On Time], lkp.PROPERTY_KEY, lkp.PROPERTY_NAME, src.[Resolution Rate], src.SnapshotMonth, src.Total, SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING(src.Location, LEN(src.Location)-3, 5), 1, 3), SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE_IMPORT] src 
        INNER JOIN #PROPS_LOOKUP lkp ON lkp.ALTERNATE_ID_3 = SUBSTRING(SUBSTRING(src.Location, LEN(src.Location)-3, 5), 1, 3);

        COMMIT TRAN;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        DECLARE @ErrorMsg NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMsg, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[REPUTATIONCOM_FACT_APPEND_SP]
AS
BEGIN

            [DATERANGERANGE], [DATERANGETO], [DATETIME_CREATED], [DATETIME_MODIFIED], [LOCATIONID], 
            [LOCATIONNAME], [MODIFIEDDATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RATING], [RESPONSECOUNT], 
            [SCORE], [SCORESIGNALSLISTINGACCURACY], [SCORESIGNALSREVIEWLENGTH], [SCORESIGNALSREVIEWRECENCY],

        ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

        SELECT

    [COMPETITOR_4_AVERAGE_RATING], [COMPETITOR_4_LOCATIONS], [COMPETITOR_4_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS], [COMPETITOR_4_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS], [COMPETITOR_4_POSITIVE_REVIEWS], [COMPETITOR_4_REPUTATION_SCORE], [COMPETITOR_4_TOTAL_REVIEWS],

    [CREATEDATE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [LOCATIONS], [MODIFIEDDATE], 
    [NEGATIVE_REVIEWS], [NEUTRAL_REVIEWS], [POSITIVE_REVIEWS], 
    [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [REPUTATION_SCORE], [TOTAL_REVIEWS], [LAST_RUN_DT]
)
SELECT 
    [DATE_KEY2], -- Mapped from Staging DATE_KEY2
    [ID], 
    CAST([AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Competitor 1
    CAST([COMPETITOR_1_AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_LOCATIONS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_1_TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Competitor 2
    CAST([COMPETITOR_2_AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_LOCATIONS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_2_TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Competitor 3
    CAST([COMPETITOR_3_AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_LOCATIONS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_3_TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Competitor 4
    CAST([COMPETITOR_4_AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_LOCATIONS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_4_TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Competitor 5
    CAST([COMPETITOR_5_AVERAGE_RATING] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_LOCATIONS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([COMPETITOR_5_TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)),
    -- Meta/Dates
    [CREATEDATE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], 
    CAST([ENTITY_NUMBER] AS VARCHAR(30)),

    [MODIFIEDDATE], 
    -- Metrics
    CAST([NEGATIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([NEUTRAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), CAST([POSITIVE_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
    [PROPERTY_KEY],

    CAST([REPUTATION_SCORE] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
    CAST([TOTAL_REVIEWS] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
    SYSDATETIME()
FROM [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_REPORTS_0] 
WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL;

        -- [6] BEST IN CLASS
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_F];
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_BEST_IN_CLASS_F] ([DATE_KEY], [ID], [CLIENT], [COUNTRY], [CREATEDATE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DIVISION], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [Listing Completeness], [LOCATION], [Location Code], [MODIFIEDDATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [Reputation Score], [Review Quality], [Review Recency], [Review Response], [Review Sentiment], [Review Spread], [Review Volume], [RM], [RSM], [RVP], [Search Impressions], [Social Score], [LAST_RUN_DT])
        SELECT

            CAST([LOCATION] AS VARCHAR(1000)),

        -- [7] CUSTOMER INQUIRIES
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_F];
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_F] ([DATE_KEY], [ID], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [CATEGORIES], [CREATEDATE], [DATE], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [Expired PII Removed], [Final Date], [FLAGS], [INQUIRIESID], [LOCALE], [Location Code], [Location Name], [MODIFIEDDATE], [ORIGIN], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [q342-sq351], [q342-sq356], [Result Status], [Sent Date], [SENTIMENT], [SQ335], [SQ372], [SQ374], [Survey Taken Duration], [Survey taker Email], [Survey taker Name], [Survey taker Phone number], [LAST_RUN_DT])
        SELECT

            [CREATEDATE], 
            CAST([DATE] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],

            CAST([FLAGS] AS VARCHAR(1000)), 
            CAST([INQUIRIESID] AS VARCHAR(255)),

            [MODIFIEDDATE],

            CAST([Survey taker Phone number] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_CUSTOMER_INQUIRIES_0] WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL;

        -- [8] GOOGLE RATINGS
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_F];
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_F] ([DATE_KEY], [ID], [Average Rating], [CLIENT], [COUNTRY], [CREATEDATE], [Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Total Reviews], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DIVISION], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [LOCATION], [Location Code], [MODIFIEDDATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [Reputation Score], [Response Rate], [RM], [RSM], [RVP], [LAST_RUN_DT])
        SELECT

            CAST([Average Rating] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([CLIENT] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([COUNTRY] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [CREATEDATE], 
            CAST([Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)] AS VARCHAR(255)),

            CAST([Current Total Reviews] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], 
            CAST([DIVISION] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [ENTITY_NUMBER], 
            CAST([LOCATION] AS VARCHAR(1000)), 
            CAST([Location Code] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [MODIFIEDDATE], [PROPERTY_KEY],

            CAST([Reputation Score] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([Response Rate] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([RM] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([RSM] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([RVP] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0] WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL;

        -- [9] RESOLUTION RATE
        TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE_F];
        INSERT INTO [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE_F] ([ID], [BACKLOG], [CLOSED], [CLOSED_ON_TIME], [COUNT], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [LOCATION], [PERCENT_CLOSED_ON_TIME], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [RESOLUTION_RATE], [SNAPSHOT_MONTH], [TOTAL], [LAST_RUN_DT])
        SELECT 
            [ID], 
            CAST([BACKLOG] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([CLOSED] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([CLOSED_ON_TIME] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            [COUNT], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], 
            CAST([LOCATION] AS VARCHAR(255)),

            [PROPERTY_KEY], 
            CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(100)), 
            CAST([RESOLUTION_RATE] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([SNAPSHOT_MONTH] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            CAST([TOTAL] AS VARCHAR(255)), 
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_RESOLUTION_RATE];

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
        PRINT 'All 9 Tables Loaded Successfully.';
END;

name: REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0_SP
transformations: DATE_CREATED: CASE WHEN src.[CreateDate] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[CreateDate], 112) AS INT) ELSE 0 END
DATE_MODIFIED: CASE WHEN src.[ModifiedDate] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[ModifiedDate], 112) AS INT) ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_IMPORT, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_0]
        ([DATE_KEY], [ID], [Average Rating], [CLIENT], [COUNTRY], [CREATEDATE], [Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)], [Current Total Reviews], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_MODIFIED], [DIVISION], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [LOCATION], [Location Code], [MODIFIEDDATE], [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [Reputation Score], [Response Rate], [RM], [RSM], [RVP])
    SELECT

        CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_KEY],
        src.[ID] AS [ID],
        src.[Average Rating] AS [Average Rating],
        src.[Client] AS [CLIENT],
        src.[Country] AS [COUNTRY],
        src.[CreateDate] AS [CREATEDATE],
        src.[Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)] AS [Current Negative Reviews (Percentage)],
        src.[Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)] AS [Current Neutral Reviews (Percentage)],
        src.[Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)] AS [Current Positive Reviews (Percentage)],
        src.[Current Total Reviews] AS [Current Total Reviews],
        CASE WHEN src.[CreateDate] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[CreateDate], 112) AS INT) ELSE 0 END AS [DATE_CREATED],
        CASE WHEN src.[ModifiedDate] IS NOT NULL THEN CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), src.[ModifiedDate], 112) AS INT) ELSE 0 END AS [DATE_MODIFIED],
        src.[Division] AS [DIVISION],
        p.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS [ENTITY_NUMBER],
        src.[Location] AS [LOCATION],
        src.[Location Code] AS [Location Code],
        src.[ModifiedDate] AS [MODIFIEDDATE],
        p.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        p.[PROPERTY_NAME] AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
        src.[Reputation Score] AS [Reputation Score],
        src.[Response Rate] AS [Response Rate],
        src.[RM] AS [RM],
        src.[RSM] AS [RSM],
        src.[RVP] AS [RVP]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[REPUTATION_COM_GOOGLE_RATINGS_IMPORT] src
    LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
        ON src.[Location Code] = p.[ALTERNATE_ID_3]
    WHERE src.[Location Code] IS NOT NULL
        AND src.[Location Code] <> '';
END

name: RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0];

    WITH [Leases] AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS [LEASE_ID], [ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
               [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
        WHERE [OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (5)
          AND [FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE] IS NULL
    ),
    [AR] AS (
        SELECT [LEASE_ID], [AR_CODE_ID], [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
               [ID] AS [AR_TRANSACTION_ID], [AR_TRIGGER_ID],
               [IS_DELETED], [IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT], [IS_POSTED], [IS_REVERSAL],
               [POST_DATE], [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT], [TRANSACTION_DATE],
               [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE], [AR_ORIGIN_ID]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
        WHERE [IS_DELETED] NOT IN ('1', 'True')
          AND [IS_TEMPORARY] NOT IN ('1', 'True')
    ),
    [ARCodes] AS (
        SELECT [ID], [LEDGER_FILTER_ID], [NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES]
    ),
    [LedgerFilters] AS (
        SELECT [ID], [NAME] AS [LEDGER_FILTER_NAME]
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEDGER_FILTERS]
    ),
    [Properties] AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
        WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
    ),
    [AR_GROUPS] AS (
        SELECT [AR_CODE_ID], [AR_CODE_GROUP], [AR_CODE_NAME], [FLAG_ACTIVE]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[AR_CODE_GROUPS_0]
    )
    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0]
        ([ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [AR_CODE_ID], [AR_CODE_GROUP], [AR_CODE_NAME],
         [AR_CODE_TYPE_ID], [AR_ORIGIN_ID], [AR_TRANSACTION_ID], [AR_TRIGGER_ID],
         [FLAG_AR_GROUP_ACTIVE], [IS_DELETED], [IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT], [IS_POSTED],
         [IS_REVERSAL], [POST_DATE], [POST_PERIOD], [LEDGER_FILTER_ID],
         [TRANSACTION_DATE], [NAME], [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT], [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE],
         [UNPAID_RENT], [UNPAID_OTHER], [UNPAID_TOTAL],
         [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_NAME],
         [DATE_KEY], [LEASE_ID], [LEDGER_NAME], [CURRENT_BALANCE])
    SELECT
        L.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        AR.[AR_CODE_ID],
        AG.[AR_CODE_GROUP],
        AG.[AR_CODE_NAME],
        AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID],
        AR.[AR_ORIGIN_ID],
        AR.[AR_TRANSACTION_ID],
        AR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID],
        AG.[FLAG_ACTIVE],
        AR.[IS_DELETED],
        AR.[IS_DEPOSIT_CREDIT],
        AR.[IS_POSTED],
        AR.[IS_REVERSAL],
        AR.[POST_DATE],
        CAST(LEFT(CAST(AR.[POST_DATE] AS VARCHAR(8)), 6) AS INT),
        AC.[LEDGER_FILTER_ID],
        AR.[TRANSACTION_DATE],
        AC.[NAME],
        AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
        AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE],
        CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0 AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 2
             THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0
              AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (2, 7)
              AND (AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] IN (3,4,5,6,8,9)
                   OR (AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 2 AND AR.[AR_ORIGIN_ID] IN (2,6))
                   OR AR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] = 401)
             THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END,
        CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0 AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] = 2
             THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END
        + CASE WHEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT] > 0
                AND AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] NOT IN (2, 7)
                AND (AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] IN (3,4,5,6,8,9)
                     OR (AR.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID] <> 2 AND AR.[AR_ORIGIN_ID] IN (2,6))
                     OR AR.[AR_TRIGGER_ID] = 401)
               THEN AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE] ELSE 0 END,
        P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        L.[PROPERTY_ID],
        P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        CAST(FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT),
        L.[LEASE_ID],
        LF.[LEDGER_FILTER_NAME],
        AR.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]
    FROM [Leases] L
    INNER JOIN [AR] ON L.[LEASE_ID] = AR.[LEASE_ID]
    INNER JOIN [ARCodes] AC ON AR.[AR_CODE_ID] = AC.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [LedgerFilters] LF ON LF.[ID] = AC.[LEDGER_FILTER_ID]
    INNER JOIN [Properties] P ON L.[PROPERTY_ID] = P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [AR_GROUPS] AG ON AR.[AR_CODE_ID] = AG.[AR_CODE_ID];
END

name: RESIDENT_LEDGER_SUMMARY_SNAPSHOT_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.RESIDENT_LEDGER_SUMMARY_SNAPSHOT_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_SUMMARY_SNAPSHOT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_SUMMARY_SNAPSHOT_0];

        WITH [Properties_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY], 
                [PROPERTY_NAME]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0]
            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        ),
        [Aggregated_Ledger] AS (
            SELECT 
                CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_KEY],
                D.[LEASE_ID],
                D.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                SUM(D.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT]) AS [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
                SUM(D.[TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE]) AS [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE],
                SUM(D.[UNPAID_RENT]) AS [UNPAID_RENT],
                SUM(D.[UNPAID_OTHER]) AS [UNPAID_OTHER],
                SUM(D.[UNPAID_TOTAL]) AS [UNPAID_TOTAL]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_DETAIL_0] D
            INNER JOIN [Properties_CTE] P 
                ON D.[PROPERTY_KEY] = P.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            GROUP BY 
                D.[LEASE_ID], 
                D.[PROPERTY_KEY], 
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
        )

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[RESIDENT_LEDGER_SUMMARY_SNAPSHOT_0]
        (
            [DATE_KEY],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],
            [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT_DUE],
            [UNPAID_RENT],
            [UNPAID_OTHER],
            [UNPAID_TOTAL]
        )
        SELECT 
            [DATE_KEY],
            [LEASE_ID],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [TRANSACTION_AMOUNT],

name: SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_STAGING.dbo.E_AR_CODES into WH_STAGING.dbo.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- Step 1: Truncate Target
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0];

        -- Step 2: Transform and Load
        -- Logic: 
        -- 1. Filter E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES for ID 155010 (Lock Off Discount).
        -- 2. Calculate duration (End - Start). If End is NULL, use Lease Interval End.
        -- 3. Aggregate amounts per Lease Interval.

        WITH [Filtered_SC_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.[ID],
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
                SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT],
                SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
            WHERE SC.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL 
              AND SC.[AR_CODE_ID] = 155010 -- Filter for Scheduled Lock Off Discount
        ),

        [Calculated_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                ARC.[NAME] AS [AR_CODE],
                SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
                SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT],
                -- Calculation: Duration in Months = (EndDate - StartDate) + 1
                -- Fallback: If Charge End Date is NULL, use Lease End Datetime from E_LEASE_INTERVALS
                (DATEDIFF(MONTH, 
                          SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE], 
                          ISNULL(SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE], LI.[LEASE_END_DATETIME])
                 ) + 1) AS [Duration_Months]
            FROM [Filtered_SC_CTE] SC
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ARC ON SC.[AR_CODE_ID] = ARC.[ID]
            INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] LI ON SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = LI.[ID]
        ),

        [Aggregated_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [AR_CODE],
                [AR_CODE_ID],
                COUNT(*) AS [CHARGE_COUNT],
                SUM([CHARGE_AMOUNT]) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT], -- Sum of Monthly amounts
                SUM([CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Duration_Months]) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL] -- Sum of Total projected amounts
            FROM [Calculated_CTE]
            GROUP BY 
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                [AR_CODE],
                [AR_CODE_ID]
        )

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_0]
        (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE],
            [AR_CODE_ID],
            [CHARGE_COUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
        )
        SELECT 
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE],
            [AR_CODE_ID],
            [CHARGE_COUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT],
            [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_DISCOUNT_TOTAL]
        FROM [Aggregated_CTE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Execution completed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES into WH_STAGING.dbo.SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0];

    INSERT INTO [dbo].[SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_0]
        ([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], [AR_CODE], [AR_CODE_ID],
         [CHARGE_COUNT], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM], [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL])
    SELECT
        sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
        arcode.[NAME] AS [AR_CODE],
        sc.[AR_CODE_ID],
        SUM(1) AS [CHARGE_COUNT],
        SUM(sc.[CHARGE_AMOUNT]) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM],
        SUM(sc.[CHARGE_AMOUNT] *
            (DATEDIFF(MONTH, sc.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                ISNULL(sc.[CHARGE_END_DATE], intv.[LEASE_END_DATETIME])) + 1)
        ) AS [SCHED_LOCK_OFF_PREMIUM_TOTAL]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] sc
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPES] sct
        ON sct.[ID] = sc.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_TYPE_ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODE_TYPES] act
        ON act.[ID] = sc.[AR_CODE_TYPE_ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] arcode
        ON sc.[AR_CODE_ID] = arcode.[ID]
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_LEASE_INTERVALS] intv
        ON sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID] = intv.[ID]
    WHERE sc.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
      AND sc.[AR_CODE_ID] = 155082
    GROUP BY sc.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], arcode.[NAME], sc.[AR_CODE_ID];
END

name: SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_AR_TRANSACTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0];

        WITH [Valid_Charges_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.[ID],
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SC.[PROPERTY_ID],
                SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
                SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT],
                SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE],
                SC.[UPDATED_ON],
                SC.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_SCHEDULED_CHARGES] SC
            WHERE SC.[DELETED_ON] IS NULL
              AND SC.[AR_CODE_ID] IN (154778, 155006, 155002, 155003, 155004, 155089)
        ),

        [Min_Charge_ID_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                MIN([ID]) AS [MIN_ID]
            FROM [Valid_Charges_CTE]
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_ID], [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID]
        ),
[Reversals_CTE] AS (
    SELECT 
        [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID],
        -- Use CASE to handle string 'True'/'False' or '1'/'0'
        MAX(CASE 
                WHEN [IS_REVERSAL] IN ('True', '1') THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END) AS [IS_REVERSAL_FLAG] 
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_TRANSACTIONS]
    WHERE [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID] IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY [SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
),

        [Calculated_CTE] AS (
            SELECT 
                SC.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
                SC.[AR_CODE_ID],
                SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE],
                SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE],
                SC.[UPDATED_ON],
                SC.[LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
                SC.[CHARGE_AMOUNT],
                ARC.[NAME] AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],
                ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MONTH, SC.[CHARGE_START_DATE], SC.[CHARGE_END_DATE]) + 1, 0) AS [Calculated_Months]
            FROM [Min_Charge_ID_CTE] MC
            INNER JOIN [Valid_Charges_CTE] SC ON MC.[MIN_ID] = SC.[ID]
            INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_AR_CODES] ARC ON SC.[AR_CODE_ID] = ARC.[ID]
            LEFT JOIN [Reversals_CTE] R ON SC.[ID] = R.[SCHEDULED_CHARGE_ID]
            WHERE ISNULL(R.[IS_REVERSAL_FLAG], 0) = 0
        )

        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SHORT_TERM_PREMIUMS_0]
        (
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_ID],
            [DATE_CHARGE_BEGIN],
            [DATE_CHARGE_END],
            [DATE_UPDATED],
            [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS]
        )
        SELECT 
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID],
            [AR_CODE_ID],
            TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [CHARGE_START_DATE], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_CHARGE_BEGIN],
            TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [CHARGE_END_DATE], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_CHARGE_END],
            TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [UPDATED_ON], 112) AS INT) AS [DATE_UPDATED],
            [LEASE_TERM_MONTHS],
            [CHARGE_AMOUNT] AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_MONTHLY],
            CAST([CHARGE_AMOUNT] * [Calculated_Months] AS DECIMAL(15,2)) AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_TOTAL],
            [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CODE],
            [Calculated_Months] AS [SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_CHARGE_MONTHS]
        FROM [Calculated_CTE];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
        PRINT 'Execution completed successfully.';
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

        0 AS [FLAG_APP_FEE],
        0 AS [FLAG_CANCELLED],
