        ISNULL(s.[NEW_AGG] + s.[RENEWAL_AGG], 0) AS [FLAG_COMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_MANUAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_FALL_SCHEDULED],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_MANUAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONCESSION_SCHEDULED],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_CANCELLED],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_NEW],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_NEW_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_NEW_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_CONV_TOTAL_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_DEPOSIT_CHARGED],
        0 AS [FLAG_DEPOSIT_COLLECTED],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_CANCELLED],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_ALONE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_HOLDOVER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_NEW_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_ALONE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_HOLDOVER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_RENEWAL_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_ALONE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_HOLDOVER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_FALL_TOTAL_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_FMO_PROCESSED],
        0 AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD],
        0 AS [FLAG_GIFT_CARD_MULTIPLE],
        0 AS [FLAG_GUARANTOR_APPROVED],
        0 AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER],
        0 AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER_EXPIRING],
        0 AS [FLAG_HOLDOVER_MIDDLE_YEAR],
        0 AS [FLAG_IN_COLLECTIONS],
        0 AS [FLAG_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CALL_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_CHAT_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_EMAIL_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_INBOUND],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONLINE_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_ONSITE_VISIT_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS],
        0 AS [FLAG_INITIAL_CONTACT_SMS_LEASED],
        0 AS [FLAG_LEASE_TYPE_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_LONG_TERM_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_MIDDLE_YEAR],
        0 AS [FLAG_MOVED_OUT],
        0 AS [FLAG_MTM_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_NEW_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        0 AS [FLAG_RENEWAL_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_SHORT_TERM_PREMIUM_VIOLATION],
        1 AS [FLAG_STATIC_HISTORY],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_CANCELLED],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_COMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_INCOMPLETE],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_MONTH_TO_MONTH_LEASE],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_APPLICANT],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CANCELLED],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_CURRENT],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_FUTURE],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_NOTICE],
        0 AS [FLAG_STATUS_TYPE_PAST],
        0 AS [FLAG_TERM_IS_COMMERCIAL],
        0 AS [FLAG_TRANSFER],
        0 AS [FLAG_TRANSFER_IN],
        0 AS [FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT],
        0 AS [GIFT_CARD_AMOUNT],
        0 AS [GIFT_CARD_COUNT],
        0 AS [REFERRAL_AMOUNT],
        0 AS [REFERRAL_COUNT],
        0 AS [RENT_AMOUNT]
    FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[STATIC_HISTORY_STAGING_0] s
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F] p
        ON s.[PROPERTY_KEY] = p.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        AND ISNULL(p.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW], 0) > 0
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] d
        ON d.[DATE_KEY] >= s.[DATE_WEEK_BEGIN]
        AND d.[DATE_KEY] <= s.[DATE_WEEK_END]
        AND d.[AY_WEEK_KEY] = s.[AY_WEEK_KEY]
    WHERE CASE WHEN s.[DATE_WEEK_END] < p.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1
        AND s.[DATE_WEEK_END] >= 20180801;
END

name: SUBSCRIPTION_EMAIL_LIST_LOAD_SP
transformations: FLAG_SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP: CASE WHEN LEFT([PROPERTY_NAME], 1) < 'T' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.SUBSCRIPTION_EMAIL_LIST (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[SUBSCRIPTION_EMAIL_LIST_LOAD_SP]

AS

BEGIN

    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    

    BEGIN TRY

        -- Transaction Start

        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table (Logic: Replace/Refresh List)

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[SUBSCRIPTION_EMAIL_LIST];

        -- 2. Define Transformations

        

        -- CTE_Fields: Source Filter and Selection

        ;WITH CTE_Fields AS (

            SELECT 

                [PROPERTY_KEY],

                [PROPERTY_NAME],

                [OWNER_GROUP],

                -- Contact Emails/Names

                [AM_EMAIL], [AM_NAME],

                [PM_EMAIL], [PM_NAME],

                [LM_EMAIL], [LM_NAME],

                [RM_EMAIL], [RM_NAME],

                [RSM_EMAIL], [RSM_NAME],

                [RVP_EMAIL], [RVP_NAME],

                [ASSET_MGR_EMAIL], [ASSET_MGR_NAME]

            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]

            WHERE [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1

        ),

        -- CTE_Unpivoted: Flattening the roles (AM, PM, LM, etc.) into rows

        CTE_Unpivoted AS (

            -- AM

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [AM_EMAIL] AS [EMAIL], [AM_NAME] AS [NAME], 'AM' AS [TYPE] 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [AM_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- PM

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [PM_EMAIL], [PM_NAME], 'PM' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [PM_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- LM

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [LM_EMAIL], [LM_NAME], 'LM' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [LM_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- RM

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [RM_EMAIL], [RM_NAME], 'RM' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [RM_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- RSM (Has extra check for Name <> '--')

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [RSM_EMAIL], [RSM_NAME], 'RSM' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [RSM_EMAIL] <> '--' AND [RSM_NAME] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- RVP

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [RVP_EMAIL], [RVP_NAME], 'RVP' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [RVP_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- AssetMgr (Note: ATL checks RVP_EMAIL <> '--' to include AssetMgr)

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], [ASSET_MGR_EMAIL], [ASSET_MGR_NAME], 'AssetMgr' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [RVP_EMAIL] <> '--'

            

            UNION ALL

            

            -- ADMIN (Hardcoded, checks RVP_EMAIL <> '--')

            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME], [OWNER_GROUP], 'biadmin@peakmade.com', 'BIADMIN', 'ADMIN' 

            FROM CTE_Fields WHERE [RVP_EMAIL] <> '--'

        ),

        -- CTE_Subjects: Calculate dynamic strings and flags

        CTE_Subjects AS (

            SELECT 

                [PROPERTY_KEY],

                [PROPERTY_NAME],

                [EMAIL],

                -- Logic: If Property Name starts with letter < 'T', Group 1, else 2

                CASE 

                    WHEN LEFT([PROPERTY_NAME], 1) < 'T' THEN 1 

                    ELSE 2 

                END AS [FLAG_SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP],

                [NAME],

                [OWNER_GROUP],

                [TYPE],

                -- Dynamic Date Subjects (Yesterday's Date)

                [PROPERTY_NAME] + ' - Market Survey - Client Standard as of ' + FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 'MM/dd/yyyy') AS [Subject_MS_Client_Standard],

                [PROPERTY_NAME] + ' - Property Snapshot - Weekly Standard as of ' + FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 'MM/dd/yyyy') AS [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard],

                [PROPERTY_NAME] + ' - BV Property Snapshot as of ' + FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 'MM/dd/yyyy') AS [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_BV],

                [PROPERTY_NAME] + ' - Property Snapshot - Weekly Standard as of ' + FORMAT(DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 'MM/dd/yyyy') + '.pdf' AS [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_FILENAME]

            FROM CTE_Unpivoted

        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target

        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[SUBSCRIPTION_EMAIL_LIST] (

            [PROPERTY_KEY],

            [PROPERTY_NAME],

            [EMAIL],

            [FLAG_SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP],

            [NAME],

            [OWNER_GROUP],

            [TYPE],

            [Subject_MS_Client_Standard],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_BV],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_FILENAME],

            [LAST_RUN_DT]

        )

        SELECT 

            [PROPERTY_KEY],

            [PROPERTY_NAME],

            [EMAIL],

            [FLAG_SUBSCRIPTION_GROUP],

            [NAME],

            [OWNER_GROUP],

            [TYPE],

            [Subject_MS_Client_Standard],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_BV],

            [Subject_PS_Weekly_Standard_FILENAME],

            SYSDATETIME()

        FROM CTE_Subjects

;

        -- Commit Transaction

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;

    END TRY

    BEGIN CATCH

        -- Rollback if error

        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;

        THROW;

    END CATCH

END;

name: SURVEY_RESPONSES_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORIES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTIONS into WH_STAGING.dbo.SURVEY_RESPONSES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0];

    WITH

    InterestCategories AS (
        SELECT
            ID,
            NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORIES]
    ),

    PossibleAnswers AS (
        SELECT
            ID,
            ANSWER
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTIONS]
    ),

    PossibleQuestions AS (
        SELECT
            ri.ID,
            ri.QUESTION,
            ISNULL(sq.QUESTION_CONFORMED, SUBSTRING(ri.QUESTION, 1, 50)) AS QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            ri.DELETED_ON                                                  AS Obsolete_DateTime,
            ri.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORY_ID,
            ic.NAME                                                        AS ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORY_NAME
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS]            ri
        LEFT JOIN InterestCategories                           ic  ON ri.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORY_ID = ic.ID
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_QUESTIONS_0]     sq  ON ri.ID = sq.ID
    ),

    CustomerSurveys AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            ID,
            CREATED_ON_DATE,
            CREATED_ON_DATEID,
            CREATED_ON_DATETIME,
            CUSTOMER_ID,
            PREFERENCE_DATE,
            PREFERENCE_DATEID,
            PREFERENCE_DATETIME,
            ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID,
            ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTION_ID,
            UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            UPDATED_ON_DATETIME,
            WRITTEN_RESPONSE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMER_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS]
    ),

    Property AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID  AS PROPERTY_ID,
            PROPERTY_NAME      AS PROPERTY_NAME_CONFORMED
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0
    ),

    ApprovedLeases AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            ca.LEASE_ID,
            MAX(ca.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID)   AS LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            ca.PROPERTY_ID,
            p.PROPERTY_NAME_CONFORMED   AS PROPERTY_NAME,
            a.CUSTOMER_ID               AS PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID,
            ca.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_APPLICATIONS]  ca
        INNER JOIN Property                           p   ON p.PROPERTY_ID = ca.PROPERTY_ID
        LEFT JOIN  [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANTS]     a   ON a.ID = ca.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID
        GROUP BY
            ca.LEASE_ID,
            ca.PROPERTY_ID,
            p.PROPERTY_NAME_CONFORMED,
            a.CUSTOMER_ID,
            ca.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_ID
    ),

    Combo AS (
        SELECT
            cs.ID                                                       AS Survey_ID,
            cs.CUSTOMER_ID,
            ISNULL(pa.ANSWER, cs.WRITTEN_RESPONSE)                     AS Survey_ANSWER,
            pa.ID                                                       AS Survey_ANSWER_ID,
            cs.LEASE_ID                                                 AS Survey_LEASE_ID,
            pq.QUESTION                                                 AS Survey_QUESTION,
            pq.QUESTION_CONFORMED                                       AS Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            pq.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORY_ID                            AS Survey_Question_CATEGORY_ID,
            pq.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_CATEGORY_NAME                         AS Survey_Question_CATEGORY_NAME,
            pq.ID                                                       AS Survey_QUESTION_ID,
            cs.UPDATED_ON_DATE                                          AS Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            cs.UPDATED_ON_DATEID                                        AS Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            cs.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID,
            cs.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTION_ID
        FROM CustomerSurveys                cs
        LEFT JOIN PossibleQuestions         pq  ON cs.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID      = pq.ID
        LEFT JOIN PossibleAnswers           pa  ON cs.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_OPTION_ID = pa.ID
    ),

    Combo2 AS (
        SELECT
            al.LEASE_ID,
            al.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            al.PROPERTY_ID,
            al.PROPERTY_NAME,
            c.Survey_ID,
            c.Survey_ANSWER,
            c.Survey_ANSWER_ID,
            c.Survey_LEASE_ID,
            c.Survey_QUESTION,
            c.Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            c.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_ID,
            c.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_NAME,
            c.Survey_QUESTION_ID,
            c.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            c.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            c.CUSTOMER_ID,
            al.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
        FROM Combo                          c
        LEFT JOIN ApprovedLeases            al  ON c.Survey_LEASE_ID = al.LEASE_ID
    ),

    Written_max AS (
        SELECT
            MAX(ID)                     AS ID,
            LEASE_ID,
            ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS]
        WHERE WRITTEN_RESPONSE IS NOT NULL
          AND ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID = 73040
        GROUP BY LEASE_ID, ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID
    ),

    Written AS (
        SELECT
            a.ID,
            a.LEASE_ID,
            a.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID,
            a.WRITTEN_RESPONSE,
            a.UPDATED_ON
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_APPLICANT_ROOMMATE_INTERESTS]  a
        INNER JOIN Written_max                                  wm  ON a.ID = wm.ID
        WHERE a.WRITTEN_RESPONSE IS NOT NULL
          AND a.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID = 73040
    ),

    Combo3 AS (
        SELECT
            c2.LEASE_ID,
            c2.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            cu.NAME_FIRST                                               AS CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            c2.CUSTOMER_ID,
            cu.NAME_LAST                                                AS CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            c2.PROPERTY_ID,
            c2.PROPERTY_NAME,
            c2.Survey_ID,
            c2.Survey_ANSWER,
            c2.Survey_ANSWER_ID,
            c2.Survey_LEASE_ID,
            c2.Survey_QUESTION,
            c2.Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            c2.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_ID,
            c2.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_NAME,
            c2.Survey_QUESTION_ID,
            c2.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            c2.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            c2.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID,
            w.WRITTEN_RESPONSE
        FROM Combo2                                 c2
        LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CUSTOMERS]     cu  ON c2.CUSTOMER_ID        = cu.ID
        LEFT JOIN Written                           w   ON c2.LEASE_ID           = w.LEASE_ID
                                                       AND c2.Survey_QUESTION_ID = w.ROOMMATE_INTEREST_ID
    ),

    MaxConformed AS (
        SELECT
            LEASE_ID,
            LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            MAX(Survey_ID)              AS Survey_ID,
            Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED
        FROM Combo3
        GROUP BY LEASE_ID, LEASE_INTERVAL_ID, Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED
    ),

    Pool AS (
        SELECT
            c3.LEASE_ID,
            c3.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            c3.CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
            c3.CUSTOMER_ID,
            c3.CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
            c3.PROPERTY_ID,
            c3.PROPERTY_NAME,
            c3.Survey_ID,
            ISNULL(c3.Survey_ANSWER, c3.WRITTEN_RESPONSE)              AS Survey_ANSWER,
            c3.Survey_ANSWER_ID,
            c3.Survey_LEASE_ID,
            c3.Survey_QUESTION,
            c3.Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
            c3.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_ID,
            c3.Survey_Question_CATEGORY_NAME,
            c3.Survey_QUESTION_ID,
            c3.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
            c3.Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
            c3.PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
        FROM MaxConformed                mc
        INNER JOIN Combo3               c3  ON  mc.LEASE_ID                 = c3.LEASE_ID
                                            AND mc.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID        = c3.LEASE_INTERVAL_ID
                                            AND mc.Survey_ID                = c3.Survey_ID
                                            AND mc.Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED = c3.Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0] (
        LEASE_ID,
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        SURVEY_ID,
        SURVEY_ANSWER,
        SURVEY_ANSWER_ID,
        SURVEY_LEASE_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_ID,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_CATEGORY_NAME,
        SURVEY_QUESTION_ID,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        SURVEY_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    )
    SELECT
        LEASE_ID,
        LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST,
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST,
        PROPERTY_ID,
        PROPERTY_NAME,
        Survey_ID,
        Survey_ANSWER,
        Survey_ANSWER_ID,
        Survey_LEASE_ID,
        Survey_QUESTION,
        Survey_QUESTION_CONFORMED,
        Survey_Question_CATEGORY_ID,
        Survey_Question_CATEGORY_NAME,
        Survey_QUESTION_ID,
        Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATE,
        Survey_UPDATED_ON_DATEID,
        PRIMARY_APPLICANT_CUSTOMER_ID
    FROM Pool;

    -- Audit stamp
    UPDATE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[SURVEY_RESPONSES_0]
    SET LAST_RUN_DT = SYSDATETIME()
    WHERE LAST_RUN_DT IS NULL;

END;

name: TARGETS_BY_DAY_0_SP
transformations: FLAG_NO_CONCESSION_BUDGET: CASE WHEN IND.CONCESSION_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_GIFT_CARD_BUDGET: CASE WHEN IND.GIFT_CARD_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_PLAN_TARGET: CASE WHEN WT.PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET: CASE WHEN IND.REFERRAL_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET: CASE WHEN WT.TARGET_TOTAL_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_DAY_0.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_0];

        WITH CTE_Dates AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY, AY, AY_WEEK, AY_WEEK_KEY, DAY_OF_WEEK, RELATIVE_AY, YYYYMM
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            WHERE RELATIVE_AY IN (-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)
        ),
        CTE_Properties AS (
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, PROPERTY_NAME, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, BED_COUNT_COMPILED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE FLAG_SUBPROPERTY = 0 
              AND FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION = 0 
              AND FLAG_NON_PROPERTY = 0 
              AND FLAG_TENTATIVE = 0
        ),
        CTE_DATES2 AS (
            SELECT 
                D.DATE_KEY, P.PROPERTY_KEY, D.AY, D.AY_WEEK, D.AY_WEEK_KEY,
                P.BED_COUNT_COMPILED, D.DAY_OF_WEEK, P.PROPERTY_NAME,
                P.DATE_DISPOSITIONED, P.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, D.RELATIVE_AY, D.YYYYMM
            FROM CTE_Dates D
            CROSS JOIN CTE_Properties P
        ),
        CTE_OccTargets AS (
            SELECT DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS, CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT, CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL,
                   FALL_OCC_BEDS, FALL_OCC_PERCENT, FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                   FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET, FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[OCCUPANCY_TARGETS_0]
        ),
        CTE_WeekTargets AS (
            -- FIX: 'Entity_ID' casing corrected here
            SELECT PROPERTY_KEY, AY_WEEK_KEY, [Entity_ID] AS ENTITY_ID, 
                   PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT,
                   PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS, PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS,
                   PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET, PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS,
                   PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED, PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR,
                   PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS, PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE,
                   TARGET_NEW_AGG, TARGET_NEW_WEEK, TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT,
                   TARGET_RENEW_AGG, TARGET_RENEW_WEEK, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED,
                   TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED,
                   TARGET_VISIT_AGG, TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK,
                   TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_WEEK_0]
        ),
        CTE_Inducements AS (
            SELECT AY, PROPERTY_KEY, 
                   CONCESSION_AGG, CONCESSION_NEW, CONCESSION_RENEW,
                   GIFT_CARD_AGG, GIFT_CARD_NEW, GIFT_CARD_RENEW,
                   REFERRAL_AGG, REFERRAL_NEW, REFERRAL_RENEW
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[CONCESSION_TARGETS_0]
        ),
        CTE_Combo AS (
            SELECT 
                D2.DATE_KEY, D2.PROPERTY_KEY, D2.AY, D2.AY_WEEK, D2.AY_WEEK_KEY,
                D2.BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
                IND.CONCESSION_AGG, IND.CONCESSION_NEW, IND.CONCESSION_RENEW,
                OCC.CURRENT_OCC_BEDS, OCC.CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT, OCC.CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL,
                D2.DATE_DISPOSITIONED, D2.DAY_OF_WEEK, WT.ENTITY_ID,
                OCC.FALL_OCC_BEDS, OCC.FALL_OCC_PERCENT, OCC.FALL_OCC_TOTAL,
                D2.FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
                CASE WHEN IND.CONCESSION_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_NO_CONCESSION_BUDGET,
                ISNULL(OCC.FLAG_MISSING_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET, 0) AS FLAG_NO_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET,
                ISNULL(OCC.FLAG_MISSING_FALL_OCC_TARGET, 0) AS FLAG_NO_FALL_OCC_TARGET,
                CASE WHEN IND.GIFT_CARD_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_NO_GIFT_CARD_BUDGET,
                CASE WHEN WT.PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_NO_PLAN_TARGET,
                CASE WHEN IND.REFERRAL_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET,
                CASE WHEN WT.TARGET_TOTAL_AGG IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET,
                
                IND.GIFT_CARD_AGG, IND.GIFT_CARD_NEW, IND.GIFT_CARD_RENEW,
                WT.PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, WT.PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED, WT.PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT,
                WT.PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS, WT.PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, WT.PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS,
                WT.PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET, WT.PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, WT.PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS,
                WT.PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED, WT.PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR,
                WT.PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS, WT.PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, WT.PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE,
                D2.PROPERTY_NAME,
                IND.REFERRAL_AGG, IND.REFERRAL_NEW, IND.REFERRAL_RENEW,
                D2.RELATIVE_AY,
                WT.TARGET_NEW_AGG, WT.TARGET_NEW_WEEK, WT.TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT,
                WT.TARGET_RENEW_AGG, WT.TARGET_RENEW_WEEK, WT.TARGET_TOTAL_AGG,
                WT.TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED, WT.TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK, WT.TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES,
                WT.TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED, WT.TARGET_VISIT_AGG, WT.TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED,
                WT.TARGET_VISIT_WEEK, WT.TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS, WT.TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED,
                D2.YYYYMM
            FROM CTE_DATES2 D2
            LEFT JOIN CTE_OccTargets OCC 
                ON D2.DATE_KEY = OCC.DATE_KEY 
               AND D2.PROPERTY_KEY = OCC.PROPERTY_KEY
            LEFT JOIN CTE_WeekTargets WT 
                ON D2.PROPERTY_KEY = WT.PROPERTY_KEY 
               AND D2.AY_WEEK_KEY = WT.AY_WEEK_KEY
            LEFT JOIN CTE_Inducements IND 
                ON D2.PROPERTY_KEY = IND.PROPERTY_KEY 
               AND D2.AY = IND.AY
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_0] (
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, AY_WEEK, AY_WEEK_KEY, BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
            CONCESSION_AGG, CONCESSION_NEW, CONCESSION_RENEW, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,
            CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT, CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, DAY_OF_WEEK,
            ENTITY_ID, FALL_OCC_BEDS, FALL_OCC_PERCENT, FALL_OCC_TOTAL, FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            FLAG_NO_CONCESSION_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET, FLAG_NO_FALL_OCC_TARGET,
            FLAG_NO_GIFT_CARD_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_PLAN_TARGET, FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET,
            FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET, GIFT_CARD_AGG, GIFT_CARD_NEW, GIFT_CARD_RENEW,
            PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT,
            PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS, PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS,
            PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET, PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS,
            PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED, PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR,
            PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS, PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE,
            PROPERTY_NAME, REFERRAL_AGG, REFERRAL_NEW, REFERRAL_RENEW, RELATIVE_AY,
            TARGET_NEW_AGG, TARGET_NEW_WEEK, TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT, TARGET_RENEW_AGG,
            TARGET_RENEW_WEEK, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_AGG,
            TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS,
            TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED, YYYYMM, LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, AY_WEEK, AY_WEEK_KEY, BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
            CONCESSION_AGG, CONCESSION_NEW, CONCESSION_RENEW, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,
            CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT, CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL, DATE_DISPOSITIONED, DAY_OF_WEEK,
            CAST(ENTITY_ID AS VARCHAR(1000)), FALL_OCC_BEDS, FALL_OCC_PERCENT, FALL_OCC_TOTAL, FLAG_DISPOSITIONED,
            FLAG_NO_CONCESSION_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET, FLAG_NO_FALL_OCC_TARGET,
            FLAG_NO_GIFT_CARD_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_PLAN_TARGET, FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET,
            FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET, GIFT_CARD_AGG, GIFT_CARD_NEW, GIFT_CARD_RENEW,
            PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT,
            PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS, PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS,
            PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET, PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS,
            PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED, PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR,
            PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS, PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE,
            CAST(PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)), REFERRAL_AGG, REFERRAL_NEW, REFERRAL_RENEW, RELATIVE_AY,
            TARGET_NEW_AGG, TARGET_NEW_WEEK, TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT, TARGET_RENEW_AGG,
            TARGET_RENEW_WEEK, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_AGG,
            TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS,
            TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED, CAST(YYYYMM AS VARCHAR(1000)), SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Combo;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: TARGETS_BY_DAY_SP

description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_DAY_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.TARGETS_BY_DAY (cross-database).

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_SP]

            CONCESSION_AGG, CONCESSION_NEW, CONCESSION_RENEW, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,

            FLAG_DISPOSITIONED, FLAG_NO_CONCESSION_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_CURRENT_OCC_TARGET,
            FLAG_NO_FALL_OCC_TARGET, FLAG_NO_GIFT_CARD_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_PLAN_TARGET,
            FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET, GIFT_CARD_AGG, GIFT_CARD_NEW,
            GIFT_CARD_RENEW, PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED,
            PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS,
            PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS, PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET,
            PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS, PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED,
            PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS,
            PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE, PROPERTY_NAME,
            REFERRAL_AGG, REFERRAL_NEW, REFERRAL_RENEW, RELATIVE_AY, TARGET_NEW_AGG,
            TARGET_NEW_WEEK, TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT, TARGET_RENEW_AGG, TARGET_RENEW_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_AGG, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_AGG,
            TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS,
            TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED, YYYYMM, LAST_RUN_DT
        )
        SELECT 
            DATE_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY, AY, AY_WEEK, AY_WEEK_KEY, BED_COUNT_COMPILED,
            CONCESSION_AGG, CONCESSION_NEW, CONCESSION_RENEW, CURRENT_OCC_BEDS,
            CURRENT_OCC_PERCENT, CURRENT_OCC_TOTAL, DATE_DISPOSITIONED,
            -- Transformation: Convert Integer Date (YYYYMMDD) to Datetime
            CASE 
                WHEN DATE_KEY IS NOT NULL AND LEN(DATE_KEY) = 8

            FLAG_NO_REFERRAL_BUDGET, FLAG_NO_WEEKLY_TARGET, GIFT_CARD_AGG, GIFT_CARD_NEW,
            GIFT_CARD_RENEW, PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED,
            PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT, PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS,
            PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES, PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS, PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET,
            PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE, PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS, PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED,
            PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS,
            PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR, PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE, CAST(PROPERTY_NAME AS VARCHAR(1000)),
            REFERRAL_AGG, REFERRAL_NEW, REFERRAL_RENEW, RELATIVE_AY, TARGET_NEW_AGG,
            TARGET_NEW_WEEK, TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT, TARGET_RENEW_AGG, TARGET_RENEW_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_AGG, TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK,
            TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES, TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_AGG,
            TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK, TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS,
            TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED, CAST(YYYYMM AS VARCHAR(1000)), SYSDATETIME()
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_DAY_F];

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        
        DECLARE @ErrorMessage NVARCHAR(4000) = ERROR_MESSAGE();
        RAISERROR(@ErrorMessage, 16, 1);
    END CATCH
END;

name: TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_0_SP
transformations: BEDS: CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023 THEN [BEDS] * 2 ELSE [BEDS] END
OCC_BEDS: CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023 THEN [OCC_BEDS] * 2 ELSE [OCC_BEDS] END
OCC_TOTAL: CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023 THEN [OCC_TOTAL] * 2 ELSE [OCC_TOTAL] END
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER into unknown target.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ATL: Table_Comparison auto_correct_using_merge=yes, detect_delete=no,
    -- loader_load_choice=append => MERGE upsert, no truncate, no deletes.
    -- Keys: DATE_YYYYMM, FLOORPLAN_KEY, PROPERTY_KEY

    MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_0] AS TGT
    USING (
        SELECT
            [DATE_YYYYMM],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            -- Custom rule: The Station on Washington (9071) AY 2023
            CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023
                 THEN [BEDS] * 2 ELSE [BEDS] END                    AS [BEDS],
            [BED_NON_ECON],
            [DATE_AY],
            [DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR],
            [DATE_KEY],
            CAST([DATE_UPDATED] AS INT)                             AS [DATE_UPDATED],
            [FLOORPLAN],
            [GLOL],
            [MKT_RENT_AVG],
            [MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC],
            [MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL],
            [OCC_ADJ],
            CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023
                 THEN [OCC_BEDS] * 2 ELSE [OCC_BEDS] END            AS [OCC_BEDS],
            [OCC_BEDS_CA],
            [OCC_BEDS_CO],
            [OCC_BEDS_MODEL],
            [OCC_PCT],
            CASE WHEN [PROPERTY_KEY] = 9071 AND [DATE_AY] = 2023
                 THEN [OCC_TOTAL] * 2 ELSE [OCC_TOTAL] END          AS [OCC_TOTAL],
            CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(100))                   AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [RENT_CA],
            [RENT_CO],
            [RENT_LEASED_AVG],
            [RENT_LEASED_TOTAL],
            [RENT_MODEL],
            [RENT_TOTAL],
            [VACANCY_LOSS]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER]
    ) AS SRC
    ON  TGT.[DATE_YYYYMM]   = SRC.[DATE_YYYYMM]
    AND TGT.[FLOORPLAN_KEY] = SRC.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]
    AND TGT.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY]

    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        TGT.[BEDS]                = SRC.[BEDS],
        TGT.[BED_NON_ECON]        = SRC.[BED_NON_ECON],
        TGT.[DATE_AY]             = SRC.[DATE_AY],
        TGT.[DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR]  = SRC.[DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR],
        TGT.[DATE_KEY]            = SRC.[DATE_KEY],
        TGT.[DATE_UPDATED]        = SRC.[DATE_UPDATED],
        TGT.[FLOORPLAN]           = SRC.[FLOORPLAN],
        TGT.[GLOL]                = SRC.[GLOL],
        TGT.[MKT_RENT_AVG]        = SRC.[MKT_RENT_AVG],
        TGT.[MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC] = SRC.[MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC],
        TGT.[MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL]  = SRC.[MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL],
        TGT.[OCC_ADJ]             = SRC.[OCC_ADJ],
        TGT.[OCC_BEDS]            = SRC.[OCC_BEDS],
        TGT.[OCC_BEDS_CA]         = SRC.[OCC_BEDS_CA],
        TGT.[OCC_BEDS_CO]         = SRC.[OCC_BEDS_CO],
        TGT.[OCC_BEDS_MODEL]      = SRC.[OCC_BEDS_MODEL],
        TGT.[OCC_PCT]             = SRC.[OCC_PCT],
        TGT.[OCC_TOTAL]           = SRC.[OCC_TOTAL],
        TGT.[PROPERTY_NAME]       = SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        TGT.[RENT_CA]             = SRC.[RENT_CA],
        TGT.[RENT_CO]             = SRC.[RENT_CO],
        TGT.[RENT_LEASED_AVG]     = SRC.[RENT_LEASED_AVG],
        TGT.[RENT_LEASED_TOTAL]   = SRC.[RENT_LEASED_TOTAL],
        TGT.[RENT_MODEL]          = SRC.[RENT_MODEL],
        TGT.[RENT_TOTAL]          = SRC.[RENT_TOTAL],
        TGT.[VACANCY_LOSS]        = SRC.[VACANCY_LOSS],
        TGT.[LAST_RUN_DT]         = SYSDATETIME()

    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [DATE_YYYYMM], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [BEDS], [BED_NON_ECON],
        [DATE_AY], [DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [FLOORPLAN],
        [GLOL], [MKT_RENT_AVG], [MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC], [MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL],
        [OCC_ADJ], [OCC_BEDS], [OCC_BEDS_CA], [OCC_BEDS_CO], [OCC_BEDS_MODEL],
        [OCC_PCT], [OCC_TOTAL], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [RENT_CA], [RENT_CO], [RENT_LEASED_AVG], [RENT_LEASED_TOTAL],
        [RENT_MODEL], [RENT_TOTAL], [VACANCY_LOSS],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    ) VALUES (
        SRC.[DATE_YYYYMM], SRC.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        SRC.[BEDS], SRC.[BED_NON_ECON],
        SRC.[DATE_AY], SRC.[DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR], SRC.[DATE_KEY], SRC.[DATE_UPDATED],
        SRC.[FLOORPLAN],
        SRC.[GLOL], SRC.[MKT_RENT_AVG], SRC.[MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC], SRC.[MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL],
        SRC.[OCC_ADJ], SRC.[OCC_BEDS], SRC.[OCC_BEDS_CA], SRC.[OCC_BEDS_CO], SRC.[OCC_BEDS_MODEL],
        SRC.[OCC_PCT], SRC.[OCC_TOTAL], SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        SRC.[RENT_CA], SRC.[RENT_CO], SRC.[RENT_LEASED_AVG], SRC.[RENT_LEASED_TOTAL],
        SRC.[RENT_MODEL], SRC.[RENT_TOTAL], SRC.[VACANCY_LOSS],
        SYSDATETIME()
    );
END

name: TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER_SP
transformations: Flag_Deleted_Floorplan: CASE WHEN UPPER([FLOORPLAN]) LIKE '%DELETED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
DATE_KEY: CASE WHEN [AY] = 0 THEN 0 ELSE CAST(CAST([AY] AS VARCHAR) + SUBSTRING([Month], 2, 2) + '01' AS INT) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.Adaptive_Rent_Import_Summary_Cube, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- ATL: loader_drop_and_create_table=yes, loader_load_choice=append => TRUNCATE + INSERT
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER];

    WITH
    -- Source: App_Support.DBO.ADAPTIVE_RENT_IMPORT_SUMMARY_CUBE (no filter)
    RISC0 AS (
        SELECT
            [Academic_Yr], [Account_Code], [Level_Name], [Unit_Type],
            [Jan], [Feb], [Mar], [Apr], [May], [Jun],
            [Jul], [Aug], [Sep], [Oct], [Nov], [Dec]
        FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Rent_Import_Summary_Cube]
    ),
    -- Code Prep: AY = Academic_Yr directly (already 4-digit), normalize codes
    RISC AS (
        SELECT
            [Academic_Yr]                             AS [AY],
            CAST(LEFT([Level_Name], 3) AS VARCHAR(4)) AS [Entity_Number],
            UPPER(SUBSTRING([Account_Code], 12, 50))  AS [ACCOUNT_CODE],
            UPPER([Unit_Type])                        AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [Jan]  AS [M01], [Feb]  AS [M02], [Mar]  AS [M03], [Apr]  AS [M04],
            [May]  AS [M05], [Jun]  AS [M06], [Jul]  AS [M07], [Aug]  AS [M08],
            [Sep]  AS [M09], [Oct]  AS [M10], [Nov]  AS [M11], [Dec]  AS [M12]
        FROM RISC0
    ),
    -- Reportable properties, exclude sub-properties
    Properties AS (
        SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [BED_COUNT_COMPILED], [ENTITY_NUMBER],
               [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
        WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
          AND [FLAG_REPORTABLE] <> 0
    ),
    -- Active floorplans
    Floorplans AS (
        SELECT
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            CASE WHEN UPPER([FLOORPLAN]) LIKE '%DELETED%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [Flag_Deleted_Floorplan],
            UPPER([FLOORPLAN])      AS [FLOORPLAN],
            UPPER([FLOORPLAN_CODE]) AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F]
        WHERE UPPER([FLOORPLAN_CODE]) <> 'CATCH ALL FLOOR PLAN'
          AND [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND [FLAG_ACTIVE_FLOORPLAN] <> 0
    ),
    -- Properties INNER JOIN Floorplans
    Base AS (
        SELECT
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY], F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            P.[ENTITY_NUMBER], F.[Flag_Deleted_Floorplan], P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
            F.[FLOORPLAN], F.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], P.[PROPERTY_NAME]
        FROM Properties P
        INNER JOIN Floorplans F ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = F.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),
    -- Base LEFT JOIN RISC, map Budget_Element codes
    Pool0 AS (
        SELECT
            B.[PROPERTY_KEY], B.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            ISNULL(R.[AY], 0) AS [AY],
            ISNULL(CASE
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'BEDS'               THEN 'BEDS'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'AVG_LEASED_RENT'    THEN 'RENT_LEASED_AVG'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPANCY_PCT'      THEN 'OCC_PCT'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPIED_BEDS'      THEN 'OCC_BEDS'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'TOT_LEASED_RENT'    THEN 'RENT_LEASED_TOTAL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'TOT_OCCUPANCY'      THEN 'OCC_TOTAL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'TOTAL_RENT'         THEN 'RENT_TOTAL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'AVG_MKT_RENT'       THEN 'MKT_RENT_AVG'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'AVG_MKT_RENT_METRIC' THEN 'MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'MKT_POTENTIAL_RENT' THEN 'MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'VACANCY_LOSS'       THEN 'VACANCY_LOSS'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPANCY_ADJ'      THEN 'OCC_ADJ'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'NON_ECON_BEDS'      THEN 'BED_NON_ECON'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'MODEL_RENT'         THEN 'RENT_MODEL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPIED_BEDS_MODEL' THEN 'OCC_BEDS_MODEL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'GAIN_LOSS_TO_LEASE' THEN 'GLOL'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'CO_RENT'            THEN 'RENT_CO'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPIED_BEDS_CO'   THEN 'OCC_BEDS_CO'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'CA_RENT'            THEN 'RENT_CA'
                WHEN R.[ACCOUNT_CODE] = 'OCCUPIED_BEDS_CA'   THEN 'OCC_BEDS_CA'
                ELSE R.[ACCOUNT_CODE]
            END, 'NONE') AS [Budget_Element],
            B.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], B.[ENTITY_NUMBER], B.[Flag_Deleted_Floorplan],
            B.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], B.[FLOORPLAN], B.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], B.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            R.[M01], R.[M02], R.[M03], R.[M04], R.[M05], R.[M06],
            R.[M07], R.[M08], R.[M09], R.[M10], R.[M11], R.[M12]
        FROM Base B
        LEFT JOIN RISC R
            ON B.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = R.[Entity_Number]
           AND B.[FLOORPLAN_CODE] = R.[FLOORPLAN_CODE]
    ),
    -- Unpivot months M01-M12
    PivotMonths AS (
        SELECT
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY], P.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], P.[AY], P.[Budget_Element],
            P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], P.[ENTITY_NUMBER], P.[Flag_Deleted_Floorplan],
            P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], P.[FLOORPLAN], P.[FLOORPLAN_CODE], P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            UP.[Month], UP.[Value]
        FROM Pool0 P
        CROSS APPLY (VALUES
            ('M01', [M01]), ('M02', [M02]), ('M03', [M03]), ('M04', [M04]),
            ('M05', [M05]), ('M06', [M06]), ('M07', [M07]), ('M08', [M08]),
            ('M09', [M09]), ('M10', [M10]), ('M11', [M11]), ('M12', [M12])
        ) AS UP([Month], [Value])
    ),
    -- Calc dates, clean values, filter AY > 0
    byMonths AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [AY], [Month], [Budget_Element],
            [BED_COUNT_COMPILED], [ENTITY_NUMBER], [Flag_Deleted_Floorplan],
            [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            CASE WHEN [AY] = 0 THEN 0
                 ELSE CAST(CAST([AY] AS VARCHAR) + SUBSTRING([Month], 2, 2) + '01' AS INT)
            END AS [DATE_KEY],
            CAST(CAST([AY] AS VARCHAR) + SUBSTRING([Month], 2, 2) AS INT) AS [DATE_YYYYMM],
            ISNULL(CASE WHEN [Flag_Deleted_Floorplan] = 1 AND [AY] >= 2021
                        THEN 0.0000 ELSE [Value] END, 0.0000) AS [x]
        FROM PivotMonths
        WHERE ISNULL([AY], 0) > 0
    ),
    -- Re-pivot: aggregate budget elements into columns
    PivotBudgetElements AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [AY], [Month], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_YYYYMM],
            [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'BEDS'                THEN [x] END) AS [BEDS_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'BED_NON_ECON'        THEN [x] END) AS [BED_NON_ECON_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'GLOL'                THEN [x] END) AS [GLOL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'MKT_RENT_AVG'        THEN [x] END) AS [MKT_RENT_AVG_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC' THEN [x] END) AS [MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL'  THEN [x] END) AS [MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_ADJ'             THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_ADJ_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_BEDS'            THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_BEDS_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_BEDS_CA'         THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_BEDS_CA_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_BEDS_CO'         THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_BEDS_CO_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_BEDS_MODEL'      THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_BEDS_MODEL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_PCT'             THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_PCT_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'OCC_TOTAL'           THEN [x] END) AS [OCC_TOTAL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_CA'             THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_CA_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_CO'             THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_CO_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_LEASED_AVG'     THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_LEASED_AVG_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_LEASED_TOTAL'   THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_LEASED_TOTAL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_MODEL'          THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_MODEL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'RENT_TOTAL'          THEN [x] END) AS [RENT_TOTAL_x],
            MAX(CASE WHEN [Budget_Element] = 'VACANCY_LOSS'        THEN [x] END) AS [VACANCY_LOSS_x]
        FROM byMonths
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [AY], [Month],
                 [DATE_KEY], [DATE_YYYYMM], [FLOORPLAN], [FLOORPLAN_CODE], [PROPERTY_NAME]
    )

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_MONTH_FLOORPLAN_PRELOADER] (
        [DATE_YYYYMM], [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [BEDS], [BED_NON_ECON],
        [DATE_AY], [DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR], [DATE_KEY], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [FLOORPLAN],
        [GLOL], [MKT_RENT_AVG], [MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC], [MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL],
        [OCC_ADJ], [OCC_BEDS], [OCC_BEDS_CA], [OCC_BEDS_CO], [OCC_BEDS_MODEL],
        [OCC_PCT], [OCC_TOTAL], [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [RENT_CA], [RENT_CO], [RENT_LEASED_AVG], [RENT_LEASED_TOTAL],
        [RENT_MODEL], [RENT_TOTAL], [VACANCY_LOSS],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        [DATE_YYYYMM],
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        [PROPERTY_KEY],
        CAST(ISNULL([BEDS_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL([BED_NON_ECON_x], 0) AS INT),
        [AY],                              -- DATE_AY
        [AY],                              -- DATE_CALENDAR_YEAR
        [DATE_KEY],
        [AY],                              -- DATE_UPDATED = AY per ATL
        CAST([FLOORPLAN_CODE] AS VARCHAR(255)),
        [GLOL_x], [MKT_RENT_AVG_x], [MKT_RENT_AVG_METRIC_x], [MKT_RENT_POTENTIAL_x],
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_ADJ_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_BEDS_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_BEDS_CA_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_BEDS_CO_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_BEDS_MODEL_x], 0) AS INT),
        [OCC_PCT_x],
        CAST(ISNULL([OCC_TOTAL_x], 0) AS INT),
        CAST([PROPERTY_NAME] AS VARCHAR(100)),
        [RENT_CA_x], [RENT_CO_x], [RENT_LEASED_AVG_x], [RENT_LEASED_TOTAL_x],
        [RENT_MODEL_x], [RENT_TOTAL_x], [VACANCY_LOSS_x],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM PivotBudgetElements;
END

name: TARGETS_BY_WEEK_0_SP
transformations: NEW_AGG: CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505' AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023 THEN [New_Cum] * 2 ELSE [New_Cum] END

description: MERGE (upsert) from DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.Adaptive_Weekly_Tracker_Targets, DB_APP_SUPPORT.dbo.Adaptive_Weekly_Tracker_Assumptions into WH_STAGING.dbo.ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_TARGETS_0, WH_STAGING.dbo.ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_ASSUMPTIONS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TARGETS_BY_WEEK_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Step 1: Refresh ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_TARGETS_0 (TRUNCATE+INSERT from DB_APP_SUPPORT)
    -- ATL: loader_drop_and_create_table=yes, loader_load_choice=append
    -- Note: table name is mixed case in DB_APP_SUPPORT (Fabric SQL Database is case-sensitive)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_TARGETS_0];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_TARGETS_0] (
        [AY], [ENTITY_ID], [WEEK_BEGINNING], [LEVELS],
        [NEW_AGG], [NEW_WEEK], [RENEW_AGG], [RENEW_WEEK],
        [TOTAL_AGG], [TOTAL_AGG_REVISED], [TOTAL_WEEK], [TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES], [TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
        [VISIT_AGG], [VISIT_AGG_REVISED], [VISIT_WEEK], [VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS], [VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
        [PRELEASED_PERCENT],
        [LEAD_WEEK], [LEAD_AGG], [LEAD_WEEK_ADD_LEADS], [LEAD_WEEK_REVISED],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT)           AS [AY],
        LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1)                    AS [ENTITY_ID],
        CAST(SUBSTRING([Week_Beginning], 2, 2) AS INT)                        AS [WEEK_BEGINNING],
        [Levels]                                                               AS [LEVELS],
        -- Custom rule: Entity_ID=505, AY=2023 => multiply by 2
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [New_Cum] * 2 ELSE [New_Cum] END                            AS [NEW_AGG],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [New_Weekly] * 2 ELSE [New_Weekly] END                      AS [NEW_WEEK],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Renewal_Cum] * 2 ELSE [Renewal_Cum] END                    AS [RENEW_AGG],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Renewal_Weekly] * 2 ELSE [Renewal_Weekly] END              AS [RENEW_WEEK],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Total_Cum] * 2 ELSE [Total_Cum] END                        AS [TOTAL_AGG],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [REV_TOTAL_CUM] * 2 ELSE [REV_TOTAL_CUM] END                AS [TOTAL_AGG_REVISED],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Total_Weekly] * 2 ELSE [Total_Weekly] END                  AS [TOTAL_WEEK],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Rev_Weekly_Add_Leases] * 2 ELSE [Rev_Weekly_Add_Leases] END AS [TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES],
        CASE WHEN LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1) = '505'
              AND CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT) = 2023
             THEN [Rev_Weekly_Lease_Target] * 2 ELSE [Rev_Weekly_Lease_Target] END AS [TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
        [Visits_Cum]                                                           AS [VISIT_AGG],
        [REV_VISITS_CUM]                                                       AS [VISIT_AGG_REVISED],
        [Visits_Weekly]                                                        AS [VISIT_WEEK],
        [Rev_Weekly_Add_Visits]                                                AS [VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS],
        [Rev_Weekly_Visits]                                                    AS [VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
        [Target_Preleased_%]                                                   AS [PRELEASED_PERCENT],
        [FTP_Weekly]                                                           AS [LEAD_WEEK],
        [FTP_Cum]                                                              AS [LEAD_AGG],
        [Rev_Weekly_Add_FTP]                                                   AS [LEAD_WEEK_ADD_LEADS],
        [Rev_Weekly_FTP]                                                       AS [LEAD_WEEK_REVISED],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Weekly_Tracker_Targets]
    WHERE [Levels] <> '229 Dakota Ranch';

    -- Step 2: Refresh ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_ASSUMPTIONS_0 (TRUNCATE+INSERT)
    TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_ASSUMPTIONS_0];

    INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_ASSUMPTIONS_0] (
        [AY], [Entity_ID], [WEEK_BEGINNING],
        [FALL_OFF_PCT], [LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED], [LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        [NEW_LEASED_BEDS], [PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES], [PCT_OF_RENEWALS], [PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
        [RENEWAL_BASE], [RENEWAL_BEDS],
        [TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED], [TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR],
        [TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS], [VISITS_ADD_FACTOR], [VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
        [LAST_RUN_DT]
    )
    SELECT
        CAST('20' + LEFT(CAST([Academic_Yr] AS VARCHAR), 2) AS INT)                    AS [AY],
        LEFT([Levels], CHARINDEX(' ', [Levels] + ' ') - 1)                             AS [Entity_ID],
        CAST(SUBSTRING([Week_Beginning], 2, 2) AS INT)                                 AS [WEEK_BEGINNING],
        ISNULL([Fall_Off_Pct], 0.00)                                                   AS [FALL_OFF_PCT],
        ISNULL([Leased_Beds_Needed], 0.00)                                             AS [LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED],
        ISNULL([Leased_Beds_Needed_with_Fall_Off_Pct], 0.00)                           AS [LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        ISNULL([New_Leased_Beds], 0.00)                                                AS [NEW_LEASED_BEDS],
        ISNULL([Pct_of_New_Leases], 0.00)                                              AS [PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES],
        ISNULL([Pct_of_Renewals], 0.00)                                                AS [PCT_OF_RENEWALS],
        ISNULL([Physical_Occupancy_Target], 0.00)                                      AS [PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
        ISNULL([Renewal_Base], 0)                                                      AS [RENEWAL_BASE],
        ISNULL([Renewal_Beds], 0.00)                                                   AS [RENEWAL_BEDS],
        ISNULL([Total_Cumulative_Visits_Needed], 0.00)                                 AS [TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED],
        ISNULL([Total_Cumulative_Visits_Needed_with_Add_Factor], 0.00)                 AS [TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR],
        ISNULL([Total_Property_Beds], 0)                                               AS [TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS],
        ISNULL([Visits_Add_Factor], 0.00)                                              AS [VISITS_ADD_FACTOR],
        ISNULL([Visits_Conversion_Rate], 0.00)                                         AS [VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
        SYSDATETIME()
    FROM [DB_APP_SUPPORT].[dbo].[Adaptive_Weekly_Tracker_Assumptions]
    WHERE [Levels] <> '229 Dakota Ranch';

    -- Step 3: MERGE TARGETS_BY_WEEK_0 (auto_correct_using_merge=yes, detect_delete=no)
    -- Keys: PROPERTY_KEY, AY_WEEK_KEY
    -- Filter: RELATIVE_AY IN (0,1) AND PROPERTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
    MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TARGETS_BY_WEEK_0] AS TGT
    USING (
        SELECT
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            W.[AY_WEEK_KEY],
            W.[AY],
            W.[AY_WEEK],
            W.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
            W.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
            P.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
            T.[ENTITY_ID]                                               AS [Entity_ID],
            ISNULL(A.[FALL_OFF_PCT], 0.00)                             AS [PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT],
            ISNULL(A.[LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED], 0.00)                       AS [PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED],
            ISNULL(A.[LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT], 0.00)     AS [PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
            ISNULL(A.[NEW_LEASED_BEDS], 0.00)                          AS [PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS],
            ISNULL(A.[PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES], 0.00)                        AS [PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES],
            ISNULL(A.[PCT_OF_RENEWALS], 0.00)                          AS [PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS],
            ISNULL(A.[PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET], 0.00)                AS [PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
            ISNULL(A.[RENEWAL_BASE], 0)                                AS [PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE],
            ISNULL(A.[RENEWAL_BEDS], 0.00)                             AS [PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS],
            ISNULL(A.[TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED], 0.00)           AS [PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED],
            ISNULL(A.[TOTAL_CUMULATIVE_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR], 0.00) AS [PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR],
            ISNULL(A.[TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS], 0)                         AS [PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS],
            ISNULL(A.[VISITS_ADD_FACTOR], 0.00)                        AS [PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR],
            ISNULL(A.[VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE], 0.00)                   AS [PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
            P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            T.[NEW_AGG]                                                AS [TARGET_NEW_AGG],
            T.[NEW_WEEK]                                               AS [TARGET_NEW_WEEK],
            T.[RENEW_AGG]                                              AS [TARGET_RENEW_AGG],
            T.[RENEW_WEEK]                                             AS [TARGET_RENEW_WEEK],
            T.[TOTAL_AGG]                                              AS [TARGET_TOTAL_AGG],
            T.[TOTAL_AGG_REVISED]                                      AS [TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED],
            T.[TOTAL_WEEK]                                             AS [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK],
            T.[TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES]                                  AS [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES],
            T.[TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED]                                     AS [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
            T.[LEAD_AGG]                                               AS [TARGET_VISIT_AGG],
            T.[LEAD_AGG]                                               AS [TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED],
            T.[LEAD_WEEK]                                              AS [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK],
            T.[LEAD_WEEK_ADD_LEADS]                                    AS [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS],
            T.[LEAD_WEEK_REVISED]                                      AS [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
            T.[PRELEASED_PERCENT]                                      AS [TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_TARGETS_0] T
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT [AY], [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY], [RELATIVE_AY]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
            GROUP BY [AY], [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE], [AY_WEEK_KEY], [RELATIVE_AY]
        ) W
            ON T.[AY] = W.[AY] AND T.[WEEK_BEGINNING] = W.[AY_WEEK]
        LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[ADAPTIVE_WEEKLY_TRACKER_ASSUMPTIONS_0] A
            ON T.[AY] = A.[AY]
           AND T.[ENTITY_ID] = A.[Entity_ID]
           AND T.[WEEK_BEGINNING] = A.[WEEK_BEGINNING]
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
                   CAST([ENTITY_NUMBER] AS VARCHAR(10)) AS [Entity_ID],
                   [BED_COUNT_COMPILED]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
        ) P
            ON T.[ENTITY_ID] = P.[Entity_ID]
        WHERE W.[RELATIVE_AY] IN (0, 1)
          AND P.[PROPERTY_KEY] IS NOT NULL
    ) AS SRC
    ON  TGT.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY]
    AND TGT.[AY_WEEK_KEY]   = SRC.[AY_WEEK_KEY]

    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        TGT.[AY]                                        = SRC.[AY],
        TGT.[AY_WEEK]                                   = SRC.[AY_WEEK],
        TGT.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE]                        = SRC.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE],
        TGT.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE]                          = SRC.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
        TGT.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED]                        = SRC.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED],
        TGT.[Entity_ID]                                 = SRC.[Entity_ID],
        TGT.[PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT]                         = SRC.[PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        TGT.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED]                   = SRC.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED],
        TGT.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT] = SRC.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        TGT.[PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS]                      = SRC.[PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS],
        TGT.[PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES]                    = SRC.[PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES],
        TGT.[PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS]                      = SRC.[PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS],
        TGT.[PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET]            = SRC.[PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
        TGT.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE]                         = SRC.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE],
        TGT.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS]                         = SRC.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS],
        TGT.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED]              = SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED],
        TGT.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR] = SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR],
        TGT.[PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS]                  = SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS],
        TGT.[PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR]                    = SRC.[PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR],
        TGT.[PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE]               = SRC.[PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
        TGT.[PROPERTY_NAME]                             = SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        TGT.[TARGET_NEW_AGG]                            = SRC.[TARGET_NEW_AGG],
        TGT.[TARGET_NEW_WEEK]                           = SRC.[TARGET_NEW_WEEK],
        TGT.[TARGET_RENEW_AGG]                          = SRC.[TARGET_RENEW_AGG],
        TGT.[TARGET_RENEW_WEEK]                         = SRC.[TARGET_RENEW_WEEK],
        TGT.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG]                          = SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG],
        TGT.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED]                  = SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED],
        TGT.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK]                         = SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK],
        TGT.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES]              = SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES],
        TGT.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED]                 = SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
        TGT.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG]                          = SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG],
        TGT.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED]                  = SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED],
        TGT.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK]                         = SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK],
        TGT.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS]              = SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS],
        TGT.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED]                 = SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
        TGT.[TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT]                  = SRC.[TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT],
        TGT.[LAST_RUN_DT]                               = SYSDATETIME()

    WHEN NOT MATCHED BY TARGET THEN INSERT (
        [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY_WEEK_KEY], [AY], [AY_WEEK], [AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], [AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
        [BED_COUNT_COMPILED], [Entity_ID],
        [PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT], [PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED], [PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        [PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS], [PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES], [PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS], [PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
        [PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE], [PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS], [PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED],
        [PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR], [PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS],
        [PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR], [PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
        [PROPERTY_NAME],
        [TARGET_NEW_AGG], [TARGET_NEW_WEEK], [TARGET_RENEW_AGG], [TARGET_RENEW_WEEK],
        [TARGET_TOTAL_AGG], [TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED], [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK],
        [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES], [TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
        [TARGET_VISIT_AGG], [TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED], [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK],
        [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS], [TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
        [TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT], [LAST_RUN_DT]
    ) VALUES (
        SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY], SRC.[AY_WEEK_KEY], SRC.[AY], SRC.[AY_WEEK], SRC.[AY_WEEK_BEGIN_DATE], SRC.[AY_WEEK_END_DATE],
        SRC.[BED_COUNT_COMPILED], SRC.[Entity_ID],
        SRC.[PLAN_FALL_OFF_PCT], SRC.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED], SRC.[PLAN_LEASED_BEDS_NEEDED_INCL_FALL_OFF_PCT],
        SRC.[PLAN_NEW_LEASED_BEDS], SRC.[PLAN_PCT_OF_NEW_LEASES], SRC.[PLAN_PCT_OF_RENEWALS], SRC.[PLAN_PHYSICAL_OCCUPANCY_TARGET],
        SRC.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BASE], SRC.[PLAN_RENEWAL_BEDS], SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED],
        SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_AGG_VISITS_NEEDED_INCL_ADD_FACTOR], SRC.[PLAN_TOTAL_PROPERTY_BEDS],
        SRC.[PLAN_VISITS_ADD_FACTOR], SRC.[PLAN_VISITS_CONVERSION_RATE],
        SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
        SRC.[TARGET_NEW_AGG], SRC.[TARGET_NEW_WEEK], SRC.[TARGET_RENEW_AGG], SRC.[TARGET_RENEW_WEEK],
        SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG], SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_AGG_REVISED], SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK],
        SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_ADD_LEASES], SRC.[TARGET_TOTAL_WEEK_REVISED],
        SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG], SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_AGG_REVISED], SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK],
        SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_ADD_VISITS], SRC.[TARGET_VISIT_WEEK_REVISED],
        SRC.[TARGET_PRELEASED_PERCENT], SYSDATETIME()
    );
END

name: TIMECARD_APPROVALS_0_SP
transformations: ADDRESS_STATE: CASE WHEN p.[ADDRESS_STATE] IN ('CA', 'NY') THEN p.[ADDRESS_STATE] ELSE 'ALL' END
Flag_Timecard_Submission_Fail: CASE WHEN [Date_Approval_Added] < [DATE_APPROVE_BY] THEN 0 WHEN [Date_Approval_Added] = [DATE_APPROVE_BY] AND [Time_Approval_Added] <= [CUTOFF_TIME] THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.IMPORT_TIMECARD_APPROVALS into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TIMECARD_APPROVALS_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- Transaction Start
        IF @@TRANCOUNT = 0 -- [REMOVED] BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. Truncate Target Table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [TIMECARD_APPROVALS_0];

        -- 2. Define Transformation CTEs
        
        -- CTE_Property: Filter properties based on business rules
        ;WITH CTE_Property AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ADDRESS_STATE]
            FROM [PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [FLAG_CORPORATE_LOCATION] = 1 
               OR [FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1 
               OR [FLAG_TENTATIVE] = 1
        ),

        -- CTE_Approvals: Reference table for approval windows
        CTE_Approvals AS (
            SELECT 
                [PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
                [PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
                [PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
                [DATE_START],
                [DATE_END],
                [DATE_APPROVE_BY],
                [CUTOFF_TIME]
            FROM [TIMECARD_APPROVAL_DATES_0]
        ),

        -- CTE_Timecards: Raw Timecard Data
        CTE_Timecards AS (
            SELECT 
                [DATE_KEY],
                [EE_CODE] AS [EE_Code],
                [LAST_NAME] AS [Last_Name],
                [FIRST_NAME] AS [First_Name],
                [BADGE_NBR] AS [Badge_Nbr],
                [DEPARTMENT_CODE] AS [Department_Code],
                [DEPARTMENT_DESC] AS [Department_Desc],
                [PAYROLL_PROFILE_CODE] AS [Payroll_Profile_Code],
                [PAYROLL_PROFILE_DESC] AS [Payroll_Profile_Desc],
                [CORP_DEPARTMENT_CODE] AS [Corp_Department_Code],
                [CORP_DEPARTMENT_DESC] AS [Corp_Department_Desc],
                [ROLE_CODE] AS [Role_Code],
                [ROLE_DESC] AS [Role_Desc],
                [PAYCLASS_CODE] AS [Payclass_Code],
                [PAYCLASS_DESC] AS [Payclass_Desc],
                [EE_STATUS] AS [EE_Status],
                [DATE_OF_TERM] AS [Date_of_Term],
                [APPROVAL_TYPE] AS [Approval_Type],
                [DATE_APPROVED] AS [Date_Approved],
                [APPROVED_BY] AS [Approved_By],
                [APPROVAL_ADDED_DATETIME] AS [Approval_Added_DateTime],
                [DI_FILENAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[IMPORT_TIMECARD_APPROVALS]
        ),

        -- CTE_Combo2: Join Timecards to Properties and Normalize State/Dates
        CTE_Combo2 AS (
            SELECT 
                t.[DATE_KEY] AS [Date_Key],
                p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                p.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                p.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                p.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                
                -- State Logic for Join
                CASE 
                    WHEN p.[ADDRESS_STATE] IN ('CA', 'NY') THEN p.[ADDRESS_STATE] 
                    ELSE 'ALL' 
                END AS [ADDRESS_STATE],
                
                t.[EE_Code] AS [Employee_Code],
                t.[Last_Name],
                
                -- Date Conversions (String to Date to Int/String)
                -- Approval_Added_DateTime format assumption: MM/DD/YYYY HH:MI
                CAST(FORMAT(TRY_CAST(t.[Approval_Added_DateTime] AS DATETIME2), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) AS [Date_Approval_Added],
                FORMAT(TRY_CAST(t.[Approval_Added_DateTime] AS DATETIME2), 'HH:mm') AS [Time_Approval_Added],
                
                -- Date_Approved format assumption: MM/DD/YYYY
                CAST(FORMAT(TRY_CAST(t.[Date_Approved] AS DATETIME2), 'yyyyMMdd') AS INT) AS [Date_Timecard]

            FROM CTE_Timecards t
            INNER JOIN CTE_Property p ON p.[ENTITY_NUMBER] = t.[Department_Code]
        ),

        -- CTE_Combo3: Left Join to Approval Rules
        CTE_Combo3 AS (
            SELECT 
                c2.[Date_Key],
                c2.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                c2.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
                c2.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                c2.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                c2.[ADDRESS_STATE],
                c2.[Date_Timecard],
                c2.[Employee_Code],
                c2.[Date_Approval_Added],
                c2.[Time_Approval_Added],
                c2.[Last_Name],
                a.[PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
                a.[PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
                a.[PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
                a.[DATE_START],
                a.[DATE_END],
                a.[DATE_APPROVE_BY],
                a.[CUTOFF_TIME]
            FROM CTE_Combo2 c2
            LEFT OUTER JOIN CTE_Approvals a 
                ON c2.[ADDRESS_STATE] = a.[PAY_PERIOD_STATE]
                AND c2.[Date_Timecard] >= a.[DATE_START]
                AND c2.[Date_Timecard] <= a.[DATE_END]
        ),

        -- CTE_Rules: Final Logic Calculation
        CTE_Rules AS (
            SELECT 
                [Date_Key],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [ENTITY_NUMBER],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [ADDRESS_STATE],
                [Date_Timecard],
                [Employee_Code],
                [Date_Approval_Added],
                [Time_Approval_Added],
                [Last_Name],
                [PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
                [PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
                [PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
                [DATE_START],
                [DATE_END],
                [DATE_APPROVE_BY],
                [CUTOFF_TIME],
                
                -- Fail Flag Logic
                CASE 
                    WHEN [Date_Approval_Added] < [DATE_APPROVE_BY] THEN 0
                    WHEN [Date_Approval_Added] = [DATE_APPROVE_BY] AND [Time_Approval_Added] <= [CUTOFF_TIME] THEN 0
                    ELSE 1 
                END AS [Flag_Timecard_Submission_Fail]
            FROM CTE_Combo3
        )

        -- 3. Insert into Target
        INSERT INTO [TIMECARD_APPROVALS_0] (
            [Date_Key],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [ADDRESS_STATE],
            [Date_Timecard],
            [Employee_Code],
            [Date_Approval_Added],
            [Time_Approval_Added],
            [Last_Name],
            [PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
            [PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
            [PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
            [DATE_START],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATE_APPROVE_BY],
            [CUTOFF_TIME],
            [Flag_Timecard_Submission_Fail],
            [LAST_RUN_DT]
        )
        SELECT 
            [Date_Key],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [ADDRESS_STATE],
            [Date_Timecard],
            [Employee_Code],
            [Date_Approval_Added],
            [Time_Approval_Added],
            [Last_Name],
            [PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
            [PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
            [PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
            [DATE_START],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATE_APPROVE_BY],
            [CUTOFF_TIME],
            [Flag_Timecard_Submission_Fail],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM CTE_Rules;

        -- -- [REMOVED] COMMIT TRAN @@TRANCOUNT > 0 -- [REMOVED] COMMIT TRAN;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- Rollback if error
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 -- [REMOVED] ROLLBACK TRAN;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: TIMECARD_APPROVALS_FACT_SP
description: INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.TIMECARD_APPROVALS_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.TIMECARD_APPROVAL_FACTS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TIMECARD_APPROVALS_FACT_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;-- 1. DELETE Existing Rows in Target that match Source Keys (Auto Correct Logic)
        -- Matching Keys: PROPERTY_KEY, DATE_TIMECARD, EMPLOYEE_CODE
        DELETE T
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[TIMECARD_APPROVAL_FACTS] T
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[TIMECARD_APPROVALS_F] S
            ON T.[PROPERTY_KEY]  = S.[PROPERTY_KEY]
           AND T.[DATE_TIMECARD] = S.[DATE_TIMECARD]
           AND T.[EMPLOYEE_CODE] = S.[EMPLOYEE_CODE];

        -- 2. INSERT New/Updated Rows from Source
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[TIMECARD_APPROVAL_FACTS] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [DATE_TIMECARD],
            [EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            [ADDRESS_STATE],
            [CUTOFF_TIME],
            [DATE_APPROVAL_ADDED],
            [DATE_APPROVE_BY],
            [DATE_END],
            [DATE_KEY],
            [DATE_START],
            [ENTITY_NUMBER],
            [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            [FLAG_TIMECARD_SUBMISSION_FAIL],
            [LAST_NAME],
            [PAY_PERIOD_NUMBER],
            [PAY_PERIOD_STATE],
            [PAY_PERIOD_YEAR],
            [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [TIME_APPROVAL_ADDED])
        SELECT 
            S.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            S.[DATE_TIMECARD],
            S.[EMPLOYEE_CODE],
            S.[ADDRESS_STATE],
            S.[CUTOFF_TIME],
            S.[DATE_APPROVAL_ADDED],
            S.[DATE_APPROVE_BY],
            S.[DATE_END],
            S.[DATE_KEY],
            S.[DATE_START],
            S.[ENTITY_NUMBER],
            S.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            S.[FLAG_TIMECARD_SUBMISSION_FAIL],
            S.[LAST_NAME],
