name: TRANSFORM_LEASES_TESTING_SP
transformations: FLAG_MOVED_IN: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= @YesterdayDateInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MOVED_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= @YesterdayDateInt THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT: CASE WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: Unknown from WH_ODS.dbo.E_CACHED_LEASES into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[TRANSFORM_LEASES_TESTING_SP]

AS
BEGIN
    -- Fail the pipeline if we encounter an error
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        -- 1. VARIABLE DECLARATION
        --    Calculate "Yesterday" once here to avoid the 
        --    "distributed processing" error with SYSDATETIME()
        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        DECLARE @YesterdayDateInt INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(day, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        -- 2. CLEANUP
        --    Drop the table if it exists from a previous run
        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        IF OBJECT_ID('xtemp.Leases', 'U') IS NOT NULL 
            DROP TABLE xtemp.Leases;

        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        -- 3. CREATE AND LOAD (CTAS)
        --    Performance optimized; Fabric handles storage format.
        -- -----------------------------------------------------
        CREATE TABLE xtemp.Leases
        AS
        SELECT 
            ID,
            ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID,
            BUILDING_NAME,
            CID,
            COLLECTIONS_START_DATE,
            COMPANY_NAME,
            CREATED_BY,
            CREATED_ON_DATE,
            DEPOSIT_HELD,
            DISPLAY_NUMBER,
            FINANCIAL_BALANCE,
            -- FLAG_MOVED_IN logic using Variable
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <> 0 
                     AND ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) <= @YesterdayDateInt 
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END AS FLAG_MOVED_IN,
            -- FLAG_MOVED_OUT logic using Variable
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 99999999) <= @YesterdayDateInt 
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END AS FLAG_MOVED_OUT,
            -- FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT
            CASE 
                WHEN ISNULL(TRANSFER_LEASE_ID, 0) > 0 
                     AND LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID NOT IN (4,5) 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END AS FLAG_TRANSFER_OUT,
            FMO_APPROVED_ON_DATE,
            FMO_PROCESSED_ON_DATE,
            FMO_STARTED_ON_DATE,
            HAS_REPAYMENT_AGREEMENT,
            IS_MONTH_TO_MONTH,
            IS_MULTI_SLOT,
            IS_TRANSFERRING_IN,
            LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID,
            ISNULL(MOVE_IN_DATE, 0) AS MOVE_IN_DATE,
            MOVE_IN_REVIEW_COMPLETED_ON_DATE,
            ISNULL(MOVE_OUT_DATE, 0) AS MOVE_OUT_DATE,
            NAME_FIRST,
            NAME_LAST,
            NAME_MIDDLE,
            NOTICE_DATE,
            OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID,
            PAYMENT_ALLOWANCE_TYPE_ID,
            PRIMARY_CUSTOMER_ID,
            PRIMARY_PHONE_NUMBER,
            PROPERTY_ID,
            PROPERTY_NAME,
            PROPERTY_UNIT_ID,
            RENEWAL_PROMPT_MUTED_ON_DATE,
            REPAYMENT_BALANCE,
            RESIDENT_BALANCE,
            TERMINATION_LIST_TYPE_ID,
            TOTAL_BALANCE,
            TRANSFER_LEASE_ID AS TRANSFER_NEW_LEASE_ID,
            TRANSFERRED_ON_DATE,
            UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE,
            UNIT_SPACE_ID,
            UPDATED_BY,
            UPDATED_ON_DATE
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES];

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        -- If anything fails, throw the error up so the pipeline knows it failed
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: UNITS_F_SP
transformations: FLAG_0_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_1_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_2_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_3_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_4_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_5_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS: CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE: CASE WHEN S.UNIT_NUMBER LIKE '%-%' AND UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1 WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_CONVENTIONAL: CASE WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC: CASE WHEN I.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_OCCUPIED: CASE WHEN UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_STUDENT: CASE WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
FLAG_VACANT: CASE WHEN UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
FLOORPLAN_CODE: CASE WHEN P.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9753, 9744) THEN FP.FLOORPLAN_NAME ELSE UPPER(T.NAME) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_RATES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_UNIT_SPACES into WH_STAGING.dbo.UNITS_F (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNITS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @Yesterday INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @Today INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SYSDATETIME(), 112) AS INT);
    DECLARE @TodayPlus30 INT = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, 30, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_F];

        WITH
        Rates_Filtered AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID],
                [RATE_AMOUNT]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_RATES]
            WHERE [LEASE_TERM_ID] IN (202, 269)
              AND [IS_ALLOWED] = 1
              AND TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [DEACTIVATION_DATE], 112) AS INT) > @Yesterday
              AND TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [WINDOW_START_DATE], 112) AS INT) <= @TodayPlus30
              AND TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), [WINDOW_END_DATE], 112) AS INT) >= @Today
              AND [IS_RENEWAL] = 0
              AND [RATE_AMOUNT] > 0.00
              AND [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID] IS NOT NULL
        ),
        MaxRate AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_ID],
                [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID],
                MAX([RATE_AMOUNT]) AS [RATE_AMOUNT]
            FROM Rates_Filtered
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_ID], [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID]
        ),
        Spaces AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_SPACES]
            WHERE [IS_REPORTABLE] <> 0
              AND [UNIT_EXCLUSION_REASON_TYPE_ID] <> 3
        ),
        Properties AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
              AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
        ),
        Entrata_Keys AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_KEYS_0]
            WHERE [SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
        ),
        Floorplans AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_FLOORPLANS]
        ),
        Apartments AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_UNITS]
        ),
        Types AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES]
        ),
        StatusTypes AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_SPACE_STATUS_TYPES]
        ),
        Floors AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_PROPERTY_FLOORS]
        ),
        OccupancyType AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_OCCUPANCY_TYPES]
        ),
        ExclusionType AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_EXCLUSION_REASON_TYPES]
        ),
        Intervals AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_CACHED_LEASES]
        ),
        FloorplanKEYS AS (
            SELECT * FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_F]
        ),

        Combo AS (
            SELECT
                EK.[UNIT_KEY],
                S.[UNIT_NUMBER] AS [APARTMENT_NUMBER],
                ISNULL(A.[SQUARE_FEET], 0) AS [APARTMENT_SQFT],
                T.[NUMBER_OF_BATHROOMS] AS [BATHROOMS],
                T.[NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS] AS [BEDROOMS],
                CAST(T.[NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS] AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(CAST(T.[NUMBER_OF_BATHROOMS] AS DECIMAL(3,1)) AS VARCHAR) AS [BEDXBATH],
                S.[BUDGETED_RENT],
                ISNULL(S.[BUILDING_NAME], '1') AS [BUILDING],
                1 AS [COUNT],
                ISNULL(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.[AVAILABLE_ON_DATE], 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DATE_AVAILABLE],
                ISNULL(S.[CREATED_ON_DATE], 0) AS [DATE_CREATED],
                ISNULL(EK.[DATE_ADDED], 0) AS [DATE_KEY_ADDED],
                @Today AS [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                ISNULL(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.[MAKE_READY_DATE], 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DATE_MAKE_READY],
                ISNULL(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.[MOVE_OUT_DATE], 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                ISNULL(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.[RESERVE_UNTIL_DATE], 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL],
                ISNULL(TRY_CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.[UPDATED_ON_DATE], 112) AS INT), 0) AS [DATE_UPDATED],
                S.[DISPLAY_NUMBER],
                UPPER(ET.[NAME]) AS [EXCLUSION_TYPE],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_0_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_1_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_2_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_3_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_4_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_5_BEDS],
                CASE WHEN ISNULL(T.NUMBER_OF_BEDROOMS, 0) > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
                A.[IS_FURNISHED] AS [FLAG_APARTMENT_FURNISHED],
                S.[IS_AVAILABLE] AS [FLAG_AVAILABLE],
                CASE
                    WHEN S.UNIT_NUMBER LIKE '%-%' AND UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1
                    WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'STUDENT' THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE],
                CASE WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'CONVENTIONAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
                0 AS [FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED],
                S.[IS_MARKETED] AS [FLAG_MARKETED],
                CASE
                    WHEN I.LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID = 2 AND UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 1
                    ELSE 0
                END AS [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
                CASE WHEN UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                S.[IS_PRICING_SYNCED] AS [FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED],
                S.[IS_REPORTABLE] AS [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                S.[SHOW_ON_WEBSITE] AS [FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE],
                CASE WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'STUDENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_STUDENT],
                CASE WHEN UPPER(ST.NAME) IN ('NOTICE UNRENTED','OCCUPIED NO NOTICE','NOTICE RENTED') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS [FLAG_VACANT],
                ISNULL(FL.[FLOOR_NUMBER], 1) AS [FLOOR],
                FP.[FLOORPLAN_NAME] AS [FLOORPLAN],
                CASE
                    WHEN P.PROPERTY_KEY IN (9753, 9744) THEN FP.FLOORPLAN_NAME
                    ELSE UPPER(T.NAME)
                END AS [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                FP.[ID] AS [FLOORPLAN_ID],
                FK.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                ISNULL(FP.[MAX_SQUARE_FEET], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_MAX_SQFT],
                ISNULL(FP.[MIN_SQUARE_FEET], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_MIN_SQFT],
                ISNULL(MR.[RATE_AMOUNT], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_RATE_MAX],
                ISNULL(S.[CURRENT_LEASE_ID], 0) AS [LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
                ISNULL(S.[FUTURE_LEASE_ID], 0) AS [LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
                ISNULL(I.[ACTIVE_LEASE_INTERVAL_ID], 0) AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
                I.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
                I.[LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
                I.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
                I.[LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
                ISNULL(
                    CASE
                        WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'CORPORATE / SHOW MINI MODEL' THEN 'CORPORATE'
                        WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'VIP UNIT' THEN 'CORPORATE'
                        WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'STUDENT' THEN 'STUDENT LIVING'
                        WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) LIKE 'STORAGE%' THEN 'STORAGE'
                        WHEN UPPER(OT.NAME) = 'MAJOR A/C REPAIR' THEN 'OFFLINE'
                        ELSE UPPER(OT.NAME)
                    END, '--'
                ) AS [OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
                P.[DATE_ADDED_TO_DW] AS [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
                P.[DATE_DISPOSITIONED] AS [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] AS [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] AS [PROPERTY_ID],
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                P.[PROPERTY_NAME],
                EK.[SOURCE_SYSTEM],
                S.[SPACE_NUMBER] AS [SPACE],
                S.[ID] AS [SPACE_ID],
                REPLACE(S.[UNIT_NUMBER_CACHE], '-', '') AS [SPACE_NUMBER],
                UPPER(ST.[NAME]) AS [STATUS],
                EK.[UNIT_ID],
                T.[NAME] AS [UNIT_TYPE],
                S.[UNIT_TYPE_ID]
            FROM Spaces S
            INNER JOIN Properties P ON P.LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID = S.PROPERTY_ID
            INNER JOIN Entrata_Keys EK ON EK.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY AND EK.UNIT_ID = S.ID
            INNER JOIN Floorplans FP ON S.PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID = FP.ID
            LEFT JOIN Apartments A ON S.PROPERTY_UNIT_ID = A.ID
            INNER JOIN Types T ON S.UNIT_TYPE_ID = T.ID
            INNER JOIN StatusTypes ST ON S.UNIT_SPACE_STATUS_TYPE_ID = ST.ID
            LEFT JOIN Floors FL ON S.PROPERTY_FLOOR_ID = FL.ID
            LEFT JOIN OccupancyType OT ON S.OCCUPANCY_TYPE_ID = OT.ID
            LEFT JOIN ExclusionType ET ON S.UNIT_EXCLUSION_REASON_TYPE_ID = ET.ID
            LEFT JOIN Intervals I ON S.CURRENT_LEASE_ID = I.ID
            LEFT JOIN MaxRate MR ON S.PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID = MR.PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID
            LEFT JOIN FloorplanKEYS FK ON FK.PROPERTY_KEY = P.PROPERTY_KEY AND FK.FLOORPLAN_ID = S.PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID
        ),

        LegacyUnits AS (
            SELECT
                [UNIT_KEY],
                [APARTMENT_NUMBER],
                ISNULL([APARTMENT_SQFT], 0) AS [APARTMENT_SQFT],
                [BATHROOMS],
                [BEDROOMS],
                [BEDXBATH],
                [BUDGETED_RENT],
                [BUILDING],
                [COUNT],
                ISNULL([DATE_AVAILABLE], 0) AS [DATE_AVAILABLE],
                ISNULL([DATE_CREATED], 0) AS [DATE_CREATED],
                ISNULL([DATE_KEY_ADDED], 0) AS [DATE_KEY_ADDED],
                ISNULL([DATE_LAST_UPDATED], 0) AS [DATE_LAST_UPDATED],
                ISNULL([DATE_MAKE_READY], 0) AS [DATE_MAKE_READY],
                ISNULL([DATE_MOVE_OUT], 0) AS [DATE_MOVE_OUT],
                ISNULL([DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL], 0) AS [DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL],
                ISNULL([DATE_UPDATED], 0) AS [DATE_UPDATED],
                [UNIT_KEY] AS [DISPLAY_NUMBER],
                [EXCLUSION_TYPE],
                [FLAG_0_BEDS],
                [FLAG_1_BEDS],
                [FLAG_2_BEDS],
                [FLAG_3_BEDS],
                [FLAG_4_BEDS],
                [FLAG_5_BEDS],
                [FLAG_6+_BEDS] AS [FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
                [FLAG_APARTMENT_FURNISHED],
                [FLAG_AVAILABLE],
                0 AS [FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE],
                [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
                ISNULL([FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED], 0) AS [FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED],
                [FLAG_MARKETED],
                0 AS [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
                [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                [FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED],
                [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
                [FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE],
                [FLAG_STUDENT],
                [FLAG_VACANT],
                [FLOOR],
                [FLOORPLAN],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_ID],
                [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                ISNULL([FLOORPLAN_MAX_SQFT], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_MAX_SQFT],
                ISNULL([FLOORPLAN_MIN_SQFT], 0) AS [FLOORPLAN_MIN_SQFT],
                ISNULL([FLOORPLAN_RATE_MAX], 0.00) AS [FLOORPLAN_RATE_MAX],
                ISNULL([LEASE_ID_CURRENT], 0) AS [LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
                ISNULL([LEASE_ID_FUTURE], 0) AS [LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
                ISNULL([LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT], 0) AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
                NULL AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE],
                NULL AS [LEASE_INTERVAL_TYPE_ID],
                NULL AS [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE],
                NULL AS [LEASE_STATUS_TYPE_ID],
                [OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
                [PROPERTY_DATE_ADDED_TO_DW],
                [PROPERTY_DATE_DISPOSITIONED],
                [PROPERTY_FLAG_DISPOSITIONED],
                0 AS [PROPERTY_ID],
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [PROPERTY_NAME],
                [SOURCE_SYSTEM],
                [SPACE],
                0 AS [SPACE_ID],
                [SPACE_NUMBER],
                [STATUS],
                [UNIT_ID],
                NULL AS [UNIT_TYPE],
                NULL AS [UNIT_TYPE_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNITS_LEGACY_GROUP_F]
        ),

        Final_Set AS (
            SELECT
                [UNIT_KEY], [APARTMENT_NUMBER], [APARTMENT_SQFT], [BATHROOMS], [BEDROOMS], [BEDXBATH],
                [BUDGETED_RENT], [BUILDING], [COUNT], [DATE_AVAILABLE], [DATE_CREATED], [DATE_KEY_ADDED],
                [DATE_LAST_UPDATED], [DATE_MAKE_READY], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL], [DATE_UPDATED],
                [DISPLAY_NUMBER], [EXCLUSION_TYPE], [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], [FLAG_3_BEDS],
                [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS], [FLAG_APARTMENT_FURNISHED], [FLAG_AVAILABLE],

name: UNIT_FACTS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_PROD2.dbo.UNIT_FACTS into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNIT_FACTS_SP] AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    WITH Source_Data AS (
        SELECT
            [BUDGETED_RENT], [COUNT], [DATE_AVAILABLE], [DATE_KEY],
            [DATE_MAKE_READY], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL], [DATE_UPDATED],
            [EXCLUSION_TYPE],
            [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], [FLAG_3_BEDS],
            [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
            [FLAG_AVAILABLE], [FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE], [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
            [FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED], [FLAG_MARKETED], [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
            [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
            [FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE], [FLAG_STUDENT], [FLAG_VACANT],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [LEASE_ID_CURRENT], [LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
            [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT], [OCCUPANCY_TYPE], [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [STATUS], [UNIT_KEY],
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [UNIT_KEY] ORDER BY (SELECT NULL)) AS rn
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS]
    )

    MERGE INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS] AS Target
    USING (SELECT * FROM Source_Data WHERE rn = 1) AS Source
    ON Target.[UNIT_KEY] = Source.[UNIT_KEY]

    WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
        Target.[BUDGETED_RENT]             = Source.[BUDGETED_RENT],
        Target.[COUNT]                     = Source.[COUNT],
        Target.[DATE_AVAILABLE]            = Source.[DATE_AVAILABLE],
        Target.[DATE_KEY]                  = Source.[DATE_KEY],
        Target.[DATE_MAKE_READY]           = Source.[DATE_MAKE_READY],
        Target.[DATE_MOVE_OUT]             = Source.[DATE_MOVE_OUT],
        Target.[DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL]        = Source.[DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL],
        Target.[DATE_UPDATED]              = Source.[DATE_UPDATED],
        Target.[EXCLUSION_TYPE]            = Source.[EXCLUSION_TYPE],
        Target.[FLAG_0_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_0_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_1_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_1_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_2_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_2_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_3_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_3_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_4_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_4_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_5_BEDS]               = Source.[FLAG_5_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS]           = Source.[FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
        Target.[FLAG_AVAILABLE]            = Source.[FLAG_AVAILABLE],
        Target.[FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE]       = Source.[FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE],
        Target.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL]         = Source.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
        Target.[FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED]      = Source.[FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED],
        Target.[FLAG_MARKETED]             = Source.[FLAG_MARKETED],
        Target.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC]      = Source.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
        Target.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]             = Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
        Target.[FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED]       = Source.[FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED],
        Target.[FLAG_REPORTABLE]           = Source.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        Target.[FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE]      = Source.[FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE],
        Target.[FLAG_STUDENT]              = Source.[FLAG_STUDENT],
        Target.[FLAG_VACANT]               = Source.[FLAG_VACANT],
        Target.[FLOORPLAN_KEY]             = Source.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
        Target.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT]          = Source.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT],
        Target.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE]           = Source.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
        Target.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT] = Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT],
        Target.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE]            = Source.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE],
        Target.[PROPERTY_KEY]              = Source.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        Target.[STATUS]                    = Source.[STATUS]

    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
        [BUDGETED_RENT], [COUNT], [DATE_AVAILABLE], [DATE_KEY],
        [DATE_MAKE_READY], [DATE_MOVE_OUT], [DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL], [DATE_UPDATED],
        [EXCLUSION_TYPE],
        [FLAG_0_BEDS], [FLAG_1_BEDS], [FLAG_2_BEDS], [FLAG_3_BEDS],
        [FLAG_4_BEDS], [FLAG_5_BEDS], [FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
        [FLAG_AVAILABLE], [FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE], [FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
        [FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED], [FLAG_MARKETED], [FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
        [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED], [FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        [FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE], [FLAG_STUDENT], [FLAG_VACANT],
        [FLOORPLAN_KEY], [LEASE_ID_CURRENT], [LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
        [LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT], [OCCUPANCY_TYPE], [PROPERTY_KEY],
        [STATUS], [UNIT_KEY]
    ) VALUES (
        Source.[BUDGETED_RENT], Source.[COUNT], Source.[DATE_AVAILABLE], Source.[DATE_KEY],
        Source.[DATE_MAKE_READY], Source.[DATE_MOVE_OUT], Source.[DATE_RESERVE_UNTIL], Source.[DATE_UPDATED],
        Source.[EXCLUSION_TYPE],
        Source.[FLAG_0_BEDS], Source.[FLAG_1_BEDS], Source.[FLAG_2_BEDS], Source.[FLAG_3_BEDS],
        Source.[FLAG_4_BEDS], Source.[FLAG_5_BEDS], Source.[FLAG_6PLUS_BEDS],
        Source.[FLAG_AVAILABLE], Source.[FLAG_COLIVING_SPACE], Source.[FLAG_CONVENTIONAL],
        Source.[FLAG_ENTRATA_DELETED], Source.[FLAG_MARKETED], Source.[FLAG_MTM_CURRENT_OCC],
        Source.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], Source.[FLAG_PRICING_SYNCED], Source.[FLAG_REPORTABLE],
        Source.[FLAG_SHOW_ON_WEBSITE], Source.[FLAG_STUDENT], Source.[FLAG_VACANT],
        Source.[FLOORPLAN_KEY], Source.[LEASE_ID_CURRENT], Source.[LEASE_ID_FUTURE],
        Source.[LEASE_INTERVAL_ID_CURRENT], Source.[OCCUPANCY_TYPE], Source.[PROPERTY_KEY],
        Source.[STATUS], Source.[UNIT_KEY]
    );

END;

name: UNIT_KEYS_0_ADDNEW_SP
description: INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_UNIT_SPACES, WH_STAGING.dbo.PROPERTY_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.UNIT_KEYS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNIT_KEYS_0_ADDNEW_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    DECLARE @MaxKey INT = 0;
    DECLARE @InsertDate INT;

    -- Calculate "Yesterday" integer date once (YYYYMMDD)
    SET @InsertDate = CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, SYSDATETIME()), 112) AS INT);

    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. GET CURRENT MAX KEY
        -- Simulates ATL key_generation() behavior
        SELECT @MaxKey = ISNULL(MAX([UNIT_KEY]), 0) 
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_KEYS_0];

        -- 2. DEFINE SOURCE CTEs
        WITH Source_Spaces AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID], 
                [PROPERTY_ID]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_SPACES]
            WHERE [DELETED_ON_DATE] IS NULL 
            -- Note: [ENTRATA_DELETED_FLAG] removed as it does not exist in ODS
        ),
        
        Source_Properties AS (
            SELECT 
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                [LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_F]
            WHERE [SOURCE_SYSTEM] = 'ENTRATA'
              AND [FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
              AND ISNULL([FLAG_TENTATIVE], 0) = 0
        ),

        -- 3. LOGIC: IDENTIFY NEW RECORDS
        -- Join Properties + Spaces, then Left Join existing Keys to find missing ones
        New_Records AS (
            SELECT 
                P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                S.[ID] AS [UNIT_ID]
            FROM Source_Properties P
            INNER JOIN Source_Spaces S 
                ON P.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID] = S.[PROPERTY_ID]
            LEFT JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_KEYS_0] K 
                ON S.[ID] = K.[UNIT_ID] 
                AND P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = K.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            WHERE K.[UNIT_KEY] IS NULL -- Filter where key does not exist
        )

        -- 4. INSERT NEW KEYS
        -- Generates UNIT_KEY using ROW_NUMBER() + @MaxKey
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_KEYS_0] (
            [UNIT_KEY],
            [LEGACY_UNIT_KEY],
            [DATE_ADDED],
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            [SOURCE_SYSTEM],
            [UNIT_ID],
            [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            @MaxKey + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY N.[PROPERTY_KEY], N.[UNIT_ID]) AS [UNIT_KEY],
            NULL AS [LEGACY_UNIT_KEY],
            @InsertDate AS [DATE_ADDED],
            N.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            'ENTRATA' AS [SOURCE_SYSTEM],
            N.[UNIT_ID],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM New_Records N;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0_ONBOARDS_SP
description: MERGE (upsert) from WH_PROD2.dbo.UNIT_FACTS, WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY into unknown target (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0_ONBOARDS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- !! ANNUAL MAINTENANCE REQUIRED !!
    -- AY and CutoffDate are hard-coded per ATL design.
    -- Both must be updated each year after the AY Cutover process (runs Oct 1).
    DECLARE @AY         INT = 2022;
    DECLARE @CutoffDate INT = 20220904;  -- DATE_KEY must be > this value

    -- CTE 1: Earliest recorded DATE_KEY per property in UNIT_FACTS
    WITH CTE_MinDate AS (
        SELECT
            [PROPERTY_KEY],
            MIN([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY]
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS]
        GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
    ),

    -- CTE 2: Aggregate occupancy totals at each property's earliest date
    CTE_Totals AS (
        SELECT
            md.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            md.[DATE_KEY],
            SUM(uf.[COUNT])         AS [COUNT],
            SUM(uf.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]) AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            SUM(uf.[FLAG_VACANT])   AS [FLAG_VACANT]
        FROM CTE_MinDate md
        INNER JOIN [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS] uf
            ON  md.[PROPERTY_KEY] = uf.[PROPERTY_KEY]
            AND md.[DATE_KEY]     = uf.[DATE_KEY]
        GROUP BY md.[PROPERTY_KEY], md.[DATE_KEY]
    ),

    -- CTE 3: Final source — non-dispositioned properties with onboard snapshot,
    --        filtered to dates after cutoff to remove pre-onboard noise
    CTE_Source AS (
        SELECT
            t.[DATE_KEY],
            p.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            @AY                         AS [AY],
            LEFT(p.[PROPERTY_NAME], 50) AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            1                           AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_AY],
            t.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            t.[FLAG_VACANT]
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY] p
        INNER JOIN CTE_Totals t
            ON p.[PROPERTY_KEY] = t.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        WHERE p.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND t.[DATE_KEY] > @CutoffDate
    )

    -- UPSERT: keys are DATE_KEY + PROPERTY_KEY
    MERGE INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0] AS TGT
    USING CTE_Source AS SRC
        ON  TGT.[DATE_KEY]     = SRC.[DATE_KEY]
        AND TGT.[PROPERTY_KEY] = SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY]

    WHEN MATCHED THEN
        UPDATE SET
            TGT.[AY]             = SRC.[AY],
            TGT.[PROPERTY_NAME]  = SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            TGT.[FLAG_ACTIVE_AY] = SRC.[FLAG_ACTIVE_AY],
            TGT.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]  = SRC.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            TGT.[FLAG_VACANT]    = SRC.[FLAG_VACANT]

    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_AY], [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_VACANT]
        )
        VALUES (
            SRC.[DATE_KEY], SRC.[PROPERTY_KEY], SRC.[AY], SRC.[PROPERTY_NAME],
            SRC.[FLAG_ACTIVE_AY], SRC.[FLAG_OCCUPIED], SRC.[FLAG_VACANT]
        );

END

name: UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_PROD2.dbo.UNIT_FACTS, WH_PROD2.dbo.PROPERTY into WH_STAGING.dbo.UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    DECLARE @FilterDateKey INT = 20220904;
    DECLARE @CurrentAY INT = 2022;

    BEGIN TRY
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0];

        WITH MinDate_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                [PROPERTY_KEY],
                MIN([DATE_KEY]) AS [DATE_KEY]
            FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS]
            GROUP BY [PROPERTY_KEY]
        ),
        Totals_CTE AS (
            SELECT
                M.[PROPERTY_KEY],
                M.[DATE_KEY],
                SUM(F.[COUNT]) AS [COUNT],
                SUM(F.[FLAG_OCCUPIED]) AS [FLAG_OCCUPIED],
                SUM(F.[FLAG_VACANT]) AS [FLAG_VACANT]
            FROM MinDate_CTE M
            INNER JOIN [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[UNIT_FACTS] F
                ON M.[PROPERTY_KEY] = F.[PROPERTY_KEY]
                AND M.[DATE_KEY] = F.[DATE_KEY]
            GROUP BY M.[PROPERTY_KEY], M.[DATE_KEY]
        )
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_OCCUPANCY_SNAPSHOT_0] (
            [DATE_KEY], [PROPERTY_KEY], [AY], [PROPERTY_NAME],
            [FLAG_ACTIVE_AY], [FLAG_OCCUPIED], [FLAG_VACANT]
        )
        SELECT
            T.[DATE_KEY],
            P.[PROPERTY_KEY],
            @CurrentAY AS [AY],
            SUBSTRING(P.[PROPERTY_NAME], 1, 50) AS [PROPERTY_NAME],
            1 AS [FLAG_ACTIVE_AY],
            T.[FLAG_OCCUPIED],
            T.[FLAG_VACANT]
        FROM [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[PROPERTY] P
        INNER JOIN Totals_CTE T ON P.[PROPERTY_KEY] = T.[PROPERTY_KEY]
        WHERE P.[FLAG_DISPOSITIONED] = 0
          AND T.[DATE_KEY] > @FilterDateKey;

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: UNIT_TYPES_0_SP
transformations: FLOORPLAN: CASE WHEN F.[FLOORPLAN] = 'DELETED TYPE' THEN U.[NAME] ELSE ISNULL(F.[FLOORPLAN], U.[NAME]) END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_UNIT_TYPES, WH_STAGING.dbo.FLOORPLANS_0 into WH_STAGING.dbo.UNIT_TYPES_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[UNIT_TYPES_0_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRANSACTION;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET (Full Load)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_TYPES_0];

        -- 2. DEFINE CTEs
        WITH UnitTypes_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                [ID] AS [Unit_Type_ID],
                [PROPERTY_FLOORPLAN_ID] AS [FLOORPLAN_ID],
                [NAME]
            FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_UNIT_TYPES]
        ),

        Floorplans_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                MAX([FLOORPLAN_KEY]) AS [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                [FLOORPLAN],
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                [FLOORPLAN_ID]
            FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[FLOORPLANS_0]
            WHERE [PROPERTY_KEY] <> 1109
            GROUP BY 
                [FLOORPLAN], 
                [FLOORPLAN_CODE], 
                [FLOORPLAN_ID]
        ),

        Combo_CTE AS (
            SELECT 
                U.[Unit_Type_ID] AS [UNIT_TYPE_ID],
                -- ATL decode logic: if FLOORPLAN is 'DELETED TYPE', use NAME, else use FLOORPLAN (or NAME if null)
                CASE 
                    WHEN F.[FLOORPLAN] = 'DELETED TYPE' THEN U.[NAME]
                    ELSE ISNULL(F.[FLOORPLAN], U.[NAME])
                END AS [FLOORPLAN],
                F.[FLOORPLAN] AS [FLOORPLAN_ACTUAL],
                F.[FLOORPLAN_CODE],
                U.[FLOORPLAN_ID],
                F.[FLOORPLAN_KEY],
                U.[NAME] AS [FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE]
            FROM UnitTypes_CTE U
            LEFT JOIN Floorplans_CTE F 
                ON U.[FLOORPLAN_ID] = F.[FLOORPLAN_ID]
        )

        -- 3. INSERT INTO TARGET
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[UNIT_TYPES_0] (
            [UNIT_TYPE_ID],
            [FLOORPLAN],
            [FLOORPLAN_ACTUAL],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [FLOORPLAN_ID],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE],
            [LASTUPDATED]
        )
        SELECT 
            [UNIT_TYPE_ID],
            [FLOORPLAN],
            [FLOORPLAN_ACTUAL],
            [FLOORPLAN_CODE],
            [FLOORPLAN_ID],
            [FLOORPLAN_KEY],
            [FLOORPLAN_UNIT_TYPE],
            SYSDATETIME()
        FROM Combo_CTE;

        COMMIT TRANSACTION;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
            ROLLBACK TRANSACTION;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END;

name: WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0_SP
transformations: UNIT_NUMBER_EXCLUSION_FLAG: CASE WHEN RIGHT(d.[UNIT_NUMBER], 1) = '*' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CANCELLED_COUNT: CASE WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
COMPLETED_COUNT: CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
IN_PROGRESS_COUNT: CASE WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES: CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 240 WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0 ELSE 0 END
ON_HOLD_FLAG: CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT: CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) ELSE 0 END

ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES: CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) ELSE 0 END

NET_ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES: CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) ELSE 0 END

NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES: CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 240 WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0 ELSE 0 END) < 0 THEN 240 ELSE (CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 240 WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0 ELSE 0 END) - ISNULL(wknd.[Weekend_Day_Count_Minutes], 0) - (CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime]) WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) ELSE 0 END) END

FLAG_OPEN_DAY_VIOLATION: CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 1 WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()) < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_ODS.dbo.E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES, WH_ODS.dbo.E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS into WH_STAGING.dbo.WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0 (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0_SP]
AS

-- !! DEPRECATED 2026-04-01: Canonical version migrated to WH_ODS. This staging copy pending cleanup. !!
-- !! Do not modify this copy. Make changes to WH_ODS.dbo.WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0_SP instead. !!

BEGIN
    TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0];

    -- CTE 1: Pivot E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS to get first date per status per request
    WITH StatusLookup AS (
        SELECT [ID] AS status_id,
               [NAME] AS status_name
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES]
    ),
    LogPivot AS (
        SELECT
            rl.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID] AS maintenance_request_id,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'COMPLETE' OR sl.status_name = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATE] END) AS COMPLETED_created_on_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'COMPLETE' OR sl.status_name = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] END) AS COMPLETED_created_on_dateid,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'COMPLETE' OR sl.status_name = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] END) AS COMPLETED_created_on_datetime,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'CANCELLED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATE] END) AS CANCELLED_created_on_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'CANCELLED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] END) AS CANCELLED_created_on_dateid,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'CANCELLED'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] END) AS CANCELLED_created_on_datetime,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'ON HOLD'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATE] END) AS ON_HOLD_created_on_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'ON HOLD'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] END) AS ON_HOLD_created_on_dateid,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'ON HOLD'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] END) AS ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'NEW'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATE] END) AS NEW_created_on_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'NEW'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] END) AS NEW_created_on_dateid,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'NEW'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] END) AS NEW_created_on_datetime,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'OPEN'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATE] END) AS OPEN_created_on_date,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'OPEN'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATEID] END) AS OPEN_created_on_dateid,
            MIN(CASE WHEN sl.status_name = 'OPEN'
                THEN rl.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] END) AS OPEN_created_on_datetime
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS] rl
        INNER JOIN StatusLookup sl ON rl.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = sl.status_id
        GROUP BY rl.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
    ),
    -- CTE 2: Weekend day counts (count Sat/Sun between CREATED_ON_DATE and Sysdate/COMPLETED for open/on-hold)
    WeekendCounts AS (
        SELECT
            r2.[ID] AS maintenance_request_id,
            COUNT(*) AS Weekend_Day_Count,
            COUNT(*) * 1440 AS Weekend_Day_Count_Minutes
        FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS] r2
        INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F] df
            ON df.[DATE_KEY] >= r2.[CREATED_ON_DATE]
            AND df.[DATE_KEY] <= CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()), 112) AS INT)
            AND (df.[DAY_OF_WEEK] = 6 OR df.[DAY_OF_WEEK] = 7)
        WHERE (
            -- Only for open or on-hold requests
            r2.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] IN (
                SELECT [ID] FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES]
                WHERE [NAME] = 'OPEN'
            )
            OR r2.[ID] IN (
                SELECT rl3.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
                FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_LOGS] rl3
                INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES] s3
                    ON rl3.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = s3.[ID]
                WHERE s3.[NAME] = 'ON HOLD'
            )
        )
        AND r2.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPE_ID] = 2
        AND r2.[CREATED_ON_DATE] >= 20220101
        GROUP BY r2.[ID]
    )
    INSERT INTO [dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_0]
        ([PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_NUMBER], [ACTUAL_COMPLETED_BY], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATEID], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATETIME], [BUILDING_ID], [BUILDING_NUMBER], [CANCEL_DATE], [CANCEL_DATEID], [CANCEL_DATETIME], [CANCELLED_BY], [COMMON_AREA_NAME], [COMPLETED_DATE], [COMPLETE_TIME], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_DATE], [CREATED_DATEID], [CREATED_DATETIME], [ENTRY_RELATED_NOTES], [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATE], [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATETIME], [FLOORPLAN_GROUPNAME], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], [FORMER_RESIDENT], [LOCATION_TYPE], [MADE_READY_FLAG], [MAKE_READY_START_DATE], [MAKE_READY_START_DATETIME], [MAKE_READY_START_TIME], [MODIFIED_BY], [MODIFIED_DATE], [MODIFIED_DATETIME], [MOVEIN_DATE], [MOVEOUT_DATE], [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATE], [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATETIME], [ONHOLD_DATE], [ONHOLD_DATEID], [ONHOLD_DATETIME], [PENDING_RESIDENT], [PERMISSION_TO_ENTER_FLAG], [PREFERRED_START_DATE], [PREFERRED_START_DATETIME], [PRIORITY], [PROPERTY_NUMBER], [REQUEST_TIME], [RESIDENT_HOUSEHOLD_ID], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_EMAIL], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_ID], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_PHONE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATEID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATETIME], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_NAME], [STATUS], [STATUS_DETAIL], [TECHNICIAN_NAME], [TIME_RANGE_END], [TIME_RANGE_START], [TYPE], [UNIT_ID], [UNIT_NUMBER], [UNIT_NUMBER_EXCLUSION_FLAG], [WORKORDER_NUMBER], [SERVICE_REQUEST_COUNT], [CANCELLED_COUNT], [COMPLETED_COUNT], [IN_PROGRESS_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [DAYS_BETWEEN_CREATION_AND_ONHOLD], [DAYS_SINCE_ON_HOLD_TOTAL], [ON_HOLD_FLAG], [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT], [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [NET_ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [WEEKEND_DAY_COUNT], [WEEKEND_MINUTE_COUNT], [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [FLAG_OPEN_DAY_VIOLATION], [SERVICE_PROBLEM], [REQUESTOR_NAME])
    SELECT

        p.[PROPERTY_KEY] AS [PROPERTY_KEY],
        r.[PROPERTY_ID] AS [PROPERTY_ID],
        r.[ID] AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_ID],
        NULL AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_NUMBER],
        NULL AS [ACTUAL_COMPLETED_BY],
        ISNULL(lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_date], 0) AS [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE],
        ISNULL(lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_dateid], 0) AS [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATEID],
        lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] AS [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATETIME],
        r.[PROPERTY_BUILDING_ID] AS [BUILDING_ID],
        NULL AS [BUILDING_NUMBER],
        ISNULL(lg.[CANCELLED_created_on_date], 0) AS [CANCEL_DATE],
        ISNULL(lg.[CANCELLED_created_on_dateid], 0) AS [CANCEL_DATEID],
        lg.[CANCELLED_created_on_datetime] AS [CANCEL_DATETIME],
        NULL AS [CANCELLED_BY],
        NULL AS [COMMON_AREA_NAME],
        lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] AS [COMPLETED_DATE],
        NULL AS [COMPLETE_TIME],
        CAST(r.[CREATED_BY] AS VARCHAR(50)) AS [CREATED_BY],
        ISNULL(r.[CREATED_ON_DATE], 0) AS [CREATED_DATE],
        ISNULL(r.[CREATED_ON_DATEID], 0) AS [CREATED_DATEID],
        r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AS [CREATED_DATETIME],

        r.[UPDATED_ON_DATETIME] AS [MODIFIED_DATETIME],
        NULL AS [MOVEIN_DATE],
        NULL AS [MOVEOUT_DATE],
        NULL AS [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATE],
        NULL AS [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATETIME],
        ISNULL(lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_date], 0) AS [ONHOLD_DATE],
        ISNULL(lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_dateid], 0) AS [ONHOLD_DATEID],
        lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] AS [ONHOLD_DATETIME],
        NULL AS [PENDING_RESIDENT],
        NULL AS [PERMISSION_TO_ENTER_FLAG],
        NULL AS [PREFERRED_START_DATE],
        NULL AS [PREFERRED_START_DATETIME],
        ISNULL(mp.[NAME], '--') AS [PRIORITY],
        p.[ENTITY_NUMBER] AS [PROPERTY_NUMBER],
        NULL AS [REQUEST_TIME],
        NULL AS [RESIDENT_HOUSEHOLD_ID],
        NULL AS [RESIDENT_MEMBER_EMAIL],
        NULL AS [RESIDENT_MEMBER_ID],
        d.[MAIN_PHONE_NUMBER] AS [RESIDENT_MEMBER_PHONE],
        ISNULL(r.[CREATED_ON_DATE], 0) AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATE],
        ISNULL(r.[CREATED_ON_DATEID], 0) AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATEID],
        r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATETIME],
        NULL AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_ID],
        NULL AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_NAME],
        ISNULL(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END, '--') AS [STATUS],
        NULL AS [STATUS_DETAIL],
        NULL AS [TECHNICIAN_NAME],
        NULL AS [TIME_RANGE_END],
        NULL AS [TIME_RANGE_START],
        'Service Request' AS [TYPE],
        r.[UNIT_SPACE_ID] AS [UNIT_ID],
        ISNULL(d.[UNIT_NUMBER], '--') AS [UNIT_NUMBER],
        CASE WHEN RIGHT(d.[UNIT_NUMBER], 1) = '*' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [UNIT_NUMBER_EXCLUSION_FLAG],
        NULL AS [WORKORDER_NUMBER],
        1 AS [SERVICE_REQUEST_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [CANCELLED_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [COMPLETED_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [IN_PROGRESS_COUNT],
        ROUND(CAST((CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1440.0, 2) AS [OPEN_DAY_COUNT],
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END AS [OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES],
        ISNULL(lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_dateid], 0) - ISNULL(r.[CREATED_ON_DATEID], 0) AS [DAYS_BETWEEN_CREATION_AND_ONHOLD],
        ISNULL(lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_dateid], 0) - DATEDIFF(DAY, '1900-01-01', DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE())) AS [DAYS_SINCE_ON_HOLD_TOTAL],
        CASE WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS [ON_HOLD_FLAG],
        CASE
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(DAY, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            ELSE 0 END AS [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT],
        CASE
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            ELSE 0 END AS [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES],
        CASE
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            ELSE 0 END AS [NET_ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES],
        ISNULL(wknd.[Weekend_Day_Count], 0) AS [WEEKEND_DAY_COUNT],
        ISNULL(wknd.[Weekend_Day_Count_Minutes], 0) AS [WEEKEND_MINUTE_COUNT],
        ROUND(CAST((CASE WHEN (CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END) < 0 THEN 240
        ELSE (CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END) - ISNULL(wknd.[Weekend_Day_Count_Minutes], 0) - (CASE
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            ELSE 0 END)
        END) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 1440.0, 2) AS [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT],
        CASE WHEN (CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END) < 0 THEN 240
        ELSE (CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] >= r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME]
                THEN 240
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'CANCELLED' THEN 0
            ELSE 0 END) - ISNULL(wknd.[Weekend_Day_Count_Minutes], 0) - (CASE
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime])
            WHEN lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime] IS NOT NULL
                THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, lg.[ON_HOLD_created_on_datetime], DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()))
            ELSE 0 END)
        END AS [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES],
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(CASE WHEN ms.[NAME] = 'COMPLETE' THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE ms.[NAME] END) = 'COMPLETED'
                AND lg.[COMPLETED_created_on_datetime] < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 1
            WHEN UPPER(ms.[NAME]) = 'OPEN'
                AND DATEADD(DAY, -1, GETDATE()) < r.[CREATED_ON_DATETIME] THEN 1
            ELSE 0 END AS [FLAG_OPEN_DAY_VIOLATION],
        d.[PROBLEM_DESCRIPTION] AS [SERVICE_PROBLEM],
        ISNULL(d.[CUSTOMER_NAME_FIRST] + ' ' + d.[CUSTOMER_NAME_LAST], '--') AS [REQUESTOR_NAME]
    FROM [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUESTS] r
    INNER JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_DETAILS] d
        ON r.[ID] = d.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PRIORITIES] mp
        ON r.[MAINTENANCE_PRIORITY_ID] = mp.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_STATUSES] ms
        ON r.[MAINTENANCE_STATUS_ID] = ms.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_LOCATIONS] ml
        ON r.[MAINTENANCE_LOCATION_ID] = ml.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN [WH_ODS].[dbo].[E_MAINTENANCE_PROBLEMS] mb
        ON r.[MAINTENANCE_PROBLEM_ID] = mb.[ID]
    LEFT JOIN LogPivot lg
        ON r.[ID] = lg.maintenance_request_id
    INNER JOIN [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[PROPERTY_0] p
        ON r.[PROPERTY_ID] = p.[LEGACY_ENTRATA_ID]
    LEFT JOIN WeekendCounts wknd
        ON r.[ID] = wknd.maintenance_request_id
    WHERE p.[FLAG_REPORTABLE] = 1
        AND p.[FLAG_SUBPROPERTY] = 0
        AND (r.[ENTRATA_DELETED_FLAG] = 0 OR r.[ENTRATA_DELETED_FLAG] IS NULL)
        AND r.[MAINTENANCE_REQUEST_TYPE_ID] = 2
        AND r.[CREATED_ON_DATE] >= 20220101;
END

name: WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_F into WH_PROD2.dbo.WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS (cross-database).
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    BEGIN TRY
        -- 1. Clear the destination table
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS];

        -- 2. Insert with forced truncation to match Target (Prod) limits
        INSERT INTO [WH_PROD2].[dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS] (
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_ID], [SERVICEREQUESTID_EXCLUSION], [SERVICE_REQUEST_NUMBER], 
            [ACTUAL_COMPLETED_BY], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATEID], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATETIME], 
            [BUILDING_ID], [BUILDING_NUMBER], [CANCEL_DATE], [CANCEL_DATEID], [CANCEL_DATETIME], [CANCELLED_BY], 
            [COMMON_AREA_NAME], [COMPLETED_DATE], [COMPLETE_TIME], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_DATE], [CREATED_DATEID], 
            [CREATED_DATETIME], [ENTRY_RELATED_NOTES], [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATE], [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATETIME], 
            [FLOORPLAN_GROUPNAME], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], [FORMER_RESIDENT], [LOCATION_TYPE], [MADE_READY_FLAG], 
            [MAKE_READY_START_DATE], [MAKE_READY_START_DATETIME], [MAKE_READY_START_TIME], [MODIFIED_BY], 
            [MODIFIED_DATE], [MODIFIED_DATETIME], [MOVEIN_DATE], [MOVEOUT_DATE], [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATE], 
            [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATETIME], [ONHOLD_DATE], [ONHOLD_DATEID], [ONHOLD_DATETIME], [PENDING_RESIDENT], 
            [PERMISSION_TO_ENTER_FLAG], [PREFERRED_START_DATE], [PREFERRED_START_DATETIME], [PRIORITY], 
            [PROPERTY_NUMBER], [REQUEST_TIME], [RESIDENT_HOUSEHOLD_ID], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_EMAIL], 
            [RESIDENT_MEMBER_ID], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_PHONE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATEID], 
            [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATETIME], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_NAME], [STATUS], 
            [STATUS_DETAIL], [TECHNICIAN_NAME], [TIME_RANGE_END], [TIME_RANGE_START], [TYPE], [UNIT_ID], 
            [UNIT_NUMBER], [UNIT_NUMBER_EXCLUSION_FLAG], [WORKORDER_NUMBER], [SERVICE_REQUEST_COUNT], 
            [CANCELLED_COUNT], [COMPLETED_COUNT], [IN_PROGRESS_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], 
            [DAYS_BETWEEN_CREATION_AND_ONHOLD], [DAYS_SINCE_ON_HOLD_TOTAL], [ON_HOLD_FLAG], [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT], 
            [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [NET_ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [WEEKEND_DAY_COUNT], [WEEKEND_MINUTE_COUNT], 
            [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [FLAG_OPEN_DAY_VIOLATION], [REQUESTOR_NAME], [SERVICE_PROBLEM]
        )
        SELECT 
            [PROPERTY_KEY], [PROPERTY_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_ID], [SERVICEREQUESTID_EXCLUSION], [SERVICE_REQUEST_NUMBER], 
            [ACTUAL_COMPLETED_BY], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATE], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATEID], [ACTUAL_COMPLETION_DATETIME], 
            [BUILDING_ID], [BUILDING_NUMBER], [CANCEL_DATE], [CANCEL_DATEID], [CANCEL_DATETIME], [CANCELLED_BY], 
            [COMMON_AREA_NAME], [COMPLETED_DATE], [COMPLETE_TIME], [CREATED_BY], [CREATED_DATE], [CREATED_DATEID], 
            [CREATED_DATETIME], 
            LEFT(ISNULL([ENTRY_RELATED_NOTES], ''), 255), -- Match Prod 255
            [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATE], [EXPECTED_COMPLETION_DATETIME], [FLOORPLAN_GROUPNAME], [FLOORPLAN_NAME], 
            [FORMER_RESIDENT], [LOCATION_TYPE], [MADE_READY_FLAG], [MAKE_READY_START_DATE], [MAKE_READY_START_DATETIME], 
            [MAKE_READY_START_TIME], [MODIFIED_BY], [MODIFIED_DATE], [MODIFIED_DATETIME], [MOVEIN_DATE], [MOVEOUT_DATE], 
            [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATE], [MUST_COMPLETE_BY_DATETIME], [ONHOLD_DATE], [ONHOLD_DATEID], [ONHOLD_DATETIME], 
            [PENDING_RESIDENT], [PERMISSION_TO_ENTER_FLAG], [PREFERRED_START_DATE], [PREFERRED_START_DATETIME], 
            [PRIORITY], [PROPERTY_NUMBER], [REQUEST_TIME], [RESIDENT_HOUSEHOLD_ID], 
            LEFT(ISNULL([RESIDENT_MEMBER_EMAIL], ''), 255), -- Match Prod 255
            [RESIDENT_MEMBER_ID], [RESIDENT_MEMBER_PHONE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATE], [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATEID], 
            [SERVICE_REQUEST_DATETIME], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_ID], [SERVICE_REQUEST_SOURCE_NAME], [STATUS], 
            [STATUS_DETAIL], [TECHNICIAN_NAME], [TIME_RANGE_END], [TIME_RANGE_START], [TYPE], [UNIT_ID], 
            [UNIT_NUMBER], [UNIT_NUMBER_EXCLUSION_FLAG], [WORKORDER_NUMBER], [SERVICE_REQUEST_COUNT], 
            [CANCELLED_COUNT], [COMPLETED_COUNT], [IN_PROGRESS_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], 
            [DAYS_BETWEEN_CREATION_AND_ONHOLD], [DAYS_SINCE_ON_HOLD_TOTAL], [ON_HOLD_FLAG], [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT], 
            [ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [NET_ON_HOLD_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [WEEKEND_DAY_COUNT], [WEEKEND_MINUTE_COUNT], 
            [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT], [NET_OPEN_DAY_COUNT_MINUTES], [FLAG_OPEN_DAY_VIOLATION], 
            LEFT(ISNULL([REQUESTOR_NAME], ''), 30),   -- CRITICAL: Match Prod 30
            LEFT(ISNULL([SERVICE_PROBLEM], ''), 255) -- CRITICAL: Match Prod 255
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[WORK_ORDER_REQUESTS_F];

    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        PRINT 'Error: ' + ERROR_MESSAGE();
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

name: YEARS_F_SP
description: TRUNCATE + INSERT from WH_STAGING.dbo.DATE_F into WH_STAGING.dbo.YEARS_F.
sql:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[YEARS_F_SP]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;
    
    BEGIN TRY
        BEGIN TRAN;

        -- 1. TRUNCATE TARGET (Data Refresh)
        TRUNCATE TABLE [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[YEARS_F];

        -- 2. SOURCE TRANSFORMATION LOGIC & INSERT
        -- The ATL "Years" Query uses a GROUP BY on YEAR, YEAR_ID, RELATIVE_YEAR.
        INSERT INTO [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[YEARS_F] (
            [YEAR_KEY],
            [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [YEAR_ID]
        )
        SELECT 
            [YEAR] AS [YEAR_KEY],
            [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [YEAR_ID]
        FROM [WH_STAGING].[dbo].[DATE_F]
        GROUP BY 
            [YEAR],
            [RELATIVE_YEAR],
            [YEAR_ID];

        COMMIT;
    END TRY
    BEGIN CATCH
        IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0 ROLLBACK;
        THROW;
    END CATCH
END

description: Unknown from WH_STAGING.sys.schemas, WH_STAGING.sys.tables into WH_STAGING.sync_tables.EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT.
sql:
CREATE   PROCEDURE [sync_tables].[sp_Prepare_EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT_Reload]
AS
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;

    -- Create schema if missing
    IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.schemas WHERE name = 'sync_tables')
    BEGIN
        EXEC('CREATE SCHEMA sync_tables');
    END

    -- If table exists, truncate it to prep for fresh data
    IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.tables t 
               JOIN sys.schemas s ON t.schema_id = s.schema_id 
               WHERE t.name = 'EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT' AND s.name = 'sync_tables')
    BEGIN
        TRUNCATE TABLE sync_tables.EMP_TITLE_GROUP_MGMT;
    END
END;
